# 13A Research

> Defence and security technology advisory boutique providing expert leadership, research, and mentoring to founders and executives competing in the defence and security sector.

## What they do

13A Research is a London-based consulting boutique focused on complex challenges in the defence and security community. The firm provides expert technology leadership advice, research reporting, and mentoring to founders, CEOs, and industry leaders. It was incorporated in April 2023 and positions itself as a specialist in next-generation science and technology capabilities for defence and security.

## Products and solutions

- **Technology Leadership Advisory** - expert advice on innovation and next-generation science and technology capabilities for the defence and security sector.
- **Research Reporting** - bespoke research and analysis on defence technology topics.
- **Mentoring** - skills development for operating effectively in the defence and security community.

companies.name: 2iC Limited
companies.summary: UK software company providing digital interoperability across disparate devices, platforms and systems in the battlespace.
companies.body:
# 2iC Limited

> UK software company providing digital interoperability across disparate devices, platforms and systems in the battlespace.

## What they do

2iC develops off-the-shelf software that connects users to a growing inventory of disparate devices, platforms and systems, creating a responsive and resilient network with real-time access to sensors, effectors and intelligence products. The company is the inventor of the Lean Services Architecture, a modular and open architecture standard for the battlespace tested and published by the UK Ministry of Defence. It states its software is designed for tactical and DDIL (denied, degraded, intermittent and limited bandwidth) environments.

## Products and solutions

- **2iC NODE** - enterprise licence software suite providing the digital backbone, service discovery and automation across systems and devices.
- **2iC CONNECT** - software connecting disparate devices and systems, including out-of-the-box solutions 2iC CONNECT:UNCREWED (for autonomous and uncrewed systems) and 2iC CONNECT:TAK (for TAK ecosystems).
- **2iC TRUST** - secure and flexible interoperability across different trust domains (classification, nationality or organisation).
- **2iC TOOLKIT** - software for engineers to research, develop and test modular, open and interoperable systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** JOSCAR.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-10** - Spectra Group and 2iC announced a MANET-to-satellite (GENSS) tactical data bridging solution using 2iC software. [source](https://www.2icworld.com/spectra-group-and-2ic-deliver-breakthrough-manet-to-satellite-connectivity/)
- **2025** - 2iC named as part of SCEPTRE, a sovereign UK technology stack of British SMEs, providing the digital backbone. [source](https://sceptre.org.uk/news/uk-smes-unite-to-launch-sceptre-a-next-gen-sovereign-stack/)

## Links

- Website: https://2icworld.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/2icworld

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Companies House, ADS members directory, SCEPTRE and Spectra Group public announcements.

companies.name: 4C Strategies
companies.summary: Resilience, training and exercise management software and advisory services, with a defence customer base across NATO allied armed forces.
companies.body:
# 4C Strategies

> Resilience, training and exercise management software and advisory services, with a defence customer base across NATO allied armed forces.

## What they do

4C Strategies provides organisational readiness, training and exercise management solutions built around its Exonaut software platform, alongside expert advisory and software-related services. The company works across the military, finance, public sector, healthcare and utilities. It supports more than 150 customers, including several NATO allied armed forces, and operates the brand within 4C Group AB (publ), which is listed on the Nasdaq First North Premier Growth Market.

## Products and solutions

- **Exonaut** - software platform for designing, delivering and evaluating training and exercises, with planning tools, scenario generation, MEL/MIL generation, data synchronisation and integrated assessment.
- **Exercise Manager** - software for organisations to design, deliver and evaluate exercises that test resilience and preparedness across scenarios such as fire, cyber attack or crisis.
- **Resilience Platform** - integrated solutions for risk, business continuity, and incident and crisis management, plus training and exercising.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Listing:** parent 4C Group AB (publ) listed on Nasdaq First North Premier Growth Market.

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Australian Department of Home Affairs selected Exonaut to provide the Common Counter Terrorism Exercise Management System (CCTEMS). [source](https://www.cubic.com/news-events/news/cubic-and-4c-strategies-provide-common-counter-terrorism-exercise-management)
- **2025-12** - At I/ITSEC 2025 in Orlando, 4C Strategies showcased Exonaut at a federated simulation event with partners including BAE Systems, MASA Group, PLEXSYS and others, and highlighted new contracts. [source](https://www.janes.com/osint-insights/defence-news/defence/iitsec-25-4c-strategies-expands-exonaut-usage-highlights-new-contracts)

## Links

- Website: https://www.4cstrategies.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/4c-strategies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (4cstrategies.com), LinkedIn company page, Janes, Cubic press release.

# 4E Futures

> Contract electronics manufacturer serving defence, medical, aerospace, and motorsport with low-to-medium volume, high-regulatory PCBA and box-build assembly.

## What they do

4E Futures, trading as 4E Technology, is a Salisbury-based contract electronics manufacturer providing tailor-made, value-added manufacturing solutions for technically demanding electronic products. The company focuses on highly regulated markets including defence, and offers full traceability alongside New Product Introduction support. It has been delivering specialist electronic manufacturing services for over twenty years.

- **NPI and Prototyping** - new product introduction support and prototype manufacture.

# 4E Futures Limited

> UK contract electronics manufacturer specialising in defence, aerospace, medical, and other regulated markets.

## What they do

4E Futures Limited, trading as 4E Technology, provides sub-contract electronics manufacturing and assembly from its facility in Salisbury, Wiltshire. The company serves low-to-medium volume production requirements in defence, aerospace, medical, automotive, and cleantech sectors. For defence clients, it manufactures PCBA assemblies, full box-build units, and complex electronic assemblies including power supplies, inverters, converters, and hybrid circuits for advanced missile controls.

- **PCBA and Box Build Assembly** - Printed circuit board assembly through to full electro-mechanical integration for defence and aerospace applications.

companies.name: AACE
companies.summary: Independent UK defence engineering consultancy providing embedded technical experts across air, land, and maritime domains throughout the CADMID lifecycle.
companies.body:
# AACE

> Independent UK defence engineering consultancy providing embedded technical experts across air, land, and maritime domains throughout the CADMID lifecycle.

## What they do

AACE (Aerospace & Airworthiness Consultancy Enterprises Limited) is a Bristol-based SME founded in 1997 by a former RAF officer. The company provides independent engineering consultancy to MOD and the wider Defence Enterprise, with staff drawn predominantly from military backgrounds. Work spans five core service lines: air safety and engineering, land safety and engineering, maritime safety and engineering, integrated logistics support, and technical publications.

## Products and solutions

- **Air Safety and Engineering** - airworthiness (Type and Continuing), Release to Service, Ship Air Integration, MRP 145 compliance, Human Factors investigation, and RPAS airspace integration.
- **Land Safety and Engineering** - safety case development, hazard analysis, risk management to Def Stan 00-056/00-051, POSMS/POEMS, legislative exemptions, and mid-life upgrade support.
- **Maritime Safety and Engineering** - safety cases for submarines and surface ships, ASEMS frameworks, SIL 2 functional safety documentation, naval certification, and combat systems safety.
- **Integrated Logistics Support** - full CADMID lifecycle ILS programme management, supportability analysis, support solution design, and business case authoring aligned to Def Stan 00-600 and the DLF.
- **Technical Publications** - APs, AESPs, BRs, Illustrated Parts Catalogues, and maintenance manuals aligned to DefStan 00-601 Part 4.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 9001:2015
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant (Silver Award)

## Links

- Website: https://www.aace.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aace-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: aace.co.uk; Companies House (03377828, 10358816); adsgroup.org.uk/members/aerospace-airworthiness-consultancy-enterprises-aace-ltd-1; gov.uk Armed Forces Covenant register; aerospacedefensereview.com/aace; navyleaders.com/exhibitor/aace-ltd.

companies.name: ABD Solutions
companies.summary: Retrofit vehicle autonomy specialist applying driving-robotics technology to defence and industrial fleets.
companies.body:
# ABD Solutions

> Retrofit vehicle autonomy specialist applying driving-robotics technology to defence and industrial fleets.

## What they do

ABD Solutions is a subsidiary of UK-listed AB Dynamics plc, formed to apply the group's proven vehicle automation technology to industrial and defence applications. It specialises in after-market autonomy that can be retrofitted to existing vehicles, using physical driving robotics that control steering, clutch, brake, throttle and gearshift rather than relying on CAN-based integration. This allows almost any vehicle with a steering wheel and pedals, including those with mechanical linkages and manual transmissions, to be automated. Target sectors include defence, mining, construction, materials handling and agriculture.

## Products and solutions

- **Indigo Drive** - a software ecosystem and robotic actuation system that enables defence and industrial vehicles to be automated quickly and cost-effectively. Features include driverless or remote vehicle control, precise path following, task planning, drive-by-wire and robotic actuation, redundant architecture, secure communications and pedestrian detection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024-01-16** - ABD Solutions extended Indigo Drive autonomy to the Australian market. [source](https://im-mining.com/2024/01/16/abd-solutions-bringing-its-indigo-drive-autonomy-to-australian-mining/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.abdsolutions.com/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/abdsolutions

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (abdsolutions.com, including the Defence and About pages), ADS Group member listing, AB Dynamics group information, SDBR News and International Mining coverage of Indigo Drive. ABD Solutions used Indigo Drive to automate a Wolfhound Tactical Support Vehicle in collaboration with NP Aerospace, an engineering authority for the UK MOD protected mobility fleet.

companies.body:
# ABP Technologies

> UK manufacturer of EOD disruptors, remotely operated vehicles, and maritime systems, with products in continuous MOD service since 1966.

## What they do

ABP Technologies designs, manufactures, and provides in-service support for explosive ordnance disposal equipment, remotely operated ground vehicles, and maritime platform systems. Founded as a primary MOD contractor in 1966 and trading from Poole, Dorset, the company has sustained that customer relationship for over fifty years. Products are used by British bomb disposal teams, UK police, emergency services, and international security agencies. The company also provides bespoke engineering design and prototyping, and manages Contractor Logistics Support and Contracting for Availability arrangements, including obsolescence management and in-service modification kits.

## Products and solutions

- **Needle / Needle Plus Disruptor** - precision EOD disruptor for smaller IEDs; in active service with UK MOD.
- **Pigstick / Pigstick Kit** - thin-walled IED disruption system; over thirty years in MOD service.
- **Hotrod / Hotrod Lightweight Disruptor** - EOD disruptor for heavier-walled packages and suitcases.
- **ABL2000 Recoilless Disruptor and De-armer Kit** - designed for medium IEDs and conventional munitions disposal.
- **EOAB Kit** - Explosive Ordnance Assault Breaching kit.
- **ROV/UGV platforms** - ground-based remotely operated vehicles for EOD, military, and security applications.
- **Maritime systems** - platform management consoles, water-cooled cabinets, combat management equipment, and communication systems for surface ships and submarines.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** Armed Forces Covenant signatory

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Exhibited at DSEI 2025, London, stand N4-120. [source](https://www.abp-technologies.co.uk/news/dsei-2025)

## Links

- Website: https://www.abp-technologies.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/abptechnologies

# ABSL Power Solutions

> Designer and manufacturer of lithium-ion and other batteries and power solutions for defence, space and aerospace.

## What they do

ABSL Power Solutions researches, designs and manufactures rechargeable and non-rechargeable batteries, charging solutions, lithium-ion cells and control electronics. It serves defence, space, aerospace, marine and industrial markets. ABSL builds batteries used in military radios and portable communication systems, and in unmanned aerial, undersea and ground vehicles. The UK operation is based at Culham Science Centre in Oxfordshire. ABSL has its roots in AEA Technology and was acquired by the US company EnerSys in 2011; the ABSL brand now sits within EnerSys, which is listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

## Products and solutions

- **ABSL lithium-ion batteries** - battery packs for military vehicles, aircraft, submarines, underwater vehicles, missiles and weapons.
- **Soldier and communications power** - batteries for military radios and portable communication systems.
- **Space batteries** - batteries supplied for satellite and space mission systems.

> Engineering services company specialising in GNSS technology for aerospace, defence and space applications.

## What they do

Accord Global Technology Solutions is an engineering services company with expertise in Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) technology, providing engineering services across aerospace, automotive and digital technology. The business is headquartered in Bangalore, India, and supplies GNSS-based solutions for strategic and space programmes, including work for the Defence Research and Development Organisation and the Indian Space Research Organisation. The company was acquired by Alten S.A. in June 2023 and subsequently renamed ALTEN Global Technologies Private Limited.

companies.name: Accrofab (Alcester) Limited
companies.summary: Manufacturer of fabricated and machined components for the aerospace, defence and power generation sectors.
companies.body:
# Accrofab

> Manufacturer of fabricated and machined components for the aerospace, defence and power generation sectors.

## What they do

Accrofab manufactures complex, high-precision machined and fabricated components, with experience in hard alloys and exotic materials. Capabilities include laser cutting, fabrication, welding, superplastic forming and heat treatment, supporting new product introduction, volume production and legacy platforms. The company operates UK facilities including sites in Alcester and Derby, the latter established in 1977.

## Products and solutions

- **Fabricated and machined components** - precision parts for commercial and military engine programmes and airframe platforms.
- **End-to-end manufacturing** - laser cutting, welding, superplastic forming and heat treatment under one supplier.

# Actica Consulting

> Independent, UK-owned technology and management consultancy supporting public sector, defence and national security programmes.

Actica Consulting is an independent, UK-owned technology and management consultancy based at Surrey Research Park, Guildford. It supports complex, high-security and mission-critical digital transformation programmes across the UK public sector, bringing architecture, data, cyber, transformation and engineering specialisms. The company has experience in defence, police, central and local government, and specialises in supporting the acquisition of ICT solutions, working across both waterfall and agile delivery methodologies.

## What they do

ACUA Ocean designs and builds uncrewed surface vessels (USVs) for ocean monitoring, data collection and maritime security. The company, based at Turnchapel Wharf in Plymouth, focuses on long-endurance platforms built around stable hull designs intended to operate in high sea states for extended periods.

# AdaCore

> Supplier of development and verification tools for safety- and security-critical software.

## What they do

AdaCore develops tools and provides support for the production of safety-critical and security-critical software. Its technologies are used by aerospace, defence and rail contractors for high-integrity systems including tactical command and control, missile and artillery launcher systems, and missile defence. The group is headquartered in New York, with the UK entity AdaCore Ltd (registered office in Yeovil) operating as a centre of excellence for safety- and security-critical software tools, opened in 2019.

## Products and solutions

- **GNAT Pro** - Ada/SPARK development toolchain for high-integrity software, with support for C/C++ and Rust.
- **SPARK Pro** - formal verification toolset for software with stringent security requirements, based on a formally verifiable subset of Ada.
- **QGen** - model-based code generator and static verifier for a safe subset of Simulink and Stateflow models.

# Adarga

> A British AI software company building information intelligence and decision-advantage tools for defence, security and resilience.

## What they do

Adarga develops artificial intelligence software that helps defence, national security and commercial organisations process and analyse large volumes of structured and unstructured data. Its platform fuses multimodal data from sources such as global news, reports and open-source intelligence to surface decision-ready insight. The company also offers a practitioner-led intelligence service, pairing analysts with its tooling to deliver mission-relevant analysis.

## Products and solutions

- **Catalyst** - multidomain data fusion platform underpinning Adarga's AI-driven solutions, combining deep-learning AI with symbolic reasoning for explainable analysis.

# ADDEV Materials UK Limited

> Aerospace and defence materials specialist: chemicals, coatings, adhesives, films, tapes and custom packaging, with a UK operation in Hampshire.

## What they do

ADDEV Materials is a supplier of high-performance materials for the aerospace and defence industries, covering engineered chemical solutions, advanced converting and custom packaging. The group designs custom value-added materials for aircraft manufacturers, equipment suppliers, airlines, MRO providers, operators and defence integrators. Its UK presence was established in 2019 through the acquisition of the Graytone Group, including Pexa and PSG, and the UK entity (formerly Graytone Limited) operates from Bordon, Hampshire. Headquarters of the wider group are in Lyon, France.

## Products and solutions

- **Adhesives, sealants and surface treatments** - aerospace-specification adhesives, sealants, cleaners, solvents and surface preparation fluids.
- **Paints and coatings** - primers, topcoats, conformal coatings, corrosion inhibiting compounds (CICs) and specialty coatings; distribution of brands including AkzoNobel, PPG, Henkel and Sherwin-Williams.
- **Tapes, foams, films and composites** - technical films, tapes, foams, laminates, composite fabrics, prepregs and resins.
- **Converting and engineered components** - die-cut adhesives, foams, films, insulation, gaskets and bonding components.
- **Custom packaging (Andpak)** - repackaging of aerospace chemicals into aerosols, cartridges, syringes, tubes, pouches and bespoke formats.
- **Zip-Chem** - OEM-approved corrosion inhibitors, cleaners and lubricants for airlines, MROs and military operators.

The group serves commercial aviation, business aviation, MRO, space, air defence and land defence markets.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Advai

> UK deep-tech specialist in AI assurance, testing AI and machine-learning systems for robustness, safety and security.

## What they do

Advai is a UK deep-tech company focused on AI safety and security. It tests and evaluates artificial intelligence and machine-learning systems, including large language models and computer vision, so customers can assure them for deployment in business-critical or regulated environments. Its tooling stress-tests AI to find reliable operating boundaries and build early warning systems for natural or adversarial failure. From defence origins, the company now also serves regulated commercial sectors.

companies.name: Advanced Blast & Ballistic Systems Limited
companies.summary: UK developer of active and passive blast-mitigation systems for armoured vehicle occupant survivability, with related emergency descent systems for eVTOL and light aircraft.
companies.body:
# Advanced Blast & Ballistic Systems Limited

> UK developer of active and passive blast-mitigation systems for armoured vehicle occupant survivability, with related emergency descent systems for eVTOL and light aircraft.

## What they do

ABBS develops survivability technology to protect the occupants of armoured vehicles from mine and IED under-belly blast. Its approach combines active systems that counteract the blast with passive shock-absorbing components, and the same rocket-motor expertise is applied to emergency descent systems for eVTOL aircraft through a joint venture. The company sits at the head of a group that includes Advanced Reaction Motor Systems (ARMS) and Active VTOL Crash Prevention (AVCP).

## Products and solutions

- **VGAM (Vehicle Global Acceleration Mitigation)** - patented Linear Rocket Motors (LRM) that counteract mine-blast lifting forces to prevent a vehicle being thrown into the air.
- **VAFS (Vehicle Active Floor System)** - actuators that pull the floor away from occupants' feet to reduce floor-shock injury.
- **CRBP (Composite Reinforced Belly Plate)** - a passive belly plate with composite beams and an energy-absorbing layer to reduce deformation and shock transfer.
- **Minefield breaching vehicle concept** - a vehicle design with built-in mine resilience and protection against RPG and anti-tank missile strikes.
- **Mine-resilient and mine-clearance uncrewed ground vehicles (UGVs)** - concepts applying ABBS technologies to lightweight autonomous platforms.
- **AVCP zero-zero safety system** - ballistic recovery and emergency descent systems for eVTOL and light aircraft (via the AVCP joint venture).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-10-03** - Article published, "Can Europe Create a 'Drone Wall'". [source](https://www.advanced-blast.com/can-europe-create-a-drone-wall/)
- **2025-09-24** - Article published on developing solutions for threats from unmanned aerial systems (UAS). [source](https://www.advanced-blast.com/developing-solutions-for-threats-from-umanned-aerial-systems-uas/)
- **2025-07-12** - Article published, "Making Drone Munitions Safer". [source](https://www.advanced-blast.com/making-drone-munitions-safer/)

## Links

# Advanced Integrated Technologies

> UK electromechanical systems integrator designing and manufacturing UAS airframes, counter-drone platforms, radomes, and composite assemblies for defence and aerospace customers.

## What they do

Advanced Integrated Technologies (trading as AiT) is a Cambridgeshire-based manufacturer incorporated in February 2024. The company takes full responsibility for the design, build, integration, test, and in-service support of complex composite components and electromechanical assemblies, reducing the engineering and integration burden on defence customers. Core focus areas are unmanned air, ground, and maritime vehicles; counter-UAS platforms; and antenna and radome manufacture. AiT operates a clean room facility and a 3.5m autoclave for composite production, and references a design centre in South Africa for airframe manufacturing.

## Products and solutions

- **Fixed-wing and VTOL UAS airframes** - lightweight, cost-effective designs with custom flight control systems, hot-swappable payload bays, and EO/IR and passive RF payload integration.
- **Counter-UAS platform** - integrated C-UAS system built around distributed sensing and electronic engagement; described in company blogs as a next-generation mission system.
- **Antennas and radomes** - radar systems and sensor assemblies for defence applications.
- **Unmanned maritime and ground vehicles** - UUV, USV, and UGV platforms.
- **Ballistic and blast-protected land vehicles** - composite-based protective structures.
- **Composite design, prototyping, and manufacture** - full-cycle service including CFD, FEA, environmental test, and First Article Inspection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory

## Recent news

- **2025** - Published blog on counter-drone platform development: "Rebuilding the Threat: How We're Turning Counter-Drone Platforms Into Next-Gen Mission Systems". [source](https://advanced-tech.uk/blog-post-three)
- **2024** - Completed installation of clean room and commissioned 3.5m autoclave; moved to larger Technical Design Centre. [source](https://www.advanced-tech.uk/from-breakthroughs-to-bold-moves-aits-2024-journey/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/advanced-integrated-technologies-limited-worldwide

## What they do

Advanced Logistics for Aerospace (UK) Limited is the UK entity of ALA Group (A.L.A. S.p.A.), an aerospace and defence supply chain integrator headquartered in Naples, Italy, with offices and operations across Italy, France, Germany, the United Kingdom, Israel and North America. The group describes itself as a single-source partner for the management and distribution of products, services and engineering solutions to aerospace and defence manufacturers, covering both production and aftermarket phases of programmes. The UK company is registered in Esher, Surrey, and was incorporated in 1988 under the former name Specialist Technologies Ltd.

## Products and solutions

- **Aerospace and defence supply chain integration** - distribution and management of hardware, components and engineered products for aerospace and defence OEMs and operators.
- **Production and aftermarket logistics** - supply chain services spanning production support, spare parts distribution, inventory management and in-service support.
- **Defence-sector product supply** - per the ADS member listing, product manufacturing and supply across defence-relevant categories including bomb disposal and explosive search equipment, CBRN and decontamination, asset tracking, replenishment-at-sea, search and rescue, and weapons storage.

companies.body:
# Advanced Systems Understanding (ASU)

> Employee-owned, veteran-led consultancy specialising in enterprise and systems architecture for defence and the wider public sector.

## What they do

Advanced Systems Understanding (ASU) is an employee-owned, veteran-led consultancy operating at the intersection of systems thinking, strategy and transformation. It works with clients across defence, healthcare, transport and beyond, specialising in enterprise, business and solution architecture and in system-of-systems engineering. Its work analyses systems, processes and delivery models to help organisations evolve with clarity.

## Products and solutions

companies.name: Advanced Tactical Resources Limited
companies.summary: Specialist protection and risk management provider delivering training, security services and covert ISR equipment to defence, law enforcement and government.
companies.body:
# Advanced Tactical Resources Limited

> Specialist protection and risk management provider delivering training, security services and covert ISR equipment to defence, law enforcement and government.

## What they do

ATR provides specialist protection and risk management services, focused on training solutions, security strategies, services and specialist equipment. Its Military and Government Division supplies capabilities to defence, law enforcement and government agencies, including support to sensitive ISR and technical surveillance operations. The company also delivers regulated security qualifications, close protection, conflict management and first aid training.

## Products and solutions

- **Covert ISR equipment** - concealment systems, cameras, lenses and imaging components, GPS tracking, covert audio and video recording platforms, sensor and trigger technologies, transmission and specialist communications, and custom power solutions for extended deployments.
- **Technical surveillance training** - hands-on programmes covering technical surveillance operator digital fabrication, mimicry and concealment, and technical operations, tailored to ISR and low-visibility missions.
- **Technical services** - bespoke hide fabrication, technical system integration, product development and engineering support, and consultancy for ISR and covert operational requirements.
- **Security and resilience training** - HEAT, CONDO, close protection, physical intervention, conflict management, trauma first aid and regulated qualifications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group. Signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

companies.summary: Precision engineering company manufacturing springs, wire forms, deep drawn parts and metal inserts for aerospace and other sectors.
companies.body:
# Advanex Europe

> Precision engineering company manufacturing springs, wire forms, deep drawn parts and metal inserts for aerospace and other sectors.

## What they do

Advanex Europe is the European arm of the Advanex Group, a precision engineering business. It designs and manufactures springs (tension, compression and torsion), wire forms, precision pressings and stampings, deep drawn parts, coil thread inserts and metal inserts for composite materials. The company supplies aerospace OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers across civil and defence programmes, using processes including CNC coiling, deep drawing, micro-forming and multi-slide technology. It operates from sites at Southwell and Bilborough in Nottinghamshire and a facility in Prague, Czech Republic, as part of the wider Advanex Group, which is headquartered in Japan.

## Products and solutions

- **Springs and wire forms** - tension, compression and torsion springs and custom wire forms.
- **Deep drawn components** - lightweight, high-strength parts for aerospace systems.
- **Coil thread inserts** - tangless coil thread inserts (KATO).
- **Insert mouldings** - precision metal inserts for composite materials.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.summary: Independent information security and physical security consultancy supporting governance, risk and compliance, including for the defence sector.
companies.body:
# Advent IM

> Independent information security and physical security consultancy supporting governance, risk and compliance, including for the defence sector.

## What they do

Advent IM is an independent information security and physical security consultancy supporting governance, risk and compliance (GRC). It provides consultancy, training, outsourced solutions and testing across information and cyber security, physical security, business continuity, and data protection. In defence it supports adoption of the Secure by Design (SbD) process and works to frameworks including the Cyber Assessment Framework (CAF), JSP 440, ISO 27001 and the NIST Cybersecurity Framework. Its consultants are security vetted.

## Products and solutions

- **Secure by Design (SbD) support** - assurance of MOD capabilities in line with policy.
- **Defence Cyber Certification (DCC)** - supplier cyber assurance across the defence supply chain.
- **Physical security reviews and red teaming** - benchmarking and testing of physical security measures.
- **Training Academy** - SIRO, IAO, data protection and security awareness training.
- **Outsourced security solutions** - contingent security roles supplied on demand.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud; Digital Outcomes and Specialists; Cyber Security Services 3 (CCS)

# AEI Systems

> Designer and manufacturer of medium-calibre cannon and weapon systems for air, land and naval platforms.

## What they do

AEI Systems is a UK defence company specialising in the design, development, test, manufacture, validation and installation of medium-calibre weapons and weapon systems. It has engineering heritage dating to 1961 and works in revolver cannon technology across air, land and naval domains. The company is based in Ascot. Since 2023 it has been a subsidiary of the Turkish defence group Samsun Yurt Savunma (SYS), which acquired a majority stake.

companies.name: AERALIS Ltd
companies.summary: UK developer of a modular family of jet aircraft built around reconfigurable common airframes.
companies.body:
# AERALIS

> UK developer of a modular family of jet aircraft built around reconfigurable common airframes.

## What they do

AERALIS designs a family of modular jet aircraft built around a common core fuselage with interchangeable wing and engine modules, intended to be reconfigured to cover roles from basic and advanced jet training through to aerobatics, display and light combat. The company opened its first site in Bristol and has assembled an industry supply base around the programme.

## Products and solutions

- **AERALIS Advanced Jet Trainer (AJT)** - the initial variant of the modular family, an advanced jet trainer reconfigurable across multiple training and light-combat roles through common modules.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-14** - AERALIS entered administration after its main financial backer withdrew funding, with administrators citing sustained cash-flow pressure linked to delays to the UK Defence Investment Plan. [source](https://www.flightglobal.com/fixed-wing/2026/05/cashflow-pressures-send-uk-modular-trainer-developer-aeralis-into-administration/)

# Aero Metals Alliance UK

> Group of metal suppliers providing materials and supply chain management to aerospace and defence customers.

## What they do

Aero Metals Alliance (AMA) provides materials and supply chain management services to aerospace and defence companies. It brings together metal suppliers (Gould Alloys, Service Centres Aero, Sunshine Metals, PASU Progressive Alloy and Wolften) to offer stockholding, distribution and metal processing through service centres across the Americas, Europe and Asia Pacific. AMA acts as a single point of contact for OEMs and sub-contractors sourcing aeronautical metals, processing and related services.

## Products and solutions

- **Metal supply** - ferrous and nonferrous metals including titanium, nickel, stainless and re-melted alloys, tungsten, molybdenum and tantalum.
- **Processing capabilities** - metal processing to British, American and German specifications and customer-specific grades.

# Aero Solutions UAV Ltd

> UK developer of fixed-wing unmanned aerial systems for defence applications.

## What they do

Aero Solutions UAV Ltd designs, develops and deploys unmanned aerial systems. The company was incorporated in August 2023 and is registered in Hertfordshire. It works with partners across the UK engineering supply chain on military UAV platforms.

## Products and solutions

- **ASX-1** - a fixed-wing UAV platform described as modular and adaptable to customer-specific requirements, with a maximum take-off weight of 35 kg, payload capacity up to 20 kg and endurance up to 3 hours.
- **HAMMER** - a one-way attack drone developed in partnership with Edinburgh Drone Company, carrying a warhead of around 2.5 kg (extendable), with range options of about 22 km standard or up to 50 km with an extended-range kit. Catapult launched.

AeroGlow International, based in Salisbury, supplies survivability systems for military armoured fighting vehicles. The company has worked in soldier safety and escape lighting for around two decades. Its systems are in service on military platforms internationally.

## What they do

Aeromet International is a supplier of aluminium and magnesium castings and fully finished, assembly-ready cast parts for aerospace and defence customers. It has over 40 years of casting experience and operates three UK sites. It supplies aerospace and defence OEMs and supply-chain companies including Airbus, Boeing, Rolls-Royce, Safran and Embraer.

# Aerospace Metal Finishers

> Surface treatment and non-destructive testing provider for the aerospace and defence sectors.

## What they do

Aerospace Metal Finishers, based in Ballymena, provides non-destructive testing and surface treatments for the aerospace and defence sectors. The company was established in 2002 and is part of the Dontaur Group. It holds prime contractor and OEM approvals including Bombardier, Boeing, Airbus, Safran Aircelle, Moog, GE Aerospace, GKN Aerospace and Thales Air Defence.

## Products and solutions

- **Chemical processing** - anodising (hard, tartaric sulphuric, chromic acid, sulphuric acid, boric/sulphuric), passivation, conversion coating, titanium pickle and etch.

- **In-house laboratory** - salt spray corrosion testing, coating thickness and adhesion testing, chemical analysis.

# Aerossurance

> Aberdeen-based aviation consultancy helping organisations procure and assure aviation services across civil and military operations.

## What they do

Aerossurance is an aviation consultancy founded in 2014 and based in Aberdeen, Scotland, supporting customers globally. It helps organisations procure aviation services by identifying requirements, developing technical specifications, conducting market analyses, preparing tenders and draft contracts, and evaluating bids. It helps organisations assure aviation services through reviews, audits, investigations and supplier contract management. The company has worldwide experience across fixed wing, rotary wing and UAS/RPAS operations, onshore and offshore, civil and military.

## Products and solutions

- **Procurement support** - aviation requirements definition, technical specifications, tendering and contract evaluation.
- **Assurance** - aviation reviews, audits, accident investigation and supplier contract management.

# Aerowind Ireland

> Maintenance, repair and overhaul of aviation rotating equipment, based in County Clare, Ireland.

## What they do

Aerowind Ireland Ltd, founded in 1999 and based in Scariff, County Clare, provides maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) of aviation rotating equipment including motors and sub-components such as armatures, field coils, rotors and stators, for OEMs and first tier suppliers. Services span electric motor rewinding, repair, surface treatments and manufacturing assembly, with testing and quality assurance on components such as cabin air compressors and nitrogen generating systems. Aerowind is an ADS member; its head office is in Ireland.

- **MRO** - repair and overhaul of aviation electric motors, armatures, field coils, rotors and stators.

companies.summary: UK sovereign agentic AI platform for defence, intelligence, government and enterprise.
companies.body:
# Agentycs

> UK sovereign agentic AI platform for defence, intelligence, government and enterprise.

## What they do

Agentycs is a UK company building agentic AI that operates across high-side and low-side networks, deployed from a UK sovereign cloud or at the tactical edge. The platform fuses structured, unstructured and sensor data in an AI-native lakehouse and supports hybrid search, natural-language analytics and agentic reasoning. It is designed to run in air-gapped, disconnected and comms-degraded environments without reliance on US hyperscalers or foreign infrastructure.

## Products and solutions

- **Agentycs Platform** - end-to-end AI operating platform spanning a data and knowledge fabric (Atom), inference orchestration (Anima), mission applications (Agent2) and deployment runtime and edge (Apex).
- **Agentycs-in-a-Box (AIB)** - a rugged, self-contained, man-portable AI appliance preloaded with models, lakehouse and agentic stack, able to run offline and reach initial operating capability rapidly.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://agentycs.com

> UK arm of Agilent's Raman spectroscopy business, formerly Cobalt Light Systems, making security and material-identification instruments.

## What they do

Agilent Technologies LDA UK is the UK entity behind the former Cobalt Light Systems, a Harwell spin-out acquired by Agilent Technologies in 2017. It develops and manufactures Raman spectroscopy instruments that identify chemicals and materials through opaque barriers and sealed containers. Applications span aviation security screening, hazardous-material and chemical-warfare-agent identification, and pharmaceutical quality control. The parent, Agilent Technologies, is a US-listed company headquartered in Santa Clara, California; this UK entity is registered in Cheadle, Cheshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Insight200M** - liquid explosive detection system (LEDS) for aviation security, screening common container types for liquid explosives.
- **Resolve** - handheld Raman analyser for rapid identification of explosives, narcotics, toxic industrial chemicals and chemical warfare agents through sealed, opaque containers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2022-11-29** - Agilent deployed its next-generation explosive detection system at London Heathrow Airport. [source](https://www.agilent.com/about/newsroom/presrel/2022/29nov-ca22035.html)
- **2017-07** - Agilent Technologies acquired Raman spectroscopy innovator Cobalt Light Systems. [source](https://www.agilent.com/about/newsroom/presrel/2017/07jul-gp17014.html)

companies.name: AI Score
companies.summary: AI governance and risk management platform for enterprises managing regulated AI workloads.
companies.body:
# AI Score

> AI governance and risk management platform for enterprises managing regulated AI workloads.

## What they do

AI Score is a London-based startup providing a modular, cloud-native platform that gives enterprises visibility and control across their AI estate. It connects third-party SaaS products, models, risks and outcomes into a single view, delivering real-time insight, intelligent scoring and automated safeguards. The platform is described by the company as a control plane for enterprise AI governance, aligning AI usage with policy and covering visibility, compliance, performance analytics and risk management in one layer. The platform is not defence-specific but is relevant to defence buyers managing regulated AI workloads. AI Score was built within GALLOS Technologies, a venture studio for security, defence and resilience companies, and its advisory board includes a former GCHQ director. The company secured around 864,000 euros (roughly 1 million US dollars) in pre-seed funding, announced in November 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **AI Score platform** - model-agnostic AI governance dashboard covering risk scoring, compliance monitoring and automated safeguards across an organisation's AI estate.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- None confirmed from public sources at time of verification.

# Airbus Defence and Space

> The defence and space division of Airbus, designing and building military satellites, secure communications and space systems in the UK.

## What they do

Airbus Defence and Space is the military and space systems division of Airbus, formed in 2014 from the restructuring of EADS. In the UK it designs, manufactures and operates satellites and space systems, with major sites at Stevenage and Portsmouth and further capability in Newport, Guildford, Newcastle and Chippenham. Stevenage is a centre for satellite design, manufacture and operations; Portsmouth houses the largest clean room complex in the UK and develops satellite payloads.

## Products and solutions

- **Skynet** - military satellite communications systems for the UK Ministry of Defence, including the Skynet 6A satellite built in the UK.
- **Oberon** - two synthetic aperture radar satellites providing space-based intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance for the UK MOD.
- **Space systems** - telecommunications, Earth observation, scientific and meteorology satellites and spacecraft propulsion.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Airnesco Group

> Designer and manufacturer of pneumatic barrel cleaning systems for military weapon platforms.

## What they do

Airnesco designs and manufactures specialist compressed air products for bore cleaning applications, supplying air tools and associated equipment to industrial and military markets. The company's weapon care equipment cleans rifled and smooth barrels, mortars and launchers from 12.7mm upwards. From its head office in Kent it works with agents, distributors and licensees internationally.

## Products and solutions

- **Barrel Cleaning System (BCS)** - pneumatically powered system for cleaning smooth and rifled barrels, mortars and launchers of calibre 12.7mm and above.
- **Small Gauge BCS** - for weapon platforms with a calibre between 12.7mm and 40mm.
- **Large Gauge BCS** - for weapon platforms with a calibre between 57mm and 203mm, with larger sizes available.

The Airnesco BCS entered UK MoD trials in the late 1990s and was accepted into service with the Royal Navy and British Army by 2000. It is also used by other armed forces internationally.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# AirTanker

> Operator of the RAF Voyager fleet, delivering air-to-air refuelling and strategic air transport under a long-term MOD contract.

## What they do

AirTanker delivers and supports the Royal Air Force's fleet of 14 Airbus A330-200 Multi-Role Tanker Transport aircraft, designated Voyager in RAF service, under a 27-year Private Finance Initiative contract signed with the Ministry of Defence in 2008. AirTanker Services Limited operates and maintains the fleet, providing air-to-air refuelling, strategic air transport and aeromedical evacuation. The Voyager became fully operational as a tanker in 2013, replacing the VC10. AirTanker is delivered through a partnership of aviation and defence shareholders including Airbus, Babcock, Rolls-Royce and Thales.

## Products and solutions

- **Air-to-air refuelling** - Voyager operating as a dedicated air-to-air refuelling platform able to carry up to 109 tonnes of fuel.
- **Strategic air transport** - passenger and freight air transport for the RAF and government, including aeromedical evacuation.
- **Fleet operation and maintenance** - operation and through-life support of the 14-aircraft Voyager fleet, with surge aircraft available for commercial use and military recall.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# AirTanker Services

> Operator of the Royal Air Force's Voyager air-to-air refuelling and transport fleet.

## What they do

AirTanker Services operates the RAF's fleet of Airbus A330 Multi-Role Tanker Transport aircraft, in RAF service known as Voyager. Voyager is a dedicated air-to-air refuelling platform that also operates in air transport and aeromedical evacuation roles. In 2008 the AirTanker consortium signed a 27-year contract with the Ministry of Defence to deliver and support 14 MRTT aircraft under the Future Strategic Tanker Aircraft (FSTA) programme. AirTanker's responsibilities span aircraft delivery, crew training, maintenance and dispatch.

## Products and solutions

- **Voyager fleet operation** - operation and support of 14 A330 MRTT aircraft for the RAF.
- **Military flying** - delivery of air-to-air refuelling and air transport capability.
- **Maintenance** - end-to-end aircraft maintenance.
- **Training** - aircrew and ground crew training.
- **Civil flying and leasing** - non-core aircraft made available to the civil leasing market.

Nine aircraft form a core fleet for the RAF; the five non-core aircraft are available to the RAF and can also be offered to other parties, including civil leasing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Alchem Technologies Ltd

> Data integration platform provider enabling selective, on-demand data sharing between trusted partners in national security, defence, and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

Alchem Technologies is a data and systems integrator providing technical capabilities in the national security, defence and critical infrastructure sectors. It builds a data integration platform that allows organisations to establish collaborative programmes, verify data quality, and create a single source of truth across partner networks. The platform uses a mesh architecture enabling selective data sharing between trusted partners, with operational data remaining in situ with each data owner. The company positions its mesh architecture as extending beyond defence and border and maritime security into critical national infrastructure monitoring.

## Products and solutions

- **Data Integration Platform** - mesh architecture enabling selective data sharing between trusted partners while preserving data governance and chain of custody with each owning organisation.
- **AI Scaling** - funnels partner data into AI models to improve training quality and output at scale.
- **Data Quality and Lineage** - verifies data quality and maintains certified data attributes and chain of custody across collaborative programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

No frameworks, accreditations or memberships publicly confirmed as at this review.

companies.body:
# Alford Technologies

> Designs and manufactures explosive charge systems for explosive ordnance disposal, counter-IED and breaching.

## What they do

Alford Technologies designs and manufactures user-filled, patented explosive charge container systems used by explosive ordnance disposal (EOD) and counter-IED organisations in military, government and commercial sectors worldwide. Founded in 1985 by Dr Sidney Alford, it supplies explosive solutions for breaching, unexploded ordnance, conventional munitions disposal and improvised explosive device disposal. It also runs Alford Training, delivering counter-IED, EOD and breaching courses at ranges in the South West of England.

## Products and solutions

- **Vulcan** - shaped charge used for bomb disposal and deliberate disruption of unexploded ordnance.
- **Krakatoa** - cutting and shaped charge for demolition and disposal tasks.
- **Pluton** - maritime EOD kit for low-order disposal of underwater unexploded ordnance.
- **REDS** - ROV EOD Deployment System for remote underwater disposal.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Counter-EO UK

- **2026-04-02** - Alford's Vulcan shaped charge used in controlled disposal of a WWII bomb at Singapore Changi Airport. [source](https://www.explosives.net/alford-vulcan-defeats-uxo-singapore-airport/)

companies.name: ALL.SPACE Networks Limited
companies.summary: Develops multi-orbit, multi-network satellite communications terminals for defence and government.
companies.body:
# ALL.SPACE Networks

> Develops multi-orbit, multi-network satellite communications terminals for defence and government.

## What they do

ALL.SPACE develops satellite communications terminals built around a single antenna that connects simultaneously to multiple satellites across different orbits (LEO, MEO, GEO, HEO) and networks. The company markets the result as resilient, jam-resistant communications-on-the-move across land, sea and air, with a dedicated government and defence line of business. It was founded in 2013 as Isotropic Systems and renamed ALL.SPACE in 2022. The company has raised approximately 160 million US dollars, with backers including Seraphim Space, Boeing, AE Industrial Partners, Promus Ventures and BOKA Group.

## Products and solutions

- **Hydra 2** - dual-link, multi-orbit Ka-band mobility terminal.
- **Hydra 4** - quad-link terminal connecting military Ka, commercial Ka, Ku and L-band simultaneously.
- **Hydra MAX** - dual-beam, full-duplex satellite communications terminal for on-the-move connectivity.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Allan Webb

> Supportability engineering and through-life support consultancy for defence and other regulated sectors.

## What they do

Allan Webb is a supportability engineering and asset-management consultancy. It provides support engineering, technical documentation, obsolescence management, NATO codification and integrated logistic support to reduce whole-life cost and increase operational availability. The company works across defence, aerospace, nuclear, rail, industrial and renewables, with many staff drawn from former Ministry of Defence inventory management roles. It operates from sites in Stonehouse, Gloucestershire and Barrow-in-Furness.

## Products and solutions

- **DiamondOM** - obsolescence management service for long-life equipment programmes.
- **Integrated logistic support** - ILS and integrated product support across the equipment lifecycle.
- **Technical documentation** - technical publications, illustration and S-Series standards support.
- **NATO codification** - codification and supply chain data services.

# Allen-Vanguard

> Develops electronic countermeasure systems to defeat radio-controlled improvised explosive devices and small unmanned aerial systems.

## What they do

Allen-Vanguard designs and manufactures electronic countermeasure (ECM) equipment for defeating radio-controlled improvised explosive devices (RCIEDs) and the threat from small drones. The company supports bomb disposal technicians, armed forces, and protective security teams operating in high-threat environments. It is based in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, and is owned by US private equity firm Versa Capital Management, which acquired the business in 2009.

## Products and solutions

- **EQUINOX NG** - vehicle-based electronic countermeasure system built around electronic warfare hardware standards.

companies.name: Allied
companies.summary: European defence procurement and production platform connecting engineers, manufacturers and technology partners across Europe and Ukraine to source and integrate defence systems at speed.
companies.body:
# Allied
> European defence procurement and production platform connecting engineers, manufacturers and technology partners across Europe and Ukraine to source and integrate defence systems at speed.

## What they do

Allied (Allied Adaptive Industries, trading as A2I) is a UK defence procurement and production platform. The company describes itself as building infrastructure that connects capable engineers, manufacturers and technology partners across Europe and Ukraine to get their systems into the field, on a peer-to-peer partner model rather than a traditional prime-subcontractor hierarchy. It frames the problem it addresses as one of production capacity rather than a lack of technology. The model is integration-led rather than end-to-end product development: Allied sources and combines third-party systems, including drones, air defence systems and software, and bundles them with support services into contract solutions for government customers. Allied is backed by Notion Capital and 1991 VC, and was co-founded by a former Royal Marines officer.

## Products and solutions

- **Arena** - a marketplace platform for defence technology systems, sub-systems, components and related professional services, connecting suppliers with government and industry buyers.
- **AlliedOS** - a platform layer supporting the marketplace's digital procurement tooling.
- Access to the marketplace is free for participating companies and governments; Allied's stated business model takes a transaction fee on sales made through the platform, alongside tiered subscriptions for support services and digital procurement tools.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

No frameworks, accreditations or memberships publicly confirmed as at this review.

## Recent news

- **2024-11-25** - Profile and interview covering the company's launch, model and investors (Notion Capital, 1991 VC). [source](https://sifted.eu/articles/defence-tech-startups-government-procurement-company)

# Alloyed

> Designs advanced metal alloys and additive manufacturing solutions for aerospace, space, and high-technology applications.

## What they do

Alloyed Ltd, formerly OxMet Technologies, is a University of Oxford spin-out that develops proprietary metal alloys and end-to-end metal additive manufacturing for aerospace and other demanding sectors. Its Alloys-by-Design platform uses predictive modelling to design alloys that balance properties such as high-temperature strength and printability. The company is based in Yarnton, Oxfordshire.

# Alpha 56 Solutions Ltd

> Veteran-owned tactical communications and TAK integration specialist delivering deployable C2 architectures, MANET radio integration, and specialist training to UK defence and government.

## What they do

Alpha 56 Solutions delivers tactical communications systems, end-to-end system integration, and specialist training built around the Android Tactical Assault Kit (ATAK) ecosystem. The company serves dismounted, mounted, and headquarters roles, providing complete deployable communication architectures combining MANET mesh radios, SATCOM, LTE connectivity, drone integration, and ruggedised compute hardware. Alpha 56 describes itself as the UK lead TAK training subject-matter expert and a single point of supply for tactical and strategic communications, from system integration through to through-life support.

## Products and solutions

- **Dismounted Tactical Systems** - body-worn and OEM radio modules for dismounted personnel supporting live video, ISR feeds, and C2 data on the move.
- **Mounted and HQ Tactical Systems** - deployable C2 systems integrating LTE, TAK, and existing communications infrastructure for vehicles and command posts.
- **Silvus MANET Radios** - official UK supplier and integrator of Silvus StreamCaster radios into TAK-centric architectures.
- **ATAK and TAK Training** - specialist training in the Android and Windows Tactical Assault Kit ecosystem.
- **SATCOM Integration** - agnostic SATCOM and radio connectivity for global coverage at the tactical edge.
- **INVISIO Tactical Audio** - reseller and integrator of INVISIO tactical headsets and hearing protection.

# Alpine Eagle Defence

## What they do

Alpine Eagle builds airborne counter-drone systems for defence and security applications. Its system integrates multi-sensor detection, fire control and strike into a single networked capability. The company was founded in 2023 in Germany and announced expansion into the UK in July 2025, with plans for a UK base covering business development, manufacturing and research. Alpine Eagle Defence Ltd is the UK-registered entity; the group is headquartered in Germany.

# Amentum

> A global engineering and project delivery company supporting UK defence, nuclear and energy programmes from its Warrington base.

## What they do

Amentum is a global engineering, project management and solutions integration company. Its UK arm is headquartered in Warrington and employs more than 6,000 people, providing programme, project and engineering services to major UK defence, nuclear and energy organisations. Its UK defence work includes safety and technology services for the Royal Navy's nuclear submarines, management of the UK military training estate for the Defence Infrastructure Organisation, and engineering support for the Atomic Weapons Establishment. The parent company is headquartered in Chantilly, Virginia, USA.

- **Submarine safety and technology services** - supporting the Royal Navy submarines that deliver Operation Relentless.
- **Hypersonic capability development** - systems engineering, mission planning, test design and safety systems under the UK's Hypersonic Technologies and Capability Development Framework.
- **Nuclear engineering and decommissioning** - design, safety case and project management at Sellafield and other UK nuclear sites.
- **Training estate management** - maintenance of the UK military training estate.

companies.body:
# Amfax

> Test engineering company designing and manufacturing automated test equipment and related hardware for the aerospace and defence sectors.

## What they do

Amfax designs, builds and supports automated test equipment (ATE) and test engineering solutions, alongside electronic, electrical and mechanical engineering services. It provides bespoke cable, harness and wiring loom manufacture and test fixtures. The company is a National Instruments system integrator partner, with LabVIEW and TestStand at the core of its software work.

## Products and solutions

- **Automated test equipment (ATE)** - design and build of PXI-based and custom test systems.
- **Test fixtures, cables and harnesses** - bespoke interconnect and wiring loom manufacture.
- **PCB assembly inspection** - inspection systems supplied through the Amfax A3DI brand.
- **Test software** - LabVIEW and TestStand development, plus the SAM test executive.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 Rev D; Cyber Essentials; ISO 9001.
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Midlands Aerospace Alliance.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/amfax

companies.name: Amphenol Limited
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of high-performance interconnect systems and connectors for military aircraft, naval, ground, space and soldier-system applications.
companies.body:
# Amphenol

> UK manufacturer of high-performance interconnect systems and connectors for military aircraft, naval, ground, space and soldier-system applications.

## What they do

Amphenol Limited designs, manufactures and supplies connectors and cable assemblies for harsh-environment defence and aerospace applications. Its products cover circular and rectangular connectors, hermetic and fibre-optic connectors, cable assemblies and EMI/EMP filter connectors. The UK business is based in Whitstable, Kent, and is part of the US-listed Amphenol Corporation.

## Products and solutions

- **MIL-DTL-38999 circular connectors** - standard military circular interconnect range.
- **Rhino and Raptor series** - high-power and high-voltage connectors for vehicle and electric-flight applications.
- **Databus connectors** - MIL-STD-1553B data transmission interconnect.
- **Fibre-optic connectors and cable assemblies** - high-speed data interconnect for airborne and ground systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024-06-25** - Amphenol Ltd introduced its Molliflex flat and foldable power and data cable. [source](https://www.amphenol.co.uk/article/introducing-molliflex/)

companies.body:
# AMS Global Solutions

> Defence support services provider specialising in maintenance, repair and overhaul of military land systems and equipment.

## What they do

AMS provides defence support services for military land systems and equipment, including maintenance, repair, overhaul and modernisation programmes, logistics and end-to-end supply chain. It works for governments across Europe, Asia, Africa and the Middle East. The company is also referred to as AMS Integrated Solutions and operates from offices in Exeter, Dubai and Florida.

## Products and solutions

- **Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul (MRO)** - through-life equipment support and modernisation programmes.
- **Field Support Representatives (FSR)** - frontline technical support working alongside armed forces personnel.
- **Technical Training Services** - structured training programmes for equipment sustainment.
- **Supply Chain Services** - sourcing, procurement and logistics, including spare parts and defence vehicle procurement.

companies.name: AmSafe Bridport Limited
companies.summary: Engineered textile manufacturer producing safety, restraint and protection products for the aerospace and defence markets.
companies.body:
# AmSafe Bridport

> Engineered textile manufacturer producing safety, restraint and protection products for the aerospace and defence markets.

## What they do

AmSafe Bridport designs and manufactures engineered textile solutions for aerospace and defence, covering airframe restraints, barrier systems, cargo handling, air cargo covers and vehicle armour protection. It takes products from conceptual design through analysis, testing and delivery, with accreditation from the CAA, FAA and government bodies. The company is headquartered in Bridport, Dorset, and is part of the US-listed TransDigm Group, which acquired the AmSafe business in 2012.

## Products and solutions

- **Cargo restraint** - pallet nets and cargo securement systems, including the Pallet Net Zero range.
- **Cabin safety** - installed physical secondary barrier systems for aircraft.
- **Fire protection** - fire containment products.
- **Defence** - troop and vehicle protection solutions, including RPG protection armour and airframe restraints.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of secure remote computing and infrastructure for government, defence and security organisations.
companies.body:
# Amulet Hotkey

> Designer and manufacturer of secure remote computing and infrastructure for government, defence and security organisations.

## What they do

Amulet Hotkey designs, manufactures and integrates secure remote computing solutions for government, defence and financial-services customers. Its infrastructure centralises compute in the data centre and delivers it to thin and zero clients and remote workstations, keeping data off endpoint devices. Products are engineered and manufactured in the UK and tested for use across land, air and sea in Five Eyes nations. The company was previously named Amulet Electronics Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **Secure thin and zero clients** - endpoint devices designed to keep data within the data centre, including the MagNOS zero client.
- **CoreStation remote workstations** - dedicated high-performance remote workstation platforms (RX360, RX660).
- **DX1500 secure client** - thin client designed for security and reliability.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.summary: Belfast data and AI company, with a defence and security capability embedding AI into hardware platforms for edge analytics.
companies.body:
# Analytics Engines

> Belfast data and AI company, with a defence and security capability embedding AI into hardware platforms for edge analytics.

## What they do

Analytics Engines helps organisations use data and artificial intelligence across AI strategy, data science, data engineering and delivery enablement. It works as a data services consultancy rather than a single-product vendor. Alongside commercial verticals it has a defence and security thread, embedding AI directly into hardware platforms for analytics at the point of collection.

## Products and solutions

- **Panoramic AI** - named AI offering on the company's site.
- **Edge analytics for defence** - AI embedded in hardware platforms for real-time sensor data processing, anomaly detection and classification in austere or contested environments, keeping data secure and sovereign.
- **Service lines** - data science, data engineering, AI strategy and delivery enablement.

companies.name: Anartes
companies.summary: UK defence procurement and supply specialist providing COTS and bespoke hardware, including FPV drone systems, to the MOD, Armed Forces, police, and government agencies.
companies.body:
# Anartes

> UK defence procurement and supply specialist providing COTS and bespoke hardware, including FPV drone systems, to the MOD, Armed Forces, police, and government agencies.

## What they do

Anartes is a Section 5 certified UK defence supplier providing specialist procurement, supply chain, and distribution services to the MOD, British Army, police, and government agencies. They source and supply commercial off-the-shelf and bespoke hardware, operating secure UK-based storage and distribution. The company also partners with manufacturers to bring emerging technologies including unmanned ground vehicles to the UK defence market.

## Products and solutions

- **FPV Drone Kits** - supply of 5-inch, 8-inch, and 10-inch quadcopter FPV drone systems, batteries, and goggles for British Army strike pilot training.
- **Defence Procurement Services** - specialist sourcing for MOD, law enforcement, and government customers.
- **Unmanned Systems** - supply of unmanned ground vehicles via partnership with XRC Robotics.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Section 5 Firearms Act certification; Armed Forces Covenant signatory
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-10** - MOD awarded Anartes a contract worth up to £4.17 million for FPV drone kits and training systems (FPV Tranche 2 Kits and Ancillaries); initial order value £2.28 million covering 1,000+ units across three drone sizes. [UK Defence Journal](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk)

## Links

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: ADS Group member directory; Companies House (14161461); GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register; UK Defence Journal; The Defence Post; SUAS News.

# Anduril Industries (UK)

> The UK arm of US defence technology company Anduril Industries, developing autonomous systems, drones and surveillance technology.

## What they do

Anduril Industries UK Ltd is the British subsidiary of Anduril Industries, a US defence technology company that develops drones, autonomous weapons systems, surveillance technology and robotics. The UK operation houses engineering and business development teams and supports Anduril's work with UK and European customers, including the Ministry of Defence. The company has stated plans to establish a UK manufacturing and research and development site to act as its European headquarters.

companies.body:
# Anglesey Associates

> Defence and space consultancy linking niche suppliers to prime contractors and public sector clients in the UK and allied nations.

## What they do

Anglesey Associates provides consultancy and market research linking niche suppliers in the defence and space sectors to prime contractors and public sector clients in the UK and allied or NATO countries. It helps defence and space businesses enter new markets and pursue opportunities with the UK MOD and prime contractors. The team is drawn from former UK military aviators and defence procurement specialists, several ex-MOD or Dstl.

## Products and solutions

- **Analysis and research** - market intelligence, policy briefing and capability development including technology roadmaps and TRL/MRL work.
- **Product development** - storyboarding, bespoke collateral and innovation bids, with stated experience of DASA and Innovate UK submissions.
- **On-premises services** - joint project teams (P3M), tender support for MOD and other public bodies, and red teaming.
- **Bespoke software tools** - data analytics for supply chain analysis and live logistics tracking.

# Angloco

> British manufacturer of fire fighting and rescue vehicles, including airport crash tenders and vehicles for the UK Ministry of Defence.

## What they do

Angloco designs and manufactures fire fighting and rescue vehicles, with distribution and after-sales service worldwide. Its vehicles and equipment serve petro-chemical, industrial, airport, municipal, rescue and defence applications, with customers in over 50 countries. Most vehicles are custom-built to individual customer requirements.

## Products and solutions

companies.name: ANGOKA Limited
companies.summary: Belfast cyber-security company securing machine-to-machine communications for connected systems and smart mobility.
companies.body:
# ANGOKA

> Belfast cyber-security company securing machine-to-machine communications for connected systems and smart mobility.

## What they do

ANGOKA is an IoT and machine-to-machine security company protecting communications for smart cities, smart mobility and connected industrial systems. Headquartered in Belfast, it has held offices in London and The Hague. Its patented approach secures the device and its identity rather than the network, safeguarding the integrity and provenance of machine-to-machine data even across untrusted networks.

## Products and solutions

- **Device identity and M2M security** - solutions that create trusted connections between machines, protecting communication integrity and data provenance for connected and autonomous systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Ankasa

> UK systems engineering and technical assurance SME specialising in tactical communications and C4I programmes for the British Army and MOD.

## What they do

Ankasa provides independent systems engineering and technical assurance services to MOD teams and industry partners on complex defence communications programmes. Core specialism is tactical information systems, with sustained delivery on the British Army's Bowman/BCIP programme, Skynet 5, and current programmes including Future C4I and Land Deployable C4. Services include programme technical assurance, acceptance, governance, vendor-independent process development, and knowledge transfer.

## Products and solutions

- **Systems Engineering and Technical Assurance** - programme-level technical assurance and acceptance support for large-scale MOD communications programmes.
- **Tactical Network Expertise** - specialist knowledge of tactical routing, bearers and radios, network modelling, and battlefield management applications.

companies.body:
# Anschuetz UK

> UK naval navigation subsidiary of the German Anschütz group, supporting and integrating Royal Navy bridge and navigation systems.

## What they do

Anschuetz UK provides in-service support to Warship Integrated Navigation and Bridge Systems in the Royal Navy, and integrates navigation and surveillance systems in the UK. It is based at Portsdown Technology Park overlooking Portsmouth Harbour, positioned for waterfront response to ships at Portsmouth Naval Base and deploying engineers UK-wide. It is the UK entity of the Anschütz group, headquartered in Kiel, Germany, and ultimately owned by DMB Holding following the group's separation from Raytheon in 2023.

## Products and solutions

- **Warship Integrated Navigation and Bridge Systems** - design, integration and in-service support for Royal Navy warships including Type 45, Type 26 and Type 31.
- **SYNAPSIS NAVAL** - integrated navigation system being installed on the Type 26 (HMS Glasgow).
- **SMARTBLUE** - modular surveillance system for coastal surveillance and waterway management.
- **Gyrocompasses and bridge systems** - parent group navigation portfolio including ECDIS and steering control.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus.
