companies.name: ANSYS UK Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Ansys, the engineering simulation software company whose tools are used across aerospace and defence.
companies.body:
# ANSYS UK

> UK subsidiary of Ansys, the engineering simulation software company whose tools are used across aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Ansys develops engineering simulation software that predicts how product designs behave in real-world environments, spanning structures, fluids, electromagnetics and multiphysics. ANSYS UK Limited is the Sheffield-registered UK entity of Ansys Inc, headquartered in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania. Ansys was acquired by Synopsys in July 2025 and is now a wholly owned subsidiary of that US company. Its simulation tools are used across aerospace and defence, supported by a dedicated public defence industry programme.

## Products and solutions

- **Ansys Mechanical** - structural finite element analysis.
- **Ansys Fluent** - computational fluid dynamics for fluid flow, heat transfer and reactions.
- **Ansys HFSS** - 3D electromagnetic simulation used for antenna design in aerospace and defence.
- **Ansys LS-DYNA** - explicit multiphysics for crash and impact, used in aerospace and military structural analysis.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, listed under Professional Services.

## Recent news

- **2025-07-17** - Synopsys completed its acquisition of Ansys; Ansys common stock was delisted from NASDAQ. [source](https://news.synopsys.com/2025-07-17-Synopsys-Completes-Acquisition-of-Ansys)

## Links

- Website: https://www.ansys.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ansys-inc

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources used: Ansys website including its defence industry page, ADS members directory, Companies House (03917515), Synopsys acquisition press release. UK entity of Ansys Inc (Canonsburg, USA), now owned by Synopsys; LinkedIn line is the global Ansys company page.

companies.name: Antillion
companies.summary: Defence and security product and services company designing deployable, ruggedised edge-computing systems.
companies.body:
# Antillion

> Defence and security product and services company designing deployable, ruggedised edge-computing systems.

## What they do

Antillion is a product and services company based in Bristol, focused on the defence and security sectors. It designs edge-computing solutions that bring data-centre performance to defence, first-responder and security teams operating in challenging environments. The company has in-house mechanical and software design and build capability and integrates its systems into customer platforms. Antillion has over a decade of experience supporting NATO and UK MOD programmes, with UK offices in Bristol, Aylesbury and Tring and a US presence in Herndon, Virginia.

## Products and solutions

- **PACE FRONTIER** - purpose-built rugged edge compute platform for tactical field use, with a modular, shock-resistant design for secure high-performance computing in extreme environments.
- **PACE AIR** - edge computing platform for high-performance data processing tailored to specific operational contexts.
- **Deployable ruggedised systems** - tactical cloud and edge orchestration capabilities, including Azure Stack HCI deployments and automation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Partnerships:** systems integrator for Everfox cross-domain and high-assurance cyber security capabilities.

## Recent news

[source](https://www.defenseadvancement.com/news/antillion-enters-partnership-to-secure-expand-deployable-edge-capabilities/)

companies.name: APC Technology Group Ltd
companies.summary: Specialist distributor and systems integrator of electronic components and sub-systems for the defence, avionics and aerospace sectors.
companies.body:
# APC Technology Group

> Specialist distributor and systems integrator of electronic components and sub-systems for the defence, avionics and aerospace sectors.

## What they do

APC Technology Group is a UK and Ireland distributor and specialist for over 100 global electronic-technology manufacturers, providing design-in, specification and sourcing of specialist electronic components, control technologies and connectivity products. Its main focus, accounting for the majority of its sales, is the defence, avionics and aerospace sectors, where mission-critical reliability is required. It supports defence manufacturers and military primes with high-reliability and MIL-STD technology for naval, land and avionic applications. It is part of Certify Holdings.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence-grade computing** - rugged laptops, tablets and displays, high-performance computing and MIL-STD VPX solutions for C4IS and military networking, built to SWaP-C constraints.
- **RF and microwave** - RF sensors, military-spec connectors and sub-systems for secure communications, navigation, electronic warfare and radar.
- **Mission-critical components** - analogue and mixed-signal ICs for flight control, navigation and engine management; rigid-flex PCBs; power and protection solutions.
- **Component sourcing and testing** - anti-counterfeit and electrical testing to AS6171 for UK defence and aerospace customers.
- **SCIF** - turnkey design and installation of Secure Compartmented Information Facilities.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, AS9120, Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, UKspace.

[source](https://apctech.com/news/apc-strengthens-its-specialist-electronic-components-and-systems-offering-for-mission-critical-aerospace-and-defence-applications-at-dsei-2025.html)

# Apec Systems

> UK designer and manufacturer of bespoke covert camera and video surveillance systems for police, government and military customers.

## What they do

Apec Systems is an independently owned UK designer and manufacturer of bespoke camera and covert video surveillance solutions. It has operated in the government, law enforcement and security sectors for over 15 years, supplying short, medium and long-range surveillance camera systems to police, government agencies and military customers globally. The company emphasises VIP protection and operational surveillance.

## Products and solutions

- **Covert video surveillance systems** - bespoke camera solutions for short, medium and long-range surveillance.
- **Surveillance vehicle conversions** - whole-vehicle platform integration for mobile surveillance.
- **Deployed observation systems** - off-vehicle stand-off observation and intelligence gathering.
- **Camera technologies** - low-light, pan-and-tilt, thermal and infrared imaging, and CCTV/ANPR cameras with control systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

## Links

# APEL

> Manufacturer of precision fasteners and machined components for the aerospace and defence industry.

## What they do

APEL Limited, established in 1965, is a manufacturer and supplier of precision fasteners and machined parts to the aerospace and defence industry. It supplies a worldwide customer base from its facility in Wilmslow, Cheshire. Its stated customers include BAE Systems, Airbus, Spirit AeroSystems, Bombardier and Beechcraft.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision aerospace fasteners** - bolts, nuts and machined fastening components for airframe and aircraft applications.
- **Precision machined parts** - CNC-turned and milled components for aerospace and defence platforms, produced on sliding-head lathes and machining centres with CMM inspection.

- **Accreditations:** Nadcap; BSI-certified quality management.

companies.name: APH10
companies.summary: Software supply chain security company helping organisations identify and manage risks from complex and potentially compromised software supply chains.
companies.body:
# APH10

> Software supply chain security company helping organisations identify and manage risks from complex and potentially compromised software supply chains.

## What they do

APH10 is a UK software supply chain security company, registered as APH10 Limited. The company addresses the growing threat of software supply chain attacks, giving organisations the tooling and advice to manage complex dependency chains and identify vulnerabilities before they are exploited. Its work centres on Software Bill of Materials (SBOM), helping organisations understand the components of their software and the risks attached to them. APH10 operates within the D3IP community at the Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park.

## Products and solutions

- **SBOMLens** - product for managing and reviewing Software Bills of Materials.
- **SBOM consulting** - developing an SBOM programme to understand software components and associated risks.
- **Assessments and audits** - reviews of secure development and Secure-by-Design processes, using the OWASP SAMM framework to assess development process maturity.
- **Training** - training in the use and benefits of SBOMs, secure software development and the use of open source software.
- **Design and implementation review** - review of software designs and implementations for security vulnerabilities, with additional cyber security services such as training, audit and penetration testing offered through partners.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- None confirmed from public sources at time of verification. APH10 references use of the OWASP SAMM framework in its assessment methodology.

## Links

- Website: https://aph10.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Company website (aph10.com), including Services and SBOM pages.

companies.name: APPH Limited
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of landing gear and hydraulic systems for civil and military aircraft, part of Canada's Heroux-Devtek.
companies.body:
# APPH

> UK manufacturer of landing gear and hydraulic systems for civil and military aircraft, part of Canada's Heroux-Devtek.

## What they do

APPH, trading as Heroux-Devtek UK, is a supplier of landing gear solutions for all aircraft types, including military helicopters, fighter jets, civil airliners and business jets. It designs, engineers, manufactures and provides aftermarket support for landing gear and hydraulic systems and sub-systems for fixed and rotary wing aircraft, for both OEM and aftermarket. It operates UK sites at Runcorn (Cheshire) and Kirkby-in-Ashfield (Nottinghamshire). It is part of Heroux-Devtek Inc. of Quebec, Canada, which was taken private by US firm Platinum Equity in February 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Landing gear systems** - design and manufacture for fixed and rotary wing aircraft. Design programmes include the BAE Hawk, Saab Gripen, AW101 Merlin, Leonardo C-27J Spartan, and components for the Embraer KC-390.
- **Hydraulic systems** - assemblies for landing gear and aircraft systems.
- **Aerospace filtration** - fuel and oil filters.
- **Aftermarket and MRO** - spares, overhaul and support, including MoD and US military fleet support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001, Nadcap, EASA Part 145, ITAR.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-02-11** - Heroux-Devtek, APPH's parent, completed its acquisition by Platinum Equity and delisted from the TSX. [source](https://www.platinumequity.com/news/platinum-equity-completes-acquisition-of-heroux-devtek/)

## What they do

Applied Intuition UK is the UK arm of Applied Intuition, a vehicle intelligence company headquartered in Mountain View, California. The UK subsidiary was established to deliver autonomy management and development systems for existing and next-generation defence platforms. It describes itself as a sovereign UK subsidiary working across air, space, land and sea domains.

Appvia builds and operates secure cloud platforms, combining engineering services with open-source tooling. companies.body:
# APS Aegis

> Specialist provider of high security perimeter protection, access control, detection and monitoring systems.

## What they do

APS Aegis supplies high security perimeter protection, access control, detection and monitoring systems for sensitive and critical sites. It offers land and marine protection, detection systems ranging from land-based stations to drone detection, access control with biometric integration, and full turnkey security solutions including installation and maintenance.

## Products and solutions

- **Anti-ram products** - tested and certified (K4, K12 and British Standards) rising road blockers, automatic bollards and a Tyre Killer Barrier System to protect against vehicular attack.
- **Detection systems** - passive and discreet sensor systems including land-based stations and drone detection, for ports, harbours, pipelines and other critical applications.
- **Access control** - centrally logged personnel and visitor control with biometric recognition integration.

# APSYS Risk Engineering

> Risk management and safety engineering consultancy, an Airbus Group subsidiary, supporting aerospace and defence certification.

## What they do

APSYS is an engineering services company headquartered in Paris and a subsidiary of the Airbus Group, with operations including the UK. Its public self-description covers systems safety and certification, process assurance (DO178C and DO254), reliability, availability and maintainability (RAMS), integrated logistic support, and safety management systems. It supports certification for aircraft manufacturers and equipment suppliers across civil (FAA, EASA) and military environments.

The UK entity is registered at Companies House under company number 07541925; that registration is now recorded under the name Airbus Protect Limited, while the ADS membership and prior public profile use the APSYS Risk Engineering name. The UK operation has worked from Bristol and Aberdeen.

## Products and solutions

- **Systems safety and certification** - safety analysis and certification support for aerospace and defence systems.
- **Process assurance** - DO178C and DO254 compliance support.
- **RAMS and ILS** - reliability, availability and maintainability analysis and integrated logistic support.

# AQ Wiring Systems Rockford

> Manufacturer of cable assemblies, wiring harnesses and system-level electrical equipment for the aerospace, defence and industrial markets.

## What they do

AQ Wiring Systems Rockford designs, manufactures, tests and delivers system-level electrical equipment, from wiring harnesses and electro-mechanical sub-assemblies through to complete systems. It describes itself as the UK's largest independent provider of wiring, interconnect and system solutions for the aerospace, defence and industrial markets. The business has operated since 1978 and runs sites at Rendlesham, Worksop and Salisbury. It was formerly Rockford Components Limited and was acquired by the Swedish AQ Group AB in July 2024.

## Products and solutions

- **Cable assemblies and wiring harnesses** - including hermetically sealed and over-braided harnesses, over-moulded connectors and high-speed USB and ethernet.
- **System-level electricals** - looms, box builds, control panels, racks and electro-mechanical assemblies.
- **Lifecycle services** - design, rapid prototyping, on-site installation, production, logistics, spares and obsolescence management.

companies.name: Aquark Technologies Limited
companies.summary: Southampton quantum-technology company building miniaturised, deployable cold-atom hardware.
companies.body:
# Aquark Technologies

> Southampton quantum-technology company building miniaturised, deployable cold-atom hardware.

## What they do

Aquark Technologies, a spin-out associated with the University of Southampton, develops miniaturised cold-atom quantum hardware for sensing and timing. Its technology laser-cools atoms to near absolute zero, packaged small enough to be portable and deployable. The company targets accuracy, precision and stability for critical operations across defence and industry.

## Products and solutions

- **AQlock** - described by the company as the first commercially available cold-atom atomic clock designed and built in the UK.
- **Cold-atom quantum sensing hardware** - deployable cold-atom systems for navigation, timing and sensing applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** awarded an Innovate UK contract to develop a high-performance cold atom clock.

## Recent news

- **2025-04** - Aquark deployed cold-atom quantum technology underwater, trapping ultra-cold atoms during a trial aboard the National Oceanography Centre autonomous submersible Boaty McBoatface. [source](https://thequantuminsider.com/2025/04/23/quantum-mcquantumface-aquark-deploys-cold-atom-quantum-tech-underwater-in-boaty-mcboatface-test/)
- **2024-11** - Aquark trialled cold-atom technology with the Royal Navy for covert monitoring at sea aboard HMS Pursuer. [source](https://www.uktech.news/quantum/southampton-startup-trials-quantum-technology-with-royal-navy-20241101)

## Links

- Website: https://www.aquarktechnologies.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aquark-technologies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Aquark Technologies website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House, Optica, The Quantum Insider, UKTN.

# Arc Additive

> Scottish supplier of large-scale wire-arc additive manufacturing (WAAM) for metal parts, including aerospace and defence applications.

## What they do

Arc Additive industrialises large-scale metal 3D printing using wire-arc additive manufacturing (WAAM). The company runs a factory in Livingston, West Lothian, and prints in superalloys and critical metals including titanium, Inconels, stainless steels and aluminium. Its stated focus is certified metal part production that reduces lead times and reliance on global supply chains in sectors including aerospace and defence.

## Products and solutions

- **WAAM part production** - large-scale directed-energy-deposition (DED) wire-arc additive manufacture of metal components.
- **AML3D ARCEMY distribution** - appointed in 2025 as a non-exclusive UK and Europe distributor for AML3D's ARCEMY wire-arc metal additive manufacturing systems.

companies.name: Arcani Systems
companies.summary: UK developer of passive acoustic sensing technology for counter-UAS and ground threat detection, selected into the NATO DIANA 2026 Challenge Programme.
companies.body:
# Arcani Systems

> UK developer of passive acoustic sensing technology for counter-UAS and ground threat detection, selected into the NATO DIANA 2026 Challenge Programme.

## What they do

Arcani Systems develops the HARK (Hostile Acoustic Reconnaissance Kit) sensor system: a passive distributed acoustic array with integrated edge processing for real-time detection, classification, and localisation of aerial and ground-based threats. The system generates no emissions, making it resistant to electronic warfare, and integrates with C2 platforms including ATAK and Lattice. Arcani positions the technology for deployment at fixed sites, forward operating bases, and on vehicles.

## Products and solutions

- **HARK (Hostile Acoustic Reconnaissance Kit)** - passive microphone array with edge processing providing sub-second detection of drones and ground threats; outputs location, azimuth, height, drone model, speed, and direction of travel; deployable as distributed arrays over ultra-low-bandwidth mesh networks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Programmes:** NATO DIANA 2026 Challenge Programme (Autonomy and Unmanned Systems challenge area)

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - Janes reported planned operational testing of HARK in Ukraine, targeting FPV drones in complex terrain. [Janes](https://www.janes.com)
- **2026-01** - HARK demonstrated to Poland's Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of National Defence at the opening of FORT Krakow (NATO DIANA Accelerator Poland). [arcani.ai](https://www.arcani.ai)

## Links

- Website: https://www.arcani.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/arcani-systems

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: arcani.ai; Companies House (15836688); ADS Group member directory; Janes (April 2026); NATO DIANA programme announcements.

Archer Aviation UK Limited is the UK arm of Archer Aviation, a US-headquartered developer of eVTOL aircraft listed on the New York Stock Exchange (ACHR). companies.name: ARK Group DMCC
companies.summary: Social enterprise delivering stabilisation, security and capacity-building programmes in fragile and conflict-affected states.
companies.body:
# ARK Group DMCC

> Social enterprise delivering stabilisation, security and capacity-building programmes in fragile and conflict-affected states.

## What they do

ARK Group is a social enterprise working at the intersection of governance, security and community resilience, delivering stabilisation, development and capacity-building programmes in fragile and conflict-affected states. Its work covers research and analysis, programme design and management, capacity development, and monitoring and evaluation for governments, donors and local partners, with delivery from Haiti and Lebanon to Syria, Yemen and Nigeria. ARK is headquartered in Dubai; the UK entity (registered as a foreign company, FC035638) supports UK-based staff and client compliance. ARK is an ADS Group member, listing defence consultancy, counter-terrorism and intelligence, security consultancy, surveillance and tactical training among its capabilities.

## Products and solutions

- **Stabilisation and capacity building** - programme design and delivery in fragile and conflict-affected states.
- **Defence and security consultancy** - defence consultancy, counter-terrorism and intelligence, and security consultancy services.

# Ark Integrated Solutions

> Northern Ireland systems integrator providing engineered solutions to the security and defence sectors.

## What they do

Ark Integrated Solutions provides engineered solutions to the security and defence sectors, with a main focus on personnel protection systems in custodial environments. It delivers and supports passive cyber security monitoring systems for IP and legacy serial networks across OT and IT, and provides IoT edge monitoring to a secure platform for environmental monitoring and location services. System integration forms a large part of its delivery, working with end clients on bespoke systems. The company is based in Ballynahinch, Northern Ireland, and is an ADS Group member.

- **Passive cyber security monitoring** - monitoring for IP and legacy serial networks across OT and IT.

- **Systems integration** - bespoke integration of security and building systems.

Arke is an independent SME consultancy based in Westbury, Wiltshire, working with UK and international public and private sector organisations. > Exeter manufacturer of military and police clothing, tactical vests and load-carrying equipment.

## What they do

Arktis Endurance Textiles manufactures and supplies clothing and equipment for military, police and emergency services from its factory in Exeter, Devon. The Arktis brand was created in 1985 by a former Royal Marine to improve on standard-issue combat uniform. In 2017 the brand was acquired by the directors of County Antrim textiles firm Francis Dinsmore Ltd, who formed Arktis Endurance Textiles Ltd to continue trading from the original Exeter site. The company designs camouflage patterns in-house and counts special forces among its customers.

companies.name: Arqit Quantum Inc
companies.summary: London quantum-safe encryption company providing symmetric key agreement technology for government, defence and telecoms.
companies.body:
# Arqit

> London quantum-safe encryption company providing symmetric key agreement technology for government, defence and telecoms.

## What they do

Arqit develops symmetric key agreement (SKA) technology for quantum-safe encryption, serving telecoms, government and defence customers. Its software lets a device download a lightweight agent that generates encryption keys locally with any number of other devices, avoiding the size, weight and power limitations of hardware encryption. The parent company, Arqit Quantum Inc, is registered in the UK and listed on NASDAQ under the ticker ARQQ.

## Products and solutions

- **SKA-Platform** - software platform for quantum-safe symmetric key agreement across devices and cloud.
- **SKA Edge Controller (SKA-EC)** - ruggedised, quantum-safe communications platform for forward-deployed operations, supporting secure command and control in contested and disconnected environments.
- **Encryption Intelligence (EI)** - automated cryptographic discovery to support post-quantum migration.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01-22** - Arqit fully launched its Encryption Intelligence product for automated cryptographic discovery ahead of post-quantum migration. [source](https://arqitgroup.com/)
- **2025-09** - The UK National Cyber Security Centre selected Arqit to support UK post-quantum cryptography migrations. [source](https://ir.arqit.uk/)

## Links

- Website: https://arqitgroup.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/arqit

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Arqit website, investor relations site, LinkedIn company page, ADS members directory.

ARRK Europe provides product development and manufacturing services from sites at Gloucester and Nuneaton, with capabilities spanning additive manufacturing, vacuum casting, CNC machining, composites, precision engineering, tooling and injection moulding. Its Nuneaton technical centre supplies engineering, tooling and composite solutions to aerospace, automotive, motorsport and defence customers. companies.name: Artemis Technologies Ltd
companies.summary: Belfast maritime design and applied-technologies company developing electric hydrofoil vessels, including patrol and coastal-security variants.
companies.body:
# Artemis Technologies

> Belfast maritime design and applied-technologies company developing electric hydrofoil vessels, including patrol and coastal-security variants.

## What they do

Artemis Technologies is a high-performance maritime design and applied-technologies company based in Belfast, spun out from the Artemis Racing America's Cup team in 2017 to commercialise its hydrofoiling and autonomy intellectual property. Its patented eFoiler system combines a high-power-density electric drivetrain with an autonomously controlled hydrofoil, lifting the hull clear of the water at speed to cut drag. The company also provides engineering services and develops maritime simulators. A Belfast Maritime Consortium led by Artemis won a UK government grant to develop the technology.

## Products and solutions

- **eFoiler system** - electric drivetrain integrated with an autonomously controlled hydrofoil.
- **EF-12 Patrol** - electric hydrofoil vessel for coastal security, with a top speed of 30 knots and an optional diesel hybrid range extender.
- **EF-12 Pilot** - electric hydrofoil pilot boat for transferring ships' pilots.
- **Maritime simulators** - simulation tools for high-performance vessel design and operation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

# ARX Robotics UK Ltd

> UK arm of European defence-technology firm ARX Robotics, building software-defined uncrewed ground vehicles.

## What they do

ARX Robotics develops software-defined uncrewed ground vehicles (UGVs) and the operating software that runs them. ARX Robotics UK Ltd is the UK entity, incorporated in 2025, established to manufacture autonomous ground systems in the United Kingdom with a London headquarters and a production facility in south-west England. The wider group describes its platforms as modular and mission-ready, designed to integrate with existing military systems.

## Products and solutions

- **GEREON uncrewed ground vehicle** - modular UGV manufactured in the UK, configurable for reconnaissance, logistics support, route clearance, casualty evacuation and force protection, and able to carry intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance payloads.
- **Mithra OS** - the company's operating software for managing and integrating uncrewed systems.

# Astroscale

> In-orbit servicing and active debris removal, delivered from the company's UK and European base at Harwell.

## What they do

Astroscale develops in-orbit servicing solutions, including active debris removal, end-of-life services, life extension and in-situ space situational awareness. Astroscale Ltd is the UK and European subsidiary of Astroscale Holdings Inc., which is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. The UK operation runs offices, satellite servicer manufacturing facilities and a Mission Control Centre at the Zeus building on Harwell Science and Innovation Campus, Oxfordshire.

## Products and solutions

- **COSMIC** - the Cleaning Outer Space Mission through Innovative Capture spacecraft, a UK-led active debris removal mission to remove two inactive UK satellites from orbit.
- **ELSA-M** - a commercial end-of-life service designed to remove prepared satellites from orbit.
- **Docking plates** - hardware fitted to client satellites to enable later capture and removal.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **2025-03** - Airbus Defence and Space placed a commercial order for more than 100 of Astroscale UK's second-generation docking plates. [source](https://www.astroscale.com/en/news/from-docking-plates-to-debris-removal-astroscale-uks-year-in-review)
- **2024-09** - Astroscale UK awarded a £1.95 million UK Space Agency contract for Phase 2 development of COSMIC. [source](https://www.astroscale.com/en/missions/cosmic)

# Astuco Ltd

> UK defence IT systems integrator delivering secure hyper-converged private cloud and mission-critical infrastructure to UK Front-Line Commands.

## What they do

Astuco is a systems integrator building secure IT infrastructure for UK Defence, founded during the Covid pandemic. It designs, deploys and delivers hyper-converged private cloud and mission-critical capabilities to Front-Line Commands, with specialisms spanning Secure by Design, defence applications, C4ISR, managed service delivery, software-defined datacentres, multi-tenant secure platforms, synthetic environment management, platform performance benchmarking and AI infrastructure platforms. The company states it holds a flexible resource pool of permanent staff, sub-contractors and associate SMEs from across the UK, built to provide people with the right security clearance at the right time. It states its team includes a former military CIS subject matter expert and a former Big Four advisory director.

## Products and solutions

- **Hyper-converged Private Cloud** - secure, multi-tenanted private cloud deployed to UK Front-Line Commands, built on VMware, Dell, HPE and Cisco platforms.
- **Deployed Mission Capabilities** - mission-critical IT infrastructure delivered directly to operational commands.
- **Secure by Design Solutions** - consultancy, systems architecture and implementation of compliant, Secure by Design platforms.
- **AI Infrastructure Platforms** - infrastructure architecture bringing GPU acceleration to secure environments, enabling AI inference and containerised workloads within air-gapped and classified networks.
- **IT Strategy and Advisory** - support for IT strategy and roadmap development, vendor selection and technical resource augmentation.
- **Outcome Based Delivery** - fixed-price project delivery, with access to Crown Commercial Service frameworks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered; Crown Commercial Service frameworks.
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Other:** Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/astuco

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Sources: astu.co (homepage, careers pages); Companies House (14636601); LinkedIn company page.

# ATL Europe

> Aircraft design and certification, including modifications and repairs for military and civil aircraft.

## What they do

ATL Europe is an aircraft design and certification provider. It holds EASA Part 21 Subpart J Design Organisation Approval and UK Military Aviation Authority DAOS approval, with a scope covering aircraft structural, cabin interior, electrical and avionics design. Its design approval certification extends to military aircraft and airborne equipment, and to modifications and repairs for fixed and rotary wing aircraft. The company is registered at Bournemouth Airport, Christchurch, Dorset, and is part of the KDC Group following an acquisition in late 2022.

## Products and solutions

- **Design modifications** - changes to aircraft, systems and equipment in avionic, hydro-mechanical and structural fields, including TCAS, EGPWS and RVSM installations.
- **Certification and approvals** - management of certification processes under EASA Part 21J, UK MOD DAOS and ISO 9001:2015, with a catalogue of ready-to-implement DOA solutions and Supplemental Type Certificates.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** EASA Part 21 Subpart J Design Organisation Approval; UK MAA DAOS; ISO 9001:2015.

# ATL Transformers

> Designer and manufacturer of small to medium magnetics and wound products, including for military applications.

## What they do

ATL Transformers designs and manufactures small to medium magnetics. The company was established as a family business in Greater Manchester by the Haide family in the early 1970s and is registered at Middleton, Manchester. Its products serve rail signalling, underground, marine, military, power generation and machine-building sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Transformers** - single and three-phase isolation transformers and specialist wound products up to 900kVA.
- **Reactors and inductors** - AC reactors, DC chokes and air-cored inductors.

companies.body:
# ATL Turbine Services

> Independent gas turbine component repair, overhaul and coating specialist serving civil aerospace, defence aerospace, marine and industrial turbine sectors.

## What they do

ATL Turbine Services is one of the UK's independent gas turbine component repair organisations, specialising in the refurbishment and repair of hot-section gas turbine components and the application of high-temperature coatings. It delivers bespoke engineering and repair solutions across the industrial, civil aerospace, defence aerospace and marine turbine sectors, operating around the clock. The company describes itself as a specialist in late-lifecycle turbines.

## Products and solutions

- **Component repair and overhaul** - repair of rotary and static hot-section gas turbine parts in super-alloy materials to OEM specification.
- **Coatings** - thermal spray, gas-phase aluminizing and high-temperature protective coatings; investment in an Oerlikon Metco Surface Two thermal spray system.
- **Defence aerospace MRO** - repair of the RB199 engine (Panavia Tornado) and support for the EJ200 engine (Eurofighter Typhoon).
- **Defence marine** - support for the Rolls-Royce WR-21 gas turbine powering the Royal Navy's Type 45 destroyers.
- **Laboratory, NDT and engineering services** - assessment, non-destructive testing, ultrasonic cleaning and laser powder fusion.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** EASA/FAA Part 145, AS 9110C, ISO 9001, NADCAP (NDT); Rolls-Royce approved special processes (SABRe 3).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-14** - Invested around £1m, with Scottish Enterprise support, in an Oerlikon Metco Surface Two thermal spray system to expand coating capability. [source](https://www.oerlikon.com/en/about-us/media/press-releases/-atl-turbine-services-invests-in-surface-two%E2%84%A2-to-expand-thermal-spray-capabilities-and-drive-process-excellence/)
- **2024-10-28** - Multi-year contract extension agreed with Sulzer. [source](https://atlturbineservices.co.uk/all-news/)

## Links

- Website: https://atlturbineservices.co.uk/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/atl-turbine-services

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (atlturbineservices.co.uk), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/atl-turbine-services-2), Companies House, Oerlikon press release.

Atlantic Technology specialises in the development of operational security products, ranging from high-performance network data processing to small, low-power data recorders. # ATS Applied Tech Systems

> System integrator delivering smart manufacturing, automation and quality software, with a dedicated aerospace and defence practice.

## What they do

ATS Applied Tech Systems is the UK operating entity of the ATS Global group, an independent solution provider for digital transformation in manufacturing. It provides products, solutions and services across the automation pyramid, covering control, execution and information layers. The group dates to 1986 and supports manufacturers across aerospace, defence and other sectors with automation, IT/OT integration, manufacturing execution and quality management.

The UK company is based in Nuneaton, Warwickshire; the ATS Global group is headquartered in Haarlem, Netherlands, with offices across multiple countries.

## Products and solutions

- **Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES/MOM)** - execution-layer manufacturing software and operations management.
- **Automation and IT** - industrial automation and IT/OT convergence, including equipment connectivity.
- **Smart manufacturing and Industry 4.0** - IoT, location-awareness devices and predictive data analytics.
- **PLM and quality management** - product lifecycle management integration and quality management systems.
- **Supply chain management** - advanced planning and scheduling.
- **Aerospace and defence practice** - digital transformation solutions for aerospace and defence OEMs and tier suppliers.

companies.name: Augur
companies.summary: AI-powered sensor intelligence platform that turns existing camera and IoT infrastructure into real-time threat detection and situational awareness for critical sites and grey-zone threat scenarios.
companies.body:
# Augur

> AI-powered sensor intelligence platform that turns existing camera and IoT infrastructure into real-time threat detection and situational awareness for critical sites and grey-zone threat scenarios.

## What they do

Augur connects to cameras and sensors already installed at transport hubs, energy infrastructure, stadiums, and other sensitive sites. Machine learning models detect anomalous behaviours, link activity across multiple locations, and reconstruct incident timelines in seconds. The platform operates on anonymised behavioural and movement patterns without facial recognition, and is framed around grey-zone threats including sabotage and sub-threshold adversarial activity against critical infrastructure.

## Products and solutions

- **Sensor Intelligence Platform** - AI-driven threat detection and situational awareness across existing multi-site sensor networks; no facial recognition.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-09** - Raised $15 million seed round led by Plural, with participation from First Kind, SNR, Flix, and Tiny VC, framed around expanding from UK deployments into European markets. [UKTN](https://www.uktech.news/ai/augur-ai-security-funding-round-20260309)

companies.body:
# Auterion UK Ltd

> UK entity of Auterion, a developer of operating-system software for autonomous drones and robotic systems used in defence.

## What they do

Auterion develops a common operating system and software applications for autonomous systems, focused on the defence and enterprise sectors. AuterionOS coordinates drones across air, land and sea, and the company's hardware modules integrate autopilot, mission computing, AI autonomy, secure communications and edge computing. Auterion UK Ltd is the company's UK-registered entity; the wider group is headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, with a software hub in Munich and origins in Zurich, where it was founded in 2017.

## Products and solutions

- **AuterionOS** - an operating system for coordinated, large-scale autonomous drone operations across air, land and sea.
- **Skynode X** - an integrated module combining autopilot, mission computer, AI autonomy, secure communications and edge computing, designed to operate under GPS and video jamming.
- **Nemyx** - a defence system for turning autonomous drones into coordinated forces.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-09-23** - Auterion closed a 130 million US dollar Series B round led by Bessemer Venture Partners to scale its defence software. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/09/23/auterion-secures-130-million-series-b-to-scale-defense-software/)

# Avanti Communications Group plc

## What they do

Avanti Communications is a satellite operator selling wholesale satellite broadband and connectivity to internet service providers, mobile network operators, enterprises, governments and other satellite operators. It operates a fleet of high throughput satellites alongside an international fibre network connecting its gateways and data centres. Its government and defence services cover remote bases, border security and disaster recovery using secure Ka-band communications.

# AVD Fire

> UK manufacturer of lithium-ion battery fire containment and suppression products.

## What they do

AVD Fire develops and produces active and passive safety products to control and extinguish lithium-ion battery fires. The company uses Aqueous Vermiculite Dispersion (AVD), an extinguishing agent that cools, contains and extinguishes lithium battery fires. It is a subsidiary of Goodwin PLC. Its products are used across applications including electric vehicles, energy storage, consumer electronics, government facilities and defence systems.

## Products and solutions

- **AVD lithium battery fire extinguishers** - portable extinguishers using the Aqueous Vermiculite Dispersion agent.
- **Fixed suppression systems** - installed systems for lithium-ion battery fire containment.

companies.summary: Developer of 3D Holographic Radar for drone detection and air surveillance.
companies.body:
# Aveillant

> Developer of 3D Holographic Radar for drone detection and air surveillance.

## What they do

Aveillant is a radar technology company that pioneered 3D Holographic Radar. Unlike mechanically or electronically scanned systems, Holographic Radar transmits a wide-angle pulse and forms multiple simultaneous receive beams, maintaining a continuous picture of the full airspace volume. The company is based in Cambridge and was acquired by the Thales Group in November 2017, so it now operates as part of the French-headquartered Thales. The Companies House entity remains active.

## Products and solutions

- **Gamekeeper** - Holographic Radar system to detect, track and classify drones, including micro systems, providing 3D tracks and classification to discriminate drones from birds with detection at long range.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2017-11-28** - Thales completed its acquisition of Aveillant. [source](https://www.thalesgroup.com/en/worldwide/defence/press-release/thales-completes-acquisition-aveillant-world-pioneer-holographic)

companies.summary: A Leeds-based digital and data consultancy specialising in open data standards for healthcare and public-sector providers.
companies.body:
# Avenue3

> A Leeds-based digital and data consultancy specialising in open data standards for healthcare and public-sector providers.

## What they do

Avenue3 describes itself as a technology partner for government and public-sector providers, specialising in the adoption of open data standards and open data solutions. It builds solutions that keep health data independent of the applications that use it, on the principle that separating data from software improves flexibility, reduces cost and supports long-term access and interoperability. Its defence relevance is specific: it holds a UK Ministry of Defence contract to deliver a deployable electronic health record for military clinicians.

## Products and solutions

- **Strategy** - advice to shape digital strategies around open data.
- **Discovery** - stakeholder engagement, identifying system challenges and producing technical roadmaps for complex projects.
- **Architecture** - specialists designing and implementing scalable open data system integrations.
- **Engineering** - openEHR engineers building scalable open-data solutions for data management and healthcare delivery.
- **Project Mercury** - a secure, deployable electronic health record system for UK Defence Medical Services, supporting offline data access and sharing across devices.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group (listed under Professional Services). openEHR International industry partner.

## Recent news

- **2026-01-08** - UK Defence Medical Services awarded Avenue3 a contract reported at GBP 2.5m to roll out Project Mercury, a deployable military electronic health record system, with first live release scheduled for Spring 2026. [The Defense Post](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/01/08/uk-avenue3-project-digital-health/)

## Links

- Website: https://avenue3.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/avenue3/

Aviation and Security Assistance (UK) Ltd is the UK entity of the ASA Group, established in 1999 and headquartered in Manila with permanent offices across Hong Kong, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, the Philippines, the UK and the US. companies.summary: Developer of emergency oxygen systems for commercial and defence aircraft using patented breathing technology.
companies.body:
# Caeli Nova

> Developer of emergency oxygen systems for commercial and defence aircraft using patented breathing technology.

## What they do

Caeli Nova (the trading name of Aviation Works Ltd) was established in 2018 by founders with backgrounds in medicine and aviation, following research into the optimisation of human body oxygenation at altitude. The company develops patented breathing technology to improve passenger and crew safety and survivability in challenging environments. It works with both commercial and defence aerospace operators.

## Products and solutions

- **Cordillera** - an emergency oxygen system for commercial and military passenger aircraft, designed to protect passengers in the event of a loss of cabin pressure and to allow an aircraft to divert safely at a higher altitude following a decompression event.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

# AVIC Cabin Systems UK

> Designer and manufacturer of aircraft cabin interiors for commercial and military aircraft.

## What they do

AVIC Cabin Systems UK (trading as ACS UK) designs, manufactures, certifies and maintains cabin interiors for major airlines on Airbus and Boeing aircraft. The UK operation is based in Bournemouth and continues programmes previously delivered as AIM Altitude. AIM Altitude has worked on military aircraft programmes including the Eurofighter Typhoon and the Merlin helicopter, and has been a supplier to the Ministry of Defence and BAE Systems. The UK business is part of the AVIC Cabin Systems group, which is owned by Aviation Industry Corporation of China (AVIC), headquartered in Beijing.

## Products and solutions

- **Cabin interiors** - galleys, stowages, bars, lounges, feature panels and premium cabin interior products.
- **Composites** - advanced materials, complex mouldings and decorative finishes with in-house testing capability.

companies.body:
# AVL Powertrain UK

> UK engineering, simulation and testing arm of AVL, including powertrain work for the security and defence sector.

## What they do

AVL Powertrain UK is the UK subsidiary of AVL List GmbH, a mobility technology company headquartered in Graz, Austria, working in development, simulation and testing. The UK operation runs engineering and technical centres in Basildon and Coventry with powertrain test beds, virtual test beds and battery and electronics laboratories. AVL's security and defence work provides engineering for military powertrains across internal combustion, hybrid and electric systems for land, sea and aviation platforms, designed to meet military standards. AVL Powertrain UK is a signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Powertrain engineering** - development of internal combustion, hybrid and electric powertrains for defence platforms.
- **Simulation and testing** - powertrain test beds, virtual test beds, hardware-in-the-loop and battery and electronics laboratories.

companies.name: Avon Protection Limited
companies.summary: Manufacturer of respiratory protection, CBRN and ballistic protection equipment for military and first responders.
companies.body:
# Avon Protection

> Manufacturer of respiratory protection, CBRN and ballistic protection equipment for military and first responders.

## What they do

Avon Protection develops and manufactures respiratory protection system technology and related protective equipment. It has supplied protection solutions to the UK Ministry of Defence and allied forces for many decades and is a supplier of CBRN respiratory equipment to the United States Department of Defense. Its product range covers respirators, CBRN protective wear, escape devices, self-contained breathing apparatus, powered air purifying respirators, thermal imaging and underwater systems. The business is part of Avon Technologies plc, listed on the London Stock Exchange, with its operation based in Melksham, Wiltshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Air purifying respirators** - full face masks including the FM50, FM53, FM54, M50, M53A1, C50 and PC50.
- **CBRN protective wear** - the EXOSKIN range of protective clothing.
- **Self-contained breathing apparatus** - the ST50, ST53 and ST54 systems.
- **Powered air purifying respirators (PAPR)** - including CS-PAPR and MP-PAPR units.
- **Thermal imaging** - the Mi-TIC range of thermal imaging cameras.
- **Underwater systems** - the MCM100 underwater rebreather.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- None confirmed in the last 12 months from public sources at time of verification.

companies.name: AVoptics
companies.summary: UK supplier of engineered fibre-optic, photonic, electrical and electronic solutions for harsh aerospace, defence and space environments.
companies.body:
# AVoptics

> UK supplier of engineered fibre-optic, photonic, electrical and electronic solutions for harsh aerospace, defence and space environments.

## What they do

AVoptics (A V Optics Limited) provides engineered photonic solutions for harsh environments and supplies aerospace and defence primes. Its capability spans production, with operators accredited to internationally recognised aerospace fibre-optic standards, and a consultancy division of scientists, engineers and technicians experienced in optics and photonics for harsh environments. The company is based in Yeovil, Somerset, with a research and development facility in Chepstow, Wales.

## Products and solutions

- **Free Space Optics (FSO/FSOC)** - laser-based optical communications, including the "Galahad" modulated retro-reflector system for covert, secure, low size, weight and power links.
- **Cable assemblies** - build-to-print or full design service.
- **Test equipment and components** - inspection, hand tools, curing, polishing, cleaning, components and ready-made patchcord assemblies, sold via an online shop.
- **Services** - research and development, fibre-optic training to internationally recognised standards, design, calibration, on-site services, in-field repair and test, and an environmental testing facility.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, AS9100, Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group. NATO DIANA programme participant.

# AVPE Systems

> Manufacturer of complex machined components and sub-assemblies for civil and defence aerospace.

## What they do

AVPE Systems, based in Bitton near Bristol, supplies complex machined components and sub-assemblies to aerospace OEM and Tier 1 customers across civil, defence and aftermarket sectors. It specialises in airframe and landing gear parts and the machining of castings, forgings and 3D printed parts, supplying flight-critical parts for aircraft including the A320, A350 and A220, as well as helicopters and military aircraft. AVPE Systems is part of Broadway Group, formed in 2021 to bring together Broadway Engineering and AVPE Systems.

companies.name: AVRT
companies.summary: Free-roam wireless VR training system for military, law enforcement, and emergency services, requiring no controllers and supporting up to twelve concurrent users.
companies.body:
# AVRT

> Free-roam wireless VR training system for military, law enforcement, and emergency services, requiring no controllers and supporting up to twelve concurrent users.

## What they do

AVRT develops fully immersive, wireless free-roam VR training systems. Trainees use natural movement and real-world replica weapons with no handheld controllers, in shared virtual environments accommodating up to twelve concurrent users. The system is instructor-configurable for scenarios including lethal and less-lethal force, CBRN, FIBUA, vehicle interdiction, and counter-terrorism. AVRT is a product line of KIM Software Solutions Limited, which holds supply relationships with Home Office agencies including UK Border Force, HMRC, and the NCA, as well as the Metropolitan Police Service.

## Products and solutions

- **AVRT Military System v3** - large-area free-roam VR for Army collective training; demonstrated at 400 sq m with 12 concurrent soldiers; supported by the UK Export Support Team.
- **AVRT Law Enforcement System** - scenario-based VR for police Taser and use-of-force training.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud 14 (via KIM Software Solutions Limited)

## Recent news

- **2024-01** - AVRT Military System v3 demonstrated at Larkhill with the British Army, described as the largest free-roam VR military training environment in the UK at 400 sq m. [Joint Forces News](https://www.joint-forces.com/defence-equipment-news/70705-avrt-v3-first-appearance)
- **2023** - Singapore Army purchased the AVRT system, the company's first international military sale. [avrt.training](https://avrt.training)

## Links

- Website: https://avrt.training
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/avrt-training

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: avrt.training; LinkedIn company page; Companies House (KIM Software Solutions Limited, 03691242); Joint Forces News (January 2024).

companies.name: AWE plc
companies.summary: UK Ministry of Defence body responsible for the design, manufacture and in-service support of the warheads for the UK's nuclear deterrent.
companies.body:
# AWE plc

> UK Ministry of Defence body responsible for the design, manufacture and in-service support of the warheads for the UK's nuclear deterrent.

## What they do

AWE designs, manufactures and supports the nuclear warheads for the UK's continuous at-sea deterrent, and applies its specialist expertise to wider national security work. Its activity spans the warhead life cycle, from concept, assessment and design, through component manufacture and assembly, to in-service support and eventual decommissioning and disposal. The organisation is owned by the Ministry of Defence and operates as a government body rather than a commercial supplier.

## Products and solutions

- **Warhead design and manufacture** - design, production and assembly of warhead components for the UK's nuclear deterrent.
- **In-service support** - maintenance and assurance of the warhead stockpile across its life cycle.
- **National security science and technology** - specialist research applied to wider defence and security challenges.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Regulated by the Office for Nuclear Regulation across its Aldermaston and Burghfield sites.

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - AWE highlighted at DSEI and across MOD deterrent announcements as the body delivering warhead capability for the UK's strategic deterrent. [source](https://www.awe.co.uk/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.awe.co.uk/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources used: AWE company website (awe.co.uk), Companies House (company 02763902), Office for Nuclear Regulation, Wikipedia. AWE is a Ministry of Defence body rather than a typical ADS SME; no ADS membership was confirmed, so the ADS membership line and mbr-ads tag are omitted. No verified LinkedIn company page was identified, so the LinkedIn line is omitted.

companies.body:
# Awerian Limited

> Technology consultancy in the homeland security and defence space, providing research, development and technology demonstrators for the UK and its allies.

## What they do

Awerian is a TTP Group company based near Cambridge, formed from an internal group within TTP plc that had worked in defence and related areas for over a decade. It provides research and development services intended to extend the ability of the UK and its allies to defend themselves. Its work runs from ideas generation through rapid design and implementation of technology demonstrators to complete product design and transfer to manufacture.

## Products and solutions

- **Science and technology** - applied research addressing defence and security problems.
- **Cyber** - cyber capability development.
- **Artificial intelligence and machine learning** - AI/ML applied to defence and security.
- **Autonomous systems** - design and development of autonomous capability.
- **Electromagnetics** - electromagnetics engineering, complemented by bespoke designs for technology demonstrators and special products.

Axillium is an independent research and innovation agency working with businesses, public bodies and universities to deliver R&D projects, programmes and clusters. companies.name: Axis Electronics Limited
companies.summary: Electronic manufacturing services provider specialising in high-reliability, high-mix electronics for the defence and aerospace sectors.
companies.body:
# Axis Electronics Limited

> Electronic manufacturing services provider specialising in high-reliability, high-mix electronics for the defence and aerospace sectors.

## What they do

Axis Electronics was formed in 1995 as a UK contract electronic manufacturing services (EMS) provider. It specialises in the design, manufacture and testing of high-technology, high-mix, low-to-medium volume electronic products for defence and aerospace, alongside security, automotive, oil and gas and industrial customers. The Bedford facility is MOD approved for handling protected information and applies cyber security controls aligned to the Defence Cyber Protection Partnership. Axis was acquired by Cicor Group in November 2021 and operates within Cicor's group of EMS companies.

## Products and solutions

- **Contract electronics manufacturing** - high-reliability, complex PCBA and system assembly and test.
- **Design and test services** - electronics design, manufacture and testing to defence and aerospace workmanship standards (IPC-A-610 Class 3, J-STD-001 Class 3).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR.
- **Accreditations:** AS9100 (including ISO 9001), ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus; SC21 award winner; MOD approved for handling protected information.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Space UK.

## Recent news

- **2021-11-30** - Cicor Group acquired Axis Electronics Ltd, bringing the company into its EMS group. [source](https://www.cicor.com/en/news/article/cicor-acquires-british-contract-manufacturer-axis-electronics-ltd/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.axis-electronics.com/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/axis-electronics-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources used: Axis Electronics company website (axis-electronics.com), Axis Electronics LinkedIn company page, ADS members directory, Cicor Group. Axis is a UK entity owned by Switzerland-headquartered Cicor Group, hence the owned-foreign tag; the company itself is UK-based in Bedford.

# Axon' Cable Limited

> UK subsidiary of the Axon' Cable group, a vertically integrated manufacturer of wire, cable, connectors and cable assemblies for defence, aerospace and space.

## What they do

Axon' Cable is a vertically integrated manufacturer of high-performance interconnect solutions for defence, military aerospace and space applications, marking 60 years of the group in 2025. The group is headquartered in Montmirail, France, with a UK presence through its Rosyth site in Fife. The UK operation employs over 50 people and carries out prototyping, engineering development and small to medium scale manufacturing. Group strengths include fluoropolymer insulated and flat cable, complex Micro and Nano-D harnessing, RF and EMI shielding and Mil-1553B databus looms.

## Products and solutions

- **Cables and wire** - fluoropolymer insulated and flat cable constructions.
- **Connectors and harnesses** - complex Micro-D and Nano-D harnessing and cable assemblies.
- **Interconnect for mission-critical systems** - RF and EMI shielding and Mil-1553B databus looms, from polymer extrusion to clean-room assembly.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

AXYZ Automation (U.K.) Limited supplies CNC cutting equipment, working alongside the WARDJET waterjet brand under the same group. The company makes configurable CNC routers and knife systems for processing aluminium, composites, plastics and metals, with motion control, high-speed cutting and options such as automatic tool changers. companies.summary: Logistics and operational support provider for civil protection and defence, including unmanned systems for ISTAR, cargo and ground support.
companies.body:
# AYR Orbis

> Logistics and operational support provider for civil protection and defence, including unmanned systems for ISTAR, cargo and ground support.

## What they do

AYR Orbis Limited provides logistics and operational support across humanitarian, peacekeeping, disaster relief and contingency operations, working with governments, NGOs, UN agencies and multinational organisations. The company states it has worked across 47 countries and has expanded into unmanned technologies for civil protection and defence. Its work spans uncrewed systems for Intelligence, Surveillance, Target Acquisition and Reconnaissance (ISTAR), heavy-lift cargo transport, and unmanned ground vehicle support, supported by in-house research and development and verification and validation activity. The company has previously traded as AYR Aviation, AYR Group and AYR Logistics.

## Products and solutions

- **Integrated logistics support** - turnkey logistics and operational support for missions in austere environments.
- **Unmanned ISTAR** - uncrewed systems for intelligence, surveillance, target acquisition and reconnaissance.
- **Unmanned cargo and ground support** - heavy-lift cargo UAS and all-weather, all-terrain unmanned ground vehicle support.
- **UAS training and consultancy** - certification pathways, integrated training and instruction for VLOS and BVLOS operations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

companies.name: B&H Worldwide Ltd
companies.summary: Specialist aviation and aerospace logistics provider, including bespoke defence logistics solutions.
companies.body:
# B&H Worldwide

> Specialist aviation and aerospace logistics provider, including bespoke defence logistics solutions.

## What they do

B&H Worldwide was established in the United Kingdom in 1988 and provides logistics services dedicated to the aviation and aerospace industry. It handles time-critical and routine shipments of aerospace components for airlines, MROs, stockists, leasing companies and OEMs, including aircraft engines, avionics, rotables and consumables. The company operates from hubs in locations including London, Birmingham, Amsterdam, Frankfurt, Dubai, Singapore, Hong Kong and Australia, with 24/7 AOG support. Among its sector services it offers bespoke defence logistics covering routine, critical and AOG, out-of-gauge and dangerous goods cargo. In March 2026 an affiliate of Sun European Partners completed an investment in the company.

## Products and solutions

- **AOG and critical logistics** - 24/7 aircraft-on-ground and time-critical freight services.
- **Defence logistics** - tailored defence logistics for routine, critical, AOG, out-of-gauge and dangerous goods cargo.
- **Warehousing and inventory** - forward stocking locations and inventory management for aerospace parts.
- **Engine transport and storage** - movement and storage of aircraft engines.
- **Trade compliance and customs clearance** - customs and trade compliance support across markets.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN/JISQ 9120, ISO 9001, IATA, AEO (UK), Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-26** - An affiliate of Sun European Partners completed an investment in B&H Worldwide Ltd. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260326128591/en/Sun-European-Affiliate-Completes-an-Investment-in-BH-Worldwide-Ltd.)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bh-worldwide

companies.name: B.C.B. International Limited
companies.summary: Cardiff-based manufacturer of survival, protective and mission-support equipment for the British Army and NATO forces.
companies.body:
# BCB International

> Cardiff-based manufacturer of survival, protective and mission-support equipment for the British Army and NATO forces.

## What they do

BCB International designs, manufactures and supplies survival, protective and mission-support equipment. It serves the British Army and the defence, security, government, humanitarian and maritime sectors worldwide. Many of its core products are standard issue to NATO troops, and over 200 of its products hold NATO approvals. The brand markets a heritage dating to 1854; the current legal entity was incorporated in 1979.

## Products and solutions

- **Soldier survivability and sustainment** - individual first aid kits, trauma pouches, haemostatic dressings, stretchers, survival medical kits, FireDragon fuel and stoves, water purification and shelter systems.
- **ATMIS multispectral camouflage** - signature management across UV, visual, NIR, SWIR, TIR and radar, including patrol cloaks and vehicle concealment nets.
- **Blast Boxers** - ballistic protective undergarments for groin and femoral protection.
- **Marine survival** - life-raft survival packs, marine pyrotechnics, water rations and self-inflating maritime body armour.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Ownership

Acquired by Wescom Group in January 2025 and integrated into Wescom Defence in August 2025 around four capability pillars: prime contracting support, operational infrastructure, soldier survivability and sustainability, and multispectral camouflage. The operating facility remains in Cardiff.

## Recent news

- **2025-08-29** - Wescom Defence announced a new capability model with the strategic integration of BCB International. [source](https://wescom-group.com/wescom-news/wescom-defence-announces-new-capability-model-with-strategic-integration-of-bcb-international/)

## Links

- Website: https://bcbin.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bcb-international-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: company website (bcbin.com), ADS member listing (adsgroup.org.uk/members/bcb-international-ltd-1/), Companies House (01442485), Wescom Group news.

companies.name: Babcock International Group plc
companies.summary: A UK aerospace, defence and nuclear engineering services company, supporting the Royal Navy, the wider armed forces and critical national infrastructure.
companies.body:
# Babcock International Group

> A UK aerospace, defence and nuclear engineering services company, supporting the Royal Navy, the wider armed forces and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

Babcock International Group plc is a British aerospace, defence and nuclear engineering services company based in London. Although it holds civil contracts, its main business is with public bodies, particularly the UK Ministry of Defence. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange and is a constituent of the FTSE 100, operating across the UK and overseas in Africa, North America, South America, Europe and Australasia.

## Products and solutions

- **Submarine and naval base support** - sustainment, refit and infrastructure services for the Royal Navy's fleet and nuclear submarines, including work at Devonport.
- **Arrowhead frigate** - the Type 31 / Arrowhead 140 frigate design, built for the Royal Navy and offered for export.
- **Defence training and equipment support** - through-life support, training and engineering services for land, air and naval platforms.
- **Nuclear engineering** - decommissioning and submarine dismantling services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04-03** - Babcock agreed a six-month bridging contract with the MOD to maintain continuity of naval base and nuclear submarine fleet support services following completion of the five-year FMSP contract. [source](https://www.navaltoday.com/2026/04/03/babcock-secures-bridging-contract-to-support-uks-naval-base-and-submarine-fleet/)
- **2025-06-05** - Babcock awarded a GBP 114 million, three-year contract to prepare for the first defuelling of a decommissioned Royal Navy nuclear submarine in over 20 years, at Devonport. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2025/06/babcock-secures-contract-to-support-first-nuclear-submarine-defueling-operations-in-20-years/)

companies.name: Babel Street
companies.summary: Risk intelligence software for defence, intelligence, law enforcement and regulated industries.
companies.body:
# Babel Street

> Risk intelligence software for defence, intelligence, law enforcement and regulated industries.

## What they do

Babel Street, founded in 2009, provides AI-driven risk intelligence used by defence, intelligence, law enforcement and regulated organisations. Its platform ingests records across languages, domains and regions to support identity and vendor vetting, situational awareness and threat intelligence, with entity resolution, risk scoring, event detection and network mapping. The company is headquartered in the Washington, D.C. area, with offices including London, Canberra and Ottawa; its UK presence operates as Babel Street Limited. The UK entity is registered under the former Basis Technology Ltd name, the multilingual text analytics and digital forensics business Babel Street acquired.

## Products and solutions

- **Babel Street Insights** - threat intelligence, identity and risk analysis across multilingual open and licensed data.
- **Identity and vendor risk intelligence** - vetting of identities and vendor networks.
- **Strategic threat intelligence** - situational awareness and threat detection for government and defence.
- **Rosette text analytics** - multilingual entity extraction, name matching and translation for identity resolution.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-21** - Babel Street launched Insights Investigator, an agentic AI platform for intelligence investigations. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/05/21/babel-ai-insights-investigator/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.babelstreet.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/babelstreet

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ADS Group member directory, Babel Street website, Companies House, The Defense Post.

companies.body:
# BAE Systems

> Britain's largest defence company, supplying air, land and naval platforms, electronics, cyber and security services worldwide.

## What they do

BAE Systems plc is a British multinational aerospace, defence and security company headquartered in London. It is the largest defence contractor in Europe. Its products and services span air, land and naval forces, alongside advanced electronics, security, information technology and support services. The company employs around 93,500 people worldwide.

## Products and solutions

- **Type 26 frigates** - City Class anti-submarine warfare frigates built in Glasgow for the Royal Navy and export customers.
- **Combat aircraft** - including the Eurofighter Typhoon and the Tempest future combat air programme.
- **Combat vehicles and munitions** - armoured vehicles, artillery and ammunition for land forces.
- **Electronic systems and cyber** - avionics, electronic warfare, and cyber and intelligence services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - The UK MOD awarded BAE Systems a GBP 4.2 billion contract to build five more Type 26 frigates in Glasgow, sustaining over 4,000 jobs. [source](https://www.baesystems.com/en-uk/article/bae-systems-awarded-4-2bn-contract-to-build-five-more-type-26-frigates-in-glasgow)
- **2025-08-31** - Norway confirmed plans to acquire at least five Type 26 frigates from the UK in a deal worth around GBP 10 billion. [source](https://breakingdefense.com/2025/09/norway-selects-uk-type-26-frigates-under-13-5-billion-plan/)

# Bagira Systems UK

> UK arm of an Israeli training and simulation company supplying live, virtual and constructive military training systems.

## What they do

Bagira Systems designs, develops and supports training and simulation systems for military forces, covering live, virtual and constructive training. The company states it trains soldiers across more than 40 sites worldwide. Bagira Systems UK Ltd is the UK entity, registered in London in 2023; the wider business is headquartered in Israel. In 2023 Bagira won a UK Ministry of Defence contract for its Magnet live tactical engagement simulation system, delivered to the British Army with UK partner Babcock International.

- **Infantry skills trainer** - simulator for individual and small-team infantry skills.

# BAR Associates

> Defence and security sector business development consultancy helping SMEs with high-value technologies and services grow within UK and US markets.

## What they do

BAR Associates provides strategic and commercial advisory services to companies seeking to grow within the UK defence and security sectors. Services include strategic planning, operations management, digital technology, sales development, and business coaching. The firm describes its approach as "Appropriate, Affordable, Achievable" and states it works with UK defence and security companies with the appetite and ambition for growth, including serving personnel, reservists, veterans and military families.

companies.body:
# Barnbrook Systems Limited

> UK aerospace, defence, maritime and rail engineering firm designing and manufacturing electro-mechanical switching and safety-critical systems, with MRO services and IIoT asset-monitoring technology.

## What they do

Barnbrook designs, manufactures and supports control systems, relays and contactors, and pressure transducers and systems for the aerospace, aviation, defence, maritime, rail and commercial sectors. It provides Maintenance, Repair and Overhaul (MRO) to extend the life of older defence assets such as fighter aircraft and warships, and is building Parts Manufacturer Approval (PMA) capability. It also develops IIoT remote-sensing technology for real-time asset monitoring. The company is based in Fareham, Hampshire, with offices in Virginia, USA, and Prague, Czech Republic.

## Products and solutions

- **Relays, contactors and circuit breakers** - electromechanical and solid-state.
- **Pressure transducers and systems, power controllers, engine control units and solenoids.**
- **Actuators and test sets** - flight and fire-suppression actuators and bespoke test sets.
- **Rail braking controller systems.**
- **Intelligent in-flight refuelling switch** - uses BlueCube sensing to detect pressure changes and cut pumps to prevent spills.
- **BlueCube** - an IIoT remote-sensing and tracking system monitoring temperature, pressure, humidity, GPS location, current and movement across assets such as trains, boats and aircraft.
- **E:BAG** - a lithium-ion battery fire-suppression bag.
- **MRO and PMA services** for aerospace and defence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, AS9100D (EN 9100:2018), ISO 9001, CAA Part 21-G, CAA Part 145, FAA FAR 145, Gulfstream UK145 approval, SIL2 (IEC 61508-2:2010).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Farnborough Aerospace Consortium (founding member), International Institute of Obsolescence Management, Make UK Defence. Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Recent news

- **2025-12-18** - Reported a year of growth, including a new North America office in Virginia, a seven-figure ten-year contract to supply relays for Rolls-Royce engines on a foreign navy's destroyer fleet, and repeat orders for its helicopter refuelling switch. [Aerospace Innovations](https://aerospace-innovations.com/barnbrook-systems-set-to-build-on-transformative-year-in-2026/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/barnbrook-systems-ltd

# Barum & Dewar

> UK manufacturer of protective cases, transit containers and packaging solutions for the defence, aerospace and space sectors.

## What they do

Barum & Dewar designs and manufactures complete packaging solutions for the defence, space, aerospace, subsea and industrial sectors. The company offers in-house technical design (3D CAD), foam engineering and the manufacture of bespoke shipping containers, handling equipment and protective cases, alongside off-the-shelf transit cases and 19" racks. It has supplied the UK MoD, NATO and defence primes for over 20 years.

## Products and solutions

- **Bespoke shipping containers** - engineered containers for payloads from 5kg to 5000kg.
- **Foam engineering** - in-house foam facility producing custom protective inserts.
- **19" racks** - COTS, COTS+ and bespoke rack systems, including half-19" formats.

## Ownership

Acquired by Macfarlane Group in October 2023. Operates within Macfarlane Packaging while retaining the Barum & Dewar brand and legal entity. The company is registered in Scotland (Glasgow) with its manufacturing operation in Barnstaple, Devon.
