companies.summary: UK data and digital consultancy operating exclusively in defence, national security, and critical infrastructure.
companies.body:
# Darter Ltd

> UK data and digital consultancy operating exclusively in defence, national security, and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

Darter is a Southampton-based consultancy whose stated scope is strengthening UK security, resilience, and prosperity through data strategy and digital transformation. Service lines include data strategy, cloud platform implementation, digital transformation advisory, and AI and data governance programmes. The company works with defence clients including RAF Digital and operates as a partner SME within the Mars Secure Advisors consortium for defence and aerospace data transformation. Darter holds two G-Cloud 14 listings on the Crown Commercial Service digital marketplace.

## Products and solutions

- **Data strategy and advisory** - data maturity assessment and roadmap development for defence organisations.
- **Cloud platform implementation** - secure cloud and data architecture design for defence and national security contexts.
- **Secure digital and data transformation** - structured transformation programmes for engineering and defence organisations; includes experience in secure data architectures for critical infrastructure.

# DAS Ltd

> Independent management and technical consultancy providing strategic decision support to defence, government, and critical national infrastructure clients worldwide.

## What they do

Decision Analysis Services Limited (DAS Ltd) is a Basingstoke-based consultancy specialising in systems thinking, programme and portfolio management, investment modelling, and AI-enabled analytics. Defence clients include the UK Ministry of Defence, Australian Department of Defence, US Department of Defense, and New Zealand Defence Force, with domain coverage spanning submarines, air systems, ships, land systems, C4ISTAR, and infrastructure. DAS operates from the UK, Australia, and Poland.

## Products and solutions

- **Intelligent Futures / PreVueAI** - AI-enhanced horizon scanning and strategic foresight service designed for use in highly secure environments, including defence.
- **P3M Advisory** - Programme, portfolio, and project management consulting; accredited P3M3 assessors.

# Dash-CAE Ltd

> Composite engineering, additive manufacturing and robotics for aerospace, defence, automotive and motorsport.

> [!note] Description note
> Public sources describe Dash-CAE as a composite engineering and manufacturing business rather than a data-acquisition and instrumentation firm. The entry reflects the public self-description.

## What they do

Dash-CAE is a composite engineering and manufacturing company based in Abingdon, Oxfordshire. It combines engineering design and development with composites, robotics and additive manufacturing technology, and works across the automotive, motorsport, aerospace, defence, marine and heritage sectors. The company designs and produces complex, high-strength composite parts, components and tooling.

companies.name: Dassault Systemes UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of the French 3DEXPERIENCE software group, providing 3D design, simulation, and digital manufacturing platforms to aerospace, defence, and industrial customers.
companies.body:
# Dassault Systemes UK Ltd

> UK subsidiary of the French 3DEXPERIENCE software group, providing 3D design, simulation, and digital manufacturing platforms to aerospace, defence, and industrial customers.

## What they do

Dassault Systèmes UK Ltd is the British operating entity of Dassault Systèmes SE (branded as "the 3DEXPERIENCE Company"), founded in 1981 and headquartered in France. The UK subsidiary sells, deploys, and supports the group's platform portfolio into British aerospace, defence, and manufacturing industry. Dassault Systèmes serves 290,000 customers in 140 countries across 11 industries. In the UK it has over 250 employees and a primary office in Warwick, and is a long-standing partner to Airbus, the AMRC at the University of Sheffield, and Cranfield University.

## Products and solutions

- **CATIA** - 3D design and engineering platform; the established standard tool across the Airbus supply chain and used by BAE Systems, Rolls-Royce, and UK defence primes.
- **SIMULIA Aerospace and Defence** - multi-physics simulation covering structural, aerodynamic, aeroacoustic, and electromagnetic analysis for rotorcraft, ground systems, fighter aircraft, and missiles.
- **DELMIA** - digital manufacturing and operations management, including Factory of the Future capability demonstrated at AMRC Cymru.
- **ENOVIA** - product lifecycle and programme management.
- **3DEXPERIENCE platform** - cloud-based integration layer for digital engineering and virtual twin programmes; marketed for defence programme management and sovereign cloud deployment.
- **Sovereign cloud for defence** - a secure, certified cloud collaboration environment for next-generation defence programmes, partnered with Dassault Aviation for FCAS-adjacent work and NATO-aligned customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (design, development, deployment, and support of 3DEXPERIENCE, SIMULIA, and SOLIDWORKS); ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (information security); ISO 27701 (privacy information management); SOC 2 Type II; ASME NQA-1:2022 (nuclear-grade software quality for SIMULIA).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; North West Aerospace Alliance.

## Recent news

- **2026-07** - Confirmed participant at Farnborough Airshow 2026 with a "3D UNIVERSES" theme around continuity across products and generations. [3ds.com](https://www.3ds.com)
- **2025** - Airbus and Dassault Systèmes announced a five-year Memorandum of Agreement for collaborative 3D design, engineering, manufacturing, simulation, and intelligence. [ADS Group](https://www.adsgroup.org.uk)
- **2024-07** - Renewed and extended 10-year partnership with the University of Sheffield AMRC at Farnborough Airshow 2024, committing software, training, and support to UK aerospace innovation including virtual twin development. [3ds.com](https://www.3ds.com/newsroom/press-releases/euronorth/dassault-systemes-and-university-sheffield-amrc-enter-new-partnership-support-innovation-aerospace-manufacturing-uk)

## Links

- Website: https://www.3ds.com
- UK office: https://www.3ds.com/about/company/office-locations/united-kingdom

## Sources

Company website (3ds.com), ADS Group members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/dassault-systemes-uk-ltd-1/), ADS Member Spotlight, Companies House (03482081), North West Aerospace Alliance capability guide, 3ds.com SIMULIA Aerospace and Defence page, 3ds.com press releases (AMRC partnership, Cranfield partnership).

companies.name: Databricks UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK and EMEA subsidiary of Databricks, Inc., providing a unified data lakehouse and AI platform to government, defence, and enterprise customers.
companies.body:
# Databricks UK Ltd

> UK and EMEA subsidiary of Databricks, Inc., providing a unified data lakehouse and AI platform to government, defence, and enterprise customers.

## What they do

Databricks UK Ltd (registered as Databricks U.K. Limited) is the British subsidiary of Databricks, Inc., founded in 2013 in San Francisco by the original creators of Apache Spark. The company offers a cloud-native Data Intelligence Platform combining data engineering, machine learning, SQL analytics, and generative AI on a unified lakehouse architecture, running natively on AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud. More than 20,000 organisations globally use the platform, including over 50% of the FTSE 100. The UK entity serves as the EMEA hub; a March 2026 commitment of over $850m to UK expansion includes quadrupling the London office footprint and doubling UK and Ireland headcount from 500 to over 1,000. Databricks holds ADS Group membership and G-Cloud 14 listings, and the platform has achieved US DoD Impact Level 5 authorisation on AWS GovCloud, indicating security credentials relevant to defence-grade workloads.

## Products and solutions

- **Data Intelligence Platform** - unified data lakehouse for data engineering, SQL analytics, machine learning, and AI at scale; runs on AWS, Azure, and GCP.
- **Databricks SQL** - SQL analytics and business intelligence on the lakehouse.
- **MLflow and AutoML** - open-source machine learning lifecycle management and automated model training.
- **Unity Catalog** - data governance, lineage, and access control across the platform.
- **Data Intelligence for Cyber Defense** - threat detection, SIEM augmentation, and security analytics capability; announced June 2025.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud 14 (Crown Commercial Service) -- two service listings (Data Intelligence Platform; cloud support).
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus (Azure Databricks); ISO/IEC 27001:2022; ISO 27017; ISO 27018; ISO 27701; SOC 2 Type II; US DoD IL5 provisional authorisation (AWS GovCloud, November 2024); FedRAMP High Agency ATO (AWS GovCloud, February 2025).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Databricks announced an $850m investment in UK expansion over three years, including a new 137,000 sq ft EMEA headquarters in Fitzrovia, doubling UK/Ireland headcount to over 1,000, and a commitment to train 100,000 people in data and AI skills by 2028. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/company/newsroom/press-releases/databricks-announces-850m-uk-investment-accelerate-enterprise-data)
- **2025-10** - Databricks joined the UK Department for Science, Innovation and Technology "Get Tech Certified this Autumn" programme, delivering free AI and machine learning training to public sector employees. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/company/newsroom/press-releases/databricks-advances-data-and-ai-innovation-uk-public-sector)
- **2025-02** - Databricks achieved FedRAMP High Agency ATO for AWS GovCloud, following the DoD IL5 authorisation of November 2024. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/blog/announcing-general-availability-aws-govcloud-fedramp-high-agency-ato-and-department-defense)
- **2024-11** - Databricks achieved US Department of Defense Cloud Computing Security Requirements Guide Impact Level 5 provisional authorisation on AWS GovCloud. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/company/newsroom/press-releases/databricks-achieves-authorization-dod-il5-aws-govcloud)

## Links

- Website: https://www.databricks.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks

# Datactics

> Data quality and matching software for regulated industries and government, with security-cleared engineers and a track record in national policing and public sector programmes.

## What they do

Datactics develops low-code, self-service data quality and matching software designed for non-technical users across financial services and government. The platform handles data wrangling, classification, quality management, and fuzzy matching at scale. Engineers are security cleared and the company has delivered programmes for highly sensitive government environments.

## Products and solutions

- **DQMatch** - data quality and matching platform for regulated and government data types, configurable without coding.

# Datalink Electronics

> Contract electronics manufacturer serving aerospace, defence, medical, and industrial sectors, AS9100 certified and based in Loughborough.

## What they do

Datalink Electronics is a UK contract electronics design and manufacturing company established in 1983. The company specialises in low to medium volume, high mix product profiles, with services spanning PCB assembly layout, fast-turnaround new product introduction, cable and box builds, production testing, and final product assembly. It holds AS9100D, ISO 9001, and ISO 13485 certifications, underpinning its work in aerospace and defence.

## Products and solutions

- **PCBA design and manufacture** - PCB layout, component placement, and assembly for high-reliability applications including aerospace and defence.
- **Cable and box builds** - custom cable assemblies and box-build manufacturing for mission-critical environments.
- **New product introduction (NPI)** - fast-turnaround NPI service from concept through to production.

companies.body:
# Dataminr UK

> UK entity of the New York-headquartered AI platform for real-time event detection, threat intelligence, and risk management, with confirmed UK MOD contracts and government clients globally.

## What they do

Dataminr develops AI-powered real-time event and risk intelligence software. Its platform synthesises text, image, video, audio, and sensor signals across more than one million public data sources to deliver early-warning alerts on breaking events, emerging threats, and physical and cyber risks. The UK entity (company number 09232100, incorporated 2014) is the commercial and operational presence serving UK government and commercial clients.

## Products and solutions

- **Dataminr for Public Sector** - real-time intelligence and alerting for government agencies, supporting situational awareness and crisis response.
- **Dataminr for Cyber Defense** - AI-powered cyber threat intelligence fusing external threat signals with internal telemetry, including client-tailored threat intelligence (CTTI) and autonomous threat and exposure management.
- **Physical Security Intelligence** - early detection of physical threats, critical events, and emerging risks to people, assets, and operations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- **2026-02** - Dataminr announced AI-powered client-tailored intelligence and autonomous threat and exposure management capabilities. [source](https://www.dataminr.com/press/announcement/dataminr-redefines-cyber-defense/)

# Datum Tool Design

> Northern Ireland aerospace tooling specialist designing and manufacturing composite tooling and assembly fixtures for major airframe programmes, including BAE Systems and Airbus.

## What they do

Datum Tool Design is an independent design and manufacturing company based in Lisburn, providing technical design consultancy services and precision tooling to major airframe manufacturers and their supply chains. The company specialises in tooling for composite parts ranging from simple fairings to primary structures such as integrally stiffened wings and fuselage sections. Its work spans assembly fixtures, trimming and drill tooling for both manual and automated operations, and build-to-print manufacturing.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite tooling** - design and manufacture of tooling for composite aerospace structures, from fairings to primary wing and fuselage components.
- **Assembly and ICY fixtures** - precision fixtures for airframe assembly operations.
- **Trimming and drill tooling** - tooling for manual and automated trimming and drilling in high-tolerance aerospace environments.

companies.summary: Specialist in mechanical power transmission systems for land and naval defence platforms.
companies.body:
# David Brown Santasalo UK

> Specialist in mechanical power transmission systems for land and naval defence platforms.

## What they do

David Brown Santasalo designs, manufactures, tests, and provides through-life support for gear systems and drivetrain solutions serving land and naval defence customers. Operating from Huddersfield, the company supplies transmissions for armoured fighting vehicles and propulsion gearboxes for surface ships and submarines, with over 10,000 gear systems delivered globally across defence programmes. The David Brown brand in defence dates to 1860; the Santasalo merger completed in 2016. The company is owned by Stellex Capital Management (US private equity, defence-focused) following acquisition in March 2023.

## Products and solutions

- **TN54E Automatic Transmission** - fully automatic transmission fitted to the Challenger 2 main battle tank and CRAARV recovery vehicle.
- **BOXER MIV Powerpack** - powerpack assembly (engine, transmission, cooling) for the UK Army's BOXER Mechanised Infantry Vehicle, supplied under a 10-year programme with WFEL and KMW.
- **Naval propulsion gearboxes** - propulsion gearboxes for frigates, destroyers, aircraft carriers, and submarines.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-01** - Planned addition of 100 further jobs at Huddersfield, following 100 added in 2024. [source](https://www.themanufacturer.com/articles/defence-is-the-best-form-of-attack-for-david-brown-santasalo/)
- **2023-03** - Acquired by Stellex Capital Management LLC from N4 Partners. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20230308005201/en/Stellex-Capital-Management-LLC-Completes-Acquisition-of-David-Brown-Santasalo)

# Day 1 People

> Defence and national security programme and bid management consultancy based in Wiltshire.

## What they do

Day 1 People is a small consultancy providing programme management, bid and capture management, and PMO support to clients across defence, national security, and aerospace. The company operates from Chippenham, Wiltshire, in the Defence Digital and MOD Corsham cluster. Its client base spans government departments and prime defence industry contractors. The founding team includes personnel with service backgrounds and defence procurement experience. The company was incorporated in 2017 as EH3 Group Limited and renamed Day 1 People Limited in August 2021.

## Products and solutions

- **Bid and Capture Management** - Pink, Red, and Gold team reviews using Shipley Best Practice methodology, applied to Cat A MOD and defence industry bids.
- **Programme and Portfolio Management (P3M)** - project, programme, and portfolio management support for defence programmes.

companies.summary: Engineering and advisory consultancy specialising in nuclear defence and civil nuclear programmes.
companies.body:
# DBD

> Engineering and advisory consultancy specialising in nuclear defence and civil nuclear programmes.

## What they do

DBD (trading as DBD International) is an independent engineering and advisory consultancy focused on complex, highly regulated environments, with a particular emphasis on nuclear defence and civil nuclear. Services span front-end design, process and systems engineering, commissioning and decommissioning, waste management, safety assurance, and programme and project management. The company is headquartered at Birchwood Park, Warrington, with a further UK office at Westlakes Science Park in West Cumbria and US operations in South Carolina, Washington state, and Idaho. DBD was incorporated in 1995 as Different by Design Limited and renamed in 2009.

## Products and solutions

- **Nuclear defence engineering** - design, safety, and programme support on UK nuclear deterrent infrastructure, including work embedded in the AWE Manufacturing Programme Partnership alongside Mace and BakerHicks.
- **Decommissioning and waste management** - technical consultancy for nuclear site decommissioning and radioactive waste treatment.
- **Safety and assurance** - regulatory assurance, hazard analysis, and nuclear safety case development.
- **Programme management consultancy** - project controls, PMO, and programme delivery support for major nuclear programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Women in Nuclear UK (WiNUK), IChemE Employer Partner

## Recent news

- **2026** - Silver Sponsor and Exhibitor, Nuclear Professionals Conference 2026, Manchester. [source](https://dbdinternational.com)
- **2025** - Exhibitor, World Nuclear Exhibition (WNE) 2025, Paris. [source](https://dbdinternational.com)

companies.name: DEA Aviation Limited
companies.summary: Specialist airborne operations provider offering ISR, aerial survey, flight calibration, and maritime surveillance services.
companies.body:
# DEA Aviation

> Specialist airborne operations provider offering ISR, aerial survey, flight calibration, and maritime surveillance services.

## What they do

DEA Aviation operates a fleet of fixed-wing aircraft from its base at Retford (Gamston) Airport, Nottinghamshire, delivering persistent airborne ISR for European border and security agencies, aerial survey and data acquisition, flight path validation and navigation aid calibration, and maritime surveillance. Over 30% of its workforce are former Armed Forces personnel. The company holds a CAA Air Operator's Certificate, EASA, and FAA approvals, and a Part 145 Maintenance Organisation Approval. In June 2025 it opened an R&D facility in Lincoln within the Greater Lincolnshire Defence and Security Cluster. DEA has secured two tranches of UK Export Finance-backed financing from Santander UK, specifically tied to ISR capability and export growth (2023 and 2025). The company was incorporated in 2006 as Diamond Executive Aviation Limited and renamed in December 2017.

## Products and solutions

- **Airborne ISR** - persistent 24/7/365 surveillance missions for European border agencies; intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance using multi-sensor airborne platforms.
- **Aerial survey and data acquisition** - multi-sensor imaging including a long-running contract with Ordnance Survey to capture national geographic imagery, extended through 2026.
- **Flight calibration** - ground navigation aid calibration covering ILS, VOR, NDB, and related systems.
- **Maritime and border surveillance** - dedicated sensor fits and operational procedures for maritime patrol and border monitoring tasks.
- **ISTAR training and RPAS/UAV replication** - airborne training support for military ISTAR personnel, including replication of remotely piloted air system and UAV profiles for exercise and training purposes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CAA Air Operator's Certificate; EASA approval; FAA approval; Part 145 Maintenance Organisation Approval; Armed Forces Covenant signatory
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Greater Lincolnshire Defence and Security Cluster

## Recent news

- **2025-06** - Opened new R&D office in Lincoln within the Greater Lincolnshire Defence and Security Cluster. [source](https://www.adsgroup.org.uk/knowledge/industry-member-news/dea-aviation-opens-lincoln-office/)
- **2025-01** - Secured second tranche of UKEF-backed export finance from Santander UK, supporting continued ISR and export growth; workforce had grown to over 220. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/dea-aviation-secures-new-multi-million-pound-export-finance-package)
- **2024** - Ordnance Survey extended aerial imaging contract with DEA through 2026 following a successful season covering over 80,000 sq km. [source](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/os-extends-dea-aviation-contract.html)

## Links

- Website: https://dea.aero
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/diamond-executive-aviation-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (dea.aero), ADS members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/dea-aviation-limited-2/), Companies House (no. 05728943), GOV.UK UKEF announcement, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register, ADS Advance (OS contract extension), ADS industry news (Lincoln office), Wikipedia (DEA Aviation Limited).

Decho Group is a technology and AI consultancy founded in 2024 by Palantir alumni, specialising in the design and delivery of Palantir software-enabled transformations. # Decision Analysis Services

> Independent management consultancy applying systems thinking, programme management, and data analysis to defence, energy, government, and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

Decision Analysis Services (DAS) is an independent management consultancy operating across Defence and Security, Energy, Government, Transport, Health, and Critical Minerals. The company supports defence organisations to make resilient acquisition decisions, improve strategic decision-making, and navigate complex programme environments. DAS works with defence system integrators and a range of government departments across the UK, North America, Europe, Japan, South Africa, and Australasia.

# Decision Lab

> AI-powered decision support, digital twins, and drone control systems for defence, national security, and industrial clients.

## What they do

Decision Lab is a technology company specialising in mathematical modelling, optimisation, simulation, data science, and artificial intelligence. For defence and national security clients, the company develops mission-ready decision support systems, secure AI digital twins powered by Agentic AI and Reinforcement Learning, and drone control systems. Clients include Babcock International, Leonardo, Thales, Rolls-Royce, the Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (Dstl), the Royal Navy, and Cranfield University.

## Products and solutions

- **Secure AI Digital Twins** - simulation and digital twin environments powered by Agentic AI and Reinforcement Learning, providing quantitative assurance for mission-critical decisions.
- **Drone Control Systems** - autonomous drone control development using AI and reinforcement learning.
- **Mission-Ready Decision Support Systems** - decision intelligence platforms supporting defence manufacturing, supply chain, and sustainment planning.
- **Munitions and Platform Ramp-Up Analytics** - modelling to de-risk critical production scaling for munitions and defence platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Deecon Consulting

> Strategic advisory, programme delivery, and procurement consultancy serving defence, aerospace, and security organisations.

## What they do

Deecon Consulting is a UK-based consultancy delivering strategic advisory, programme delivery, and capability development to defence, aerospace, and security clients. The company's consultants support the Ministry of Defence, its agencies, and delivery partners across procurement, commercial management, programme governance, and capability development. Consultants hold SC and DV security clearances. The company has been named in The Sunday Times Best Places to Work 2025 list for the second consecutive year.

# Deep Blue C Technology

> Developer of open-source maritime data analysis and training software for naval defence analysts.

## What they do

Deep Blue C Technology Ltd has produced analysis and training software for naval and maritime personnel since 2000. The company operates an open-source model, making its products free to use and fully documented. It holds accredited research supplier status with DSTL across multiple subject domains.

## Products and solutions

- **Debrief Maritime Analysis Tool** - open-source tool for maritime data analysis and reporting; supports the full analysis process from data loading through to formatted report outputs; in continuous development since 1995 and in use by navies, governmental and non-governmental organisations worldwide.

# Defence Contracts Experts

> Procurement, contract management and supplier relationship consultancy and training for the UK defence sector.

## What they do

Defence Contracts Experts Ltd provides commercial contract, procurement and supplier relationship management services to both public sector and private sector defence organisations. The company helps small businesses understand MoD public procurement processes and locate opportunities, and assists the public sector in managing supplier relationships. It has been operating since 2015, drawing on over 30 years of experience within the UK MoD and major defence prime contractors.

companies.body:
# Defence Dynamics

> Manufacturer of anti-vibration and shock isolation mounting solutions for military, marine, aerospace and commercial applications.

## What they do

Defence Dynamics manufactures anti-vibration and shock isolation mounting products for military, naval, aerospace and commercial customers. The company's Admiralty range of naval mountings is the preferred and recommended choice of the UK MoD and is used by navies worldwide. Mounts are manufactured in the UK to defence industry specifications and comply with relevant international standards. The company uses proprietary calculation software to verify mounting selection and predict the response of mounted systems to shock and vibration, providing design guidance alongside its products.

## Products and solutions

- **Admiralty range naval mountings** - shock and anti-vibration mounts for naval vessels; recommended by the UK MoD and in service with multiple navies.
- **Military and aerospace mountings** - anti-vibration and shock isolation solutions for land, air and commercial platform applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Defence Holdings PLC

> London-listed, software-led defence-technology holding company building and acquiring sovereign defence capability.

## What they do

Defence Holdings PLC is a London-listed, software-led defence-technology holding company building and acquiring sovereign defence and national-security capability for the UK and European markets. It positions itself as a listed, software-led defence platform developing and acquiring AI-enabled sensing, secure communications, autonomous drone systems and cyber-defence across land, sea, air, space and cyber domains. It operates as a platform and holding model and runs a defence technology accelerator, rather than as a single point-solution vendor. The entity was formerly the cash shell Cassell Capital Plc and rebranded to Defence Holdings PLC in May 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Stated capability pillars** - drone warfare and aggregation, AI agents for defence operations, information and influence warfare, critical infrastructure defence, and a national security pillar.
- **Defence Tech Accelerator** - programme for early-stage defence and national-security startups.

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Oracle named as hyperscale cloud partner for the accelerator programme; Defence Holdings included in Oracle's defence ecosystem cohort. [source](https://www.investegate.co.uk/announcement/prn/defence-holdings-plc--alrt/defence-holdings-announces-partnership-with-o-/9611167)

companies.name: DefendTex Limited
companies.summary: Australian-owned manufacturer of multi-domain asymmetric warfare solutions, including autonomous drone munitions, armour systems and precision guided weapons.
companies.body:
# DefendTex

> Australian-owned manufacturer of multi-domain asymmetric warfare solutions, including autonomous drone munitions, armour systems and precision guided weapons.

## What they do

DefendTex is an Australian-owned company with offices in Australia, the United States and the United Kingdom. Incorporated in the UK in 2017, its UK registered office is in London. The UK operating base is in Salcombe Regis, Devon. The company develops cost-effective capabilities designed to increase the strike range, survivability and lethality of existing platforms. Its products are in service with British Army and other Five Eyes partner forces.

## Products and solutions

- **Drone40 (D40)** - 40mm grenade-launched autonomous mini quadcopter; weighs 190g; range of over 12 miles; flight time up to one hour; available with ISR, strike and kinetic payloads; capable of swarm operations and multiple munitions simultaneous impact.
- **Drone60 / Drone81 / Drone155** - extended range and payload variants of the Drone40 family covering 60mm, 81mm and 155mm calibres.
- **Armour systems** - personal protection and vehicle armour solutions.
- **Precision guided weapons** - energetics and propulsion-based precision munitions.
- **Responsive access to space** - small satellite and space access capabilities.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Drone40 presented at MSPO 2025, highlighting ISR and strike payload options including EO and thermal sensors. [Army Recognition](https://www.armyrecognition.com/news/aerospace-news/2025/mspo-2025-defendtex-drone-40-highlights-tactical-flexibility-with-isr-and-strike-payloads)
- **2025** - DefendTex Drone40 wins Japanese Ministry of Defense tender for Small Attack Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (Type I), with a budget of approximately 3.2 billion yen. [Australian Defence Magazine](https://www.australiandefence.com.au/news/news/adm-eyes-on-asia-defendtex-drone40-wins-japanese-contract)

companies.name: Delian Alliance Industries UK Ltd
companies.summary: AI-first defence technology company building autonomous surveillance and counter-UAS systems for NATO and allied governments.
companies.body:
# Delian Alliance Industries UK

> AI-first defence technology company building autonomous surveillance and counter-UAS systems for NATO and allied governments.

## What they do

Delian Alliance Industries develops autonomous systems for defence mission-critical applications, including surveillance towers, loitering munitions, electronic warfare and GPS-denied navigation. The company was originally founded in Athens, Greece in 2021 as Lambda Automata, with a UK entity (Delian Alliance Industries UK Ltd) incorporated in August 2024 and registered in St. Albans, Hertfordshire. It serves clients in the United Kingdom and Greece, with plans to expand across Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **LAST (Autonomous Surveillance Tower)** - Portable and static surveillance tower in civilian, marine and multi-domain configurations, using AI-based video and thermal analysis to detect, track and geolocate targets, fusing camera and radar feeds into a single real-time picture.
- **Jericho** - Portable intelligence, communications and autonomy suite providing a networking backbone across drones, cameras and legacy sensor platforms.
- **OSIRIS** - GPS-denied navigation and positioning module for operations in contested environments.
- **M4K15** - Electronic warfare system combining RF and GNSS jamming with signal detection and direction-finding for counter-UAS protection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-07-29** - Raised $14 million Series A, co-led by Air Street Capital and Marathon Venture Capital, to scale autonomous systems production across Europe. [Silicon Canals](https://siliconcanals.com/delian-alliance-industries-lands-12m/)

companies.name: Delkia Ltd
companies.summary: Specialist engineering and technology company delivering assured C4ISR, mission systems and platform integration for defence and nuclear sectors.
companies.body:
# Delkia

> Specialist engineering and technology company delivering assured C4ISR, mission systems and platform integration for defence and nuclear sectors.

## What they do

Delkia provides specialist control, engineering and instrumentation for safety-related and mission-critical systems across defence and nuclear. The company delivers C4ISR, tactical data links, combat systems, platform and propulsion engineering, and secure communications, fusing mission data from multiple sources into a common operational picture. In November 2024 Delkia acquired SyntheSys Defence Systems, a provider of Tactical Data Link and secure communications solutions with over 30 years of experience, which now operates as a subsidiary. Delkia is headquartered at the Delkia Nexus Centre in Haydock, St. Helens, where it operates an 18,000 sq ft production and testing facility.

## Products and solutions

- **Tactical Data Link (TDL) systems** - Link 11, Link 16, Link 22, VMF and JREAP interoperability and secure real-time data transmission solutions, delivered through SyntheSys Defence Systems.
- **Mission systems integration** - Platform and propulsion engineering for aerospace and maritime defence applications.
- **Defence digital systems** - Cybersecurity for mission-critical systems, data and mission management solutions.
- **Production build and power/propulsion systems** - Assembly, testing and storage of power and propulsion systems across aerospace, maritime and nuclear sectors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; North West Aerospace Alliance

## Recent news

- **2024-11** - Acquired SyntheSys Defence Systems, expanding capabilities in Tactical Data Link solutions for NATO and allied clients. [North West Aerospace Alliance](https://www.aerospace.co.uk/news/delkia-announces-acquisition-of-synthesys-defence-expanding-capabilities-in-tactical-data-link-solutions/)

companies.name: Dellner Glass Solutions Ltd
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of ballistic and blast-resistant glazing for military vehicles, armoured platforms and critical infrastructure.
companies.body:
# Dellner Glass Solutions

> UK manufacturer of ballistic and blast-resistant glazing for military vehicles, armoured platforms and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

Dellner Glass Solutions is a specialist glass processor and manufacturer supplying protective glazing to the global transport, security and defence markets. Formed in 2021 through the consolidation of Dellner Romag (Consett, County Durham), Dellner Percy Lane (Tamworth, Staffordshire) and Dellner Wizard (Luton), the business brings over 150 years of combined manufacturing experience. It is a wholly owned subsidiary of Dellner Group, a Swedish privately held industrial group headquartered in Borlänge, Sweden. The company has supplied military glazing for over seven decades and operates its own indoor ballistic range and air cannon for live-fire testing.

## Products and solutions

- **Military vehicle glazing** - Windscreens and vision panels for armoured and military vehicles, tested to STANAG 4569 (ballistic) and DIN 52290 Part 5 (blast); certified from STANAG Level 1 to Level 3.
- **Transparent armour composites** - Ballistic glass for high-risk military installations, government buildings, embassies and VIP protection.
- **Infrastructure security glazing** - Protected windows and partitions for strategic military sites, guard houses and transport security.
- **Cash-in-transit and armoured vehicle glazing** - Specialist glass for security vehicles requiring ballistic protection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Rail Forum UK

## Recent news

- **2025** - Awarded EcoVadis Bronze Medal for sustainable and ethical business practices. [Dellner Glass Solutions](https://www.dellnerglass.co.uk/news/)

companies.name: Delta Mobrey Ltd
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of precision process instrumentation for defence, nuclear, oil and gas, and safety-critical industrial applications.
companies.body:
# Delta Mobrey

> UK manufacturer of precision process instrumentation for defence, nuclear, oil and gas, and safety-critical industrial applications.

## What they do

Delta Mobrey designs and manufactures process instrumentation for the measurement and control of fluids and gases, with a heritage in the field spanning over 100 years. The company was formed when Delta Controls Ltd acquired the Mobrey range of instruments from Emerson in 2019; all products are manufactured in the UK at its Camberley, Surrey site. Delta Mobrey has supported UK defence programmes since 1947, supplying instrumentation to land facilities and mobile weapons platforms including naval vessels and military vehicles. The company is JOSCAR accredited.

## Products and solutions

- **Pressure and differential pressure transmitters** - High-accuracy instruments for safety-critical and mission-critical environments including weapons systems and fuel management.
- **Level measurement systems** - Fuel tank measurement and fluid level monitoring for military vehicles, naval vessels and fixed installations.
- **Flow and temperature measurement** - Industrial instrumentation designed for harsh environments with high vibration and electromagnetic interference tolerance.
- **Switches and gauges** - Process monitoring and control devices with proven in-service longevity for defence applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** JOSCAR
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Exhibited at DPRTE 2026 (Defence Procurement, Research, Technology and Exportability), Farnborough International Exhibition and Conference Centre. [Delta Mobrey](https://www.delta-mobrey.com/dprte-2026-exhibition/)

companies.name: Delta Tango
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of waterproof, military-grade FPV drones and counter-drone payloads.
companies.body:
# Delta Tango

> UK manufacturer of waterproof, military-grade FPV drones and counter-drone payloads.

## What they do

Delta Tango designs and manufactures FPV UAS and associated payloads for defence, public safety, and export markets. Products are IP67-rated waterproof with extended operational ranges, positioned for attack and reconnaissance scenarios. The company exhibits at DroneX in London and markets an Africa export product line alongside its core range.

## Products and solutions

- **10-inch FPV Drone** - Waterproof (IP67), 25 km stated flight range, 5.8 GHz video at 30 W; positioned for attack and defence scenarios.
- **Three-axis Thermal Camera Drone** - Combined thermal infrared and full-HD low-light camera with dimmable LED illuminator.
- **50 W Onboard Jamming System** - Counter-drone payload stated effective to approximately 6 metres; controlled under the Wireless Telegraphy Act 2006 in the UK.
- **Drone-mounted Megaphone** - Stated audio range up to 5 km; marketed at public safety and emergency response.
- **Object Detection Software** - Real-time target tracking and analysis.

## Links

- Website: https://deltatango.io

Public information verified 2026-07-04. deltatango.io; DroneX exhibitor records (ExCeL London, 2024 and 2025). No Companies House registration confirmed from public sources. No LinkedIn company page confirmed; LinkedIn field omitted.

companies.name: Delta XD Limited
companies.summary: Precision metrology and engineering consultancy providing aerospace-grade 3D scanning, inspection and Digital Image Correlation services to defence, aerospace and related sectors.
companies.body:
# Delta XD Limited

> Precision metrology and engineering consultancy providing aerospace-grade 3D scanning, inspection and Digital Image Correlation services to defence, aerospace and related sectors.

## What they do

Delta XD provides precision metrology and engineering measurement services across aerospace, defence, security, energy and transport. The company specialises in 3D optical scanning, dimensional inspection, reverse engineering, fixture design, and full-field structural testing using Digital Image Correlation (DIC). It operates as ZEISS Certified Metrology Partner for the UK and Ireland, responsible for the sale, training and aftercare of ARAMIS, TRITOP, PONTOS and ARGUS systems across industry, research and academia.

## Products and solutions

- **3D Scanning and Inspection** - high-resolution non-contact dimensional measurement and production verification using optical scanning systems.
- **Digital Image Correlation (DIC)** - full-field, non-contact strain and deformation analysis for structural testing and validation.
- **Reverse Engineering** - mesh-to-CAD reconstruction and digital twin creation from physical components.
- **Fixture Design and Manufacture** - custom fixtures enabling repeatable, production-ready inspection workflows.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 (aerospace quality management)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Denchi Group Limited
companies.summary: UK-based designer and manufacturer of mission-critical lithium-ion batteries and charging systems for defence, aerospace and adjacent sectors.
companies.body:
# Denchi Group Limited

> UK-based designer and manufacturer of mission-critical lithium-ion batteries and charging systems for defence, aerospace and adjacent sectors.

## What they do

Denchi Group is a UK-owned battery specialist based in Thurso, Caithness, Scotland. The company designs and manufactures batteries and charging systems for defence and security applications, with origins tracing to the late 1950s and strong links to the UK Ministry of Defence and defence prime contractors. Denchi supplies products for military radios, vision systems, manned military vehicles, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), unmanned underwater vehicles (UUVs) and unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs). All design and manufacture is carried out within the UK.

## Products and solutions

- **6T Lithium-Ion Battery** - NATO 6T format drop-in replacement for lead-acid batteries in 24V military ground vehicles, covering main battle tanks, armoured personnel carriers and light armoured vehicles; rated for over 4,000 recharge cycles.
- **BB-2590 Smart Battery** - rugged lithium-ion smart battery for military radios and mission-critical portable equipment.
- **UAV/UAS Battery Packs** - specialist cells and packs for commercial and military unmanned aerial systems.
- **UUV and Subsea Battery Systems** - high-reliability battery solutions for underwater unmanned systems.
- **Battery Chargers** - intelligent charging systems designed alongside battery products for defence and security use.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials Plus, IECEx product manufacture (QAN/QAR)
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

[source](https://www.astutegroup.com/news/defence/astute-group-appointed-authorised-distribution-partner-for-denchi-group/)
- **2025-01-01** - Denchi announced volume production of its 6T lithium-ion battery series for military ground vehicles following field trials with key customers. [source](https://denchigroup.com/our-markets/defence/news/denchi-begins-volume-production-of-game-changing-6t-battery-for-military-vehicles)

companies.name: Denodo Technologies Limited

companies.body:
# Denodo Technologies Limited

> Data virtualisation platform vendor with a UK entity serving public sector and defence-adjacent customers through the G-Cloud framework and partnership with UK government-cleared cloud providers.

## What they do

Denodo Technologies develops and licenses a data virtualisation and integration platform that provides a logical abstraction layer across disparate data sources, enabling fast data access without physical replication. The company was founded in 1999 in A Coruña, Spain, and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California, with offices in London and approximately 764 employees globally. Its UK entity, Denodo Technologies Limited, is registered at 5 New Street Square, London. Denodo's platform is used across UK central government departments, and the company has partnered with UKCloudX to deliver data virtualisation capability to defence and government customers operating in secure cloud environments.

## Products and solutions

- **Denodo Platform** - data virtualisation and integration platform for data engineers and analytics teams, enabling unified data access across relational databases, cloud stores, APIs and legacy systems without data movement.
- **Denodo Enterprise Plus** - enterprise-tier licensing available through the UK G-Cloud Digital Marketplace.
- **Data Fabric** - logical data delivery layer with embedded data governance, quality and policy management.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (listed on UK Government Digital Marketplace)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/denodo-technologies

companies.name: Denroy Plastics Limited
companies.summary: Northern Ireland injection moulding manufacturer supplying precision plastic components for civil and military aerospace and defence programmes.
companies.body:
# Denroy Plastics Limited

> Northern Ireland injection moulding manufacturer supplying precision plastic components for civil and military aerospace and defence programmes.

## What they do

Denroy Plastics Limited is a privately owned injection moulding manufacturer based in Bangor, County Down, founded in 1972 by the Rainey family. The company operates from two factories covering 7,500 square metres and supplies precision moulded components to civil and military aerospace, defence, automotive and other sectors. Customers include Airbus, BAE Systems, Boeing, Bombardier and Thales. Denroy took over all injection moulding from British Aerospace during a restructuring in 1995 and has since supplied major programmes including Airbus A320, Hawk, Tornado and the Airbus A220 (formerly Bombardier C-Series). The company specialises in lightweighting materials including PEEK and PPS.

## Products and solutions

- **Injection Moulded Structural Components** - precision thermoplastic parts for airframe, wing, centre wing-box and fuel-tank applications, replacing machined aluminium and titanium brackets to reduce weight.
- **Thermoplastic Composites** - advanced moulded components for aerospace and defence using high-performance polymers.
- **Custom Mouldings** - design, tooling and manufacture of moulded components across aerospace, defence and adjacent sectors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN 9100, ISO 9001, SC21 Gold (ADS 21st Century Supply Chains, held for five consecutive years), EFQM 6 Star for organisational performance
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/denroy-plastics-ltd

companies.name: Destinus UK Limited
companies.summary: European aerospace and defence company developing hypersonic and supersonic drones, cruise missiles and AI-enabled autonomous systems; UK entity registered in London.
companies.body:
# Destinus UK Limited

> European aerospace and defence company developing hypersonic and supersonic drones, cruise missiles and AI-enabled autonomous systems; UK entity registered in London.

## What they do

Destinus is a European aerospace and defence manufacturer focused on unmanned strike, interceptor and reconnaissance systems across the subsonic to hypersonic speed range. The company was founded in 2021 in Payerne, Switzerland and relocated its headquarters to Amsterdam, Netherlands in late 2024. Destinus UK Limited, incorporated in March 2024 and registered at 21 Holborn Viaduct, London, is the UK entity. The group has raised nearly 400 million euros in equity and debt financing and completed the acquisition of AI avionics specialist Daedalean in January 2026 for approximately 225 million US dollars. Destinus and Rheinmetall announced a joint venture, Rheinmetall Destinus Strike Systems, in April 2026, with Rheinmetall holding 51 per cent and Destinus 49 per cent; the JV intends to manufacture and deliver its first RUTA Block 3 cruise missiles before the end of 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **Ruta (B1/B2/B3)** - cruise missile family; Block 2 has a range up to 450 kilometres and a 250-kilogram payload; Block 3 extends range to 2,000 kilometres powered by the T220 turbojet engine.
- **Hornet Block 2** - dual-role electric interceptor for subsonic threats, with a range of 75 to 150 kilometres; tested by the French Army.
- **Lord** - long-range reconnaissance and strike UAS with a range exceeding 1,000 kilometres.
- **T150 Turbojet Engine** - in-house turbojet powering the Ruta B1 and B2 family; Destinus completed its 1,000th unit in June 2026, reaching industrial-scale production.
- **Daedalean AI Avionics** - AI-enabled flight systems for autonomous and safety-critical aviation applications, acquired January 2026.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-18** - Destinus announced completion of its 1,000th T150 turbojet engine, marking industrial-scale cruise missile propulsion production in Europe. [source](https://www.prnewswire.co.uk/news-releases/engine-no-1000-destinus-reaches-industrial-scale-turbojet-production-in-europe-302803526.html)
- **2026-04-13** - Rheinmetall and Destinus formally announced the Rheinmetall Destinus Strike Systems joint venture for missile system manufacture. [source](https://www.rheinmetall.com/en/media/news-watch/news/2026/04/2026-04-13-rheinmetall-and-destinus-form-joint-venture-for-missile-systems)
- **2026-01-05** - Destinus completed the acquisition of Daedalean, Zurich-based AI avionics specialist, for approximately 225 million US dollars. [source](https://www.prnewswire.co.uk/news-releases/destinus-completes-acquisition-of-daedalean-accelerating-next-generation-ai-for-defense-and-civil-aviation-302652183.html)

companies.name: Detego Global (Mobile Content Management Solutions Limited)
companies.summary: UK developer of digital forensics, case management and endpoint monitoring software for military, law enforcement and intelligence agencies.
companies.body:
# Detego Global

> UK developer of digital forensics, case management and endpoint monitoring software for military, law enforcement and intelligence agencies.

## What they do

Detego Global is the trading name of Mobile Content Management Solutions Limited, a British company founded in 2003 and headquartered in Horsham, West Sussex. The company develops digital forensics, case management and endpoint monitoring software for military units, law enforcement teams, intelligence agencies and enterprise organisations. Its solutions are used in more than 70 countries and are the de facto standard within the Five Eyes community for digital data acquisition and triage. The company holds patented technology and is an active community member of the Accelerated Capability Environment (ACE) network.

## Products and solutions

- **Detego Unified Digital Forensics Platform** - end-to-end suite of modular tools for field-based data acquisition and triage as well as lab-based automated analysis, covering computer forensics, mobile forensics, remote acquisition and AI-assisted analysis.
- **Military Deployment Pack** - ruggedised field kit designed for document and media exploitation (DOMEX), sensitive site exploitation (SSE) and tactical media exploitation (TME) operations.
- **Detego Case Manager for DFIR** - purpose-built case management platform for digital forensics and incident response workflows, launched as a standalone product in November 2025.
- **Detego Endpoint Monitor** - endpoint monitoring solution for enterprise and government environments.
- **Ballistic Imager** - high-speed forensic imaging tool for field and lab use, launched December 2025.
- **Mission Darkness Faraday Products** - RF shielding bags and solutions for device isolation during evidence handling.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 27001:2022 (achieved March 2026), Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus; Accelerated Capability Environment (ACE) network member
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-19** - Detego 2026 R2 software release published. [source](https://detegoglobal.com/2026/06/19/detego-2026-r2-download-our-latest-release-today/)
- **2026-04-29** - Sole digital forensics finalist at UK Security and Policing Awards 2026. [source](https://detegoglobal.com/2026/04/29/detego-global-stands-out-as-sole-digital-forensics-finalist-at-uk-security-policing-awards/)
- **2026-03-05** - Launched Artefact_Compare tool for rapid device integrity verification. [source](https://detegoglobal.com/2026/03/05/detego-global-launches-artefact_compare-for-rapid-device-integrity-verification/)

companies.name: Deva Technologies Limited
companies.summary: North Wales engineering design company specialising in safety-critical electronics, motor control and electromechanical actuation for aerospace and defence applications.
companies.body:
# Deva Technologies

> North Wales engineering design company specialising in safety-critical electronics, motor control and electromechanical actuation for aerospace and defence applications.

## What they do

Deva Technologies Limited is an independent engineering design and manufacturing company established in 1993 and based in Wrexham, North Wales. The company designs, develops and manufactures bespoke electromechanical actuators, motor control electronics, electronic sub-assemblies and contactless position sensors for flight control surfaces and secondary actuation systems. It serves first and second tier customers across UK, European and international aerospace and defence markets (civil and military, land, sea and air). The team provides DO-254 electronics and DO-178 safety-critical software design and verification, as well as pre-qualification EMI/EMC screening services.

## Products and solutions

- **Electromechanical actuators** - bespoke actuators for flight control surfaces and secondary actuation systems, including UAV and drone flight surface actuation systems, qualified for harsh environments.
- **Motor control and drive systems** - precision embedded servo motor drives and power electronics for aerospace and defence platforms.
- **DO-254/DO-178 design and verification services** - safety-critical electronics hardware and software design, documentation and pre-qualification EMI/EMC screening for development and production programmes.
- **Bespoke electronic test equipment** - custom test and interface boxes built to customer requirements; legacy electronics assembly upgrade reviews.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Aerospace Wales Forum

companies.name: Dewar Brothers Limited
companies.summary: Scotland's only commercially MPAS-accredited specialist packaging manufacturer, designing and producing bespoke packaging to MOD standards for defence and aerospace customers.
companies.body:
# Dewar Brothers

> Scotland's only commercially MPAS-accredited specialist packaging manufacturer, designing and producing bespoke packaging to MOD standards for defence and aerospace customers.

## What they do

Dewar Brothers Limited is a specialist packaging manufacturer established in 1973 and based in Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire. The company designs and manufactures corrugated, foam, timber and flight-case packaging for defence, aerospace, medical, industrial, electronic and oil and gas customers. It is the only commercial company in Scotland accredited to the Military Packer Approval Scheme (MPAS), which gives it the facility to design, approve and manufacture packaging to MOD standards. Dewar Brothers is Scotland's sole appointed supplier of SKB cases and the European distributor of Spacecase modular containers, and provides a Kanban/JIT delivery service to key customers.

## Products and solutions

- **MOD-standard defence packaging** - bespoke packaging designed, approved and manufactured to Ministry of Defence standards under MPAS accreditation; covers corrugated, foam, timber and composite formats.
- **Flight cases** - custom-built flight cases with bespoke cut-foam interiors for sensitive defence and aerospace equipment.
- **SKB cases** - Scotland's sole appointed SKB distributor; watertight, dust-proof military-grade protective cases.
- **Spacecase modular containers** - European distributor of rotationally moulded Spacecase modular container systems.
- **Foam engineering** - bespoke foam engineering using CNC router technology for protective equipment interiors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015; Military Packer Approval Scheme (MPAS); Wood Packing Material Programme (WPMP, ISPM15 56/30); SC21 registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: dewarbrothers.com/defence, dewarbrothers.com/accreditations, dewarbrothers.com/about-us; ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/dewar-brothers-limited); Companies House record SC135296.

companies.name: DHELTA Limited
companies.summary: Defence software startup developing a unified software supply chain to accelerate prototype warfare for high-performance edge systems.
companies.body:
# DHELTA Limited

> Defence software startup developing a unified software supply chain to accelerate prototype warfare for high-performance edge systems.

## What they do

DHELTA describes itself as a prototype warfare accelerant, focused on reducing three bottlenecks in high-performance defence systems: complexity, latency, and integration cost. Engineers write high-level logic in Fluxtion, which DHELTA's Optimiser compiles into machine code deployed on the company's ruggedised Mongoose hardware platform. The company also fuses high-volume data streams into a single decision framework to support real-time situational awareness and faster targeting in high-threat environments.

DHELTA was incorporated in July 2025 and is registered in Cheltenham. Its Companies House SIC codes include both business software development and defence activities.

## Products and solutions

- **Fluxtion** - a high-level logic language for writing safe, optimised defence software.
- **Optimiser** - compiles Fluxtion logic into hyper-efficient machine code for low-power edge devices.
- **Mongoose** - standardised, ruggedised hardware platform for edge deployment in defence environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://dhelta.net

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Sources: ADS Group member profile (https://www.adsgroup.org.uk/members/dhelta-ltd-1/); Companies House record 16557377 (https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/16557377); DHELTA website (https://dhelta.net).

companies.body:
# DHL Global Forwarding (UK) Limited

> UK entity of Deutsche Post DHL Group providing air, ocean, road and rail freight forwarding with a dedicated public sector and defence logistics capability.

## What they do

DHL Global Forwarding (UK) Limited is the freight forwarding arm of Deutsche Post DHL Group in the United Kingdom, registered at Staines-upon-Thames. The company is an ADS Group member and holds SC21 Bronze and SC21 OE accreditations, reflecting supply chain performance standards relevant to the aerospace and defence sector. DHL Global Forwarding operates dedicated aerospace and aviation logistics services including time-critical AOG solutions, engine transport and hazardous materials handling for defence industry suppliers and government clients. Its public sector practice provides tailored logistics for international governments and defence manufacturers, with stated close collaboration with Western-led Ministries of Defence.

The UK entity previously traded as DHL Logistics (UK) Limited and, before that, as Danzas Limited. The parent group Deutsche Post DHL is headquartered in Bonn, Germany; this is a foreign-headquartered entity with a UK-registered subsidiary.

## Products and solutions

- **Aero AOG** - 24-hour emergency freight for Aircraft on Ground situations, available around the clock.
- **Aero Critical** - next-available-flight service for time-sensitive aerospace and defence parts.
- **Aero Engines** - dedicated transport for high-value, shock-sensitive aircraft engines by air.
- **Public Sector and Defence Logistics** - tailored freight forwarding for governments and defence industry suppliers, covering hazardous materials, out-of-gauge transport, charter services and customs clearance.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** SC21 Bronze, SC21 OE
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.dhl.com/gb-en/home/global-forwarding.html

companies.name: Didsbury Engineering Co. Limited
companies.summary: Manufacturer of lifting, hoisting and mechanical handling equipment for defence, civil aerospace and industrial markets, supplying ground support equipment to defence organisations globally.
companies.body:
# Didsbury Engineering Co.

> Manufacturer of lifting, hoisting and mechanical handling equipment for defence, civil aerospace and industrial markets, supplying ground support equipment to defence organisations globally.

## What they do

Didsbury Engineering has designed and manufactured ground support equipment for over 80 years, serving the defence, civil aviation and industrial safety sectors worldwide. The company specialises in lifting and handling devices for aircraft engines, landing gear, APUs, actuators and other high-value components. It supplies equipment directly to defence organisations and is specified by major airframe manufacturers including Airbus, Boeing, Embraer, Fokker, Dassault and Sukhoi. Didsbury Engineering was acquired by Swedish group Lifco AB in March 2023 and sits within Lifco's Systems Solutions business area.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence Hoist Kits** - modular, portable hoist kits for engine changes and component removal in field and maintenance environments.
- **Purge Air Military** - purge air systems for safe working within aircraft fuel tanks, adapted for military applications.
- **Bespoke military transport packaging** - custom packaging for missiles, armour and other sensitive military loads.
- **Ground Support Equipment (GSE)** - off-the-shelf and bespoke kits for aircraft engine removal, vehicle ancillary handling and sensitive equipment movement.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2023-03-03** - Lifco AB acquires Didsbury Engineering; company consolidated into Lifco's Systems Solutions division. [Lifco press release](https://lifco.se/investors/press-releases/lifco-acquires-didsbury-engineering-in-the-uk/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.didsbury.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/didsbury-engineering

companies.body:
# Didsbury Engineering Co. Limited

> Manufacturer of specialist ground support equipment for the defence and civil aerospace sectors, with over 80 years of design and production experience.

## What they do

Didsbury Engineering designs and manufactures lifting and mechanical handling equipment for the defence, civil aerospace and industrial safety markets, operating from Wilmslow, Cheshire. The company works directly with military procurement offices and aircraft manufacturers, supplying ground support equipment for the safe handling of aircraft engines, weapons, personnel and other high-value loads. Products are used worldwide and the company has a service presence in Dallas, Texas, alongside global service centres. Didsbury holds Cyber Essentials certification and is a subsidiary of Lifco AB (a Swedish listed group), as evidenced by the Lifco tax statement on its website.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence Hoist Kits** - bespoke and off-the-shelf kits for engine removal, vehicle ancillary handling and sensitive equipment handling; lightweight, modular and portable for field use.
- **Purge Air Military** - a dedicated purge air system for efficient and safe working within aircraft fuel tanks, developed with Airbus and adapted for military applications.
- **Military Transport Packaging** - bespoke packaging for missiles and armour, designed for secure transport of sensitive defence materiel.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Diegesis Limited

> UK technology consultancy delivering IT integration, legacy system modernisation, GIS, AI and cyber security services to government and defence organisations.

## What they do

Diegesis is a London-based business and technology consultancy founded in 2007, focused on helping organisations manage, modernise and migrate legacy IT systems and databases. The company combines experience in legacy database technologies (Ingres, Informix, Db2) with capability in cloud platforms, AI, GIS and cyber security. Government and defence are stated core markets: the company's website describes it as "trusted for decades to deliver and support systems for government and defence organisations." Partners include IBM, Red Hat, Hexagon and SCC. The company holds Cyber Essentials and IASME accreditations.

## Products and solutions

- **Manage, Modernise, Migrate** - structured approach to extending the life of legacy systems, planning modernisation, and executing migration to cloud platforms including AWS, Azure and GCP.
- **GIS Services** - creation, management, analysis and mapping of geospatial data using Hexagon and other platforms.
- **AI Services** - applied AI and machine learning to extract insight from existing data assets.
- **Cyber Security** - risk management and cyber security advisory for government and public sector clients.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, IASME
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# DIEM Analytics

> UK defence analytics consultancy specialising in decision support, simulation, and capability investment analysis.

## What they do

DIEM Analytics helps defence stakeholders from tactical to strategic level make better decisions about capability investment and operational planning. Their method combines visual modelling of the problem space with structured stakeholder interviews, producing simulation tools, decision aids, and evidence bases for evaluating courses of action. The company is entirely defence-focused; its client and domain list covers Dstl, Raytheon UK, Roke Manor Research, and Cohort plc subsidiaries, across the UK MOD and prime contractor community.

## Products and solutions

- **Decision Support Modelling** - Visual modelling of problem spaces combined with structured small-group stakeholder interviews; produces evidence bases for option analysis.
- **Simulation and Synthetic Environments** - Custom simulation tools for operational planning and capability development; domains include Close Combat, Air Defence, End-to-End Targeting, and Joint Logistics.
- **Data Science and Transformation** - AI and machine learning applied to defence analytical problems; modelling and synthetic environment generation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Digica Solutions Ltd
companies.summary: AI and software engineering company with a dedicated defence practice, covering ISR, autonomous systems, sensor fusion and computer vision.
companies.body:
# Digica Solutions

> AI and software engineering company with a dedicated defence practice, covering ISR, autonomous systems, sensor fusion and computer vision.

## What they do

Digica builds AI and software solutions in cloud, IoT and embedded systems for industries including defence, automotive, healthcare and semiconductors. Its defence practice focuses on mission-critical AI that operates with sparse data, covering intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance, autonomous systems, chemical analysis and fault prediction. The company holds offices in the UK, Poland and the USA, and describes itself as owner-led.

## Products and solutions

- **Military-grade DPV detectors** - deep-learning training pipeline capable of detecting and differentiating drones, people and vehicles from petabytes of sensor data.
- **Target tracking and re-identification** - integrated surveillance system combining thermal cameras, visual-light cameras and motion detectors for multi-source target tracking.
- **Automatic payload monitoring** - GPU-accelerated method that detects which equipment payloads (fuel, ammunition) are being loaded onto a UGV.
- **Unified battlefield system** - fuses visual-light and thermal camera feeds, radar, motion detectors and target classifiers into a single surveillance and observation interface.
- **Chemical analysis module** - ML segmentation model trained to detect reacted surfaces indicating chemical contamination on military vehicles, with display via military-grade VR helmet.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO-certified (ISOQAR); Google Cloud Partner Advantage.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

companies.body:
# Digital Concepts Engineering

> UK SME designing and manufacturing robotic control systems and uncrewed ground vehicles for defence, nuclear and hazardous-environment applications.

## What they do

Digital Concepts Engineering (DCE) specialises in the design, development and production of robotic control systems and unmanned vehicles. Its products are used across defence, nuclear, health and agriculture sectors where keeping people out of hazardous environments is the primary objective. The company is based in the Midlands and has supplied government defence agencies, laboratories, prime contractors and industry partners; it participated in the British Army's 2018 Army Warfighting Experiment.

## Products and solutions

- **Marionette Universal Control System** - modular, vehicle-agnostic applique robotics toolkit providing bolt-on low-latency external control. Deployed on platforms from 250 kg to 30,000 kg including the FV510 Warrior armoured fighting vehicle, HMMWV, RMMV HX60 tactical truck, Wheelbarrow Mk7 EOD robot and the Ghost Vision-60 Q-UGV. Interfaces with cameras, weapon systems, CBRNe sensors and manipulator arms.
- **X Series** - range of high-capability, affordable, tracked all-terrain uncrewed ground vehicles covering amphibious and multi-domain roles.
- **UGV Operator Course** - training programme combining theory, legal considerations and hands-on practical demonstration for UGV operators.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; ISO 9001.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Make UK Defence.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-01** - British Army selected DCE to supply fifteen X-series uncrewed ground vehicles in what DCE describes as the UK MOD's largest UGV order to date; first vehicles were already deployed on Exercise Rhino Storm in Germany at time of announcement. [source](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk/british-army-picks-dce-for-first-operational-ugv-fleet/)

companies.body:
# Dionach

> CREST-approved cybersecurity consultancy with a dedicated defence and aerospace practice; now part of the Nomios Group.

## What they do

Dionach is a CREST-approved cybersecurity consultancy with over 25 years of experience delivering assurance, compliance and incident response services. It holds NCSC CHECK company status for penetration testing and serves defence contractors, aerospace manufacturers and government and MoD suppliers, helping them manage cyber risk across IT, OT and embedded environments. In October 2024, Dionach was acquired by Nomios, a European cybersecurity and network-services group. The company retains its UK offices in Oxford and Glasgow.

## Products and solutions

- **Penetration testing** - network, web application and threat-led penetration testing; NCSC CHECK-certified.
- **OT/ICS/SCADA testing** - security assessment of operational technology and industrial control systems in defence and aerospace environments.
- **Red team and adversary simulation** - red team assessments, assumed breach exercises and purple teaming.
- **Compliance services** - ISO 27001, ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials, NIST, NIS2 and MoD supplier assurance support.
- **Solas Platform** - proprietary cyber risk management platform.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CREST (penetration testing, incident response, vulnerability assessment); NCSC CHECK; ISO 27001; ISO 9001; Cyber Essentials Plus; PCI QSA.
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered; Crown Commercial Service supplier.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

# DIS Consulting

> UK defence systems engineering and technical assurance consultancy covering land, air, maritime, and weapons domains.

## What they do

DIS Consulting (Defence and Innovation Systems Consulting) is a Warminster-based technical consultancy providing systems engineering, safety assurance, data science, and quantum technology advisory services to DE&S, UK Front Line Commands, and NATO. The company operates an associate-heavy delivery model, assembling multidisciplinary teams including SQEP consultants and chartership holders. It is independent and supplier-agnostic.

## Products and solutions

- **Systems Engineering** - Complex and safety-critical systems; Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE); validation and verification using digital methods.
- **Safety, Environmental and Material Assurance** - Tailored assurance teams covering legislative, regulatory, and policy responsibilities across all domains.
- **Data Science and Transformation** - Modelling, simulation, synthetic environments, AI and machine learning applied to defence problems.
- **Material Science in Defence** - Material selection, testing and characterisation, modelling, and through-life management.
- **Quantum Technologies** - Advisory on sensing, imaging, PNT, communications, computing, and simulation strategies.

companies.summary: AI-driven threat intelligence and risk identification platform for defence, national security, and critical infrastructure customers.
companies.body:
# Disruptive Industries Ltd

> AI-driven threat intelligence and risk identification platform for defence, national security, and critical infrastructure customers.

## What they do

Disruptive Industries builds the Keystone threat discovery engine, which uses behavioural sequencing, geospatial analysis, and real-time anomaly detection to identify threats across proprietary data streams. Its ODDITY product monitors GPS interference and its ORBAT feed consolidates adversarial intelligence from multiple sources into a near-real-time single feed. The company targets defence and national security customers, positioning Keystone across air, land, sea, space, and cyber domains within a C5ISR framework.

## Products and solutions

- **Keystone** - AI-powered threat discovery engine; behavioural sequencing, geospatial analysis, real-time risk and anomaly detection. Listed on the G-Cloud Digital Marketplace.
- **ODDITY** - GPS interference monitoring and overlay feed; counter-UAS and electronic warfare relevance.
- **ORBAT** - Consolidated adversarial intelligence feed with one-hour refresh cadence; listed on the Digital Marketplace.
- **Curated Alerting** - Actionable tactical threat analysis including threats from illicit online communities.
- **Tailored Reporting** - Bespoke weekly or monthly intelligence reports.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
