companies.name: Distance Technologies
companies.summary: Finnish startup developing glasses-free mixed reality displays that turn transparent surfaces into augmented-reality screens.
companies.body:
# Distance Technologies

> Finnish startup developing glasses-free mixed reality displays that turn transparent surfaces into augmented-reality screens.

## What they do

Distance Technologies is a Helsinki-based startup, founded in 2024, developing glasses-free mixed reality technology that transforms transparent surfaces into augmented-reality displays. The system uses AI and eye-tracking to project layered digital information into the user's natural line of sight without headsets or glasses. In defence it is applied to vehicle windshields and heads-up displays, showing real-time 3D tactical data, terrain mapping and AI-driven insights, including in low-visibility conditions such as darkness and smoke. The company initially targeted automotive use to prove low-cost mass production before extending into defence.

## Products and solutions

- **Glasses-free mixed reality display** - turns windshields and transparent surfaces into 3D AR displays driven by AI and eye-tracking, with defence applications in military vehicle heads-up displays.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Member of the Patria-led eALLIANCE collaboration on next-generation mixed reality HUDs.

## Recent news

- **2026-01-30** - Reported development of mixed reality vehicle displays giving armoured vehicle crews enhanced situational vision. [source](https://tech.eu/2026/01/30/how-distance-technologies-is-building-x-ray-like-vision-for-tank-commanders/)
- **2025** - Closed a 10M EUR seed round led by GV (Google Ventures), with FOV Ventures and Maki.vc participating; GV's first Finnish investment. [source](https://siliconcanals.com/distance-technologies-secures-e10m/)

## Links

- Website: https://distance.tech/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/distance-technologies

## Sources

companies.body:
# DMG MORI UK

> UK subsidiary of the global precision machine tool manufacturer DMG MORI, supplying high-precision machining solutions to the aerospace, defence and space sectors.

## What they do

DMG MORI UK Limited is the British sales and service entity of DMG MORI, a Japanese-German machine tool manufacturer with operations in 45 countries and 128 locations worldwide. The UK entity is based in Coventry and provides the full DMG MORI product portfolio alongside training, maintenance and spare-parts support. The global group employs approximately 13,500 people across 18 production plants; the UK operation is a sales, service and demonstration centre rather than a manufacturing site.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC turning and milling machines** - multi-axis turning and milling centres used in aerospace, defence and space component manufacture.
- **Lasertec additive manufacturing systems** - laser deposition welding and hybrid additive/subtractive machining platforms for complex metal parts.
- **Automation and digital integration solutions** - end-to-end automation cells, digital manufacturing (DX) software and Green Transformation (GX) energy-monitoring tooling under the Machining Transformation (MX) programme.
- **Aerospace Excellence Centre support** - feasibility analysis, application technology development and turnkey solutions for aviation and space customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dmg-mori-uk-limited

# DMG MORI UK Limited

> UK subsidiary of the global DMG MORI group, providing high-precision CNC machine tools and manufacturing solutions to the aerospace, defence and space sectors from its Coventry base.

## What they do

DMG MORI UK Limited is the British sales, service and technology centre for DMG MORI, a Japanese-German machine tool manufacturer with operations in 45 countries and approximately 13,500 employees globally. The UK entity is based in Coventry and provides the full DMG MORI product portfolio to British and Irish customers alongside training, maintenance, spare-parts support and application engineering. The global group supplies precision turning, milling, grinding, ultrasonic and additive manufacturing systems, with a dedicated focus on aviation and space, automotive, die and mould, medical, and semiconductor sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC turning and milling centres** - multi-axis turning and milling machines used in aerospace, defence and space component manufacture, including engine housings, landing gear and structural parts.
- **LASERTEC additive manufacturing systems** - hybrid laser deposition welding and 5-axis milling platforms for complex metal components in finished-part quality.
- **Automation and digital integration solutions** - end-to-end automation cells, digital manufacturing software and energy-monitoring tooling under the Machining Transformation (MX) programme.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dmg-mori-uk-limited

DMG MORI UK Limited (Companies House 01030108, incorporated 1971) is a wholly owned subsidiary of the DMG MORI group, headquartered in Nagoya, Japan. The German entity DMG MORI AG is listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. The UK operation is a sales, service and demonstration centre; manufacturing takes place at the group's overseas production plants.

companies.body:
# DMS technologies

> Hampshire-based manufacturer of military-grade battery packs, engine-start systems and bespoke portable power solutions for defence, aviation and security customers worldwide.

## What they do

DMS technologies designs, manufactures and supplies portable and static power solutions from its 18,000 sq ft facility in Romsey, Hampshire. Founded in 1986 and ADS Group member, the company serves military, aviation, marine, rail and industrial markets. Its defence work covers engine-start systems for armoured fighting vehicles, helicopters and aircraft, as well as bespoke battery packs for body-worn equipment, generators and crew-served weapons systems. The company holds ISO 9001 accreditation.

## Products and solutions

- **Red Flash Portable Power Pack** - rugged AGM-based ground power unit designed to start military vehicles including helicopters, battle tanks, armoured fighting vehicles and light aircraft in extreme conditions.
- **Mini-Gun Slave Battery Mk2** - purpose-designed battery system to power the 6-barrel Dillon Aero M134D Mini-Gun, in service with the Royal Navy.
- **Custom battery packs** - bespoke lithium and AGM battery assemblies for body-worn equipment, field generators, aircraft starting and portable field power applications.
- **Charging systems** - military-specification standby charging and management systems to support in-service battery maintenance.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

# DNASTREAM Limited

> Guildford-based IFS specialist consultancy delivering enterprise resource planning, asset management and digital transformation services to defence and defence-sector organisations.

## What they do

DNASTREAM Limited is an independently owned IT consultancy founded in 2006, specialising in the implementation, upgrade and support of IFS enterprise software. The company holds Specialized Partner status within the IFS partner programme, with a stated focus on defence, energy and utilities, resources, service industries and enterprise asset management. Its services cover programme and project management, technical and solution architecture, system implementation, managed support and change adoption. DNASTREAM operates from Surrey Technology Centre in Guildford and has exhibited at the Defence Procurement, Research, Technology and Exportability (DPRTE) event alongside IFS.

## Products and solutions

- **ASCEND AMS** - DNASTREAM's own suite of managed services for IFS application support, including pro support, lifecycle assurance, insights and analytics, and UK sovereign hosting.
- **IFS Applications implementation** - full delivery of IFS ERP, enterprise asset management, field service management and defence-relevant modules including aviation maintenance.
- **Transformation services** - programme management, stakeholder engagement, training and adoption work to support enterprise technology deployments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Dominion Dynamics
companies.summary: Canadian defence technology startup building an Arctic autonomy and sensing stack for NATO and allied nations.
companies.body:
# Dominion Dynamics

> Canadian defence technology startup building an Arctic autonomy and sensing stack for NATO and allied nations.

## What they do

Dominion Dynamics develops an integrated stack combining Arctic-optimised sensing, autonomous systems and networked platforms, describing its mission as providing allied forces with interoperable, rapidly deployable, software-defined systems for extreme and remote environments. The stated goal is to give Canada a domestic defence capability at scale, reducing reliance on large US primes. The company completed field trials of its sensor technology in Northern Ontario and has an active deployment in the Yukon, and its AuraNet platform was used by the Canadian Armed Forces during Operation Nanook-Nunalivut to support mission tracking, planning and real-time communications in the High Arctic.

Dominion Dynamics raised a CAD 21 million seed round led by Georgian, with Bessemer Venture Partners and the British Columbia Investment Management Corporation (BCI) participating, and followed this with a CAD 139 million Series A, reported as the largest Series A raise in Canadian defence technology history.

## Products and solutions

- **AuraNet** - flagship command-and-control software platform that fuses ruggedised Arctic sensor nodes, communications and autonomous systems into a single operating picture.
- **Arctic sensor network** - ruggedised sensor nodes for monitoring Canada's northern frontier, field-tested in Northern Ontario and deployed in the Yukon.
- **Scout** - autonomous collaborative uncrewed aircraft designed to operate alongside crewed fifth-generation fighter aircraft and extend the AuraNet network into austere environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

Not publicly stated at time of writing.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-30** - Closed a CAD 139 million Series A funding round to scale AuraNet and the Scout autonomous aircraft programme. [BetaKit](https://betakit.com/dominion-dynamics-lands-139-million-in-canadas-largest-defence-tech-series-a/)
- **2026-01-20** - Raised a CAD 21 million seed round led by Georgian, with Bessemer Venture Partners and BCI participating, to build Arctic sensing and autonomy systems. [BCI](https://www.bci.ca/news/article/dominion-dynamics-raises-21m-cad-seed-round/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.dominion-dynamics.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dominiondynamics/

companies.name: Domo Tactical Communications (DTC)
companies.summary: Tactical IP mesh, COFDM and software-defined radio systems for video, voice and data; part of Codan (Australia).
companies.body:
# Domo Tactical Communications (DTC)

> Tactical IP mesh, COFDM and software-defined radio systems for video, voice and data; part of Codan (Australia).

## What they do

Domo Tactical Communications (DTC), a Codan Company, designs and manufactures mission-critical tactical communications systems based on IP mesh and COFDM technologies. Its solutions secure, share and communicate real-time video, voice and data to enable shared situational awareness on land, at sea and in the air, serving military, law enforcement, counter-terror, government, broadcast, commercial and NGO users. DTC was acquired by Australia-headquartered Codan Limited in 2021; the UK registered entity is Domo Tactical Communications (DTC) Limited in Whiteley, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **NETNode IP mesh radios** - IP mesh radio family, with the Phase 5 generation offering dual HD video encoders and MIMO capability.
- **BluSDR family** - software-defined radios for long-range mission-critical connectivity with MANET networking, including unmanned-platform variants.
- **SDR-H2 and SDR-M** - software-defined radio transceivers.
- **Vidar** - video compression solution for real-time streaming in low-bandwidth, contested environments.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-17** - DTC selected for a US Army communications infrastructure contract. [source](https://www.dtccodan.com/)
- **2026-05** - DTC launched the BluTrak-90-D, a self-contained system that autonomously tracks UAVs for stable long-range data links. [source](https://www.dtccodan.com/)
- **2025** - DTC introduced SafeSignal, a long-range wireless imaging solution shown at SOF Week 2025 (with Cuattro), and the BluSDR-90-UL software-defined radio module for unmanned platforms. [source](https://www.unmannedsystemstechnology.com/company/dtc-codan/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.dtccodan.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/domo-tactical-communications

# Domo Tactical Communications (DTC)

> UK-based designer and manufacturer of tactical IP mesh communications, software-defined radios, and covert audio and video surveillance solutions for defence, law enforcement, and unmanned systems markets.

## What they do

DTC develops and manufactures mission-critical communications and surveillance technology for demanding operational environments. Its products span tactical IP mesh radio networks, software-defined radios, covert audio and video equipment, and command-and-control software. The company has operated in this space for over 50 years and serves customers in more than 150 countries across military, law enforcement, intelligence, and unmanned vehicle platforms on land, sea, and air.

DTC is owned by Codan Limited, an Australian publicly-listed company, with the UK entity registered in Whiteley, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **NETNode IP Mesh Radios** - multi-role tactical mesh radio nodes for fixed, mobile, and unmanned vehicle installations, supporting real-time video, voice, and data sharing across distributed networks.
- **Software-Defined Radios (SDRs)** - compact transceivers operating across UHF to 5 GHz, carrying DTC's MeshUltra and MeshUltra-X MIMO MANET waveforms; designed for UGV, UAV, and USV integration.
- **Covert Audio and Video Solutions** - surveillance-grade audio and video capture and transmission equipment for intelligence and law enforcement operations.
- **Command and Control Software** - strategic C2 software for managing surveillance and communications networks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Donite Plastics Ltd

> Northern Ireland thermoforming manufacturer producing large-format vacuum-formed plastic parts and assemblies for aerospace, defence, and space customers.

## What they do

Donite Plastics specialises in batch manufacture of heavy-duty plastic mouldings using vacuum forming and CNC trimming processes. It holds AS9100 certification for the design, manufacture, and assembly of thermoformed products for the aviation, space, and defence industries, and is the first vacuum forming company in the UK and Ireland to hold both AS9100 and ISO 14001. The company operates one of the largest vacuum formers in Ireland and the UK, capable of producing parts up to 2.5 x 2 metres, and has expanded capacity significantly through recent machinery investment.

## Products and solutions

- **Vacuum-formed aerospace interiors components** - large and small-dimension moulded parts for aircraft interior programmes, produced to AS9100 standards.
- **5-axis and 3-axis CNC trimming and machining** - precision finishing of thermoformed parts, including toolmaking, with machines capable of working up to 4.8 x 1.8 x 1.2 metres.
- **Mould, trim tooling, fabrication, and assembly** - end-to-end manufacturing from design and prototyping through to finished assemblies.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001, ISO 14001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Dontaur Engineering Limited

> Northern Ireland precision CNC machining company producing detailed aerospace and defence components and assemblies to AS9100 standard, with customer approvals from Airbus, GE Aviation, and Bombardier.

## What they do

Established in 1976, Dontaur Engineering manufactures quality-assured precision components, assemblies, and kits for the aerospace, defence, and security sectors. The company holds AS9100:2016 and ISO 9001:2015 approval and has maintained SC21 Silver status since 2013. Its core machining capabilities cover 3, 4, and 5-axis milling, multi-axis turning, grinding, thread rolling, and assembly, working in aluminium, steel, titanium, and Inconel. In 2002 Dontaur opened its sister company Aerospace Metal Finishers, providing surface treatment and becoming one of the few one-stop-shops for manufacturing, treating, and assembling aircraft parts in the UK.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision machined components and assemblies** - detailed components, kits, and assemblies manufactured to AS9100 standard for aerospace and defence customers.
- **5-axis machined parts** - complex geometries in titanium, Inconel, and aluminium using DMG/Mori and similar 5-axis centres.
- **Surface treatment and finishing** - via sister company Aerospace Metal Finishers, providing an integrated supply offering for treated and assembled aerostructure parts.

Doyle Shipping Group (Belfast) is the Northern Ireland operation of the Doyle Shipping Group (DSG), an Irish family-owned shipping and logistics company founded in 1886. The Belfast entity offers ship agency, stevedoring and heavy lifting, customs clearance, warehousing, and project freight forwarding across Belfast, Larne, and Foyle ports. DSG Belfast played a prominent role in Brexit-related customs and trade matters for the group and carries particular expertise in project freight forwarding for complex cargo movements.

companies.name: DRISQ Ltd
companies.summary: Malvern-based software verification specialist applying formal mathematical proof techniques to safety-critical and mission-critical embedded software in aerospace, defence, autonomous systems, and space.
companies.body:
# D-RisQ

> Malvern-based software verification specialist applying formal mathematical proof techniques to safety-critical and mission-critical embedded software in aerospace, defence, autonomous systems, and space.

## What they do

D-RisQ Ltd was incorporated in 2011, drawing on over 30 years of government-backed formal methods research. The company develops and applies automated verification tools that generate machine-checkable mathematical proof of software correctness, replacing or substantially reducing the testing burden required by civil and military certification standards including DO-178C (with the DO-333 Formal Methods Supplement) to Level A (highest integrity). Customers span aerospace, defence, autonomous systems, automotive, marine, nuclear, medical, robotics, and space. The company is based at Malvern Hills Science Park, Worcestershire.

## Products and solutions

- **Kapture** - requirements authoring tool producing unambiguous, verifiable, and traceable natural-language requirements.
- **Modelworks** - automated formal verification of Simulink and Stateflow designs against requirements.
- **CLawZ** - proves that C code generated from a Simulink/Stateflow model is a complete and correct implementation of the design; eliminates downstream unit testing at that stage.
- **FEVER** - proves that binary code correctly implements source code, catching errors introduced by the compiler.
- **System Kapture** - system-level requirements management for multi-stakeholder environments.

Known application: Eurofighter Typhoon auto-throttle and auto-pilot verification (QinetiQ-led programme).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - Soil Machine Dynamics (SMD) selects D-RisQ's automated verification tools to generate safety-case evidence for their autonomous underwater vehicle programme. [ADS Advance](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/smd-selects-d-risq-to-advance-autonomous-systems.html)
- **2025** - D-RisQ selected for the Mobilise innovation accelerator, funded by the Department for Business and Trade and the Centre for Connected and Automated Vehicles; grant of up to £180,000 to commercialise the Proof Tool Suite across automotive, aerospace, MedTech, and space. [D-RisQ](https://www.drisq.com/d-risq-uk-government-funded-mobilise-innovation-accelerator)

## Links

- Website: https://www.drisq.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/d-risq-ltd

## Sources

## What they do

Drone Band Ltd is a London-based start-up incorporated in January 2023. It has developed the Crown, a 3D-printed, drone-mounted mechanical capture device that intercepts hostile or unauthorised multi-rotor drones mid-flight using a patent-pending physical mechanism with no propellants or pyrotechnics. An interceptor drone deploys the Crown, which entangles the target drone's rotors on contact; the captured drone separates and descends under a parachute for safe recovery and forensic examination. The system is positioned as a terminal layer within wider layered counter-UAS architectures, suited to urban areas, critical infrastructure, prisons, events and sensitive environments.

## Products and solutions

- **The Crown** - 3D-printed mechanical counter-drone capture device; patent pending; fits a range of FPV carrier drones; recovers the captured drone under parachute; no propellants, no pyrotechnics; reusable; combined system weight approximately 500g in the lightest configuration.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Drone Band exhibited the Crown at International Security Expo 2025, Olympia, London. [source](https://www.internationalsecurityexpo.com/news/drone-band-showcases-the-crown-at-ise-2025-a-safe-cost-effective-physical-counter-drone-solution)

companies.name: Drone Defence Services Ltd
companies.summary: UK counter-UAS company delivering drone detection, tracking, identification and mitigation systems.
companies.body:
# Drone Defence Services Ltd

> UK counter-UAS company delivering drone detection, tracking, identification and mitigation systems.

## What they do

Drone Defence Services Ltd is a UK counter-UAS company incorporated in 2017, based at the Drone Innovation Centre, West Carr Business Park, Retford. It uses proprietary technologies to detect, track and identify drones across wide areas on land or at sea using multi-sensory technology, and to disrupt drone command and navigation radio transmissions in any weather, day or night. The company states its systems are intended for qualified defence, government and security organisations and are subject to UK export controls.

## Products and solutions

- **AeroStrike** - high-speed kinetic drone interceptor reaching up to 270 km/h, with an intercept envelope of 100-200 km/h, up to 10 minutes endurance and a 13 km operating range; non-explosive and recoverable architecture.
- **AeroTracker** - flight monitoring, tasking and intercept management platform, integrating with radar, RF and EO/IR detection systems.
- **Detection and mitigation systems** - multi-sensory wide-area drone detection, tracking and identification, plus RF disruption of drone command and navigation links.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-02** - Unveiled AeroStrike, a high-speed kinetic drone interceptor for high-threat environments. [source](https://www.dronedefence.co.uk/news/dd-unveils-high-speed-drone-interceptor)

## Links

- Website: https://www.dronedefence.co.uk/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/drone-defence

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (dronedefence.co.uk), Companies House (10886588), DroneLife, Unmanned Airspace, The Defense Post.

companies.body:
# Drone Evolution Ltd

> Welsh UAS manufacturer developing the Scimitar FPV strike and ISR range and the Sentinel tethered surveillance UAV, with an active MoD training contract and Ukraine theatre testing.

## What they do

Drone Evolution Ltd is a Caerphilly-based UAS developer incorporated in 2018 and backed by Investment Fund for Wales funding. Starting as a commercial drone services and tethered-power systems provider, it has pivoted to defence manufacture. Its Scimitar FPV range covers 7", 10", 13" and 15" quadcopters for one-way strike and ISR missions, built to approximately 95% UK-sourced components with the company's own flight controller, batteries, radios and frames; the stated goal is to eliminate all Chinese components as a sovereign supply chain measure. It holds an MoD contract for intensive FPV pilot training delivered on Salisbury Plain and has had Scimitar systems tested by Ukrainian FPV pilots in theatre.

## Products and solutions

- **Scimitar FPV range** - 7", 10", 13" and 15" quadcopters for one-way strike and ISR; the 10" variant carries up to 7 kg payload to 5 km or 3 kg to 25 km on dual battery; approximately 95% UK-sourced components.
- **Sentinel** - tethered quadcopter UAV carrying up to 5 kg ISR, communications or electronic warfare payloads to 50 m altitude for extended endurance; launched at DSEI 2023.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory (Defence Employer Recognition Scheme Bronze Award).

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Unveiled the Scimitar FPV range at DSEI 2025, confirming MoD Salisbury Plain training contract and plans for swarming capability and export markets. [source](https://www.shephardmedia.com/news/air-warfare/dsei-2025-droneevolution-eyes-uk-and-export-markets-with-scimitar-fpv-drone/)
- **2025-07** - Euro-SD interview covering the Scimitar FPV range, sovereign supply chain approach, Ukraine testing and MoD engagement. [source](https://euro-sd.com/2025/07/major-news/45355/drone-evolution-fpv-solutions/)

companies.name: Drone Major Ltd
companies.summary: Independent UAS and counter-UAS consultancy, procurement adviser and marketplace operator, serving defence, government and critical national infrastructure customers.
companies.body:
# Drone Major Ltd

> Independent UAS and counter-UAS consultancy, procurement adviser and marketplace operator, serving defence, government and critical national infrastructure customers.

## What they do

Drone Major Ltd is a London-based specialist incorporated in September 2016, operating as a division of Drone Major Group. It provides strategic consultancy, market intelligence, procurement advisory and test and evaluation services across the drone and counter-drone sector, connecting buyers to suppliers from a vetted global network of over 7,000 suppliers via its marketplace platform. Sectors served include MOD, defence primes, government and critical national infrastructure operators across land, maritime and air domains. In June 2025 it received the first CAA Operational Authority to fly long-range BVLOS drones over active UK critical national infrastructure in non-segregated airspace, in partnership with Network Rail.

## Products and solutions

- **Procurement advisory and supplier matching** - independent advisory connecting buyers to vetted drone and counter-drone suppliers.
- **Drone and counter-UAS consultancy** - strategic consultancy, capability design, rapid prototyping support and project management for UAS and C-UAS programmes.
- **Drone Major marketplace** - buyer/supplier platform covering over 7,000 global drone and autonomous systems suppliers.
- **Digital Tethering** - system for assured BVLOS operations in complex environments; trialled on Network Rail routes for long-range drone navigation and safety.
- **Test and evaluation** - independent test and evaluation services for drone and autonomous systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-06** - Received first CAA Operational Authority for long-range BVLOS drone flights over UK critical national infrastructure (Network Rail, Wolverhampton to Sandwell and Dudley, 12 km). [source](https://emergencyservicestimes.com/2025/06/17/uk-caa-gives-green-light-to-long-range-drone-flights-over-critical-national-infrastructure/)
- **2025-04** - Network Rail announced partnership with Drone Major to develop the UK's first drone assured navigation and safety system across its 20,000 miles of track. [source](https://www.newcivilengineer.com/latest/network-rail-trialing-bvlos-drone-asset-inspections-as-government-invests-20m-in-research-01-04-2025/)

## Links

- Website: https://dronemajor.net
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dronemajor

companies.body:
# DroneTector Limited

> Glasgow firm building millimetre-wave radar to detect and track small, low-signature drones. Trading as Milliray.

## What they do

DroneTector, now trading as Milliray, builds high-frequency millimetre-wave radar systems designed to detect and track small, low-signature drones that conventional detection systems miss, from single nano or consumer drones to autonomous swarms. It positions cheap consumer drones as a security threat to airports, critical infrastructure, venues, VIP protection and defence, and offers a suite of sensors built around its millimetre-wave radar.

## Products and solutions

- **Millimetre-wave radar** - high-frequency radar purpose-built to detect and classify small and nano drones that other systems struggle with.
- **Sensor suite** - a broader set of sensors for drone detection and tracking.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Y Combinator Winter 2026 cohort. Company-stated support from NATO DIANA and the UK MoD Defence and Security Accelerator, and listed in the Converge Challenge.

# Drop Table Ltd

> Microsoft-certified Azure cloud security consultancy serving highly regulated industries including defence.

## What they do

Drop Table designs, builds, and secures Azure cloud platforms for organisations in financial services, healthcare, manufacturing, and defence. The company offers services across cloud architecture, security engineering, DevSecOps, platform engineering, compliance, and automated security assessments. It holds Microsoft Solutions Partner status with advanced specialisations in cloud security.

## Products and solutions

- **Drop Table Pulse** - An automated security assessment tool for Azure DevOps. Runs 150+ security checks across pipelines, repositories, and service connections and produces compliance reporting and remediation guidance.

Drop Table has documented defence sector delivery, including a Zero Trust security architecture designed and implemented for a major defence contractor to enable secure collaboration across classified and unclassified environments. The company lists ISO 27001, SOC 2, and DORA compliance services alongside defence-relevant security engineering.

companies.body:
# Druid Software

> Private 4G and 5G cellular core network software provider, with a dedicated defence offering for tactical and welfare communications.

## What they do

Druid Software develops private cellular core network technology, operating in the space since 2000. Its Raemis platform delivers 2G through 5G private network capability for defence, enterprise, healthcare, ports, and utilities customers across more than 35 countries. The company raised $20 million in January 2025 to accelerate growth in defence, shipping, and utilities markets. The UK registered entity, Druid Software NI Limited, is based in Belfast and was incorporated in October 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Raemis** - A private cellular core network platform supporting 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G. Deployable on commodity hardware; manages provisioning, reporting, and network management from a single software platform. Configurable for rapid field deployment including vehicular and backpack configurations for mobile patrols.
- **Mesh Networking** - An extension of Raemis allowing multiple patrol deployments to operate as a single network, with dynamic expansion and contraction as units join and leave.
- **Welfare Calling** - A managed mobile basecamp service for defence personnel deployed overseas, providing secure voice and data access on personal devices via SIM provisioning.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Drumgrange Ltd

> Independent British engineering company specialising in maritime mission systems, C5ISR, and VLF communications for defence.

## What they do

Drumgrange is a family-owned British engineering company established in 1979, operating from sites in Chertsey, Surrey and Portland, Dorset. It designs, develops, integrates, and supports electronic and communication systems for naval and defence customers. The company delivers end-to-end engineering from concept and research through to obsolescence management, with products in service with UK Armed Forces, NATO forces, and foreign militaries.

## Products and solutions

- **Maritime Mission Systems** - Bespoke systems for naval applications including signature management, positioning and navigation, sonar systems and signal processing, and integration services.
- **C5ISR** - Scalable command, control, communications, computers, cyber, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance solutions. Covers deployable tactical communications, capture solutions, and platform systems integration.
- **VLF Communications** - VLF demodulator and modulator equipment, RED REM processors, and associated broadcast chain infrastructure. Compliant with NATO STANAGs 4724 and 5065. Installed at communication centres, transmitter sites, and submerged platforms.
- **Diamond Intercom and Radio Combiner System** - A radio and intercom integration product.
- **Generic ComSim** - An RF simulator product for training and testing.
- **Acoustic Hailing Devices** - A product family for acoustic communications.

# DT Publications Ltd

> Technical documentation specialists producing defence and aerospace publications to MOD and ASD S1000D specifications.

## What they do

DT Publications has been providing technical publications products and services for over 40 years, working with the MOD and companies that support the MOD on defence-related projects. The company was originally part of the Rolls Royce technical centre of excellence before becoming an independent technical publications business. It operates across defence, aerospace, and rail and mass transit, producing operational and maintenance documentation to legacy and structured defence specifications.

# DTM Global

> Naval simulation and training software company supplying maritime bridge, fire control, communications, and recognition training systems to the Royal Navy and international customers.

## What they do

DTM Global designs and supplies simulation and training software for naval and maritime applications, operating from Ivybridge, Devon. The company holds JOSCAR registration, Cyber Essentials certification, and ISO 9001:2015 UKAS accreditation. Its fire control trainer is installed at HMS Collingwood for Royal Navy small calibre weapon operator training. The company trades as DT Media Ltd t/a DTM Global.

## Products and solutions

- **Fleetman** - A configurable maritime bridge simulation software suite, available in standalone training, bridge training, and classroom training configurations.
- **Fire Control Trainer (FCT)** - A simulation of the MSI Defence Systems small calibre automated gun system, used by Royal Navy personnel at HMS Collingwood.
- **Mobile Fire Control Trainer** - A Peli-case packaged version of the Fire Control Trainer, self-contained and requiring only a power outlet, for remote weapon operator training anywhere. Launched at World Defence Show 2024.
- **Insight Recognition Trainer** - Target recognition and identification training software covering aircraft, land vehicles, and sea vessels. Supports EW, C2, air defence, special forces, and intelligence organisation training, including pre-deployment theatre familiarisation.
- **FleetComms** - A communications simulation product for naval training environments.
- **Flight Deck Officer Trainer** - A virtual reality trainer for flight deck officer roles.

companies.summary: IT services and solutions provider with over four decades of UK aerospace and defence experience, delivering mission-critical systems for the MOD and defence industry.
companies.body:
# DXC Technology

> IT services and solutions provider with over four decades of UK aerospace and defence experience, delivering mission-critical systems for the MOD and defence industry.

## What they do

DXC Technology provides IT services, consulting, and solutions to defence, aerospace, and public sector organisations. In the UK, the company operates through its subsidiary Enterprise Services Defence and Security UK Limited and is the sole organisation accredited by the Military Aviation Authority to design, modify, and sustain the Advanced Mission Planning Aid (AMPA) system for the Royal Air Force. DXC has a presence of more than 6,500 people across the UK and opened a dedicated Aerospace and Defense Hub in Farnborough in June 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Advanced Mission Planning Aid (AMPA)** - Ground-based mission planning system providing computerised support for Typhoon, Hercules, Storm Shadow, Hawk TMk1, and Hawk TMk2 aircrew for mission planning, rehearsal, and debriefing.
- **Aerospace and Defense IT Solutions** - AI-powered IT modernisation, cloud transformation, and digital engineering services for defence primes and government customers.
- **Military Training and Simulation** - In partnership with Hadean, development of next-generation training, planning, and data exploitation capabilities for defence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Military Aviation Authority Design Organisation approval (AMPA)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- **2025-06-26** - DXC opens its Farnborough Aerospace and Defense Hub, consolidating teams from Aldershot and Hook into a single purpose-built facility. [DXC Newsroom](https://dxc.com/newsroom/06262025-dxc-opens-farnborough-office-launches-aerospace-defense-hub-in-uk)

# Dynamic Aerospace Fabrications

> Precision aerospace and defence metal fabrication and component manufacturer based in Castle Donington, operating under the US-headquartered Dynamic Aerospace and Defense group.

## What they do

Dynamic Aerospace Fabrications Ltd supplies precision machined and fabricated metal components to the aerospace, defence, automotive, and nuclear sectors. The company operates from Castle Donington, Derbyshire, and employs around 100 people. It was formed in 2019 following the acquisition of the aerospace division of Paul Fabrications Ltd, which had been manufacturing defence and aerospace components since 1937, including nose cones for Spitfire aircraft and exhaust manifolds for Rolls-Royce Merlin engines during the Second World War. The parent group, Dynamic Aerospace and Defense, is headquartered in Michigan, USA.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision Metal Fabrication** - 6-axis laser cutting, 3-, 4-, and 5-axis CNC milling, CNC turning, hot and cold forming, resistance and fusion welding, and heat treatment for aerospace and defence applications.
- **Aerospace Engine Components** - Internal LPT honeycombed seal assemblies, finger seals, shrouds, and cases for commercial and military aircraft engines.
- **Defence Structural Components** - Sheet metal and fabricated assemblies for military and civil aircraft programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR

# Dynamic Devices Ltd

> Liverpool embedded systems consultancy developing satellite-enabled casualty tracking and hardware security technology for dual-use defence and emergency services applications.

## What they do

Dynamic Devices is an embedded systems consultancy with over two decades of experience in embedded Linux, RTOS, and IoT integration. Its most defence-relevant work is INST (Instantly Networked Smart Triage), an ESA-funded satellite-enabled casualty tracking system that uses low-cost IoT tags and a multi-bearer mesh network, including satellite links, to give commanders real-time visibility of casualty location, number, and triage urgency. The company also contributed to the UKRI Digital Security by Design programme, integrating CHERI/Morello memory-safe processor architecture into the Yocto Embedded Linux build system.

## Products and solutions

- **INST (Instantly Networked Smart Triage)** - Satellite-enabled mass casualty tracking system; IoT tags transmit triage data via mesh and satellite bearers to a digital-twin command map. Site Acceptance Test completed February 2026.
- **meta-cheri (Yocto layer)** - Open-source Yocto/OpenEmbedded layer adding CHERI/Morello build support for hardware-enforced memory safety; contributed to the UKRI DSbD Technology Access Programme.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-01** - INST Site Acceptance Test completed and stakeholder demonstration held at STFC Daresbury. [ESA Space Solutions](https://business.esa.int/projects/inst)
- **2025-06-18** - INST team attended Blue Light Show, Olympia London. [Dynamic Devices](https://www.dynamicdevices.co.uk/inst-team-attends-blue-light-show-2025/)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dynamic-devices-limited

# Dynatrace

> Observability, AI-powered automation, and security software platform, listed on NYSE, with a UK subsidiary based in Maidenhead and active public sector and defence customers.

## What they do

Dynatrace provides a unified software intelligence platform combining full-stack observability, AI-powered analytics, application performance monitoring, log management, digital experience monitoring, and security. The company serves government and defence organisations seeking to monitor and secure complex, cloud-native and hybrid IT environments. Its UK subsidiary, Dynatrace Limited, is registered in Maidenhead and has supplied platform subscriptions to UK public sector bodies via the G-Cloud framework. Dynatrace's platform can operate in air-gapped architectures, which is relevant to classified defence environments.

## Products and solutions

- **Dynatrace Platform** - Unified observability, AIOps, and security platform with full-stack monitoring across applications, infrastructure, and user experience.
- **Threat Observability** - Security analytics combining runtime vulnerability detection with observability telemetry to support security operations.
- **Government and Public Sector Solutions** - Tailored deployment options for regulated environments, including air-gapped and protected hosting, with compliance enablement for government security standards.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (Digital Marketplace)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001

companies.name: DZP Technologies
companies.summary: Cambridge advanced-materials company developing printable conductive inks and flexible electronics for robotics, sensors, and autonomous systems.
companies.body:
# DZP Technologies

> Cambridge advanced-materials company developing printable conductive inks and flexible electronics for robotics, sensors, and autonomous systems.

## What they do

DZP Technologies develops water-based conductive inks, graphene dispersions, and electrically conductive adhesives that can be printed or deposited onto flexible and heat-sensitive substrates including textiles, paper, and polymers. The materials underpin flexible and stretchable electronics for wearables, sensors, energy storage, and embedded circuits. In 2025, ARIA selected DZP under its Robot Dexterity programme to develop printed electronics components enabling dexterous robotic manipulation.

## Products and solutions

- **Silver conductive inks** - printable silver formulations for flexible circuit traces and antennas on polymer and textile substrates.
- **Graphene inks and dispersions** - carbon-based conductive materials for supercapacitors, sensors, and 3D-printed electronics.
- **Electrically conductive adhesives** - low-temperature-cure bonding agents for component attachment on flexible assemblies.
- **Thermal management materials** - heat-dissipation pastes for compact embedded electronics.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Selected by ARIA (Advanced Research + Invention Agency) for funded work under the Robot Dexterity programme, developing printed electronics components for dexterous robotic hands. [ARIA funded projects](https://aria.org.uk/opportunity-spaces/smarter-robot-bodies/robot-dexterity/funded-projects)

## Links

- Website: https://dzptechnologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dzp-technologies-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Companies House (06764280); ARIA funded projects page; DZP Technologies website.

companies.name: e2e-assure Ltd
companies.summary: UK-owned managed threat detection and response provider, specialising in 24/7 SOC-as-a-service for defence, government, and critical national infrastructure.
companies.body:
# e2e-assure

> UK-owned managed threat detection and response provider, specialising in 24/7 SOC-as-a-service for defence, government, and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

e2e-assure delivers Security Operations Centre services to defence, government, and critical infrastructure organisations, using exclusively SC-cleared UK-based analysts. The company operates its proprietary CUMULO platform, which connects IT and OT monitoring, AI-driven threat detection, and real-time response under a single sovereign capability. It has over a decade of experience securing defence and government environments and holds JOSCAR registration, Cyber Essentials Plus, and G-Cloud 14 accreditation. BGF backed the company with a Series B investment in February 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **CUMULO** - Sovereign AI-driven SOC platform for IT and OT environments, supporting zero-day threat detection through behaviour-based rules and live threat intelligence, with Standard and Enterprise tiers.
- **Managed Threat Detection and Response (MDR)** - 24/7 SOC-as-a-service with SC-cleared UK analysts, covering endpoint, cloud, identity, and OT telemetry.
- **OT Security Monitoring** - Passive network monitoring for SCADA, ICS, and industrial control systems, delivering compliance support for NIS2, CAF, and IEC 62443.
- **Vulnerability Scanning and Monitoring** - Continuous vulnerability management integrated with the SOC service.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR, G-Cloud 14
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK

## Recent news

- **2026-06-18** - e2e-assure launches Cumulo, described as the UK's only sovereign AI-driven zero-day SOC platform for IT and OT environments, in response to GCHQ's call for AI-driven national cyber defence. [Intelligent CISO](https://www.intelligentciso.com/2026/06/18/e2e-assure-launches-cumulo-the-uks-only-sovereign-ai-driven-zero-day-soc-platform-for-it-and-ot-security/)
- **2025-02-04** - BGF completes Series B investment in e2e-assure. [BGF](https://www.bgf.co.uk/bgf-invest-10-5m-in-cyber-security-business-e2e-assure/)

# Eagle Eye Innovations

> UK-based RPAS training, operations and consultancy company serving commercial and defence customers globally.

## What they do

Eagle Eye Innovations (EEI) specialises in Remotely Piloted Aircraft Systems (RPAS) training, turn-key operational services, security services, independent consultancy, and research and development for commercial and defence customers. Founded in 2013, EEI was the UK's longest-running CAA-approved drone training provider and the first organisation accredited to deliver the CAA Remote Pilot Certificate Level 1. Its team draws heavily on former military aviation personnel.

## Products and solutions

- **EEI Academy** - CAA-accredited RPAS training programme covering regulatory compliance, airspace, and practical operations across all UAS weight classes.
- **Defence and Security Services** - mission-ready training, operational support, and tailored drone solutions for military and government security customers.
- **Turn-key RPAS Operations** - end-to-end drone services including survey, inspection, and persistent security operations for civil and defence clients.

companies.summary: Edinburgh startup building cooperative autonomy and distributed sensing for uncrewed subsea systems.
companies.body:
# Eagle Ray Robotics Ltd

> Edinburgh startup building cooperative autonomy and distributed sensing for uncrewed subsea systems.

## What they do

Eagle Ray Robotics Ltd is an Edinburgh-based startup, incorporated in 2023, developing technologies that let autonomous systems operate more effectively in the subsea domain. Its work focuses on distributed sensing, cooperative autonomy and intelligent underwater systems supporting defence, offshore energy and environmental monitoring. The company develops a distributed autonomy platform that enables underwater vehicles to operate as a coordinated sensing network, sharing updates while submerged.

## Products and solutions

- **ConstelX (Constellation OS)** - a fleet intelligence operating system that connects heterogeneous autonomous underwater vehicles into cooperative subsea sensing networks, integrating with onboard vehicle software so operators can add cooperative sensing to existing platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Easol

> Innovation-as-a-service partner helping defence and government organisations turn early-stage ideas into market-ready products and services.

## What they do

Easol is a Gosport-based innovation consultancy working across a spectrum of government and private-sector projects. The company uses a proprietary methodology called HeadStarts to move clients from strategy and early-stage concepts through to functional, deployable outcomes. It has worked as a supplier to the Accelerated Capability Environment (ACE) on multiple commissions, including market analysis and technology evaluation work for policing applications. Approximately half its project mix is government and defence.

- **HeadStarts methodology** - structured process for moving innovation concepts through feasibility, market analysis and deployment planning.

companies.body:
# East Harbour Group

> Specialist supplier of chemical intermediates and energetics raw materials to defence and high-hazard manufacturers.

## What they do

East Harbour Group supplies raw materials to manufacturers in the energetics and high-hazard industries, including the civil and defence sectors. The company distributes chemical intermediates used in the production of explosives, propellants and pyrotechnics, alongside a broader range of industrial and speciality chemicals. It operates from Colchester, Essex, and has additional operations in India, with logistics arrangements certified to UKWA, BIFA and FTA standards.

## Products and solutions

- **Energetics raw materials** - supply of materials including PETN (pentaerythritol tetranitrate) and ammonium perchlorate (primary oxidiser in solid rocket motors and composite propellants) to manufacturers in the defence and civil sectors.
- **Chemical intermediates** - distribution of speciality and industrial chemicals including propellant stabilisers such as ethyl centralite, and process chemicals for energetics manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Easyfairs UK

> UK operating entity of the Easyfairs Group, a pan-European events company that organises Advanced Engineering, the UK's leading aerospace, defence and engineering supply-chain exhibition.

## What they do

Easyfairs UK Limited is the British subsidiary of the Brussels-headquartered Easyfairs Group, which runs over 110 market-leading events across 12 countries. In the UK, the principal defence-relevant event is Advanced Engineering, held annually at the NEC Birmingham, which brings together OEMs and engineering supply-chain professionals across aerospace, defence, space, composites, automotive and adjacent sectors. # Ebeni

> Independent safety and engineering assurance consultancy for defence, aerospace, nuclear and rail; MoD Safety Adviser on several large aircraft programmes.

## What they do

Ebeni is an independent specialist engineering company focused on the assessment and assurance of safety, mission and business-critical systems. Its core work spans defence, air traffic management, nuclear and rail. In defence, Ebeni works across air, land, maritime and C4ISTAR domains, providing engineering and management expertise for safety-critical and mission-critical applications. The company is Safety Adviser to the UK MoD on several large aircraft programmes and is Independent Technical Evaluator for the GA-ASI Protector RPAS being delivered to the RAF.

## Products and solutions

- **Safety assurance and certification** - independent safety case development, review and certification for defence platforms, aircraft and complex systems under MoD and civil regulatory frameworks.
- **Airworthiness and regulatory support** - regulatory compliance, airworthiness substantiation and independent technical evaluation for military and civil aviation programmes.
- **Risk and systems engineering** - risk management, system safety analysis, reliability engineering and functional safety assessment across high-integrity domains.

companies.body:
# Echosec Systems UK

> OSINT and geospatial intelligence platform for national security, defence, and law enforcement, operating as part of Flashpoint.

## What they do

Echosec Systems UK Ltd is the UK subsidiary of Echosec Systems, a Canadian-originated open-source intelligence and geospatial intelligence platform company acquired by Flashpoint in August 2022. The platform aggregates real-time data from social media, fringe networks, messaging applications, news sources, and dark web forums, then maps it geospatially to support physical threat intelligence, situational awareness, counterterrorism, and geopolitical risk assessment. The product is now delivered as "Echosec by Flashpoint" within the Flashpoint Ignite unified intelligence platform. The UK operational office is in Cardiff, Wales.

## Products and solutions

- **Echosec by Flashpoint** - geospatial OSINT platform providing real-time social and dark web data mapped to an interactive interface, with geofencing and proximity alerting.
- **Flashpoint Ignite** - unified intelligence platform integrating Echosec capabilities with cyber threat intelligence, vulnerability data, and OSINT.
- **Echosec Assist** - AI summarisation assistant within the Echosec platform, launched May 2024.
- **Echosec Optimize** - AI-powered location-based keyword generation for geospatial OSINT searches, launched December 2025.
- **APIs** - data delivery for integration into customer SIEM, SOAR, and GIS systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Flashpoint launched Echosec Optimize, an AI-powered keyword generation tool for location-based OSINT searches. [source](https://flashpoint.io/resources/product-updates/echosec-optimize/)
- **2024-05** - Flashpoint introduced Echosec Assist, an AI summarisation assistant within the Echosec platform. [source](https://flashpoint.io/resources/product-updates/introducing-echosec-assist/)

## Links

companies.body:
# Eclipse Digital Solutions

> Physical security systems integrator serving Ministry of Defence, government, justice sector, and critical national infrastructure clients.

## What they do

Eclipse Digital Solutions designs, installs, and maintains integrated electronic security systems for government, defence, justice, and critical national infrastructure clients. The company works across MOD installations, HM Prison Service sites, UK Border Agency facilities, and CPNI-advised organisations. In June 2025 it launched a dedicated Custodial Division to formalise its justice sector presence. It holds a strong accreditation stack including Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001, and SSAIB certification, and is a signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Perimeter Intrusion Detection Systems (PIDS)** - perimeter detection integrated with thermal CCTV and video analytics.
- **Drone detection and mitigation** - RF-based detection systems with a range of up to 500 metres.
- **Under-vehicle scanning** - deployed at high-security entry points.
- **CCTV and video management systems** - design, installation, and maintenance across secure sites.
- **Access control** - installation and managed maintenance of access control infrastructure.
- **ANPR** - automatic number plate recognition systems.
- **Control room design and integration** - integrated security control room design for government and defence clients.
- **Managed maintenance and support** - ongoing support services for installed security systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 27001:2017, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, SSAIB, Armed Forces Covenant signatory
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Ecolog International UK

> Global provider of integrated base support and life support services to military and government customers in remote and austere environments.

## What they do

Ecolog International delivers the full suite of base and life support services that keep military personnel operational: accommodation, catering, laundry, facilities management, supply chain, modular construction, engineering, waste and environmental services, healthcare, fuel, water supply, and air service. The company was founded in 1999 following identification of unmet support needs during NATO KFOR operations in Kosovo. Defence and government are its primary markets, with confirmed military customers including the UK Ministry of Defence, US Army, Bundeswehr, NATO, French Army, and the United Nations.

The UK entity (incorporated 2017) is the delivery vehicle for UK and European military contracts. The operational base is in Harlow, Essex. Ecolog has signed the UK Armed Forces Covenant and exhibits regularly at DSEI.

## Products and solutions

- **Life support** - integrated accommodation, catering, food service, and laundry for deployed military personnel.
- **Base and facilities management** - full site management services for military installations in remote and austere environments.
- **Supply chain and logistics** - end-to-end supply chain management for operational and contingency deployments.
- **Modular construction and engineering** - design, build, and maintenance of modular infrastructure for forward operating bases.
- **Healthcare services** - medical support and healthcare provision for deployed forces.
- **Environmental services** - waste management, water supply, and environmental compliance in operational settings.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001:2022
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory

companies.name: ECS Special Projects Ltd
companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of maritime and sub-sea explosive ordnance disposal systems, with products in service with the Royal Navy.
companies.body:
# ECS Special Projects

> Designer and manufacturer of maritime and sub-sea explosive ordnance disposal systems, with products in service with the Royal Navy.

## What they do

ECS Special Projects designs, manufactures, and supplies maritime EOD systems for military and commercial UXO clearance operations. Its flagship Cobra MDS (Mine Disposal System) is a modular sub-sea EOD system in service with the UK Royal Navy and used commercially on offshore wind farm and pipeline projects. The company also manufactures non-lethal security systems and inert training mine targets. It trades as Cobra MDS.

Engineering design is ISO 9001 certified. The company works through a network of strategic partners including Atlas Elektronik GmbH, Ocean Modules, and VideoRay for system integration.

## Products and solutions

- **Cobra MDS** - modular sub-sea mine disposal system; in service with the UK Royal Navy for mine investigation and neutralisation; used commercially on North Sea wind farm and pipeline UXO clearance projects.
- **Viper MDS** - twin-shot disruptor integrated onto the VideoRay Defender ROV for military and commercial EOD operations.
- **Cobra MASTT** - command and control system for Cobra MDS.
- **MX series (MX-50, MX-100, MX-150)** - self-fill, transportable IED and UXO mine disposal tools rated to 300 m depth.
- **LX range** - self-fill low-order deflagrators and disruptors for controlled IED and UXO neutralisation.
- **VAL (Vessel Arrest Launcher)** - pneumatic non-lethal vessel arrest system; deployed by Marine Security Services at the London 2012 Olympics and at the 2013 G8 Summit.
- **Inert mine targets** - replica training mines for Royal Navy validation and training.

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: EDM Limited
companies.summary: Manchester manufacturer of high-performance training simulators and emergency-training equipment for the civil aviation, defence and rail sectors.
companies.body:
# EDM Limited

> Manchester manufacturer of high-performance training simulators and emergency-training equipment for the civil aviation, defence and rail sectors.

## What they do

EDM designs and manufactures training simulators and emergency-training equipment, describing itself as the world's leading supplier of training simulators to the civil aviation and defence markets. Product lines span full-scale cabin crew trainers, maintenance rigs, fire and smoke devices, and defence procedure and maintenance trainers. It is a JOSCAR-registered first-tier supplier and a UK, USA and NATO defence-approved supplier.

## Products and solutions

- **Cabin Emergency Evacuation Trainers (CEETs)** - fuselage-based trainers for cabin crew SOP, SEP and CRM drills, including smoke, fire and evacuation scenarios, in static or motion-based configurations.
- **Door trainers, cabin service trainers and full-size mockups** - civil aviation cabin and crew training devices.
- **Defence procedure trainers, maintenance trainers, ejection seats, simulators and full-size replicas** - synthetic training and maintenance simulators plus ground support equipment.
- **Virtual Slide Trainer** - a recently launched training product.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, AS9100D, Cyber Essentials Plus, JOSCAR registered, RISQS verified (rail). Approved supplier to UK, USA and NATO defence, and to Airbus, Boeing, BAE Systems, Rolls-Royce, Martin Baker and Lockheed Martin.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Make UK, North West Aerospace Alliance, BSI, National Training and Simulation Association.

## Recent news

- **2025-2026** - Acquired Safety Training Systems, Inc. (STS) of Tulsa, USA, combining aviation and defence training capability. [source](https://edmgroupltd.com/)
- **2025-2026** - Won a Boeing 787 and 777 combination Cabin Emergency Evacuation Trainer order from a major US airline. [source](https://www.aero-mag.com/edm-wins-cabin-emergency-evacuation-trainer-order-us-airline/)

## Links

- Website: https://edmgroupltd.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/edm-ltd

companies.body:
# Efficio

> Procurement and supply chain consultancy serving the UK Ministry of Defence and defence supply chain organisations.

## What they do

Efficio is an independent procurement and supply chain consultancy, operating across 14 offices in Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, and North America. It works with public sector clients including the UK MOD on procurement transformation, commercial capability development, and supply chain resilience. Its public sector practice has more than 150 practitioners.

Defence-specific work includes supporting UK Defence Medical Services with sourcing and delivery of medical equipment to the Armed Forces of Ukraine, advising on MOD commercial capability gaps, and publishing a series of insights for UK Defence leaders on strategy, commercial skills, and SME engagement. Efficio has signed the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Procurement transformation** - advisory and implementation services to restructure procurement functions and improve commercial outcomes.
- **Supply chain resilience** - supply chain risk assessment, mapping, and resilience programmes for defence and government clients.
- **Spend analysis and category management** - data-led category strategies across complex spend portfolios.
- **Sustainable procurement** - net-zero and ESG integration into procurement strategy.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.summary: DevSecOps and software lifecycle consultancy with a dedicated defence and aerospace service line and security-cleared staff.
companies.body:
# Eficode UK

> DevSecOps and software lifecycle consultancy with a dedicated defence and aerospace service line and security-cleared staff.

## What they do

Eficode is a European DevOps and software lifecycle consultancy, headquartered in Helsinki with operations across ten countries. The UK entity, headquartered in Southampton and originally trading as Clearvision, was acquired by Eficode in 2022. Eficode provides Atlassian tooling (Jira, Confluence), GitLab, GitHub, DevSecOps, scaled Agile, managed DevOps platforms (Eficode ROOT), ITSM, and AI-assisted software development.

The company has a dedicated "Agile and DevOps in Defence and Aerospace" service line, employs security-cleared staff, and has experience working in air-gapped environments. It is a member of Team Defence Information, the MOD-industry-academia collaboration body, and holds JOSCAR registration alongside ISO 27001 and Cyber Essentials.

## Products and solutions

- **Eficode ROOT** - a managed DevOps toolchain platform; available on G-Cloud.
- **Atlassian services** - implementation, migration, and support for Jira, Confluence, and the Atlassian product suite.
- **GitLab and GitHub services** - advisory, implementation, and managed services; Eficode is an Atlassian Platinum and GitHub partner.
- **DevSecOps for defence and aerospace** - secure software pipeline design, implementation, and operation in regulated and classified environments.
- **Agile and scaled Agile** - coaching, tooling, and transformation for Agile adoption on complex defence programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR; G-Cloud (supplier ID 92614)
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, ISO 27001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Team Defence Information (joined December 2023)

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Eficode unifies global operations into a single functional organisation aligned around AI in software development. [source](https://www.eficode.com/press-releases/eficode-unifies-global-operations-to-power-the-ai-driven-future-of-software-development)

companies.name: Egis UK - Consulting and Engineering Limited
companies.summary: Engineering and consulting firm with active UK defence-nuclear work including the Sellafield decommissioning programme and Sizewell C civil design.
companies.body:
# Egis UK

> Engineering and consulting firm with active UK defence-nuclear work including the Sellafield decommissioning programme and Sizewell C civil design.

## What they do

Egis is a French engineering, project management, and mobility services group with approximately 23,500 employees across more than 100 countries. The UK entity, headquartered in London at Valentine Place in Southwark, employs approximately 1,000 people across offices in London, Bristol, Farnborough, Edinburgh, Glasgow, and Oakham.

UK work spans civil and defence nuclear engineering, aviation advisory and engineering, rail and urban transit, and roads. Defence-relevant work is concentrated in the nuclear domain: Egis holds positions on the £4.6bn Sellafield Decommissioning and Nuclear Waste Partnership (Lot 1, through the Amentum-led DNWP consortium), the Sizewell C civil design contract (extended September 2025), and through its subsidiary Galson Sciences Ltd, a 10-year appointment as Major Permissions Delivery Partner for Nuclear Waste Services' Geological Disposal Facility programme. The parent group holds explicit defence infrastructure capability including naval bases, air bases, and secure environments, primarily for the French Ministry of Armed Forces.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence and civil nuclear engineering** - safety case, civil design, and decommissioning engineering for nuclear sites including Sellafield, Hinkley Point C, and Sizewell C.
- **Nuclear waste and geological disposal** - technical and permitting support for the UK Geological Disposal Facility programme (Galson Sciences subsidiary).
- **Aviation engineering and advisory** - airport operations, airspace design, and engineering services; long-standing base at Farnborough.
- **Rail and transport engineering** - digital rail transformation and transit infrastructure; client includes Transport for London.
- **Infrastructure and buildings** - civil and structural engineering, including roads (M25, M40 operations).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR; Sellafield Decommissioning and Nuclear Waste Partnership (Lot 1, October 2025); Transport for London Professional Services Framework (April 2025)
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 27001:2022
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Thomas and Adamson rebrands as Egis following acquisition, expanding the UK headcount to approximately 1,000. [source](https://www.egis-group.com/all-news/thomas-adamson-rebrands-as-egis-following-acquisition)
- **2025-10** - Egis awarded positions on the multi-billion-pound Sellafield Decommissioning and Nuclear Waste Partnership framework (Lot 1, Amentum-led consortium). [source](https://www.egis-group.com/all-news/egis-awarded-positions-on-sellafield-decommissioning-framework)
- **2025-09** - Egis and ICOSH consortium secure Sizewell C contract extension. [source](https://news.europawire.eu/egis-and-icosh-consortium-secure-contract-extension-to-advance-sizewell-c-nuclear-power-project/eu-press-release/2025/09/02/15/46/32/161548/)
- **2025-04** - Egis awarded major contract with Transport for London under the Professional Services Framework. [source](https://news.railbusinessdaily.com/egis-awarded-major-contract-with-transport-for-london/)

# Egregious

> London-based AI startup providing narrative intelligence and SOCMINT capabilities for national security, defence, and regulated industries.

## What they do

Egregious builds AI-powered analysis tools to detect and counter disinformation, malign influence operations, and AI-driven deception. Their platform maps the relationships between online narratives to deliver actionable intelligence. The company serves national security and defence clients alongside finance and corporate security customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Narrative Graph** - an AI-driven map of online narratives used to identify and track influence operations and disinformation campaigns.
- **SOCMINT Platform** - private and secure social media intelligence for national security and defence use cases.
- **Narrative Intelligence** - tools for detecting AI-generated content, polarisation, and coordinated inauthentic behaviour across open-source channels.

# EIZO

> Japanese display manufacturer producing rugged, TEMPEST-compliant and MIL-STD-810 qualified monitors for defence C4ISR, air traffic control, and maritime applications.

## What they do

EIZO Corporation develops high-end display solutions across professional, healthcare, maritime, and defence markets. Its dedicated defence subsidiary, EIZO Rugged Solutions Inc. (Orlando, Florida), has over 30 years' experience in military ISR display and embedded processing, supplying rugged LCD monitors and GPGPU cards qualified to MIL-STD-810 and TEMPEST standards. The UK entity, EIZO Limited (Companies House 07738824, Ascot, Berkshire), handles commercial and professional display distribution; defence-specific UK sales are supported by Sarsen Technology as a UK integration partner.

## Products and solutions

- **Talon rugged LCD monitors** - MIL-STD-810 qualified, TEMPEST-compliant, sunlight-readable monitors in 24-, 28-, and 32-inch formats for vehicle, shipborne, and ground station applications.
- **Embedded GPGPU and video processing** - SOSA-aligned XMC and VPX cards for OpenVPX C4ISR integration, including H.264/265 encoders and video splitters.
- **Sonar and radar display variants** - specialist 2K×2K and stereoscopic display configurations for sonar visualisation, radar, and chart table navigation.

## Recent news

companies.body:
# Elastic
> US-listed search and analytics platform with a defined UK Defence and Public Sector practice, deployed across MOD, intelligence and central government workloads.

## What they do
Elastic produces the Elasticsearch engine and the wider Elastic Stack (Elasticsearch, Kibana, Beats, Logstash), used for search, observability, security and generative AI workloads at scale. In the UK, Elastic operates a dedicated Defence and Public Sector practice and supports government-aligned deployments including air-gapped and on-premises options. The platform underpins log search, threat detection (Elastic Security / SIEM) and observability of mission systems across MOD and intelligence customers.

Elastic is listed on the NYSE (ESTC) and has significant UK presence alongside its Mountain View headquarters.

## Products and solutions
- **Elastic Stack** - search, observability and security analytics platform (Elasticsearch, Kibana, Beats, Logstash).
- **Elastic Security** - SIEM and threat detection, deployed across government and defence environments.
- **Air-gapped and on-premises deployment** - government-aligned options for classified and sensitive environments.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/elastic-co/

Elasticsearch Limited is the UK entity of Elastic NV (NYSE: ESTC), a Dutch-American software company headquartered in San Francisco. companies.body:
# Elbit Systems UK

> UK subsidiary of Israeli defence prime Elbit Systems, delivering UAS, electronic warfare, optronics, battle management, and military training systems to the UK Armed Forces.

## What they do

Elbit Systems UK Limited is the UK holding entity for Elbit Systems' British operations, comprising six subsidiaries and two joint ventures across sixteen sites and approximately 680 employees. The company is engaged in multiple major UK defence programmes spanning uncrewed aerial systems, electronic warfare, optronics, command and control, and military flight training. It operates manufacturing, design, and support facilities in England.

## Products and solutions

- **Watchkeeper WK450 UAS** - tactical uncrewed aerial system delivered to the British Army through UAV Tactical Systems Ltd (UTacS), which Elbit fully acquired in January 2026.
- **MORPHEUS Battle Management Application** - command and control software for British Army headquarters and tactical units, based on the TORC2 H platform.
- **MEWSIC (Maritime Electronic Warfare Systems Integrated Capability) Increment 1** - electronic warfare suites for the Royal Navy, provided under a 13-year, £100 million contract with Babcock and QinetiQ.
- **UK Military Flying Training System (MFLTS)** - elementary and basic fast-jet training aircraft and simulators delivered through the Affinity Flying Training Services joint venture with KBR.
- **Night Vision Goggles** - produced at a Centre of Excellence for electro-optics in Kent, supplying the British Army and allied nations.
- **Joint Fires Synthetic Training (JFST)** - simulators supporting Joint Terminal Attack Controller and Fire Support Team training for the British Army.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Elbit Systems UK completed the full acquisition of UAV Tactical Systems Ltd (UTacS) following UK government and regulatory approval. [Flight Global](https://www.flightglobal.com/defence/elbit-systems-uk-takes-full-ownership-of-watchkeeper-industrial-venture-utacs/166041.article)
- **2025-02** - Royal Navy's next-generation electronic warfare system under MEWSIC Increment 1 entered final test phase. [The Defense Post](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/02/13/royal-navys-electronic-warfare/)

companies.name: Electric Twin
companies.summary: AI startup building synthetic audiences that model how populations think and behave, with stated applicability to military campaign planning and strategic influence operations.
companies.body:
# Electric Twin

> AI startup building synthetic audiences that model how populations think and behave, with stated applicability to military campaign planning and strategic influence operations.

## What they do

Electric Twin combines large language models with real-world survey data and social science research to generate synthetic human populations. Clients run simulations against these audiences to predict how real people will respond to messages, policies, or decisions. Independent validation by the London School of Economics found the platform achieves 95% accuracy across 40,000 evaluations in 155 countries. Co-founder Alex Cooper is a former British Army officer and has explicitly positioned the capability for military planning. Simon Case, former Cabinet Secretary and Non-Executive Director at the Ministry of Defence, sits on the company's ethics board.

## Products and solutions

- **Synthetic audience platform** - AI-generated population models enabling simulation of human responses to communications, policies, and campaign messages across demographic and geographic segments.

## Recent news

- **2026-02** - Raised $10 million Series A led by Atomico, with participation from LocalGlobe, Mercuri, and Samos Investments, bringing total funding to $14 million. [EU Startups](https://www.eu-startups.com/2026/02/covid-government-adviser-and-military-commander-land-e12-million-to-scale-electric-twins-synthetic-audience-platform/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/electric-twin

# Electrogear

Electrogear (Fareham) Ltd is a small engineering business providing electro-mechanical, electrical, electronic, and radio frequency design and manufacturing services.
