# Electropak

> Preston-based precision engineering and busbar manufacturer with AS9100 certification and BAE Systems approval, supplying aerospace and defence programmes including Eurofighter, Tornado, Hawk, and F-35.

## What they do

Electropak Limited is a precision engineering and busbar manufacturer established in 1986 and based in Preston, Lancashire. The company holds AS9100 Rev D and ISO 9001 certifications and is approved by BAE Systems. It provides CNC machining, sheet metal fabrication, busbar manufacture, aerospace engraving, painting, and surface finishing services to the aerospace, defence, energy, medical, and rail sectors. Electropak is a subsidiary of UKC Group and exhibited at DSEI 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Busbar Manufacture** - custom busbar assemblies for aerospace, defence, and energy applications.
- **Aerospace Engraving** - engraving of labels, panels, and tools for aircraft including Eurofighter, Tornado, Hawk, and F-35 Joint Strike Fighter.
- **Defence Painting and Surface Finishing** - AS9100-certified powder coating and painting for defence and aerospace components.
- **Sheet Metal Fabrication** - bespoke fabricated structures and assemblies for defence and aerospace programmes.

companies.name: Electrosciences Ltd
companies.summary: UK materials science consultancy specialising in piezoelectric, ferroelectric, and multifunctional materials, with applications in military sensors, sonar, and structural materials.
companies.body:
# Electrosciences Ltd

> UK materials science consultancy specialising in piezoelectric, ferroelectric, and multifunctional materials, with applications in military sensors, sonar, and structural materials.

## What they do

Electrosciences provides scientific consultancy and contract R&D in multifunctional materials, covering piezoelectric, ferroelectric, pyroelectric, multiferroic, magnetoelectric, and thermoelectric systems. Services include measurement, characterisation, metrology, standards development, and the development of bespoke instruments. The company also supplies commercial instruments for piezoelectric materials characterisation.

## Products and solutions

- **Piezoelectric Materials d33 Analyser** - instrument for measuring piezoelectric coefficients in materials and components.
- **LIMM Analyser** - laser intensity modulation method instrument for pyroelectric and piezoelectric profiling.
- **StressCell (Multifunctional Stress Rig)** - test rig for combined mechanical and electrical characterisation of materials.
- **ESPY33** - piezoelectric measurement tool developed in collaboration with aixACCT Systems GmbH.
- **Contract R&D and characterisation services** - testing and modelling of multifunctional materials for defence, aerospace, and industrial clients.

## Defence and aerospace applications

The company's publicly stated military and defence applications include sonar transduction, adaptive camouflage materials, self-healing structural materials, sensor and actuator arrays for military platforms, functionally graded armour materials, and super-hydrophobic surface coatings for military equipment.

companies.name: Element Materials Technology
companies.summary: The world's largest independent provider of testing, inspection, and certification services to the aerospace and defence sector, headquartered in London and owned by Temasek (Singapore).
companies.body:
# Element Materials Technology

> The world's largest independent provider of testing, inspection, and certification services to the aerospace and defence sector, headquartered in London and owned by Temasek (Singapore).

## What they do

Element Materials Technology provides testing, inspection, and certification services across aerospace, defence, and advanced industrial supply chains. Their defence capability spans materials testing, product qualification testing, non-destructive testing, environmental and EMC testing, vibration and shock testing, calibration, and space simulation testing. The company operates over 270 laboratory locations worldwide and has supported programmes including F-35, F-22, A400M, CH-53K, Challenger MBT, Mastiff, and Husky.

UK laboratory locations with defence relevance include Hitchin, Hull, Malvern, Skelmersdale, Warwick, and Wimborne. The company also operates Element Defense (elementdefense.com) as a dedicated US Space and Defense division.

## Products and solutions

- **Materials testing** - destructive and non-destructive testing of metals, composites, coatings, and structural components to aerospace and defence standards.
- **Product qualification testing (PQT)** - environmental, EMC, vibration, shock, and climatic testing to military specifications across six UK sites.
- **Space simulation testing** - thermal-vacuum, vibration, and acoustic testing for space programmes.
- **Calibration services** - traceable calibration across mechanical, electrical, and dimensional measurement disciplines.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (UK Product Qualification Testing laboratories; recognised by BAE Systems, Babcock, QinetiQ, NATS, Leonardo, Meggitt, and the MOD)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (multiple UK sites)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Ownership note

Element Materials Technology is operationally headquartered in London. Ultimate ownership is Temasek, the Singaporean state investment fund, which acquired the business from Bridgepoint in July 2022 for approximately $7 billion. The company is a substantive UK-headquartered business, not a thin UK entity of a foreign firm.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-19** - Announced $20M+ investment to expand the Charlotte, North Carolina aerospace and defence materials testing facility, adding stress rupture, tensile, metallurgical, and miniature testing capacity. [source](https://www.element.com/about-element/news/2026/05/19/element-materials-technology-invests-more-than-20-million-in-charlotte-facility-to-expand-aerospace-and-defense-materials-testing-capacity)
- **2025-12** - Acquired CETECOM (USA), expanding US wireless and connectivity testing capacity. [source](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-element-materials-technology)
- **2024-10** - Acquired Issinspection. [source](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-element-materials-technology)

## Links

- Website: https://www.element.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/element-materials-technology

Elendil Alliance structures and builds UK-incorporated joint ventures with Ukrainian defence technology innovators. companies.name: Elesa (UK) Ltd
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A. (Italy), supplying certified standard machine elements and industrial components to the defence, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing sectors.
companies.body:
# Elesa (UK) Ltd

> UK subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A. (Italy), supplying certified standard machine elements and industrial components to the defence, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing sectors.

## What they do

Elesa (UK) Ltd is the UK subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A., established in 1991 and based in Metheringham, Lincolnshire. The company supplies standard machine elements in plastic and metal, including knobs, handles, levers, hinges, fasteners, clamps, levelling elements, and position indicators, marketed to defence and aerospace manufacturers and MRO suppliers.

Defence and aerospace-relevant product lines include ATEX-certified control elements for explosive-atmosphere environments, INOX stainless steel ranges (AISI 303, 304, 316L) for corrosive and naval environments, Visual Detectable (VD) components for inspection-critical applications, and vibration-damping parts for platform-mounted equipment. Elesa (UK) exhibited at DSEI 2025 to market these product lines directly to the defence and security sector.

## Products and solutions

- **ATEX-certified components** - IECEx/ATEX zone 1 and zone 21 certified control elements, knobs, and levers for explosive-atmosphere defence and offshore applications.
- **INOX stainless steel range** - AISI 303, 304, and 316L components for naval, offshore, and aerospace environments requiring corrosion resistance.
- **Visual Detectable (VD) components** - safety-oriented components designed for inspection visibility in defence and critical-industry applications.
- **Vibration-damping elements** - components for mobile and platform-mounted military and industrial equipment.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Ownership note

Elesa (UK) Ltd is a subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A., headquartered in Monza (Milan), Italy, founded 1941. The UK entity was established in 1991 with operational facilities at Metheringham, Lincolnshire.

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Exhibited at DSEI 2025, ExCeL London (Stand N4-245), showcasing ATEX, INOX, VD, and vibration-damping components for defence applications. [source](https://www.elesa.com/en/CatalogoMediaServicesUK/news---1/elesa-uk-to-showcase-dsei-2025)
- **2025-10** - Confirmed exhibitor at Advanced Engineering 2025, NEC Birmingham. [source](https://www.advancedengineeringuk.com/exhibitor/elesa-uk-ltd/)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/elesa-uk

companies.body:
# Elite Electronic Systems Ltd

> Northern Ireland-based contract electronics manufacturer specialising in high-reliability PCB assembly, cable and harness assembly, and box-build for the aerospace and defence sector.

## What they do

Elite Electronic Systems is a contract electronics manufacturing services (EMS) provider focused on high-reliability and regulated markets, with aerospace and defence as a primary sector. The company offers PCB assembly, cable and harness assembly, high-level and box-build assembly, and control panels, serving OEMs from prototype and NPI through to production scale. It operates three UK manufacturing sites: Enniskillen (Northern Ireland), Livingston (Scotland), and Chesterfield (England), totalling approximately 150,000 sq ft of manufacturing space. The company is backed by private equity investor Lonsdale Capital Partners.

## Products and solutions

- **PCB assembly (PCBA)** - high-reliability surface-mount and through-hole assembly for aerospace, defence, medical, and industrial OEMs.
- **Cable and harness assembly** - from prototype to volume production for complex defence and aerospace wiring systems.
- **Box-build and systems integration** - high-level assembly including panel wiring, mechanical assembly, and functional test.
- **NPI and prototype services** - new product introduction support from design for manufacture through to first articles.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** AS9100D (all three sites; Livingston achieved AS9100D June 2026), ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485:2016, ISO 27001:2022
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- **2025-12** - Acquired Kingfield Electronics (Chesterfield), a high-reliability EMS provider with 40+ years in aerospace and defence. [source](https://www.lonsdalepartners.com/news/lonsdale-backed-elite-electronics-completes-bolt-on-acquisition-of-kingfield-electronics/)

companies.body:
# Elma Electronic UK

> UK subsidiary of the Swiss Elma Electronic group; designs and manufactures rugged chassis, backplanes, and embedded computing sub-systems for defence C5ISR, EW, and SIGINT applications.

## What they do

Elma Electronic UK Ltd is the British trading entity of the Elma Electronic group, headquartered in Switzerland, with over 35 years of experience in rugged embedded computing hardware for defence and aerospace. The Bedford-based UK operation supplies and supports chassis, backplane, and enclosure products deployed across Royal Navy submarines and surface ships, as well as land and air platforms. The company holds SC21 Bronze status and is an active ADS Group member. The wider Elma group operates across the USA, UK, Germany, Switzerland, and other regions.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged VPX and OpenVPX chassis** - VITA 46/65, SOSA-aligned, CMOSS and HOST-compatible chassis for C5ISR and EW applications.
- **Backplanes and enclosures** - VME, CPCI, CPCI Serial, VNX+ backplane and sub-system designs for land, naval, and air platforms.
- **Custom embedded sub-systems** - configured and integrated computing systems for radar, SIGINT, and sensor processing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Emberion Limited
companies.summary: Cambridge-based developer of colloidal quantum dot infrared sensors and cameras for surveillance, drone-based imaging, and defence ISR; acquired by French electro-optical company Exosens in April 2026.
companies.body:
# Emberion

> Cambridge-based developer of colloidal quantum dot infrared sensors and cameras for surveillance, drone-based imaging, and defence ISR; acquired by French electro-optical company Exosens in April 2026.

## What they do

Emberion Limited is a deep-technology sensor company that designs and manufactures shortwave infrared (SWIR) and broadband visible-to-thermal cameras using colloidal quantum dot technology and graphene transducers integrated with proprietary CMOS readout ICs. Founded in 2016 as a spinout from Nokia with R&D operations in Cambridge (UK) and Espoo (Finland), the company targets defence surveillance, portable imaging, and drone-based ISR markets. In April 2026 Emberion was acquired by Exosens (Nasdaq: EXOSENS), a French electro-optical group, to expand Exosens's defence and surveillance imaging portfolio. The Emberion brand and Cambridge operation remain active post-acquisition.

## Products and solutions

- **VS20 Vis-SWIR camera** - 400-2000 nm broadband camera combining visible and shortwave infrared in a single sensor, suited to night vision, surveillance, and laser range finding.
- **Ultra-wide band Vis-SWIR-Thermal sensors** - broad-spectrum sensors spanning visible, SWIR, and thermal bands for multi-domain ISR.
- **Graphene quantum dot transducers** - proprietary sensing element technology underpinning the product range; covered by 25 protected patent families worldwide.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-24** - Acquired by Exosens (Nasdaq: EXOSENS) to expand the group's defence and surveillance imaging portfolio, with specific focus on portable and drone-based imaging systems. [source](https://www.emberion.com/exosens-acquires-emberion/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/emberion

# EMI Seals & Gaskets Ltd

> UK manufacturer of custom sealing, shielding and thermal components for defence, aerospace, nuclear and space applications.

## What they do

EMI Seals & Gaskets Ltd designs and manufactures custom sealing and EMI/RF shielding components, including seals, gaskets, O-rings, bonded washers, thermal management products, foams, extrusions and mouldings. The company supplies the defence, aerospace, nuclear, space and industrial sectors, and holds a long-standing position in the UK defence supply chain with products embedded in named platforms including the BOXER Armoured Fighting Vehicle, Type 26 Frigate and nuclear submarine programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **EMI/RF shielding components** - custom shielded gaskets and seals for electromagnetic compatibility in defence and aerospace platforms.
- **Sealing solutions** - O-rings, bonded washers, moulded seals and extrusions for aerospace, nuclear and defence applications.

companies.summary: Specialist energetics and pyrotechnics company designing, developing, testing and manufacturing explosive, propellant and blast protection products for defence and security customers.
companies.body:
# Energetics Technology Ltd

> Specialist energetics and pyrotechnics company designing, developing, testing and manufacturing explosive, propellant and blast protection products for defence and security customers.

## What they do

Energetics Technology Ltd (ETL) researches, develops and manufactures energetic materials products and blast mitigation equipment. Capability areas include high-explosive and pyrotechnic compositions, pyrotechnic payloads and actuators, rocket propellants, cable cutters, gas generators, igniters and delays, and IED-resistant containment and mitigation products. Customers include defence manufacturers, EOD teams, police and special forces. ETL is part of the Etienne Lacroix Group, a French defence and pyrotechnics group.

## Products and solutions

- **Pyrotechnic payloads and actuators** - designed for integration into ordnance and weapons systems.
- **Cable cutters** - electrically initiated cutters for braided steel, armoured cabling and fibre-optic lines.
- **Rocket propellants** - melt-castable, low-cost formulations designed for high-volume production.
- **Blast mitigation products** - IED isolation units, bomb-resistant litter bins and detonator containment units for use in public spaces and by EOD and police teams.
- **CIED training and EOD equipment** - training aids and equipment for counter-IED and explosive ordnance disposal roles.
- **40mm medium-velocity ammunition** - design and evaluation of medium-velocity ammunition for small arms and support weapons.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Entrust (Europe)

> UK and European entity of Entrust Corporation, providing digital identity, PKI, hardware security modules and border-control technology to government and defence-adjacent customers.

## What they do

Entrust (Europe) Ltd is the UK and European legal entity of Entrust Corporation, a US-headquartered digital security company. Through this entity the Entrust portfolio is delivered to UK government, financial services, and critical national infrastructure customers. The UK product footprint includes hardware security modules, PKI and certificate lifecycle management, AI-powered identity verification, and government credential and travel-document issuance platforms. The registered UK office is in London; principal operational presence is in Reading.

## Products and solutions

- **nShield Hardware Security Modules** - physical cryptographic devices certified to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+, used to protect PKI, encryption keys and classified infrastructure. Acquired from Thales (nCipher) in 2019.
- **PKI and certificate lifecycle management** - TLS/SSL, code signing and document signing certificates and management platforms.
- **Digital identity verification** - AI-powered biometric IDV and document verification, expanded through the acquisition of Onfido in April 2024.
- **Government credential and border-control solutions** - ePassport and national identity card issuance, biometric smart corridors, eGates, and the Electronic Travel Authorisation platform deployed for the UK Home Office.
- **Identity and access management** - enterprise authentication, MFA and zero-trust enablement.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Entrust Corporation organisation-wide); nShield HSMs certified to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - UK ETA and eVisa milestones reported; 19.6 million ETAs and 2.2 million visas issued since October 2023, with biometric algorithms reducing manual verifications by over 50%. [source](https://www.biometricupdate.com/202601/uk-eta-evisa-milestones-position-entrust-to-expand-citizen-identity-footprint)
- **2025-07** - Entrust received the US Midsize Investment in the UK award at the Transatlantic Growth Awards 2025. [source](https://www.entrust.com/company/newsroom/entrust-receives-tag-award)

## Links

- Website: https://www.entrust.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/entrust

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Entrust corporate website (entrust.com), ADS Group member profile, Companies House (03403634), ICO data controller register (Z1987264), UK Home Office ETA case study and press release (entrust.com), Biometric Update, Wikipedia (Entrust). Entrust (Europe) Ltd is the UK/European subsidiary of Entrust Corporation (Shakopee, Minnesota, USA; private). The registered office is 9 Devonshire Square, London; operational UK office at Abbey Gardens, Reading.

companies.name: Entrust Security Solutions UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK operating subsidiary of Entrust Corporation, with roots in the Datacard physical credential issuance business, supplying secure card and document issuance systems, encryption hardware and identity infrastructure to government and defence-adjacent customers.
companies.body:
# Entrust Security Solutions UK

> UK operating subsidiary of Entrust Corporation, with roots in the Datacard physical credential issuance business, supplying secure card and document issuance systems, encryption hardware and identity infrastructure to government and defence-adjacent customers.

## What they do

Entrust Security Solutions UK Ltd is a UK-registered operating subsidiary of Entrust Corporation, a US-headquartered digital security company. The entity traces its lineage to Datacard Corporation (founded 1969), which was acquired by Entrust Inc. to form Entrust Datacard in 2013 and rebranded as Entrust in 2020; the UK entity was renamed to its current form in 2021. It sits within the Entrust portfolio alongside Entrust (Europe) Ltd, which holds the European software and services activity. The SIC code is 46520 (wholesale of electronic and telecommunications equipment). The registered office is at 9 Devonshire Square, London.

## Products and solutions

- **Card and credential issuance systems** - hardware and software platforms for printing and personalising government identity cards, military credentials, smart cards and passports. Rooted in the Datacard card-printing heritage.
- **nShield Hardware Security Modules** - FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+ certified cryptographic devices for key management and PKI, shared across the Entrust group following the nCipher acquisition from Thales in 2019.
- **ePassport and national identity document infrastructure** - secure credential issuance platforms used by governments for travel documents and national ID schemes.
- **PKI and encryption** - certificate lifecycle management and encryption infrastructure.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Entrust Corporation organisation-wide); nShield HSMs certified to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - UK ETA and eVisa milestones reported across the Entrust group; 19.6 million ETAs and 2.2 million visas issued since October 2023. [source](https://www.biometricupdate.com/202601/uk-eta-evisa-milestones-position-entrust-to-expand-citizen-identity-footprint)
- **2025-07** - Entrust announced CEO succession: Tony Ball to succeed Todd Wilkinson, effective 31 March 2026. [source](https://www.entrust.com/company/newsroom/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.entrust.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/entrust

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Entrust corporate website (entrust.com), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/entrust-security-solutions-uk-ltd-1/), Companies House (03056930), open.endole.co.uk, Wikipedia (Entrust), Secure ID News (rebrand reporting), Cambridge Network (nCipher/Entrust announcement), Biometric Update. Entrust Security Solutions UK Ltd is a UK subsidiary of Entrust Corporation (Shakopee, Minnesota, USA; private). Incorporated 1995 as Glanco (34) Ltd, renamed Data Card 1995 Ltd, then Data Card Ltd, then current name in 2021.

companies.name: Environmental Defence Systems Limited
companies.summary: Huddersfield manufacturer of blast protection, explosive ordnance disposal support equipment and aviation fire containment products, serving the British MoD, EOD departments and commercial aviation operators worldwide.
companies.body:
# Environmental Defence Systems

> Huddersfield manufacturer of blast protection, explosive ordnance disposal support equipment and aviation fire containment products, serving the British MoD, EOD departments and commercial aviation operators worldwide.

## What they do

Environmental Defence Systems Limited, trading as EDS Limited, invents, manufactures and supplies protective products used by military forces, emergency services and commercial aviation operators. Its BlastSax product is in active service with the British MoD and EOD departments; its AvSax product has become the world's best-selling aviation lithium battery fire containment bag. The company holds ADS Group and Counter EO UK membership.

## Products and solutions

- **BlastSax** - sandless sandbags that absorb water to form a blast and fragmentation protection barrier. Deployed by the British MoD and EOD departments, and used by police forces worldwide to contain small explosive devices during detonation, including two World War Two bombs disposed of by Hong Kong Police.
- **AvSax** - fire containment bags for in-flight lithium battery emergencies. Carried on more than 15,373 aircraft operated by 80 airlines. Winner of the Queen's Award for Enterprise (Innovation) in 2018.
- **FloodSax** - alternative sandbags for civil flood protection and liquid spill absorption.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Counter EO UK (listed under Personal Protection Equipment).

## Links

- Website: https://edslimited.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (edslimited.co.uk), ADS Group member profile, Companies House (06300190), Counter EO UK member directory, FloodSax news page (Armed Forces and emergency services use), ZoomInfo company profile. The LinkedIn slug `eds-limited` was surfaced in research but was not independently verified as resolving unambiguously to this company, so the LinkedIn line has been omitted. Queen's Award for Enterprise (Innovation) 2018 confirmed from public sources.

companies.name: Envitia

companies.body:
# Envitia

> UK geospatial and data software and services firm serving defence, national security and central government.

## What they do

Envitia is an IT services and consulting company specialising in complex data challenges. Its consultancy and technical engineering teams deliver data solutions that enable defence, national security and central government customers to make better decisions. Stated specialties include software engineering, mapping and geospatial, data modelling, data quality, data governance, analytics, and AI and machine learning. The operating entity is Envitia Ltd, under holding company Envitia Group Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **MapLink Pro** - a cross-platform suite of geospatial software development toolkits used as a foundation for command and control, ISR, situational awareness, and training and simulation applications. MapLink Pro 11 was released in 2025. Publicly named integrators include BAE Systems, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, General Dynamics and IBM.
- **Data Discovery Platform (DDP)** - a modular geospatial data discovery, cataloguing and processing platform with open-standards APIs to discover, harvest, transform and visualise data, used in UK and US military systems.
- **Service lines** - AI and machine learning, architecture, cloud services, data analytics and visualisation, data quality and management, digital and data strategy, geospatial, and software engineering.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO/IEC 27001, Cyber Essentials, JOSCAR registered (certification badges carried on the company homepage).
- **Memberships:** techUK.

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Envitia announced work supporting Defra's digital-first ambitions. [source](https://www.envitia.com/2026/06/envitia-supports-digital-transformation-defra/)
- **2025-02** - MapLink Pro 11 launched. [source](https://www.envitia.com/2025/02/officially-live-maplink-pro-11/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.envitia.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/envitia

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (envitia.com, MapLink Pro and news pages), Companies House (Envitia Ltd 02348404, Envitia Group Limited 03982993), LinkedIn company page, techUK white paper listing. LinkedIn lists the company-size band as 51-200 employees, with headcount reported as approaching 100. Backed by Maven Capital Partners following a 2020 management buyout of Envitia Group.

companies.name: EP90 Group
companies.summary: Specialist consultancy in security and intelligence, automotive cyber security, and private mobile networks for government and defence clients.
companies.body:
# EP90 Group

> Specialist consultancy in security and intelligence, automotive cyber security, and private mobile networks for government and defence clients.

## What they do

EP90 Group operates across three practices: security and intelligence, automotive cyber security, and mobile telecoms. Its founders bring backgrounds in UK government interception agencies and complex security investigations, and its client portfolio spans military, policing, government, and adjacent industries. The telecoms practice focuses on 4G LTE and 5G standalone private network design, with a national cyber capacity building strand.

## Products and solutions

- **Security and intelligence consultancy** - Communications intelligence, cyber threat intelligence, industrial control system (ICS) security, and confidential investigations with a digital dimension.
- **Automotive cyber security testing** - Bespoke component, sub-assembly, and whole-vehicle testing; Attacker-in-the-Loop (AIL) testing integrating security into the embedded-system development lifecycle for connected and autonomous vehicles.
- **Private network design** - 4G LTE and 5G standalone private networks; national cyber capacity building.

## Links

- Website: https://www.ep90group.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ep90group-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Companies House (09758830); EP90 Group website; Dorset Innovation Park enterprise zone records.

# Epicor Software UK

> Enterprise resource planning and manufacturing management software supplier to the aerospace and defence supply chain.

## What they do

Epicor sells ERP and manufacturing management software with a named aerospace and defence vertical. Their core platform, Epicor Kinetic, is a cloud ERP system with compliance capabilities covering ITAR export control, CMMC 2.0 cybersecurity readiness, DCAA financial accountability, DFARS and DCMA requirements, and AS9100 quality management workflows including first article inspection, non-conformance tracking, and CAPA. The UK subsidiary in Bracknell serves as the sales, support, and professional services presence for the UK market.

## Products and solutions

- **Epicor Kinetic** - Cloud ERP platform with an aerospace and defence module covering ITAR, CMMC 2.0, AS9100, shop floor data collection, finite capacity scheduling, and defence supply chain management.
- **Epicor Prism** - Agentic AI capability for manufacturing operations, announced at Epicor Insights 2025.
- **Epicor Grow AI** - Predictive machine learning for manufacturing, announced 2025.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (Epicor Kinetic listed on UK Government Digital Marketplace)

- **2024** - CVC Capital Partners joined Clayton, Dubilier and Rice as co-investor. [source](https://www.epicor.com/en-us/newsroom/news-releases/cvc/)

companies.body:
# Epiq Design Solutions UK

> Commercial off-the-shelf software-defined radio platforms for electronic warfare, signals intelligence, and counter-UAS applications.

## What they do

Epiq Design Solutions is the UK subsidiary of Epiq Solutions Inc., a US defence-technology company founded in 2009 with heritage from the former radio division of G3 Technologies. The company designs and manufactures COTS software-defined radio transceivers and rugged embedded computing platforms for RF sensing, signal processing, electronic warfare, and uncrewed platform payloads. The UK entity, registered in February 2023, serves as the company's UK and European market presence. The parent holds a portfolio of SDR product families addressing SWaP-constrained defence mission requirements, electronic attack, spectrum awareness, direction finding, and signals intelligence.

## Products and solutions

- **Matchstiq Z4** - Compact SDR transceiver targeting small uncrewed platform payloads, electronic attack and jamming, and counter-UAS applications; announced January 2026.
- **Matchstiq X40** - SDR platform combining Analog Devices AD9084 MxFE with AMD Versal Adaptive SoC, supporting up to 2 GHz instantaneous bandwidth for AI/ML applications at the RF edge.
- **Matchstiq V40** - High-bandwidth SDR variant for advanced signal processing.
- **SOSA/MOSA-aligned VPX solutions** - Open-architecture embedded computing for defence integration.
- Spectrum awareness, signal classification, direction finding, and geolocation software.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Matchstiq Z4 SDR announced, targeting SWaP-constrained UAV payloads, electronic attack, and counter-UAS. [source](https://epiqsolutions.com)
- **2026** - Exhibited at Security and Policing 2026 (Home Office event, Farnborough International). [source](https://www.securityandpolicing.co.uk/exhibitors/exhibitors-list-2026/epiq-design-solutions/)

companies.name: ePropelled Limited
companies.summary: Electric motors, hybrid starter-generators, and power management systems for defence uncrewed aerial, ground, and maritime platforms.
companies.body:
# ePropelled

> Electric motors, hybrid starter-generators, and power management systems for defence uncrewed aerial, ground, and maritime platforms.

## What they do

ePropelled designs and manufactures high-performance electric motors, hybrid starter-generators, electronic speed controllers, and intelligent power management systems for uncrewed platforms in defence and allied applications. The company holds 36 patents in advanced magnetics, electric drive, and energy management. The UK entity, originally ElectronicaUK Ltd (incorporated 1998 and acquired by ePropelled in 2018), operates from a Global Innovation Centre in Coventry opened in March 2026, targeting production of one million propulsion systems annually by 2027. The US parent is headquartered in Laconia, New Hampshire, with additional R&D and operations in Chennai, India.

## Products and solutions

- **Sparrow Series** - Brushless motors from micro-class (APM 1404) to 7,000W for small tactical UAVs, loitering munitions, and ISR drones.
- **Falcon Series** - Higher-power motors up to 10 kW (iAPM600) for larger uncrewed aerial platforms.
- **Hercules Series** - Hybrid starter-generators up to 14 kW for hybrid-electric propulsion architectures; supports mission ranges over 1,000 km and heavy-fuel (jet-fuel-compatible) configurations for military UAV applications.
- **ePConnect** - Onboard service manager and telemetry platform for real-time monitoring, control, and analytics on uncrewed platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; ARPAS-UK

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Global Innovation Centre opened in Coventry, targeting 1 million propulsion systems annually by 2027. [source](https://dronelife.com/2026/03/23/epropelled-opens-uk-hub-to-scale-uav-propulsion/)
- **2026-03** - Largest expansion of electronic speed controllers and intelligent power systems announced. [source](https://dronelife.com/2026/03/05/epropelled-esc-intelligent-power-systems-expansion/)
- **2026-01** - Strategic partnership with Hirth Engines to develop hybrid UAV propulsion combining Hirth two-stroke engines with ePropelled starter-generators for heavy-fuel military UAV applications. [source](https://dronelife.com/2026/01/13/hirth-engines-epropelled-partner-for-hybrid-uav-power-systems/)
- **2025-12** - Sparrow motor line expanded specifically for mission-critical defence UAVs. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/12/09/epropelled-expands-sparrow-motor-line-for-mission-critical-defense-uavs/)
- **2025-08** - US manufacturing expansion to meet rising demand for drone components. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/08/22/epropelled-expands-u-s-manufacturing-to-meet-rising-demand-for-drone-components/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/epropelled

companies.summary: Cyber security and GRC consultancy focused on defence, space and government sectors.
companies.body:
# Escend

> Cyber security and GRC consultancy focused on defence, space and government sectors.

## What they do

Escend has over 22 years of expertise in cyber security, data protection, and governance, risk and compliance (GRC). The company delivers consultancy services to clients across defence, space and government, with a stated focus on enhancing security frameworks and implementing advanced cybersecurity protocols to safeguard critical assets. Services include strategic security planning, managed detection and response, and 24/7/365 SOC operations across multiple sites. The company describes delivering certifications required by the UK Ministry of Defence and the US Department of Defence.

## Products and solutions

- **Managed Detection and Response** - 24/7/365 SOC monitoring and incident response across multiple client sites.
- **Strategic Security Planning** - security framework design and implementation for defence and government clients.
- **GRC Consultancy** - governance, risk and compliance advisory including NIST and COBIT 5 frameworks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://escend.io
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/escend-uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ADS members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/escend-limited-1/), Companies House (no. 06927146).

companies.name: ESET Software UK Limited
companies.summary: Global cybersecurity company with a dedicated defence, military and government tier and a UK office in Bournemouth.
companies.body:
# ESET UK

> Global cybersecurity company with a dedicated defence, military and government tier and a UK office in Bournemouth.

## What they do

ESET is a Slovak-headquartered cybersecurity company, founded in 1992, with a UK entity (ESET Software UK Limited) based in Bournemouth since 2004. The UK office is ESET's regional head sales office. The company provides endpoint protection, managed detection and response (MDR), extended detection and response (XDR), and threat intelligence products to home, SME, enterprise and public-sector clients. ESET PRIVATE, launched globally in 2026, is a dedicated tier for defence organisations, military, government agencies and critical national infrastructure operators, supporting air-gapped, on-premise and restricted-bandwidth environments.

## Products and solutions

- **ESET PRIVATE** - custom-engineered security solutions for defence, military, government and CNI clients; supports air-gapped and fully isolated deployments.
- **ESET PROTECT** - XDR platform for extended detection and response across endpoints, cloud and network; ranked in G2 Winter 2026 XDR Report.
- **Threat Intelligence** - ESET is recognised as a leading publisher of APT research, particularly on state-sponsored groups targeting critical infrastructure in Europe.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ECSO "Cybersecurity Made in Europe" label; VB100 (100+ awards)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; NATO Strategic Partnership (formalised May 2026)

## Recent news

- **2026-05-27** - NATO strategic partnership formalised at CyCon, Tallinn, alongside Microsoft and Palo Alto Networks, covering threat intelligence sharing and coordinated cyber defence. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/27/3302178/0/en/eset-enters-a-strategic-partnership-with-nato-alongside-leading-industry-partners.html)
- **2026-05** - ESET PRIVATE announced at ESET World 2026 as a dedicated security tier for defence, military and government clients. [source](https://www.eset.com/uk/about/newsroom/press-releases/about/newsroom/products/eset-private-global-launch-uk/)
- **2026-04** - Participated in NATO Locked Shields 2026, the world's largest live-fire cyber defence exercise (4,000+ defenders, 41 nations).

## Links

- Website: https://www.eset.com/uk/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/eset-uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ESET UK website (eset.com/uk), ADS members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/eset-uk-1/), Companies House (no. 07184889), GlobeNewswire (NATO partnership announcement 2026-05-27), ESET UK newsroom (ESET PRIVATE launch), Industrial Cyber (UK manufacturing cyber report April 2026).

companies.name: Esoteric Limited
companies.summary: Counter-espionage and Technical Surveillance Countermeasures (TSCM) specialist serving defence, government and high-profile clients; a wholly-owned subsidiary of Mitie since November 2021.
companies.body:
# Esoteric

> Counter-espionage and Technical Surveillance Countermeasures (TSCM) specialist serving defence, government and high-profile clients; a wholly-owned subsidiary of Mitie since November 2021.

## What they do

Esoteric is a specialist counter-espionage and TSCM company with over 20 years of experience, founded in 1998 and now operating within Mitie Intelligence Services. The company provides TSCM sweeps (bug detection and electronic surveillance countermeasures), RF-shielded room installation, cyber TSCM, physical security penetration testing, insider threat services and accredited covert surveillance training. Esoteric's engineers are drawn exclusively from government agency or military backgrounds and cleared to the highest government security levels. The company serves defence, transportation, financial, pharmaceutical and government clients.

## Products and solutions

- **TSCM (Technical Surveillance Countermeasures)** - detection and removal of covert listening devices and electronic surveillance threats.
- **TRAICE** - integrated offering spanning TSCM, Risk Assurance, Insider Threat and Counter-Espionage.
- **Cyber TSCM and penetration testing** - technical assessment of cyber and physical security posture.
- **Covert surveillance training** - accredited courses for government and law enforcement personnel.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (NSI-approved); ISO 27001 (BSI-certified); Cyber Essentials Plus (IASME-certified); NSI accreditation for electronic sweeping and covert investigations; BS 7858:2019 (all staff)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.esotericltd.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/esoteric-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ADS members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/esoteric-ltd-1/), ADS Member Spotlight (adsgroup.org.uk/knowledge/member-spotlight-esoteric-ltd/), Companies House (no. 04441008), Esoteric website (esotericltd.com), Mitie Intelligence Services (mitie-intelligence.com).

companies.name: Espanaro Ltd
companies.summary: Veteran-founded defence engineering consultancy specialising in autonomous system security, C5I architecture and the Consilium command orchestration platform.
companies.body:
# Espanaro

> Veteran-founded defence engineering consultancy specialising in autonomous system security, C5I architecture and the Consilium command orchestration platform.

## What they do

Espanaro is a systems engineering and software engineering company based in Newtown, Wales, incorporated in 2020 and founded by a veteran-led team with backgrounds in mathematics, theoretical physics and computer science. The company delivers systems integration and secure engineering solutions to the UK defence sector, with stated clients including the Ministry of Defence, Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (Dstl) and the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA). Capability areas include autonomous system security, life-critical systems security, data-centric security, cyber security and C5I solutions and architectures.

## Products and solutions

- **Consilium** - automated technology policy management system providing decision support and command orchestration, integrating cameras, fixed sensors, autonomous drones and UGVs into a sense-reason-decide-effect capability. Deployed on a 12-month T&E programme for a UK Government CNI client and completed final acceptance testing with the NDA.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

Esparta engineers secure, scalable cloud platforms that underpin mission-critical operations for UK defence and security organisations. # ESRI (UK) Limited

> UK distributor and services partner for Esri's ArcGIS platform, and the MOD's Strategic Geospatial Partner.

## What they do

Esri UK provides geographic information system (GIS) software, location intelligence and mapping services to public sector, defence and commercial customers across the United Kingdom. It is the authorised distributor and services arm of Esri Inc (US parent) in the UK and Ireland. The company holds a long-standing strategic relationship with the UK Ministry of Defence, most recently confirmed under a £46 million enterprise agreement covering the full suite of ArcGIS products across the MOD's information architecture, including land, maritime and air domains.

## Products and solutions

- **ArcGIS platform** - full suite of Esri GIS products covering field operations, mapping, data science, imagery, situational awareness and data collection across MOD domains.
- **Defence and National Security services** - professional services, integration and support for defence customers including battle management, ISR, air operations and maritime operations use cases.
- **Strategic Geospatial Partnership** - managed GIS technology access, licencing and support under the MOD enterprise agreement, enabling location-based intelligence and digital transformation across the Armed Forces.

# ESS - Compass Contract Services (UK)

> Defence and government soft facilities management provider, delivering catering, cleaning and support services to over 250 UK military establishments.

## What they do

ESS is the defence, government and offshore division of Compass Group UK and Ireland. It provides catering, cleaning and a broad range of soft facilities management services to the UK Armed Forces, government agencies, and critical national infrastructure sites. ESS has served the UK defence estate for over 40 years and supports Army, Royal Navy, Royal Marines, RAF and Strategic Command establishments, as well as the Defence Training Estate and a number of private finance initiative sites.

companies.body:
# Etherstack

> Tactical radio and mission-critical communications technology; UK-incorporated, ASX-listed.

## What they do

Etherstack plc is a wireless communications technology company that designs, develops and deploys radio products for defence, public safety and utility networks. It specialises in waveform software, radio protocol stacks and deployable tactical communications systems, supplying defence organisations, public-safety agencies, carriers and utilities. The UK operating entity is Etherstack Wireless Limited; the parent is incorporated in the UK and listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: ESK), with R&D across the UK, Australia, the USA and Japan.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence waveforms** - P25, TETRA, DMR and NXDN protocol stacks plus NATO and sovereign waveforms, ported across multiple radio platforms.
- **Tactical communications** - deployable repeater and push-to-talk-over-IP systems for resilient field communications.
- **LMR-IWF** - 3GPP-compliant interworking function for migrating land mobile radio to LTE and 5G.
- **Cryptography and key management** - AES-256 encryption for secure voice and data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; TCCA.

companies.body:
# Ethicronics

> Cambridge deep-tech startup developing software to verify the integrity and authenticity of electronic hardware components across defence and critical supply chains.

## What they do

Ethicronics develops a software-as-a-service platform to establish trust in electronics hardware, addressing the risk of counterfeit, tampered, cloned or maliciously modified components. Its solution generates hardware integrity certificates by applying unforgeable digital stamps at PCB to nanometer-level resolution, enabling supply chain assurance for defence, aerospace, space, transport, finance and critical infrastructure. The company was incorporated in 2022 and is based at the Allia Future Business Centre, Cambridge.

## Products and solutions

- **Hardware Integrity SaaS platform** - a scalable software solution that certifies and authenticates electronic components, producing hardware integrity certificates for defence and critical-sector supply chains.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2024-08** - Ethicronics received Defence Technology Exploitation Programme (DTEP) funding from MOD/DASA to develop its hardware assurance solution in partnership with Thales as the higher-tier supplier. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/dtep-funding-propels-two-additional-small-businesses)

companies.name: Eurofins E&E UK
companies.summary: UK network of test and compliance laboratories providing military EMC, environmental simulation and product certification to defence, aerospace and commercial customers.
companies.body:
# Eurofins E&E UK

> UK network of test and compliance laboratories providing military EMC, environmental simulation and product certification to defence, aerospace and commercial customers.

## What they do

Eurofins E&E UK is an end-to-end testing, certification and compliance provider covering electromagnetic compatibility (EMC), electrical safety, environmental simulation and radio equipment testing. Its UK network of UKAS-accredited laboratories, headquartered in York, serves military and commercial product programmes across land, sea and air domains. The network includes the Eurofins York brand (formerly York EMC Services) and laboratory sites in Devon, Southampton, London, Bristol, Castleford and Grangemouth. For projects requiring security clearance, the York site handles those enquiries. Eurofins E&E UK is part of the Eurofins Scientific group, headquartered in Luxembourg.

## Products and solutions

- **Military EMC testing** - UKAS-accredited testing to DEF STAN 59-411 and MIL-STD-461 (variants D through G) for land, sea and air platforms.
- **Environmental simulation** - extreme environmental testing (vibration, shock, temperature, humidity, ingress) for military and defence applications.
- **EMC training** - a four-day EMC for Military course covering DEF STAN 59-411, MIL-STD-461 and related standards.
- **Fibre optic testing** - testing to MIL-PRF-28876, MIL-PRF-85045 and MIL-DLT-83526.
- **Electromagnetic shielding effectiveness** - testing for materials and enclosures up to 40 GHz, including comb generator emitters.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** UKAS accreditation covering DEF STAN 59-411, DEF STAN 59-41, MIL-STD-461.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.eurofins.co.uk/electrical-and-electronics/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/eurofins-e-e-uk

companies.name: Eutelsat OneWeb
companies.summary: Integrated GEO-LEO satellite operator providing government and defence connectivity across land, maritime, and air domains.
companies.body:
# Eutelsat OneWeb

> Integrated GEO-LEO satellite operator providing government and defence connectivity across land, maritime, and air domains.

## What they do

Eutelsat OneWeb was formed in September 2023 through the merger of Eutelsat Communications and OneWeb, combining Eutelsat's 36 geostationary (GEO) satellites with OneWeb's 652-satellite low-earth-orbit (LEO) constellation operating at approximately 1,200 km altitude. The company provides hybrid multi-orbit satellite broadband connectivity across commercial, government, and defence verticals. The UK Government holds a golden share and a board seat in the company. The parent group, Eutelsat Communications SA, is headquartered in Paris; the UK operational centre is at West Works Building, 195 Wood Lane, London.

## Products and solutions

- **OneWeb LEO constellation** - 652-satellite LEO network providing low-latency broadband at global coverage, used for government and military connectivity including Comms-on-the-Move applications.
- **Intellian OW7MP manpack terminal** - the first military-grade LEO manpack terminal for the OneWeb network, co-developed with Intellian; fits a standard military rucksack, supports Comms-on-the-Move (5-130 kph) and Comms-on-the-Pause, and operates in GPS-denied environments with throughput up to 57 x 10 Mbps.
- **Kymeta Goshawk u8 flat-panel terminal** - multi-orbit terminal available on the Eutelsat OneWeb LEO network for government and military customers.
- **Satellite Virtual Network Operator (SVNO)** - digital product giving government and defence customers full control over SATCOM service provisioning.
- **Hybrid multi-orbit SATCOM** - combined GEO high-throughput and LEO low-latency configuration supporting ISR missions across manned and unmanned aircraft, land, and maritime platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; UKspace

## Recent news

- **2026-06-15** - Signed the CENTAURE contract, the first call-off under the EUR 1 billion NEXUS framework agreement with the French Ministry of the Armed Forces; total value approximately EUR 350 million over up to eight years for LEO capacity for French armed forces. [Satellite Today](https://www.satellitetoday.com/connectivity/2026/06/16/eutelsat-secures-first-order-under-french-defense-agreement/)
- **2026-02** - Launched the Intellian OW7MP, the first military-grade manpack terminal for the OneWeb LEO network. [Mynewsdesk](https://www.mynewsdesk.com/eutelsat/pressreleases/eutelsat-and-intellian-introduce-first-leo-manpack-terminal-for-government-and-defence-connectivity-3432227)
- **2026-01** - Airbus Defence and Space awarded a contract for 340 next-generation OneWeb LEO satellites, valued at approximately EUR 2 billion, with deliveries beginning late 2026. [Airbus](https://www.airbus.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2026-01-airbus-awarded-eutelsat-contract-for-further-340-low-earth-orbit)
- **2025-07** - FCDO Services signed a LEO capacity deal via NSSL Global for British embassies, high commissions, and consulates, including for defence and policing operations; the UK also invested EUR 90 million into Eutelsat's capital raise. [Satellite Today](https://www.satellitetoday.com/government-military/2025/07/21/uk-governments-fcdo-services-signs-deal-for-eutelsat-oneweb-leo-services/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.eutelsat.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/eutelsatoneweb

# Eviden

> Atos Group brand for cybersecurity, vision AI and mission-critical systems, with a defence offering serving European and Five Eyes ministries of defence.

## What they do

Eviden is the Atos Group brand for advanced computing, cybersecurity products, mission-critical systems and vision AI. It builds cyber-secure-by-design systems and electronics, data platforms for equipment availability and personnel readiness, and high-performance and AI computing, positioning around digital sovereignty and mission-critical applications. It runs a defence offering under its Mission-Critical Systems unit and operates a Cyber Defence Centre providing offensive security, red teaming and penetration testing. Eviden is part of Atos SE, which is publicly listed on Euronext Paris.

## Products and solutions

- **Cybersecurity products** - data encryption, digital identity management, post-quantum security, and a Cyber Defence Centre offering penetration testing, red teaming and phishing simulation.
- **Mission-critical systems** - defence, public safety and transport systems, including secure real-time communications.
- **Vision AI** - including ELIT AI, a radar-signals sensor with built-in sovereign AI.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- Eviden states a trusted presence among European and Five Eyes ministries of defence. No specific named certifications were independently confirmed from public pages.

# Evolve Dynamics

> British designer and manufacturer of all-weather, long-endurance unmanned air systems.

## What they do

Evolve Dynamics is a UK engineering company that designs, develops and manufactures unmanned air systems, payloads and software. Its systems are built for extreme-weather, persistent operation and are used across defence, police and security, search and rescue, and infrastructure inspection. The company reports field experience supporting Ukrainian forces in contested airspace.

companies.body:
# EW Solutions Ltd

> Electronic warfare, CEMA, and OSINT consultancy and intelligence products company serving defence organisations and government agencies.

## What they do

EW Solutions Ltd (trading as EWS) is a security-cleared SME founded in 2009, specialising in electronic warfare, Cyber and Electromagnetic Activities (CEMA), and OSINT-driven intelligence. The company provides vendor-agnostic consultancy, proprietary open-source intelligence products, and EW training and engineering support. Customers include armed forces, national agencies, government bodies, and defence industry OEMs. Registered and operational at Long Bennington Business Park, Nottinghamshire.

## Products and solutions

- **OSTD (Open Source Threat Database)** - unclassified, daily-updated global repository of IED and RCIED events; over 40,000 entries; used by national agencies for threat intelligence.
- **OverSite** - UxV threat database tracking UAV, UGV, USV, and UUV events, tactics, techniques and procedures, and ECM development data; available standalone or alongside OSTD.
- **Country Reports and RFI service** - tailored regional threat assessments with multilingual analysis.
- **EW and CEMA consultancy** - capability development, procurement support, red team assessments, bid support, market and competitor analysis, and technology integration for OEMs seeking routes to market.
- **EW and CEMA training** - covers JSP822 Training Needs Analysis, CEMA doctrine development, and EOD support; delivered in the UK and in deployed environments.
- **Engineering and Field Service** - technical support and Field Service Representatives (FSRs) for EW system lifecycle support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Counter-EO UK (ADS Special Interest Group)

# EWST Ltd

> Electronic warfare simulation hardware manufacturer producing multi-spectral threat and countermeasure simulators for test, evaluation, and training.

## What they do

EWST Ltd (Electronic Warfare Simulation Technologies) designs and manufactures multi-spectral threat and countermeasure simulators used for EW test, evaluation, and training by naval, air force, army, and civilian defence organisations across 30 countries. The company has over 40 years of product history, operating previously as EW Simulation Technology Ltd under Ultra Electronics before being carved out of the Ultra I&C (Cobham) portfolio. It was registered as an independent company in April 2023 under the name Ultra EWST Limited, then renamed EWST Ltd in May 2025 following a change of ownership to EWST Holdings Ltd. Over 100 simulation systems have been delivered since 1984. The operational base is Building A8, Cody Technology Park, Farnborough, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Chameleon** - radar target generator and ECM signal generator; multi-channel, multi-DRFM architecture; 500 MHz to 40 GHz coverage; supports hardware-in-the-loop and radiating applications.
- **MERTS (Mobile EW and Radar Test System)** - fully mobile system integrating ECM (Chameleon) and radar threat generation; includes antenna azimuth/elevation positioner with TV camera and GPS tracking.
- **PRS (Portable Radar Simulator)** - portable radar simulation system.
- **RSS8000** - radar threat simulation system.
- **EMES9000** - high-fidelity electromagnetic spectrum simulation system.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Exact CNC (NI) Ltd

> Northern Ireland precision CNC machining and finishing company supplying the aerospace, space and defence supply chain.

## What they do

Exact CNC (NI) Ltd is a precision engineering subcontractor based in Newry, operating primarily in the aerospace, space and defence sectors. From a 72,000 sq ft facility at Craigmore Mill Industrial Estate, the company provides CNC milling and turning across 2D and 3D configurations from 3-axis to 9-axis, covering composites, plastics, tooling board and metals. It also offers anodising, chemical coating, powder coating, CMM inspection and 3D scanning, and metal fabrication and assembly. Named customers include Collins Aerospace, Thales UK and Thompson Aero Seating.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision CNC milling and turning** - multi-axis machining (3- to 9-axis) of aerospace and defence components in metal and composite materials.
- **Cerakote ceramic coating** - ceramic-polymer finishing used on military small arms, weapon accessories and tactical equipment; Exact Group is a certified applicator.
- **Surface treatment and finishing** - anodising, chemical coating and powder coating to aerospace supply chain standards.
- **CMM inspection and 3D scanning** - dimensional verification and quality control against AS9100 Rev D requirements.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 Rev D; ISO 9001; ISO 13485; SC21 Silver (first company in Ireland to achieve Silver on first engagement; reaccredited July 2024 for the fourth consecutive year); SC21 Operational Excellence; EFQM 5 Star (2023); Cyber Essentials Plus (achieved June 2026).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-15** - Featured in NI aerospace supply chain coverage as commercial aircraft orders surge, alongside other Invest NI-backed suppliers. [source](https://runwaygirlnetwork.com/2026/04/ni-aerospace-supply-chain-soars-as-global-demand-surges/)

companies.name: Exail Ltd
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Exail Technologies SA, a France-headquartered group supplying autonomous mine countermeasure systems, unmanned maritime vehicles and inertial navigation systems to navies and defence forces worldwide.
companies.body:
# Exail Ltd

> UK subsidiary of Exail Technologies SA, a France-headquartered group supplying autonomous mine countermeasure systems, unmanned maritime vehicles and inertial navigation systems to navies and defence forces worldwide.

## What they do

Exail Ltd is the UK entity of Exail Technologies SA, listed on Euronext Paris and formed in 2022 from the merger of ECA Group (drone and robotics) and iXblue (navigation and photonics). The group employs approximately 2,000 people globally and operates in over 80 countries, with the UK registered office in Petersfield, Hampshire, and operational offices in Aberdeen and Wokingham. The company's defence focus is on autonomous mine countermeasures, unmanned maritime vehicles, and fibre optic gyroscope-based inertial navigation systems, with over 70 navies and armies among its customers. The UK entity serves the Royal Navy and allied defence customers and is actively engaged in UK MCM programme work.

## Products and solutions

- **UMIS (Unmanned MCM Integrated System)** - a fully unmanned mine countermeasure system integrating autonomous surface, underwater and aerial vehicles for end-to-end MCM missions.
- **A18-M AUV** - mid-size autonomous underwater vehicle for long-endurance MCM operations; up to 24 hours endurance, covering 20-40 sq km per mission.
- **A9-M AUV** - smaller autonomous underwater vehicle for MCM tasks.
- **DriX USV** - unmanned surface vessel series used for hydrographic survey, surveillance and mine countermeasures; in service in 19 countries.
- **Inertial navigation systems (INS)** - fibre optic gyroscope-based navigation and motion sensing for ships, submarines, UUVs, UAVs and land platforms.
- **Photonics and fibre optic components** - optical components and laser systems for space, telecoms and scientific applications (legacy iXblue capability).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - Exail and JFD signed a pre-bid agreement to collaborate on UK-based maintenance, training and support services for Royal Navy mine countermeasures, positioning ahead of the Royal Navy's transition to a hybrid manned/unmanned MCM force. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2026/04/exail-and-jfd-partner-to-increase-resilience-in-future-uk-mcm-capability/)
- **2025-09** - Exhibited at DSEI 2025 (London, stand S8-142), showcasing navigation, mine countermeasures and environmental awareness solutions. [source](https://www.exail.com/events/dsei-2025)

## Links

- Website: https://www.exail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/exail

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (exail.com), Companies House (05256818), ADS Group members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/exail-ltd-2), Naval News, UK Defence Journal, Exail Technologies FY2025 results presentation, Wikipedia (Exail Technologies), StockAnalysis.

companies.name: Excelerate Technology Ltd
companies.summary: Welsh systems integrator providing hybrid satellite and cellular communications, deployable connectivity and situational awareness solutions to military, government and emergency services customers.
companies.body:
# Excelerate Technology Ltd

> Welsh systems integrator providing hybrid satellite and cellular communications, deployable connectivity and situational awareness solutions to military, government and emergency services customers.

## What they do

Excelerate Technology Ltd is a Cardiff-based communications and situational awareness systems integrator with over 20 years of experience serving military, first responder and government markets. The company designs and supplies hybrid connectivity systems that bond satellite, 4G and 5G links to provide resilient, on-the-move communications independent of terrestrial network availability. Excelerate positions itself as a niche and agnostic integrator, supporting deployable command and control, vehicle-mounted and portable communications platforms. Defence is an explicit named vertical on their public website.

## Products and solutions

- **Hybrid communications systems** - vehicle-mounted and portable platforms bonding satellite, 4G and 5G for high-throughput, resilient military connectivity.
- **Hybrid Edge Appliance** - 4G/5G/satellite bonding device for deployable private secure networks.
- **Linx Hub** - portable Wi-Fi hotspot for field connectivity.
- **Video streaming and situational awareness** - live video and data solutions for command and control in deployed environments.
- **Deployable command support units** - communications-equipped command vehicles and incident command units, built to customer specification for emergency services and military end-users.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (held since September 2008); Cyber Essentials Plus.

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Exhibited at INTERSCHUTZ 2026 in Hannover alongside Nottinghamshire Fire and Rescue Service, showcasing a next-generation Command Support Unit now operational. [source](https://excelerate-group.com/nottinghamshire-fire-command-support-unit/)
- **2026-06** - Awarded contract to refurbish technology on Clare County Fire and Rescue Service's Incident Command Unit. [source](https://excelerate-group.com/clare-county-frs/)
- **2026-04** - Demonstrated connectivity-on-the-move with East of England Ambulance Service Trust at BAPCO 2026. [source](https://excelerate-group.com/bapco-2026-improving-connectivity-on-the-move-with-eeast/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/excelerate-technology

companies.name: EXFO Europe Ltd
companies.summary: UK and European subsidiary of EXFO Inc, a Canadian test and measurement company with a dedicated defence and homeland security division covering fibre optic network testing, tactical communications intelligence and counter-UAV systems.
companies.body:
# EXFO Europe Ltd

> UK and European subsidiary of EXFO Inc, a Canadian test and measurement company with a dedicated defence and homeland security division covering fibre optic network testing, tactical communications intelligence and counter-UAV systems.

## What they do

EXFO Europe Ltd is the UK-registered subsidiary of EXFO Inc, headquartered in Quebec City, Canada, with approximately 1,500 employees globally. The UK entity, based in Chandler's Ford, Eastleigh, operates across two distinct capability areas: fibre optic and network test and measurement equipment serving defence laboratories and supply chains, and a dedicated Homeland Security Division offering tactical communications intelligence systems. EXFO's defence test and measurement products are used to verify fibre connectivity from the lab to live deployed environments across all branches of armed forces; the Homeland Security Division products serve elite police forces, military special forces and government security agencies. The company exhibited at Security and Policing 2026, the NPSA's closed government-facing exhibition at Farnborough.

## Products and solutions

- **Fibre optic test and measurement** - OTDRs, fibre inspection scopes, field certifiers and lab instruments for verifying fibre infrastructure in defence and aerospace environments; includes the FIP-500 fibre inspection probe and MaxTester 945 Fiber Certifier.
- **5G-to-the-battlefield network testing** - tools for validating mobile network performance in deployed military environments.
- **IMSI catchers with direction-finding** - portable, vehicular, fixed-site and airborne systems for cellular interception and geolocation.
- **Mobile device interrogation and network analysis** - equipment for mobile phone interrogation, cellular and WiFi interception, and mobile service blocking.
- **Counter-UAV measures** - systems described in the Homeland Security portfolio targeting small UAS threats.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2008 and TL9000 (corporate level); EXFO Certified Contractor programme (BICSI-recognised, 2,000+ registered contractors).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-02** - Announced the first native 24-fibre testers for data centre validation. [source](https://www.exfo.com/en/corporate/news-events/)
- **2026** - Exhibited at Security and Policing 2026 at Farnborough, confirming active engagement with UK government and law enforcement. [source](https://www.securityandpolicing.co.uk/exhibitors/exhibitors-list-2026/exfo-europe/)
- **2025-06** - Vodafone Germany licensed EXFO Context, a knowledge-graph semantic modelling tool for network visibility. [source](https://www.exfo.com/en/corporate/news-events/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.exfo.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/exfo

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. EXFO company website (exfo.com/en/solutions/government), Companies House (02316168), ADS Group members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/exfo-europe-ltd-2), Security and Policing 2026 exhibitor listing, PR Newswire (Alker Fibre Optic Specialists partnership, May 2023).

companies.name: Exotopic Ltd
companies.summary: London-based space and defence accelerator and mission-delivery company, running the UK Space Agency Accelerator and delivering in-orbit demonstration missions for defence-relevant SMEs.
companies.body:
# Exotopic Ltd

> London-based space and defence accelerator and mission-delivery company, running the UK Space Agency Accelerator and delivering in-orbit demonstration missions for defence-relevant SMEs.

## What they do

Exotopic Ltd is a London SME operating at the intersection of space mission delivery, investment and defence-sector accelerator management. The company is the lead partner delivering the UK Space Agency Accelerator programme and has won contracts with both the European Space Agency and the Defence and Security Accelerator (DASA). Its primary commercial offering is an in-orbit demonstration (IOD) service, "Give Me Some Space!", which provides defence and aerospace SMEs with affordable access to space to test and validate spacecraft technologies. Exotopic is also a technical advisory business, supporting companies with investment readiness and business development in the defence and space sectors. The company is registered at the British Interplanetary Society building in Vauxhall, London.

## Products and solutions

- **Give Me Some Space! IOD missions** - rideshare in-orbit demonstration service giving SMEs access to low-Earth orbit to test propulsion, sensors, computing and other spacecraft payloads; first mission targeted Q1 2026, second (targeting Q1 2027) open to European and international entrants.
- **UK Space Agency Accelerator** - Exotopic delivers this programme as lead partner, supporting early-stage space and defence-adjacent companies.
- **SAC Technical Expert Support (TES)** - free access to technical expert advice for SMEs, delivered as part of Exotopic's accelerator remit.
- **MachLab** - a propulsion test and research facility supporting rocket engine testing up to 10 kN across a range of technology readiness levels.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; UKspace (SME member).

## Recent news

- **2026** - Announced the payload manifest for the debut "Give Me Some Space!" IOD mission, with passengers including Stars Edge (VLEO thruster) and Lodestar (TESSERACT edge computing and sensors for on-orbit robotic capture). [source](https://www.ukspace.org/exotopic-announces-manifest-for-breakthrough-uk-satellite-mission/)
- **2025** - Announced a second IOD mission targeting Q1 2027 due to demand, with MagDrive confirmed as first passenger; open to European and international SMEs. [source](https://www.exotopic.com/give-me-some-space-mission)
- **2025** - TechUK feature on Exotopic's "Tickets to Orbit" approach and its impact on UK tech scale-ups accessing space. [source](https://www.techuk.org/resource/bringing-space-to-uk-tech-scale-ups-how-exotopic-s-tickets-to-orbit-are-accelerating-time-to-market.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.exotopic.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/exotopic

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (exotopic.com), Companies House (09238982), ADS Group members directory, UKspace SME member listing, TechUK, UK Space Agency/UKspace IOD mission announcement.

# Expando AB

> Swedish specialist in rugged COTS computing, embedded systems, and space and avionics components for defence and aerospace.

## What they do

Expando AB designs, integrates, and supplies rugged computing hardware and specialist electronic components to defence, aerospace, and space customers. Founded in 2000 and owned by the Tisenhult Group, the company operates from Sollentuna, north of Stockholm, and serves Nordic and European prime contractors. Its work spans naval platforms, missile systems, surveillance systems, and satellite applications. Named customers include Kongsberg, SAAB, BAE Systems, and Patria.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged servers and board computers** - mission computers and small-form-factor tactical systems for naval, missile, and surveillance platforms.
- **High-performance embedded computing (HPEC)** - SIGINT, EW, mission computing, and C5ISR applications, including collaboration with EIZO Rugged Solutions and NVIDIA Jetson.
- **Space and avionics components** - radiation-hardened power supply, memory, computer cores, and space cameras; ARINC components (429, 571, 575).
- **Custom ASIC and bespoke semiconductor solutions** - flight-critical software and power supply subsystems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015; ISO 14001:2015
- **Memberships:** SOFF (Swedish Defence and Security Industry Association)

companies.body:
# Explosive Learning Solutions

> Defence and government training organisation specialising in training needs analysis, e-learning development, end-point assessment, and ordnance, munitions and explosives education.

## What they do

Explosive Learning Solutions (ELS) is an independent learning and development (L&D) accredited training organisation, consultancy company, and End Point Assessment Organisation (EPAO). Since 2005 it has delivered Training Needs Analysis, training design, digital and blended e-learning development, and training delivery to the UK MOD (Defence Academy and Defence Equipment and Support), UK National Government, and major defence organisations. ELS applies the Defence Systems Approach to Training (DSAT) across its work and is a formally recognised Vocational Education and Training (VET) provider, as well as a company member of the Institute of Explosive Engineers (IExpE) supporting Ordnance, Munitions and Explosives (OME) contracts.

## Products and solutions

- **Training Needs Analysis and design** - bespoke TNA, training design, and digital content for blended, virtual, and e-learning programmes aligned to DSAT best practice.
- **End Point Assessment (EPA)** - multi-year EPA contracts across defence, aviation, supply chain, NDT, and data disciplines at Levels 2 through 6, including OME Technician and Intelligence Analyst standards.
- **P3M and procurement training** - commercial off-the-shelf and bespoke training in Projects, Programmes and Portfolios methodologies and defence acquisition skills, delivered at Harwell Science and Innovation Campus or at customer sites.
- **CBRN and counter-terror consultancy** - specialist advisory and training services in CBRN, covert and counter-terror, hostile environment, and bomb disposal domains.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, SC21 Bronze
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Institute of Explosive Engineers (IExpE); approved training organisation for City and Guilds, ILM, APMG International, PeopleCert, APM, Skills for Justice, and CIPS

## Links

- Website: https://www.elsbusinesstraining.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/explosive-learning-solutions-ltd
