companies.name: Framatome Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of the French nuclear technology group Framatome, providing engineering, component manufacturing, instrumentation and control, and fuel services to the British nuclear, chemical, process, and defence industries.
companies.body:
# Framatome Ltd

> UK subsidiary of the French nuclear technology group Framatome, providing engineering, component manufacturing, instrumentation and control, and fuel services to the British nuclear, chemical, process, and defence industries.

## What they do

Framatome Limited is the UK entity of Framatome, an international nuclear technology company majority-owned by EDF. The UK business has operated in the British nuclear industry for over 25 years and employs more than 350 people across sites in Avonmouth (Bristol), Cranfield (Bedfordshire), Hinkley Point C, and Sizewell B. The company provides engineering services, computational software code development, project management, site and outage support, instrumentation and control systems, and component manufacturing. Framatome explicitly lists the British Defence industry among its UK customer sectors. The parent group operates in space and healthcare alongside its core nuclear business.

## Products and solutions

- **Nuclear engineering and services** - Design and service engineering, site outage support, and long-term operations support for existing UK nuclear power plants.
- **Instrumentation and control systems** - I&C solutions for nuclear plant safety and operations.
- **Component manufacturing** - High-quality components for nuclear steam supply systems, including post-weld heat treatment services.
- **Computational software code development** - Software tools for nuclear engineering analysis.
- **Nuclear fuel services** - Fuel design and manufacturing capability; Framatome has announced plans to establish a nuclear fuel fabrication facility in the UK.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Nuclear Industry Association

## Recent news

- **2025-11-01** - Signed an agreement with NNB for post weld heat treatments on Hinkley Point C main secondary coolant system welds. [source](https://www.framatome.com/medias/framatome-signs-an-agreement-with-nnb-for-post-weld-heat-treatments-on-the-welds-of-the-main-secondary-coolant-systems-of-hinkley-point-c/?lang=en)
- **2025-01-01** - Partnered with Perpetual Atomics to collaborate on deep space nuclear power sources. [source](https://www.aero-mag.com/framatome-and-perpetual-atomics-collaborate-on-deep-space-nuclear-power-sources)

## Links

- Website: https://www.framatome.com/en/about/locations/united-kingdom/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/framatome-ltd

companies.name: Francis Kirk (Socket Screws) Limited
companies.summary: Manchester-based distributor and stockist of specialist fasteners, socket products, PPE, and industrial supplies, serving the aerospace and other precision engineering sectors.
companies.body:
# Francis Kirk (Socket Screws) Ltd

> Manchester-based distributor and stockist of specialist fasteners, socket products, PPE, and industrial supplies, serving the aerospace and other precision engineering sectors.

## What they do

Francis Kirk is a fifth-generation family business founded in 1868, operating from a 24,000 square foot warehouse and trade counter in Denton, Manchester. The company supplies fasteners, socket screws, bolts, nuts, washers, hand tools, PPE, and industrial consumables. It holds exclusive UK distribution rights for the Philidas self-locking nut range, and is the only UK stockist to carry Philidas, Unbrako, and Holo-Krome fasteners under one roof. Francis Kirk is a member of the North West Aerospace Alliance and supplies the aerospace sector; its ADS Group membership confirms its position within the aerospace, defence, and security supply chain.

## Products and solutions

- **Philidas self-locking nuts** - Anti-vibration all-metal locking nuts used in aerospace, automotive, rail, renewable energy, and defence applications.
- **Socket screws and fasteners** - Socket head caps (DIN 912), countersunk, button, and set screw ranges in metric and imperial, including Unbrako and Holo-Krome branded products.
- **Nord-Lock washers** - Wedge-locking washers for high-vibration environments.
- **PPE and workwear** - Industrial personal protective equipment, high-visibility clothing, and footwear.
- **Vendor Managed Inventory (VMI) and Kanban** - Inventory management services for industrial customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, North West Aerospace Alliance, British and Irish Association of Fastener Distributors (BIAFD)

## Links

- Website: https://www.franciskirk.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/francis-kirk

companies.name: Frankenburg Technologies Ltd
companies.summary: Estonian defence technology startup building affordable, mass-manufacturable guided interceptor missile systems for counter-UAS and short-range air defence, with a UK registered entity and investment in UK R&D.
companies.body:
# Frankenburg Technologies Ltd

> Estonian defence technology startup building affordable, mass-manufacturable guided interceptor missile systems for counter-UAS and short-range air defence, with a UK registered entity and investment in UK R&D.

## What they do

Frankenburg Technologies is a European defence technology company founded in 2024 and headquartered in Tallinn, Estonia, with a UK entity registered in London. The company designs and manufactures low-cost guided interceptor missiles intended for mass production and rapid replenishment, addressing what it describes as a cost and scale gap in modern air defence. Frankenburg's Mark I missile is designed to intercept Class III UAS targets and other aerial threats. The company has operations in Estonia, Latvia (including a missile assembly site in Riga), Lithuania, the UK, and Ukraine, and has committed to investing in UK research and development. Partners include Babcock, Airbus, Milrem Robotics, and Colt CZ Group. The UK entity's SIC codes include defence activities (84220).

## Products and solutions

- **Mark I Guided Interceptor Missile** - The company's first product; described as the smallest and lowest-cost guided interceptor missile to have completed a live-fire intercept. Engineered for mass production using commercially available components and integrated across land, air, and maritime platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-23** - Opened Riga missile assembly site, described as the first affordable mass-production missile factory of its kind. [source](https://frankenburg.tech/frankenburg-technologies-opens-riga-missile-assembly-site-as-first-affordable-mass-production-missile-factory-in-the-world/)
- **2026-06-16** - Partnered with Milrem Robotics on an unmanned mobile counter-UAS missile defence capability. [source](https://frankenburg.tech/frankenburg-technologies-and-milrem-robotics-partner-on-unmanned-mobile-counter-uas-missile-defence-capability/)
- **2026-05-27** - Partnered with Colt CZ Group on counter-UAS missile systems for Czechia and Central and Eastern Europe. [source](https://frankenburg.tech/frankenburg-technologies-and-colt-cz-group-partner-on-counter-uas-missile-systems-for-czechia-and-central-and-eastern-europe/)
- **2026-03-30** - Completed a live demonstration with Airbus integrating the Mark I with the Bird of Prey uncrewed interceptor. [source](https://frankenburg.tech/successful-first-demo-flight-airbus-uncrewed-bird-of-prey-interceptor-autonomously-engages-kamikaze-drone-with-frankenburg-missile/)
- **2025-01-01** - Raised EUR 30 million to build European missile manufacturing capacity. [source](https://frankenburg.tech/frankenburg-technologies-raises-30m-to-build-europes-next-generation-missile-manufacturing-capacity/)

## Links

- Website: https://frankenburg.tech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/frankenburg-tech

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: Frankenburg Technologies website (frankenburg.tech); ADS Group member directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/frankenburg-technologies-ltd-2); Companies House (find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/16350270); GOV.UK news (gov.uk/government/news/defence-tech-start-up-opens-uk-headquarters-in-boost-for-industry); ADS Group news (adsgroup.org.uk/knowledge/industry-member-news/babcock-and-frankenburg-technologies-partner-on-counter-drone-system); Defence Industry EU (defence-industry.eu); Trade with Estonia (tradewithestonia.com); Invest in Latvia (investinlatvia.org).

companies.name: Fraunhofer UK Research Ltd
companies.summary: UK affiliate of the Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft, providing applied photonics research and development to industry across security, space, sensing and quantum technologies.
companies.body:
# Fraunhofer UK Research Ltd

> UK affiliate of the Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft, providing applied photonics research and development to industry across security, space, sensing and quantum technologies.

## What they do

Fraunhofer UK Research Ltd is a not-for-profit company limited by guarantee, established in 2012 in partnership with the University of Strathclyde. It oversees Fraunhofer Research Centres in the UK and provides a central UK point of contact for the wider Fraunhofer global network. Its principal research activity is the Centre for Applied Photonics (Fraunhofer CAP), which performs industry-driven laser and optical systems research for sectors including security and defence, space, healthcare and renewable energy.

## Products and solutions

- **Applied photonics R&D** - industry-contracted research in laser and optical technologies, with applications in security, environmental monitoring, sensing and quantum technologies.
- **Fraunhofer CAP** - the first UK Fraunhofer Centre, based at the University of Strathclyde's Technology and Innovation Centre; focuses on enabling new or improved products and processes for industrial partners.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Frazer-Nash Consultancy

> Systems, engineering and technology consultancy serving UK defence; part of the KBR group.

## What they do

Frazer-Nash Consultancy is a UK systems, engineering and technology company that delivers engineering and technology solutions across defence, nuclear, transport, energy and other sectors. In defence it provides systems engineering, procurement support, design assurance and through-life support, with a long-established practice in submarine and surface-ship work. The company operates from a network of UK and Australian offices and is part of the US-headquartered KBR group, which acquired it in 2021.

## Products and solutions

- **Systems engineering and assurance** - design, integration and safety assurance for defence platforms including submarines and surface ships.
- **Procurement and acquisition support** - technical advisory and programme support to defence customers.
- **Technology and digital services** - modelling, simulation, data and digital engineering for complex systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Society of Maritime Industries.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Part of Team Calibre (with KBR and V.Group) supporting the Royal Navy's Type 31 frigate through-life support, expected to commence Q4 2025. [source](https://www.fnc.co.uk/discover-frazer-nash/news/kbr-frazer-nash-and-vgroup-combine-expertise-to-strengthen-uk-naval-capability/)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/frazer-nash-consultancy

companies.name: Freightline Carriers Ltd
companies.summary: Specialist logistics provider serving the aerospace and defence sectors, offering time-critical road and air freight, customs clearance and warehousing across Europe.
companies.body:
# Freightline Carriers Ltd

> Specialist logistics provider serving the aerospace and defence sectors, offering time-critical road and air freight, customs clearance and warehousing across Europe.

## What they do

Freightline Carriers is a UK-based logistics specialist with more than 50 years of heritage in freight forwarding. The company operates 24/7 with a multilingual team and access to over 1,000 vehicles across Europe. It holds a dedicated aerospace and defence practice focused on transporting sensitive, high-value components and equipment, and supporting manufacturing, maintenance, repair and overhaul supply chains.

## Products and solutions

- **Urgent, time-critical logistics** - 24/7 road and air freight with 15-minute response and two-hour collection commitment; used in aerospace and defence supply chains to prevent production line stoppages or aircraft groundings.
- **Air freight and air charter** - global transport of aerospace and defence cargo including helicopters, private jets and large payload aircraft.
- **Customs clearance** - in-house agents handling cross-border documentation for defence materiel.
- **Warehousing and distribution** - European network of storage facilities with integrated warehouse management systems for high-value stock.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/freightlinecarriers

companies.name: Frequentis (UK) Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Frequentis AG, an Austrian-listed supplier of communication and information systems for safety-critical control centres, with a dedicated defence portfolio covering military ATC, secure voice, C2 and networks.
companies.body:
# Frequentis (UK) Limited

> UK subsidiary of Frequentis AG, an Austrian-listed supplier of communication and information systems for safety-critical control centres, with a dedicated defence portfolio covering military ATC, secure voice, C2 and networks.

## What they do

Frequentis AG is headquartered in Vienna and listed on the Vienna and Frankfurt stock exchanges. It develops communication and information systems for safety-critical environments, serving air traffic management, defence, public safety, maritime and public transport sectors. The UK entity, Frequentis (UK) Limited, is registered in Twickenham. The Group employs more than 2,600 people and operates in over 50 countries. Frequentis is a long-standing supplier to UK air navigation service provider NATS, and has assumed delivery responsibility for the NATS Main Voice System and Arrivals Manager System as part of the Deploying SESAR project.

## Products and solutions

- **Military air traffic control (MilATC)** - modular ATC systems for military heliports, transport hubs, fighter, naval and joint-use airbases; includes tower automation integrating weather, flight data processing, surveillance and airbase lighting.
- **Secure voice** - communication systems for military and government control centres requiring security-accredited voice over IP and radio integration.
- **Remote digital tower** - replaces out-of-window tower views with a visualisation system; applicable to military ATC where physical tower presence is impractical.
- **Command and control** - information and communications systems enabling coordinated decision-making in air defence and multi-domain operations.
- **Networks** - mission-critical communications networks for defence and air defence applications.
- **Recording** - voice and data recording for safety-critical and evidential use.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-05-28** - Frequentis and NATS representatives presented jointly at Airspace World 2026 in Lisbon on SESAR sustainability initiatives. [source](https://www.eurocontrol.int/sites/default/files/2026-05/airspace-world-2026-full-programme.pdf)
- **2021-08-12** - Frequentis acquired the ATC Solutions business unit of L3Harris Technologies, taking on the Main Voice System and Arrivals Manager System for NATS. [source](https://www.frequentis.com/en/pr/frequentis-strengthens-position-strategic-partner-uk-air-navigation-service-provider-nats)

## Links

- Website: https://www.frequentis.com/en/defence
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/frequentis

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: Frequentis corporate website (frequentis.com/en/defence), Companies House (find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/02704890), Frequentis press release on NATS partnership (frequentis.com/en/pr/frequentis-strengthens-position-strategic-partner-uk-air-navigation-service-provider-nats), Airspace World 2026 programme (eurocontrol.int), Wikipedia (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frequentis).

companies.name: Frewer & Co. Engineers Limited
companies.summary: Engineering design, analysis and consultancy firm serving aerospace, defence, marine, nuclear and space sectors, with accredited UK security clearance and Cyber Essentials Plus certification.
companies.body:
# Frewer Engineering

> Engineering design, analysis and consultancy firm serving aerospace, defence, marine, nuclear and space sectors, with accredited UK security clearance and Cyber Essentials Plus certification.

## What they do

Frewer Engineering, trading name of Frewer & Co. Engineers Limited, was founded in 2003 and is based in Ockley, Surrey. The company provides engineering design and analysis consultancy services across demanding sectors including aerospace, defence, gas turbines, marine, nuclear and space. Its defence work spans land-based military equipment, airborne propulsion systems, ballistic protection and fluid dynamics for military platforms. The team holds full UK security clearance and the company holds Cyber Essentials Plus accreditation. It is registered on JOSCAR and is a member of Make UK Defence.

## Products and solutions

- **Structural analysis for military platforms** - design and structural assurance of land vehicles, weapons components and airborne structures, including lightweight metallic and composite structures.
- **Ballistic protection analysis** - ballistic modelling and light-weighting for composite body armour and helmet systems.
- **Fluid flow analysis** - aerodynamic and hydrodynamic performance optimisation and flow-induced loading for military equipment.
- **Gas turbine and propulsion engineering** - design and analysis of military aircraft propulsion systems.
- **Composites design** - carbon composite structures for aerospace and defence applications.
- **Rotor dynamics** - engineering analysis for rotating systems across defence and aerospace programmes.
- **UAS programme support** - engineering support to unmanned aerial systems development (referenced in January 2026 news).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001 (BSI certified)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Make UK Defence, Composites UK, NAFEMS, IMechE

## Recent news

- **2026-05-29** - May 2026 newsletter highlighted composites expertise, BSI reaccreditation and CFD assessment work. [source](https://frewer-engineering.com/2026/05/29/latest-news-may-2026/)
- **2026-04-30** - April 2026 newsletter reported a visit from Make UK Defence and Frewer joining the D3IP programme. [source](https://frewer-engineering.com/2026/04/30/latest-news-april-2026/)
- **2026-03-31** - Renewed Cyber Essentials Plus certification. [source](https://frewer-engineering.com/2026/03/31/latest-news-march-2026/)
- **2026-01-30** - January 2026 newsletter featured UAS programme support and a new team member. [source](https://frewer-engineering.com/2026/01/30/latest-news-january-2026/)
- **2025-08-29** - Confirmed attendance at DSEI 2025. [source](https://frewer-engineering.com/2025/08/29/latest-news-august-2025/)

## Links

- Website: https://frewer-engineering.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/frewer-engineering

FBMP provides commercial management, project management and business leadership services to organisations working in defence, aerospace, maritime, cyber and national security. companies.name: FSP Consulting Services Limited
companies.summary: Digital transformation and cyber security consultancy with specific expertise in the defence sector, including secure cloud, Secure by Design and penetration testing.
companies.body:
# FSP Consulting Services Limited

> Digital transformation and cyber security consultancy with specific expertise in the defence sector, including secure cloud, Secure by Design and penetration testing.

## What they do

FSP provides digital transformation and cyber security consulting to defence, government, critical national infrastructure and regulated industries. The company integrates data and AI, cyber security, enterprise cloud and change delivery, with security-cleared teams supporting classified environments. FSP is NCSC assured for cyber security consulting in risk management and holds CREST approval for penetration testing.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber Security Consulting** - NCSC assured risk management consulting and penetration testing, including CHECK-scheme capability for public sector and CNI clients.
- **Secure by Design** - advisory and delivery support for secure cloud and classified solution design in defence programmes.
- **Digital Transformation** - business strategy, change and adoption, and digital solution delivery for defence and government organisations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** NCSC Assured (Cyber Security Consulting), CREST approved penetration testing, ISO 27001 (UKAS certified), ISO 9001 (UKAS certified), Cyber Essentials Plus

companies.name: Fugro GB Limited
companies.summary: Geo-data solutions company providing subsea survey, maritime domain awareness and critical underwater infrastructure monitoring services to government and defence clients.
companies.body:
# Fugro GB Limited

> Geo-data solutions company providing subsea survey, maritime domain awareness and critical underwater infrastructure monitoring services to government and defence clients.

## What they do

Fugro is a Dutch-listed global geo-data company with a long-established UK entity (Fugro GB Limited, Wallingford, Oxfordshire, incorporated 1973). The UK operation delivers geophysical, hydrographic and geotechnical survey services and supports subsea domain awareness for national security and critical infrastructure protection. Fugro deploys a fleet of uncrewed surface vessels, subsea robotics and remote operations centres to deliver persistent maritime surveillance and data collection.

The parent company, Fugro NV, is headquartered in Leidschendam, Netherlands, and listed on Euronext Amsterdam. Fugro GB Limited is the primary UK legal entity and ADS member; separate UK entities include Fugro GB (North) Marine Limited (Edinburgh) and Fugro Subsea Services Ltd.

## Products and solutions

- **Uncrewed Surface Vessels (USVs)** - persistent, low-risk maritime surveillance and geophysical data acquisition in complex operational zones.
- **Subsea Robotics and Remote Operations** - inspection, repair and maintenance of critical underwater infrastructure including cables and pipelines.
- **Hydrographic and Geophysical Survey** - data acquisition supporting maritime situational awareness and infrastructure resilience for government and defence clients.
- **Subsea Domain Awareness Platform** - data fusion platform (developed with partners DTACT and Ubotica) combining geo-data, satellite intelligence and other data streams for detection of threats to subsea infrastructure.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-07-01** - Fugro announced a partnership with DTACT and Ubotica to develop a subsea domain awareness and critical infrastructure monitoring platform, initially targeting government organisations in the North Sea and Baltic regions. [source](https://www.marinetechnologynews.com/news/fugro-finds-partners-subsea-650778)
- **2025-04-18** - Fugro and Damen announced a joint venture to provide the Royal Netherlands Navy with a marine security and surveillance vessel and operating crew under a two-year charter awarded by the Dutch Ministry of Defence. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2025/04/fugro-and-damen-to-support-the-royal-netherlands-navy-with-marine-security-and-surveillance-vessel/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.fugro.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/fugro

companies.body:
# Fulcrum Defence

> Veteran-owned UK supplier of bespoke equipment carriage, packaging and protection solutions for defence and emergency services.

## What they do

Fulcrum Defence is a veteran-owned UK firm that project-manages the design and delivery of bespoke equipment carriage, packaging and protection solutions for the military and emergency services. Its focus is protecting and transporting sensitive or mission-critical equipment in demanding operational environments, with attention to ergonomics and rapid access. It works through a network of partners and suppliers to deliver custom solutions to defence standards, including codification and NSN compliance.

## Products and solutions

- **Communications and walk-on fit cases** - carriage systems for communications equipment.
- **Unmanned systems cases** - protective carriage for unmanned platforms.
- **Weapons and armoury cases** - cases for weapons, ammunition, ancillaries and mobile armouries.
- **Aircrew carriage** - flight helmet and flight bag carriage solutions.
- **Lima Pack** - dual carriage system, alongside bespoke pouches and mission-specific systems.

## Recent news

- No public news items confirmed as at 2026-06-29.

# Futronics Limited

> Designer and manufacturer of vehicle-based command and control, mobile data, communications and ANPR enforcement systems for policing and law enforcement.

## What they do

Futronics designs and manufactures vehicle-mounted command and control systems, mobile data terminals, ANPR (Automatic Number Plate Recognition) enforcement systems, optical fingerprint scanners and video monitoring systems. The company serves police forces worldwide and has been a technology partner to the UK Driver and Vehicle Licensing Agency (DVLA) for its Home Office approved ANPR enforcement capability. Products are deployed across emergency services, transport and public safety organisations.

## Products and solutions

- **eTS Touchscreen** - vehicle-mounted touchscreen command and control terminal for operational policing.
- **F-Box** - integrated mobile data and communications platform for emergency vehicles.
- **eMC Range** - modular communications systems for vehicle deployment.
- **DVLA Stingray II** - Home Office approved ANPR enforcement system, deployed for DVLA vehicle excise duty enforcement.
- **eFP / eFR** - optical fingerprint scanner and fingerprint reader units for law enforcement.

# Futurum Consultancy and Training Ltd

> Specialist intelligence, surveillance, and covert tradecraft training and consultancy for defence, law enforcement, and government clients.

## What they do

Futurum provides discreet, practitioner-led training and consultancy to defence, law enforcement, and government clients internationally. The company has served clients in over 50 countries, with expertise spanning intelligence analysis, covert tradecraft, countering corporate espionage, counter-terrorism, and crisis management. All trainers are drawn from the UK police, NCA, military, special forces, and government.

## Products and solutions

- **Intelligence Analysis Training** - instruction in i2 Analyst Notebook, Palantir, open-source intelligence, and social media exploitation.
- **Covert Tradecraft Consultancy** - training across conventional and technical surveillance, specialist interviewing, and elicitation techniques.
- **Counter-Terrorism and Crisis Management** - advisory and training services for government and law enforcement clients.
- **Leadership and Management Development** - programmes for military and public sector clients.

companies.body:
# GKM Aerospace

> Precision CNC machining and turnkey component manufacture for the aerospace and defence sectors.

## What they do

G.K.M. (Aerospace) Limited is a precision engineering manufacturer based in Basildon, Essex, supplying finished components and assemblies to leading OEMs and tiered suppliers in the aerospace, defence, and communications industries. The company operates a multi-shift CNC machining facility and works from engineering drawings and 3D models to deliver complex metallic and composite parts. Customers include prime contractors in the defence sector such as BAE Systems, Martin-Baker, Airbus, and Babcock.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC precision machined components** - High-complexity turned and milled parts in aluminium, steel, titanium, invar, and exotic alloys, supplied to defence and aerospace OEMs and their supply chains.
- **Turnkey assemblies** - Complete component solutions from CAD/CAM design through to quality-controlled finished assemblies, including R&D and proof-of-concept manufacturing.

# G3 Systems

> Portland-based provider of deployable and fixed military infrastructure, engineering and support services for austere environments.

## What they do

G3 Systems designs and produces deployable infrastructure solutions and delivers engineering, service and support to defence and government customers operating in austere locations. Its work spans deployable and fixed infrastructure and systems, outsourced fire and rescue services, and through-life support. The company is a wholly owned subsidiary of US-headquartered Intrepid Global Solutions and operates from Portland, England.

- **Deployable facilities** - military shelters, containerised laboratories and field operating sites for expeditionary use.
- **Deployable logistics infrastructure** - flatracks, containers and associated equipment supplied to defence ministries.
- **Engineering and support services** - through-life support and outsourced fire and rescue services in austere environments.

companies.body:
# GaardTech

> Australian maker of robotic enemy-vehicle targets and live-fire training systems for armed forces.

## What they do

GaardTech designs and manufactures robotic enemy-vehicle targets and live-fire training systems for armies. Its catalogue of 3D Robotic Enemy Vehicles replicates a range of enemy platforms with thermal, electronic and radar signatures, and the mobile targets can be operated remotely or autonomously across terrain. The company is based in Brisbane, Queensland, and exports to several allied armed forces.

## Products and solutions

- **3D Robotic Enemy Vehicles** - mobile robotic targets replicating tanks, armoured personnel carriers and other platforms with multi-spectral signatures for live-fire training.
- **Flatpack robotic targets** - deployable, recyclable robotic targets and decoys.
- **Doctrinally correct enemy formations** - target groupings representing enemy battle groups for collective live-fire training.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Awarded a contract to supply the British Army with 32 3D Robotic Enemy Vehicles for live-fire training, to be built in Brisbane. [source](https://www.defenceconnect.com.au/land/7479-gaardtech-awarded-british-army-contract)

companies.name: Galaxkey Limited
companies.summary: Identity-based data protection platform providing encryption for email, files, messaging, and collaboration, with a specific offering for the defence and Official-Sensitive supply chain.
companies.body:
# Galaxkey Limited

> Identity-based data protection platform providing encryption for email, files, messaging, and collaboration, with a specific offering for the defence and Official-Sensitive supply chain.

## What they do

Galaxkey provides a post-quantum ready data protection platform built on a three-layer, identity-based encryption architecture. Organisations retain full control of their own encryption keys. The platform is listed by the NCSC and has a dedicated product configuration for the UK defence and Official-Sensitive supply chain, protecting data that must be shared across contractors and subcontractors beyond secure network boundaries. Clients include KNDS UK (formerly WFEL), the Ministry of Justice, Bradford City Council, UCL, and international financial institutions.

## Products and solutions

- **Secure Emails** - end-to-end encryption for business communications, preventing unauthorised forwarding or sharing.
- **Secure Workspace** - controlled environment for secure collaboration and large file transfer between organisations including defence subcontractors.
- **Secure Files and Digital Rights Management** - persistent protection applied to Official-Sensitive documents regardless of location or recipient system.
- **LockChat** - enterprise secure messaging with identity-based encryption, positioned as a replacement for consumer apps such as WhatsApp in regulated environments.
- **Secure Signatures** - digitally signed contractual and compliance documentation.
- **Secure Shield** - centralised data protection dashboard with e-discovery capability.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** NCSC listed; Cyber Essentials (evidenced on website)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04-20** - Chairman Admiral Sir George Zambellas published commentary on data vulnerability and national security. [source](https://www.galaxkey.com/mythos-vulnerability-and-the-responsibility-we-cannot-ignore-admiral-sir-george-zambellas/)
- **2026-03-05** - Admiral Sir George Zambellas published analysis on data privacy in the context of conflict. [source](https://www.galaxkey.com/privacy-in-data-war-shows-the-weaknesses-admiral-sir-george-zambellas/)

companies.summary: Physical and cyber security systems manufacturer providing high-security access control, perimeter protection, and NPSA-compliant products to government, defence, and critical national infrastructure.
companies.body:
# Gallagher Security Europe Limited

> Physical and cyber security systems manufacturer providing high-security access control, perimeter protection, and NPSA-compliant products to government, defence, and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

Gallagher designs, manufactures, and supplies security systems covering access control, perimeter protection, intruder alarms, and integrated cybersecurity. The company's UK high-security team delivers solutions to Five Eyes government and critical national infrastructure sites. The High Security Controller 7000 holds compliance awards from the UK National Protective Security Authority (NPSA) under both the Automatic Access Control Systems (AACS) and Cyber Assurance of Physical Security Systems (CAPSS) standards. The UK European headquarters is in Warwick; global headquarters is in Hamilton, New Zealand.

## Products and solutions

- **High Security Controller 7000** - NPSA and CAPSS compliant access control hardware with FIPS-approved microprocessor, authenticated and encrypted reader communications, designed for UK government and Five Eyes high-security sites.
- **Command Centre** - integrated security management software platform covering access control, perimeter, video, and alarm management.
- **Perimeter Security Hardware** - fence controllers, gate hardware, and sensors for critical infrastructure and defence site perimeter protection.
- **PIV Software** - identity credential management for high-security government environments.
- **AccessNow and OneLink** - cloud and networked access control solutions for scalable deployment.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** NPSA AACS compliance; NPSA CAPSS compliance (Controller 7000)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025** - Gallagher Security's High Security Controller 7000 achieves NPSA AACS and CAPSS compliance for UK and European government sites. [source](https://security.gallagher.com/en-US/News/Gallagher-Security-announces-NPSA-compliance-for-the-High-Security-Controller-7000-in-the-UK-and-Europe)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/gallagher-security

companies.body:
# Galleon Embedded Computing Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of rugged data recorders, mission computers, and network-attached storage for aerospace and defence platforms.

## What they do

Galleon Embedded Computing develops high-performance, ruggedised data recording and storage solutions for military and commercial aerospace applications. Products span airborne, ground vehicle, and remotely operated vehicle platforms. The company became part of the Spectra Aerospace and Defense group in August 2021 and now trades under the Spectra brand, with the UK registered entity (Companies House 09962683) providing a UK presence.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged data recorders** - IRIG-106 compliant recorders supporting high-speed multi-sensor data capture, with removable storage up to 64TB.
- **Mission computers and servers** - VPX and XSR-series systems including the XSR Tactical Secure Server, meeting MIL-STD-810, MIL-STD-704, MIL-STD-461 and DO-160 standards.
- **Network-attached storage (NAS)** - High-capacity NAS devices for deployed military environments across land, sea, air, and space domains.
- **C5ISR integrated systems** - End-to-end data capture, processing, storage, and display solutions built to work across platforms without separate integration risk.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CMMC Level 2 enterprise-wide certification (Spectra group)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Galvion UK Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of ballistic helmet systems, soldier power and data management solutions, and future dismounted soldier technologies.

## What they do

Galvion designs and delivers integrated protective head systems and intelligent power and data solutions for military and tactical teams. The company holds a significant position on the UK MOD VIRTUS programme, having supplied over 200,000 helmet systems since contract award in 2015. Galvion's UK entity (Companies House 09713398) supports its British military customer base, with manufacturing for UK and European orders fulfilled in partnership with NP Aerospace. The parent company is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.

## Products and solutions

- **Batlskin helmet systems** - Modular, ballistic protective helmets including the Caiman, Hellbender, and Caiman TL variants, used by UK, US, Canadian, and NATO forces.
- **Nerv Centr power and data systems** - Soldier-worn power management, battery charging, and data distribution systems including the Squad Power Manager (SPM) and MAX-8 Mission Adaptive Charging Station.
- **CORTEX smart helmet integration platform** - Digitally enabled headborne integration system stemming from UK DSTL Future Integrated Dismounted Soldier Vision (FIDSV) programme work.
- **E.D.G headborne power and data system** - Headborne power and data distribution and management for the integrated soldier.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12-08** - Galvion won the US Marine Corps Integrated Helmet System contract. [source](https://www.galvion.com/newsroom/galvion-wins-us-marine-corps-integrated-helmet-system-contract)

companies.body:
# GardaWorld

> Private security and risk management company providing government, diplomatic, and defence security services in complex and high-threat environments.

## What they do

GardaWorld is the largest privately-owned security company in the world, headquartered in Montreal, Canada. Its International Protective Services division operates in complex, high-threat, and emerging markets, delivering physical security, close protection, risk analysis, crisis response, and training services to diplomatic, defence, development, and infrastructure clients. In the UK, GardaWorld operates under the entity GW Consulting UK Limited and is a founding signatory of the International Code of Conduct for Private Security Providers.

## Products and solutions

- **Government and defence security services** - Physical security for embassies and consulates, mobile security teams, risk analysis reporting, and emergency planning for MOD and allied-nation government clients.
- **International protective services** - Close protection teams drawing on former US and UK Special Forces personnel, operating in high-threat environments.
- **Counter-terrorism and intelligence services** - Threat assessment, intelligence reporting, and advisory services.
- **Crisis response** - Emergency planning, incident management, and evacuation support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2019-11-01** - GardaWorld acquired UK-based risk specialist Drum Cussac, expanding its presence in the British defence and security market. [source](https://www.garda.com/en-int/locations/united-kingdom)

companies.name: Gardiner & Theobald LLP
companies.summary: Independent construction and property consultancy delivering cost, project, and programme management services to defence, national security, and space clients.
companies.body:
# Gardiner & Theobald LLP

> Independent construction and property consultancy delivering cost, project, and programme management services to defence, national security, and space clients.

## What they do

Gardiner and Theobald is an independent global consultancy providing cost management, project management, and construction management services across the built environment. Its Defence and National Security practice supports MOD, the Defence Infrastructure Organisation (DIO), prime contractors, and private operators on programmes spanning land, sea, air, cyber, and space domains. Security-cleared teams manage programmes from £100,000 to £100 billion in value. The firm is regulated by RICS and has signed the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence infrastructure programme management** - Cost, commercial, and project management for MOD and DIO-led construction and estate programmes, including appointments as commercial delivery partner on the Defence Equipment and Support (DE&S) Paragon joint venture.
- **Satellite and space launch programme support** - Cost control, risk management, and regulatory readiness for LEO, MEO, and GEO satellite launch programmes and UK spaceport development.
- **Construction cost management** - Quantity surveying and cost advisory for defence facilities including Royal Navy, British Army, and Royal Air Force estate.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Gardner Aero Defence Solutions Ltd

> Aerospace and defence consultancy specialising in disruptive air vehicle concepts, strategic development, and business improvement for the military aviation sector.

## What they do

Gardner Aero Defence Solutions (GADS) provides consultancy services to the military aerospace and defence sectors, drawing on 30 years of practitioner experience. Services cover concept innovation for new air vehicle product concepts, management services for programme and project delivery, and business venture support for new market entry and collaborative development. GADS also maintains a cooperation with ARMYTEC of Israel, pooling capability in military products and support solutions for allied nations.

## Products and solutions

- **Management services** - Business simplification, programme and project management, business process redesign, risk assessment, and strategy review for aerospace and defence clients.
- **Concept innovation** - Technology surveys and appraisal, feasibility assessment, concept realisation, and regulatory support for new air vehicle programmes.
- **Business ventures** - Market assessment, collaborative venture formation, due diligence, and joint venture support for international defence business development.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Gardner Aerospace Limited
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of precision metallic aerospace components and assemblies for civil and defence aerospace programmes.
companies.body:
# Gardner Aerospace

> UK manufacturer of precision metallic aerospace components and assemblies for civil and defence aerospace programmes.

## What they do

Gardner Aerospace manufactures machined parts, sheet metal fabrications, and sub-assemblies for the aerospace industry, including defence programmes. The company holds recognised industry approvals and manufactures to AS9100 and NADCAP quality standards. It operates multiple UK facilities, with its principal site in Derby, and has expanded operations internationally including a facility in Bengaluru, India.

The company is owned by Ligeance Aerospace Technology Co. Ltd, a Shenzhen-listed Chinese entity. A 2022 proposed increase in indirect Chinese state investment (via Sichuan Development Holding Co. Ltd) was called in by the UK Government under national security legislation. The acquisition was permitted subject to conditions, including the appointment of an HM Government Observer to the board of the UK subsidiary and the removal of Chinese board members from that entity.

## Products and solutions

- **Machining** - 5-axis CNC milling and high-precision CNC mill/turn of complex metallic aerospace parts.
- **Fabrications** - Precision sheet metal fabrication for aerospace structural and system components.
- **Assembly** - Sub-assembly and full assembly work combining machined, fabricated and welded parts.
- **Speed Shop** - Rapid-turnaround machining capability for urgent aerospace component requirements.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, NADCAP
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-06-01** - Gardner Aerospace signed an expanded agreement with FDH Aero to support the phased transfer of commercial aircraft programmes as Gardner prepared to open its new facility in Bengaluru. [FDH Aero](https://fdhaero.com/press-release/fdh-aero-signs-expanded-agreement-with-gardner-aerospace/)
- **2026-03-20** - UK court ruled that former interim CEO breached legal duties by lobbying MPs against a 2022 Chinese investment transaction involving Gardner Aerospace's parent company. [Global Banking and Finance](https://www.globalbankingandfinance.com/uk-aerospace-company-wins-lawsuit-against-ex-ceo-who-lobbied/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/gardner-aerospace

companies.body:
# Gary Linton Services International

> Specialist global supplier of CBRN, forensic, mobile laboratory and modular facility equipment to military, police and security customers.

## What they do

GLSI designs, sources and delivers specialist equipment packages and turnkey solutions for defence, law enforcement and security organisations in more than 60 countries. The company operates as a full turnkey provider, managing design, build, equipping, delivery, installation, commissioning and training against a client brief. It has direct experience supplying MOD-funded programmes including an urban training village and training tower built for the MOD, comprising 14 relocatable habitable units.

## Products and solutions

- **Mobile Laboratories** - BSL2 and BSL3 containerised mobile laboratories (20ft and 40ft configurations) for forensic, biosafety and field science applications.
- **CBRN Equipment** - Rapid deployment kits, PPE kits across all four protection levels, and decontamination equipment for police and military CBRN response.
- **Mobile Biometric Kit (MBS-01)** - Biometric identification station, biometric reader, and ID check unit for field identification operations.
- **Modular Training Village** - Relocatable habitable units configurable for urban operations training; previously supplied to the MOD.
- **Crime Scene Investigation Equipment** - Forensic and police equipment packages including disaster victim identification (DVI) capability.
- **Mobile Protective Shield** - Personal protection solutions for law enforcement and security operations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; MOD Armed Forces Covenant Employer Recognition Scheme (Bronze)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Gase Engineering

> Family-owned precision engineering manufacturer supplying machined parts, sheet metal fabrication and sub-assemblies to aerospace, defence, nuclear and telecommunications industries.

## What they do

Gase Engineering is a family-owned and operated precision engineering company founded in 1964, with heritage derived from Strand Electric (Covent Garden), MOD Woolwich Arsenal and Vickers of Crayford. It operates four factories in Dartford, Kent, with a workforce of around 60. The company supplies manufactured parts to aerospace, defence, nuclear and telecommunications customers, offering capabilities from single prototypes through to high-volume batch production.

## Products and solutions

- **5-Axis CNC Milling** - High-precision machining of complex aerospace and defence components.
- **CNC Mill/Turn** - High-precision combined mill/turn operations for complex parts.
- **Precision Sheet Metal Work** - Fine-limit sheet metal fabrication, a core heritage capability.
- **Waterjet Cutting** - Specialised in-house waterjet cutting processes.
- **Final Assembly** - On-site assembly of components requiring machining, fabrication and welding.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Gattaca Projects

> Mechanical engineering consultancy delivering project-based solutions across defence, energy, aerospace and transportation.

## What they do

Gattaca Projects is a mechanical engineering consultancy providing end-to-end project delivery across design, manufacturing, structural analysis, quality control, R&D, maintenance and project engineering. The business operates as a statement-of-work partner, drawing on a network of specialist associates to scale for larger programmes. It is a subsidiary brand within Gattaca PLC, a listed engineering and technology staffing group.

companies.name: GE Aviation UK
companies.summary: UK operations of GE Aerospace, supplying propulsion, avionics, electrical power and propeller systems for military and commercial aircraft.
companies.body:
# GE Aviation UK

> UK operations of GE Aerospace, supplying propulsion, avionics, electrical power and propeller systems for military and commercial aircraft.

## What they do

GE Aviation UK is the UK-registered entity and operating presence of GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE), a global aerospace propulsion, services and systems company. The UK footprint spans Gloucestershire and Cheltenham (propeller, electrical power and avionics systems), plus maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) sites in Scotland and South Wales. More than 60% of UK business serves defence and military customers. The UK employs over 2,000 people, making it one of the largest concentrations of aviation systems engineers in the country.

## Products and solutions

- **Propulsion systems** - military jet engines including the F110, F404 and F414 for combat aircraft, and the T700 turboshaft for rotorcraft platforms including the AH-64E Apache Mk2.
- **Avionics and electrical power systems** - integrated avionics and power systems for platforms including the C-130J, Eurofighter Typhoon, F-35, Boeing P-8 Poseidon and E-7 Wedgetail.
- **Dowty Propellers** - electronically controlled, all-composite propeller systems for military airlifters, commercial aircraft and specialist platforms; manufactured in Gloucestershire.
- **MRO services** - engine maintenance, repair and overhaul for military and commercial operators at UK sites.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-06-01** - UK MOD signed support and sustainment contract (UK PASS) with GA-ASI for Protector RG Mk1; GE Aerospace systems feature across the RAF fleet. [GA-ASI press release](https://www.ga-asi.com/uk-mod-signs-protector-support-contract-with-ga-asi)
- **2024-07-19** - GE Aerospace signed the UK MOD's Defence Aviation Net Zero Charter at RIAT 2024. [GE Aerospace press release](https://www.geaerospace.com/news/press-releases/ge-aerospace-signs-uk-mods-defence-aviation-net-zero-charter)

# GEM Cable Solutions

> UK manufacturer of bespoke defence-standard cable assemblies, wiring harnesses, looms and panel builds for military and aerospace applications.

## What they do

GEM Cable Solutions is a UK manufacturer of bespoke cable assemblies, control boxes, wiring harnesses, looms, panels and fibre optic products. The company has over 30 years of experience and manufactures entirely in the UK from facilities in Hertfordshire, including within a Class 8 clean room. It serves the defence, aerospace, marine, robotics, nuclear, rail, broadcast, motorsport and satellite sectors, with defence forming a dedicated product line.

## Products and solutions

- **Military cable assemblies and wiring harnesses** - custom-built to DEF STAN and Mil-Spec requirements, covering power, signal, data and multicore configurations for military vehicles, radar, avionics and naval equipment.
- **Mil-Spec wiring systems** - components manufactured to MIL-DTL and MIL-C specifications with full traceability and certificates of conformity.
- **Sealed heatshrink and military connector systems** - components for harsh-environment applications subject to shock, vibration, moisture and extreme temperatures.
- **Fibre optic products and total network solutions** - bespoke fibre assemblies for communications and sensor systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Gemba Advantage

> Software and data engineering business delivering digital solutions for UK government departments and defence clients requiring high security clearance.

## What they do

Gemba Advantage is a software and data engineering company building and maintaining digital solutions for organisations operating in high-security and operationally complex environments. The majority of staff hold high-level security clearance. The company holds multi-year contracts with UK public sector departments and agencies, and serves private sector defence clients including BAE Systems. Gemba was acquired by Actica Consulting in October 2024, forming part of the Actica Group alongside Ntegra; Actica is backed by Sovereign Capital Partners and focuses on technology transformation and cybersecurity for national security clients.

## Products and solutions

- **High-impact software delivery** - custom software products for mission-critical government and defence programmes.
- **Digital transformation services** - advisory and delivery support helping organisations adopt modern technology practices within secure environments.
- **Supercharged product management** - user research, design and product management services applied to complex public sector programmes.

companies.name: General Atomics Aeronautical Systems UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK-registered entity of GA-ASI, providing dedicated support for the RAF's Protector RG Mk1 remotely piloted aircraft system and other UK MOD RPAS requirements.
companies.body:
# General Atomics Aeronautical Systems UK

> UK-registered entity of GA-ASI, providing dedicated support for the RAF's Protector RG Mk1 remotely piloted aircraft system and other UK MOD RPAS requirements.

## What they do

General Atomics Aeronautical Systems UK Ltd (GA-UK) is an affiliated entity of General Atomics Aeronautical Systems, Inc. (GA-ASI), incorporated in England in 2010 and headquartered in London. It supports UK Ministry of Defence Remotely Piloted Air Systems (RPAS) requirements and works with European systems and support providers to enhance the capabilities of GA-ASI's Predator-series UAS. The parent company, GA-ASI, is headquartered in San Diego, California, and is a subsidiary of General Atomics, a privately held US defence technology company.

## Products and solutions

- **Protector RG Mk1** - the RAF's new RPAS, based on the GA-ASI MQ-9B SkyGuardian; provides intelligence, surveillance, target acquisition and reconnaissance (ISTAR) capability and replaces the RAF's Reaper fleet. Achieved UK Military Type Certificate from the Military Aviation Authority in May 2025.
- **UK Protector Availability and Support Solution (UK PASS)** - sustainment and logistics contract signed with UK MOD in June 2025, covering the RPA, Certifiable Ground Control Stations and Synthetic Training Systems.
- **Predator B / MQ-9 Reaper support** - historical support for RAF Reaper operations from RAF Waddington and Creech Air Force Base, Nevada.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-06-01** - UK MOD signed the UK PASS sustainment contract with GA-ASI covering logistics and maintenance of the Protector RG Mk1 fleet. [GA-ASI press release](https://www.ga-asi.com/uk-mod-signs-protector-support-contract-with-ga-asi)
- **2025-05-01** - Protector RG Mk1 received Military Type Certificate from the UK Military Aviation Authority. [Defence Advancement](https://www.defenseadvancement.com/news/uk-mod-ga-asi-finalize-sustainment-contract-for-mq-9b-based-protector-rg-mk1/)

## Links

companies.name: General Dynamics United Kingdom Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of US defence prime General Dynamics, delivering land systems and mission systems for the British armed forces and international allies.
companies.body:
# General Dynamics UK

> UK subsidiary of US defence prime General Dynamics, delivering land systems and mission systems for the British armed forces and international allies.

## What they do

General Dynamics United Kingdom Limited operates two main business lines: Land Systems and Mission Systems. Land Systems designs, manufactures and supports armoured fighting vehicles and protected patrol vehicles for the British Army from a 57-acre site in Merthyr Tydfil, the largest active armoured vehicle production facility in the UK. Mission Systems, based in Hastings and Oakdale, delivers avionics, tactical communications, situational awareness systems, and secure data solutions for fixed-wing aircraft, rotary-wing platforms and ground vehicles. The company is a lead supplier to the Ministry of Defence and has been operating in the UK since 1962.

## Products and solutions

- **AJAX Armoured Fighting Vehicle** - family of tracked armoured reconnaissance vehicles for the British Army, assembled and integrated at Merthyr Tydfil.
- **Foxhound** - protected patrol vehicle for light infantry and specialist troops; a SHORAD variant has been demonstrated with Moog.
- **Bowman** - tactical communications and information system equipping British Army vehicles, naval vessels and aircraft; upgrades ongoing.
- **Multi Role Vehicle Protected (MRV-P)** - protected vehicle programme for the British Army.
- **Mission systems for air platforms** - avionics, stores management, video and data recording, and data-at-rest security integrated onto Eurofighter Typhoon, Hawk, AW101, AW159 Wildcat, M-346, F-16 and others.
- **Robotic Vehicles** - Tracked Robot 10-Ton (TRX) and Multi-Utility Tactical Transport (MUTT) unmanned ground vehicles.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-05** - Secretary of State for Wales visited the Oakdale Mission Systems facility to observe sovereign defence capability in action. [source](https://generaldynamics.uk.com/mission-systems/secretary-of-state-for-wales-visits-mission-systems-team-in-oakdale-supporting-uk-sovereign-defence-capability/)
- **2025-11-14** - AJAX achieved Initial Operating Capability with the British Army. [source](https://generaldynamics.uk.com/land-systems/ajax-achieves-initial-operating-capability-in-british-army/)
- **2025-10-02** - General Dynamics Land Systems UK and Ricardo announced a collaboration to develop a vehicle for the British Army Light Mobility Vehicle Programme. [source](https://generaldynamics.uk.com/land-systems/general-dynamics-land-systems-uk-and-ricardo-join-forces-to-develop-vehicle-for-the-uks-armys-light-mobility-programme/)
- **2025-09-10** - Moog and General Dynamics UK demonstrated a short-range air defence variant of Foxhound at DSEI 2025. [source](https://generaldynamics.uk.com/land-systems/moog-and-general-dynamics-uk-unveil-specialist-air-defence-foxhound/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/general-dynamics-uk-limited

companies.name: Geodesy
companies.summary: GIS consultancy providing geospatial systems, mapping applications and data integration for government agencies and the built environment.
companies.body:
# Geodesy

> GIS consultancy providing geospatial systems, mapping applications and data integration for government agencies and the built environment.

## What they do

Geodesy is a San Francisco-based GIS consultancy providing needs analysis, implementation, systems integration and automation for government and built-environment clients. Its stated client base is local, state and federal agencies in the United States, including cities, counties and federal bodies. Public information does not evidence a UK presence or a direct UK or allied defence contract; the entry is carried in Tally for its geospatial intelligence (GEOINT) tradecraft relevance rather than a demonstrated defence customer base.

## Products and solutions

- **Encompass** - enterprise GIS web application giving local government staff and the public map, data and analytics access; successor to a long-running desktop product line.
- **Dox** - spatially indexed document management system linking stored files to GIS map features.
- **GIS consulting and systems integration** - needs analysis, data modelling, and integration between GIS and other enterprise systems, typically built on Esri ArcGIS alongside open mapping tools (Google Maps, OpenLayers, Leaflet).
- **3D mapping applications** - browser-based 3D city and building models for planning and analysis use cases, built on Esri ArcGIS Pro and ArcGIS Online.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

Public information on frameworks, accreditations or memberships was not found.

companies.summary: Tewkesbury-based CNC machining specialist with a long history of supplying defence primes and mid-tier suppliers with electronic warfare enclosures, ECM housings, and precision components.
companies.body:
# Geometric Manufacturing

> Tewkesbury-based CNC machining specialist with a long history of supplying defence primes and mid-tier suppliers with electronic warfare enclosures, ECM housings, and precision components.

## What they do

Geometric Manufacturing has been producing precision CNC-machined components for the defence and aerospace industries since 1986. The company's core competence is the machining of enclosures and components used in electronic warfare systems, ECM equipment, and cyber encryption products. It also machines parts for fighting vehicles and aircraft cabin interiors. Customers include HMG and their prime contractors, as well as mid-tier defence suppliers. The company operates across two manufacturing sites with 24-hour working, and maintains air-gapped IT infrastructure and staff vetting.

## Products and solutions

- **Electronic warfare enclosures** - machined housings and enclosures for EW systems and ECM equipment, to Def Stan and MIL-SPEC standards.
- **Cyber encryption component machining** - precision components for secure communications and encryption equipment.
- **Vehicle and platform assemblies** - complex assemblies for man-pack, land vehicle installations, and maritime and air platform components.
- **CNC machined parts** - CAM-programmed precision parts from a network of UK and overseas suppliers, with in-house sub-contract finishing including plating and painting.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, JOSCAR, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

[source](https://www.punchline-gloucester.com/articles/aanews/award-winning-manufacturer-acquires-local-firm)

companies.name: Getac Technology Corporation
companies.summary: Taiwanese manufacturer of rugged laptops, tablets and mobile computing for defence and field use.
companies.body:
# Getac

> Taiwanese manufacturer of rugged laptops, tablets and mobile computing for defence and field use.

## What they do

Getac is a Taiwanese manufacturer of rugged computing devices, including fully rugged and semi-rugged laptops and tablets, software and mobile video solutions built to military-grade durability standards. The company was established in 1989 as a joint venture with GE Aerospace to provide defence electronics and now serves defence, public safety, utilities, automotive, manufacturing and logistics customers in over 100 countries. Getac Technology Corporation is a subsidiary of Getac Holdings Corporation, listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange, and is headquartered in Taipei.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged laptops and tablets** - fully and semi-rugged devices certified to MIL-STD-810 and IP ingress standards for field use.
- **5G rugged devices** - rugged hardware for defence, first response and resources frontline operations.
- **Mobile video and software solutions** - field data, video and device-management software for operational deployment.

companies.name: GF Machining Solutions Ltd
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of the Georg Fischer Group providing precision machining technology, including EDM, milling, laser and automation solutions, to aerospace and defence manufacturers.
companies.body:
# GF Machining Solutions

> UK subsidiary of the Georg Fischer Group providing precision machining technology, including EDM, milling, laser and automation solutions, to aerospace and defence manufacturers.

## What they do

GF Machining Solutions Ltd is the UK entity of GF Machining Solutions, a division of the Georg Fischer Group headquartered in Biel/Bienne, Switzerland. The company supplies machine tools and complete precision machining solutions to manufacturers of precision components and tooling, with aerospace and defence among its key served sectors. The UK subsidiary (trading as United Machining UK Limited following a 2026 rebranding of the global division) serves customers from its Midlands base. Products and solutions are used in the manufacture of highly challenging aerospace components including engine parts such as blisks and discs, as well as aerostructure components.

## Products and solutions

- **EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining)** - wire, die-sinking, and hole-drilling EDM machines under the Agie Charmilles brand, used for tight-tolerance aerospace and defence components.
- **High-speed milling** - 5-axis and high-performance milling centres under the Mikron Mill brand for precision aerospace parts.
- **Laser texturing and micromachining** - surface texturing and laser micromachining systems.
- **Turbomachinery airfoil machining** - specialist machining of blisks, discs, and airfoil components for aerospace engines under the Liechti brand.
- **Automation and tooling** - workholding, automation, and tooling systems under the System 3R brand.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.gfms.com/uk/en-gb.html

# Ghyston

> Bristol-based bespoke software development agency delivering business-critical software solutions, with security-cleared work in the defence sector.

## What they do

Ghyston is a Bristol-based bespoke software development and consultancy agency founded in 2012. The company delivers end-to-end software solutions covering consultancy, AI enablement, development, and long-term support. It is technology-agnostic, selecting the appropriate stack for each client's requirements. Ghyston holds ISO 27001 and Cyber Essentials certifications and works with security-cleared personnel for defence sector projects. The company is a Crown Commercial Service supplier.

companies.body:
# Gibson Robotics

> Developer of autonomous uncrewed aerial systems for counter-UAS and critical infrastructure protection.

## What they do

Gibson Robotics designs and manufactures autonomous fixed-wing and multirotor UAS for security applications at sensitive sites and critical national infrastructure. The company focuses on detecting, tracking, and neutralising aerial and ground threats in real time. Its systems deploy in seconds and use patented net-capture mechanisms to effect aerial threats with low collateral risk.

## Products and solutions

- **Red Kite** - High-speed autonomous fixed-wing UAS capable of intercepting aerial threats and capturing them using a patented net-capture mechanism. Equipped with sensors for visual detection, tracking, and threat identification.
- **Shadow Hawk** - Quadcopter UAS with stabilised pan-tilt-zoom thermal and RGB camera, active internal heating and cooling, triple-redundant hardware and software, and navigation and strobe lighting.

companies.name: GKN Aerospace Services Limited
companies.summary: Tier-one global aerospace and defence manufacturer of aerostructures, electrical wiring systems, landing gear, transparencies, and engine components.
companies.body:
# GKN Aerospace

> Tier-one global aerospace and defence manufacturer of aerostructures, electrical wiring systems, landing gear, transparencies, and engine components.

## What they do

GKN Aerospace Services Limited is a leading global tier-one supplier of airframe and engine structures, landing gear, electrical wiring interconnection systems (EWIS), transparencies, and aftermarket services. The company serves both civil and defence markets across fixed-wing aircraft, rotorcraft, UAVs, missiles, and space launch vehicles. It is owned by Melrose Industries plc, a UK-listed engineering company. GKN Aerospace has a significant UK manufacturing footprint, including facilities in Filton (Bristol), Luton, and Western Approach, with further sites across Sweden, the Netherlands, and the United States.

## Products and solutions

- **Composites and metallic aerostructures** - Fuselage structures, flaperons, in-flight opening doors, wing trailing and leading edges, for platforms including the F-35 Lightning II, C-130, and Tempest sixth-generation fighter.
- **Electrical wiring interconnection systems (EWIS)** - Wiring harness packages designed and produced for all F-35 aircraft in production and a broad range of military aircraft engines. GKN holds a proprietary wiring design and manufacturing system.
- **Landing gear** - Design, development, production, and MRO of landing gear systems for helicopters and fixed-wing platforms including the Chinook CH-47, Apache AH-64, NH90, and Black Hawk.
- **Transparencies and canopies** - Fighter canopies produced from single-piece stretched acrylic with low-observable coatings, supplied ready for frame installation.
- **UAV structures** - Composite landing gear and composite tail sections for platforms including the General Atomics MQ-9B SkyGuardian, flown by the RAF as Protector.
- **Missile components** - Lightweight reusable missile canisters, structural components, and missile EWIS for customers including Raytheon and Lockheed Martin.
- **Ice protection systems** - Electro-thermal ice protection systems and in-house icing wind tunnel test facilities.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-05-15** - GKN Aerospace selected to support the next phase of UK MOD's Project NYX in partnership with Anduril UK. [source](https://www.gknaerospace.com/news-insights/news/gkn-aerospace-to-support-next-phase-of-uk-mod-s-project-nyx-with-anduril-uk/)
- **2025-12-09** - GKN Aerospace and Anduril UK signed a partnership to lead UK future UAV capabilities, targeting the Army's Land Autonomous Collaborative Platform contract. [source](https://www.gknaerospace.com/news-insights/news/gkn-aerospace-and-anduril-uk-sign-partnership-to-lead-uk-s-future-uav-capabilities/)
- **2025-11-26** - GKN Aerospace and the Swedish Defence Ministry deepened collaboration with a new UAV demonstrator. [source](https://www.gknaerospace.com/news-insights/news/gkn-aerospace-and-swedish-defence-ministry-deepen-collaboration-with-new-uav-demonstrator/)

companies.name: Glasswall Solutions Limited
companies.summary: Cybersecurity company providing Content Disarm and Reconstruction (CDR) technology to protect government and defence organisations from file-based threats.
companies.body:
# Glasswall

> Cybersecurity company providing Content Disarm and Reconstruction (CDR) technology to protect government and defence organisations from file-based threats.

## What they do

Glasswall Solutions Limited develops zero-trust file security technology based on Content Disarm and Reconstruction (CDR). Its products treat every file as untrusted, validating, rebuilding, and cleaning each file to a known-good, malware-free standard before it reaches a user or system. The company's technology is deployed by government agencies and defence organisations across the Five Eyes nations, and has been adopted for cross-domain solutions, secure file transfer portals, and disconnected, degraded, intermittent, and limited (DDIL) environments. In April 2024, Glasswall joined the D3IP collaboration community, which provides access to the UK Defence BattleLab's co-creation space and the NSTIx innovation programme. The company is backed by PSG Equity.

## Products and solutions

- **Glasswall Halo (Server)** - Scalable CDR server solution deployable on-premises, in the cloud, or in air-gapped networks.
- **Glasswall Embedded Engine (SDK)** - Software development kit enabling CDR to be integrated into third-party applications and services.
- **Glasswall Meteor (Desktop)** - Automated desktop application for processing local and cloud storage files.
- **Glasswall Foresight** - AI-powered threat prediction capability using machine learning trained on file structural telemetry to identify unknown and zero-day malware.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, SOC 2 Type II, CMMC Level 2, NIST SP 800-171
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-29** - Glasswall launched Halo Agent Skills, enabling AI agent integration for file protection and policy configuration. [source](https://www.glasswall.com/us/blog/drop-glasswall-halo-into-your-ai-agent-introducing-the-halo-agent-skills-package)
- **2024-04-01** - Glasswall joined the D3IP collaboration community to share CDR expertise with the UK defence sector. [source](https://www.glasswall.com/blog/glasswall-joins-d3ip-collaboration-community-to-share-cybersecurity-expertise-with-uk-defence-sector)

## Links

- Website: https://www.glasswall.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/glasswall-solutions-limited/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: Glasswall website (glasswall.com); Companies House (05573793); GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register; UKTN funding article; Glasswall D3IP blog post; PSG Equity portfolio page.

companies.name: Glenair UK Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Glenair Inc (Glendale, California), manufacturing and supplying high-reliability interconnect solutions for military aerospace, land systems, and space applications.
companies.body:
# Glenair UK

> UK subsidiary of Glenair Inc (Glendale, California), manufacturing and supplying high-reliability interconnect solutions for military aerospace, land systems, and space applications.

## What they do

Glenair UK Limited is the UK manufacturing and sales entity of Glenair Inc, a US privately-held interconnect manufacturer headquartered in Glendale, California. The Mansfield, Nottinghamshire site has supplied the military aerospace sector with interconnect solutions for over 40 years. The company manufactures and stocks connectors, backshells and accessories, fibre optic interconnects, harness solutions, hermetic connectors, RF and microwave connectors, and space mechanisms. Its products are used in military aircraft, ground vehicles, soldier systems, and space vehicles. Glenair UK holds JOSCAR registration, AS/EN/JISQ 9100, Cyber Essentials Plus, and ISO 14001.

## Products and solutions

- **Military-specification connectors** - Circular and rectangular Mil-Spec qualified connectors in environmental, filtered, hermetic, and fibre optic configurations, for military aerospace and land systems.
- **Backshells and accessories** - Conduit fittings, EMI/RFI shielding accessories, and strain relief backshells for defence wiring systems.
- **Fibre optic interconnects** - Optical connector and cable assembly solutions for military and space platforms.
- **RF and microwave connectors** - High-frequency interconnect solutions for radar, electronic warfare, and communications applications.
- **Hermetic connectors** - Sealed connector solutions for demanding military and space environments.
- **Space mechanisms** - Hold-down and release mechanisms (HDRM) and related space interconnect products.
- **STAR-PAN harness solutions** - Integrated harness panel systems for complex military wiring installations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN/JISQ 9100, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials Plus, JOSCAR Registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.glenair.co.uk

companies.body:
# Global EMC UK Ltd

> Manufacturer of electromagnetic shielding enclosures, anechoic test chambers and Faraday cages, serving military and defence, medical, academic and automotive customers across 24 countries.

## What they do

Global EMC UK designs, manufactures and installs magnetic field shielding, Faraday cages and anechoic test chambers from an 1,800 m² factory in Nottinghamshire. The company delivers bespoke, turnkey solutions to military and defence agencies, commercial research facilities and medical institutions. Its engineering team includes Security Cleared (SC) designers and is Cyber Essentials Plus accredited.

## Products and solutions

- **Military and defence test chambers** - anechoic and conducted EMC chambers designed and manufactured to MIL-STD-461, DEF STAN 59-411 and MIL-STD-285.
- **Tempest shielded rooms** - Faraday cage enclosures meeting NATO SDIP-27 and Tempest standards, independently tested and certified to ISO 17025.
- **Anechoic test chambers** - shielded enclosures lined with high-performance absorber material for EMC and RF measurement across L, S, C, X, Ku and Ka bands; 5G and automotive CISPR12/25 variants also available.
- **Magnetic field shielding** - rooms and enclosures for TEM/SEM/E-Beam equipment and EEG applications, reducing 50 Hz AC and quasi-DC interference.
- **Faraday cages and shielded rooms** - RFI/EMI enclosures including forensic room shielding, high voltage laboratories, and control and amplifier rooms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus; products manufactured to MIL-STD-461, DEF STAN 59-411, MIL-STD-285 and NATO SDIP-27
- **Memberships:** ADS Group
