# Global Invacom Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of satellite ground equipment serving commercial, government and defence Satcom, SatTV and GNSS networks in over 120 countries.

## What they do

Global Invacom designs and manufactures satellite ground equipment from multiple UK sites, including its headquarters at Whitstable, Kent. The company serves commercial, government and defence customers with antennas, RF electronics, transceivers, fibre distribution equipment, waveguides, and complete satellite terminal solutions. Its defence portfolio includes products for Intelligence, Surveillance and Reconnaissance (ISR) applications and man-portable terminals suited to military operations. The company holds Joscar, Cyber Essentials Plus and ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001 accreditations. It is listed on the Singapore Exchange (SGX) and AIM.

## Products and solutions

- **XRJ Ka-band transceiver** - single-unit transmit and receive transceiver operating across the full extended Ka-band, supporting WGS, GovSat, Skynet and Inmarsat GX networks; Mil-STD 164C compliant and ITAR-exempt; awarded Best Government Solution at Strategies in Satellite Ground Segment 2025.
- **XY multi-orbit antenna** - steerable terminal for rapid-response and mission-critical applications, supporting GEO, MEO, LEO and High Earth Orbit.
- **ISR ground segment solutions** - satellite ground equipment designed for data capture in intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance roles.
- **Transportable and fixed satellite terminals** - manpack VSAT terminals, steerable and tracking terminals, and long-term fixed deployments.
- **RF over Fibre and waveguide products** - distribution and switching components for satellite networks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Global Marine Systems Ltd
companies.summary: UK-based subsea cable installation and maintenance company, part of Global Marine Group, acquired by Keppel Infrastructure Fund (Singapore) in 2025; the only UK-domiciled operator laying and maintaining international submarine communications cables.
companies.body:
# Global Marine Systems Ltd

> UK-based subsea cable installation and maintenance company, part of Global Marine Group, acquired by Keppel Infrastructure Fund (Singapore) in 2025; the only UK-domiciled operator laying and maintaining international submarine communications cables.

## What they do

Global Marine Systems provides installation, maintenance and repair of submarine fibre optic cables to the telecommunications, oil and gas, and deep-sea research sectors. The company operates a fleet of cable ships and trenching assets and holds maintenance agreements covering approximately 33% of the world's subsea fibre optic cable, including systems across the North and South Atlantic, English Channel, North Sea, Caribbean Sea and South East Pacific. As the sole UK-domiciled cable ship operator, it holds sovereign relevance to UK critical national infrastructure. The wider Global Marine Group, headquartered in Chelmsford, Essex, also includes OceanIQ (subsea cable data, route engineering and permitting) and SubConnect (subsea housing and interconnectors).

The Group was acquired by Keppel Infrastructure Fund (Singapore) and Keppel Infrastructure Trust, with the transaction completing in stages through 2025. The operating entity and vessels remain UK-domiciled; the group HQ is now Singapore.

## Products and solutions

- **Subsea cable installation** - planning and installation of submarine fibre optic cable systems using a fleet of six dynamically positioned cable ships.
- **Subsea cable maintenance and repair** - emergency and scheduled repair under long-term maintenance agreements covering Atlantic, Channel and North Sea systems.
- **OceanIQ data and route engineering** - subsea cable data records covering 2.8 million km of cable (97% of global fibre), survey, route engineering and permitting services.
- **SubConnect** - design, testing and supply of subsea housing, interconnectors and cable jointing services.
- **Staffing and asset hire** - specialist offshore personnel and vessel asset hire.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO 14001; ISO 45001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Atlantic Cable Maintenance and Repair Agreement (ACMA)

## Recent news

- **2025-11-25** - Keppel Infrastructure Trust completed its 46.7% investment in Global Marine Group, following the initial acquisition by Keppel Infrastructure Fund completed March 2025. [source](https://subtelforum.com/keppel-acquires-global-marine-group/)

## Links

- Website: https://globalmarine.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/gmsl

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: globalmarine.co.uk; adsgroup.org.uk/members/global-marine-systems-ltd-1/; en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Global_Marine_Systems; subtelforum.com/keppel-acquires-global-marine-group/; keppel.com; find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/01708481; globalmarine.co.uk/future-proofing-the-uks-critical-subsea-cable-infrastructure/.

companies.name: Global RadioData Communications Ltd
companies.summary: Hereford-based satellite, RF and IP networking integrator developing mission-critical communications systems for defence, government, emergency response and energy customers worldwide.
companies.body:
# Global RadioData Communications Ltd

> Hereford-based satellite, RF and IP networking integrator developing mission-critical communications systems for defence, government, emergency response and energy customers worldwide.

## What they do

Global RadioData Communications Ltd (GRC) designs, integrates and supports satellite, GSM/LTE, cloud and IP connectivity solutions for users operating in contested and remote environments. The company is a Tier 1 Value-Added Reseller with major satellite hardware and airtime providers. Its customer base includes defence and government agencies, emergency responders, oil and gas operators and NGOs. GRC operates its own Network Monitoring Centre (NMC) in Hereford, providing 24/7 hardware support and network assurance. The company also develops the Scytale family of proprietary products for tactical and government communications. GRC is a signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Scytale** - rapidly deployable communications device connectable to any bearer of opportunity (satellite, GSM, local Wi-Fi), providing VoIP telephony, Wi-Fi coverage up to 300 m and data networking within minutes of power-on; supports next-generation encryption and is interoperable with defence, government and commercial networks.
- **Scytale Tactical Cloud** - cloud-based security layer providing traffic obfuscation, digital signature protection and remote-user data security.
- **GRM rugged modem series** - in-house designed satellite modems for demanding environments.
- **6-SAT managed SATCOM service** - fully managed end-to-end satellite connectivity service aggregating multiple satellite hardware and airtime providers including Ovzon SATCOM-as-a-Service.
- **SigmaNet SD-WAN** - next-generation network resilience for assured communications.
- **Satellite terminals** - VSAT manpack terminals, hotspots and satcom-on-the-move solutions for fixed and mobile deployments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory

## Recent news

- **2022-10-27** - Ovzon announced a $2.9m SATCOM-as-a-Service order placed by GRC for integration into GRC's 6-SAT offering. [source](https://news.satnews.com/2022/10/27/ovzons-2-9-musd-order-from-uks-global-radiodata-communications-ltd-grc-for-satcom-as-a-service/)

companies.name: Global Satellite Vu Ltd
companies.summary: UK space company delivering high-resolution thermal infrared imagery from a satellite constellation for national security, economic monitoring and climate resilience applications.
companies.body:
# Global Satellite Vu Ltd

> UK space company delivering high-resolution thermal infrared imagery from a satellite constellation for national security, economic monitoring and climate resilience applications.

## What they do

SatVu designs, owns and operates a constellation of thermal infrared Earth observation satellites, capturing imagery at up to 3.5 metres ground sample distance. The data supports activity-based intelligence, critical infrastructure monitoring and situational awareness in low-light and night-time conditions. The company sells thermal imagery, tasking services and a catalogue product direct to government and commercial customers.

## Products and solutions

- **HotSat Satellite Constellation** - thermal infrared imaging satellites; HotSat-1 launched June 2023, HotSat-2 launched March 2026 and declared commercially operational June 2026; HotSat-3 under contract.
- **Thermal Imagery** - calibrated high-resolution thermal infrared data products delivered via the SatVu platform.
- **Tasking** - on-demand satellite collection scheduling for specific targets or areas of interest.
- **Catalog** - archive thermal imagery accessible via API.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-29** - SatVu declares HotSat-2 Start of Commercial Operations, delivering thermal intelligence over critical infrastructure worldwide. [satellitevu.com](https://www.satellitevu.com/news/satvu-declares-hotsat-2-start-of-commercial-operations)
- **2026-03-30** - HotSat-2 successfully launched on SpaceX Transporter-16 rideshare mission. [satellitevu.com](https://www.satellitevu.com/news/satvu-set-to-revolutionise-earth-intelligence-with-the-successful-launch-of-their-hotsat-2-thermal-satellite)
- **2025-06-25** - SatVu awarded multi-million Euro ESA contract as the first UK company to receive a Category 1 Copernicus Contributing Mission contract. [satellitevu.com](https://www.satellitevu.com/news/uks-satvu-secures-multi-million-esa-contract-to-power-climate-and-security-intelligence)

## Links

companies.body:
# Satellite Vu

> UK operator of high-resolution thermal infrared Earth observation satellites, trading as SatVu.

## What they do

SatVu (Global Satellite Vu Ltd) captures high-resolution thermal infrared imagery from space, building a satellite constellation intended to provide high-frequency global revisit. Its first satellite, HotSat-1, launched in 2023 and HotSat-2 followed in 2026. The company serves national security, economic monitoring and climate resilience applications, providing thermal data on infrastructure and activity worldwide.

## Products and solutions

- **Thermal imagery** - high-resolution thermal infrared data captured from the HotSat constellation.

companies.body:
# Globus Metal Powders Ltd

> UK manufacturer and atomiser of high-integrity metal powders for aerospace, defence and other mission-critical applications, using vacuum inert gas atomisation technology.

## What they do

Globus Metal Powders produces high-purity, process-optimised metal powders for powder metallurgy Hot Isostatic Pressing (PM-HIP), additive manufacturing, thermal spraying and related advanced consolidation processes. The company manufactures at its Middlesbrough facility using VIGA (vacuum inert gas atomisation) technology and undertakes in-house alloying to achieve controlled chemistry, ultra-low oxygen content and precise particle morphology. Customers use Globus powders to produce mission-critical components including turbine parts, airframe structures, naval hardware and submarine components.

## Products and solutions

- **Nickel superalloy powders** - including GMP 625, GMP 718, GMP 939 and GMP Alloy X for aerospace turbine and structural applications.
- **Martensitic and precipitation-hardening steel powders** - including GMP 300M, GMP M300, GMP 13-8Mo, GMP 15-5PH and GMP 17-4PH for high-strength defence components.
- **Cobalt-chromium alloy (GMP F75)** - for wear-resistant and biomedical applications.
- **Nickel-aluminium bronze (GMP 02-833)** - for marine and naval defence hardware.
- **Toll atomising and powder recycling services** - contract atomisation and re-certification of customer-supplied materials.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- Website: https://www.globusmetalpowders.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/globus-metal-powders-ltd

# GMD Eurotool Ltd

> Precision engineering and turnkey manufacturing company serving the UK Ministry of Defence, part of the Leviathan Engineering Group, with a track record in warship refit, submarine components and land vehicle parts.

## What they do

GMD Eurotool provides precision engineering services from its Plymouth facility, specialising in turnkey project delivery, CNC and manual machining, welding, fabrication and design-for-manufacture consultancy. The company is a preferred supplier to Babcock International Group under the Leviathan Engineering Group parent framework, and has a history of manufacturing components for warships, submarines, infantry fighting vehicles and supporting major dockyard infrastructure. Defence work includes build-to-print, emergency turnaround and specialist procurement.

## Products and solutions

- **Turnkey defence engineering projects** - end-to-end design, manufacture and delivery of components and assemblies for naval and land platforms.
- **Warship and submarine components** - precision-machined and fabricated parts for refit and maintenance packages.
- **Land vehicle components** - infantry fighting vehicle and support vehicle parts.
- **OEM mechanical spares and reverse engineering** - reproduction of legacy components where original suppliers are unavailable.
- **Special purpose machinery** - custom machinery design and build for defence and industrial customers.

# GMK Ltd

> UK importer and distributor of firearms, ammunition and associated equipment to the shooting sports market, law enforcement and the British military, operating as part of the Beretta Holding Group.

## What they do

GMK is the UK's principal importer of shotguns, rifles and rifle ammunition from Beretta group brands, distributing to the recreational shooting market, law enforcement and the Ministry of Defence. The company holds the Beretta Gallery in St James's, London, and has supplied firearms and associated equipment to British Army and UK law enforcement bodies. In 2025 GMK Tactical Products became part of Beretta Defence Technologies (BDT), through which the full range of Beretta group products is offered to UK law enforcement and the British military. Beretta Holding Group holds 60% of the company.

## Products and solutions

- **Beretta shotguns and rifles** - distributed under exclusive UK import arrangements.
- **Sako and Tikka rifles** - precision bolt-action rifles for sporting and professional use.
- **Benelli shotguns** - supplied to the British Army under a won tender.
- **Rifle ammunition** - RWS, Norma and GECO ammunition brands distributed through RUAG Ammotec arrangement.
- **Optics and accessories** - scopes, binoculars, thermal optics, moderators and gun safes.
- **GMK Tactical Products / Beretta Defence Technologies** - law enforcement and military product range from across the Beretta group, from 2025 operating under the BDT umbrella.

# Goaco

> UK digital transformation and cyber security consultancy, established 2010, delivering cyber security, data and AI, cloud, software development and user-centred design to public and private sector customers.

## What they do

Goaco is a UK-headquartered digital consultancy, formerly trading as Level 5, delivering services across digital delivery, cyber security, software development, data and AI, cloud, managed services and user-centred design. The company states it partners with UK Government departments and cites case studies with the Cabinet Office, the Ministry of Justice, the National Library of Wales and the Scottish Courts and Tribunals Service. It has also expanded into the Middle East with a Dubai presence.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber Security Services** - including penetration testing, a 24/7 security operations centre, data protection and managed security services.
- **DFIR (Digital Forensics and Incident Response)** - a named solution line for forensic investigation and incident response.
- **Goidentity** - a cloud-based digital identity verification platform launched July 2025, built with Thales, supporting verification of thousands of ID document types worldwide and biometric facial matching with passive liveness detection.
- **Data and AI Services** - data and artificial intelligence consulting and delivery.
- **Managed Services** - 24/7 ITIL-aligned IT service desk and support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud 14; Digital Outcomes and Specialists (DOS 6 and DOS 7); Technology Services 4 (Crown Commercial Service); Cyber Security Services 3

Goonhilly Earth Station Ltd operates from its site on Goonhilly Downs in Cornwall, with additional facilities in the USA. The company provides services across three divisions: Commercial Satcom, Defence and Security, and Lunar and Deep Space Communications. It offers secure and reliable satellite communications, telemetry tracking and command, carrier monitoring, and space domain awareness services. # Gravity Industries

> British developer of the patented Jet Suit for human-vectored flight.

## What they do

Gravity Industries designs and builds the Jet Suit, a wearable human propulsion system enabling vectored-thrust flight and agile manoeuvre. Founded in 2017, the company has moved from demonstration and entertainment toward professional and defence deployment, with applications cited in ship boarding, coast guard operations, special forces mobility, and medical and mountain rescue.

companies.body:
# Greene, Tweed & Co Limited

> US-headquartered manufacturer of high-performance sealing, composite and connector components for aerospace and defence platforms, with a UK facility in Nottinghamshire.

## What they do

Greene Tweed designs and manufactures custom sealing assemblies, thermoplastic composite structural components, and electrical and fibre optic connectors for commercial and military aerospace and defence applications. The company holds over 60 years of aerospace experience and states that 80 per cent of the world's aircraft rely on its custom-engineered components. Its UK entity is based in Ruddington, Nottinghamshire. Defence applications include flight control systems, hydraulic utility systems, fuel systems, brake systems, landing gear and engines. The company also serves the defence sector directly with products engineered for improved operational reliability, reduced system weight, and survivability in mission-critical environments.

## Products and solutions

- **Sealing solutions** - elastomer and thermoplastic O-rings, rotary seals, rod and piston seals, scrapers and wipers for high-pressure, high-temperature aerospace and defence environments.
- **Xycomp DLF thermoplastic composites** - discontinuous long-fibre thermoplastic composite components delivering 30 to 50 per cent weight savings against aluminium; used in structural airframe brackets, enclosures and airflow structures.
- **Seal-Connect electrical and fibre optic connectors** - rated to 260°C and 45,000 psi; designed for critical power and data transmission in aerospace and defence platforms.
- **Chemraz FFKM elastomers** - perfluoroelastomer sealing materials for chemically aggressive environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Greenjets
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of electric ducted-fan propulsion systems for drones, air taxis and electric aircraft, spun out from Blue Bear Systems Research.
companies.body:
# Greenjets

> UK manufacturer of electric ducted-fan propulsion systems for drones, air taxis and electric aircraft, spun out from Blue Bear Systems Research.

## What they do

Greenjets designs and manufactures electric ducted-fan propulsion systems for advanced air mobility, with a product range spanning 2 kW to 1 MW output. Its ducted-fan architecture is stated to be quieter, safer and more efficient than an equivalent open-bladed propeller, with the company citing up to 93 per cent noise reduction, up to 45 per cent lower power consumption for a given thrust, and flight speeds of up to 125 m/s. The company began as Project InCEPTion, a research programme within the ePropulsion division of Blue Bear Systems Research, and span out as an independent company at the end of 2022. Its team draws on aerospace and motorsport experience from Rolls-Royce, BAE Systems and Formula 1. Greenjets states it supplies propulsion systems to airframe manufacturers across North America and Europe, and offers an airframe integration service alongside its engines.

## Products and solutions

- **Sycamore 160** - compact ducted-fan engine for fixed-wing UAVs under 25 kg; 6 kg maximum static thrust at 792 g all-up weight, designed for a 26 m/s cruise speed with a stated 75 per cent noise reduction.
- **Aspen 212** - higher-output engine in the Aspen family for larger UAV and advanced air mobility platforms.
- **Hemlock** - compact, high-thrust engine for high flight-speed applications.
- **Integrated Power Advantage** - airframe integration service pairing Greenjets propulsion systems with customer aircraft design.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2023-07** - Secured a £50,000 grant for AI-led design capability. [Greenjets](https://www.greenjets.com/news-articles/greenjets-secures-ps50k-grant-for-ai-led-design-capability)
- **2023-07** - Began US operations in Syracuse via the Genius NY accelerator programme, following a $500,000 investment. [Greenjets](https://www.greenjets.com/news-articles/greenjets-begins-us-operations-in-syracuse-via-genius-ny-programme)
- **2023-05** - Launched the IPM5 electric jet engine. [Greenjets](https://www.greenjets.com/news-articles/ipm5-electric-jet-engine-is-launched)

_News older than ~12 months pruned; see Greenjets newsroom for full history._

## Links

- Website: https://www.greenjets.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/greenjetsltd/

## Sources

# Greycoat Global Ltd

## What they do

Greycoat Global was formed in 2017 by two founders who bring together over 50 years of combined intelligence, communications and cyber experience gained across the Ministry of Defence and other government departments. The company delivers cyber security consultancy, digital upskilling, open-source intelligence (OSINT) training, and capacity-building programmes for government and commercial clients. # GridSmart Ltd

## What they do

GridSmart supplies and supports secure tracking, sensing and switching solutions to law enforcement, military and intelligence agencies. Its Auspex platform is the common operating environment across the GridSmart product range, built to NCSC guidelines with security ingrained at the code level and OWASP best-practice development standards applied throughout. The company is staffed and operated by ex-military and police operators and provides first, second and third-line support for all software and hardware. Server solutions can be deployed on-site or as a secure cloud solution. GridSmart holds Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 certifications.

companies.name: Griffon Marine Limited
companies.summary: British designer and manufacturer of military, rescue and commercial hovercraft and marine craft.
companies.body:
# Griffon Marine

> British designer and manufacturer of military, rescue and commercial hovercraft and marine craft.

## What they do

Griffon designs, builds and supports hovercraft with payloads from around 380kg up to about 150 tonnes, for military, coastguard, rescue and commercial operators. It states over 180 craft operating in more than 40 countries, with customers including the UK Royal Marines, the Canadian Coast Guard and the Colombian Navy. Having rebranded from Griffon Hoverwork to Griffon Marine in 2025, it has broadened from hovercraft into wider marine structures and high-speed boats while keeping hovercraft as its core. It is owned by the Bland Group and holds ISO 9001, and runs a hovercraft type-rating training course accredited by the UK Chamber of Shipping.

## Products and solutions

- **Hovercraft range** - small to large amphibious craft (payloads ~380kg to ~150 tonnes) for military, rescue and commercial roles.
- **Wyvern LCAC** - a Landing Craft Air Cushion class for amphibious military transport, granted Approval in Principle by Lloyd's Register.
- **Marine solutions** - lightweight marine structures and high-speed boats.
- **Support and training** - spares, in-service support, and a Chamber of Shipping accredited type-rating course.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (via LRQA)
- **Other:** Armed Forces Covenant signatory; UK Chamber of Shipping accredited training course

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Awarded a contract by the Finnish Border Guard to build three 2000TD-class hovercraft, delivery 2026 to 2027, following an EU-wide tender. [Ships Monthly](https://shipsmonthly.com/news/griffon-marine-to-deliver-three-hovercraft-to-finnish-border-guard/)
- **2025-03** - Rebranded from Griffon Hoverwork to Griffon Marine, broadening into the wider marine market. [Manufacturing Today](https://manufacturing-today.com/news/hovercraft-and-small-boats-specialist-griffon-marine-is-reshaping-the-future-of-defense-and-marine-innovation/)
- **2023-09** - Launched the Wyvern LCAC class at DSEI. [Griffon](https://www.griffonhoverwork.com/about-us/news/wyvern-turns-heads-at-combined-naval-event/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.griffonmarine.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/griffon-hoverwork-limited

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-01. Sources: Griffon website (griffonhoverwork.com/about-us), Companies House (00853053), Ships Monthly, Manufacturing Today, Finnish Border Guard (raja.fi). Note: legal entity renamed to Griffon Marine Limited on 19 March 2025; "Griffon Hoverwork" brand still in use.

companies.name: GSN360
companies.summary: A technology channel consultancy for the defence and security sectors, helping technology vendors grow through channel strategy, distribution partnerships and market entry.
companies.body:
# GSN360

> A technology channel consultancy for the defence and security sectors, helping technology vendors grow through channel strategy, distribution partnerships and market entry.

## What they do

GSN360 (registered as Global Solutions Network(s) Ltd) is a channel consultancy rather than a reseller, systems integrator or distributor in its own right. It describes its role as accelerating technology growth through tailored channel strategies, distribution partnerships and strategic guidance, acting as an extension of client businesses as they expand into new markets and territories. The company works across sectors including defence, security, green technology, insurance, maritime and data centres, and states it has helped clients write over £50 million in contracts across around 80 countries. GSN360's LinkedIn profile describes areas of work including secure communications, robotics and synthetic environments; this framing does not currently appear on the company's own website, so it is carried here with that caveat.

## Products and solutions

- **Vendor enablement** - channel strategy development, market positioning, partner and reseller engagement, sales acceleration, and tender or bid writing support.
- **Distribution partnerships** - distributor identification and engagement, introductions, co-selling and joint marketing, and exclusive distribution agreement negotiation.
- **Deal fulfilment and local market enablement** - unblocking stalled deals, local market penetration, cross-border transaction management and regulatory compliance support.
- **Global partnerships** - cross-border market entry facilitation across the USA, Canada, the Middle East, Australia and Europe.
- **Consulting services for major projects** - sector consulting across defence, security, green technology, insurance, maritime and data centres, drawn from a curated associates network.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

No publicly stated frameworks, accreditations or memberships (ISO, Cyber Essentials, ADS Group, techUK, JOSCAR or G-Cloud) were found for GSN360 itself. The company refers generally to "accelerated onboarding via approved supplier frameworks" without naming a specific framework or accrediting body.

## Recent news

- **2025-11-03** - Published commentary on prioritising physical encryption for data protection. [source](https://gsn360.com/why-physical-encryption-should-be-high-priority)
- **2025-07-30** - Published commentary on rising global defence-technology investment. [source](https://gsn360.com/defencetech-not-a-dirty-word)

## Links

- Website: https://www.gsn360.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/gsn360

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Sources: GSN360 website (gsn360.com, including /about, /our-services, /technology, /gsn360-partners, /gsn360-clients, /trends-and-insights), Companies House (08941687), LinkedIn company page (linkedin.com/company/gsn360).

# Guidehouse Europe Ltd

> Global professional services firm delivering advisory, technology, and managed services to national security and defence clients, with a UK entity based in London.

## What they do

Guidehouse is a global AI-led professional services firm delivering advisory, technology, and managed services to commercial and government clients, with an integrated business technology approach across healthcare, financial services, energy, infrastructure, and national security markets. Its Defense & Security industry group supports diplomatic, intelligence, law enforcement, homeland security, and defence agencies, applying strategy, management, technology, and risk guidance to operational optimisation, technology modernisation, warfighting capabilities, and financial management. The firm states it employs approximately 18,000 professionals globally. Guidehouse Europe Ltd is the UK entity, based in London, and the firm maintains a wider UK and Europe, Middle East and Canada regional presence alongside operations in Germany, India and Lithuania.

## Products and solutions

- **Defense, Diplomacy & Intelligence** - strategy, management, technology, and risk advisory for defence, diplomatic and intelligence agencies.
- **Homeland Security & Law Enforcement** - advisory support for border security, customs, cybersecurity, and crisis management challenges.
- **AI & Data** - services helping clients apply AI, data, and analytics to decision-making, productivity, and strategic objectives.
- **Cybersecurity** - tailored services to protect critical assets and reduce vulnerabilities, aligned to client risk profiles and operational requirements.
- **Financial Management** - data and technology-led advisory across risk, controls, compliance, and financial systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Other:** prime supplier on 7 of 9 lots of the UK government's Management Consulting Framework Three (MCF3), covering strategy and policy, complex transformation, finance, HR, procurement and supply chain, infrastructure and transport, and environmental sustainability and socio-economic development.

companies.body:
# Guyson International Ltd

> Yorkshire-based manufacturer of blast finishing and ultrasonic cleaning equipment for the aerospace and defence sectors, covering both OEM manufacturing and MRO operations.

## What they do

Guyson International manufactures surface preparation and precision cleaning solutions for aerospace, defence, medical, and industrial applications. Its blast systems support aerospace airframe structures, turbine blades, propulsion components, landing gear, and additive manufactured parts. Defence applications include selective removal of conformal coating from printed circuit boards and surface preparation of military components. The company also designs fully robotic and automated blasting systems.

## Products and solutions

- **Manual Blast Machines (Euroblast range)** - Industrial blast cabinets for a wide range of surface preparation tasks, including ATEX-certified variants for hazardous environments.
- **Automated Blast Machines** - Rotary indexing, rotary spindle, in-line, and robotic blasting systems for high-volume and precision applications.
- **Shot Peening Systems** - Automated shot peening equipment for aerospace and defence components.
- **Automated Powder Recovery Systems** - Equipment for metal additive manufacturing and 3D printed component finishing.
- **Ultrasonic Cleaning Systems (Kerry range)** - Multi-stage aqueous and solvent cleaning systems, ultrasonic baths, and benchtop cleaners.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# GXO Logistics

> Contract logistics provider operating an active UK defence supply chain business, including warehousing and 4PL services for BAE Systems' Type 26 frigate programme.

## What they do

GXO Logistics is a US-listed, pure-play contract logistics business operating across more than 970 facilities globally. In the UK, GXO provides warehousing, materials handling and 4PL control-tower services to aerospace and defence customers. The business expanded its UK defence footprint significantly following the acquisition of Wincanton in 2024. GXO holds a six-year agreement, announced in February 2026, with BAE Systems to support shipbuilding operations at the Scotstoun and Govan yards on the River Clyde for the Type 26 frigate programme. It is also a founding member of the Torus alliance, alongside Amentum, Accenture and Maersk, established to provide integrated supply chain solutions to the UK defence sector. GXO holds Gold Award status under the UK Defence Employer Recognition Scheme.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence logistics operations** - warehousing and materials handling at defence manufacturing and shipbuilding sites, including BAE Systems' Clyde yards.
- **4PL control tower** - coordination of inbound and outbound transport operations across a distributed defence supply chain.
- **Aerospace and defence supply chain solutions** - end-to-end logistics management for aerospace and defence OEMs, drawing on over two decades of sector experience across more than 30 global A&D sites.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Defence Employer Recognition Scheme (Gold Award)

## Links

- Website: https://gxo.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/gxo-logistics/

Sources: GXO corporate website (gxo.com); GXO press release, "GXO Accelerates Aerospace & Defence Expansion with BAE Systems Renewal in UK", February 2026; GXO/Amentum/Accenture/Maersk Torus alliance press release; ADS Group members directory (snapshot 2026-05-15).

# Hadean

> London developer of distributed spatial computing software for simulation, wargaming and command and control.

## What they do

Hadean builds a distributed spatial computing platform for massively scalable simulations, synthetic environments and virtual worlds. Its technology supports defence customers with digital wargaming, command and control, and AI-driven synthetic training, alongside applications in gaming, space and enterprise. The company is venture-backed and works with the UK Ministry of Defence and partners across the UK defence technology sector.

- **Wargaming** - simulation tooling that models realistic human behaviours and evolving scenarios.

Hale Hamilton manufactures high-pressure valves and fluid and gas control equipment for naval defence, industrial gas and high-technology industrial markets. # Halo Aerospace Laboratories UK Ltd

> Non-destructive testing and surface treatment specialist serving the aerospace, defence, medical, nuclear and gas industries from a facility in Morecambe, Lancashire.

## What they do

Halo Aerospace Laboratories UK Ltd provides non-destructive testing (NDT) and materials testing services alongside a range of surface treatment processes for aerospace and defence customers. The company operates in-house and on-site facilities at its Heaton Business Park site in Morecambe and offers site inspection services throughout the UK and Europe. It holds NADCAP accreditation covering its NDT and surface treatment processes and works to customer-specific quality standards.

companies.name: Halo IS Ltd
companies.summary: Leeds-based cybersecurity consultancy specialising in security testing, compliance audits and strategic consultancy.
companies.body:
# Halo IS Ltd

> Leeds-based cybersecurity consultancy specialising in security testing, compliance audits and strategic consultancy.

## What they do

Halo IS is a cybersecurity consultancy established in 2019 in Leeds. Its core competencies are security testing, compliance audits and strategic consultancy, delivered by a team of CREST-accredited ethical hackers and account managers. Engagements range from a first network security assessment through to annual testing schedules and full red team exercises. The company describes a tailored, cost-effective approach to security testing across organisations of any size.

## Products and solutions

- **External and internal infrastructure assessment** - network reconnaissance, port scanning and vulnerability scanning from the perspective of an unauthenticated attacker, with manual verification and exploitation of confirmed vulnerabilities.
- **Web application and API assessment** - OWASP-based testing covering configuration management, transport layer security, authentication, authorisation, session management, data validation and business logic.
- **Mobile application assessment** - testing based on the OWASP Mobile Testing Guide, covering platform usage, reverse engineering, server-side controls, cryptography and data storage.
- **Cloud service review** - assessment of IaaS, PaaS and SaaS tenant configurations (for example Microsoft 365 or AWS) against NCSC Cloud Security Principles and CIS Benchmarks.
- **Wireless infrastructure assessment** - testing of access point configuration, signal bleed, encryption standards and network segmentation.
- **Server and workstation build reviews** - hardening reviews against NCSC guidance, CIS Benchmarks or Cyber Essentials Plus requirements.
- **Firewall review** - ruleset and configuration audits against best practice.
- **Social engineering** - physical access testing (site surveillance, access control bypass, tailgating) and phishing/vishing assessments, combined with user training.
- **Cyber Essentials certification support** - Cyber Essentials Basic and Cyber Essentials Plus assessments.
- **PCI DSS Requirement 11.3 testing.**

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CREST member company; Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 27001; ISO 9001.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Links

- Website: https://halo-is.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/halo-is

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Sources: halo-is.co.uk (Home, About Us, fetched 2026-07-04); CREST-approved.org member listing; ADS Group members directory (snapshot 2026-05-15); Companies House (company 11806111).

companies.body:
# Hamble Aerostructures Ltd

> UK-based designer and manufacturer of advanced composite, metallic and hybrid aerostructures for civil and military aircraft programmes, operating as part of the Aernnova group.

## What they do

Hamble Aerostructures Limited (HAL) is headquartered in Hamble-le-Rice, Hampshire, and has operated as an aerostructures manufacturer since 1936. The business became part of the Spanish aerospace group Aernnova following its acquisition from GE Aviation in 2020. HAL designs and manufactures major aircraft structures in composite, metallic, acrylic and hybrid materials, and holds design authority for a number of structural components. Its customer base includes Airbus, Boeing, BAE Systems and Bombardier. HAL also produces military role equipment and canopy systems for defence programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite aerostructures** - design and manufacture of primary and secondary composite structures for civil and military aircraft, including trailing-edge wing components for the Airbus A350.
- **Metallic aerostructures** - machined and sheet-formed metallic structures using in-house treatment and finishing capabilities.
- **Military role equipment and canopy systems** - specialist structures and transparencies for military aircraft programmes.
- **End-to-end design and build** - in-house design authority, manufacturing (composite, metallic machining and sheet forming), surface treatments and transparencies.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** EN9100 (AS9100 equivalent; certificate FM 555201)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Harland & Wolff
companies.summary: Shipbuilding, ship repair and heavy fabrication group operating four UK yards, now owned by Spain's Navantia.
companies.body:
# Harland & Wolff

> Shipbuilding, ship repair and heavy fabrication group operating four UK yards, now owned by Spain's Navantia.

## What they do

Harland & Wolff is a shipbuilding and fabrication business operating yards at Belfast (Northern Ireland), Appledore (Devon), and Methil and Arnish (Scotland). The Belfast and Appledore yards focus on naval and commercial shipbuilding and ship repair; the Scottish yards specialise in energy-sector fabrication. The business was acquired by Navantia UK, the British arm of the Spanish state-owned shipbuilder Navantia, in January 2025, which retained more than 1,000 jobs across the four sites.

## Products and solutions

- **Naval shipbuilding** - construction of vessels for UK defence programmes, including work on the Fleet Solid Support (FSS) ships for the Royal Fleet Auxiliary at Belfast and Appledore.
- **Ship repair and conversion** - dry-dock and repair services across the yards.
- **Heavy fabrication** - structures for the energy and offshore sectors, primarily at the Methil and Arnish yards.

## Recent news

- **2025-01-27** - Navantia UK completed its acquisition of Harland & Wolff's four UK yards, protecting more than 1,000 jobs. [Navantia UK](https://navantia.co.uk/2025/01/27/navantia-uk-completes-acquisition-of-harland-wolff/)
- **2025-04-23** - Navantia UK announced acceleration of modernisation work at the Belfast yard, part of a £115 million investment across the four UK sites. [Harland & Wolff](https://www.harland-wolff.com/news/navantia-uk-accelerates-modernisation-of-harland-wolff-to-create-cutting-edge-shipyard-in-belfast/)
- **2025-09-25** - Navantia UK and the Ministry of Defence attended Factory Acceptance Tests in Finland as part of the FSS modernisation programme. # Harquebus

> Intelligence and security risk management consultancy serving governments, multinationals, NGOs, and private clients.

## What they do

Harquebus draws on a team of ex-military and civilian intelligence officers with backgrounds in counter-IED, counter-terrorism, counter-insurgency, and counter-intelligence. The firm provides intelligence and security services to governments, multinationals, NGOs, and family offices, operating globally. Its focus is on enabling clients to make informed decisions in complex environments, from routine operations through to crisis.

## Products and solutions

- **Integrated Crisis Management** - combining operational crisis management expertise with strategic communications to prepare clients for and support them through crises.
- **Security Risk and Resilience Management** - threat assessment, due diligence, dispute resolution, investigations, insider threat mitigation, and M&A target assessments.
- **Training and Capacity Enhancement** - restructuring and skills development for UK and allied government security organisations (military, civil, and police) to address existing and emerging threats.
- **Counter-Terrorism and Intelligence Services** - specialist advisory and training services across the full counter-terrorism and intelligence spectrum.
- **Surveillance Services** - operational surveillance support.
- **Transport Security Services** - transport security advisory.

# Harwin

> Portsmouth-based manufacturer of high-reliability electronic connectors for defence, aerospace, space, and other demanding applications.

## What they do

Harwin manufactures high-reliability electronic connectors designed to withstand high levels of shock and vibration and extreme temperatures. The company holds EN 9100 / AS9100D certification and supplies connector products for defence, aviation, space, UAV, industrial, and medical markets. Manufacturing is based at its Portsmouth headquarters, with offices in the USA, Germany, France, and Singapore, and a worldwide distribution network.

## Products and solutions

- **High-Reliability Signal Connectors** - PCB-to-PCB and cable-to-PCB connectors rated for harsh environments including defence platforms.

- **EMC / Board Level Shielding** - EMI and RFI shielding solutions for PCB-level protection.
- **Cable Assemblies** - custom high-reliability cable assemblies configurable for specific applications.

companies.summary: Developer of open-source and enterprise infrastructure automation software used to provision, secure, connect, and run cloud and on-premises environments; now operating as an IBM company.
companies.body:
# HashiCorp UK Ltd

> Developer of open-source and enterprise infrastructure automation software used to provision, secure, connect, and run cloud and on-premises environments; now operating as an IBM company.

## What they do

HashiCorp builds tools that address development, operations, and security challenges in infrastructure, enabling organisations to automate provisioning and manage secrets, networking, and application deployment. Its open-source and enterprise products are used across government, defence, and enterprise environments, including by US Department of Defense and US Air Force programmes for cloud migration and configuration management in air-gapped environments. HashiCorp is now an IBM company, following IBM's acquisition, and continues to operate under the HashiCorp brand.

## Products and solutions

- **Terraform** - infrastructure-as-code tool for provisioning cloud and on-premises resources, including Sentinel governance controls in the enterprise tier.
- **Vault** - secrets management and data encryption platform operating a zero-trust security model, used to manage tokens, passwords, certificates and encryption keys; the platform supports FIPS 140-2 and FIPS 140-3 validated cryptographic modules.
- **Consul** - service networking and service mesh solution, supporting FIPS 140-2 validated cryptographic modules.
- **Packer** - automated machine image creation tool.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026** - HashiCorp continues to operate as an IBM company following IBM's completed acquisition, with products marketed jointly under the HashiCorp and IBM brands. [source](https://www.hashicorp.com/en)

## Links

companies.name: Hawkeye
companies.summary: US commercial GEOINT company operating a constellation of RF-sensing microsatellites to detect, characterise and geolocate radio frequency signals for defence, intelligence and maritime domain awareness.
companies.body:
# Hawkeye

> US commercial GEOINT company operating a constellation of RF-sensing microsatellites to detect, characterise and geolocate radio frequency signals for defence, intelligence and maritime domain awareness.

## What they do

HawkEye 360 operates a commercial satellite constellation of around 30 microsatellites flying in formation clusters at 400 to 600 km altitude, using trilateration to precisely geolocate RF signal sources globally. Primary use cases are maritime domain awareness, dark vessel tracking, illicit activity detection and SIGINT-led tipping and cueing of electro-optical and SAR collection. In 2019 the US National Reconnaissance Office awarded HawkEye 360 a contract to integrate its commercial RF data into geospatial intelligence architecture. The 2024 acquisition of RF Solutions from Maxar Intelligence expanded spectrum scanning capability. The company completed its initial public offering in May 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **RF geolocation** - satellite-derived detection and geolocation of radio frequency emitters globally, using clustered formation-flying satellites for triangulation accuracy.
- **Vessel Custody ID** - a maritime tracking feature that uses artificial intelligence to assign unique tracking identifiers to high-interest vessels, maintaining custody across multiple satellite collections and scoring the confidence of each identification without dependence on self-reported vessel data.
- **Spectrum mapping and monitoring** - RF spectrum scanning and monitoring capability, expanded through the 2024 acquisition of RF Solutions from Maxar Intelligence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- Public disclosures reviewed for this entry did not identify specific UK frameworks, accreditations or memberships; HawkEye 360's public customer base is described as spanning defence, intelligence and national security agencies across the US and allied and partner nations.

## Recent news

- **2026-05** - HawkEye 360 completed its initial public offering, raising $416 million at a $2.4 billion valuation. [source](https://techfundingnews.com/hawkeye-360-ipo-416m-2-4b-valuation-space-tech-defense/)
- **2026-06** - HawkEye 360 announced over $100 million in new international contract and option value across eight international customers and programmes in defence, intelligence and national security. [source](https://www.asdnews.com/news/defense/2026/06/08/hawkeye-360-announces-over-100m-new-international-contract-awards)
- **2025-12** - HawkEye 360 launched Vessel Custody ID to strengthen national security and intelligence operations. [source](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/hawkeye-360-launches-vessel-custody-id-to-strengthen-national-security-and-intelligence-operations-302630035.html)

## Links

- Website: https://he360.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/hawkeye360/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. he360.com; prnewswire.com; techfundingnews.com; asdnews.com (all fetched 2026-07-04).

# Hawkrose Ltd

> Software technology company that develops and deploys decision support solutions for the UK public and private sector, including military asset transition planning.

## What they do

Hawkrose develops and deploys tailored software to help organisations solve complex problems, primarily in the UK public sector and among its suppliers. The company uses a multi-disciplinary team covering data scientists, software developers, financial and operational analysts, and domain specialists. Its work spans decision support, process digitisation, machine learning, and advanced analytics; published applications include military asset transition planning, estates rationalisation, and carbon reduction strategies.

companies.body:
# HazmatLINK Ltd

> UK supplier of CBRN and hazardous materials detection equipment to first responders, military specialists, and emergency services.

## What they do

HazmatLINK, established in 2004, provides detection products and integration solutions for hazardous materials management and emergency response. The company supplies equipment that identifies unknown substances, including chemical and biological hazards, drugs, and explosive precursors, to first responders and military specialists. It also provides consultancy and planning advice to emergency services and government clients on managing incidents involving hazardous materials, including deliberate CBRN releases.

## Products and solutions

- **FirstDefender RM / RMX** - handheld Raman spectrometer for chemical identification in hazmat and CBRN contexts.
- **TruDefender FTX** - portable FTIR analyser for chemical threat identification.
- **TruNarc Tau** - narcotics and chemical identification device with a library of over 1,200 substances, ruggedised with a user-replaceable battery and Wi-Fi connectivity.
- **Gemini** - dual-technology analyser combining Raman and FTIR for chemical identification.
- **Spotfire** - modular biological detection system with a base station and up to four concurrent sample modules, replacing the FilmArray system.
- **SEEKERe / Chameleon / TraceX / ERG 2024** - additional detection and emergency response tools for CBRN, EOD, and hazmat markets.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# HD Thinking
> Cheltenham-based advisory practice focused on cyber strategy, AI and national security, led by a former GCHQ Director Cyber who created the National Cyber Force.
## What they do
Human Digital Thinking (HD Thinking) is the consulting practice of Sally Walker, who spent 25 years at GCHQ. Her final senior role was Director Cyber, where she ran the National Offensive Cyber Programme from 2016 and led the cross-government creation of the National Cyber Force, the joint GCHQ-MOD partnership operating alongside US Cyber Command and NCSC. HD Thinking advises senior leaders in defence, intelligence and security on the impact of big data and AI on human decision-making, cyber strategy and organisational design.

## Products and solutions

- **Strategic advisory** - advice to senior leaders in defence, intelligence and security on cyber strategy, organisational design and the impact of big data and AI on decision-making.

Heathcoat Fabrics has manufactured textiles on its Tiverton site for over 200 years and employs more than 430 people across knitting, weaving, dyeing and finishing. # Heatsense Cables Limited

> Specialist manufacturer of high-performance thermocouple and signal cables engineered for extreme environments, supplying defence and aerospace applications.

## What they do

Heatsense Cables designs and manufactures specialist cables operating across a temperature range of -196°C to +1250°C, making them suited to harsh defence and aerospace environments. The company has technology capability in fluoropolymer extrusion, high-performance taping, cable wrapping, cover sintering, colouring, etching and the application of specialist coatings. Its range includes cables resistant to flame, oils and chemicals, as well as cables rated for ultra-high vacuum, low outgassing, cryogenic and high radiation environments. Bespoke design and manufacturing services are available alongside standard product lines.

## Products and solutions

- **Thermocouple cables** - precision temperature measurement cables for extreme-environment defence and industrial applications.
- **Signal cables** - high-performance signal transmission cables for harsh environments including radiation and cryogenic conditions.
- **Specialist coated cables** - cables with fluoropolymer and other specialist coatings for flame, chemical and vacuum resistance.

# heliguy

## What they do

heliguy is the trading brand of Colena Ltd, a UK drone specialist established in 2006 and based in North Shields. It provides end-to-end drone programmes spanning hardware supply, CAA-approved training, rental, surveying, repairs and regulatory consultancy. It positions itself as a drone partner supporting commercial and public-safety operations, including BVLOS and drone-in-a-box deployments.

- **Drone supply** - DJI enterprise and consumer drones (including Matrice series, Dock 3 drone-in-a-box and FlyCart 30 delivery drone) plus accessories.
- **Training** - CAA-approved and Ofqual-regulated courses, including BVLOS and UK SORA pathway support; states over 9,000 candidates trained.
- **Drone hire** - drone rental fleet for short-term and project use.
- **Survey Assist** - end-to-end drone surveying with in-house GIS specialists, LiDAR and photogrammetry payloads, and data processing.
- **Repair centre** - in-house DJI-accredited repair and servicing.
- **Consultancy** - account-managed drone-programme build from proof of concept to regulatory support.
- **Sector solutions** - utilities, Drone as First Responder, security and surveillance, and reality capture.

companies.name: HeliOperations
companies.summary: A UK helicopter aviation services company providing search and rescue aircrew training, synthetic simulator training, and operational management services to military and government clients from its base at Portland, Dorset.
companies.body:
# HeliOperations

> A UK helicopter aviation services company providing search and rescue aircrew training, synthetic simulator training, and operational management services to military and government clients from its base at Portland, Dorset.

## What they do

HeliOperations is a British helicopter company based at The HeliPort on Osprey Quay, Portland, Dorset, the site of the former RNAS Portland (HMS Osprey). The company delivers SAR aircrew and groundcrew training, both live flying from its Portland heliport and synthetic training at its simulator facility at RNAS Culdrose. It also supplies aircraft, technical support, and operational management services to government operators and military customers. HeliOperations holds active contracts with the UK Ministry of Defence and the German Federal Navy.

## Products and solutions

- **SAR aircrew training** - Live helicopter pilot and crew training including night-vision (NVIS) and SAR-specific programmes, delivered from Portland and overseas.
- **Synthetic simulator training** - Bespoke simulated helicopter pilot training packages using a Sea King simulator at the Culdrose facility, including NVG scenarios.
- **Fleet helicopter support** - Aircraft provision, technical support, maintenance, pilots, and crew under contracted support arrangements for military customers.
- **Operational and regulatory support** - Aviation regulatory assistance and operational management services for government and commercial operators.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://helioperations.co

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ADS members directory (snapshot May 2026); helioperations.co; Wikipedia entry for HeliOperations; UK Defence Equipment and Support press release (MOD £41M Fleet Helicopter Support Unit contract, 2025); AirMed and Rescue reporting; The Aviationist reporting.

companies.name: Helix
companies.summary: A Milton Keynes-based manufacturer of high-power-density electric powertrains for aerospace and high-performance applications, formerly trading as Integral Powertrain.
companies.body:
# Helix

> A Milton Keynes-based manufacturer of high-power-density electric powertrains for aerospace and high-performance applications, formerly trading as Integral Powertrain.

## What they do

Helix designs and manufactures compact, power-dense electric motors and powertrains for aerospace, automotive, and industrial applications. Rebranded from Integral Powertrain, the company operates a flexible manufacturing facility in Milton Keynes and supplies machines under three Product Levels based on its Scalable Core Technology (SCT). In aerospace, the company focuses on performance-critical requirements where power density, efficiency, and reliability are primary considerations. Helix is currently engaged in hybrid-electric supersonic propulsion development and UK aerospace decarbonisation programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **Helix Scalable Core Technology (SCT) motors** - High-power-density electric motors supplied across three product levels, from prototype to production, for aerospace and industrial customers.
- **Hybrid-electric powertrain systems** - Systems for aerospace applications including participation in the Astro Mechanica Duality hybrid-electric supersonic engine programme.
- **Custom electric drivelines** - Engineered-to-order electric and hybrid drivetrain solutions for specialist vehicle, marine, and aerospace platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR Registered
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO 14001; AS/EN/JISQ 9100; UKAS
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/helix-powertrain

companies.name: Hellios Information Limited
companies.summary: Hellios manages the JOSCAR supplier qualification register for the UK Aerospace, Defence and Security sector.
companies.body:
# Hellios Information Limited

> Hellios manages the JOSCAR supplier qualification register for the UK Aerospace, Defence and Security sector.

## What they do

Hellios collects, validates and distributes supplier data on behalf of buying organisations in the Aerospace, Defence and Security community. Its primary product is JOSCAR (Joint Supply Chain Accreditation Register), which allows suppliers to submit a single registration to provide pre-qualified data to over 29 buying members, including the Ministry of Defence. Hellios uses that data to help buying organisations identify potential supply chain risks and make informed procurement decisions.

## Products and solutions

- **JOSCAR** - The Aerospace, Defence and Security industry's shared supplier qualification register. Over 5,000 published suppliers provide validated compliance and capability data through a single submission, used by MOD and major primes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (operator)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.hellios.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15); hellios.com (2026-06-29).

companies.name: Helsing
companies.summary: Software-native defence company building AI-enabled autonomous systems across air, land, sea and space.
companies.body:
# Helsing

> Software-native defence company building AI-enabled autonomous systems across air, land, sea and space.

## What they do

Helsing develops AI software and autonomous systems for defence, connecting existing hardware into AI-enabled networks and designing its own platforms across all domains. The company describes defence as having become a software problem, requiring a software-native company to develop advanced AI algorithms and architectures. It is headquartered in Munich and has built a UK presence, including a manufacturing facility in Plymouth.

## Products and solutions

- **Altra** - reconnaissance-strike software platform for land combat, providing AI mission planning and command and control for autonomous systems.
- **HX-2** - software-defined, mass-produceable AI strike drone with a range up to around 100 km.
- **Centaur** - AI air-combat software acting as an autonomous pilot for existing and future fighter aircraft.
- **CA-1 Europa** - autonomous multi-role uncrewed combat aerial vehicle.
- **SG-1 Fathom** - autonomous underwater glider designed and manufactured in Britain.
- **Lura** - maritime AI platform for persistent underwater surveillance and submarine detection, paired with SG-1 Fathom.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Other:** Foreign-headquartered (Germany) with a UK entity (Helsing Limited) and a UK manufacturing facility in Plymouth.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-10** - Helsing introduced the CA-1 Electronic Attack, an autonomous combat aircraft for electronic warfare. [source](https://helsing.ai/newsroom/helsing-introduces-the-ca-1-electronic-attack-an-autonomous-combat-aircraft-for-electronic-warfare)
- **2026-06-01** - Helsing unveiled its Area 9 site and launched RX-1, its first European robotics research platform. [source](https://helsing.ai/newsroom/helsing-unveils-area-9-and-launches-rx-1-its-first-european-robotics-research-platform)
- **2026-05-19** - Helsing and OHB established a joint venture, KIRK, for tactical space-based reconnaissance systems. [source](https://helsing.ai/newsroom/helsing-and-ohb-establish-joint-venture-kirk-for-tactical-space-based-reconnaissance-systems)
- **2025-11-19** - Helsing opened its first UK Resilience Factory in Plymouth to build AI-enabled submarine-hunters. [source](https://helsing.ai/newsroom/helsing-opens-its-first-uk-resilience-factory-in-plymouth-to-build-ai-enabled-submarine-hunters)

## Links

- Website: https://helsing.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/helsing

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (helsing.ai newsroom), Companies House (HELSING LIMITED, company number 13447361, incorporated 9 June 2021), Wikipedia (founding 2021, Munich), and company press releases.

companies.name: HENSOLDT
companies.summary: German sensor-solutions group for defence and security, spanning radar, electronic warfare, optronics and avionics, with a UK arm.
companies.body:
# HENSOLDT

> German sensor-solutions group for defence and security, spanning radar, electronic warfare, optronics and avionics, with a UK arm.

## What they do

HENSOLDT AG is a German multinational focused on sensor technologies for defence, security and aerospace, with main product areas in radar, optoelectronics and avionics. It originated from the defence electronics unit of Airbus, was sold to KKR in 2017, and listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange in September 2020. The group has production sites in Germany, France and the United Kingdom. Its UK arm, HENSOLDT UK (formerly Kelvin Hughes, acquired in 2017 and renamed in 2019), is based in Enfield, North London, and develops maritime navigation and surveillance radar.

## Products and solutions

- **Radar systems** - surveillance, reconnaissance, air traffic control and air defence radars used on platforms including the Eurofighter, German Navy F125 frigates and US Navy littoral combat ships.
- **Electronic warfare** - the Kalaetron family of airborne EW systems, including Kalaetron Attack for radar jamming.
- **Optronics** - daylight cameras, thermal imagers, image intensifiers and laser rangefinders for military and civil security.
- **Kelvin Hughes SharpEye** - solid-state maritime navigation and surveillance radar developed by HENSOLDT UK.

## Recent news

- **2025-03** - HENSOLDT reported a strong first quarter for 2025 with growth in order intake and revenue. [HENSOLDT](https://www.hensoldt.net/news/hensoldt-reports-strong-first-quarter-2025-with-growth-in-order-intake-and-revenue)
- **2025** - The Eurofighter Common Radar System Mark 1 (ECRS Mk1), developed with Indra, began testing in live operations, with delivery to Germany and Spain targeted for 2027. [HENSOLDT](https://www.hensoldt.net/news/eurofighter-radar-mk1-begins-testing-in-live-operations)
- **2026** - HENSOLDT reported record 2025 order intake of EUR 4,710 million and revenue of EUR 2,455 million with around 9,500 employees, and raised its 2026 outlook. [HENSOLDT](https://www.hensoldt.net/news/financial-year-2025-hensoldt-achieves-record-order-intake-and-confirms-structural-growth-path)

## Links

- Website: https://www.hensoldt.net/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/hensoldt

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: HENSOLDT website and investor news, Wikipedia, HENSOLDT UK country hub page, Defence Industry Europe reporting.

companies.name: HEO Robotics (UK) LTD
companies.summary: HEO delivers non-Earth imaging and Space Domain Awareness data using a network of spaceborne sensors.
companies.body:
# HEO Robotics (UK) LTD

> HEO delivers non-Earth imaging and Space Domain Awareness data using a network of spaceborne sensors.

## What they do

HEO (High Earth Orbit Robotics) provides on-demand, high-frequency imagery of satellites and other resident space objects using a distributed network of spaceborne sensors. Its non-Earth imaging (NEI) data supports Space Domain Awareness (SDA) for defence and intelligence customers, satellite operators, and civil governments. The UK entity is registered in London; the parent company (High Earth Orbit Robotics Pty Ltd) is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.

## Products and solutions

- **HEO Inspect 3.0** - Software platform providing access to non-Earth imaging data and derived insights on space objects.
- **Non-Earth Imaging Cameras** - Hosted payload cameras enabling spacecraft to collect NEI data as part of their mission.
- **Tessera** - A product aimed at giving government and defence customers a sovereign non-Earth imaging capability.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.heospace.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/heospace

## Sources

# Hephaestus OME

> Specialist consultancy providing expert technical support for the safe management of Ordnance, Munitions and Explosives in MOD and defence contracting.

## What they do

Hephaestus OME provides subject matter expert (SME) support to the MOD and its contractors on the safe management of Ordnance, Munitions and Explosives (OME) across the full lifecycle from manufacture to disposal. The company specialises in Munitions Technical Publications, Technical Data Packs, explosive safety cases, and report authoring. It also provides support at the tender stage and throughout delivery of Defence OME contracts, including interpreting and applying the relevant Defence Standards.

## Products and solutions

- **OME Safety Consulting** - Impartial safety management advice and support to Defence contracting activities involving munitions, explosives and weapon systems.
- **Munitions Technical Publications** - Authoring and review of technical publications for MOD and defence contractors.
- **Technical Data Packs** - Preparation and review of TDPs to Defence Standards requirements.
- **Explosive Safety Cases** - Authoring and review of safety cases for munitions and explosives programmes.
- **Defence Contracting Support** - Expert assistance from tender stage through contract delivery on OME-specific requirements hidden within Defence Standards.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Hiatus

> Veteran-owned design and communications company building brand identities, websites and UX for defence, dual-use and space organisations.

## What they do

Hiatus is a veteran-owned design practice working across defence, dual-use and space sectors. The company designs brand identities and high-performance, accessible websites for organisations operating in complex and regulated environments, and offers human-centred design and accessibility training, including UX workshops and interface audits, for defence and critical-sector clients. Hiatus is a member of the D3IP community at the Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park.

## Products and solutions

- **Brand identity design** - visual identity systems for defence contractors and dual-use organisations, built to hold up across regulatory and operational contexts.
- **Website design and build** - accessible, high-performance websites for defence and aerospace clients, from procurement platforms to internal operations portals.
- **UX training and consulting** - hands-on training and strategic consulting in human-centred design and accessibility for defence and critical-sector teams.

HTSL Group supplies radioactive isotopes, radiation detection systems, and non-destructive testing equipment across the UK. The company provides end-to-end lifecycle management for ionising radiation, including supply, installation, calibration, maintenance and repair. Its CBRN and security division supports defence, policing and critical infrastructure organisations with tailored radiological compliance and detection services.

companies.name: High Temperature Material Systems Ltd HTMS
companies.summary: Materials startup developing Ceramic Matrix Composites for aerospace, defence and high-temperature applications.
companies.body:
# High Temperature Material Systems Ltd HTMS

> Materials startup developing Ceramic Matrix Composites for aerospace, defence and high-temperature applications.

## What they do

HTMS develops bespoke Ceramic Matrix Composite (CMC) materials, specialising in novel matrix chemistries that yield improved performance and durability at extreme temperatures. Founded in 2021 to address the UK's lack of sovereign CMC capability, the company produces a CMC prepreg that processes similarly to polymer prepreg but sustains long-term use up to 1,000°C. It works with defence and automotive Tier 1 suppliers and OEMs on applications including thermal protection systems, heat shields and exhaust components.

## Products and solutions

- **Ignishield** - CMC material using basalt fibre, designed for thermal protection and fire-resistant applications.
- **ThermaLite** - CMC material using alumina fibre for high-temperature structural use.
- **Carbonite X** - CMC material using carbon fibre for performance-critical applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-10** - HTMS secured a further €1.5 million to develop advanced heat-resistant materials. [source](https://bebeez.eu/2025/10/08/bristol-based-high-temperature-material-systems-secures-e1-5-million-to-develop-advanced-heat-resistant-materials/)
- **2025** - HTMS raised £1.3 million (South West Investment Fund and Midlands Engine Investment Fund II) to open a new production facility and a Leamington Spa office. [source](https://www.compositesworld.com/news/htms-engineers-raise-13-million-to-enable-mass-market-cmc-availability)
- **2025** - HTMS was selected for a DASA Defence Technology Exploitation Programme project, partnered with MBDA, to scale up manufacturing of a lower-cost CMC form for the UK defence supply chain. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/dtep-funding-announced-for-three-more-uk-smes)

## Links

- Website: https://www.htms.tech

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. ADS members directory (snapshot 2026-05-15); The Engineer (HTMS raises £1.3m, 2025); BeBeez International (Bristol-based HTMS secures €1.5 million, October 2025); composights.com (HTMS funding round coverage); gov.uk DASA DTEP funding announcement.

companies.name: High Value Manufacturing Catapult
companies.summary: Innovate UK-funded national network of seven industrial innovation centres advancing high-value manufacturing capability, including for defence.
companies.body:
# High Value Manufacturing Catapult

> Innovate UK-funded national network of seven industrial innovation centres advancing high-value manufacturing capability, including for defence.

## What they do

The High Value Manufacturing Catapult is established and funded by Innovate UK to enable UK manufacturers to achieve measurable improvements in performance and productivity. It operates through seven specialist research, technology and innovation centres working collaboratively across advanced manufacturing disciplines. The HVM Catapult has a formal alliance with the Ministry of Defence to grow the defence industrial base and develop dual-use manufacturing technologies. Its work encompasses R&D translation, technology scale-up, supply chain development and manufacturing process innovation.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence manufacturing R&D** - applied research and technology translation supporting MoD programmes and the wider defence industrial base.
- **Dual-use technology development** - advanced manufacturing processes with both civilian and defence application, including areas such as AI, quantum technologies and semiconductors.
- **Supply chain development** - programmes to grow and qualify UK defence manufacturing suppliers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - HVM Catapult and the Ministry of Defence announced a new alliance to grow the UK defence manufacturing supply chain, tied to the publication of the Defence Industrial Strategy, giving industry, particularly SMEs, access to HVM Catapult R&D facilities and market insight. [source](https://hvm.catapult.org.uk/news/new-alliance-to-help-grow-defence-manufacturing-supply-chain/)

companies.body:
# highintegrity.ai

> Contract software and consultancy practice specialising in machine vision, EO/IR sensor systems, and applied LLM and agentic systems for defence, maritime, and automotive applications.

## What they do

highintegrity.ai is a Rochester-based contract software development and consultancy practice, operating since 2019. The core domain is machine vision systems built on multi-sensor wide-field-of-view EO/IR arrays, with a strong systems-engineering and development-automation strand. Recent work extends into applied LLM and agentic systems: tools that generate emergency-management training exercises and manuals, a systematic-literature-survey system that builds knowledge graphs from academic papers, and a dataflow-oriented runtime for engineering process automation.

## Products and solutions

- **Machine vision and EO/IR sensor systems** - multi-sensor wide-field-of-view vehicle-mounted systems combining optical and infrared imaging for surveillance and detection.
- **Applied LLM and agentic systems** - tools for training exercise generation, knowledge-graph construction from academic literature, and dataflow-oriented engineering automation.
- **Synthetic data and sensor fusion** - supporting development and evaluation of sensor-based systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# HII Unmanned Systems Inc

> Designer and manufacturer of autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) for marine research, commercial, and defence applications.

## What they do

HII Unmanned Systems Inc (trading as Hydroid) produces the REMUS family of autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs), used across defence, research, and commercial maritime missions. The company operates in the UK from Fareham, Hampshire, and is a subsidiary of HII (Huntington Ingalls Industries), the largest military shipbuilder in the United States, following HII's acquisition of Hydroid in 2020.

## Products and solutions

- **REMUS AUVs** - A range of autonomous underwater vehicles spanning shallow to deep-water operations, used for mine countermeasures, hydrographic survey, and intelligence-gathering missions. Variants include the REMUS 100, 300, 600 and 620.
- **Sea Launcher** - an automated, ship-based launch and recovery system for REMUS vehicles.
- **ROMULUS** - an unmanned surface vessel under development by HII, complementing the REMUS underwater family.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-06** - The US Navy and Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution advanced the Yellow Moray uncrewed underwater vehicle programme, achieving the first forward-deployed torpedo-tube launch and recovery of a REMUS 600 from a submarine. [HII](https://www.hii.com/news/)
- **2026** - HII marked 25 years of the REMUS uncrewed underwater vehicle family, with more than 750 vehicles delivered to around 30 nations, at the Navy League Sea-Air-Space exposition. [HII](https://hii.com/what-we-do/capabilities/unmanned-systems/remus-uuvs/)
