companies.name: Horizon Technologies Consultants Ltd
companies.summary: Airborne and space-based SIGINT specialist producing satellite monitoring systems for government ISR operations worldwide.
companies.body:
# Horizon Technologies Consultants Ltd

> Airborne and space-based SIGINT specialist producing satellite monitoring systems for government ISR operations worldwide.

## What they do

Horizon Technologies develops and manufactures the FlyingFish and BlackFish families of passive satellite communication monitoring systems, enabling governments to intercept SATCOM, L-band and maritime radar signals from airborne, ground, uncrewed and space-based platforms. The company states its systems are deployed on more than 60 NATO and non-NATO aircraft, and describes contributions to counter-piracy, counter-terrorism, border security, anti-poaching and search-and-rescue operations, including migrant rescue efforts in the Mediterranean. Horizon (operating as Horizon Space Technologies for its space programme) is prime contractor for the AMBER programme, a planned constellation of CubeSats delivering space-based maritime domain awareness data to the UK's National Maritime Information Centre.

## Products and solutions

- **FlyingFish** - airborne SATCOM and L-band monitoring system for passive SIGINT collection, configurable for manned aircraft, ground vehicles, uncrewed aircraft and fixed-wing platforms.
- **BlackFish** - tri-band passive L-band SIGINT system, described as the latest evolution of the FlyingFish line, also detecting and characterising maritime radar emissions.
- **AMBER** - space-based maritime SIGINT constellation programme, demodulating satellite-phone and radar signal content to provide vessel identification and geolocation data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

companies.body:
# Horstman Defence Systems Limited

> Land vehicle mobility specialist delivering suspension systems and drivetrain components for military platforms.

## What they do

Horstman Defence Systems designs and manufactures suspension, track and drivetrain solutions for armoured and tracked military vehicles, operating as part of the RENK Group since April 2019. The company describes itself as the pre-eminent mobility solution provider in the global heavy armoured and tracked vehicle suspension market, tracing its suspension design lineage through post-war British armour including Conqueror, Chieftain and Challenger 1. It employs over 250 people across the UK, US and Canada, and supplies battlefield mobility components from its Bath facility with an emphasis on reducing maintenance burden and improving crew survivability.

## Products and solutions

- **Hydrostrut** - hydro-pneumatic suspension strut for armoured and tracked vehicles.
- **HydroCore** - a cost-effective Hydrostrut variant designed for scalable mobility architecture across commercial and military use.
- **Programme support** - Horstman states it supports the British Army's Challenger 3, Boxer and Ajax programmes, and has a long production and support heritage on Warrior. For Challenger 3 it is refurbishing and upgrading the Hydrogas suspension to third-generation standard under the Heavy Armour Automotive Improvement Programme, covering the main battle tank plus engineering and recovery variants.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Accreditations:** AS/EN/JISQ 9100; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus; JOSCAR registered

## Recent news

- Horstman continues to deliver Hydrostrut suspension systems for the US Marine Corps Amphibious Combat Vehicle programme, with production orders running through December 2026. [source](https://defence-industry.eu/horstman-group-to-deliver-hydrostrut-suspension-systems-for-u-s-marine-corps-amphibious-combat-vehicle-programme/)
- Horstman produced the first gearbox for the UK Boxer Mechanised Infantry Vehicle programme. [source](https://horstmangroup.com/en/news/2022/horstman-produces-first-gearbox-for-uk-boxer-miv-programme)

## Links

Hosiden Besson (trading as HBL) designs and manufactures acoustic, electronic and mechanical ODM and OEM products for customers worldwide. companies.body:
# Hover Inc Ltd

> Cambridge-based aerospace hardware company developing ruggedised avionics computers for manned and unmanned aircraft.

## What they do

Hover Inc designs ruggedised Integrated Modular Avionics computers built around a proprietary ARINC 653 real-time operating system, running safety-critical and non-safety-critical software in isolated partitions on the same hardware. The company states its products are TSO-C153A approved and conform to DO-160G, DO-254, DO-178C (Level A) and DO-297. Hover is ATI-backed (Aerospace Technology Institute) and targets Advanced Air Mobility and other crewed and uncrewed aircraft manufacturers, positioning itself as an open-systems alternative to vertically integrated Tier 1 avionics suppliers, with customers retaining IP ownership. It operates from Cambridge, with a further office in Seattle, US.

## Products and solutions

- **H1.0** - dual-channel avionics computer for redundant applications.
- **H2.0** - single-channel avionics computer.
- **H3.0** - single-channel avionics computer optimised for remote I/O and battery or fuel-cell management.
- **Detect and Avoid computer** - onboard computing platform supporting ACAS XU/XR collision-avoidance logic for cooperative and non-cooperative air traffic, developed with avionics partner Sagetech Avionics.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Howco Group Plc

> Global distributor and processor of high-performance alloys supplying raw materials and precision components to the aerospace and defence sectors.

## What they do

Howco Group distributes and processes nickel alloys, titanium alloys, chromium alloys, and other superalloys for use in the world's most demanding industrial environments, including aerospace and defence. Operating from ten sites across six countries, the company provides the full supply chain from raw material to finished precision part, with additive manufacturing capability alongside conventional processing. Howco Group Plc is registered in Scotland; company records show current control held by Eryngium Limited, a private UK-registered company, since August 2023, having previously been controlled by Sumitomo Corporation of Japan. The "Plc" in the company name denotes its legal form; the company is not listed on a public stock exchange.

## Products and solutions

- **Alloy distribution and processing** - nickel, titanium, chromium and other superalloys supplied from raw material through to finished precision part, including sawing, mechanical testing and non-destructive testing.
- **Aerospace-accredited processing** - its Sheffield facility holds AS9100D accreditation covering material management, procurement, stocking, sawing of non-ferrous metal, and mechanical and non-destructive testing.

companies.name: hpad, Inc.
companies.summary: US enterprise AI company whose Enterprise AI Platform has been trialled on a UK Army capability management challenge through the D3IP defence innovation network.
companies.body:
# hpad

> US enterprise AI company whose Enterprise AI Platform has been trialled on a UK Army capability management challenge through the D3IP defence innovation network.

## What they do

hpad, Inc. builds an "Enterprise AI Platform" that captures organisational knowledge from documents, standards, and subject matter experts, structures it into a shared enterprise AI model, and uses that model to power role-specific "AI companions" for decision support. The company positions its approach as knowledge-driven and traceable, in contrast to general-purpose AI tools that rely only on large datasets. hpad is headquartered in Wichita, Kansas, and was founded in 2019. Its public case experience spans process safety, industrial automation, banking regulatory compliance, business and technology strategy, and defence capability planning.

hpad's UK defence engagement runs through the D3IP collaboration network at the Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park. In 2026, hpad and Mission Decisions completed the Incubate phase of D3IP's FCCM (Force Coherence Capability Management) initiative, delivered on behalf of Defence BattleLab under UK Defence Innovation (UKDI). The work explored using AI to support the British Army's structured capability management process, tracing a "golden thread" from strategic policy through to capability outputs, and the companies reported that their prototypes reduced the manual effort involved in producing capability artefacts.

## Products and solutions

- **hpad Enterprise AI Platform** - a platform comprising an enterprise knowledge model, a reasoning layer that encodes expert judgement, role-specific AI companions, an integration and data layer, and the "Workbench" environment used by subject matter experts to build, review, and validate the model.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** D3IP collaboration network (Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park); completed the FCCM Incubate phase delivered under UK Defence Innovation (UKDI).

## Recent news

- **2026-04-24** - D3IP announced that hpad, Inc. and Mission Decisions had successfully tested operational prototypes in the FCCM Incubate phase, applying AI to British Army capability management. [D3IP](https://www.d3ip.net/d3ip-community-reaches-major-milestone-on-previously-stalled-defence-challenge/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.hpad.ai
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/hpad

## What they do

HQW Aerospace (UK) Ltd, trading as Barden Bearings, designs and manufactures super-precision ball bearings for critical aerospace and defence applications, including APU generators, primary actuator motors, cabin air systems, and military gyroscopes. The Plymouth facility previously operated under Schaeffler ownership before being sold to HQW Precision GmbH in 2019, a transaction that secured the site and its manufacturing jobs. # HS Infra

> UK secure-infrastructure specialist building SCIFs, data centres, structured cabling, and audio-visual systems for MOD, government, and defence industry clients.

## What they do

HS Infra designs and builds secure physical infrastructure for defence and government clients, including Sensitive Compartmented Information Facilities (SCIFs), data centres, and structured cabling for protectively-marked environments. The firm holds JOSCAR registration, SCIDA credentials, ISO 9001, ISO 27001, and is an Armed Forces Covenant signatory. Based in Herefordshire, it serves MOD and wider government across the UK.

- **Data centre design and build** - bespoke and as-a-service data centre solutions for secure environments.

companies.body:
# Hughes Network Systems Ltd

> Satellite broadband and network solutions provider with a UK entity serving European defence and government customers.

## What they do

Hughes Network Systems is a global provider of satellite broadband and managed network services, operating in Europe through Hughes Network Systems Europe Limited from Milton Keynes, as part of Hughes Network Systems, LLC (Germantown, US), an EchoStar company. The European business delivers satellite communications infrastructure to government, defence and enterprise customers, describing itself as developing, installing, managing and maintaining networks and classified terminals and systems for defence and security applications. In 2024 Hughes Europe launched a dedicated Military, Defence & Government business unit, delivered in collaboration with Telespazio using Eutelsat Konnect VHTS satellite capacity, targeting government communications ministries, military operators and blue-light services across Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **JUPITER System** - high-throughput satellite system, including flyaway kits and manpack terminals.
- **HM System terminals** - software-defined satellite modems (including the HM400) using an Enhanced Scramble Code Multiple Access waveform across L-, Ku-, Ka-, Mil Ka and X-bands.
- **Software-Defined Core Module** - small form-factor modem building block for fixed, land, aero, maritime and portable terminals and gateways.
- **Smart Network Edge** - software for orchestrating multi-orbit (GEO/MEO/LEO) and 5G network connectivity, alongside a Network Management System for defence customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# HumaniFAI Ltd

> Human factors and AI research consultancy examining how AI-enabled systems affect people, teams and organisations in high-stakes environments.

## What they do

HumaniFAI is a research and consultancy organisation specialising in human-centred AI from a human factors perspective. The company supports organisations seeking to understand how AI-enabled systems interact with people, teams and organisations in high-stakes environments, focusing on how AI affects decision making, workload, trust, accountability and system resilience when deployed in real operational contexts. HumaniFAI states it does not build AI systems; instead it provides independent, research-led insight into the human implications of AI, drawing on human factors, cognitive science and socio-technical systems thinking, for defence, security, healthcare, cybersecurity, transport and critical national infrastructure customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Human-centred AI research and consultancy** - independent assessment of how AI systems affect human decision-making, workload, trust and system resilience across the system lifecycle, from concept through deployment, use, failure and recovery.
- **Assurance and governance support** - human factors evidence to inform AI safety, assurance and procurement decisions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Chartered Institute of Ergonomics and Human Factors (CIEHF)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO 27001:2022; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus; Def Stan 05-135

# Huntsman Security

> Cyber security analytics company specialising in real-time threat detection, security log management, and behavioural anomaly detection.

## What they do

Huntsman delivers security analytics and intelligent security log, event and incident management solutions that analyse and correlate events in real time to provide early detection of security threats and regulatory compliance issues. The company's patented Behavioural Anomaly Detection technology automatically baselines and processes millions of log records to detect malicious activity in real time, prioritising security and compliance issues through a single-console view.

## Products and solutions

- **Huntsman SIEM** - multi-tenant protective monitoring and security information and event management platform providing real-time correlation, alerting and drilldown dashboards, scaling from 250 to 50,000 endpoints.
- **Behavioural Anomaly Detection (BAD)** - patented user and entity behaviour analytics engine that baselines user and system behaviour to identify malicious activity automatically using machine learning.
- **Essential 8 Auditor** - on-demand automated Essential Eight cyber vulnerability and maturity assessment tool.
- **Essential 8 Scorecard** - continuous measurement of security control effectiveness against the Essential Eight framework.
- **SmartCheck** - on-demand automated risk assessment monitoring safeguards across the cyber attack sequence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Hybrid Air Vehicles Limited

> Developer of the Airlander hybrid aircraft platform, targeting logistics, communications, surveillance and low-emissions passenger transport.

## What they do

Hybrid Air Vehicles (HAV) designs and manufactures Airlander, a large hybrid aircraft that combines lighter-than-air and aerodynamic lift. Airlander 10 carries up to 100 passengers or 10 tonnes of freight and supports use cases including intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance, and beyond-line-of-sight communications relay, alongside logistics and tourism, with a stated pathway to zero-emissions aviation by 2030. The company states Airlander can operate crewed for up to five days aloft, or uncrewed for over two weeks, carrying a three-tonne payload of sensors and communications equipment.

## Products and solutions

- **Airlander 10** - large hybrid aircraft platform capable of carrying 100 passengers or 10 tonnes of freight; supports ISR, logistics and communications relay missions in crewed or uncrewed configurations.
- **Communications and surveillance payload** - on-board sensors with data collection, processing and dissemination, described by the company as able to act as an airborne intelligence, command and communications centre.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Hybrid Drones

> UK manufacturer of heavy-lift hybrid jet-electric uncrewed aerial systems, trading as HYDRA.

## What they do

Hybrid Drones Ltd is a UK heavy-lift hybrid UAS manufacturer, founded in 2019 to develop a hybrid jet-electric VTOL drone concept. Its platforms are designed to carry large payloads over tactical distances, with a modular design offering fully-electric and multi-jet variants. Stated use cases include logistical resupply, ship-to-ship transfer, casualty evacuation and weapons employment.

## Products and solutions

- **HYDRA-400** - heavy-lift VTOL UAV using hybrid propulsion combining electric rotors with micro jet turbines, with a maximum lift of up to 400 kg and rapid field assembly.
- **Platform variants** - four configurable variants of the platform (fully-electric, 2-jet, 4-jet and 6-jet), with maximum lift rising from 260 kg to 400 kg.
- **Stores carriage** - fitted with an L3Harris Gnat stores release system, able to carry casualty evacuation pods, cargo racks, under-slung loads and weapons.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Hybrid Vision

> AI assurance company delivering runtime monitoring and safety intervention for robotics and autonomous systems, marketed as OughtAI.

## What they do

Hybrid Vision develops OughtAI, a runtime AI assurance product for robotics and autonomous systems. The company states its hardware and software is platform-agnostic for edge installation on uncrewed air, ground and surface vehicles (UAV, UGV and USV) operating in comms-denied and electronic warfare environments. OughtAI is described as offering real-time AI monitoring and threat detection, with the ability to manoeuvre or execute a hard stop to render an autonomous system safe. The company states its patent-granted technology supports persistent human-on-the-loop control and is designed to help autonomous systems meet UK MOD JSP 936 dependable AI guidance. Hybrid Vision states its patents are granted in the UK, US and Australia, and describes its target markets as defence, aerospace, commercial marine, automotive and mining.

## Products and solutions

- **OughtAI** - runtime AI assurance platform for autonomous systems, providing real-time monitoring, threat detection, and an independent, electronically isolated stop capability intended to be unblockable by software, for UAV, UGV and USV platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.hybridvision.co.uk
- Product site: https://oughtai.com

companies.name: Hydro Group Ltd
companies.summary: Global subsea connectivity and engineering specialist with nearly four decades of experience in cable and connector systems, now part of the US Trexon/Amphenol group.
companies.body:
# Hydro Group Ltd

> Global subsea connectivity and engineering specialist with nearly four decades of experience in cable and connector systems, now part of the US Trexon/Amphenol group.

## What they do

Hydro Group designs, manufactures and tests complete subsea electrical and optical interconnect packages for the oil and gas, marine renewable energy and defence industries, from its Aberdeen headquarters and facilities in the USA and Singapore. The company describes itself as a vertically integrated design house, controlling design, manufacture and testing in-house for cables, connectors, penetrators and glands used in the harshest underwater environments. It states a defence and nuclear heritage dating to the early 1990s, supplying prime defence and nuclear-related contractors including the Ministry of Defence, and describes itself as part of the supply chain supporting the Royal Navy's Astute-class submarine programme.

## Products and solutions

- **Subsea cables** - purpose-built electrical, fibre optic and hybrid cables for power distribution, data transmission and control systems.
- **Connectors** - electrical and optical connection systems for data, power and signal transmission in underwater and high-pressure environments.
- **Penetrators** - submarine hull and bulkhead penetrators, including a fibre optic manned penetrator for submersibles.
- **Glands** - subsea glands, splice blocks and terminations providing sealing and electrical connections.
- **ROV umbilicals and illuminated LED tethers** for remotely operated vehicles.
- **Cable assemblies and terminations**, designed, manufactured and pressure-tested in-house.

The company states its defence-related project experience includes active towed sonar, bow and dipping sonar, ROV minehunter systems, subsea acoustic signature and acoustic buoy systems, tethered communications and mast systems, non-penetrative mast optical communications, flank array sonar, mine countermeasure systems, and acoustic hull recognition. Hydro Group supplies the connectivity and interconnect hardware for these systems; it does not itself state that it manufactures the sonar or sensor payloads.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (Hellios)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2008 (stated on company website; third-party test verification also available via Lloyd's Register, Det Norske Veritas and American Bureau of Shipping)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-11-06** - Amphenol Corporation completed its acquisition of Trexon (Hydro Group's parent) for approximately $1 billion, bringing Hydro Group under Amphenol's Harsh Environment Solutions segment. [source](https://investors.amphenol.com/news-and-events/news-details/2025/Amphenol-Corporation-Closes-Trexon-Acquisition/default.aspx)
- **2025-05-21** - Trexon acquired Aberdeen-based Greco Developments Ltd, expanding Trexon's subsea portfolio alongside its existing Hydro Group and CRE Marine businesses. [source](https://www.hydrogroup-uk.com/pdf/Greco-Press-Release-05.21.25-Final.pdf)
- **2025-02-06** - Hydro Group published a feature on its vertically integrated design, manufacturing and testing model for subsea cables, connectors, penetrators and glands, citing both defence and renewable energy applications. [source](https://www.trexon.com/news-and-events/hydro-group-leading-the-way-in-vertically-integrated-design-solutions-for-subsea-cables-connectors-penetrators-and-glands)

_Hydro Group was acquired by Ohio-based TPC Wire & Cable (an Audax Private Equity portfolio company) in 2021, later brought together with other specialty interconnect businesses under the Trexon brand; Trexon itself was acquired by Amphenol Corporation (US) in November 2025. Hydro Group Ltd remains a UK-registered company (Companies House SC132331) but is foreign (US) owned via this chain._

companies.body:
# Hypermotive

> UK specialist in electrical systems for electrification, hybrid and hydrogen platforms across defence, automotive, motorsport and aerospace.

## What they do

Hypermotive designs and manufactures high-performance electrical systems for battery-electric, fuel-cell and hydrogen platforms, working since 2016 across automotive, defence, motorsport and aerospace. Its products include low and high voltage wiring harnesses, power distribution units, DC-DC converters and EMC/EMI filters. The company operates a manufacturing facility in Northampton optimised for low to medium volume production, alongside an engineering headquarters in Lutterworth, Leicestershire. In defence it delivers electrical systems for mission-critical platforms and is active in land vehicle electrification and in subsea applications including uncrewed surface vehicles. Hypermotive also provides autonomous vehicle systems integration, including sensor supply and drive-by-wire/ADAS systems, and is the UK and EMEA distributor and installer for Dataspeed drive-by-wire kits.

## Products and solutions

- **Wiring harnesses** - low and high voltage harnesses for electrified platforms.
- **Power Distribution Units (PDU)** - power distribution for electric and hybrid systems.
- **DC-DC converters** - voltage conversion for electrified platforms.
- **EMC/EMI filters** - electromagnetic compatibility and interference filtering.
- **Autonomous vehicle systems integration** - sensor supply and integration, drive-by-wire and ADAS systems supply and installation, including as UK and EMEA distributor and installer for Dataspeed drive-by-wire kits.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, ISO 9001

# Hypersonica Ltd

> Anglo-German defence and aerospace company developing a sovereign European hypersonic precision strike capability, with a UK subsidiary registered in Ashford, Kent.

## What they do

Hypersonica is a hypersonic missile company focused on precision strike, developing what it describes as Europe's first privately funded sovereign hypersonic strike capability. Founded in December 2023, the group is headquartered in the Munich area with a wholly owned UK subsidiary, Hypersonica Limited, registered in Ashford, Kent since February 2025. The company states its approach uses rapid iteration from design to flight-ready hardware, combining simulation, prototyping and flight testing, with a modular architecture intended to shorten development timelines and reduce costs against conventional defence development programmes. Hypersonica states its goal is to deliver hypersonic strike capability by 2029.

## Products and solutions

- **Hypersonic strike missile** - a manoeuvrable hypersonic precision strike system under development, with a phased flight test programme working towards full mission requirements.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

[Hypersonica](https://www.hypersonica.com/en/news/hypersonica-raises-23-3-million-series-a-to-deliver-europe-s-first-sovereign-hypersonic-strike-capability/)

# i3 Gen Ltd

> Hampshire-based specialist in narrative wargaming, strategic planning and strategic communications for defence, government and commercial clients.

## What they do

i3 Gen's core capability is narrative wargaming: immersive, competitive simulations that enable senior leaders to rehearse strategic decisions in realistic but safe-to-fail environments. Unlike rule-bound games, its approach blends structured planning, expert adjudication and compelling narrative to stress-test policies, explore future risks and surface hidden assumptions.

## Products and solutions

- **Narrative wargaming** - an enhanced and extended matrix wargaming approach following a five-stage methodology (Understand, Design, Develop, Deliver, Report) that combines structured planning, wargaming and story-crafting.
- **Strategy wargaming** - facilitator-led competitive scenario exercises for senior leaders to rehearse strategic decisions.
- **Strategic planning** - turning insights into objectives, actionable plans and aligned leadership direction.
- **Strategic communications** - narrative development for strategy, including information operations, story-crafting informed by behavioural psychology, and digital and social media strategy.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; Armed Forces Covenant Silver Award.

companies.name: IASME Consortium Ltd
companies.summary: UK cyber security certification body, sole delivery partner for the National Cyber Security Centre's Cyber Essentials and Cyber Advisor schemes, and delivery partner for the MOD's Defence Cyber Certification scheme.
companies.body:
# IASME Consortium Ltd

> UK cyber security certification body, sole delivery partner for the National Cyber Security Centre's Cyber Essentials and Cyber Advisor schemes, and delivery partner for the MOD's Defence Cyber Certification scheme.

## What they do

IASME Consortium Ltd is a UK certification and accreditation body, not a practitioner consultancy: it designs and administers cyber security certification schemes and licenses a network of over 300 Certification Bodies and Assured Service Providers who carry out assessments and offer advice against those schemes. IASME is the sole delivery partner for the National Cyber Security Centre's (NCSC) Cyber Essentials and Cyber Advisor schemes, and one of two delivery partners for the NCSC's Cyber Incident Exercising and Cyber Incident Response (Standard Level) industry assurance schemes. Through its network, IASME also delivers the Defence Cyber Certification (DCC), developed jointly with the Ministry of Defence as an organisation-wide certification providing assurance of a supplier's cyber resilience across the UK defence supply chain.

Beyond its NCSC and MOD-linked roles, IASME runs its own IASME Cyber Assurance standard (formerly IASME Governance), designed as an accessible alternative to ISO 27001 for small and medium-sized organisations, plus IoT device certification schemes (IASME IoT Cyber Baseline and IoT Cyber Assurance) and the Maritime Cyber Baseline scheme for commercial vessels. It is also a Delivery Partner for the Civil Aviation Authority's ASSURE scheme. IASME Consortium Ltd is registered at Companies House as a private limited company (number 07897132, incorporated 2012), headquartered in Malvern with additional offices in Belfast and Dalgety Bay, near Edinburgh. IASME Community (previously the UK Cyber Security Forum) is IASME's separate community interest and social enterprise arm, running cyber security training and workforce-entry programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber Essentials / Cyber Advisor** - delivered on behalf of the NCSC; Cyber Essentials is the UK Government's baseline certification against common cyber attacks.
- **Defence Cyber Certification (DCC)** - developed with the MOD; an organisation-wide certification scheme for the UK defence supplier base.
- **IASME Cyber Assurance** - IASME's own flagship standard (formerly IASME Governance), covering cyber security, privacy, and data protection for organisations of all sizes.
- **IASME IoT Cyber Baseline / IoT Cyber Assurance** - certification for internet-connected devices, aligned to the Product Security and Telecommunications Infrastructure Act 2022 and the ETSI EN 303 645 standard.
- **Maritime Cyber Baseline** - cyber security certification for commercial marine vessels and operators worldwide.
- **Civil Aviation Authority ASSURE** - delivery partner role providing an audit mechanism for cyber security risk in the aviation sector.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Roles:** Sole NCSC delivery partner for Cyber Essentials and Cyber Advisor; one of two NCSC delivery partners for Cyber Incident Exercising and Cyber Incident Response (Standard Level); delivery partner for the MOD's Defence Cyber Certification; Delivery Partner for the Civil Aviation Authority's ASSURE scheme.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-23** - IASME's schemes and about pages updated, reflecting current scheme set including Defence Cyber Certification and CAA ASSURE. [IASME, Our Schemes](https://iasme.co.uk/our-schemes/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.iasme.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-iasme-consortium-limited/

companies.body:
# IceMOS Technology Ltd

> US-headquartered semiconductor manufacturer with wafer fabrication in Belfast, producing proprietary sensing elements and Power MOSFET switches for defence, aerospace and industrial markets.

## What they do

IceMOS is an equity-financed, privately held semiconductor company and manufacturer of Silicon MEMS-based Power MOSFETs and sensing device technology. The company designs, manufactures, markets and sells proprietary sensing elements and energy-saving Power MOSFET switches to customers across North America, Asia and Europe, with applications spanning safety-critical electronics and energy-saving power conversion. IceMOS has R&D in Arizona, design and development in Japan, and its own wafer fabrication factory at the top of the Falls Road in Belfast, which the company states employs around 70 people.

## Products and solutions

- **Sensing elements** - proprietary MEMS-based sensors for safety enhancement in electronic systems.
- **Super-junction Power MOSFETs (mSJMOS)** - high-voltage (600V-730V) power switching devices for energy-saving applications, developed from over 70 patents combining Silicon MEMS manufacturing with mature-node CMOS super-junction structures.
- **Advanced Engineered Substrates** - bonded silicon and silicon-on-insulator (SOI) substrates.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

[source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/04/02/3053968/0/en/IceMOS-Technology-Closes-22-Million-Series-E-Investment-to-Fund-Launch-of-New-Power-Semiconductor-Device-Technology-mSJMOS.html)

companies.name: iCOMAT
companies.summary: Bristol composites manufacturer whose Rapid Tow Shearing technology steers fibres without defects for aerospace, defence and automotive parts.
companies.body:
# iCOMAT

> Bristol composites manufacturer whose Rapid Tow Shearing technology steers fibres without defects for aerospace, defence and automotive parts.

## What they do

iCOMAT is a manufacturer of advanced composite components for the aerospace, defence and automotive industries. It spun out of the University of Bristol in 2019 to industrialise its proprietary Rapid Tow Shearing (RTS) process, which steers composite fibres without defects to enable lighter, optimised structures at high production rate. The company operates a production facility, Factory One, and has been building a further automated facility in Gloucester.

## Products and solutions

- **Rapid Tow Shearing (RTS)** - proprietary fibre-steering process using in-plane shearing rather than bending, enabling defect-free curved fibre paths for optimised composite parts.
- **Advanced composite components** - turnkey supply from tooling to finished parts for aerospace, defence and automotive customers.

## Recent news

- **2024-06** - iCOMAT raised $22.5 million (over £17.5 million) in a Series A round co-led by 8VC and the NATO Innovation Fund, with Syensqo Ventures and Velocity Partners participating. It was the NATO Innovation Fund's first publicly announced investment. [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.co.uk/news-releases/icomat-raises-22-5m-financing-led-by-8vc-and-nato-innovation-fund-to-automate-composites-manufacturing-302164253.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.icomat.co.uk/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/icomat

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Sources: iCOMAT website, University of Bristol news, PR Newswire and Vestbee reporting on the Series A round.

companies.summary: Belfast-based fabless semiconductor company designing high-performance GaN and GaAs MMIC products for aerospace, defence, satellite and telecommunications.
companies.body:
# Iconic RF Ltd

> Belfast-based fabless semiconductor company designing high-performance GaN and GaAs MMIC products for aerospace, defence, satellite and telecommunications.

## What they do

Iconic RF, founded in 2017, develops Monolithic Microwave Integrated Circuit (MMIC) products using GaN and GaAs compound semiconductor processes, specialising in high power amplifiers operating through millimetre-wave frequencies. The company is fabless, using leading compound semiconductor foundries worldwide, and states particular expertise in high-efficiency, high-linearity GaN MMICs for defence and satellite applications. Iconic RF was acquired by Microchip Technology, which has stated the acquisition grows its GaN MMIC product line.

## Products and solutions

- **GaN MMICs** - high power amplifier chips and discrete transistors operating from L-band to Ka-band, for pulsed, linear and CW applications in defence radar, electronic warfare and communications.
- **GaAs MMICs** - compound semiconductor ICs for satellite and telecommunications applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Acquired by Microchip Technology, extending Microchip's GaN MMIC product line. [source](https://www.fierceelectronics.com/embedded/microchip-grows-gan-mmic-line-after-acquiring-iconic-rf)

## Links

The company's platforms are used in applications where reliable, high-performance connectivity is required in austere or remote environments. The UK entity, ST Engineering iDirect (UK) Limited, is part of the ST Engineering iDirect group, formerly VT iDirect, itself part of Singapore's ST Engineering.

# IDV Defence Vehicles UK Ltd

> UK subsidiary of Italian armoured vehicle manufacturer IDV, supplying uncrewed ground vehicles and AI autonomy systems to the global defence industry.

## What they do

IDV Defence Vehicles UK supplies uncrewed ground vehicles (UGVs) and integrates payloads and systems for operational capability. The company offers the VIKING UGV platform alongside the MACE AI autonomy kit, and supports customers from concept through to urgent operational requirement programmes. It is the UK arm of IDV, a leading Italian armoured military vehicle manufacturer.

## Products and solutions

- **VIKING UGV** - All-terrain, multirole, six-wheeled diesel-electric hybrid uncrewed ground vehicle with a 750 kg payload capacity, adaptable for remote weapon stations, ISTAR, CBRNE, logistics and troop support roles.
- **MACE AI Autonomy Kit** - Modular Autonomous Control Equipment, a full-stack autonomy system for retrofit or new-build uncrewed and autonomous vehicles, including route-following, convoy-following and independent search or mapping modes.
- **ATLAS navigation system** - AI-based navigation system for GNSS-denied environments, using neural networks for terrain perception, object detection and recognition, and map database creation.

companies.body:
# Igne UXO

> UK provider of unexploded ordnance survey, risk assessment and clearance services, formerly BACTEC.

## What they do

Igne UXO Ltd is the unexploded ordnance arm of Igne, a UK subsurface services group formed in 2023 by consolidating several specialist businesses. The UXO business, formerly BACTEC, specialises in unexploded ordnance risk mitigation and explosive ordnance disposal, with land and marine coverage and a nationwide geospatial UXO risk database. It is one of the few UK contractors licensed to acquire and keep ordnance.

## Products and solutions

- **UXO risk assessments** - desk-study preliminary risk assessments using a nationwide UXO risk database, structured to CIRIA C681 guidance.
- **UXO surveys** - non-intrusive, intrusive and drone-borne magnetometer surveys to detect ferrous anomalies.
- **EOD services** - explosive ordnance disposal: search, clearance, disposal and on-site watching briefs.
- **Marine UXO** - offshore, inshore and nearshore UXO and chemical-munition risk mitigation for renewables, cabling and port operators.
- **UXO training** - CPD-accredited UXO safety training and toolbox talks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, PAS 2080:2023, UKAS-accredited testing.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, British Drilling Association, plus industry schemes including Constructionline Gold, CHAS and RISQS.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-03** - Launched a new interactive UXO Risk Map for developers, planners and consultants. [source](https://www.igne.com/news/uxo-risk-map-launch)
- **2025-09-11** - Achieved PAS 2080 carbon management certification from BSI. [source](https://www.igne.com/news/pas-2080)
- **2025-04-11** - Published a piece on the UXO unit's lineage from BACTEC to Igne. [source](https://www.igne.com/news/from-bactec-to-igne2)

## Links

- Website: https://www.igne.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ignegroup

## Sources

companies.body:
# Iliac Design Ltd

> Engineering-led design, system integration, and technology business specialising in defence and specialist vehicles and sub-systems.

## What they do

Iliac Design provides design, prototyping, and manufacturing management for defence and specialist vehicles, using CAD, computational engineering analysis, FEA, and CFD. The company covers electric vehicle integration, materials, protection, CBRN, prime movers, and trailers, supporting programmes from blue-sky concept through to urgent operational requirement delivery. The company states its teams have developed total defence platforms from lightweight and re-roll vehicles, including WMIK, through to full MRAP tactical wheeled vehicles, and have supported chassis design, up-armouring and appliqué for blast and high-kinetic protection, backed by dynamic modelling and physical testing. Iliac Design also states it has assembled the supplier network for the design and production of the armoured Range Rover Sentinel.

## Products and solutions

- **Design and analytical engineering** - concept, styling, design, analytical engineering (CAD, FEA, CFD) and manufacturing feasibility support for defence and specialist vehicles.
- **Human survivability and blast mitigation seating** - the Iliac Seat and Blast Seat product lines, designed to support occupant survivability and posture in blast events.
- **Vehicle protection and system integration** - up-armouring, appliqué armour and Behind Armour Effects mitigation, combined with human factors engineering for in-vehicle occupancy packages.
- **DextraLift** - semi-automated materials handling equipment for harsh environments such as nuclear decommissioning and ordnance handling.
- **CBRN engineering** - design support for operating and equipment in CBRN environments.
- **Technical recruitment** - supply of engineering contractors and technical candidates to defence and industry clients.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ITAR, UKAS.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, SMMT.

# In2tec Ltd

> UK electronics design, test and manufacturing company specialising in high-density component integration for defence platforms.

## What they do

In2tec is a UK electronics design, test and manufacturing company based in Kettering, with over 25 years of experience delivering end-to-end electronic assemblies from concept through to full-scale production. All work is carried out in-house without subcontracting. Its core technology, Flexi-hibrid, integrates high-density components onto flexible substrates at a fraction of the weight of traditional rigid FR4 boards, producing assemblies for platforms where every gram of weight and every millimetre of space matters.

## Products and solutions

- **Flexi-hibrid technology** - high-density component integration onto flexible substrates, covering dynamic circuits, rigidised flexible circuits and conductive contouring.
- **ReUSE and ReCYCLE** - patented technology enabling full board disassembly and component recovery, supporting obsolescence management on long-lifecycle defence programmes and reducing prototyping costs.
- **Conformal and structural electronics** - printed harnesses, operator interfaces and conformal electronics sealed into structural housings.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001; REACH and RoHS compliant
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Indicatura Ltd

> Asset management and investment consultancy for critical infrastructure, including defence and nuclear programmes.

## What they do

Indicatura is an infrastructure and asset management consultancy founded in 2012 and based in Manchester. It advises clients on high-value physical asset investment decisions, maximising the value of current and future investments by optimising performance, risk, cost and sustainability through the life of the investment. The firm works across manufacturing, commercial real estate, chemical and petrochemicals, critical infrastructure, defence and nuclear. In defence and nuclear programmes, it specialises in uncovering and mitigating risks associated with asset Availability, Reliability and Maintainability (AR&M), citing work on a £100 million defence asset storage project that identified a 45% reduction in capital expenditure and a 63% reduction in lifetime operational expenditure.

## Products and solutions

- **KBEE (Knowledge Based Economic Engineering)** - proprietary methodology for identifying whole-life value opportunities in physical asset investment decisions.
- **AR&M (Availability, Reliability and Maintainability)** - techniques and analytics for uncovering and mitigating asset performance risk across the investment lifecycle.
- **Asset Management Services** - optimisation and implementation of through-life management strategies, from acquisition to disposal or upgrade.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Infoblox UK Ltd

> DDI (DNS, DHCP, IP address management) and cloud-native network security specialist with a UK entity serving defence and government.

## What they do

Infoblox is a 20-year-plus leader in DDI infrastructure, providing DNS, DHCP, and IP address management at scale. Its BloxOne Threat Defence platform is a cloud-native SaaS security solution that uses DNS intelligence, firewalling and behavioural analytics to detect and block threats such as malware, phishing and data exfiltration at the DNS layer, across on-premise and hybrid environments, and integrates with SIEM, SOAR and SOC tools to enrich alerts with DNS, network and device context.

## Products and solutions

- **BloxOne Threat Defence** - cloud-native SaaS network security platform using DNS intelligence for threat detection and response, with add-ons including SOC Insights, Log Export, Lookalike Domain Monitoring and the Dossier threat investigation portal.
- **DDI** - integrated DNS, DHCP, and IP address management for enterprise and government networks.
- **TIDE (Threat Intelligence Data Exchange)** - machine-readable threat intelligence data aggregation and distribution service.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026** - Announced Infoblox IQ, an agentic operations layer built on the DDI platform that analyses DNS queries, DHCP leases and security events, alongside an MCP server for integration with external AI systems. [source](https://www.infoblox.com/news/)
- **2026** - Entered a definitive agreement to acquire Axur, a provider of AI-powered digital risk protection, expected to close in spring 2026; launched Digital Risk Protection Services (DRPS) scanning over 40 million URLs daily for phishing, brand abuse and credential exposure. [source](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/infoblox-expands-preemptive-security-offering-200000862.html)
- **2025** - Announced a partnership with Google Cloud to deliver Infoblox Universal DDI for Google Cloud WAN and Google Cloud DNS Armor, powered by Infoblox. [source](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/infoblox-and-google-cloud-announce-partnership-to-deliver-cloud-native-networking-and-security-solutions-reducing-complexity-for-enterprise-customers-302424041.html)

# inink

> Defence engagement consultancy specialising in communications, branding and copywriting for deep-tech companies selling into defence and national security.

## What they do

inink is a communications consultancy working wherever deep tech meets defence and national security. Founded in 2023 by two specialists who previously worked together at Improbable Defence (now Skyral), it helps technology developers take innovations from the technological frontier to the front line, articulating complex capabilities in ways that land with defence decision makers, technical evaluators, end users, and investors. It plugs into a client's existing commercial and marketing functions on a flexible, call-off basis rather than filling full-time roles, and works with venture builders, founders, start-ups and SMEs across the UK, the US and the wider NATO alliance.

## Products and solutions

- **Narrative and messaging** - product and service definition, narrative development and core messaging.
- **Positioning** - market positioning, audience identification and segmentation, and value-proposition definition.
- **Brand development** - naming, campaign ideation, brand and creative direction, tone of voice, and brand and product marketing strategy.
- **Audience engagement** - launch presentations, pitch decks, web copy, content planning, landing pages, brochures, technical blogs, think pieces and case studies.
- **Sales enablement** - tech- and sales-demo design, explainer-video scripts, and sales-enablement assets.
- **Hitchhiker's Guide to the Valley of Death** - a public interactive guide for deep-tech founders on crossing the gap between a promising technology and adoption at the front line. [guide](https://inink.io/hitchhikers-guide-to-the-valley-of-death/)

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Innovation DB and Forum Ltd

> Technology commercialisation platform linking academic and research innovation to industry, with a classified-contract dataset developed for UK Army Future Capability Command.

## What they do

Innovation DB describes itself as maintaining the world's largest database of novel, commercially useful technologies created by academic institutions, used by an international client base of multinational corporations, venture capital firms, innovative SMEs, and patent and innovation consultancies. Its database organises content into Offers, Projects, Patents and Products, drawing on research output from around 5,000 academic institutions worldwide. For defence clients, the company states it is working under a classified contract for the UK Army Future Capability Command, using its own AI to build an enhanced dataset focused on defence technology scouting.

## Products and solutions

- **Innovation DB database** - core subscription platform covering Offers, Projects, Patents and Products from academic and research institutions worldwide, used to identify licensable and partnerable technologies.
- **Aigis defence dataset** - an enhanced, defence-focused dataset developed under a classified contract for the UK Army Future Capability Command, using the company's in-house AI to multiply its technology-scouting capability.
- **Market and technology reports** - published reports on innovation-driven markets and emerging technology sectors (for example digital healthcare, graphene, imaging, and plastic electronics), available to subscribers.
- **Innovation Forum R&D community** - a community and LinkedIn group connecting subscribers with peers and collaboration partners across corporates, SMEs and universities.

companies.summary: In-ear wearable that provides real-time physiological monitoring, including core body temperature and heart rate, for workplace and operational safety.
companies.body:
# Inova Design Solutions Ltd (trading as Bodytrak)

> In-ear wearable that provides real-time physiological monitoring, including core body temperature and heart rate, for workplace and operational safety.

## What they do

Bodytrak is a wearable safety solution built around an in-ear earpiece with multiple sensors that capture real-time physiological data, analysed by AI on the device and in the cloud. The ear's proximity to the hypothalamus allows the device to measure core body temperature and heart rate, with reported mean absolute error of 0.18C against the gastro-intestinal pill at elevated temperatures. The company markets the solution across industrial, emergency services, defence and scientific or research sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Bodytrak 1** - in-ear wearable for real-time physiological monitoring.
- **Bodytrak 1 IS** - intrinsically safe variant for hazardous environments.
- **Smart Safety Solution** - platform covering heat stress monitoring, fatigue monitoring, lone worker safety, musculoskeletal disorder prevention, geolocation and geofencing, alerts and automated reporting.

## Recent news

- **2025-03-25** - Joint Administrators appointed to Inova Design Solutions Ltd (trading as Bodytrak); the company entered administration. [source](https://bodytrak.co/legal-information/)
- **2022-05** - Lakeland Industries extended its strategic investment in Inova Design Solutions to GBP 3.5 million. [source](https://www.setsquared.co.uk/inova-design-solutions-t-a-bodytrak-secures-an-additional-1-5-million-investment-from-lakeland-industries/)

companies.body:
# Integrated Security Manufacturing

> Technology company delivering intelligent command and control solutions for high-security environments and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

Integrated Security Manufacturing (ISM) has over 30 years of experience reducing costs and improving efficiency in high-security and critical infrastructure environments. The company specialises in smart technology that bridges legacy and modern systems, providing command and control integration, business intelligence, and compliance support across disparate security systems. ISM describes itself as offering manufacturer-agnostic integration of third-party systems within high-security environments, serving sectors including nuclear sites, airports, ports, utilities, data centres, hospitals, custodial estates, and venues and stadia.

## Products and solutions

- **Genesys** - command and control / PSIM (Physical Security Information Management) platform unifying CCTV and video management, access control, perimeter intrusion detection, building management systems, drone detection, and over 150 third-party integrations into a single interface, with automated incident-management workflows and situational awareness reporting. Marketed at critical national infrastructure operators.
- **Genesys Nano (Custodial)** - a variant of Genesys for police custody suites and HM Prison & Probation Service estates, covering automated detainee logging and life-sign monitoring for vulnerable persons, plus a "Smart Cell Kiosk" for telephony, self-service, and e-learning.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 27001:2022, CAPSS (Cyber Assurance of Physical Security Systems) approval for Genesys, Secured by Design (Police Preferred Specification)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026** - barox showcased its Genesys by ISM integration at The Security Event trade show (NEC), alongside other video management system integrations. [International Security Journal](https://internationalsecurityjournal.com/barox-the-security-event-nec-2026/)

## Links

# Intelligent Artefacts

> AI middleware providing intelligent, adaptive agents for next-generation defence training simulations.

## What they do

Intelligent Artefacts builds AI middleware for training simulation environments, drawing on deep expertise in navigation and behaviour systems for large-scale virtual worlds. Their middleware product gives simulated entities the ability to navigate, adapt, and behave intelligently, producing training environments that more closely replicate real-world operational conditions while reducing development time and cost. companies.name: Inter-Tec Aero Ltd
companies.summary: Aerospace engineering consultancy holding EASA Part 21J Design Organisation Approval, serving OEMs, MROs, and operators globally.
companies.body:
# Inter-Tec Aero Ltd

> Aerospace engineering consultancy holding EASA Part 21J Design Organisation Approval, serving OEMs, MROs, and operators globally.

## What they do

Inter-Tec Aero provides specialist engineering, design, and structural analysis services to the aviation sector, describing itself as offering practical EASA-approved engineering solutions for clients needing modifications or repair solutions. The company holds EASA Part 21J Design Organisation Approval and was established to continue the EASA-approved design services previously delivered under Inter-Tec Services in SW Scotland, now serving a global customer base from Shannon, Ireland, alongside a continuing UK office at Prestwick International Aerospace Park.

## Products and solutions

- **Structural repair solutions** - identification, assessment, and removal of common damage profiles including corrosion, cracking, and disbond, covering engine nacelle intake cowls, fan cowl doors, thrust reversers, exhaust nozzle components, airframe secondary structure, radomes, control surfaces, and landing gear.
- **Interiors** - management of cabin interior development, renewal, refurbishment, seat reconfiguration, and role changes across passenger, cargo, and air ambulance configurations.
- **Specialist role equipment** - support for helicopter emergency medical services and search and rescue operations, including structural provisions and bespoke mounting configurations.
- **Exteriors** - approved design solutions and material provisioning for aircraft exterior refurbishment.
- **Avionics integration** - bespoke equipment installation designs and retrofitting of instrument panels and electrical systems.
- **Consultancy** - compliance verification, project management, and stress analysis services, including maintenance and inspection planning advice.

The company states its design solution catalogue, covering aircraft types from the DHC-6 and BN2 Islander through to Airbus A320-family and Boeing widebody aircraft, ATR, SAAB, and a range of Airbus Helicopters, Leonardo, Sikorsky, and Bell rotary types.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** EASA Part 21J Design Organisation Approval, UK CAA Part 21J DOA, AS/EN 9100, ETSO authorisations covering APU and engine nacelle structural repairs and aircraft economy seats
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-04-08** - AJW Group announced a strategic partnership to market and promote Inter-Tec Aero's EASA Part 21J design services (avionics and electrical systems, aircraft structures, cabin interiors, structural repair) to AJW's global customer base. [AJW Group](https://www.ajw-group.com/news/ajw-group-announces-strategic-partnership-agreement-with-inter-tec-aero-ltd-.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.inter-tec.aero
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/inter-tec-aero-ltd/

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (inter-tec.aero), ADS Group member directory, AJW Group news release.

companies.body:
# Interpro Technology Solutions Ltd

> Defence-focused IT support and managed services company, delivering secure IT solutions through security-cleared engineers to the UK defence sector.

## What they do

Interpro Technology Solutions is a Fareham-based managed IT services provider founded in 2005, delivering IT support, systems integration, and cyber security services to small and medium businesses generally, alongside a dedicated defence practice. Its defence-facing engineers and consultants hold BPSS and SC security clearances, and the company states it has delivered IT support to organisations including QinetiQ and Aquila Air Traffic Management Services, focusing on safeguarding sensitive data, maintaining operational integrity, and meeting defence compliance requirements.

## Products and solutions

- **Managed IT support** - fully managed and monitored IT support with service-level agreements, alongside pay-as-you-go support and IT health checks.
- **Defence IT support** - a dedicated service line covering secure communications, defence-aligned cloud, and cyber protection for defence contractors and organisations in the defence supply chain, including secure hosted telephony, Microsoft 365 for Defence, secure cloud backups, and high-speed defence connectivity.
- **Cyber security services** - managed firewalls and threat filtering, antivirus and endpoint protection, email security and phishing protection, ransomware defence, vulnerability scanning, risk management and security audits, cloud security, and multi-factor authentication implementation, plus support for clients pursuing Cyber Essentials and Cyber Essentials Plus certification.
- **Cloud and telecoms** - cloud computing and hosted systems, dedicated servers, cloud backup, business email hosting, hosted VoIP phone systems, and business broadband.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus

companies.body:
# Inzpire

> Defence managed services and mission systems company, staffed by veterans from the Royal Navy, British Army, and Royal Air Force.

## What they do

Inzpire supplies the UK Ministry of Defence with operational training and mission systems, developed and delivered by personnel with front-line military flying and ground experience. Around three-quarters of its revenue comes from airborne training and evaluation services, primarily for the Royal Air Force, with the balance from the sale of aviation mission system products ranging from standalone tablets to full mission support systems integrated with aircraft avionics. Inzpire is a joint-services organisation founded in 2005, with QinetiQ as majority shareholder following a strategic investment completed in 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **GECO Mission Support System** - Fully integrated mission support system combining software, purpose-built hardware and customer service, covering the full military air mission cycle from pre-flight planning and briefing through in-flight execution to post-mission debrief; in service with UK armed forces since 2009 and used on over 22 fixed-wing and helicopter types.
- **Flying training services** - Rotary, fixed-wing and UAS operational training in synthetic and live environments, including adversary air services and Qualified Weapons Instructor training support.
- **Collective training** - Live, synthetic and blended live-synthetic collective training exercises across air, land and maritime domains.
- **Synthetic and simulation systems** - Development of synthetic training devices and deployable simulators, including a mixed reality gunnery trainer prototype for the UK MOD.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04-13** - Delivered GECO Mission Support System to Ascent Flight Training to enhance Royal Air Force and Royal Navy Mission Aircrew training at RNAS Culdrose, with further systems planned to support the Future ISTAR and Rear Crew Training System programme. [source](https://www.inzpire.com/news/inzpire-delivers-geco-mission-support-system-to-enhance-mission-aircrew-training)
- **2026-02-02** - Awarded a contract to review UK defence nuclear training. [source](https://www.inzpire.com/news)

companies.body:
# Isembard

> Software-first precision manufacturing company reshoring component production for aerospace, defence and energy.

## What they do

Isembard is a software-first precision manufacturing company that produces high-precision metal components and assemblies for critical industries including aerospace, defence and energy. It operates a network of its own and franchised factories run on its proprietary AI-driven platform, MasonOS, using advanced CNC machining and automation to move customers quickly from prototype to production. MasonOS integrates quoting, scheduling, supply chain, manufacturing, quality control and delivery into a single operating layer, using machine learning to generate customer quotes, optimise scheduling, automate supply chain and inventory management, and support quality inspection. Its stated mission is to reshore and rebuild Western industrial manufacturing capacity, with plans to scale its factory footprint across the UK and into Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **MasonOS** - proprietary AI-driven software platform that runs and standardises its factories.
- **Precision manufacturing** - high-precision CNC machining, metal part production and repair.
- **Distributed factory network** - a model combining owned and franchised factories for rapid prototype-to-production manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001, ITAR registration, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** JOSCAR registered.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-09** - Raised a $50m Series A led by Union Square Ventures to open 25 AI-powered factories serving aerospace and defence. [source](https://tech.eu/2026/03/09/uk-manufacturing-startup-isembard-secures-50m/)
- **2025-04-24** - Raised a $9m (£7m) seed round led by Notion Capital to reshore manufacturing for critical industries. [source](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/24/british-startup-isembard-lands-9m-to-reshore-manufacturing-for-critical-industries/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.isembard.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/isembard

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (isembard.com), Companies House (no. 15989684), TechCrunch, tech.eu, EU-Startups, Resilience Media, techfundingnews.com.

companies.body:
# ISTEC Services Ltd

> UK manufacturer of precision-engineered small-arm and medium-calibre weapon mounts and weapon ancillaries for land, sea and air platforms.

## What they do

ISTEC Services Limited, formed in 1989, is the UK's principal supplier of high-quality, precision-engineered small-arm and medium-calibre gun mounts and weapon ancillaries. The company designs, manufactures and supports complex weapon integration solutions for military platforms, specialising in fully integrating a customer's existing inventory of crew-served weapons, either retrospectively onto vehicle platforms or by design at the concept stage. ISTEC states its mounts and ancillaries are operated by users worldwide and are supplied to major defence contractors and directly to the UK Ministry of Defence and US Department of Defense.

## Products and solutions

- **Ring mounts** - a range of mounts for 5.56mm, 7.62mm, 12.7mm and 40mm Grenade Machine Gun weapon systems.
- **Enhanced Close Range Protection (ECRP)** - shield wall system providing increased physical protection on vehicle platforms.
- **Smoke Discharger Systems (SDS)** - vehicle-mounted smoke discharger equipment.
- **Softmount systems** - including the Mk2 Softmount for the M2 Heavy Machine Gun.
- **Universal Gun Mounts (UGM)** - traverse control mechanisms and swing arm systems for weapon platforms, including for the Supacat Jackal 3 Extenda.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Other:** Ministry of Defence Employer Recognition Scheme Silver Award (support to the Armed Forces community); Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Announced a new collaboration agreement with Fering Technologies at the International Armoured Vehicle (IAV) show, Farnborough. [source](https://istec.co.uk/istec-announces-a-new-collaboration-agreement-with-fering-technologies-at-iav/)
- **2025** - Selected by BAE Systems to supply its Enhanced Close Range Protection (ECRP) shield wall system for an overseas customer. [source](https://istec.co.uk/istec-selected-by-bae-systems-to-provide-its-enhanced-close-range-protection-for-an-overseas-customer/)
- **2025** - Appointed by GM Defence as preferred mission kit supplier for UK and wider EU/NATO programmes. [source](https://istec.co.uk/gm-defence-appoints-istec-as-preferred-mission-kit-supplier-for-uk-and-wider-eu-nato-programmes/)
- **2025** - Signed a collaboration agreement with SiNAB Pty Ltd in Australia. [source](https://istec.co.uk/istec-services-ltd-secures-a-key-collaboration-agreement-with-sinab-pty-ltd-in-australia/)
- **2025-09** - Launched the Mk2 Softmount for the M2 Heavy Machine Gun at DSEi 2025. [source](https://istec.co.uk/istec-launches-mk2-softmount-for-m2-heavy-machine-gun-hmg-at-dsei-25/)

# ITP Aero UK Ltd

> Aerospace engine component manufacturer serving the civil and defence aviation sectors, operating from a former Rolls-Royce site in Hucknall, Nottinghamshire.

ITP Aero UK manufactures complex fabrications, combustors, casings and outlet guide vanes for civil and defence aviation programmes. The Hucknall site, integrated in 2021, houses three manufacturing plants with a skilled team specialising in design and advanced manufacturing processes including CNC machining, welding, superplastic forming and electron beam processes.

# ITSUS Consulting Limited

> Cardiff-based network and cyber security consultancy delivering secure communications and digital transformation programmes for defence, aerospace and public sector clients.

## What they do

ITSUS Consulting, founded in 2008, provides network and cyber security services for clients operating mission-critical communications systems. The company collaborates with international aerospace, defence and public sector organisations to deliver complex digital transformation programmes, working across three broad capability areas: networks, cyber security, and data science. ITSUS states it is a validated cyber security supplier to HMG. Named public-sector and defence clients include the Ministry of Defence, Dstl, Leonardo, General Dynamics, and Airbus Defence and Space.

## Products and solutions

- **Network engineering** - design, build and support of secure communications networks, including next-generation firewall deployments.
- **Cyber security services** - services covering zero trust architecture and cyber security culture, delivered to HMG-validated standards.
- **Data science** - analysis and interpretation of complex data to provide actionable insights.
- **Technology partnerships** - certified partner for Cisco, Palo Alto Networks and Keysight Technologies, delivering network security solutions built on these vendors' products.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 27001:2022.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

companies.summary: Global engineering and technical services firm with a specialist defence, aerospace, and security practice.
companies.body:
# Jacobs UK Ltd

> Global engineering and technical services firm with a specialist defence, aerospace, and security practice.

## What they do

Jacobs is a global engineering consultancy with a significant UK presence, ranking among the largest providers of technical, professional and construction services to government and industry defence clients. Its specialist UK services include facility cyber security, sustainability and resiliency planning, environmental services, and feasibility and master planning for aerospace, defence and security applications. Jacobs also holds a long-standing role supporting Royal Navy naval nuclear propulsion research and technical support, and is a joint delivery partner to the Ministry of Defence's procurement organisation, DE&S.

## Products and solutions

- **Facility and OT cyber security** - secure operational technology network design and SCADA integration, OT-managed security services, governance, risk and compliance, and advanced OT cyber security services including penetration testing and threat hunting, delivered jointly with PA Consulting.
- **Naval nuclear propulsion support** - research and technology services and through-life technical support for Royal Navy submarine reactors, including work on future reactor development.
- **MOD programme and project delivery** - joint delivery partner (with Turner & Townsend, as the Equinox joint venture) on the Defence Equipment and Support Project Delivery Partner-Successor framework, covering project and operational delivery across MOD departments.
- **Environmental services and master planning** - environmental planning, remediation, EHS consulting and feasibility/master planning for aerospace, defence and security facilities.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** MOD Digital and IT Professional Services (DIPS) framework, Lot 3 (cyber security, crypto, security operations and integrated systems); DE&S Project Delivery Partner-Successor (PDP-S) framework.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2024-01-25** - Jacobs awarded a UK MOD contract for naval nuclear propulsion research and technology, running until 2032, covering Royal Navy submarine reactor support and future reactor development. [source](https://www.jacobs.com/newsroom/press-release/jacobs-awarded-132-million-uk-ministry-defence-research-and-technology)
- **2024-02-15** - Jacobs named joint project delivery partner (with Turner & Townsend) on DE&S's Project Delivery Partner-Successor framework, a five-year term from March 2024. [source](https://www.jacobs.com/newsroom/news/jacobs-awarded-key-role-uk-ministry-defence-procurement)
- **2024-03** - Jacobs named as a supplier of cyber security services to the UK MOD under the Digital and IT Professional Services (DIPS) framework, Lot 3. [source](https://www.jacobs.com/newsroom/press-release/jacobs-named-supplier-cyber-security-services-uk-ministry-defence)

## Links

- Website: https://www.jacobs.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (jacobs.com newsroom), ADS Group member directory. Note: Jacobs' former Critical Mission Solutions and Cyber & Intelligence Government Services businesses, which carried its intelligence-community ISR capability, were spun off and merged into the separately listed Amentum Holdings, Inc. in September 2024; this page describes only the UK defence, cyber and engineering services that remain within Jacobs.

companies.body:
# Janes Group UK Ltd

> Defence intelligence and open-source data provider with over 125 years of military OSINT expertise.

## What they do

Janes provides foundational military open-source intelligence (OSINT) data sets and analysis to militaries, governments, and global defence organisations. Its data is compiled through more than 500,000 analyst hours annually and covers military capabilities, orders of battle, events and country intelligence, equipment, and defence markets, programmes and forecasts, across any operational environment or platform type. The company was founded in 1898 and today trades as Janes Group UK Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **Janes Fighting Ships** - reference yearbook and database of naval platform specifications, photographs and silhouettes for ships in development, production and service worldwide.
- **Janes Defence Weekly** - weekly defence news publication covering equipment, military geopolitics, forces, organisations, markets and business.
- **Janes Terrorism and Insurgency Centre (JTIC)** - online database tracking terrorism and insurgency incidents and groups.
- **Janes C4ISR products** - coverage of C4ISR and mission systems worldwide, including emerging technologies, market forecasts and technical reference data.
- **Janes Markets Forecast** - verified data and insight across global defence markets, with ten-year forecasts and historical data on awarded programmes.
- **Janes Intelligence Platform** - an API-enabled knowledge graph interconnecting structured intelligence data sets (equipment, sensors and weapons, military capabilities, country and CBRN profiles, defence budgets, programmes and forecasts), using machine learning for classification, deduplication and entity detection, and supporting fusion with other intelligence disciplines.
- **Tradecraft Online** - Janes' OSINT training programme.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - UK Ministry of Defence announced intent to award Janes a multi-year Enterprise Agreement covering OSINT database, taxonomy and analytical tool licences across the whole of MOD, replacing separate branch-level subscriptions. [source](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk/mod-to-award-intelligence-data-deal-to-janes/)
- **2026-05** - Janes announced a strategic partnership with SOSi to integrate its validated military intelligence into SOSi's exoINSIGHT AI-powered analysis platform. [source](https://www.sosi.com/press-releases/sosi-and-janes-partner-to-deliver-contextualized-military-intelligence-built-on-exoinsight-platform/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.janes.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (janes.com), ADS Group member directory, Companies House (12199785).

## What they do

Jarvis Manufacturing designs and produces bespoke textile products for defence and wider applications from a dedicated facility in Eastbourne employing around 28 staff. It describes itself as a one-stop shop for textile products, able to manufacture items ranging from a small lanyard to a large vehicle cover, combining current textile technology with over 40 years of experience. The company's origins are in fashion belt manufacturing before moving into military helmets and wider defence soft goods; it now serves military, medical, emergency services, law enforcement and commercial customers.

- **Load-carrying equipment** - Tactical ops bags, bergens, heavy-duty rucksacks, camo daysacks, holdalls, tool bags, utility and ammo pouches, haversacks, radio pouches, tactical carriers and rifle cases.
- **Design and manufacturing services** - product design, development and prototyping, UK cutting, sewing, hardware fitting, printing and embroidery with no minimum order quantity, plus offshore sourcing and supply chain management for higher-volume orders.
- **Contract cutting** - CNC cutting of webbing, plastics, foam, Velcro and PVC.

Fabric and finishing capabilities stated by the company include rot and fungal resistance, flame retardancy, UV stability, infrared reflectivity and water-resistant treatments for extreme climate conditions.
