companies.body:
# JET Connectivity

> UK developer of secure sovereign 5G mesh networks delivered on floating buoy platforms for maritime and remote environments.

## What they do

JET Connectivity delivers secure 5G/6G mesh networks with integrated backhaul and positioning, navigation and timing capabilities for maritime and expeditionary environments. The company, spun out from JET Engineering in 2020 and trading under the JET Connectivity name from October 2022, has built its own hardware and software stack. It positions its sovereign networks as land and sea-based alternatives to satellite services for offshore, coastal and remote sites.

## Products and solutions

- **5G connectivity buoys** - floating buoy platforms hosting bespoke 5G networks, sharing coverage between buoys and relaying data to shore.
- **Pop-up 5G IAB mesh** - secure mesh capability designed for littoral, offshore and remote environments, including GPS-denied conditions.
- **Platform range** - a compact buoy for rivers and coastal areas, a mid-size platform for wider maritime zones, and an offshore station for year-round connectivity miles from shore, with onboard sensors collecting sea state, weather and video data.

## Recent news

companies.name: JET Engineering System Solutions
companies.summary: Developer and manufacturer of floating, pop-up 5G connectivity solutions for the marine and offshore environment.
companies.body:
# JET Engineering System Solutions

> Developer and manufacturer of floating, pop-up 5G connectivity solutions for the marine and offshore environment.

## What they do

JET Engineering System Solutions (trading as JET Connectivity) designs and builds in-house 5G radio equipment hardened for harsh offshore and ultra-remote environments, enabling high-speed internet and real-time data streaming at sea. The company describes its offering as the world's first pop-up, floating 5G connectivity solution at sea, combining 5G, AIS and RF networks to support civilian, defence, green-shipping and renewables customers. For defence, the company states it is developing a deployable mobile multi-radio IP/5G network capability for littoral and offshore environments, intended to provide high-bandwidth, low-latency, multi-domain integrated communications and data with high resilience.

## Products and solutions

- **Floating 5G platform** - pop-up, sea-based 5G connectivity node combining 5G, AIS and RF networks for offshore data transfer.
- **Deployable multi-radio IP/5G network** - mobile network capability for littoral and offshore defence environments, supporting high-bandwidth, low-latency, multi-domain communications.
- **Offshore safety and sensor communications** - links supporting safety-critical emergency communications and real-time sensor data streaming for offshore operations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Programmes:** DASA-funded (5G Wireless Communication challenge)

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - TRICAPITAL Angels led a £1.2m investment into JET's sovereign dual-use 5G solutions. [ScottishPower Renewables](https://www.scottishpowerrenewables.com/news/pages/scottishpower_renewables_exploring_offshore_5g_with_connectivity_pioneer_jet_engineering_system_solutions.aspx)

> Underwater capability provider serving defence and commercial markets with diving, submarine rescue and hyperbaric solutions.

## What they do

JFD delivers capability across special operations diving, submarine rescue, submarine systems and commercial diving, drawing on over 40 years of experience in the underwater environment. The company designs and manufactures equipment ranging from diving systems and hyperbaric chambers to submarine rescue vehicles and platform launch-and-recovery systems.

companies.body:
# JJ Churchill Ltd

> Precision engineering manufacturer producing high-quality components and assemblies for the aerospace, defence and power generation sectors.

## What they do

JJ Churchill operates as a first-tier sub-contractor, taking supply-chain management responsibility and applying advanced CNC machining processes to high-value aerospace and defence components. The business works across engine components, weapon system parts and structural assemblies, using specialist materials including titanium, nickel and aluminium alloys. Founded in 1937 to provide sub-contract machining to the aerospace industry, the company relocated to Market Bosworth in 1941 and today serves the aerospace, power generation, medtech, diesel engine and defence sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision-machined components** - 5-axis CNC milling and turning of complex aerospace and defence parts.
- **Propulsion components** - engine components, rotors and propellers for aerospace platforms.
- **Weapon system components** - parts for missiles, rockets and torpedo/anti-submarine systems.

companies.name: Joby Aviation
companies.summary: Developer and manufacturer of all-electric vertical take-off and landing aircraft for commercial passenger and defence applications.
companies.body:
# Joby Aviation

> Developer and manufacturer of all-electric vertical take-off and landing aircraft for commercial passenger and defence applications.

## What they do

Joby Aviation designs and manufactures an all-electric eVTOL aircraft capable of carrying a pilot and four passengers at speeds up to 200 mph on a single charge, with a range exceeding 150 miles. The company has UK operations, registered in Altrincham, Cheshire, and states it is exploring a new aircraft class for defence applications: a gas turbine hybrid VTOL aircraft designed for low-altitude missions that is optionally piloted, enabling both crewed and fully autonomous operation.

## Products and solutions

- **Joby S4** - the company's core all-electric eVTOL air taxi, piloted, carrying four passengers, in delivery to the US Air Force under the Agility Prime programme.
- **Defence VTOL aircraft (with L3Harris)** - a gas turbine hybrid VTOL aircraft built on the S4 platform, described by Joby as optionally piloted for crewed or fully autonomous operation, with L3Harris providing sensors, effectors, communications and collaborative autonomy integration.
- **Autonomous flight technology** - Joby states the aircraft uses its own SuperPilot autonomous flight technology, following its 2024 acquisition of the autonomy division of Xwing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** US Air Force Agility Prime, run with AFWERX.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-08-01** - Joby announced a collaboration with L3Harris to pursue defence applications for an autonomous hybrid VTOL aircraft. [source](https://www.jobyaviation.com/news/joby-collaborates-with-l3harris-to-pursue-defense-applications-for-autonomous-hybrid-vtol-aircraft)
- **2025-11-13** - Joby and L3Harris completed the first military test flight of the autonomous aircraft. [source](https://www.defensenews.com/air/2025/11/13/joby-l3harris-fly-autonomous-electric-aircraft-eye-defense-market/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.jobyaviation.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (jobyaviation.com newsroom), ADS Group member directory, Companies House (13946282). US-headquartered company with UK registered presence (Altrincham, Cheshire). The uas/autonomy capability described relates specifically to Joby's defence aircraft programme with L3Harris; the company's core commercial product remains a piloted eVTOL air taxi.

companies.body:
# JOLTS Consulting

> UK veteran-owned organisation performance consultancy delivering training, Integrated Logistic Support and decision support to defence, maritime and aviation clients.

## What they do

JOLTS Consulting Limited is a veteran-owned and operated UK consultancy specialising in organisation performance, working predominantly in high-risk and safety-critical environments across defence, maritime and aviation. The company combines data-driven insight with people-centred leadership across four service lines: training, consultancy, Integrated Logistic Support (ILS) and creative digital services. It has provided training needs analysis for UK Defence's Joint Fires Synthetic Trainer (JFST) and has supported the British Army through experimentation activity to inform capability development and acquisition decisions.

## Products and solutions

- **Training services** - analysis, design and delivery of training solutions, including training needs analysis and desktop simulation to optimise organisational performance.
- **ILS and engineering support** - Integrated Logistic Support and Management consultancy covering reliability and maintainability analysis, obsolescence management, asset and supply chain management, and technical publications, built to UK Def-Stan/Def-Con, JSPs, the Defence Logistics Framework, international AQAPs and NATO MIL-STDs.
- **Consultancy services** - bespoke business and market intelligence for defence and security clients, and decision support through experimentation and evidence-based analysis.
- **Digital services** - immersive 2D and 3D visualisation and serious gaming solutions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Recognition:** Gold Award, Defence Relationship Management's Employer Recognition Scheme (2024), reflecting Armed Forces Covenant commitments.

## Recent news

- **2024** - JOLTS Consulting received the Gold Award in the Defence Relationship Management Employer Recognition Scheme. [source](https://joltsconsulting.com/about)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/jolts-consulting-limited

# JOTA Holdings

> Engineering group applying motorsport-derived precision and composites expertise to defence, automotive and marine sectors.

## What they do

JOTA Holdings operates across endurance motorsport, advanced engineering and composites manufacturing, with subsidiaries JOTA Advanced Engineering and JOTA Composites serving defence, automotive and marine customers. JOTA Advanced Engineering, incorporated in 2015 and registered in Tunbridge Wells, manufactures fully inspected, complex components in aluminium, stainless steel, special alloys and plastics. JOTA Composites operates from a 15,000 sq ft facility in West Oxfordshire, producing complex autoclave-cured components in carbon, aramid and sustainable fibres for automotive, defence and marine customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision-machined components** - complex, fully inspected parts in aluminium, stainless steel, special alloys and plastics (JOTA Advanced Engineering).

## What they do

JVAT provides professional services across risk management, engineering assurance, and safety in complex regulated environments, including systems assurance, safety engineering, systems engineering, enterprise risk management, human factors and cyber security. companies.body:
# K Sharp

> Human factors and human science research consultancy working across defence, security and public safety.

## What they do

K Sharp provides strategic and applied human sciences research and human-centred design to help clients understand and predict user behaviour, optimising the safety and usability of systems, processes, products and training. The team describes over 12 years of delivery into defence, alongside security, public safety, health, aviation, space and smart technology, and has worked with MOD, Dstl, BAE Systems, QinetiQ, General Dynamics, Leonardo, Raytheon and the UK Space Agency.

## Products and solutions

- **Human factors design and assessment** - human-centred design of software, hardware, control rooms and human-machine interfaces, plus usability, workload and situational awareness assessment.
- **Human factors integration and project management** - human factors integration, agile and risk management support across programme lifecycles.
- **Training** - ergonomics and human factors training, manual handling, simulation and synthetic blended training, and training needs analysis.
- **Research and analysis** - task and systems analysis, human error and reliability analysis, and applied research into human behavioural sciences, command and control, and information superiority.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR; Digital Outcomes and Specialists (DOS); Sell2Wales; BAE Systems ASC and Human and Social Science Research Capability (HSSRC) panels.
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.

## What they do

K.Lacey Cables (registered as K. Lacey (Engineers & Designers) Limited) began as a small family business over 50 years ago after identifying a gap in the market for aerospace and defence cable supply and stockholding. Operating from Littlehampton, West Sussex, it is one of the UK's largest suppliers and stockists of PTFE equipment wire to BS3G210, and a manufacturer of build-to-print cable and wire assemblies to the IPC/WHMA-A-620 standard, serving aerospace, defence, electronics and automotive customers.

# K39 Consulting
> Australian veteran-owned defence consultancy delivering strategic advisory across guided weapons, maritime sustainment, and programme delivery, with a UK presence from 2025.
## What they do
K39 Consulting is a professional services consultancy founded in Sydney in 2018 by Darren Owen, a dual British/Australian Army veteran. It provides strategic advisory, commercial and procurement support, engineering, and technical assurance across Australian and UK defence, with specialist expertise in Guided Weapons and Explosive Ordnance (GWEO) and maritime sustainment. The team numbered approximately 44 staff as of mid-2026, over 40% of whom hold UK citizenship. K39 expanded into the UK in late 2025, establishing a London presence at Farringdon Street.

# Kahootz Ltd

> MOD-accredited secure SaaS collaboration platform for sharing information up to Official Sensitive with external partners.

## What they do

Kahootz provides a cloud-based workspace tool that allows organisations to set up secure, accredited environments for bids, procurement, projects, stakeholder engagement and knowledge management within minutes. Its Defence Share platform is the MOD's primary collaboration tool and remains the only platform of its type accredited by the MOD to store and share information marked up to Official-Sensitive, supporting collaboration across the wider defence supply chain. The company is certified to ISO 27001 and listed on G-Cloud 14.

# Kainos Group

> London-listed digital technology company delivering software, data and AI services to public sector, defence and healthcare.

## What they do

Kainos Group plc is a digital technology company headquartered in Belfast, Northern Ireland, listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: KNOS) and a constituent of the FTSE 250. Founded in 1986 as a joint venture between Fujitsu and Queen's University Belfast's business incubation unit, it develops information technology for businesses and organisations. The group operates three divisions: Digital Services, Workday Services and Workday Products, and is a UK supplier of digital, data and AI capability to public sector, defence and healthcare.

## Products and solutions

- **Digital Services** - digital transformation, software development, data and AI delivery for government, healthcare and commercial clients.
- **Workday Services** - implementation and support partner for Workday enterprise applications.
- **Workday Products** - software products extending and automating Workday deployments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service Digital and IT Professional Services (DIPS); G-Cloud; Defence Innovation and Procurement frameworks.

## Recent news

- **2025-01** - Kainos was awarded a three-year contract worth £50m, running to January 2028, to evolve and support the Ministry of Defence's Defence Data Analytics Platform (DDAP), via the CCS Digital and IT Professional Services framework, taking over platform management, maintenance and support from the incumbent partner. DDAP is built on AWS and supports end-users across the Royal Navy, British Army, RAF and other MOD organisations. [source](https://www.kainos.com/insights/news/kainos-extends-partnership-with-ministry-of-defence-to-drive-data-and-ai-innovation-with-enhanced-platform-capabilities)

> UK defence technology company building software platforms and advisory services for defence and national security programmes.

## What they do

Karve International is a UK defence technology company building software platforms for high-trust environments where delivery is complex and coordination is critical. Founded in 2021, it develops sovereign-aligned infrastructure for defence and national security programmes that span multiple organisations, approvals and constraints. companies.name: KBR
companies.summary: Engineering, construction and programme management firm delivering infrastructure and support services to UK defence and government.
companies.body:
# KBR

> Engineering, construction and programme management firm delivering infrastructure and support services to UK defence and government.

## What they do

KBR's UK operation, headquartered in Leatherhead with around 3,000 staff (rising to over 4,000 nationally including Frazer-Nash Consultancy, a KBR company), delivers estate management, engineering and construction services to defence and public sector clients. Work includes rehousing British Army personnel in modern accommodation and managing large-scale infrastructure programmes. KBR's UK focus spans defence, policing and home affairs, and energy, and it describes itself as a world leader in programme and project management, engineering, procurement and construction, logistics, services and training.

## Products and solutions

- **Heavy Equipment Transporter (HET) support** - provision, operation and maintenance of the British Army's Heavy Equipment Transporter fleet, including movement of Challenger 2 tanks, under the Materiel Distribution Land 2025 programme.
- **Combat Water Supply System (CWSS)** - design, manufacture, supply and storage of potable water systems for deployed UK forces, plus reimbursable maintenance, repair and operational support.
- **Operational support to Permanent Joint Headquarters (PJHQ)** - embedded operational support capability for UK military headquarters.
- **Defence estate and infrastructure management** - engineering, procurement and construction services across the British Army estate and other public sector infrastructure.
- **Transforming Forensics programme delivery** - delivery partner to the National Police Chiefs' Council and Association of Police and Crime Commissioners, providing programme management, design, communications and change expertise for forensic services reform.
- **MOJ National Service Hub (Swindon)** - facilities and estate support across Ministry of Justice probation offices, approved premises, training centres and Home Office estate.
- **Submarine and maritime engineering (via Frazer-Nash Consultancy)** - engineering support across the UK submarine programme, including work for Rolls-Royce Submarines' nuclear reactor design, analysis, manufacture, assurance and in-service support.
- **Cyber defence research (via Frazer-Nash Consultancy)** - AI and machine-learning-based self-defending, self-recovering cyber defence concepts developed with Dstl under the Autonomous Resilient Cyber Defence (ARCD) programme.
- **Defence engineering delivery (via Frazer-Nash Consultancy)** - engineering delivery partner support for rapid deployment of military equipment to the front line, as part of the Aurora Engineering Partnership.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Management Consultancy Framework Four (MCF4), Aurora Engineering Partnership / Engineering Delivery Partner (EDP) programme (via Frazer-Nash Consultancy).
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (processes, procedures and work instructions), ISO 44001 (collaborative business relationships).
- **Recognition:** Gold Award, UK Defence Employer Recognition Scheme; signatory of the Armed Forces Covenant since 2014.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-12-08** - Rolls-Royce Submarines signed a strategic collaboration partnership worth up to £400m with Assystem, AtkinsRéalis and Frazer-Nash (a KBR company) to support nuclear submarine reactor design, analysis, manufacture, assurance and in-service support under a five-year Capability Assured Strategic Partnership. [Naval Technology](https://www.naval-technology.com/news/rolls-royce-nuclear-contract/), [Rolls-Royce](https://www.rolls-royce.com/media/press-releases/2025/05-12-2025-rr-signs-strategic-collaboration-partnership-with-assystem-atkinsrealis-and-frazer-nash-to-support-its-nuclear-growth-ambitions.aspx)
- **2025-09-10** - Frazer-Nash Consultancy (a KBR company) and KBR joined the QinetiQ-led Aurora Engineering Partnership as Engineering Delivery Partner (EDP), supporting rapid deployment of military equipment to the front line. [Frazer-Nash Consultancy](https://www.fnc.co.uk/discover-frazer-nash/news/frazer-nash-and-kbr-to-strengthen-mission-critical-ministry-of-defence-engineering-programme/), [ADS Advance](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/qinetiq-led-aurora-engineering-partnership-expanded.html)
- **2025-08-13** - Frazer-Nash Consultancy (a KBR company) was appointed as an approved supplier under the UK Government's Management Consultancy Framework Four (MCF4), covering business, complex transformation, procurement and supply chain, and infrastructure, transport and nuclear advisory services to 2027. [Frazer-Nash Consultancy](https://www.fnc.co.uk/discover-frazer-nash/news/frazer-nash-wins-multi-year-multi-million-contract-as-approved-supplier-of-management-consultancy-services-to-the-uk-government/)

companies.name: Keltech IoE
companies.summary: Irish infrastructure technology company engineering hybrid power-and-data network solutions for rapidly deployable defence, disaster-relief and telecoms infrastructure.
companies.body:
# Keltech IoE

> Irish infrastructure technology company engineering hybrid power-and-data network solutions for rapidly deployable defence, disaster-relief and telecoms infrastructure.

## What they do

KelTech IoE ("Internet of Everything") Networks, based in Dublin, designs hybrid dual distribution energy and data network (DDN) solutions that integrate power and passive fibre and copper data in a single deployable system. The product set targets rapidly deployable infrastructure use cases including expeditionary command nodes, temporary headquarters and field sites, as well as civilian 5G, smart city and microgrid rollouts, where running separate power and data cabling is impractical. The company positions its defence offer around applications spanning benign to non-benign environments and mobile/deployed through to fixed infrastructure, and also serves the disaster-relief and humanitarian sector.

## Products and solutions

- **DDN (Dual Distribution energy and data Network)** - hybrid cable and closure system integrating power and passive fibre/copper data distribution in a single run, supporting rapid deployment of communications infrastructure.
- **LOC (Label on a Cable)** - ruggedised NFC-tag asset identification and management platform giving real-time visibility of infrastructure assets via mobile app and cloud platform.

## Recent news

- **2025-03** - KelTech IoE secured a five-year, €21 million contract with Hosted America for smart fibre management infrastructure in the US. [source](https://www.eu-startups.com/2025/03/keltech-ioe-secures-e21-million-contract-for-smart-fibre-management-in-the-us/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.keltechioe.com
- LinkedIn: https://ie.linkedin.com/company/keltech-ioe-networks

# Key Plastics Ltd

> Irish plastics and precision metal manufacturer serving the aerospace, medical and engineering sectors.

## What they do

Key Plastics Ltd, based in Bray, Co. Wicklow, provides custom-manufactured components in plastic and metal, covering the full project lifecycle from concept, prototyping and validation through to mass production. The company combines mould design, mould manufacture and precision engineering with injection moulding, including a Class 7 moulding cleanroom, and serves aerospace, medical device, telecoms and engineering customers in the UK, Europe, North America and Asia-Pacific as a single-source procurement partner.

## Products and solutions

- **Injection moulding** - custom plastic component manufacture, including cleanroom moulding for medical and precision applications.

companies.summary: Defence and facilities management bid and sales consultancy helping organisations win more work and differentiate in competitive markets.
companies.body:
# Keyne Group Ltd

> Defence and facilities management bid and sales consultancy helping organisations win more work and differentiate in competitive markets.

## What they do

Keyne Group is a work-winning and growth consultancy for the facilities management, defence and government services sectors. Formed in 2023, the firm states it has supported over £15 billion of complex bids across hundreds of opportunities over the last decade. It covers bid management, service solutioning, technical writing and commercial and pricing support, alongside post-award contract retention, rather than bid writing alone.

## Products and solutions

- **Work Winning** - sales methodology and bid strategy support to identify and secure opportunities, using established bidding frameworks.
- **Bid support** - end-to-end bid management, technical bid writing, service solution development and commercial and estimating support, including contract legal reviews.
- **Keyne Continuum (contract retention)** - a "Win-Again" framework for retaining live facilities management and service contracts through renewal, including in central government and defence.
- **Operational improvement** - ongoing monitoring of facilities management sector innovation and continuous improvement support for live contracts.

Sector coverage stated on their site includes defence bidding (estate management, training, equipment support, secure facilities and logistics, UK and international), government bidding (including the RM6232 facilities management framework and Crown Commercial Service frameworks), and commercial and technical bidding (data centres, manufacturing, banking and power generation, including nuclear).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** bid support under the RM6232 Crown Commercial Service facilities management framework (as bid consultancy, not framework supplier).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant (September 2025).

companies.body:
# Keysight Technologies UK Ltd

> UK entity of Keysight Technologies, a global designer and manufacturer of electronic test and measurement equipment and systems.

## What they do

Keysight Technologies designs, manufactures and supplies electronic design and test equipment, systems, software and associated calibration and repair services. The parent company, Keysight Technologies Inc., is listed on the NYSE and headquartered in Santa Rosa, California; Keysight Technologies UK Ltd is its UK operating entity, with sites including Winnersh, Fleet, Telford and Edinburgh. The company serves aerospace and defence, communications, semiconductor and automotive and energy sectors, and states its aim in defence is to support electromagnetic spectrum operations, secure communications, space and satellite, and radar programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **Oscilloscopes** - including the Infiniium and Pro XR8 series, used across aerospace, defence and RF applications.
- **Signal and spectrum analysers** - including the UXA and PXA analysers, for radar, electronic warfare and wideband signal analysis.
- **Vector and agile signal generators** - including the M9484C VXG and UXG, for electronic warfare threat and radar scenario simulation.
- **FieldFox handheld analysers** - portable RF and microwave test equipment for field use, spectrum monitoring and interference-finding.
- **Vector network analysers** - the PNA-X and ENA-X ranges, for component and satellite-link characterisation.
- **EW Advanced Simulation Platform (EWASP)** - scalable electronic warfare test environments for training, reprogramming and research and development.
- **PathWave software suite** - design and test software, including SystemVue and Advanced Design System, for RF, radar and phased-array systems.
- **Aerospace and defence automated test equipment (ATE)** - systems and services for test automation across aerospace and defence programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** SC21 Silver Award (ADS Group's Supply Chains for the 21st Century programme, held since 2013); ISO 27001:2013; ISO 27701:2019; Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 17025 (calibration and testing).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Secured a five-year Test Equipment Managed Services contract with Leonardo UK, covering calibration, repair and asset lifecycle management across multiple Leonardo UK sites. [source](https://www.aerospacetestinginternational.com/news/keysight-secures-test-equipment-management-contract-with-leonardo-uk.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.keysight.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/keysight-technologies

# KHIPU Networks

## What they do

KHIPU Networks are a privately owned, international cyber security specialist delivering network, wireless and security solutions across multiple sectors. They run 24x7 Network and Security Operations Centres in the UK and South Africa, serving education, healthcare, government and the private sector. Their stated approach is to partner with customers, understand their challenges and design fitted solutions.

companies.body:
# Kier Group plc

> UK infrastructure services and construction company and strategic supplier to the UK Government, with a dedicated defence sector practice.

## What they do

Kier Group plc is a UK infrastructure services, construction and property development group, headquartered in Salford and listed on the London Stock Exchange. It employs around 10,000 people and describes itself as a strategic supplier to the UK Government, with over 400 live projects across the UK. Kier operates a "develop, design, build and maintain" model across sectors including defence, education, healthcare, justice, nuclear, water, highways, rail and aviation. In defence, Kier delivers build, refurbishment and estate-optimisation projects for the Ministry of Defence across naval bases, air stations, army bases and defence research sites, and states it has delivered around 20 defence-sector projects since 2019, worth approximately £350 million.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence Estate Optimisation Portfolio** - Kier is one of seven contractors appointed to the Ministry of Defence's Strategic Alliance Contract, a 10-year, £5.1 billion programme, delivering a major project at RAF Cranwell and a regional package for the British Army estate in the south of England.
- **Single Living Accommodation and Technical Infrastructure Programme** - new-build accommodation and technical infrastructure for the Army, including a contract to rebuild Keogh Barracks, Aldershot, running to 2030.
- **Defence Infrastructure Organisation National Framework** - general build and refurbishment work under the DIO's national contracting framework.
- **Facilities management** - Kier states it maintains more than 5,500 buildings across its portfolio, alongside modern methods of construction and in-house design and engineering services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Defence Infrastructure Organisation National Framework; Ministry of Defence Strategic Alliance Contract (Defence Estate Optimisation Portfolio).
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001 (certified under Kier's Safety, Health and Environmental Management System); listed on the CIPS Corporate Ethics Register.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-01-16** - Signed a contract worth around £243 million to rebuild Keogh Barracks, Aldershot, part of the Defence Estate Optimisation Single Living Accommodation and Technical Infrastructure Programme. [source](https://www.constructionenquirer.com/2025/01/16/kier-signs-243m-army-barracks-upgrade/)
- **2025-03-04** - Won a further army barracks contract worth around £118 million in Suffolk, running to 2030. [source](https://www.constructionnews.co.uk/contractors/kier/kier-scoops-118m-army-barracks-deal-04-03-2025/)
- **2025-11-13** - Reported a group order book of £11.6 billion in its AGM trading update. [source](https://www.constructionnews.co.uk/civils/kiers-order-book-hits-11-6bn-13-11-2025/)

## Links

- Defence sector page: https://www.kier.co.uk/sectors/defence/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kier-group
- Careers: https://jobs.kier.co.uk/

companies.summary: Programme and systems engineering company specialising in electronics, telecommunications and space.
companies.body:
# KISPE Ltd

> Programme and systems engineering company specialising in electronics, telecommunications and space.

## What they do

KISPE works with customers from early business planning and concept design through to manufacture, integration, test and operations, delivering programme and systems engineering across the electronics, telecommunications and space sectors. The company also provides specialist training and development alongside its consultancy and engineering services. KISPE is based at Farnborough's Cody Technology Park, with a further site in Evesham, and has over 25 years of combined industry experience across its team. The company has two subsidiaries: KISPE Space Systems Ltd, covering space-related programme management and systems engineering, and Applied Space Solutions Limited, focused on space-related research, analytics, applications and services.

## Products and solutions

- **Space systems engineering** - system design, development, procurement, implementation and deployment for space missions, plus spacecraft design, development, manufacture, integration, test and operation.
- **Launch procurement and support** - experience working with launch service providers for ride-share and dedicated payload delivery to orbit.
- **Next Generation Microsatellite Platform** - a satellite platform in development aimed at delivering small-satellite performance at CubeSat price points, using a common integrated platform avionics design across missions.
- **Satellite communications engineering** - design and development of satellite-based communications systems, payloads and equipment, including low-earth-orbit store-and-forward communications, machine-to-machine satellite communications, in-orbit spectrum monitoring, telecommunications and navigation payload design, in-orbit test and characterisation, and geostationary communications satellite design.
- **Electronics design and manufacture** - digital and RF electronic design for terrestrial and satellite applications, covering microelectronics and digital signal processing, analogue electronics, RF and telecommunications, software-defined radio, and embedded/application firmware and software.
- **Satellite Learning Laboratory (SATLL)** - a modular satellite engineering toolset (satellite simulator, ground station simulator, courseware and support equipment) used for workforce development, training and hands-on experimentation, sold via KISPE's training arm.
- **Training and courseware** - courses spanning introductory space and satellite topics, mission design, spacecraft systems engineering, verification and validation, human spaceflight, project management for space systems, and business modelling and planning.
- **Consultancy** - business, management and technical consultancy drawing on the same engineering and programme experience.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-11-21** - Named as a member of the ASTRAL consortium (with Orbit Fab, Gate Space Innovation, Blackswan Space and Indra Deimos), which won ESA/UK Space Agency funding (up to $3.8m/€3.3m overall, first stage worth £1.3m/€1.1m via ESA's ARTES Core Competitiveness programme) to deliver Europe's first in-orbit satellite refuelling experiment, targeting completion by 2028. [Orbit Fab press release](https://www.orbitfab.com/news/orbit-fab-wins-esa-funding-to-lead-astral/)

_News older than ~12 months should be pruned or moved below a divider._

---

- **2024-12-30** - Named alongside SatVu and SSTL as a partner receiving £5.9 million in UK Space Agency National Space Innovation Programme (NSIP) funding to develop a high-resolution infrared satellite constellation for heat-loss detection (the HotSat/SatVu programme). [UK Space Agency blog](https://space.blog.gov.uk/2024/12/30/nsip-funding-is-catalysing-investment-and-creating-jobs/)

## Links

companies.name: KNDS UK
companies.summary: Tactical military bridging manufacturer supplying armed forces worldwide, formerly WFEL Limited.
companies.body:
# KNDS UK

> Tactical military bridging manufacturer supplying armed forces worldwide, formerly WFEL Limited.

## What they do

KNDS UK designs, manufactures and supports rapidly deployable military bridging systems for land forces and disaster relief operations, drawing on over a century of engineering heritage. The product range includes the Medium Girder Bridge (MGB) and Dry Support Bridge (DSB) systems, with in-service support covering inspection, repair and maintenance, spares and field training.

The company was formerly known as WFEL Limited, operating from the same Heaton Chapel site in Stockport since 1915. It is part of KNDS, the Franco-German land defence group formed from the association of Krauss-Maffei Wegmann (KMW) and Nexter, with the unified KNDS brand adopted across the group's subsidiaries from June 2023. Alongside bridging, KNDS UK's Stockport facility carries out fabrication, assembly, integration and test work on the Boxer armoured vehicle programme for the British Army, and manufactures the Boxer drive module that underpins the British Army's RCH 155 self-propelled howitzer.

## Products and solutions

- **Medium Girder Bridge (MGB)** - Rapidly deployable tactical bridging system in service with armed forces across more than 40 countries.
- **Dry Support Bridge (DSB)** - Modern military bridging system for vehicle crossing of gaps in operational and disaster relief environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Knight Precision Wire Limited

> Specialist manufacturer and stockholder of precision wire, strip metal and resistance wire in a wide range of high-performance alloys.

## What they do

Knight Precision Wire is part of the Knight Group and processes and stocks precision wire, strip metal, tube and electrical resistance wire in nickel alloys, stainless steels, titanium, copper alloys and other special-performance materials for aerospace, defence and industrial applications. Manufacturing processes include wire drawing, strip slitting, recoiling, blanking, straightening and metal stamping.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision wire and resistance wire** - Specialist wire products in nickel chrome, cupro-nickel, titanium and a range of exotic alloys including Inconel and superconductors.
- **Strip metal and tube** - Precision strip slitting and recoiling in carbon spring steel, stainless steel and copper alloys.
- **Electrical components and cabling** - Wire and cable products for electrical interconnect and harnessing applications.

companies.name: Kognitiv Spark
companies.summary: Augmented reality technology company specialising in secure remote mentoring and mixed reality solutions for defence and industrial maintenance.
companies.body:
# Kognitiv Spark

> Augmented reality technology company specialising in secure remote mentoring and mixed reality solutions for defence and industrial maintenance.

## What they do

Kognitiv Spark builds secure, hands-free augmented and mixed reality solutions that connect frontline workers with remote experts in real time. Its flagship platform, RemoteSpark, allows field personnel wearing AR headsets to receive live guidance, view documents and 3D model overlays, and complete complex maintenance and repair tasks regardless of location or bandwidth. The company is headquartered in Fredericton, Canada, with a UK presence at Harwell Campus, Oxfordshire, and serves customers across defence, energy, manufacturing and marine sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **RemoteSpark** - hands-free AR/mixed reality platform connecting field workers with remote subject-matter experts via secure, low-bandwidth audio-visual calls, holographic annotation, document viewing and 3D model overlays. Runs on HoloLens 2, Magic Leap 2, and Windows PC, web and mobile.
- **RemoteSpark Use Case Development Kit** - a self-contained field kit combining an AR headset, mini server, handheld PC and secure cellular connectivity, allowing organisations to trial use cases without IT integration.
- **KognitivU** - a self-paced, modular training and onboarding programme for RemoteSpark users.
- **MiRRAS (Mixed Reality Remote Assistant Support)** - the branded RemoteSpark deployment used for Royal Canadian Navy vessel maintenance and repair trials.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials (UK), CyberSecure Canada.
- **Programmes:** UK Defence and Security Accelerator (DASA) funded participant; deployed on secure sovereign MOD cloud infrastructure for the British Army.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Microsoft Mixed Reality Partner Programme Gold Partner.

## Recent news

- **2025-11-19** - Kognitiv Spark deployed secure augmented reality (RemoteSpark/SparkOps) on sovereign MOD cloud infrastructure under DASA funding, with resulting commercial relationships with Rheinmetall MAN Military Vehicles, Rheinmetall BAE Systems Land, and MSI Defence Systems. [source](https://www.defenceonline.co.uk/2025/11/19/kognitiv-spark-deploys-secure-augmented-reality-for-uk-defence-with-dasa-funding/)
- **2024-06-27** - RemoteSpark made available on Magic Leap 2 devices, expanding hardware options for industrial and defence users. [source](https://www.kognitivspark.com/press-releases/kognitiv-spark-brings-mixed-reality-solution-to-magic-leap)

## Links

- Website: https://www.kognitivspark.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kognitivspark
- Careers: https://www.kognitivspark.com/careers

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (kognitivspark.com, about, products, press releases, security pages), GOV.UK/DASA case study (13 November 2025, updated 27 January 2026), Defence Online, ADS Group members directory.

# Koios Group Ltd

> Software company developing secure, operational information management systems for defence and public sector customers.

## What they do

Koios Group creates bespoke software systems designed to meet the information management requirements of customers across defence, public sector and other sectors, with security and operational reliability as core design principles. The company is based at Malvern Hills Science Park, a hub with strong links to the UK defence science and technology community. Koios Group is a group structure encompassing specialist business units, and describes its own role within the Team Mercury SME consortium as specialist digital transformation, business transformation, business process mapping and change consultancy.

## Products and solutions

- **Digital transformation consultancy** - business transformation, business process mapping and change consultancy services, delivered as part of the Team Mercury SME consortium alongside other partner firms.
- **Bespoke information management software** - custom SaaS, Android, iOS, Windows, macOS and Linux systems built for security- and public-sector clients.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Links

companies.name: KOLT Power Ltd
companies.summary: European manufacturer of power conversion solutions for defence land, sea, airborne and space programmes.
companies.body:
# KOLT Power Ltd

> European manufacturer of power conversion solutions for defence land, sea, airborne and space programmes.

## What they do

KOLT Power designs and manufactures power conversion products to DEF Standards and MIL standards, serving defence programmes across land, sea, airborne and low earth orbit domains. The company uses a modular design approach to reduce custom development overhead, with full custom design available, and operates from a European sales and design-in support office in Fareham, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Digitally controlled power conversion units** - PCB-level and chassis power solutions meeting DEF Stan and MIL-STD requirements for defence platforms.
- **Modular power systems** - Platform electrical and power systems for land, naval, airborne and LEO applications.
- **Brick Modules** - Isolated DC-DC converters in quarter-brick and half-brick form factors, up to 500 W, digitally controlled, rated to -55°C, available as PCB-mount modules or packaged plug-and-play units, with associated EMI filter modules.
- **SOSA VPX power supplies** - SOSA-aligned VPX power modules and multi-channel VPX power chassis, including AC/DC and DC/DC VPX variants.
- **Power Modules** - Single-phase and true three-phase PFC modules and isolated DC/DC converter modules, from 2.8 kW per module, used as building blocks for AC/DC power supplies and battery chargers.
- **AC/DC power supplies** - Single-phase and three-phase AC/DC power supplies for defence platforms.
- **DC/DC power supplies** - Including armoured fighting vehicle DC/DC power converters and isolated ruggedised and multi-output DC/DC power supplies.
- **Battery chargers** - Single-phase and three-phase AC/DC battery chargers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN/JISQ 9100, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IPC 610 Class 3, ISO/IEC 17025, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

No dated public news items specific to KOLT Power Ltd (the Fareham, UK entity) were found within the last 12 months. The company's public presence in this period is limited to confirmed trade show attendance:

- **2026-05-19** - Exhibiting at AOC Europe 2026, Helsinki, Finland (booth 4g36). [KOLT Power events](https://koltpower.com/events/)

companies.name: Kongsberg Maritime
companies.summary: Norwegian maritime technology company providing navigation, automation, positioning, propulsion and simulation systems for naval, merchant and offshore customers.
companies.body:
# Kongsberg Maritime

> Norwegian maritime technology company providing navigation, automation, positioning, propulsion and simulation systems for naval, merchant and offshore customers.

## What they do

Kongsberg Maritime supplies navigation, positioning, automation, propulsion and integrated bridge systems for vessels across naval, merchant marine, offshore and coastal marine markets, alongside K-Sim maritime simulation solutions for crew and dynamic-positioning training. Until 2026 it operated as the Maritime business area of Kongsberg Gruppen; it completed a demerger and began independent trading on Euronext Oslo (ticker KMAR) on 23 April 2026, majority-owned by the Norwegian state. The company's Naval Systems line covers deck machinery, propulsion and manoeuvring equipment, and integration and handling systems for uncrewed underwater and surface vehicles used by more than 70 navies worldwide. Note: Kongsberg's sonar and autonomous underwater vehicle product lines (HUGIN, HISAS, EM-series echosounders) sit under the separate Kongsberg Discovery business following the 2026 group restructuring, and are not part of Kongsberg Maritime.

## Products and solutions

- **K-Sim Navigation** - high-fidelity bridge and navigation simulation platform for training and equipment test and evaluation.
- **K-Sim DP** - dynamic positioning simulator built on the same technology as Kongsberg's K-Pos DP control systems, for DP operator training.
- **K-Pos** - dynamic positioning control system range, IMO DP Equipment Class 1/2/3 compliant, for remote control of propulsion, thrusters and steering gear.
- **K-Bridge / K-Master** - integrated bridge systems and workstations combining navigation, automation and manoeuvring in a single operator environment.
- **K-Chief** - integrated marine automation system for propulsion, power management and auxiliary system monitoring and control.
- **Naval Systems** - deck machinery, propulsion and manoeuvring equipment, and handling systems (including Mission Bay Handling Systems) for deployment and retrieval of uncrewed underwater and surface vehicles on naval platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO/IEC 27001:2023 (Kongsberg Maritime AS and K-SIM AS).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-23** - Kongsberg Maritime completed its demerger from Kongsberg Gruppen and began independent trading on Euronext Oslo (ticker KMAR), with the Norwegian state retaining a 50.004% stake. [source](https://www.kongsbergmaritime.com/news-and-events/news-archive/2026/kongsberg-maritime-begins-trading-on-oslo-stock-exchange/)
- **2026-03-30** - Kongsberg and Salt Ship Design awarded a contract by the Norwegian Defence Materiel Agency to design up to 28 standardised vessels for the Royal Norwegian Navy and Coast Guard. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2026/03/kongsberg-and-salt-ship-design-to-design-norways-standardized-vessels/)
- **2026-05-06** - Kongsberg Maritime to supply propulsion systems (Promas propeller-rudder systems, steering gear, fin stabilisers) for the US Coast Guard's Offshore Patrol Cutter programme. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2026/05/kongsberg-maritime-to-supply-propulsion-systems-for-uscgs-opc-program/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.kongsbergmaritime.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kongsberg-maritime

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (kongsbergmaritime.com, product and certificate pages), Naval News, World Oil, Cyprus Shipping News, ADS Group members directory. Corporate structure reflects the April 2026 demerger of Kongsberg Maritime from Kongsberg Gruppen; sonar and AUV capability formerly associated with the wider Kongsberg brand now sits with the separate Kongsberg Discovery entity and is not reflected in this page's tags.

companies.body:
# Kraken Robotics Services UK Ltd

> Marine technology company producing advanced underwater sensors, synthetic aperture sonar systems, and robotic platforms for defence and scientific applications.

## What they do

Kraken Robotics designs and manufactures ultra-high-resolution Synthetic Aperture Sonar (SAS) systems for seabed imaging, sub-seabed survey tools, and precision 3D LiDAR sensors. They also supply high-performance subsea batteries for autonomous underwater vehicles and remotely operated vehicles, supporting defence, commercial, and scientific operators.

## Products and solutions

- **Synthetic Aperture Sonar (SAS)** - ultra-high-resolution seabed imaging for mine countermeasures and ISR.
- **Sub-seabed survey tools** - precision instruments for sub-surface mapping.
- **3D LiDAR sensors** - precision optical sensing for underwater environments.
- **Subsea battery systems** - high-performance power solutions for AUVs and ROVs.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-07-02** - Kraken Robotics closed its acquisition of Covelya Group (parent of Sonardyne, EIVA, Forcys, Voyis and Chelsea Technologies), expanding its subsea sensor and defence portfolio. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/07/02/3321394/0/en/kraken-robotics-announces-closing-of-strategic-acquisition-of-covelya-group-limited-updated-2026-guidance-and-appointments-to-executive-team.html)
- **2026-04-07** - Kraken demonstrated KATFISH synthetic aperture sonar with autonomous launch and recovery from a Turkish SEFINE uncrewed surface vessel, live-streaming seabed imagery to an onshore command centre. [source](https://www.krakenrobotics.com/news-releases/kraken-robotics-demonstrates-katfish-autonomous-launch-and-recovery-from-sefine-usv/)
- **2026-03-17** - Kraken announced CA$24 million in new defence-related orders. [source](https://www.krakenrobotics.com/news-releases/kraken-robotics-announces-24-million-in-defence-orders/)

# Kraken Technology Group

> UK builder of high-speed boats and low-cost, open-architecture uncrewed surface vessels.

## What they do

Kraken Technology Group is a UK company applying precision design and advanced engineering to the performance marine market, with a focus on uncrewed surface vessels. It develops cost-effective, open-architecture USVs for surveillance, force protection and multi-domain operations. The company is based in Fareham, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **K3 Scout** - high-performance, low-cost uncrewed surface vessel with a fully modular payload bay, adaptable for reconnaissance, communications relay, electronic warfare, decoy, logistics or strike tasks. The 8.4 m composite hull can reach around 55 knots with a stated range of 650 nautical miles at 25 knots.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

[source](https://www.nif.fund/news/nato-innovation-fund-invests-in-kraken-technology-group-to-expand-the-alliances-autonomous-maritime-capabilities/)

# KRG Specialist Engineering Services Ltd

> Precision CNC machining and engineering manufacturer serving aerospace, defence, and marine sectors.

## What they do

KRG Specialist Engineering Services delivers precision machining, including 5-axis CNC milling and turning, alongside arc and specialist welding for clients in aerospace, defence, oil and gas, marine, and renewables. They offer asset new build and lifecycle solutions from their Coatbridge facility, providing an integrated manufacturing service from first article through to ongoing production.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC machining (5-axis)** - precision milled and turned components for aerospace and defence programmes.
- **Welding services** - arc and specialist welding for structural and platform components.
- **Lifecycle engineering** - new build and in-service maintenance manufacturing solutions.
- **Refurbishment and upgrade** - aftermarket maintenance, refurbishment, repair and certification of critical assets.
- **Special purpose manufacture** - precision-engineered custom machinery and automation.
- **Non-destructive testing (NDT)** - inspection for component integrity, performance and safety.
- **CMM and quality management** - precision quality assurance using CMM inspection and traceable processes.
- **Surface treatments** - coating solutions applied by NORSOK-trained, NACE-certified specialists.
- **Assembly and testing** - precision assembly with FAT, SIT and high-pressure testing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

KRG's Coatbridge workforce and operations continue under the Torishima Group. [Torishima announcement](https://torishima.co.uk/torishima-service-solutions-europe-ltd-acquirekrg-specialist-engineering-services) / [Machinery.co.uk coverage](https://www.machinery.co.uk/content/news/torishima-acquires-scottish-manufacturer-krg-specialist-engineering)

companies.summary: AIM-listed developer of radiation and biological threat detection technology based on cadmium zinc telluride sensors.
companies.body:
# Kromek Group plc

> AIM-listed developer of radiation and biological threat detection technology based on cadmium zinc telluride sensors.

## What they do

Kromek Group supplies and develops radiation detection solutions based on cadmium zinc telluride (CZT) and other materials, for the medical imaging, civil nuclear, security screening and homeland security markets. It also works with OEMs, governments and other agencies to design and build new solutions. The company is headquartered at NETPark in Sedgefield, County Durham, and operates across two continents.

## Products and solutions

- **D3S** - handheld radioisotope identification devices for CBRN detection, including the D3S ID and personal radiation detector variants.
- **D5 RIID** - high-accuracy, ruggedised handheld radioisotope identifier.
- **AARM** - autonomous airborne radiation monitoring system for UAV-based survey.
- **Biological threat detection** - bio-security detection products developed for government and defence customers.
- **CZT gamma detectors** - detectors and modules for SPECT medical imaging and advanced imaging applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Other:** Listed on the London Stock Exchange AIM market (ticker KMK). Registered on the UK Government's Radiological Nuclear Detection Framework since 2024.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-27** - Kromek's CEO spoke to LBC on the 40th anniversary of the Chernobyl disaster, discussing radiation detection expertise. [source](https://www.kromek.com/news/kromeks-ceo-arnab-basu-speaks-to-lbc-about-the-40th-anniversary-of-the-chernobyl-disaster/)
- **2026-03-10** - Kromek and Argon Electronics developed a training simulator for the D5 RIID handheld radioisotope identifier. [source](https://www.kromek.com/news/d5-riid-training-simulator/)

companies.name: Kvertus
companies.summary: Ukrainian developer and manufacturer of electronic warfare, SIGINT and counter-UAS systems.
companies.body:
# Kvertus

> Ukrainian developer and manufacturer of electronic warfare, SIGINT and counter-UAS systems.

## What they do

Kvertus is a Ukrainian product company specialising in the development and manufacture of signals intelligence and electronic warfare systems designed for UAV detection and suppression. Its products are in service with the Ministry of Defence of Ukraine and are codified to NATO standards. Since the start of the full-scale invasion the company has manufactured over 20,000 EW units deployed across the Ukrainian Defence Forces.

## Products and solutions

- **Atlas** - integrated SIGINT and electronic warfare complex; detects fixed-wing UAVs to around 115 km and neutralises targets to around 30 km. Basis of the "anti-drone wall" concept developed with Brave1.
- **AD Berserk** - mobile EW system on a ground robotic platform; entered serial production July 2025.
- **AD Cerberus** - modular vehicle-mounted EW system protecting vehicles from radio-controlled UAVs.
- **AD Counter FPV** - single-band FPV-drone jammers, including a backpack variant.
- **AD G-6+** - handheld anti-drone jamming gun.
- **MS Azimuth and Aero Azimuth** - electronic intelligence systems locating enemy drone crews, including an airborne variant.
- **LTEJ Mirage** - next-generation EW system presented May 2025.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** products codified to NATO standards and in service with the Ukrainian Ministry of Defence.
- **Memberships:** National Defence Industry Association of Ukraine (NAUDI).

## Recent news

- **2025-07-28** - New AD Berserk robotic EW platform enters production. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/07/25/ukrainian-firm-robotic-vehicle/)
- **2025-07-10** - Atlas system linking thousands of EW units against drones unveiled. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/07/10/ukraine-system-ew-drones/)

## Links

- Website: https://kvertus.ua/en/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kvertus

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (kvertus.ua, kvertus.com), LinkedIn company page, Wikipedia, The Defense Post, The Defender, TechUkraine.

KX develops KX Streaming Analytics, a high-performance platform built on the kdb+ time-series database, capable of ingesting and processing data at extreme speed from multiple sources and formats. companies.body:
# KYOCERA AVX Components Ltd

> International manufacturer of advanced electronic components for aerospace, defence and high-reliability applications.

## What they do

KYOCERA AVX designs and manufactures a broad portfolio of electronic components, including capacitors, inductors, filters, resistors, sensors, interconnects and antenna solutions, with a focus on high-reliability products for demanding environments. The company operates 33 research, design, manufacturing and customer support facilities across 16 countries, with its UK office in Frimley, Surrey.

## Products and solutions

- **Capacitors and inductors** - passive components for high-reliability and aerospace-qualified assemblies.
- **Sensors and transducers** - position, speed, temperature and pressure sensing components, including NTC temperature sensors, Hall angle sensors and pressure sensors, for automotive, industrial and specialist applications.
- **Connectors and interconnects** - interface solutions for ruggedised and high-reliability platforms.
- **Antenna solutions** - antenna and RF connectivity products for communications and navigation.
- **RF/microwave components** - capacitors, couplers, filters, inductors and resistive products for high-frequency, aerospace, defence, radar and satcom applications.
- **MIL-spec and DLA components** - ceramic capacitors, tantalum capacitors, RF/microwave capacitors and inductors, and EMI filters built to MIL-SPEC and DLA Qualified Products Database requirements, including the MIL-PRF-32535 BME NP0 MLCC series.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO/TS 16949

## Recent news

- **2026-06-08** - Exhibited at IMS 2026 (Boston), showcasing RF/microwave capacitors, couplers, filters, antennas and inductors for aerospace, defence, radar and satcom applications, including the expanded 550/560 Series ultra-broadband capacitors. [KYOCERA AVX](https://www.kyocera-avx.com/news/ims-2026/)
- **2026-04-27** - Presented and exhibited at CMSE 2026 (Los Angeles), covering MLCC product grades and low-inductance bulk capacitors, and showcasing high-reliability passive components for military, aerospace and space applications, including the expanded MIL-PRF-32535 BME NP0 MLCC series listed on the DLA Qualified Products Database. [KYOCERA AVX](https://www.kyocera-avx.com/news/cmse-2026/)
- **2026-03** - Began mass production of differential clock crystal oscillators with industry-leading 30 fs phase jitter. [KYOCERA AVX](https://www.kyocera-avx.com/news/ims-2026/)
- **2026-03-22** - Exhibited at APEC 2026 (San Antonio), showcasing varistors, capacitors and connectors for high-power and high-efficiency performance in military and aerospace applications, among others. [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/kyocera-avx-showcases-power-electronics-components-at-apec-2026-302722952.html)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kavxcorp

> Engineering and R&D services firm with a dedicated aerospace and defence practice, delivering digital engineering and system integration for defence manufacturers.

## What they do

L&T Technology Services (LTTS) is a listed subsidiary of Larsen & Toubro Limited, focused on engineering research and development (ER&D) services across the product and process development lifecycle. The company maintains dedicated aerospace and defence engineering design centres, including sites in Rockford, Illinois, and Toulouse, France, alongside its India base, providing digital engineering, systems engineering, software engineering and test engineering services to global aerospace and defence manufacturers. Its aerospace and defence offering spans aero engines, aerostructures and systems, avionics and air traffic management work, covering design, manufacturing and aftermarket phases of the aircraft lifecycle. LTTS states its aerospace practice holds ITAR compliance and certified facilities supporting this customer base.

# L7 Simulators

> Ukrainian developer of laser- and VR-based combat training simulators for military forces.

## What they do

Since 2019 L7 has built combat training simulators for the Armed Forces of Ukraine, the National Guard of Ukraine and other security forces. The company develops the full simulator development cycle, from concept and software through to physical modelling of combat scenarios. Using laser and VR technologies it simulates a range of combat scenarios in mobile, compact systems deployable at unit locations. The brand was renamed from PSS by Logics7 to L7 Simulators in June 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **UNITS ecosystem** - combat training platform with 50+ modules simulating weapons in service, supporting individual and multi-group training across small arms, grenade launchers, MANPADS and anti-tank weapons.
- **LT Laser Simulator** - laser-based live firing simulator.
- **Complex UNITS VR** - VR training complex.
- **Vartovyi (Watchmen)** - training simulator for interceptor drone crews; interface mimics standard ground control stations.
- **Dronobii and Dvobiy** - FPV drone shooting and training simulators.
- **Citadele** - multimedia classroom training system.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.summary: UK-founded, veteran-led defence technology company building digital verification and workforce coordination infrastructure for contested and limited-access environments.
companies.body:
# Labrys Technologies Ltd

> UK-founded, veteran-led defence technology company building digital verification and workforce coordination infrastructure for contested and limited-access environments.

## What they do

Labrys Technologies is a UK-founded defence technology company, founded in 2020 by veterans of the Royal Marines and British Army, building digital verification infrastructure for contested and limited-access environments. Its Axiom platform cryptographically verifies users and media at the point of capture, coordinates distributed teams across languages and geographies, and enables secure payments where traditional infrastructure cannot reach. Labrys offers both a managed service, where it uses Axiom and its own global access to run client programmes, and a Software as a Service offering, where clients run their own teams and programmes on the platform. Its customer base spans defence and national security, other government departments, the humanitarian and international development sector, and commercial clients, and it states operational deployment validated in defence and government contexts, including work with NATO nations.

## Products and solutions

- **Axiom** - mobile-first platform providing cryptographic verification of users and media, distributed team coordination, and secure payments for organisations operating in contested or limited-access environments.
- **Axiom for Protection** - security and risk use case of the Axiom platform.
- **Axiom for Impact** - humanitarian and development use case of the Axiom platform.
- **Axiom for Understanding** - government use case of the Axiom platform.
- **Program Delivery, powered by Axiom** - managed service using Axiom and Labrys's own global access to run client programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud, Commercial X (stated as procurement-ready)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Backing:** venture-backed by Plural and Albion VC; raised a $20m Series A in 2025

## Recent news

- **2025-06** - Raises $20m Series A to scale its defence-grade workforce coordination platform. [source](https://tech.eu/2025/06/03/labrys-raises-20m-for-humanitarian-and-security-operations-software/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.labrysgroup.org
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/labrys-group

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (labrys.tech), ADS members directory (snapshot 2026-05-15), TechCrunch, Tech.eu, Plural.

# Landguard Systems Limited

> Designer and manufacturer of bespoke ISTAR radio systems and software defined radios for government, defence and law enforcement customers.

## What they do

Landguard Systems designs and manufactures custom radio systems that enable government, defence and law enforcement customers to track, locate and protect operational assets. The company describes its offer as intelligence, surveillance, target acquisition and reconnaissance (ISTAR) radio systems, alongside software defined radios (SDRs) built to open industry frameworks. It is based in Fareham, Hampshire, with a US subsidiary, Landguard Systems Inc, in Clearwater, Florida. Landguard became part of Chemring Group in 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **ISTAR radio systems** - custom radio systems providing tracking and locating capability across satellite, cellular and RF networks for government, defence and law enforcement customers.
- **Software defined radios (SDR)** - small size, low power SDRs built to open source frameworks such as OpenCPI and OpenVPX.
- **Support services** - after-sales support, 24/7 operational assistance and training.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Leonardo S.p.A.

> Italian aerospace, defence and security prime with a large UK presence across helicopters and defence electronics.

## What they do

Leonardo is an Italian multinational specialising in aerospace, defence and security, headquartered in Rome and operating across some 180 sites worldwide. It designs, builds and supports military and civil helicopters, defence electronics, sensors, cyber and security systems, and works across the air, land, sea, space and cyber domains. The company is listed on the Borsa Italiana. In the UK it is one of the largest suppliers of defence and security equipment to the Ministry of Defence, with the British arm Leonardo UK Ltd headquartered at 1 Eagle Place, London, and major sites at Yeovil, Edinburgh and Luton.

## Products and solutions

- **Helicopters** - design, manufacture and support of military and civil rotorcraft at Yeovil, including the AW149, AW159 Wildcat and AW101 Merlin.
- **Defence electronics** - airborne, land and naval sensors, radars, electronic warfare and electro-optic systems; the UK business is a leading manufacturer of sensors and electronic systems for advanced aircraft.
- **Cyber and security** - secure communications, cyber resilience and security solutions.
- **Counter-drone and laser systems** - counter-UAS technology, military communications, lasers, satellite communications and navigation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-23** - The UK Ministry of Defence signed a contract worth around 1 billion pounds for the New Medium Helicopter, under which Leonardo will build and deliver 23 AW149 helicopters at Yeovil, sustaining around 3,300 jobs at the site. [source](https://aviationweek.com/defense/aircraft-propulsion/uk-leonardo-sign-new-medium-helicopter-contract)
- **2026-02-25** - Reporting confirmed the UK was set to finalise the long-awaited Leonardo helicopter factory contract after government funding delays. [source](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-25/uk-set-to-announce-leonardo-helicopter-contract-in-coming-days)

## Links

- Website: https://www.leonardo.com/en/home
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/leonardo_company

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (leonardo.com, uk.leonardo.com, electronics.leonardo.com, cybersecurity.leonardo.com), LinkedIn company page, Aviation Week, Bloomberg, Forces News. Companies House (Leonardo UK Ltd, company number 02426132, incorporated 25 September 1989; registered office 1 Eagle Place, St James's, London SW1Y 6AF). Global HQ Rome, Italy; formed 1948 (origins as Finmeccanica, renamed Leonardo in 2016); listed on Borsa Italiana. Global headcount approximately 60,000 per public figures; UK headcount around 8,400.

companies.name: Lightmark Technologies
companies.summary: UK deep-tech startup building capture-layer authentication for visual media, using optical fingerprinting to prove provenance at the moment of recording.
companies.body:
# Lightmark Technologies
> UK deep-tech startup building capture-layer authentication for visual media, using optical fingerprinting to prove provenance at the moment of recording.
## What they do
Lightmark Technologies develops capture-layer content authentication. The technology embeds verifiable optical fingerprints into a lit environment using controlled light modulation, so cameras present record an invisible authenticity signal at the moment of capture. Verification is binary: the optical signature is either present or absent. This approach sits earlier in the content lifecycle than detection, watermarking, or C2PA metadata, all of which act after the file exists. Dual-use applications are in development with Bifrost Defence. Lightmark is the flagship deep-tech initiative within GIF Solutions LTD, which has traded since 2020. A patent is pending.
## Products and solutions
- **Optical fingerprinting** - Light-modulation system embedding authenticity signals into video and imagery at the moment of capture.
- **Verification infrastructure** - Real-time decoding and verification of captured optical signals.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

No frameworks, accreditations or memberships publicly listed.

## Recent news

- **2026** - Lightmark reported raising development funding from Bifrost Defence, a Copenhagen-based defence venture studio, alongside a wider seed round, with stated use cases spanning broadcast piracy, defence and intelligence, public-sector authenticity and studio IP protection. [Televisual](https://www.televisual.com/news/fingerprint-of-light-tech-developed-for-media-authenticity/)
- **2025-05** - UK patent application filed covering 15 core claims for the light-modulation authentication method, with international PCT filings in progress.

## Links

- Website: https://lightmark-technologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/lightmarktechnologies/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. [Lightmark](https://lightmark-technologies.com/), [Televisual](https://www.televisual.com/news/fingerprint-of-light-tech-developed-for-media-authenticity/), [TechRadar](https://www.techradar.com/pro/the-end-of-deepfakes-a-uk-startup-fingerprinting-light-to-prove-whats-real-could-crush-global-misinformation-and-usd75-billion-video-piracy-market).

companies.summary: Developer of hyperspectral cameras targeting defence, security and commercial sensing applications.
companies.body:
# Living Optics

> Developer of hyperspectral cameras targeting defence, security and commercial sensing applications.

## What they do

Living Optics develops hyperspectral imaging cameras that capture the full colour spectrum, not just red, green and blue, at every pixel, revealing material and environmental information invisible to conventional cameras or the human eye. Its core product captures 96 spectral bands across 440 to 900 nanometres alongside a 5-megapixel RGB image at video frame rate. The company states target markets spanning food, healthcare, agriculture and general industry alongside security and national security, where it positions the camera for tactical decision-making, anomaly and camouflage detection, and next-generation surveillance.

## Products and solutions

- **Living Optics Camera** - the core snapshot hyperspectral sensor, capturing spatial and spectral data simultaneously at video frame rates.
- **Camera Kit** - the camera plus interface card and cables, for customers supplying their own edge-compute hardware.
- **Development Kit** - the camera bundled with an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin edge-compute platform, preloaded software and SDK, described by the company as sufficient to build production-grade applications from day one.
- **Living Optics Software / SDK** - a software suite for camera control, data acquisition, visualisation and analysis, with a developer API.

The company's security market page states the camera includes local compute capable of computer vision inference at the network edge, framed for tactical use, and describes applications including camouflage and low-observable material detection and target identification, tracking and reacquisition.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-07-13** - Partnered with AVerMedia Technologies to bundle the hyperspectral camera with AVerMedia edge-AI compute hardware, demonstrated at COMPUTEX 2025. [source](https://www.livingoptics.com/living-optics-and-avermedia-team-up-to-deliver-smarter-vision-at-the-edge/)
- **2025-04-16** - Presented at SPIE Defense + Commercial Sensing 2025 on real-time camouflage and uniform detection, and on snapshot hyperspectral video for ground reconnaissance and autonomous navigation. [source](https://www.livingoptics.com/we-will-be-at-spie-defense-commercial-sensing-2025/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.livingoptics.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/livingoptics/

## Sources

companies.body:
# Lobster Robotics

> Dutch developer of autonomous underwater drones that produce high-resolution optical maps of the seabed.

## What they do

Lobster Robotics designs, manufactures and operates fully integrated autonomous underwater drones. A TU Delft spin-out based at RoboHouse in Delft, the company specialises in automated subsea photogrammetry, combining large numbers of seabed photographs into a single high-resolution, georeferenced optical map, an approach distinct from sonar-based survey. It both sells and rents its platforms and runs them as a survey and inspection service for offshore wind, cable and pipeline, scientific and defence customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Scout** - autonomous underwater vehicle that combines manual control with autonomy, operating in murky water, over uneven terrain and in strong currents at depths from around 2 m to 300 m, producing sharp georeferenced optical models of the seabed.
- **Scout 3** - latest generation, unveiled in 2025, surveying large areas per hour at high resolution from a small deployment footprint.
- **Militarised Scout variant** - a defence-specific version under development for the Royal Netherlands Navy to detect, identify and classify seabed objects, mine-like threats and damage to underwater infrastructure.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** NATO DIANA (Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic) cohort company; participant in NATO seabed-security experimentation through the Seabed Security Experimentation Centre (SeaSEC).

## Recent news

- **2025-07-01** - Dutch Ministry of Defence selected Lobster Robotics to develop a next-generation seabed drone for the Royal Netherlands Navy. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/07/01/dutch-lobster-robotics-seabed-drone/)
- **2025-06-24** - Dutch MoD announced the imminent release of a military-grade version of the Scout underwater drone. [source](https://english.defensie.nl/latest/news/2025/06/24/imminent-release-of-a-military-grade-version-of-underwater-drone-scout)

## Links

- Website: https://www.lobster-robotics.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/lobster-robotics

## Sources
