companies.name: Lockheed Martin Corporation
companies.summary: Global US aerospace and defence prime spanning air, space, missiles and rotary systems, with established UK operations.
companies.body:
# Lockheed Martin Corporation

> Global US aerospace and defence prime spanning air, space, missiles and rotary systems, with established UK operations.

## What they do

Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace, defence, arms, security and advanced technologies company, formed in 1995 from the merger of Lockheed Corporation and Martin Marietta. It develops and manufactures combat aircraft, missiles and fire control systems, space and satellite systems, rotary and mission systems, and is one of the largest contractors to the US federal government. It is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker LMT, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland. UK operations run through Lockheed Martin UK Limited, headquartered in London with around 30 sites across the country, including a major facility at Ampthill, Bedfordshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Aeronautics** - combat and military aircraft, including the F-35 Lightning II Joint Strike Fighter.
- **Missiles and Fire Control** - air and missile defence, tactical missiles, fire control and sensor systems; the UK Ampthill site supports land systems and fire control.
- **Rotary and Mission Systems** - rotary-wing aircraft, naval and radar systems, training and logistics.
- **Space** - military and civil space and launch systems; supports the UK Trident strategic missile programme and operates a UK space technology office at Harwell.
- **UK programmes** - delivery of the Trident strategic missile, F-35 work and participation in the Military Flying Training System through the ASCENT team.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member (Lockheed Martin UK).

## Recent news

- **2026-06-24** - Awarded a multiyear contract reported at around 35 billion dollars for the THAAD missile defence system, among the first major deals under the US Acquisition Transformation Strategy. [source](https://aviationa2z.com/index.php/2026/06/25/lockheed-wins-new-35-billion-contract-for-thaad/)
- **2026-05-31** - Awarded more than 1 billion dollars in military contracts in late May, including an F-35 armaments order. [source](https://fortworthreport.org/2026/05/31/lockheed-martin-awarded-1b-in-military-contracts-as-iran-war-leads-to-buildup/)
- **2026-05-19** - Secured a 991 million dollar contract for F-35 Block 4 upgrade kits manufactured at Fort Worth. [source](https://www.overtdefense.com/2026/05/19/lockheed-martin-secures-991-million-contract-for-f-35-upgrades/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.lockheedmartin.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/lockheed-martin

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (lockheedmartin.com and lockheedmartin.com/en-gb), LinkedIn company page, ADS Group members directory, Aviation A2Z, Fort Worth Report, Overt Defense. Companies House (Lockheed Martin UK Limited, company number 02372738, incorporated 17 April 1989; registered office Building 7000, Langstone Park, Langstone, Havant, Hampshire PO9 1SW). Global HQ Bethesda, Maryland; formed 1995 from the merger of Lockheed and Martin Marietta; NYSE ticker LMT. Global headcount approximately 120,000 per public figures.

companies.name: Lodestar Space Ltd
companies.summary: Developer of integrated hardware and software for on-orbit servicing, inspection and repair of space assets with national security applications.
companies.body:
# Lodestar Space Ltd

> Developer of integrated hardware and software for on-orbit servicing, inspection and repair of space assets with national security applications.

## What they do

Lodestar Space is developing a hardware and software suite to provide physical and dexterous manipulation capability in orbit, enabling the protection, inspection and repair of space assets. The company frames its work around safeguarding national security today and enabling large-scale in-orbit construction in future. Its public positioning centres on UK and allied defence use cases, including space domain awareness and protect-and-defend missions for high-value satellites, alongside a secondary ambition to serve commercial in-orbit servicing, assembly and manufacturing missions.

## Products and solutions

- **Robotic arm** - a modular, dexterous robotic arm for contact-dependent operations in orbit such as inspection, capture and repair, designed to be platform-agnostic with swappable end-effectors.
- **Mithril** - described by the company as a fully autonomous, AI-powered on-orbit payload that detects, classifies and responds to other spacecraft in orbit, combining machine-vision sensors, LiDAR and an edge-compute platform to assess objects and support docking or servicing without human intervention.
- **In-orbit servicing, assembly and manufacturing (IOSM) testbed** - a ground-based facility at the company's London site used to test vision and sensing systems under simulated in-orbit visual conditions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, UKspace (startup member)
- **Programmes:** UK Space Agency grant for a platform-agnostic modular robotic arm; UK Space Agency Space Ecosystem Commercialisation Programme (SECP) Sprint R&D grant for LiDAR integration ("ECLIPSE"); UK Space Agency International Bilateral Fund award for a UK-US project with University College London and Impulse Space; selected for the SoCal-UK Space Accelerator (2024 cohort)

## Recent news

- **2025-07-24** - Announced plans to fly the first iteration of Mithril as a hosted payload on a commercial rideshare mission, expected in early 2026. [source](https://payloadspace.com/lodestar-is-building-an-in-space-bodyguard/)
- **2025-10-02** - Awarded a UK Space Agency International Bilateral Fund grant for a trilateral UK-US project with University College London and Impulse Space to demonstrate the Mithril avionics stack on Impulse's Mira spacecraft. [source](https://www.impulsespace.com/updates/lodestar-space-secures-uk-space-agency-backing-for-ground-demonstration-aboard-impulses-mira-spacecraft)
- **2025-11-25** - Secured a Space Ecosystem Commercialisation Programme Sprint R&D grant to integrate a new LiDAR sensor into Mithril's sensing suite, with flight demonstrations planned for 2026. [source](https://www.spacesouthcentral.com/news/lodestar-space-secures-secp-funding-to-advance-ai-driven-satellite-awareness-technology)

## Links

- Website: https://lodestar.space/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/lodestarspace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (lodestar.space), Companies House (14473705), LinkedIn company page, ADS Group members directory, UKspace, Payload, Impulse Space, Space South Central. ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15).

companies.name: Logically
companies.summary: AI company providing narrative and threat intelligence to detect and counter mis- and disinformation for government, defence and enterprise.
companies.body:
# Logically

> AI company providing narrative and threat intelligence to detect and counter mis- and disinformation for government, defence and enterprise.

> [!warning] Status
> The original UK legal entity (THELOGICALLY LTD, Companies House 10850644) entered administration on 2025-06-27. Its assets, brand and core technology were sold in a pre-pack administration deal to Kreatur Ltd in July 2025, preserving around 50 roles. The Logically brand continues to trade under the new owner.

## What they do

Logically provides narrative decision intelligence for government and enterprise. It combines AI with human analysis to monitor the online information environment, detect and cluster harmful narratives and disinformation, and deliver alerts, reporting and decision support. The platform is positioned for national security, defence, public safety and government missions, with enterprise risk and communications use cases second.

## Products and solutions

- **Logically Intelligence** - threat-detection platform that monitors public and open-source information, uses machine learning to assess source and content credibility, detects propaganda, and clusters emerging narratives with alerts and reporting.
- **PRISM** - scoped intelligence system offering simulation, action support and integration with customer workflows for missions beyond standard monitoring.

## Recent news

- **2025-07-04** - Assets, brand and core technology sold in a pre-pack administration deal to Kreatur Ltd, preserving around 50 roles. [source](https://www.uktech.news/ai/ai-fact-checker-logically-sold-off-in-administration-deal-20250707)
- **2025-06-27** - THELOGICALLY LTD enters administration. [source](https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/10850644/insolvency)
- **2025-03-12** - Partners with Databricks to forecast online narrative risk for governments and enterprises. [source](https://www.databricks.com/customers/logically)

## Links

- Website: https://logically.ai/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/logicallyai

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (10850644 including insolvency record), Wikipedia, Sifted, UKTN, BusinessCloud, Databricks customer page.

# Loki Dynamics Ltd

> UK marine equipment and consultancy specialist supplying shock-mitigating seating, propulsion and crew wellbeing solutions, with a defence and commercial vessel customer base.

## What they do

Loki Dynamics is a UK marine equipment and consultancy company organised around four product areas: marine products and consultancy, shock-mitigating seating, engines and drives, and crew wellbeing technology. Its shock and vibration control seating is used to protect crews and equipment aboard commercial, defence and leisure vessels operating in demanding sea states. The company also acts as a UK sales and consultancy partner for allied marine technology suppliers.

## Products and solutions

- **SHOCK-WBV seat bases** - a shock and whole-body-vibration seat suspension system, designed and manufactured in the UK, reducing wave shock and providing lateral stability for crew comfort and endurance on commercial and defence craft.
- **OMEGA cushion insert** - a patented, modular cushion insert reducing shock and vibration exposure, integrated into cushions across marine and land-based applications.
- **Engines and drives** - hybrid-ready diesel and electric propulsion solutions for commercial, defence and leisure vessels, delivered with partner powertrain manufacturers.
- **SPIIND Defence & Maritime VR** - a wellbeing technology offering drug-free relief from seasickness, intended to support crew focus and performance at sea.
- **Marine consultancy** - advisory support for boatbuilders, operators and OEM partners on integrating marine technology and optimising vessel performance.

## Links

Lone Star Analysis Ltd is the UK subsidiary of Lone Star Analysis, a provider of predictive and prescriptive analytics and guided artificial intelligence (branded Evolved AI) for decision-making under uncertainty. The company states its European client base includes the UK Ministry of Defence, the Norwegian Ministry of Defence, defence prime contractors and major offshore operators, and that its technology supports fleet readiness and availability analysis for military aircraft operators. Founded in the US in 2004, the company applies its analytics to operational and financial performance challenges across defence, aerospace, energy, logistics and healthcare.

# LPE Ltd

> Belfast-based additive manufacturing and rapid prototyping specialist with over 30 years' experience serving aerospace and defence manufacturers.

## What they do

LPE is the UK and Ireland's longest-established 3D printing partner, operating from a 25,000 sq ft facility in Belfast with more than 20 machines and 45 materials including plastics, rubbers, metals and specialist-grade materials. The company serves aerospace and defence manufacturers across rapid prototyping and low-volume production, applying processes including stereolithography, selective laser sintering, digital light processing and direct metal laser sintering.

## Products and solutions

- **Stereolithography (SLA)** - High-accuracy photopolymer prototyping for complex geometries.
- **Selective Laser Sintering (SLS)** - Nylon and engineering-grade polymer parts for functional testing.
- **Direct Metal Laser Sintering (DMLS)** - Metal additive manufacturing in aluminium, steel, titanium and Inconel alloys.
- **Hybrid Photosynthesis (HPS)** - LPE states it was the first 3D printing service in the UK and Ireland to offer the HPS process.
- **CNC Machining** - 5- and 6-axis milling for precision metal components.
- **Surface finishing** - Electroplating, electropolishing, abrasive blasting and polishing services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, AS/EN/JISQ 9100 (AS9100), ISO 13485, Cyber Essentials Plus

companies.body:
# M Subs Ltd

> Independent company specialising in manned and unmanned submarines and underwater vehicles for defence, research, and commercial survey applications.

## What they do

M Subs Ltd designs, manufactures and operates manned and unmanned submersibles for military and commercial markets, operating from Plymouth alongside its sister company Submergence Group. The company states it has designed, built and operated specialised submersibles supporting diver lock-out and long-endurance operations since 1986. Its unmanned underwater vehicle (UUV) hull designs are derived from its manned submersible designs, so most systems and components sit within the pressure hull, allowing the vehicles to be maintained and replenished without recovery. UUVs can be operated manned or unmanned using Submergence Group's SUBNAVSYS integrated bridge system.

## Products and solutions

- **Manned submersibles** - crewed submersible platforms supporting diver lock-out and long-endurance scientific research and military operations.
- **Unmanned underwater vehicles (UUVs)** - UUV platforms sharing hull and system design with the company's manned submersibles, operable manned or unmanned.
- **Extra Large Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (XLAUV)** - the company states it delivered the UK Royal Navy's XLAUV under the Cetus programme, launched at its Plymouth site.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Machina Engineering Ltd

> Automated CNC precision machining company producing high-tolerance 5-axis components for critical industries including aerospace and defence, operating lights-out 24/7 from its North Yorkshire facility.

## What they do

Machina Engineering, based in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, specialises in high-tolerance simultaneous 5-axis CNC machining for critical industries including defence and aerospace. The company uses automated Hermle pallet-pool machining centres to run 24/7 unattended production, and machines materials including titanium, Inconel alloys and ceramic matrix composites. It states it is working towards EN9100:2018 (AS9100) certification with BSI.

## Products and solutions

- **5-axis simultaneous CNC machining** - components up to 850mm x 850mm, with stated machine positional accuracy of 6 microns.
- **Hermle C400 (HS Flex) machining centre** - automated pallet-pool machine with an 18,000rpm spindle, supporting unattended lights-out production.
- **Precision tool pre-setting** - a ZOLLER Redomatic 400 pre-setter combined with automatic stick-out measurement and induction heat-shrinking.
- **CAM programming** - toolpath generation and collision checking using hyperMILL CAM software.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 and EN9100 (AS9100), both stated as in progress with BSI, not yet achieved.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Links

# MacLennan Associates

> Programme, project and business change management consultancy serving the UK defence and security sectors.

## What they do

MacLennan Associates delivers programme management, project management and business change consulting to clients in the defence and security sectors. The firm operates across complex, demanding environments and states its specialisms as programme management, business change (including benefits management), project management, cyber security advisory, strategic sourcing and procurement, supply chain and logistics, and through-life capability management.

## Products and solutions

- **Programme and project management** - management of complex defence and security programmes, including transition from programme delivery to business-as-usual.
- **Business change management** - business realignment and benefits management support.
- **Cyber security advisory** - described by the company as protecting the business rather than just information technology, covering procedural recommendations and supplier and partner assurance.
- **Strategic sourcing and procurement** - category management and supply chain and logistics support.
- **Through-life capability management** - support across the capability lifecycle for defence and security clients.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, BCS (The Chartered Institute for IT), IPSE.

## Links

- Website: https://www.maclennanassociates.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. MacLennan Associates website (maclennanassociates.com), ADS Group members directory, Companies House (company 06565177).

# MacTaggart Scott

> Scottish naval engineering company making mechanical handling and motion systems for submarines and ships.

## What they do

MacTaggart, Scott & Company is a privately owned Scottish engineering company, founded in 1898 and based in Loanhead near Edinburgh. It specialises in naval mechanical handling equipment, designing and manufacturing systems for surface ships and submarines for navies worldwide. The company supports demanding maritime environments with a long-standing reputation for quality and reliability.

## Products and solutions

- **Aircraft elevators and lifts** - deck lifts for aircraft carriers and ships.
- **Helicopter handling systems** - flight-deck handling and traversing gear.
- **Arresting gear** - a dedicated naval product line.
- **Submarine mast systems** - hoistable and mast-raising systems, including the Quiet Modular Mast.
- **Towed-array handling systems** and **emergency propulsion units** for submarines.
- **Hydraulic power units, pumps and actuators** for surface ships and submarines.

companies.name: Maersk Logistics & Services UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK entity of the global Maersk logistics group, providing integrated supply chain and logistics solutions to defence and government customers.
companies.body:
# Maersk Logistics & Services UK

> UK entity of the global Maersk logistics group, providing integrated supply chain and logistics solutions to defence and government customers.

## What they do

Maersk Logistics & Services UK is the British arm of A.P. Moller-Maersk, delivering integrated logistics across ocean, land, air, customs and port services. The company has a dedicated Government and Defence business development function and holds ITAR approval alongside ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001 and Cyber Essentials Plus certifications, positioning it for work across defence supply chains and government logistics contracts. The wider Maersk group also operates a customised government and defence transportation programme, including chartered logistics support for defence and public sector customers and status as a Civil Reserve Air Fleet partner in the United States.

## Products and solutions

- **Government and defence logistics services** - customised transport and logistics support for government and defence customers, spanning ocean, land, air, customs and port services.
- **Contract logistics and warehousing** - UK contract logistics base at the East Midlands Gateway, Derby, supporting warehousing and distribution.
- **Time-definite shipping services** - scheduled express and standard freight services for time-critical consignments.
- **Customs brokerage** - clearance and compliance services liaising with relevant government agencies.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Armed Forces Covenant signatory (signed 2016).
- **Accreditations:** JOSCAR, ITAR, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001:2022, Cyber Essentials Plus.

## Recent news

[source](https://www.gov.uk/armed-forces-covenant-businesses/maersk-logistics-and-services-uk-ltd)

companies.name: Magdrive Ltd
companies.summary: UK space propulsion company developing high-thrust, high-efficiency plasma thrusters for satellite servicing and orbital operations.
companies.body:
# Magdrive

> UK space propulsion company developing high-thrust, high-efficiency plasma thrusters for satellite servicing and orbital operations.

## What they do

Magdrive is developing next-generation spacecraft propulsion systems based at Harwell Campus, Oxfordshire. Its thruster technology uses solid metal propellant to deliver higher thrust and efficiency than existing in-space electric propulsion, targeting applications including satellite servicing, orbital assembly, constellation management and interplanetary transport. The company states defence-relevant applications including manoeuvring satellites unpredictably to make them harder to track, and constellation management in increasingly congested low Earth orbit.

## Products and solutions

- **Rogue** - compact high-thrust electric propulsion system for CubeSat-class satellites, stated thrust range 0.1 to 10mN and specific impulse of 1,800 to 3,500 seconds.
- **Warlock** - higher-power propulsion variant, stated thrust range 0.1 to 50mN.
- **Paladin** - higher-thrust system described by the company as the next stage in its propulsion line, with a stated maximum thrust above 1N.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials.
- **Programmes:** UK Space Agency National Space Innovation Programme funding; UK Space Agency Space Clusters Infrastructure Fund (DEEP Lab facility at Harwell); European Space Agency Marketplace support; US Space Force Hyperspace Challenge accelerator; Airbus Space Accelerator.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-09** - Magdrive completed its first in-orbit thruster demonstration, named "Going Rogue". [source](https://magdrive.space/news/)
- **2026-02-06** - UK Space Agency confirmed the opening of Magdrive's DEEP Lab (Disruptive Experimental Electric Propulsion Lab) at Harwell Campus. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/uk-space-agency-investment-helps-launch-cutting-edge-electric-propulsion-lab)
- **2025-12-03** - Magdrive received £2 million from the UK Space Agency's National Space Innovation Programme for mass-production readiness of its plasma propulsion system. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/uk-space-agency-invests-17-million-to-drive-next-wave-of-space-innovation)
- **2025-07-18** - Magdrive and Perpetual Atomics signed a memorandum of understanding on nuclear-plasma propulsion, citing defence and security applications as a target area. [source](https://www.electronicsweekly.com/news/business/uk-companies-sign-mou-for-nuclear-plasma-propulsion-in-space-2025-07/)
- **2025-06-20** - Magdrive launched the first flight of its next-generation plasma thruster, backed by the ESA Marketplace and delivered with D-Orbit on a SpaceX rideshare mission. [source](https://www.ukspace.org/magdrive-launches-first-flight-of-next-generation-plasma-thruster/)
- **2025-02-25** - Magdrive raised a $10.5 million seed round led by Redalpine, with Founders Fund and others participating. [source](https://techcrunch.com/2025/02/25/redalpine-founders-fund-back-magdrives-electric-thruster-business/)

## Links

- Website: https://magdrive.space
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/magdrive-ltd
- Careers: https://magdrive.space/careers/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Company website (magdrive.space), ADS members directory, GOV.UK UK Space Agency press releases, TechCrunch, Electronics Weekly, UKspace. Note: some third-party sources give founding year as 2019, others as 2020; 2019 used here per the earlier press coverage.

companies.name: MAIAR Ltd
companies.summary: Agile UK defence SME providing specialist subject matter expertise, systems engineering, and intelligence-as-a-service for MOD intelligence, operations and communications programmes.
companies.body:
# MAIAR

> Agile UK defence SME providing specialist subject matter expertise, systems engineering, and intelligence-as-a-service for MOD intelligence, operations and communications programmes.

## What they do

MAIAR was formed in December 2023 when Level 7 Expertise acquired RJD Technology and the combined business rebranded as MAIAR. It describes itself as an agile SME working primarily in the UK MOD intelligence and research arenas, and with a range of customers and partners across NATO. It provides specialist technical consultancy across intelligence (J2), operations (J3), and communications and information systems (J6), operating in complex and classified environments on high-tempo projects.

## Products and solutions

- **Systems engineering** - lifecycle support covering concept, design, solutions, architectures, test, delivery, assurance and transition, delivered to MOD and other government departments.
- **Intelligence as a Service (IaaS)** - delivery of intelligence outputs in sensitive environments, using military-grade intelligence tools and skills, with a broader all-source offering in development for the unclassified arena.
- **Geospatial and open-source analytics** - delivered in partnership with Ursa Space Systems, combining commercial satellite imagery and data fusion with MAIAR's understanding of UK MOD and NATO requirements.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud / Digital Marketplace registered supplier.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024-03-07** - Partnership announced with Ursa Space Systems to deliver geospatial and open-source analytics for UK MOD. [source](https://www.ursaspace.com)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/maiar-ltd

companies.name: Malloy Aeronautics Ltd
companies.summary: UK designer of all-electric heavy-lift uncrewed aircraft systems for military and commercial logistics.
companies.body:
# Malloy Aeronautics Ltd

> UK designer of all-electric heavy-lift uncrewed aircraft systems for military and commercial logistics.

## What they do

Malloy Aeronautics designs and supplies all-electric uncrewed aircraft systems for civil and military customers. Its heavy-lift quadcopters carry payloads from around 68 kg to several hundred kilograms over short to medium-range missions, with zero-emission operation at point of use. The company is based in Berkshire and is a BAE Systems owned entity within BAE's FalconWorks research and development division.

## Products and solutions

- **T-150** - heavy-lift drone with around 68 kg maximum payload, in service with the UK Royal Navy, Royal Marines and US Marine Corps.
- **T-400** - heavy-lift platform with around 165 kg maximum payload and extended range.
- **T-650** - next-generation aircraft under development for requirement-led concepts.
- **TRV-150** - trials variant of the T-150 used in capability demonstrations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Ownership:** BAE Systems owned entity, part of the FalconWorks research and development division within the Air sector.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-10** - UK Royal Marines achieved a number of firsts using the T-150 on Arctic missions. [source](https://www.malloyaeronautics.com/article/royal-marines-accomplish-number-of-firsts-in-arctic-missions-with-t150)
- **2025-10-07** - The Royal Navy and US Army demonstrated T-150 frontline supply delivery in trials in South Korea. [source](https://www.malloyaeronautics.com/article/royal-navy-and-us-army-show-how-t150-could-deliver-supplies-to-the-frontline)
- **2025-09-12** - The Royal Navy declared the T-150 ready for front-line operations. [source](https://www.malloyaeronautics.com/article/royal-navy-declares-t150-ready-for-operations-1757675439947)

## Links

- Website: https://www.malloyaeronautics.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/malloy-aeronautics-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (malloyaeronautics.com about and articles), LinkedIn company page. Now BAE Systems owned (UK-headquartered parent); the company website states it forms part of BAE's FalconWorks division.

# Malvern Optical

> Electro-optics and electromagnetics R&D and independent test house working primarily for UK MOD, government agencies and the defence industry.

## What they do

Malvern Optical is a research, development and independent test and measurement company focused on the electro-optics (EO) and electromagnetics (EM) domains. Based at Pershore Airfield in Worcestershire, the company works primarily for UK MOD, government agencies and the UK defence industry across platforms, systems and sub-systems. It holds UKAS accreditation to ISO 17025:2017 as an independent test house, and its three core technical teams cover Electromagnetics, Sensors and Materials.

## Products and solutions

- **EO and EM testing and measurement** - independent UKAS-accredited test services across optics and electromagnetics.
- **Simulation and modelling** - including software modelling and TEMPEST.

companies.name: Marble Aerospace
companies.summary: Designs, builds and operates fleets of high-speed VTOL drones with AI vessel detection for maritime surveillance, delivered as an end-to-end service.
companies.body:
# Marble Aerospace

> Designs, builds and operates fleets of high-speed VTOL drones with AI vessel detection for maritime surveillance, delivered as an end-to-end service.

## What they do

Marble builds hardware and software to protect maritime environments. It designs, manufactures and operates its own fleet of high-speed vertical take-off and landing drones, paired with computer-vision sensors and AI-assisted vessel detection, and manages the full deployment chain including beyond visual line of sight regulatory approvals, planning and operations. Clients include government agencies, coast guards, maritime police and environmental organisations, with applications across fisheries protection, anti-piracy and drug-trafficking surveillance, infrastructure protection and environmental and ice monitoring.

## Products and solutions

- **MRB5** - fifth-generation proprietary drone. Fixed-wing VTOL lift-and-cruise design with four lift rotors and a single pusher propeller, built for harsh maritime environments and able to break down to fit in regular airline luggage for rapid deployment.
- **Surveillance as a service** - end-to-end managed maritime monitoring offering, covering deployment, BVLOS approvals, AI vessel detection and real-time intelligence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Programmes:** NATO DIANA (Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic) participant.

## Recent news

- **2024-05** - FlightGlobal feature on the company's growth and future development plans. [source](https://www.flightglobal.com/military-uavs/2024/05/marble-on-a-roll-as-uav-maker-looks-towards-future-developments/)
- Greenland ice-monitoring operations capturing daily high-resolution data over the Ilulissat Icefjord, delivered through an ESA Space Solutions project. [source](https://business.esa.int/projects/expanding-ocean-monitoring-high-speed-uavs)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/marble-aerospace

companies.name: Marine and Remote Sensing Solutions Ltd (MARSS)
companies.summary: Develops AI-powered counter-UAS and autonomous vehicle protection systems, delivered through its NiDAR IoT platform for multi-domain situational awareness.
companies.body:
# MARSS

> Develops AI-powered counter-UAS and autonomous vehicle protection systems, delivered through its NiDAR IoT platform for multi-domain situational awareness.

## What they do

MARSS builds software and integrated systems to detect and respond to threats from unmanned autonomous vehicles across air, land, sea, and sub-surface domains. Its NiDAR platform fuses data from multiple sensors in real time, providing command and control operators with a common operating picture and automated threat response across maritime, critical infrastructure, and military environments. In January 2026, MARSS was acquired by Electro Optic Systems (EOS), combining the two companies' counter-drone and defence technology businesses.

## Products and solutions

- **NiDAR** - sensor- and effector-agnostic IoT situational awareness platform. Fuses radar, sonar, electro-optic/infrared and radio-frequency detection through proprietary sensor fusion software, with AI-driven classification and automated countermeasure recommendation, for counter-UAS and autonomous vehicle protection across maritime, land, and critical infrastructure environments.
- **NiDAR X-JOC** - command and control centre for UAS detection, integrating legacy and third-party sensors and effectors, including RF and GPS jamming and short- and medium-range interceptors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001:2022, Cyber Essentials Plus.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Acquired by Electro Optic Systems (EOS), combining the companies' counter-drone and defence technology businesses.
- **2026-05** - GCC customer contract extension exceeding US$115m, adding wider air defence and kinetic countermeasure capability.
- **2026** - NiDAR selected as the command and control solution for BAE Systems' Anti Threat System (BATS) counter-UAS capability, announced at Eurosatory.

## Links

- Website: https://www.marss.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. MARSS website (marss.com/about/news), Electro Optic Systems acquisition announcement, Shephard Media, Joint Forces News, European Defence Review, ADS Group member directory (snapshot 2026-05-15).

# Markwell Trading Services

> Engineering sales representation and specialist manufacturing services for the aerospace and defence supply chain, with 27 years of experience across European markets.

## What they do

Markwell Trading Services provides engineering sales and business development representation across the UK and Europe for manufacturers of custom-engineered products and specialist engineering services. The company works on behalf of principal manufacturers, giving them a single point of contract and a network of in-country engineers across the UK, France, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, Poland, the Czech Republic, Italy, the Netherlands and Scandinavia. Within aerospace its customer base includes major industry players; the company also represents principals into rail, gears and transmissions, wind power and composites.

## Products and solutions

- **Aircraft and helicopter exterior lighting** - represented lighting products for aerospace platforms.
- **Digital compass and AHRS modules** - attitude and heading reference system modules represented for aerospace applications.
- **High-performance solid carbide cutting tools** - drilling solutions for aerospace and composite structures, including a patented drill design for CFRP and CFRP stack drilling aimed at improved hole quality and reduced delamination.
- **Ultrasonic shot peening and needle peening** - surface treatment services for weld fatigue life improvement.
- **Ultrasonic needle straightening** - specialist straightening service for engineered components.
- **Robotic material removal** - micro drilling, trimming, cutting, sanding and polishing of composite and metallic materials.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001.

companies.name: Marlborough Communications Ltd
companies.summary: Supplies advanced RF communications, electronic warfare and uncrewed systems technology to UK defence, security and emergency services customers, drawing on over 40 years in the sector.
companies.body:
# Marlborough Communications

> Supplies advanced RF communications, electronic warfare and uncrewed systems technology to UK defence, security and emergency services customers, drawing on over 40 years in the sector.

## What they do

Marlborough Communications Ltd (MCL) has supplied intelligence collection, communications and robotic technology to the Armed Forces and police since 1980. The company designs and supplies electronic and surveillance technology for RF communications and signals intelligence applications, developing solutions in-house and sourcing complementary products from partners worldwide, and supports equipment through its full service life. MCL organises its offer across four capability areas: Electronic Warfare, Tactical Systems, Uncrewed Systems and Support Services, serving UK MOD, government departments, prime defence contractors, and emergency services including the RNLI.

## Products and solutions

- **Electronic warfare and SIGINT/ELINT systems** - modular, scalable electronic warfare, signals intelligence and electronic intelligence solutions for sea, land and air platforms, described by the company as ultra-lightweight to medium-lightweight and built on open architecture standards and software-definable frameworks.
- **Counter-UAS systems** - library-based and pure-RF detect, disrupt and defeat capabilities for protecting personnel, vehicles and static bases, stated to be in widespread use with UK forces and overseas nations.
- **Tactical dismounted soldier systems** - voice and data-enabled communication systems, hearing protection with situational awareness, walk-on-fit intercom systems and high-performance antennas for military, counter-terrorist and emergency service users.
- **Uncrewed systems** - small UAS and robotic platforms combining sensor payloads, autonomous navigation and integrated secure communications links back to a command centre, including full-motion video ISR payloads and First Person View (FPV) tactical UAS.
- **FalCom tactical audio equipment** - communications equipment supplied in support of the British Army's Dismounted Data System.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, Military Aviation Authority DAOS approval.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Royal Signals Institution corporate membership, MOD Employer Recognition Scheme (Silver Award), Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-21** - MCL selected to supply FalCom tactical audio equipment supporting the British Army's Dismounted Data System. [source](https://marlboroughcomms.com/news/mcl-falcom-dds-tactical-audio-supply)
- **2026-01-30** - MCL recognised for excellence at the 2025 Cohort Group Awards. [source](https://marlboroughcomms.com/news/mcl-cohort-business-excellence-awards-2025)
- **2025-06-16** - MCL highlighted its hyperspectral imaging capability for defence ISR operations. [source](https://marlboroughcomms.com/news/mcl-hyperspectral-imaging-defence-isr)

## Links

- Website: https://www.marlboroughcomms.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/marlborough-communications-limited

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (marlboroughcomms.com: home, Electronic Warfare, Tactical Systems, Uncrewed Systems capability pages, news), ADS Group member directory. MCL is a subsidiary of UK-listed Cohort plc.

Marlow Ropes designs and manufactures specialist ropes and cordage for defence, special forces, and safety applications, exporting to customers in some of the world's most demanding environments. companies.name: Marshall ADG
companies.summary: Independent British aerospace and defence company providing mission-critical support services to a global customer base, established in 1909.
companies.body:
# Marshall ADG

> Independent British aerospace and defence company providing mission-critical support services to a global customer base, established in 1909.

## What they do

Marshall ADG is one of the UK's oldest independent aerospace and defence businesses, founded in Cambridge in 1909, and is the aerospace and defence arm of the wider Marshall Group. The company provides deep maintenance, repair, overhaul, and modification services for military and civil aircraft platforms, alongside engineering services, precision manufacturing and through-life support. Its customer base spans armed forces and government operators in the UK and internationally.

## Products and solutions

- **Military MRO** - maintenance, repair and overhaul across military and civil aircraft platforms, including Hercules and Foreign Military Sales support work.
- **Engineering services** - modernisation programmes, capability enhancement, certification and testing, and through-life management for aircraft and land platforms.
- **Precision manufacturing** - complex subsystem assembly, parts and components manufacture, including sonar array production for the Royal Navy under a long-term Thales UK contract.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, AS9100D/EN 9100, UK CAA Part 21G/21J/145 approvals, UK Military Aviation Authority DAOS and MRP Part 145 MAOS, Nadcap (Heat Treating, NDT, Chemical Processing, Welding), Export Control Compliance certification.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026** - Awarded a long-term contract, running through 2039, by Thales UK to manufacture, maintain and support Sonar 2076 and Sonar 2087 anti-submarine sonar arrays for the Royal Navy, with a second production line opening in 2026. [source](https://marshallgroup.com/en/news-stories/marshall-14-year-contract-thales-produce-sonar-modules-for-royal-navy)

companies.name: Marshall Advanced Composites
companies.summary: Specialist composite structures manufacturer for aerospace and defence, based in North Yorkshire.
companies.body:
# Marshall Advanced Composites

> Specialist composite structures manufacturer for aerospace and defence, based in North Yorkshire.

## What they do

Marshall Advanced Composites designs, manufactures and qualifies composite structures for aerospace and defence platforms, operating from a facility in Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire. The company has been active since 1931 and holds the distinction of designing and manufacturing the first CAA-certified all-composite airframe, the Slingsby Firefly. It was sold by Marshall Group to Swedish holding company Mangohojden AB in July 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Submarine composite structures** - composite structures for submarines, including optronic mast housings, designed to reduce acoustic, visual, radar and thermal signature.
- **Naval decoy launcher tube structures** - supplied in partnership with IrvinGQ to the Royal Navy, US Navy and other international customers.
- **Aircraft trim panels** - composite trim panels for aircraft interiors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-07-02** - Sale of the business by Marshall Group to Mangohojden AB completed. [source](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/marshall-completes-sale-of-slingsby-advanced-composites-to-mangohojden-ab)

## Links

# Marshall Aerospace

> British aerospace and defence company specialising in military MRO and platform modification, headquartered in Cambridge.

## What they do

Established in 1909, Marshall Aerospace provides military maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) services and platform modification, with particular depth on the C-130 Hercules — a relationship spanning from 1966. The company holds a broad portfolio of design organisation approvals and works directly with aircraft operators and prime contractors to sustain and extend platform capability.

## Products and solutions

- **Military MRO** - maintenance, repair and overhaul across fixed-wing military aircraft including the C-130 Hercules.
- **Platform modification** - design and integration of structural and systems modifications across multiple aircraft types.
- **Platform integration** - whole aircraft integration and systems installation, including avionics, electrical and structural work.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ITAR, AS/EN 9100, AS/EN 9110, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, EASA 145, FAA 14CFR Pt145, NADCAP (CP, NDT, WLD, Heat Treatment), Boeing D1-4426

Marshall Land Systems specialises in deployable operational infrastructure delivered through standardised containerised solutions, integration of sub-systems, and managed support services. # Martin Precision

> Scottish precision engineering manufacturer supplying components and assemblies to aerospace and defence customers.

## What they do

Martin Precision, established in 1993, manufactures precision engineered components and assemblies for quality-critical industries including aerospace and defence, operating from the Caldwellside Industrial Estate in Lanark. The company focuses on on-time delivery and demanding quality standards, supported by continual investment in equipment and processes. It became employee-owned in 2023 and was acquired by Swedish investment firm Evity Invest AB in March 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC machining and turning** - 5 and 9-axis milling and multi-spindle turning of hard and soft alloys, including titanium, steel, aluminium and superalloys.
- **Component repair and refurbishment** - restoration of precision components alongside new manufacture.
- **Kits and assemblies** - sub-assembly build from own and third-party components, including product development and new product introduction support.
- **Non-destructive testing** - in-house NDT capability since 1995, alongside clean room facilities and inspection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 Rev D, BS EN ISO 9001:2015, Nadcap (Non-Destructive Testing, First Article Inspection).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

companies.body:
# Martin's Rubber Company

> Southampton-based rubber products manufacturer with over 150 years' experience supplying the aerospace and defence sectors.

## What they do

Martin's Rubber Company manufactures bespoke rubber mouldings, seals, grommets, gaskets, washers and arm rests to aerospace specification, drawing on more than 150 years in the rubber trade. The company also offers technical consultancy including Finite Element Analysis, and prototyping services alongside volume production. It supplies defence customers directly, including submarine, missile and EOD-related components, and manufactures ITAR-restricted products under licence.

## Products and solutions

- **Moulded rubber components** - seals, grommets, gaskets, washers and bespoke mouldings to aerospace specification.
- **FRlite** - a proprietary lightweight, fire-retardant silicone material developed for aerospace weight-saving.
- **Technical consultancy** - Finite Element Analysis and design support for rubber applications.
- **Defence components** - battery support mats, acoustic rubbers for noise suppression, submarine torpedo tube seals, cruise missile control cable covers, and EOD remote handling equipment tracks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** AS/EN 9100, Cyber Essentials Plus, Fit For Nuclear (F4N).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

companies.name: Martin-Baker Aircraft Company Limited
companies.summary: The world's longest-established manufacturer of ejection seats, operating from Denham in Buckinghamshire with international facilities in France, Italy and the United States.
companies.body:
# Martin-Baker

> The world's longest-established manufacturer of ejection seats, operating from Denham in Buckinghamshire with international facilities in France, Italy and the United States.

## What they do

Martin-Baker designs and manufactures ejection seats and related escape systems for military aircraft, and has developed crashworthy seats for helicopters alongside fixed-wing crew and mission seats for maritime patrol and reconnaissance platforms. Founded in 1946, the company states it has delivered over 90,000 ejection seats to 93 air forces and saved over 7,700 lives to date. Recent seat designs incorporate on-board electronic sequencers that optimise escape sequencing based on speed and altitude.

## Products and solutions

- **Ejection seats** - aircraft escape systems for fast jets and trainer aircraft, including the US16E (F-35), US18E (F-16 Block 70/72), US14A/NACES (US Navy T-45 Goshawk) and Mk16 (T-6 Texan II), fitted across numerous air forces globally.
- **Crashworthy helicopter seats** - energy-absorbing seats designed to reduce occupant injury in survivable helicopter impacts, including the Multi-Functional Operator's Seat and helicopter passenger seats fitted on the Sikorsky S-92 and Airbus EC145.
- **Mission and crew seats** - fixed-wing crew seats for maritime patrol, reconnaissance and other mission aircraft, including armoured crew seat variants.
- **Aircrew safety equipment** - escape-system components including water-activated release systems and inertia reels.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, EN9100/ISO9001, ISO14001, CAA Design, Maintenance and Production Organisation Approvals, MAA Design Organisation Certificate.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-27** - Both pilots ejected safely using the Martin-Baker US14A (NACES) seat following a US Navy T-45C Goshawk crash near Meridian Naval Air Station. [source](https://martin-baker.com/notice/7824/)
- **2025-06-03** - Signed the Armed Forces Covenant. [source](https://martin-baker.com/news_and_events/armed-forces-covenant/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.martin-baker.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. ADS members directory (snapshot May 2026), company website.

companies.body:
# Materialise UK

> UK subsidiary of Belgian additive manufacturing group Materialise, supplying software and manufacturing services to aerospace, government and defence customers.

## What they do

Founded in 1990 and headquartered in Belgium, Materialise brings additive manufacturing software and industrial 3D printing services to defence contractors, aerospace organisations and government customers. The company combines software development for additive manufacturing with large-scale production capabilities, supporting supply chain resilience through rapid prototyping and localised manufacturing. Its industrial and aerospace additive manufacturing services operate from the Advanced Manufacturing Park, Sheffield.

## Products and solutions

- **Magics** - build-preparation software for additive manufacturing, with geometry-fixing, marking and measurement/reporting tools.
- **3D printing services** - metal 3D printing, selective laser sintering, Multi Jet Fusion, fused deposition modelling and other processes, used for rapid prototyping, small-series production and on-demand spare parts.
- **Certified aerospace materials** - flame-retardant additive manufacturing materials, including Airbus-certified grades, meeting FAR/CS 25.853 heat-release, flame, smoke and toxicity requirements.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** EN 9100 (polymer and metal additive manufacturing), EASA Part 21.G Production Organisation Approval, Airbus AIPI standards certification, ISO 9001, ISO 14001.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-02-25** - Achieved EN 9100 certification for metal additive manufacturing parts production, extending its existing polymer certification under which it states it has produced upwards of 500,000 flying parts for aircraft OEMs, suppliers and MROs. [source](https://www.materialise.com/en/news/press-releases/aerospace-offering-en9100-certification-am-metal-parts)

## Links

- Website: https://www.materialise.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. ADS members directory (snapshot May 2026). HQ: Leuven, Belgium; UK site: Advanced Manufacturing Park, Sheffield. Company website and press release.

companies.body:
# MAV Systems

> Manufacturer of automatic number plate recognition (ANPR) camera systems for law enforcement, military, and government clients worldwide.

## What they do

MAV Systems designs and manufactures ANPR camera systems, serving police, military, government, parking operators, and transport authorities. Founded in 2007, the company states it has more than 30,000 cameras deployed across over 80 countries. MAV Systems is part of The Traffic Group, which also includes sister companies working in radar-based vehicle detection and traffic signals; MAV Systems' own products are ANPR and camera based.

## Products and solutions

- **MAV AiQ** - flagship ANPR camera stated to offer over 99% recognition accuracy, tamper and clone detection (GhostPlate), recognition across more than 150 country plate formats, dual 1080p colour and infrared imaging, and IP68-rated housing for operation from -40C to 60C.
- **AiQ Lite** - lower-tier variant of the AiQ camera range.
- **MAV Mobile** - vehicle-mounted ANPR camera launched January 2026, using the company's FlexiAi software with NVIDIA Jetson processing.
- **BAYiQ** - additional camera model in the current range.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 27001, Made in Britain.
- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service framework.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - MAV Mobile vehicle-mounted ANPR camera launched globally. [source](https://www.traffictechnologytoday.com/news/enforcement/mav-launches-mobile-anpr-camera-with-ghostplate-recognition.html)
- **2025-02** - MAV AiQ camera unveiled. [source](https://www.officer.com/command-hq/technology/traffic/lpr-license-plate-recognition/press-release/55270877/mav-systems-ltd-redefining-anpr-the-mav-aiq)

## Links

companies.body:
# Mbryonics

> Irish photonics company building free-space optical communications terminals and ground infrastructure for satellite and space applications.

## What they do

Mbryonics designs and manufactures free-space optical communications (FSOC) systems, optical ground terminals and adaptive optics systems, describing its work as building an end-to-end optical solution connecting terrestrial networks to orbital constellations across LEO, MEO, GEO and cislunar space. Its photonics technologies are deployed on satellite systems for secure communications links, quantum key distribution, data relay, satellite optical mesh networks, optical feeder links, and direct-to-Earth and deep space missions. The company also provides rapidly deployable, high-throughput free-space optical links for terrestrial last-mile and 5G+ network applications. Mbryonics was selected as the optical terminal provider for the US Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency's Space-BACN programme, developing the optical terminal, including the space telescope, pointing/acquisition/tracking system and optical amplifiers, to support interconnection between government and commercial satellite systems.

## Products and solutions

- **STARCOM** - optical terminal product line for inter-satellite and Earth links.
- **STARGATE** - optical ground station connecting space and terrestrial networks.
- **STARLIGHT** - integrated digital optical modem.
- **TeraBIX** - radiation-hardened silicon photonic transceiver for high-speed, low-power data transmission.
- **PakPIC** - high-precision packaging solutions for photonic integrated circuits.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2024-01** - Mbryonics selected as optical terminal provider for DARPA's Space-BACN programme. [Via Satellite](https://www.satellitetoday.com/technology/2024/01/02/mbryonics-to-build-optical-terminal-for-darpas-space-bacn-program/)

## Links

companies.body:
# MDA Space and Robotics

> UK arm of Canadian space technology company MDA, delivering space robotics, sensors, geo-intelligence, and satellite communications systems.

## What they do

MDA Space and Robotics Limited operates from the Harwell Campus in Oxfordshire as the UK entity of MDA, a company with a 50-year track record in space systems. Capabilities span space-based LIDAR, infrared cameras, laser range finders and positioning systems, space robotic servicing, satellite communications infrastructure, and geo-intelligence services. The Harwell site supports robotics and on-orbit servicing programmes, including work with the European Space Agency, alongside laser rangefinder development for lunar lander missions.

## Products and solutions

- **Space-based sensors** - LIDAR, IR cameras, and laser positioning systems for satellite and planetary applications.
- **Space robotics** - robotic servicing systems for on-orbit operations, including European Space Agency programmes supported from the Harwell site.
- **RADARSAT-2 and MDA CHORUS** - synthetic aperture radar earth observation satellites and constellation, providing wide-area coverage through to very high resolution imagery.
- **Geo-intelligence** - earth observation and spatial data services, including maritime domain awareness and dark vessel detection.
- **Communications systems** - satellite communications for programmes including the ISS and Lunar Gateway.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.mda.space

Note: some capability detail (RADARSAT-2, CHORUS, Maritime Insights, ground station network) is described at MDA group level; UK entity-specific public statements concentrate on robotics, on-orbit servicing, and Harwell site activity.

companies.body:
# MDH Defence

> Wiltshire manufacturer of CBRN filtration and collective protection systems for armoured and protected military vehicles.

## What they do

MDH Defence is a world leader in the provision of CBRN collective protection, fresh air filtration and environmental control for military platforms. With over 50 years of experience designing and manufacturing CBRN filtration and crew cooling and heating, the company supplies bespoke solutions to systems integrators and vehicle manufacturers using standard parts and sub-systems. MDH Defence equipment is in service worldwide on a range of military vehicles, ships, and rigid and tented shelters, with fielded technology on platforms including the Force Protection Cougar and FNSS ACV 300/350.

## Products and solutions

- **Vehicle CBRN Filtration** - collective and individual NBC protection for armoured and protected vehicles.
- **Shelter CBRN Filtration** - collective protection for rigid and tented shelters.
- **Fresh Air Filtration** - fine dust filtration for a range of military vehicles and shelters.
- **Environmental Control** - crew cooling and heating for military vehicles.
- **Consumables and Spares** - filter equipment and associated spares supporting the fielded product range.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

No news within the last 12 months found on the company's public news page.

companies.body:
# Mediaport Systems
> UK micro-SME designing and manufacturing ruggedised bonded-connectivity solutions for defence, CNI, and field deployment.
## What they do
Mediaport Systems designs and manufactures secure connectivity and edge-compute solutions for rapid deployment in challenging environments. Founded in 2024, the company draws on engineering heritage from its predecessor Wired Broadcast Ltd (1989 to 2022). Its flagship SONJA product aggregates bandwidth from up to four 5G networks and four LEO satellite links, or any combination of 5G, 4G, Wi-Fi, satellite, fibre, and DSL, in a WAN bonding router built around high-grade 5G modems and Bondix software. A ruggedised field variant, SONJA Rugged, is available in an IP67-rated milled aluminium enclosure optimised for size, weight, and power. Target verticals are defence, critical national infrastructure, security, and broadcast.
## Products and solutions
- **SONJA** - Portable WAN bonding router aggregating up to four 5G networks and four LEO satellite links for reliable connectivity in contested or remote environments.
- **SONJA Rugged** - Field variant in IP67-rated milled aluminium enclosure, optimised for SWaP and rough handling.
## Links

# Meliorem HR Consultancy

# MEP

> Precision manufacturer of complex metal and plastic components and assemblies for aerospace and defence.

## What they do

MEP, founded in 1972 as Moulded and Engineered Plastics, manufactures complex machined parts through to multi-part assemblies and platforms, serving global aerospace and defence primes as a preferred supplier. The company describes itself as a supply chain and R&D risk-sharing partner across aerospace, defence, space, medical, motorsport, and rail sectors, and also operates a US entity, Making Everything Possible LLC, in Virginia.

## Products and solutions

- **Multi-axis machining** - manual and semi-CNC through to five-axis milling and seven-axis mill-turn, across ferrous, non-ferrous, and polymeric materials.
- **Plastics moulding** - thermoset compression, thermoplastic injection, thermoset transfer, and hand lay-up, including in-house metallic insert encapsulation.
- **Insulations** - stamped and machined engineering laminates for mission-critical applications.
- **Assemblies** - simple through to complex, higher-level assemblies.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR, SC21 (Silver level, multiple awards).
- **Accreditations:** AS9100:2018 Rev D, ISO 9001, ISO 14001:2015, Cyber Essentials Basic and Plus, First Article Certification (FAC).

companies.name: METCLOUD
companies.summary: Sovereign cloud, cyber security and managed services for regulated and defence-sector organisations.
companies.body:
# METCLOUD

> Sovereign cloud, cyber security and managed services for regulated and defence-sector organisations.

## What they do

METCLOUD provides sovereign cloud, cyber security and managed services built around high-assurance security technologies. Its hybrid cloud platform combines cyber defence, surveillance and AI and machine learning capabilities. METCLOUD Defence delivers secure, sovereign cloud services positioned for the UK defence sector.

## Products and solutions

- **Sovereign cloud platform** - hybrid cloud built around high-assurance security controls, with enterprise servers and storage.
- **Managed cyber security services** - next generation firewall, SIEM, endpoint protection, network access control, automated patch management and backup, plus 24/7 monitoring and surveillance.
- **Security Operations Centre as a Service (SOCaaS)** and **Monitoring as a Service (MaaS)** - continuous cyber threat detection and infrastructure monitoring.
- **Cyber Incident Response (CIR)** - service to help mitigate the risk of extensive damage and downtime following an attack.
- **Vulnerability Application Management (VAM)** - ongoing visibility of vulnerabilities across a customer's IT infrastructure.
- **Penetration testing** - systematic probing of a customer's computing infrastructure to identify potential vulnerabilities.
- **METCLOUD Defence** - secure, sovereign cloud services tailored to the UK defence sector, stated to be vetted by NCSC and supported by UK Government SC-cleared personnel.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001:2022, ISO 9001:2015.
- **Memberships:** Fire Industry Association (FIA) listed partner.

## Recent news

- **2026-05** - METCLOUD selected by Nurol Makina UK as its UK cybersecure sovereign cloud provider.
- **2025-11** - METCLOUD Defence awarded "highly commended" for Defence Innovator of the Year at The Innovation Awards. [source](https://www.metcloud.com/about/success/)
- **2025-02** - Expansion into the fifth floor of Lyndon House, Birmingham, following contract wins including cyber security services to a specialist defence manufacturing firm, with plans to create up to 100 jobs.

## Links

- Website: https://www.metcloud.com/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/metcloud

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. METCLOUD website (metcloud.com), METCLOUD LinkedIn company page, Companies House (company 03594373), FIA membership listing, Invest West Midlands.

companies.name: MGI Engineering Ltd
companies.summary: Unmanned autonomous systems design, prototyping and manufacture for defence and security, drawing on over 25 years of Formula 1 engineering.
companies.body:
# MGI Engineering Ltd

> Unmanned autonomous systems design, prototyping and manufacture for defence and security, drawing on over 25 years of Formula 1 engineering.

## What they do

MGI Engineering delivers high-quality consultancy and unmanned autonomous systems design, prototyping and manufacture, applying engineering disciplines developed over two decades in Formula 1 motorsport. The company serves the defence and security sector alongside other high-performance industries. Its defence arm, MGI Defence, designs and delivers autonomous platforms for land, air, and maritime operations intended for contested and electronically denied environments.

## Products and solutions

- **TigerShark** - long-range autonomous one-way effector, ground-launched and salvo-capable, with a modular payload and a guidance suite combining inertial navigation with GPS-free terrain mapping for operation in GPS-denied and spoofed environments.
- **SkyShark** - medium-range autonomous one-way effector strike drone with a modular payload.
- **SeaGlide** - autonomous foiling uncrewed surface vessel, described as a swarm-mothership able to carry and launch UAV swarms simultaneously or in sequence, using hydrofoil autonomy for navigation without reliance on external guidance or satellite communications.
- **TigerShark II / LeopardShark** - additional platforms in the company's Autonomous Collaborative Platforms line.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR.
- **Accreditations:** AS9100D, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-07-01** - Welcomed the UK Defence Investment Plan's £5bn drone commitment.
- **2026-06-22** - Showcased TigerShark for MOD Project BRAKESTOP.
- **2026-04-01** - Announced TigerShark launch partnership with Auterion.
- **2025-11-14** - Selected for the UK Space Agency Accelerator Shuttle Programme.
- **2025-09-19** - Announced UAV manufacturing partnership with Vigilar Group (Italy) at DSEI 2025.
- **2025-09-09** - Publicly unveiled TigerShark at DSEI 2025.
- **2025-08-08** - Launched SkyShark.

## Links

- Website: https://mgiengineering.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/mgiengineering

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. MGI Engineering and MGI Defence websites, Auterion partnership announcement, ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15).

companies.name: MH International
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of military bridging, trestling and engineering support solutions with over 60 years of heritage.
companies.body:
# MH International

> UK manufacturer of military bridging, trestling and engineering support solutions with over 60 years of heritage.

## What they do

MH International, trading name of Mabey Hire Limited, designs and manufactures rapidly deployable bridging, trestling and force-protection systems for military applications, covering both planned tactical operations and disaster relief. The company states it works with defence professionals to establish line-of-communication routes and to support damaged structures, with products built to military-grade specifications.

## Products and solutions

- **Heavy Vehicle BeamBridge (HVBB)** - pre-assembled bridge spanning up to 20m, rated to MLC 150, available in flat-top or rollover deck formats.
- **Heavy Vehicle Trench Crossing Units (HVTCU)** - short-span bridging for rapid deployment in combat zones.
- **Heavy Vehicle OverBridge (HVOB)** - short-gap crossing and ramp system for overbridging.
- **Trestling (MAT125)** - modular propping system rated to 125 tonnes per prop, used for bridge support and back-propping.
- **Modular Protective System (MPS)** - prefabricated force-protection shell, deployable subterranean or above-ground.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - MH International opened a new depot in Portlaoise, Ireland, extending its temporary works portfolio including propping, jacking, groundworks and temporary bridging. [source](https://mh.international/mh-international-launches-irish-depot/)

## Links

# Milanion

> Defence company developing uncrewed ground and surface systems, ISR and loitering munitions.

## What they do

Milanion Group is a vertically integrated defence company that designs, integrates and manufactures autonomous and robotic systems for the tri-service defence and security sectors. Its operating and manufacturing base is in Abu Dhabi, and the group now markets a UK headquarters with a UK registered entity (Milanion Group Ltd) and a London presence. It works across land, maritime, air, communications and munitions, combining autonomy, secure communications and precision effects.

## Products and solutions

- **AGEMA UGV** - modular, multi-mission, amphibious unmanned ground vehicle, with ISR payloads and weaponised or munitions-launcher variants.
- **Unmanned surface vessels** - an Advanced Autonomous Conversion System that converts manned platforms such as fast attack craft to unmanned operation.
- **MSP Warblefly** - tube-launched loitering munition UAV, marketed by Milanion as an air system, including a launcher integrated onto the AGEMA UGV.
- **Mortar and indirect fire systems** - mobile mortar carrier and indirect-fire systems (Milanion NTGS), plus remote weapon stations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

- **2026-06-19** - Signed an agreement with RPAL/Republikorp at Eurosatory 2026 to expand the Indonesian Navy USV programme. [source](https://milaniongroup.com/press-release/milanion-rpal-usv-programme/)

# MilDef Group AB

> Rugged IT systems integrator and full-spectrum provider for defence, government and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

MilDef is a systems integrator and full-spectrum provider specialising in rugged IT for military, government and critical infrastructure sectors. Since 1997 it has designed, tested, qualified, manufactured, sold and supported rugged computing products for military applications in harsh environments. It supplies hardware, software and services across multiple countries including Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States and Australia. MilDef Group AB has been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged computers and electronics** - small form factor computers, mobile computers, displays, panel PCs and special electronics for the harshest conditions.
- **19"/2 rugged IT platform** - rack-mounted rugged computing supporting modular defence systems.
- **OneCIS** - tactical C2IS software platform providing secure, deployable IT infrastructure that hosts and connects command and control, battle management and geographical services, delivered to defence customers including the Swedish Navy.
- **Integration services** - system design and implementation alongside hardware delivery.

## Recent news

- **2025-07** - Kongsberg Defence & Aerospace ordered MilDef rugged IT equipment worth SEK 225 million, MilDef's largest order in the Norwegian market, with deliveries beginning in 2026. [source](https://mildef.com/news/kongsberg-defence-aerospace-orders-mildefs-ruggedized-it-equipment-worth-225-msek/)
- **2025-03** - MilDef completed the acquisition of roda computer GmbH, expanding its European footprint. [source](https://view.news.eu.nasdaq.com/view?id=bfb62e20f1026fe4833ce5a698e6b886f&lang=en)

# Milfoam International Ltd

> UK-headquartered manufacturer of barrel cleaning systems for military and civilian firearms, used in over 40 countries.

## What they do

Milfoam International supplies eco-friendly, high-precision barrel cleaning solutions for the defence and civil sectors, combining advanced foam technology with NATO-approved chemicals. Initially adopted by the Finnish Defence Forces, their systems are now deployed across more than 40 countries and are designed to enhance weapon performance and extend barrel lifespan.

## Products and solutions

- **Milfoam Forrest Bore Cleaning Foam** - colour-changing foam (blue for copper, black for other residues) that removes carbon, copper, brass and plastic residues from weapon barrels, supplied in aerosol format.
- **Milfoam Forrest Synthetic Gun Maintenance Oil** - synthetic oil that cleans, lubricates and protects barrels to extend service life.
- **Vibrating Pneumatic Brush (VPB) range** - sized for calibres from 23mm to 155mm, accelerating and standardising the cleaning process for military and commercial users.
- **Foam Dispenser and Heavy Barrel Cleaning System** - equipment for large-calibre application and post-proof cleaning of new gun barrels, used by weapon manufacturers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Mills CNC Ltd

> UK importer and distributor of Doosan CNC machine tools, supplying aerospace, defence and industrial manufacturers.

## What they do

Mills CNC is the exclusive UK and Ireland agent for Doosan Infracore (DN Solutions) CNC machine tools, a relationship spanning 35 years. Operating from a technology campus in Leamington Spa, the company imports around 450 to 480 machine tools annually and supplies them across manufacturing sectors including aerospace and defence, supported by showroom, turnkey and machine storage facilities. The installed UK and Ireland base exceeds 4,500 machines.

## Products and solutions

- **Lynx and Puma lathe ranges** - CNC turning centres, including vertical turning models.
- **MX and SMX mill-turn ranges** - multi-tasking machining centres, including twin-turret and twin-spindle models.
- **DVF series** - 5-axis machining centres with Fanuc or Siemens controls.
- **NHP horizontal machining centres** - horizontal machining with linear pallet system options.
- **SYNERGi automation** - automation systems supplied alongside machine tools.
- **Applications engineering and training** - support services delivered alongside machine sales from the Leamington Spa technology campus.

companies.body:
# Mind Foundry

> Oxford-spinout applied machine learning company building responsible AI for defence and national security.

## What they do

Mind Foundry develops responsible AI and machine learning solutions for high-stakes applications in defence and national security. It was spun out of the University of Oxford and turns complex, multi-modal sensor data into trusted insight, supporting human operators while preserving human autonomy in mission-critical environments. The company is based in Oxford.

## Products and solutions

- **Sentry: Sensor Fusion** - real-time fusion of data from multiple sensors into a single evolving picture for situational awareness, making existing hardware and command-and-control software smarter.
- **Nightingale: ASW** - acoustic software for anti-submarine warfare, delivering automated tonal analysis and classification to turn maritime sound into actionable intelligence.
- **Continuous Metalearning** - platform approach in which AI adapts its own learning to real-world change.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus, JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024-10-08** - Mind Foundry awarded Defence Technology Exploitation Programme (DTEP) funding to develop a unified operating picture capability with BAE Systems. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/dtep-funding-announced-for-three-more-uk-smes)
- **2024-01-24** - Saab UK awarded the LookOut Phase 3 contract in collaboration with Mind Foundry to develop maritime early warning for the Royal Navy, funded through DASA. [source](https://www.saab.com/markets/united-kingdom/stories/saab-uk-awarded-lookout-phase-3-contract)

companies.body:
# MindLink Software

> Ultra-secure chat and messaging platform for classified communication in national security and defence.

## What they do

MindLink provides a secure mission information-sharing platform that lets organisations and their mission partners establish a global communication backbone for mission execution. It offers encrypted, real-time chat using data classification and user entitlements to restrict access on a need-to-know basis. The platform uses a data-centric, end-to-end encryption approach with attribute-based access control, and is deployed at scale in air-gapped environments. The company is based in London.

## Products and solutions

- **MindLink Platform** - ultra-secure chat and messaging for international and inter-agency mission operations across defence and intelligence.
- **Data-centric security engine** - multi-layered access control based on secret attributes, roles and security clearances.
- **FRNIX federation protocol** - federation protocol designed to share classified information only with those holding the appropriate need-to-know.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.

## Recent news

- **2024** - MindLink achieved Cyber Essentials Plus certification. [source](https://www.mindlinksoft.com/blog/demonstrating-security-in-practice-mindlink-achieves-cyber-essentials-plus)
