companies.body:
# NIOA UK Ltd

> UK subsidiary of NIOA, a family-owned global supplier of firearms, weapons and munitions to defence and security customers.

## What they do

NIOA is the largest privately-owned supplier of weapons and munitions in Australia, with operations spanning NIOA Australia, NIOA New Zealand, NIOA UK, the Australian Missile Corporation, Barrett Firearms (USA, acquired 2023) and a joint venture with Rheinmetall. NIOA UK Ltd was incorporated in June 2024 with a registered office in Bristol, and opened an office at Abbey Wood, home of the MOD's Defence Equipment & Support organisation. The company states this office is also intended to serve as NIOA Group's European headquarters, supporting closer ties with DE&S and UK industry and exploring munitions manufacturing and military supply opportunities in the UK and Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **Small arms** - supply of small arms to commercial, law enforcement and military markets.
- **Munitions** - supply of medium and large calibre munitions, special-function grenades and pyrotechnics, under Australia's Major Munitions Deed covering more than 50 munitions types.
- **Rheinmetall NIOA Munitions joint venture** - 155mm artillery shell manufacturing (Maryborough, Queensland) and 120mm tank round, 30mm and 35mm cannon ammunition manufacturing (Benalla, Victoria).
- **Optics and carriage solutions** - pistol systems, optics and associated carriage equipment.

No UK-specific manufacturing contract or MOD supply agreement has been publicly confirmed for NIOA UK Ltd to date; public statements describe the UK office as exploring opportunities rather than delivering against a confirmed contract.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025** - NIOA Group appointed a General Manager to lead its UK expansion from the Bristol office. [source](https://www.defenceconnect.com.au/industry/16750-mark-osborn-appointed-to-lead-nioa-group-expansion-into-united-kingdom)

## Links

NIOA Group public pages (nioa.com.au, defence.nioa.com.au); Companies House record for NIOA UK Ltd (company number 15756121); Defence Connect and Manufacturers' Monthly trade press coverage of the UK office opening.

companies.name: NiTech Solutions Ltd
companies.summary: Developer of dual-use continuous manufacturing technology for chemical and defence applications, supported by DASA.
companies.body:
# NiTech Solutions Ltd

> Developer of dual-use continuous manufacturing technology for chemical and defence applications, supported by DASA.

## What they do

NiTech Solutions, based in Edinburgh, develops patent-protected continuous manufacturing technology for chemical reaction and crystallisation processes, replacing traditional batch processing. Its core technology superimposes an oscillatory flow on the net flow through jacketed pipework, combining heat and mass transfer with uniform mixing, so kinetic reaction times proven at laboratory scale can be reproduced at pilot and production scale. The company describes its process solutions as dual-use, applicable to both civil chemical manufacturing and defence-related energetics and propellant production. Stated application areas include speciality and fine chemicals, pharmaceuticals, battery materials, food and drink, and energetics and propellants.

## Products and solutions

- **Continuous Oscillatory Baffled Reactor (COBR)** - continuous-flow reactor technology for chemical reaction processes.
- **Continuous Oscillatory Baffled Crystalliser (COBC)** - continuous-flow crystallisation technology, offered across a range of pipe diameters.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** DASA-funded, supporting demonstration of the technology in the energetics sector.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Links

- Website: https://www.nitechsolutions.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nitech-solutions

companies.summary: Advanced fibre laser and photonics manufacturer supplying defence and security applications on mobile platforms.
companies.body:
# NKT Photonics Ltd

> Advanced fibre laser and photonics manufacturer supplying defence and security applications on mobile platforms.

## What they do

NKT Photonics develops advanced fibre laser technology for use in laser systems deployed on mobile platforms including aircraft, ships and ground vehicles, with a focus on security and asymmetrical threat applications. The UK entity is based in Southampton and supports European and US special project requirements. The company states that its multi-kilowatt single-frequency fibre lasers can be spectrally combined to exceed 20 kW at near diffraction-limited beam quality, suited to high-energy laser applications, and that it also supplies laser technology for tracking and illumination at eye-safe wavelengths.

**Note on parent company.** Following Hamamatsu Photonics' acquisition of NKT Photonics A/S (completed June 2024), the Danish parent was formally renamed Hamamatsu Photonics A/S around June 2026, operating as the "Lasers & Fibers" business unit; its former nktphotonics.com website now redirects accordingly. The UK entity continues to be listed as NKT Photonics Ltd in public directories at the time of writing.

## Products and solutions

- **SuperK series** - supercontinuum white-light lasers.
- **Koheras series** - single-frequency fibre lasers, including variants used in high-power spectrally-combined configurations for directed energy applications.
- **Ultrafast lasers (aeroPULSE, ORIGAMI)** - ultrafast laser sources.
- **Optical fibres and gain modules** - including ytterbium-doped double-clad gain fibres for laser amplification.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Parent company NKT Photonics A/S formally renamed Hamamatsu Photonics A/S following the 2024 acquisition, operating as the Lasers & Fibers business unit. [source](https://www.photonics.com/Articles/Hamamatsu-Formalizes-New-Brand-Name-for-NKT/p5/a72369)

## Links

NMS UK, the UK arm of Nurol Makina, is a UK-based supplier of Protected Mobility Vehicles combining proven vehicle expertise with British engineering and manufacturing capability. The company manufactures combat patrol, command and control, ambulance and specialist vehicle variants, and aims to serve export markets as well as UK Armed Forces requirements. companies.name: Nominal
companies.summary: US software company building a unified test and mission data platform for defence, aerospace and other complex hardware programmes.
companies.body:
# Nominal

> US software company building a unified test and mission data platform for defence, aerospace and other complex hardware programmes.

## What they do

Nominal builds a unified software stack for hardware engineering teams, letting them test and iterate on physical systems as quickly as software teams ship code. Its platform captures, organises, monitors, visualises and securely shares high-rate test and operational data from complex hardware including aircraft, hypersonics, satellites and autonomous vehicles. The company has roots in aerospace and defence, founded by engineers from Anduril, Lockheed Martin and Palantir, and is headquartered in Los Angeles with offices including London.

## Products and solutions

- **Nominal Core** - secure cloud workbench for managing, monitoring and analysing high-rate sensor data, logs, video, simulation results and procedures in one time-aligned, collaborative view, with trend analysis, anomaly detection and synchronised post-test replay.
- **Nominal Connect** - Python-first edge platform for building custom hardware-in-the-loop applications, handling sensor streams at kilohertz rates and streaming large volumes of test and video data from a test bench into Nominal.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-30** - Acquired Fid Labs to bring AI agents to the full hardware engineering lifecycle. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/30/3284606/0/en/nominal-acquires-fid-labs-to-bring-ai-to-the-full-hardware-engineering-lifecycle.html)
- **2026-03-05** - Reached a $1bn valuation in an $80M round led by Founders Fund, taking total raised to $155M in 10 months, with international expansion including a London office. [source](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/05/hardware-testing-startup-nominal-hits-1b-valuation-raises-155m-in-10-months/)
- **2025-06-25** - Raised a $75M Series B led by Sequoia Capital to modernise hardware testing. [source](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/nominal-raises-75-million-led-by-sequoia-capital-to-modernize-hardware-testing-302479991.html)

## Links

- Website: https://nominal.io/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nominal-inc

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (nominal.io), LinkedIn company page, TechCrunch, GlobeNewswire, PR Newswire and MIT News. Legal entity Nominal, Inc.; founded 2022. Headcount not published; the medium band is an estimate from public indicators (Series B-stage, 60-plus customer organisations, four offices). Named public customers include Anduril, Shield AI and the US Air Force.

The company states its work spans software solutions, cyber security and lifecycle management services through to project delivery, describing itself as "executing exceptional cyber and digital transformations". Its key client base is government defence. The company's Cheltenham base places it within the UK's national security and intelligence cluster, and it maintains a strategic partnership with CDS Defence & Security for joint cyber security and information assurance delivery.

companies.body:
# Northrop Grumman Corporation

> Global US aerospace and defence prime operating across air, space, defence and cyberspace, with established UK operations.

## What they do

Northrop Grumman is a global aerospace and defence technology company working across space, aeronautics, defence and cyberspace. It designs, develops and manufactures systems for national security and commercial customers across the air, land, sea, space and cyber domains, and is one of the largest contractors to the US federal government. It is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker NOC, headquartered in Falls Church, Virginia, and maintains UK operations through Northrop Grumman UK Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **Aeronautics Systems** - manned and unmanned air systems, including military aircraft, autonomous systems and aerospace structures; lead contractor for the B-21 Raider next-generation stealth bomber.
- **Defense Systems** - modernisation and sustainment, battle command systems, directed energy, tactical weapons and armaments.
- **Mission Systems** - cyber-secure, software-defined systems including sensors, radars, electronic warfare and C4ISR.
- **Space Systems** - space and launch systems for national security, civil and commercial customers.
- **UK operations** - cyber and technology facilities in Cheltenham, London, Manchester and New Malden; the New Malden site specialises in marine navigation systems, radars, integrated bridge systems and integrated platform management systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member; UKspace member.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-22** - Awarded a five-year US Army contract to produce the M1147 Advanced Multi-Purpose (AMP) tank ammunition round. [source](https://news.northropgrumman.com/armaments/northrop-grumman-awarded-multiple-year-contract-to-produce-advanced-multi-purpose-tank-ammunition-round)
- **2026-04-29** - Won a $488M sole-source contract for global F-16 radar support. [source](https://news.clearancejobs.com/2026/04/29/northrop-grumman-wins-488m-sole-source-contract-for-global-f-16-radar-support/)
- **2026-03-30** - Awarded a US Navy contract modification for the SEWIP Block 3 maritime electronic attack system. [source](https://news.northropgrumman.com/electronic-warfare/northrop-grumman-awarded-contract-modification-for-sewip-block-3-maritime-electronic-attack-system)

## Links

companies.body:
# NOVA Defence Intelligence Systems
> Bristol-based startup building an agentic AI platform that automates the full UK DSAT lifecycle for Allied defence training.

## What they do
NOVA automates the Defence Systems Approach to Training (DSAT) lifecycle, including Training Needs Analysis, design, delivery and evaluation, mapped to UK JSP 822, US TRADOC 350-70 and NATO Bi-SC 075-003 doctrine. The platform is built on a doctrine corpus of over 78,000 searchable passages and generates SCORM and xAPI-compatible packages with citations back to source. It positions itself as the first agentic Allied Defence Training platform.

## Products and solutions
- **Force Multiplier** - Four autonomous AI agents covering the Analysis, Design, Delivery and Assurance stages of the DSAT cycle.
- **Command** - Full platform including Slides Creator, One-Click Course and cross-doctrinal fusion tools; unlimited AI generations.
- **Enterprise** - On-premises or air-gapped deployment for IL4/IL5 environments, with coalition data partitioning and SSO.

## Links
- Website: https://novaalliedtrainingllm.com

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-07-05, against the company's own website (novaalliedtrainingllm.com).

# Novatech

> UK custom-computing manufacturer building bespoke PCs, servers and rugged COTS hardware, including defence training and simulation systems.

## What they do

Novatech designs, assembles, supports and repairs custom-built computer hardware from its Portsmouth headquarters, serving home, business, education and public-sector customers. Alongside its mainstream PC and server business, it supplies specialist and adaptable hardware including custom rack design and build, high-performance commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) PCs and servers, and ruggedised solutions. Its engineering team delivers complex rack and compute systems that power simulators for defence and aviation customers, and the company states it has supplied engineered COTS hardware into the MOD through primes including Thales, BAE Systems and Airbus Defence and Space.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence, Training and Simulation** - a dedicated sector division supplying engineered computing and simulation systems.
- **Motion Sims** - motion-simulator systems for training, including powerboat and RHIB trainers.
- **Custom Server and Rack Solutions** - bespoke rack design and build, configurable tower and rackmount servers.
- **Design and Engineering** - in-house engineering of COTS PCs, servers and ruggedised solutions, including high-performance AI and deep-learning compute workstations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024** - Babcock signed research and development agreements with Novatech and partners to develop a virtual-reality synthetic military driver-training capability. [source](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/novatech-and-babcock-team-up-on-military-driver-training.html)
- **2020-01** - Novatech awarded a contract to supply RHIB motion simulators to Royal Navy Reserve establishments across the UK and Northern Ireland. [source](https://www.defenceonline.co.uk/2020/01/13/novatech-navy-reserves-training-simulator-technology/)

## Links

# NovAtel

> Hexagon brand providing assured GNSS positioning, navigation and GPS anti-jam technology for defence, aerospace and maritime applications.

## What they do

NovAtel, part of Hexagon's positioning division, develops and manufactures GNSS receivers, GPS anti-jam technology and positioning systems for defence and regulated sectors. The UK office is based in Aberdeen, Scotland, serving military and defence customers from the Veripos House facility.

## Products and solutions

- **GAJT (GPS Anti-Jam Technology)** - protects against jamming and interference to maintain GPS position, navigation and timing availability.
- **OEM7 GNSS Receivers** - multi-constellation, multi-frequency receivers with field-upgradeable software for defence and precision applications.
- **GRIT (GNSS Resilience and Integrity Technology)** - technology for maintaining GNSS integrity and resilience in contested environments.
- **Navigation and Mapping Systems** - end-to-end navigation, GPS and surveying solutions.

companies.body:
# Novel Engineering Consultants Ltd

> Aerospace, defence and eVTOL engineering consultancy providing systems and equipment services to OEMs and prime aircraft manufacturers, based in Nailsworth, Gloucestershire.

## What they do

Novel Engineering Consultants is a high-niche engineering consultancy founded by experienced engineers for aerospace engineering customers. It works across three capability areas: eVTOL, defence and civil aviation. Its engineers describe centuries of combined aerospace design and certification experience, gained as experts and chief engineers at various airframers and Tier 1 suppliers, and the company states a client portfolio that includes major aerospace OEMs and primes such as Airbus, Mitsubishi, Safran and Turkish Aerospace.

## Products and solutions

- **Safety and certification-led system architecture design** - eVTOL systems engineering support, working alongside a customer's own team to break down aircraft complexity and design for certifiability.
- **Certification gap analysis** - design audit of an eVTOL aircraft or system against certification standards, with a report on gaps and suggested improvements.
- **Guidance and training** - informal and formal training in Novel's technical specialisms, delivered alongside engineering engagements.
- **Defence systems engineering** - mechanical and electrical system design, providing analytical and safety support for defence customers.
- **Civil aerospace certification** - aerospace system and equipment certification, including product acceleration from TRL 3 through to certification.

Stated technical specialisms include safety-led design, certification knowledge, flight control systems design, electric propulsion systems, electric actuation systems design, hybrid power systems, and equipment and system sizing and design.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Links

- Website: http://www.novelengc.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/novel-engineering-consultants/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (novelengc.com, including the eVTOL page), ADS members directory (ADS directory snapshot, 2026-05-15), Companies House (06226933).

companies.summary: Coventry-headquartered armour manufacturer and military vehicle integrator delivering survivability and protection solutions for defence and security customers worldwide.
companies.body:
# NP Aerospace

> Coventry-headquartered armour manufacturer and military vehicle integrator delivering survivability and protection solutions for defence and security customers worldwide.

## What they do

NP Aerospace describes itself as a world-leading armour manufacturer and vehicle integrator delivering high-performance defence and security solutions and engineering services, drawing on close to 100 years of experience producing lightweight survivability solutions from advanced materials. Its Coventry Advanced Armour Systems facility houses engineering, design, composites and armour manufacturing alongside a UKAS-accredited Ballistics Centre of Excellence. Its vehicle systems team handles full military vehicle integration, through-life support, repairs and refurbishment, and acts as Engineering Authority for the UK MoD's Protected Mobility fleet.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite vehicle armour systems** - lightweight add-on and integrated armour for military vehicles.
- **Vehicle integration and through-life support** - full military vehicle integration, repairs, refurbishment and spares; Engineering Authority for the UK MoD Protected Mobility fleet.
- **Ballistic helmets and shields** - personal protection products.
- **Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) suits** - protective equipment for ordnance disposal.
- **Body armour plates** - personal survivability systems.
- **LC300 armoured vehicle** - upgraded armoured platform; entered full-rate production from January 2026.
- **Ballistics testing services** - independently UKAS ISO/IEC 17025 accredited laboratory.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 (Coventry Advanced Armour Systems facility); UKAS ISO/IEC 17025 accredited Ballistics Centre of Excellence.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group member.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-23** - Announced a definitive agreement to acquire US-based Iten Defense, expanding into the US market, subject to regulatory approvals. [source](https://npaerospace.com/np-aerospace-to-acquire-iten-defense-and-expand-into-the-us-market/)
- **2025-05-20** - Opened a new military vehicle armour complex in England. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/05/20/np-aerospace-armor-complex/)
- **2025-05** - Awarded a multi-year add-on armour contract from General Dynamics Land Systems-Canada for a LAV international order. [source](https://www.edrmagazine.eu/%E2%96%BA-np-aerospace-canada-receives-multi-year-contract-from-general-dynamics-land-systems-for-add-on-armour-systems)

## Links

- Website: https://npaerospace.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/npaerospace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (npaerospace.com), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (03472480), ADS member directory, and reputable defence press (The Defense Post, EDR Magazine, Soldier Systems). Heritage founding date 1926 per company history page; the current limited company entity was incorporated later. Headcount of approximately 350 reported in trade press (March 2025); third-party aggregators give lower, older figures.

companies.name: NquiringMinds
companies.summary: Southampton-based trusted AI and cyber security company building secure data-sharing and analytics for defence, government and industry.
companies.body:
# NquiringMinds

> Southampton-based trusted AI and cyber security company building secure data-sharing and analytics for defence, government and industry.

## What they do

NquiringMinds describes itself as a trusted AI company building advanced analytics on top of solid cyber security principles. Founded in 2010 by AI and cyber security experts from the mobile and defence research industries, it builds secure data-sharing solutions for central government, the wider public sector, and industrial manufacturing and agriculture. Its stated areas of expertise are AI-powered data analytics, secure data sharing and cyber-resilient Internet of Things, with customers across smart cities, Industry 4.0, defence, agriculture, telecoms and health and social care.

## Products and solutions

- **TDX (Trusted Data Exchange)** - cloud-based secure data-sharing and AI-powered analytics platform built for security and scale, handling large-scale and real-time IoT data with owner-controlled access and selective sharing.
- **InterliNQ** - secure IoT hub technology for small, low-power devices, providing security from hardware through to a PKI certificate-based application layer using a peer-to-peer cryptographic model.

Related consortium initiatives include TAIBOM (a trustable AI bill of materials, led by NquiringMinds with partners including BAE Systems and BSI, funded by the UKRI Technology Missions Fund) and Secure Networking by Design work with TechWorks and the University of Oxford.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Participant in the Defence and Security Accelerator (DASA) innovation programme; UKRI Technology Missions Fund (TAIBOM); research collaborations with the University of Oxford and TechWorks.

## Recent news

- **2025-04-29** - TAIBOM project entered its next phase with an invitation to contribute to the trustable AI bill of materials framework. [source](https://nquiringminds.com/news/taibom-launch/)
- **2025-02-25** - Presented on engineering trustworthiness in AI systems at a TechWorks event at Bletchley Park. [source](https://nquiringminds.com/news/computing-breakthrough-and-cognitive-router-technology-promises-secure-networking-by-design/)

## Links

- Website: https://nquiringminds.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nquiringminds

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (nquiringminds.com), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (NQUIRINGMINDS LIMITED, company number 07452630, incorporated 26 November 2010), Southampton Science Park business directory, University of Southampton ECS, IoT Security Foundation and Land Mobile. Size band 11-50 per LinkedIn. No Cyber Essentials, ISO 27001, G-Cloud, techUK or ADS membership evidenced in public sources.

# NuSpace Engineering Ltd

> Space systems engineering consultancy delivering modular, cloud-native architectures for mission-critical space programmes, based in Reading.

## What they do

NuSpace describes itself as a highly specialised micro-SME founded on more than 25 years of combined expertise in space systems and software engineering. It applies agile development approaches, cloud technologies and space systems engineering expertise to create space architectures that are modular, scalable and interoperable, in place of traditional monolithic approaches. The company states its mission as helping to revolutionise the UK space sector by applying best-in-class technologies and modern engineering practices to space systems.

- **Agile software development** - development patterns for rapidly building and prototyping systems.

NYK Component Solutions distributes high-end military and aerospace circular connectors and backshells under full franchise and QPL approval arrangements, based in Hedge End, Southampton. # Occam Group Ltd
> Integrated assurance consultancy delivering safety, security and human factors services across high-hazard and high-security defence environments.
## What they do
Occam Group provides turnkey assurance services covering safety, environmental management, human factors, safety-critical systems, security, fire safety and hazardous materials. The firm works across the programme lifecycle in high-hazard, high-security environments including radiological, explosive and CBRN domains, serving maritime, land, air, infrastructure, weapons and C4ISTAR markets in defence, alongside renewables and space outside defence. Occam Group states it has launched a dedicated security practice alongside its established safety and human factors assurance work.
## Products and solutions
- **Safety and environmental assurance** - safety management, environmental management, materials assurance and independent technical evaluation across the programme lifecycle.
- **Human factors** - insight and assurance of complex sociotechnical systems and human-based safety claims, accredited as a CIEHF Registered Consultancy.
- **Security practice** - governance, risk and compliance; security operations covering threat intelligence, incident response planning and vulnerability management; and assurance and testing covering security audits, penetration testing and red/purple teaming.
- **Fire engineering** - fire safety assurance services.
## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (fully registered).
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2015, Cyber Essentials Plus, CIEHF Registered Consultancy.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Affiliate Organisation of the Safety and Reliability Society (SaRS); Armed Forces Covenant signatory (Silver Defence Employer Recognition Scheme).

companies.body:
# Occam Industries
> Early-stage London-based autonomy company building under the tagline "Autonomy Simplified".
## What they do
Occam Industries is a post-stealth autonomy start-up founded in 2025 and based in London. The company's public positioning is values-led and sits firmly in the Western defence-tech and European-sovereignty bracket, with explicit orientation towards Ukraine. Its stated product is a retrofit computer-vision autopilot for FPV drones, installed as software on existing, mass-manufactured drone airframes without hardware or supply-chain changes.

## Products and solutions

- **OccamX** - a retrofit autopilot using onboard computer vision for perception, target tracking and navigation, intended to reduce reliance on continuous manual control, GPS, or external datalinks in contested or GPS-denied environments.

[source](https://www.eu-startups.com/2026/02/london-based-defencetech-startup-occam-raises-e3-million-to-support-frontline-drone-autonomy-in-ukraine/)

Ocean Infinity deploys fleets of marine robots, operated remotely from onshore control centres via satellite, to capture ocean and seabed data and deliver maritime solutions. companies.body:
# Octric Semiconductors Ltd

> UK manufacturer of compound semiconductors for defence and telecommunications applications, including critical military platforms.

## What they do

Octric develops and manufactures compound semiconductor products used in defence and telecommunications, from a site that has operated continuously since 1991 under successive owners. The company is described as the only secure UK facility with the skills and capability to manufacture semiconductors used in critical military platforms, including the Typhoon fighter jet. The UK Ministry of Defence acquired the Newton Aycliffe facility in September 2024 to secure the defence semiconductor supply chain, and has committed to a 10-year investment plan for the site.

## Products and solutions

- **Gallium arsenide (GaAs) semiconductors** - established production for RF and microwave components used in radar and other high-frequency, high-power applications.
- **Gallium nitride (GaN) and indium phosphide (InP)** - platforms the site states it is expanding production into, alongside its established GaAs line.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Recent news

- **2024-09** - UK Ministry of Defence acquired the Newton Aycliffe compound semiconductor facility, rebranding it Octric, as part of a stated 10-year, £200m investment plan for the site. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/uk-defence-supply-chain-bolstered-to-support-armed-forces)
- **2026-03** - Partnered with South West Durham Training and Bishop Auckland College to take on its first multi-skilled maintenance apprentices. [source](https://bacoll.ac.uk/octric-semiconductors-uk-invests-in-the-future-with-south-west-durham-training-apprenticeship-partnership/)

## Links

companies.body:
# OcuSight Ltd

> Developer of passive surveillance camera systems with AI-driven image processing for situational awareness applications.

## What they do

OcuSight designs passive surveillance cameras and systems integrating advanced image processing and AI algorithms. Their capability set covers IP-based sensors, edge computing, target tracking, motion detection and classification, aimed at delivering enhanced situational awareness. The company is based at the OpTIC Technology Centre in St Asaph, North Wales, and describes its team as bringing over 100 person-years of experience in electro-optical systems for defence and paramilitary applications.

## Products and solutions

- **PARS** - a stabilised imaging and positioner product incorporating a Long-Wave InfraRed (LWIR) camera housed to provide a second axis of motion without external mechanisms, a single connector for camera and stabiliser functions, and an integrated IMU for motion tracking and control. Positioned as cost-effective stabilised imaging for uncrewed ground and surface platforms and one-way mission systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Aerospace Wales Forum.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Exhibited PARS at DSEI UK. [source](https://militaryembedded.com/radar-ew/sensors/mission-critical-surveillance-and-positioner-products-announced-at-dsei-uk)

# ODU UK Ltd

> UK subsidiary of German connector manufacturer ODU, supplying components and equipment for defence and aerospace applications.

## What they do

ODU UK is the British subsidiary of ODU GmbH, a specialist in electrical connector and contact solutions. The company supplies components and equipment technologies to defence, aerospace and industrial customers from its facility in Runcorn, Cheshire.

## Products and solutions

- **ODU AMC** - break-away military connector rated for 5,000-plus mating cycles, described by ODU for next-generation military applications.
- **ODU AMC NP** - a standardised connector used on Dismounted Soldier Systems, covering tactical soldier batteries, power distribution units, conformable wearable batteries and C4ISR peripherals.
- **ODU MEDI-SNAP** - lightweight, plastic-housed push-pull and break-away connector, up to 75 percent lighter than metal equivalents, used across medical, test and industrial applications.
- ODU states it has supplied more than 100,000 miniature push-pull helmet connectors for the UK's Bowman military communications programme since 2002.

# Oldbury UK Limited

> Defence and industrial manufacturer supplying components, platform structures, platform systems and weapons from Wolverhampton.

## What they do

Oldbury UK is a manufacturing organisation supplying a wide range of defence products including components, platform structures, platform systems, platform interiors, platform integration, and weapons. The ADS directory also lists PPE, safety equipment and construction and infrastructure in their capability set. The company traces its origins to 1861 and now operates as the specialist engineering and defence products division of Boughton Engineering Ltd, from a facility in Wolverhampton with overhead craneage, fabrication and fitting bays, a dedicated paint shop and axle shop, and in-house CAD design engineering.

## Products and solutions

- **Specialist and bespoke trailers** - design, development, manufacture, integration and supply of specialist and bespoke mobility and transportable systems, including Urgent Operational Requirement (UOR) solutions, from lightweight through to maximum-weight special types.
- **Hook-loaders and skip-loaders** - carrier platform systems for defence and industrial use.
- **Theatre support equipment** - enclosed generator packages, high-performance air-conditioning units, solar shields, environmental protection systems and shelters, and high free-volume sand and dust filtration packages.

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

companies.body:
# Oldham Engineering Ltd

> Defence and nuclear sector manufacturer offering coded fabrication, CNC machining, complex assembly and testing from Greater Manchester.

## What they do

Oldham Engineering is a preferred supplier to the defence and nuclear industries, trading for over 160 years and operating across 80,000 square feet at its Oldham site plus a second site in Sheffield. The company offers in-house coded fabrication, medium-heavy CNC machining, and complex assembly and testing, specialising in high-integrity assemblies, bespoke and batch complex fabricated and machined components, and turnkey project management. Beyond defence and nuclear, the company also serves the oil and gas, subsea, aerospace, and rail sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Coded fabrication and welding** - fabrication to AWS D1.1, BS EN ISO 15614, ANSI, and NORSOK codes.
- **Medium-heavy CNC machining** - bespoke and batch complex machined components.
- **Complex assembly and testing** - high-integrity assemblies with turnkey project management.
- **Nuclear engineering services** - bespoke fabrications, decommissioning engineering, heavy machining, and welding for the nuclear sector.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (certificate FM24503, UKAS-accredited via BSI)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; associate member of the Nuclear AMRC; signatory to the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority supply chain charter

Olive Jar Digital is a UK digital services and consultancy firm focused on MOD and central government work. The business provides managed digital delivery and expert talent augmentation, primarily through the Digital Outcomes & Specialists (DOS) and Crown Commercial Service (CCS) frameworks. # Olsen Actuation UK Ltd

> Precision actuator and motion control manufacturer serving aerospace, defence, and other demanding platform environments.

## What they do

Olsen Actuation UK Ltd, trading as Olsen Actuators & Drives, designs and manufactures actuator and motion control solutions for challenging mechanical applications across aerospace, defence, and industrial sectors. The company supplies components and subcomponents for platform systems including flight control, hydraulic and pneumatic systems, landing gear, propeller control, and helm/steering systems. It is based at the Sci-Tech Daresbury Innovation Centre in Cheshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Actuators and drives** - precision actuation solutions for aerospace and defence platform systems, including primary flight control actuation.
- **Electric roller screw actuators** - UK supplier of servo-electric roller screw actuator technology, including a named product line pairing an inverted roller screw with brushless servo motor technology.
- **Motion control components** - electrical, electronic, and mechanical subcomponents for platform integration.
- **Test rig actuation** - actuation for dynamic, static, and endurance test rigs used in defence prime contractor work.

# Omni Executive Ltd

> Defence, national security, intelligence, and critical infrastructure consultancy delivering solutions in complex and demanding environments.

## What they do

Omni Executive Ltd is the UK arm of the Omni Executive group, launched to extend the group's defence and national security capabilities into the United Kingdom. The group provides solutions focused on defence, national security, intelligence, and critical infrastructure, working to further the national interest. Its stated approach centres on trusted, proven delivery in demanding environments, protecting individuals, organisations, and governments from traditional and non-traditional risks. Group-wide, the business states it draws on more than 400 professionals across consulting, vetting, security, and aerospace, including veterans, former senior police, and intelligence specialists.

companies.name: Onebrief
companies.summary: Military planning software platform designed to accelerate staff decision cycles and enable collaboration across classification levels.
companies.body:
# Onebrief

> Military planning software platform designed to accelerate staff decision cycles and enable collaboration across classification levels.

## What they do

Onebrief is a software platform built for military staff operations, live on NIPR, SIPR, JWICS, and coalition networks, and accredited to Impact Level 5 (IL5). It is designed to drive faster decision cycles and enable what the company describes as superhuman military staffs through improved planning and collaboration tooling. The company states it is the planning layer within the US Army's Next Generation Command and Control (NGC2) prototype and has been used in the 4th Infantry Division's IVY STING experimentation series.

## Products and solutions

- **Collaborative planning** - real-time, cross-echelon plan editing and synchronisation, with course-of-action development support.
- **AI-assisted staff work** - agentic AI, built on Anthropic's Claude, trained on open-source material, military doctrine, and historical orders and staff outputs, supporting contextual planning, automated intelligence processing, multi-domain coordination, and course-of-action drafting.
- **Operational data visualisation** - chart-building and relationship visualisation of the operational picture for staff planning.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Onebrief closed a $200 million Series D round at a valuation of over $2.15 billion, co-led by Sapphire Ventures, alongside the acquisition of wargaming company Battle Road Digital. [source](https://sapphireventures.com/blog/the-ultimate-command-operating-system-for-global-defense-why-were-excited-to-co-lead-onebriefs-200m-series-d/)
- **2026-06** - Onebrief reported on scaling its Next Generation Command and Control (NGC2) support to a full division through the 4th Infantry Division's IVY STING experimentation series. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260626590172/en/Onebrief-Compresses-Army-Planning-Timelines-from-Hours-to-Minutes-as-Next-Generation-Command-and-Control-Scales-to-a-Full-Division)

Onodrim Industries is building a defence industrial platform aimed at high-priority national security challenges, including border protection and resilient supply chains for mission-critical systems. companies.name: Ontic Engineering & Manufacturing Ltd
companies.summary: Global aerospace OEM specialising in the acquisition, manufacture, and support of legacy and hard-to-source aerospace product lines.
companies.body:
# Ontic Engineering & Manufacturing Ltd

> Global aerospace OEM specialising in the acquisition, manufacture, and support of legacy and hard-to-source aerospace product lines.

## What they do

Ontic is a global aerospace OEM with over 1,300 employees across seven sites and four time zones, including its Cheltenham and Bishops Cleeve sites in the UK. The company acquires product lines divested by leading aviation OEMs, manufacturing and supporting those components over the long term so the original manufacturers can focus on new development. Its portfolio spans electronics, electromechanical systems, hydraulics, pneumatics, and structural components, including fuel measurement and gauging systems, avionics, and cockpit instruments and controls, across more than 200 licensed product lines. Platforms supported include Airbus and Boeing commercial airliners, Sikorsky and Leonardo helicopters, and fighter aircraft including the F-16. Ontic is owned by CVC Capital Partners, following acquisition from BBA Aviation in 2019 and a recapitalisation with new minority investors in 2024.

## Products and solutions

- **Legacy aerospace product line acquisition** - acquiring and sustaining product lines divested by original aviation OEMs.
- **Electromechanical and fuel systems** - fuel measurement and gauging equipment, including systems transferred from Airbus for the A320 family.
- **Avionics and cockpit instruments** - cockpit instruments and controls for commercial and military platforms.
- **MRO services** - maintenance, repair and overhaul support for legacy aerospace components.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 (aerospace quality management, accredited by Intertek under the ANAB/IAQG ICOT scheme); FAA Air Agency Certificate (Miramar site)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04-16** - Ontic agreed to acquire Woodward Inc.'s pilot controls product line, covering throttle quadrant assemblies, rudder pedals, and passive side sticks for commercial and defence applications. [source](https://www.ontic.com/news/ontic-expands-licence-portfolio-with-acquisition-of-woodward-pilot-controls-product-line)
- **2026-06** - Ontic signed a lease on a new facility in Weston, Florida, as part of its continued site expansion. [source](https://avitrader.com/2026/06/22/ontic-signs-lease-on-new-weston-florida-facility/)

## Links

# Open Cosmos Ltd

> End-to-end space mission provider offering bespoke mission services, shared constellation infrastructure, and downstream data analytics.

## What they do

Open Cosmos delivers space missions across three service lines: Open Orbit (bespoke mission services), Open Constellation (shared standard infrastructure), and Data Cosmos (downstream data analytics). The company is based at the Harwell Campus in Oxfordshire, a principal UK space cluster.

## Products and solutions

- **Open Orbit** - Bespoke end-to-end space mission design and delivery.
- **Open Constellation** - Mutualised satellite infrastructure for shared access.
- **Data Cosmos** - Earth observation and space-derived data analytics services, combining satellite, drone and sensor data with vector layers on open geospatial standards, with data visualisation tools and AI-based imagery analytics delivered through third-party analytic partners.

companies.name: OpenWorks Engineering Ltd
companies.summary: Counter-drone and autonomous optical detection and tracking technology for defence and security.
companies.body:
# OpenWorks Engineering Ltd

> Counter-drone and autonomous optical detection and tracking technology for defence and security.

## What they do

OpenWorks Engineering develops counter-drone capture systems and autonomous optical detection, tracking and classification solutions, describing itself as a provider of counter-UAS, air defence and surveillance technology. Its stated aim is to protect the territory and airspace of NATO countries and allies, and to protect high-profile assets, facilities, the public and VIPs from aerial threats. Products are deployable on static, mobile and unmanned platforms. The company states its specialist capability includes dynamic positioners, EO/IR optical units, sensor fusion including with radar, and a common interface enabling integration of third-party detectors, classifiers, interceptors and effectors.

## Products and solutions

- **SkyWall Patrol** - handheld pneumatic launcher that physically captures a hostile drone in a net-carrying smart projectile, using an onboard targeting system; projectiles are reusable and deployed operationally for VIP and event protection.
- **Vision Flex** - modular electro-optical (HD daylight) and cooled thermal (MWIR) camera system for static, vehicle-mounted or rapid tripod deployment, with built-in AI modules for classification, tracking and false-alarm reduction, and integration with third-party command and control systems.
- **Vision Pace** - stabilised, direct-drive optical tracking and targeting system for on-the-move use on vehicles and vessels, built through integration with third-party gimbal and radar sensors for cueing kinetic and non-kinetic effectors.
- **Vision Guard** - portable, rapidly deployable autonomous surveillance system combining daylight panoramic imaging with configurable active and passive sensors, including radar and acoustic options, for long-range detection, tracking and identification of small unmanned aircraft.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; North East Regional Defence and Security Cluster (NERDSC) Steering Committee.
- **Other:** Armed Forces Covenant Employer Recognition Scheme, Bronze award.

## Recent news

- **2025-09-03** - Launched Vision Pace at DSEI 2025 for on-the-move targeting of aerial threats. [source](https://openworksengineering.com/on-the-move-kinetic-threat-targeting-launched-at-dsei-2025/)
- **2025-07-01** - Vision Guard handed over to troops during Project Vanaheim, a joint UK/US counter-UAS experimentation exercise. [source](https://openworksengineering.com/soldiers-exercise-with-vision-guard-as-part-of-project-vanaheim/)
- **2026-03-24** - Vision Flex electro-optical sensor integrated with a third-party counter-drone command and control platform. [source](https://openworksengineering.com/openworks-strengthens-droneshield-c2-capabilities-with-vision-flex-sensor-integration/)
- **2026-04-28** - Joined the North East Regional Defence and Security Cluster (NERDSC) Steering Committee. [source](https://openworksengineering.com/openworks-joins-north-east-regional-defence-security-cluster-nerdsc-steering-committee/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.openworksengineering.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15). Company website and press releases.

companies.name: OPSWAT Ltd
companies.summary: Cybersecurity platform protecting critical infrastructure through malware prevention and secure data transfer.
companies.body:
# OPSWAT Ltd

> Cybersecurity platform protecting critical infrastructure through malware prevention and secure data transfer.

## What they do

OPSWAT provides threat prevention and process creation tools focused on eliminating malware and zero-day attacks at the point of data transfer and device access. Its products are deployed to protect critical infrastructure environments across government and defence. The UK entity, OPSWAT Ltd, is registered in London; the global company was founded in 2002.

## Products and solutions

- **MetaDefender** - multi-scanning across multiple anti-malware engines, Deep CDR (content disarm and reconstruction), sandbox and dynamic analysis, and vulnerability and SBOM detection.
- **MetaDefender Kiosk** - scans and sanitises removable media at the perimeter, including the K3001 model.
- **MetaDefender Drive** - verifies device and endpoint security before connection, used in supply chain security contexts.
- **MetaDefender NetWall** - data diodes and secure gateways for one-way OT data transfer across trust boundaries.
- **MetaDefender Aether** - combines sandboxing, machine-learning scoring and threat hunting for perimeter security.
- **Cross-Domain Solutions** - combines data diodes with threat prevention for defence, intelligence and critical infrastructure customers.
- **MetaAccess** - device compliance and network access control for secure endpoint management.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO/IEC 27001:2013; Common Criteria EAL2+ (MetaDefender Core and Kiosk, certified by the Canadian Centre for Cyber Security); FIPS 140-3 validated cryptographic modules.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-02-10** - OPSWAT reported more than 25 percent year-on-year ARR growth for 2025, over 2,000 customers, triple-digit growth in its data-diode business, and new offices and critical-infrastructure-protection labs including in the UK. [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/opswat-delivers-a-landmark-year-of-innovation-and-growth-302684032.html)
- **2026-05-07** - NIST's Cryptographic Module Validation Program authenticated an OPSWAT cryptographic module. [NIST CMVP]

## Links

- Website: https://www.opswat.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/opswat

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (opswat.com), Companies House (no. 09402526), PR Newswire, ADS Group members directory, ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15).

companies.name: Optalysys Ltd
companies.summary: Silicon photonics company enabling Fully Homomorphic Encryption for secure computation at scale.
companies.body:
# Optalysys Ltd

> Silicon photonics company enabling Fully Homomorphic Encryption for secure computation at scale.

## What they do

Optalysys uses advanced silicon photonics to enable Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), allowing data to be processed without decryption. This addresses technical, regulatory, and commercial barriers to data sharing across defence, intelligence, and sensitive government environments.

## Products and solutions

- **FHE accelerator** - photonic co-processor enabling encrypted computation at performance levels not achievable in conventional silicon.
- **LightLocker Node** - dedicated FHE-acceleration hardware appliance supporting confidential computation use cases such as private data sharing and post-quantum secure processing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Cloud Security Alliance FHE Working Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01-22** - Raised further funding, including participation from the UK government's National Security Strategic Investment Fund, to advance photonic computing and fund expansion. [source](https://optalysys.com/resource/optalysys-secures-23m-funding-to-advance-photonic-computing/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.optalysys.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15). Company website and press releases.

companies.summary: Tech-enabled manufacturer and distributor of precision fasteners and engineered components for defence and mission-critical industries.
companies.body:
# Optimas OE Solutions Ltd

> Tech-enabled manufacturer and distributor of precision fasteners and engineered components for defence and mission-critical industries.

## What they do

Optimas supplies precision components, engineered fasteners, and integrated supply chain solutions to global OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers in defence and other mission-critical sectors. The company provides fully customised inventory management and manufacturing programmes designed to support operational readiness and reduce production downtime. The UK operation is based in Gloucestershire, part of a group headquartered in Illinois, United States.

## Products and solutions

- **Engineered fasteners** - custom-engineered fastening solutions built to application-specific tolerances and performance requirements.
- **Standard fasteners and C-Class components** - industrial screws, nuts, bolts, washers and other high-volume production parts.
- **OptiSpec** - bill-of-materials management tool aimed at improving traceability and supply chain visibility for defence manufacturers.
- **OptiTech managed inventory systems** - customised vendor-managed inventory programmes automating fastener replenishment.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# OptiMatrix
> Independent defence and aerospace consultancy specialising in procurement, supply chain, commercial, and operations management. JOSCAR registered.
## What they do
OptiMatrix provides independent consulting services to the defence, aerospace and security sector across procurement, supply chain, commercial and operations management. Work extends to programme management, project management and bid management. The firm has supported both industry clients (from SMEs to international primes) and government agencies, including MOD transformation programmes and complex procurement environments. JOSCAR registered since 2020; customers using JOSCAR include BAE Systems, MOD, Babcock, Leonardo, QinetiQ, NATS, Meggitt, MBDA, General Dynamics, Rolls-Royce, Roke and Leidos.

## Products and solutions

- **Commercial strategy development and execution** - shaping how equipment and services are sourced, acquired and supported through life.
- **Bid and proposal development** - support for industry clients preparing defence and aerospace tenders.
- **Market engagement, sourcing and tendering** - support across procurement and supply chain optimisation.
- **Operational design and restructure** - support for organisational and operational change programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR Registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group (Defence SME Committee); Defence Industry Joint Council (DIJC) Communications forum; UK Defence and Security Export (UKDSE) Faculty.

companies.body:
# Optimise Engineering Ltd

> Systems engineering consultancy supporting complex defence acquisition, design, test, and maintenance programmes.

## What they do

Optimise Engineering helps defence and government organisations respond to the challenges of increasingly complex system design, acquisition, testing, and maintenance. They provide engineering consultancy, systems integration, software services, and engineering training, with a core specialism in IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management tooling (DOORS, DOORS Next, Rhapsody, Engineering Workflow Management and Engineering Test Management). Sectors served include aerospace, defence, automotive, energy, infrastructure, medical devices, rail and utilities.

## Products and solutions

- **IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management training** - instructor-led courses on DOORS, DOORS Next, Rhapsody, Engineering Workflow Management and Engineering Test Management, delivered on-site, in Lincoln, or live online.
- **Introduction to Systems Engineering with Requirements Writing** - foundational course on lifecycle principles, requirements traceability and verification methods.
- **INCOSE Systems Engineering Professional exam preparation** - structured, handbook-aligned exam preparation course.
- **Optimise3P** - managed and cloud-hosting service for IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management, covering licensing, hosting infrastructure, training and support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 9001:2015.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; IBM Gold Business Partner; Institute for Systems Engineering (IfSE) UK Endorsed Training Provider.

companies.name: OrbiSky
companies.summary: Builds secure, assured Edge AI and autonomy for defence, space and critical infrastructure, combining cybersecurity with runtime monitoring.
companies.body:
# OrbiSky
> Builds secure, assured Edge AI and autonomy for defence, space and critical infrastructure, combining cybersecurity with runtime monitoring.
## What they do
OrbiSky develops Edge AI and autonomy solutions for defence, space and critical infrastructure environments, integrating cybersecurity with runtime monitoring to deliver assured autonomous systems. The company's public description now centres on in-orbit manufacturing mission assurance: turning process telemetry, provenance records, anomaly detection and acceptance metrics into structured evidence for hosted payload providers, orbital manufacturing teams, mission assurance teams and in-space assembly and manufacturing (ISAM) operators. A member of the D3IP community at Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park.

## Products and solutions

- **Mission evidence platform** - converts runtime telemetry, logs, control actions and calibration context into structured, reviewable evidence packs for in-orbit manufacturing operations.
- **Anomaly-aware verification** - flags missing, delayed, corrupted or off-nominal data with traceability to the affected mission claims or decisions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Other:** UK Space Agency-funded studies under the Sustainability and In-Space Assembly and Manufacturing (ISAM) and Unlocking Space programmes; member of the D3IP community at Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-09** - Awarded UK Space Agency funding for the "SkyYield" study, designing a payload for processing ZBLAN fluoride glass in microgravity for optical fibre manufacturing. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/new-studies-for-manufacturing-advanced-materials-in-orbit)

## Links

- Website: https://orbisky.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website and UK Government press release.

companies.name: Orbit Fab Ltd
companies.summary: In-orbit propellant supply and refuelling infrastructure company extending the lifespan and flexibility of spacecraft.
companies.body:
# Orbit Fab Ltd

> In-orbit propellant supply and refuelling infrastructure company extending the lifespan and flexibility of spacecraft.

## What they do

Orbit Fab is building orbital refuelling infrastructure to provide a ubiquitous supply of propellant for government and commercial in-orbit assets, ending the single-use paradigm for spacecraft. Their UK team operates from the Harwell Science and Innovation Campus and leads missions focused on space sustainability.

## Products and solutions

- **RAFTI (Rapidly Attachable Fluid Transfer Interface)** - an open-licence, industry-standard docking and refuelling valve supporting multiple storable propellants, approved by the US Space Force as an accepted refuelling interface for military satellites.
- **GRIP** - the active-side docking and refuelling nozzle that mates with RAFTI.
- **RAVEN shuttle and NEST depot** - refuelling shuttle and propellant depot expanding the in-space refuelling network.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Other:** RAFTI's design follows CONFERS (Consortium for Execution of Rendezvous and Servicing Operations) best-practice standards.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-16** - Selected by NASA to develop fluid transfer technology for the Lunar Gateway. [source](https://www.orbitfab.com/news/orbit-fab-selected-by-nasa-to-develop-fluid-transfer-technology-for-lunar-gateway/)
- **2026-03-05** - Announced a partnership with Airbus Defence and Space on satellite refuelling. [source](https://www.orbitfab.com/news/orbit-fab-and-airbus-defence-and-space-work-together-on-satellite-refuelling/)
- **2026-04-14** - Unveiled the RAVEN shuttle and NEST depot, expanding the in-space refuelling network. [source](https://www.orbitfab.com/news/orbit-fab-unveils-raven-shuttle-nest-depot-for-in-space-refueling-network/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.orbitfab.com

Public information verified 2026-07-05. ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15). Company website and press releases.

companies.name: Origami Labs UK Ltd
companies.summary: Applied AI and autonomy research and development consultancy, maturing technologies from TRL 1 to TRL 7 for defence and security customers.
companies.body:
# Origami Labs UK Ltd

> Applied AI and autonomy research and development consultancy, maturing technologies from TRL 1 to TRL 7 for defence and security customers.

## What they do

Origami Labs delivers applied research, development and consultancy services focused on artificial intelligence and autonomy technologies. Their work spans TRL 1 through 7, covering defence consultancy, unmanned systems, simulation and modelling, biometrics and imagery, and security consultancy. Capability pillars include Edge Intelligence (perception, computer vision, natural language processing and autonomous behaviours for low-power processing on small unmanned aircraft), Optimisation and Planning (geospatial analysis, routing and tasking), and Autonomous Systems Engineering (architecture, integration, assurance and human-machine teaming).

## Products and solutions

- **Multi-sensor fusion for future combat air** - exploration of multi-platform, multi-sensor fusion architectures and classification performance trade-offs for next-generation combat air programmes.
- **Person re-identification** - unmanned aircraft-based system for tracking a person of interest in a crowd using multimodal inputs, including imagery and text description.
- **Sonar classification** - self-supervised and contrastive learning techniques applied to submarine sonar classification.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Origin Safety

> Independent safety engineering consultancy providing consultancy and auditing services for safety-critical systems in defence and civil sectors.

## What they do

Origin Safety supports the design and operation of safety-critical systems, covering projects from initial conception through to system certification. Their portfolio includes submarines, satellites, and other novel and complex engineering programmes across both defence and civil sectors, including aviation, nuclear, naval, rail, automotive and land. Safety engineers are described as Chartered and TÜV-certified Functional Safety Engineers.

## Products and solutions

- **Safety case development and management** - including Hazard Log development and safety requirement derivation.
- **Hazard identification and risk assessment** - including Failure Modes Effects and Criticality Analysis, and Fault Tree and Event Tree Analysis.
- **Functional and software safety** - assessment against international and regulatory safety standards.
- **Availability, reliability and maintainability analysis** - and cost-benefit analysis to support ALARP assessments.
- **Safety auditing** - including in-service safety performance monitoring and end-of-life or decommissioning safety cases.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (Management of Safety Engineering and Consultancy Services); Cyber Essentials.

companies.body:
# Orqa

> Croatian manufacturer of FPV drone goggles, components and complete unmanned aerial systems.

## What they do

Orqa is a Croatian drone-tech company headquartered in Osijek that designs and manufactures first-person view (FPV) equipment and complete unmanned aerial systems. It began with the FPV.One goggles for the consumer and prosumer market and has expanded into mission-ready aerial robotics for defence and security use. Development and production are based in Osijek, with products marketed as made in Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **FPV.One goggles** - FPV goggle systems for piloting drones, including the FPV.One Pilot and OLED variants.
- **FPV MRM-2 Interceptor** - an FPV interceptor drone reported to be in use by the Croatian military.
- **FPV components and systems** - NDAA-compliant, Chinese-component-free FPV drones produced at the Osijek facility.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Manufacturing:** states an annual production capacity of around 280,000 NDAA-compliant FPV drones.

## Recent news

- **2024** - secured a 5.8 million USD investment from Lightspeed Venture Partners. [source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orqa)
- **2025-08** - the FPV MRM-2 Interceptor reported as in use by the Croatian military. [source](https://total-croatia-news.com/news/osijek-orqa-croatian-military/)
- **2026-04** - signed a memorandum of cooperation with Ukrainian defence-tech company General Cherry. [source](https://defence-industry.eu/croatian-company-orqa-boosts-annual-fpv-drone-output-to-280000-units-as-it-removes-reliance-on-chinese-technology/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/orqafpv

companies.body:
# Orscheln Europe

> Designer and manufacturer of mechanical and electronic control products for aerospace, defence, commercial vehicle and marine markets.

## What they do

Orscheln Products designs, manufactures and supplies control products across aerospace, defence, commercial vehicle and marine sectors. The Rugby, England site is the group's European hub, serving OEM and aftermarket customers and managing a network of F.A.S.T.® distributors across Europe. The wider Orscheln group is headquartered in Moberly, Missouri, USA, where it manufactures aircraft controls and holds an FAA PMA-approved quality management system.

## Products and solutions

- **Mechanical control cables** - push-pull, tension and ball-bearing control cable assemblies for aerospace, defence, commercial vehicle and marine applications.
- **Aerospace control cables and cable assemblies** - cable-based control systems for commercial aviation, general aviation, light jet, helicopter and military aircraft, plus bonding straps, RAT release and hold-open struts.
- **Electronic gear selectors and actuators** - electronic control actuation for commercial vehicle and defence applications, including shift solutions for AT/AMT transmissions on military wheeled and tracked vehicles.
- **Electronic throttle controls** - electronic foot throttle and pedal box systems for defence and commercial vehicle markets.
- **Fluid level indicators** - dipstick assemblies and fluid level monitoring for military and commercial vehicle platforms.
- **Park-brake systems** - park-brake cable and lever systems for defence and commercial vehicle applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, AS9100D, ISO 14001, FAA PMA-approved quality management system (group-wide).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026** - Orscheln exhibited at PNAA 2026, showcasing ball-bearing control cable demonstrations and aerospace-programme solutions from prototype through production. [Orscheln Products](https://orschelnproducts.com/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/orscheln-products-llc

companies.name: Oshkosh Corporation
companies.summary: US-headquartered defence and industrial manufacturer producing specialist vehicles, components and weapons systems for military and government customers worldwide.
companies.body:
# Oshkosh Corporation

> US-headquartered defence and industrial manufacturer producing specialist vehicles, components and weapons systems for military and government customers worldwide.

## What they do

Oshkosh Corporation designs and manufactures purpose-built vehicles, defence systems and components for military and government operators through its Oshkosh Defense business. Its defence portfolio includes tactical wheeled vehicles, protected mobility platforms and associated sustainment services, delivered to the US military and allied foreign governments. Oshkosh Defense maintains a UK branch office in Bristol, registered at Bristol Business Park, alongside its global manufacturing base in the United States.

## Products and solutions

- **JLTV / eJLTV (Joint Light Tactical Vehicle)** - light tactical vehicle family with the TAK-4i intelligent independent suspension system, scalable protection levels and integrated plug-and-play C4ISR provision; a hybrid-electric variant (eJLTV) has also been shown publicly. Used by the US military and allied forces including Lithuania, Slovenia, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Mongolia, Belgium, Slovakia, Brazil, Romania, Israel and the Netherlands.
- **Family of Medium Tactical Vehicles (FMTV) A2** - medium tactical wheeled vehicles supplied to the US Army.
- **Family of Heavy Tactical Vehicles (FHTV) / Palletized Load System (PLS) A2** - heavy tactical vehicles and load-handling systems supplied under US Army contract.
- **ROGUE-Fires / L-MAV** - remotely operated and autonomous multi-mission ground vehicle platforms built on Oshkosh's tactical vehicle base, developed for the US Marine Corps and demonstrated with third-party mission payloads.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026** - Oshkosh Defense displayed an armed variant of the JLTV at Defence IQ's International Armoured Vehicles conference in Farnborough, UK. [Oshkosh Defense](https://oshkoshdefense.com/)
- **2026** - Oshkosh Defense showcased tactical mobility solutions, including the hybrid-electric JLTV (eJLTV), at Eurosatory 2026. [Oshkosh Defense](https://www.joint-forces.com/defence-equipment-news/91693-oshkosh-defense-showcase-at-eurosatory-2026)
- **2026** - Oshkosh Defense announced orders valued at $142 million for Family of Medium Tactical Vehicles (FMTV) A2, and an $89 million US Army order for Palletized Load System (PLS) A2 vehicles under the Family of Heavy Tactical Vehicles (FHTV) V contract. [StockTitan](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/OSK/oshkosh-defense-highlights-u-s-army-modernization-with-89-million-vanyn9hvuplx.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.oshkoshcorporation.com

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/oshkosh-corporation

companies.name: OSINT Industries
companies.summary: Automated, scalable open-source intelligence platform serving law enforcement, government and OSINT practitioners across more than 1,500 sources.
companies.body:
# OSINT Industries

> Automated, scalable open-source intelligence platform serving law enforcement, government and OSINT practitioners across more than 1,500 sources.

## What they do

OSINT Industries provides an automated OSINT platform that checks emails, phone numbers and usernames in real time across more than 1,500 sources to identify linked accounts on social and messaging platforms. Customer base includes more than 5,000 law enforcement departments worldwide. Searches are not retained post-query. The company also delivers tailored OSINT training and bespoke tooling for clients with specific operational needs.

## Products and solutions

- **OSINT platform** - real-time enrichment of email, phone number and username selectors across more than 1,500 public sources, with no retention of search data.
- **API access** - integration of real-time OSINT data into a customer's existing platforms, including bulk data integration.
- **Training programmes** - modular, sector-specific OSINT training delivered live online or in person, including for law enforcement, government, non-profit and journalism sectors.
- **Free platform access schemes** - access for law enforcement, government, non-profit and journalism sector users.

## Recent news

- **2025-12-03** - OSINT Industries supported the New South Wales Police in the Strike Force Constantine child exploitation investigation. [GlobeNewswire](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/12/03/3198535/0/en/Catching-Satanic-Predators-Protecting-Kids-OSINT-Industries-Supports-NSW-Police-in-Strike-Force-Constantine-Investigation.html)

Founded in 2010, OSL Technology supplies and integrates drone detection and counter-drone systems designed to create safer spaces in complex three-dimensional environments. companies.body:
# OSPL UK Ltd

> Manufacturer of TEMPEST, rugged and secure computing and communications solutions for NATO military organisations and government agencies.

## What they do

OSPL designs and manufactures TEMPEST-approved, rugged and secure equipment for military and government customers across NATO. The company operates and manages a TEMPEST test facility approved by NATO and the Dutch national TEMPEST authority, providing both product manufacture and third-party TEMPEST testing and modification services. OSPL is listed as a NATO SDIP-55 Certified TEMPEST Vendor and appears on NATO NCIA and EU approved TEMPEST supplier registers.

## Products and solutions

- **TEMPEST rugged workstations and laptops** - TEMPEST-certified ruggedised computing platforms built on rugged laptop and workstation hardware, for military and government use.
- **TEMPEST computing and communications catalogue** - a wider range of TEMPEST-certified PCs, thin and zero clients, servers, displays, printers, scanners, network and communications products, IP phones, projectors, racks and enclosures, and video conference systems.
- **TEMPEST test and modification services** - testing, ruggedisation and modification of third-party equipment to TEMPEST standards, alongside security consultancy, installation and maintenance.

companies.body:
# Ovation Systems Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of rugged, high-performance video surveillance products for military, police and government law enforcement agencies worldwide.

## What they do

Ovation Systems designs, develops and manufactures its own range of rugged video recording and surveillance products for covert vehicle and body-worn deployments. The company states it has supplied the world's law enforcement, military and government agencies with video and surveillance products for over twenty years, with all products designed, developed and manufactured in the UK. Products are supplied to military, police and government law enforcement customers and include digital video recorders and streamers with SD, HD, WiFi and 4G connectivity.

## Products and solutions

- **FlashBack-2 and FlashBack-3** - miniature, rugged and compact digital video recorders for covert, body-worn and mobile recording; FlashBack-3 uses H.264 video compression, offering over an hour of record time per GB.
- **AfterBurner and AfterBurner-2** - evidential DVD and digital video recorders designed to meet police evidential standards.
- **AfterBurner-IP** - 4-channel IP video recorder.
- **ViewLock-II and Micro-ViewLock-II** - video encryption systems using line-cut-and-rotate encryption with programmable encryption keys; Micro-ViewLock-II is a miniature version for ultra-covert and body-worn use.
- **Digital video recorders and streamers** - compact, rugged flash-memory SD and HD recorders for covert vehicle and body-worn use, with WiFi and 4G connectivity options.

companies.name: Overview Ltd
companies.summary: Innovators in sensor systems and sensor pointing technologies, differentiated by agility, low latency and direct-drive design.
companies.body:
# Overview Ltd

> Innovators in sensor systems and sensor pointing technologies, differentiated by agility, low latency and direct-drive design.

## What they do

Overview Ltd designs, develops and manufactures Integrated Servo Drives, sensor pointing solutions and remote autonomous sensor systems. The company states it is a leader in integrated servo motors and their application into mechatronic sensor positioning solutions, serving the Defence, Security, Energy, Broadcast/Pro AV and Environmental markets. Overview says it has invested more than 20% of revenue in UK-based R&D every year since 1988, and is a member of both the ADS Group and the D3IP community at Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park.

## Products and solutions

- **Servotorq I and Servotorq II** - integrated servo motor technology underlying Overview's drive products; Servotorq II delivers torque up to 4Nm and speeds up to 1000°/s, with direct-drive accuracy and repeatability to 0.0055°.
- **iBLDC positioning mechanism** - direct-drive pan-tilt-zoom (PTZ) mechanism built around Overview's Servotorq drives, aimed at applications needing agile, silent and ultra-smooth sensor pointing.
- **Product families (Titan, Leto, Miranda, Atlas, Artemis, Helios, Lelantos, Hydra, AdvISE, PodView)** - Overview's named ranges of integrated servo drives and sensor positioning products, applied across surveillance, camera pointing and remote sensor platforms.
- **Case study application** - Overview states its Atlas-derived Servotorq technology was used by a compact surveillance radar manufacturer as the motion platform within a third-party counter-drone solution.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials Plus, IASME Cyber Assurance
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; D3IP community, Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park

## Recent news

_No dated news items from the last 12 months were found from public sources at time of writing. The company's most recent verifiable public recognition is the Queen's Award for Enterprise in Innovation 2020, which pre-dates the review window and is not listed as recent news._

## Links
