companies.name: Oxford Dynamics Limited
companies.summary: UK sovereign AI defence company building multi-agent AI and robotics for sensing, sense-making and action at the tactical edge.
companies.body:
# Oxford Dynamics Limited

> UK sovereign AI defence company building multi-agent AI and robotics for sensing, sense-making and action at the tactical edge.

## What they do

Oxford Dynamics describes itself as a sovereign AI defence company building a unified system for sensing, sense-making and action, with AI and robotics at the edge and humans in control. It engineers autonomous systems, robotics and multi-agent AI for defence forces, with systems trained on real-world scenarios and engineered for regulated, contested domains. The company is based at Harwell Campus in Oxfordshire.

## Products and solutions

- **AVIS (A Very Intelligent System)** - flagship multi-agent AI engine; a modular, containerised data-interrogation and analytics platform providing explainable insights and command-and-control from tactical edge to command level in bandwidth-denied environments.
- **SR-1** - multi-sensor robot for drone detection, fusing EO/IR, RF, LiDAR and radar for passive scouting and AI-directed investigation.
- **STRIDER** - autonomous ground robotic platform for hazardous (CBRN, ordnance, logistics) environments with hot-swap payloads and beyond-line-of-sight tele-operation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** UK MOD Digital Decision Accelerators for Defence (DDAD) Open Framework, Lot 2; UK MOD Enterprise Agreement LITE.
- **Programmes:** DASA and Dstl funding history (first DASA contract 2020).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-08-07** - BAE Systems made a strategic minority investment in Oxford Dynamics. [source](https://www.army-technology.com/news/bae-systems-oxford-dynamics-ai/)
- **2026-02-17** - Secured a place on the UK MOD Digital Decision Accelerators for Defence (DDAD) Open Framework, the primary delivery route for the British Army's ASGARD programme. [source](https://oxdynamics.com/oxford-dynamics-secures-place-on-uk-ministry-of-defence-digital-decision-open-framework/)

## Links

- Website: https://oxdynamics.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/oxford-dynamics

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (12274185), ADS members directory, Army Technology, UK Defence Journal, Find a Tender.

companies.name: Oxford Insights
companies.summary: AI and digital strategy consultancy working with governments on emerging technology adoption.
companies.body:
# Oxford Insights

> AI and digital strategy consultancy working with governments on emerging technology adoption.

## What they do

Oxford Insights works with governments to harness emerging technology to achieve their strategic and operational goals. It specialises in artificial intelligence, digital transformation, and digital strategy, with a focus on human-centred design, user research, and evaluation. Founded in 2016, the company describes its thematic expertise as covering big data and AI, and has also analysed quantum technologies, digital twins, and the immersive economy.

## Products and solutions

- **Government AI Readiness Index (GARI)** - an annual comparative assessment of governments' capacity to harness AI for public benefit, now in its 8th edition. The 2025 edition ranks 195 countries across 69 indicators, 14 dimensions and six pillars (Policy Capacity, Governance, AI Infrastructure, Public Sector Adoption, Development and Diffusion, Resilience), and is used as a benchmark by national governments and international bodies including the G20.
- **Service delivery** - business analysis, user research, service design, and delivery management to develop public services.
- **Evaluations** - human-centred evaluation combining theories of change, qualitative interviews, and quantitative impact measurement.
- **Policy advice** - advisory work supporting governments in developing, implementing, and evaluating AI and digital policy.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Published the Government AI Readiness Index 2025, ranking 195 countries; the UK placed among the top five globally. [Oxford Insights](https://oxfordinsights.com/ai-readiness/government-ai-readiness-index-2025/)

_News older than ~12 months should be pruned or moved below a divider._

## Links

- Website: https://www.oxfordinsights.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/oxford-insights

Public information verified 2026-07-05. companies.name: Oxford Quantum Circuits Ltd
companies.summary: UK quantum computing company delivering quantum-computing-as-a-service via superconducting circuits.
companies.body:
# Oxford Quantum Circuits Ltd

> UK quantum computing company delivering quantum-computing-as-a-service via superconducting circuits.

## What they do

Oxford Quantum Circuits (OQC) is Europe's first quantum-computing-as-a-service (QCaaS) provider and the only company deploying quantum systems into commercial data centres. Its core technology uses a patented 3-D superconducting circuit architecture, branded Dimon, designed to scale whilst maintaining speed, with a sovereign and secure-by-design offering. The company states it works with defence primes and with defence and security organisations to deliver proof of concepts and experimentation activity, and describes itself as the only company integrating quantum into secure data centre infrastructure.

## Products and solutions

- **Quantum-computing-as-a-service (QCaaS)** - cloud access to OQC's superconducting quantum processors, deployed inside partner data centres.
- **On-premise quantum deployment** - a quantum processing unit sold and deployed directly on a customer's premises, for example at the CESGA high-performance computing centre in Spain, running quantum and classical compute side by side.
- **Quantum-AI data centre integration** - joint deployments with data-centre partners combining quantum processors with AI/HPC infrastructure, including a facility in New York built with NVIDIA GH200 Grace Hopper Superchips.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Quantum Business Network (QBN)
- **Programmes:** Innovate UK funded project (with Riverlane) to build a Quantum Error Correction testbed integrated within a commercial data centre and connected to HPC, announced 2025

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Raised £260m ($350m) Series C, described as Europe's largest ever private quantum computing funding round, led by Bullhound Capital with participation from the British Business Bank and other investors. [Data Center Dynamics](https://www.datacenterdynamics.com/en/news/oxford-quantum-circuits-raises-260m-in-oversubscribed-series-c-funding-round/)
- **2025-07** - Riverlane integrated second-generation quantum error correction technology with an OQC quantum computer as part of the joint UK testbed project. [The Quantum Insider](https://thequantuminsider.com/2025/07/22/riverlane-integrates-second-generation-qec-technology-with-oqc-quantum-computer/)

_News older than ~12 months should be pruned or moved below a divider._

## Links

- Website: https://oqc.tech
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/oqc

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. OQC website (oqc.tech, including "Access/Deployments" and newsroom pages); Data Center Dynamics, Sifted and The Quantum Insider coverage of the June 2026 Series C round; OQC/Riverlane newsroom announcement on the Quantum Error Correction testbed (oqc.tech/company/newsroom/oqc-riverlane-quantum-error-correction-testbed); ADS Group members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/oxford-quantum-circuits-ltd-1); Quantum Business Network member page (qbn.world/qbn-member/oxford-quantum-circuits). ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15).

Note: the National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC) full-stack quantum computer deployment reported in August 2025 was delivered by Oxford Ionics, a separate company, not OQC; excluded from this page to avoid conflation.

companies.name: Oxford Sigma Ltd
companies.summary: Advanced materials engineering company serving fusion, nuclear, and defence applications.
companies.body:
# Oxford Sigma Ltd

> Advanced materials engineering company serving fusion, nuclear, and defence applications.

## What they do

Oxford Sigma is an advanced materials company focused on fusion, nuclear, and defence systems. Founded in 2019, it develops and validates materials for extreme environments, applying a "right material, right place" approach that is agnostic to fusion confinement method (magnetic, inertial, or hybrid). Its work spans fusion-agnostic materials engineering, component design and prototyping, modelling and simulation (including neutronics and tritium migration analysis), irradiation experimental planning, and regulatory and standards alignment. The company has since expanded from its fusion origins into advanced fission and defence applications, and holds an in-house manufacturing capability for trial production and scale-up of specialist materials.

## Products and solutions

- **Structural and functional materials substantiation** - qualification and substantiation of fusion and fission core materials against extreme thermal, mechanical, and radiation conditions.
- **In-vessel component design** - design and concept development of plasma-facing structures, blankets, and magnets for fusion power plant developers.
- **Breeder and multiplier materials** - lithium ceramic materials development for tritium breeding, including the UKAEA-funded VICE (Validation in Ceramic Experiments) programme.
- **Plasma diagnostics** - development of diagnostic devices for fusion power plants, including enhanced mirrors and erosion sensors.
- **Materials manufacturing services** - in-house pilot batch and small-scale production, process scale-up, and controlled handling of sensitive materials (wet chemistry, powder processing, hydrogen handling), commissioned in 2026.
- **Defence materials solutions** - materials for shielding, propulsion, and containment in extreme thermal, mechanical, and radiation environments, including participation in the UK's Hypersonic Technologies & Capability Development Framework.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** UKAEA Embedded Engineering Resources Framework (Tier 1 contractor); UK Hypersonic Technologies & Capability Development Framework
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; ISO 9001; UK Defence Employer Recognition Scheme (Silver); Armed Forces Covenant signatory
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Fusion Industry Association (affiliate); The Fusion Cluster; Fusion Industry Taskforce; contributor to ASME Boiler & Pressure Vessel Code Section III Division 4 (Fusion Energy Devices)

## Recent news

- **2026-06-08** - Commissioned in-house advanced materials manufacturing capability, offering trial production and scale-up services across fusion, defence, and fission sectors. [Oxford Sigma](https://oxfordsigma.com/updates/news/oxford-sigma-commissions-advanced-materials-manufacturing-capability/)
- **2026-02-09** - Expanded advanced shielding materials programme with new tungsten and metal hydride technology development projects. [Oxford Sigma](https://oxfordsigma.com/updates/fusion/oxford-sigma-expands-advanced-shielding-materials-programme-with-new-tungsten-and-metal-hydride-technologies/)
- **2025-07-30** - Appointed Tier 1 contractor to UKAEA's Embedded Engineering Resources Framework. [Oxford Sigma](https://oxfordsigma.com/updates/fusion/oxford-sigma-appointed-tier-1-contractor-to-a-ukaea-engineering-framework/)
- **2025-06-06** - Awarded Silver status in the UK Defence Employer Recognition Scheme. [Oxford Sigma](https://oxfordsigma.com/updates/news/oxford-sigma-awarded-silver-status-by-the-uk-defence-employer-recognition-scheme-ers/)
- **2025-04-02** - Awarded two UKAEA-funded fusion plasma diagnostics contracts, for enhanced mirrors and AI-accelerated erosion sensors. [Oxford Sigma](https://oxfordsigma.com/updates/news/oxford-sigma-awarded-two-ukaea-fusion-plasma-diagnostics-contracts-enhanced-mirrors-and-ai-accelerated-erosion-sensors/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.oxfordsigma.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Oxford Sigma website (About, Capabilities, Services, Memberships and Accreditations pages, and Updates/News section, accessed 2026-07-05); ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15).

companies.summary: Consultancy specialising in digital transformation and cyber security for public and private sector organisations.
companies.body:
# P3M Works Ltd

> Consultancy specialising in digital transformation and cyber security for public and private sector organisations.

## What they do

P3M Works is a Cheltenham-based cyber resilience consultancy delivering complex digital transformation and cyber security programmes for defence, government, and critical national infrastructure clients, as well as private sector and SME organisations. It covers defence, space, and information technology consultancy services, with capabilities declared to ADS Group spanning cyber security and systems integrity, data analysis, digital and computer forensics, software optimisation, and TEMPEST. The company also supports major project and programme delivery (assurance, governance, and delivery recovery) and helps clients select and operationalise third-party cyber security technology.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber resilience services** - ongoing, practical cyber security support from initial assessment through to embedded long-term partnership, including penetration testing and awareness campaigns.
- **Major projects** - structured programme and project delivery, assurance, and governance support for defence, government, and critical national infrastructure clients, including delivery recovery on troubled programmes and alignment to NIST CSF, Secure by Design, and MOD JSP 440/453.
- **Technology partners** - selection, procurement, deployment, and ongoing optimisation of third-party cyber security platforms across identity and access, endpoint protection, and resilience and assurance tooling, working with vendors including Akamai, CyberArk, and Sophos.
- **Bug bounty and adversarial testing** - delivered an in-person bug bounty capability for a defence sector client, establishing a new adversarial testing methodology.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (Hellios)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001:2022; Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory

## Recent news

- **2026-06-17** - Published guidance mapping NIST CSF 2.0 to the NCSC Cyber Assessment Framework (CAF) for UK critical national infrastructure organisations. [P3M Works](https://p3mworks.co.uk/insights/nist-csf-2-0-vs-ncsc-caf-what-s-the-difference-and-how-do-they-map)
- **2025-11-12** - Published commentary on collaboration between small businesses as a driver of UK cyber innovation. [P3M Works](https://p3mworks.co.uk/insights/why-collaboration-not-competition-is-the-key-to-small-business-innovation-in-the-uk)
- **2025-08-27** - Published analysis of the Marks & Spencer cyber incident and its implications for retail cyber resilience. [P3M Works](https://p3mworks.co.uk/insights/cyber-resilience-in-retail-a-wake-up-call-from-the-m-and-s-incident)

# PA Consulting

> Global consulting and innovation firm with an established defence and security practice, headquartered in London.

## What they do

PA Consulting is a consulting and innovation firm of around 4,000 strategists, innovators, designers, consultants, scientists, engineers and technologists, with expertise across eight industries including defence and security. Its defence and security practice works with the armed forces, government agencies and police on capability delivery, programmes and transformation. The firm operates from offices across the UK, US, Ireland, the Nordics and the Netherlands.

## Products and solutions

- **Public sector defence** - strategy, capability delivery and transformation for the Ministry of Defence and the armed forces.
- **Aerospace, defence and security industries** - performance, workforce and next-generation technology work for primes and suppliers.

# PAC Group

> Northern Ireland engineering firm providing process automation, robotics, and composite manufacturing solutions for industrial and defence sectors.

## What they do

PAC Group designs, manufactures, and commissions automated machinery and manufacturing systems for industrial and commercial clients across Northern Ireland and the UK. It operates through service divisions including PAC Automation, PAC Composites and PAC Calibrations. Capabilities include process automation, robotics, cobots and autonomous mobile robots, remote monitoring, and composites manufacturing (resin transfer infusion, preformers, hot drape formers). Customers span aerospace, automotive, marine and defence-adjacent manufacturing.

## Products and solutions

- **PAC Automation** - design, build and integration of bespoke automated machinery, robotics, cobots and Industry 4.0 manufacturing systems.
- **Preformers and hot drape formers** - large-format composite forming equipment for aerospace and automotive composite layup, including work for the Aerospace Innovation Centre in Prestwick.
- **Resin transfer infusion equipment** - composite manufacturing systems for aerospace, automotive and marine applications.
- **PAC Calibrations** - instrumentation and calibration services for industrial process control.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Palantir Technologies UK, Ltd.

> UK operation of the US data and AI software company Palantir Technologies, serving defence, intelligence and government with its Gotham, Foundry and AIP platforms.

## What they do

Palantir builds software platforms that integrate large, varied data sources and apply analytics and AI to support decision-making in government and commercial organisations. Its flagship platforms are Gotham (government and intelligence), Foundry (enterprise data operations), AIP (Artificial Intelligence Platform) and Apollo (continuous software delivery). The UK entity delivers these into UK defence, health and government. The US parent is headquartered in Denver, Colorado, and the UK office is in London.

## Products and solutions

- **Gotham** - built for government and intelligence; pattern identification across data sources for intelligence analysis, battlefield command and targeting.
- **Foundry** - core data operations platform for data integration, ontology, analytics and workflow development.
- **AIP** - generative-AI layer connecting large language models securely into the platforms, with tooling to build agents and automations.
- **Apollo** - continuous delivery platform managing the infrastructure hosting Foundry and AIP.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service supplier (Back Office Software); G-Cloud framework.

## Recent news

- **2025-09-18** - Signed a strategic defence partnership with the UK MOD, committing to invest up to £1.5bn in the UK and establish a European HQ in Britain. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/new-strategic-partnership-to-unlock-billions-and-boost-military-ai-and-innovation)
- **2026-01-28** - UK MOD signed a new three-year data analytics contract worth around £240m, effective 1 April 2026. [source](https://www.theregister.com/2026/01/28/mod_palantir_deal/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.palantir.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/palantir-technologies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (07042994), GOV.UK, Crown Commercial Service, The Register, NHS England. Publicly listed on NASDAQ (ticker PLTR).

Pall Aerospace has supplied filtration and separation technology to aerospace and defence platforms since 1946, with filters protecting hydraulic, fuel, lubrication and air systems to extend equipment life. Its filtration products are qualified across major civil and military aircraft programmes. Pall Europe, based in Portsmouth, forms part of Pall Corporation, a subsidiary of Danaher Corporation (US). Palo Alto Networks delivers cybersecurity platforms combining AI, analytics, and automation to protect digital infrastructure at scale. The company serves defence and government organisations as part of a broader enterprise and public-sector portfolio. Its UK entity is assured by the National Cyber Security Centre for Cyber Incident Response (CIR) at both Standard and Enhanced levels, and has extended its Prisma SASE and Cortex XSIAM offerings to UK public-sector customers including the Ministry of Justice.

companies.body:
# Pandect Precision Components Ltd

> Specialist designer and manufacturer of custom slip ring assemblies for the defence and aerospace sectors.

## What they do

Pandect has designed and manufactured custom slip ring assemblies (SRAs) for passing data and power across rotating interfaces since 1964, with the defence and aerospace markets as its primary customers. Its products integrate microwave rotary joints, fibre optic rotary joints, and hydraulic or pneumatic rotary joints depending on application requirements. Applications named on its own site include missile guidance, missile launcher and stabilised navigation systems, stabilised gun platforms and sights, land, marine and airborne radar, fighting vehicle turret power and signals, ship-borne and helicopter-borne winches, and unmanned air, ground and surface vehicles.

## Products and solutions

- **Slip Ring Assemblies** - Custom assemblies for long-term defence and aerospace programmes, supporting data, power, RF, and optical transmission across rotating interfaces.
- **Microwave Rotary Joints** - Integrated into SRAs for radar and satellite-on-the-move applications.
- **Fibre Optic Rotary Joints** - Integrated into SRAs for very high data rate requirements.
- **High Speed Units, Through Bore, Miniature, Pancake and PCB, and Twist Capsule slip rings** - product variants for different mounting, size and rotation requirements.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.pandect.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Company website (https://www.pandect.co.uk/about-us/, /about-us/certifications/, /applications/); ADS Group member directory. Companies House number 806716 as stated on the company's own website footer.

companies.body:
# Panoptech Ltd

> Secure IT infrastructure and digital services company serving defence and aerospace customers.

## What they do

Panoptech, founded in 2000, delivers secure IT infrastructure, cyber security, data analysis, video and surveillance systems, secure telecoms, and bespoke software into high-security environments, with a focus on communications, command and control, and surveillance capabilities for defence and aerospace organisations. Its software team develops applications that combine multiple datasets into a single data-rich picture of a geographical area or ongoing operation. The company holds ISO 27001:2022 and Cyber Essentials Plus accreditations and is a G-Cloud supplier.

## Products and solutions

- **Video and surveillance systems** - camera technology, video management and storage, delivered as a Premier Partner for Milestone VMS and Husky, lead UK reseller for ProHawk Video AI and VEGA Redundancy & Migration Solutions, and a gold AXIS partner.
- **Secure telecoms** - mobile SIM, fixed line, wireless and internet connectivity delivered into secure customer environments, including SIP phone systems.
- **IT infrastructure and networking** - secure network design, delivery and long-term support for high-security environments.
- **Software development** - bespoke mobile and web applications, including data-fusion tools that combine multiple datasets into a single operational picture.
- **Security audits** - system security surveys and audits to assess and reduce exposure to intrusion.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud
- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001:2022, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

Parmley Technologies designs and manufactures electronic control products for military vehicles and other industrial applications operating in harsh environments, from its facility on the Tyne Tunnel Trading Estate, North Shields. companies.name: PATCH
companies.summary: Waterproof wearable device providing off-grid, AES-256 encrypted mesh connectivity for tactical teams with no infrastructure requirement.
companies.body:
# PATCH
> Waterproof wearable device providing off-grid, AES-256 encrypted mesh connectivity for tactical teams with no infrastructure requirement.
## What they do
PATCH, manufactured by Roper Solutions, Inc. (Austin, TX), creates zero-infrastructure mesh networks for situational awareness and secure messaging when cellular, Wi-Fi, satellite or conventional radio are unavailable. The system uses the SnapMesh protocol, generates one-time-use AES-256 keys at network initialisation and wipes them on shutdown. Designed with no operating system, no open-source code and no persistent data storage; independently tested as jamming-resistant outside 277 yards. NDAA compliant and ATAK-compatible. Represented in the UK by Benjia.
## Products and solutions
- **PATCH device** - Wearable encrypted mesh node; AES-256, BLE Secure Connections for smartphone pairing, automatic location and activity monitoring across the network.
## Links
- Website: https://www.patchconnects.com
## Sources
Public information verified 2026-06-29.

# PDL Solutions (Europe) Limited

> Advanced engineering analysis consultancy serving the nuclear, defence, and offshore energy sectors.

## What they do

PDL Solutions (Europe) Limited is an engineering analysis consultancy based in Hexham, incorporated in 2001. It provides advanced engineering consultancy services to clients in safety-critical, mission-critical industries, working predominantly across defence, nuclear, oil and gas, transport, renewable energy and water. The company describes its core skill sets as finite element analysis (FEA), computational fluid dynamics (CFD), global dynamic analysis, process optimisation, structural calculations, engineering design, pipe stress analysis, and linear elastic fracture mechanics, with clients across Europe, North America and Asia.

## Products and solutions

- **Finite Element Analysis (FEA)** - structural and stress analysis for design validation.
- **Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD)** - fluid and thermal modelling for complex engineering problems.
- **Global Dynamic Analysis** - dynamic response analysis for structures and systems.
- **Pipe Stress Analysis** - analysis using CAESAR II for piping systems in safety-critical plant.
- **Process Optimisation and Structural Calculations** - engineering design support for asset validation and in-field problem-solving.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Pela Systems

> Manufacturer of the patented PELAmesh sensor integration and fusion range, providing detection, identification and monitoring for CBRNe and hazardous environments.

## What they do

Pela Systems designs and builds the PELAmesh range, a portable, sensor-agnostic detector integration network aimed at Chemical, Biological, Radiological, Nuclear and explosives (CBRNe) and hazmat situations. PELAmesh networks detectors from multiple manufacturers into a single visual display, giving operators real-time, positionally mapped data from legacy and current-generation sensors in harsh environments. The company states that it designs and builds all hardware and software in the UK, and serves defence and CBRN forces, critical national infrastructure and transport hub operators, first responders, and conservation and agriculture customers. Pela Systems is a member of the D3IP community at Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park.

## Products and solutions

- **PELAmesh** - patented, portable, sensor-agnostic detector integration and fusion network; ruggedised to exceed IP69 and STD-810H; encrypted data transmission from sensors to a Commander unit metres or many miles away.
- **PELAmesh Commander** - field-deployable hardware for storing, processing and re-transmitting sensor data to specialists at distance.
- **PELAcan** - field-deployable sensor node component of the PELAmesh range.
- **Scene Assessment** - situational awareness tools for hazardous incident response.
- **Tactical Communication** - communication capability supporting detection and response operations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; D3IP (Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park)

## Recent news

- **2026** - PELAmesh selected to participate in the British Army's Army Warfighting Experiment, demonstrating sensor fusion for wide-area CBRN reconnaissance and detection. [source](https://www.pelasystems.com/)
- Exhibited at Security & Policing (UK Home Office vetted event) and the Emergency Services Show, Birmingham, on wide-area detection and decontamination themes. [source](https://www.pelasystems.com/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.pelasystems.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/pela-systems

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (pelasystems.com); Companies House record 08685676; ADS Group member directory (snapshot 2026-05-15).

# Permali Gloucester Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of high-performance composite and polymeric materials for aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Permali designs and manufactures lightweight ballistic and mine protection solutions, including composite vehicle structures and cargo systems for aircraft, with protection levels to STANAG 4569 Level 4 and above. The company is also a licensed applicator of Battlejacket spray-on fuel tank protection for armoured vehicles and aircraft.

## Products and solutions

- **Ballistic and mine protection panels** - Lightweight composite armour for armoured fighting vehicles, certified to STANAG 4569 Level 4 and higher.

> Flight test instrumentation specialist providing image acquisition, recording and data processing equipment to European flight test engineers.

Photo-Sonics International Ltd (PSIL) has supported flight test engineers across Europe since 1973, supplying and supporting equipment for acquisition, recording and processing of images and data. Based in Thame, Oxfordshire, the company holds niche expertise in flight test instrumentation and specialised applications engineering tailored to each customer's requirements. The company's history runs from high-speed and HUD cameras for military aircraft through to its current focus on flight test and aerospace imaging systems.

- **Flight test instrumentation** - Image and data acquisition, recording and processing equipment for flight test engineers.

- **Space launch instrumentation** - Instrumentation supporting launch vehicle test and data acquisition, via a long-standing relationship with Safran Data Systems.

companies.name: Pitch Technologies Ltd
companies.summary: Simulation interoperability specialist providing HLA-based and cloud-hosted simulation products and services, now trading as part of BAE Systems OneArc.
companies.body:
# Pitch Technologies Ltd

> Simulation interoperability specialist providing HLA-based and cloud-hosted simulation products and services, now trading as part of BAE Systems OneArc.

## What they do

Pitch Technologies is focused on open standards-based simulation interoperability, including HLA-Evolved (IEEE 1516-2010, and the newer IEEE 1516-2025 "HLA 4") and DIS (IEEE 1278), plus cloud-hosted simulation environments. The company has a strong R&D orientation and supplies products, methodologies and services to defence and government customers. Its UK address is in London; the parent company was headquartered in Sweden. From 12 November 2025 the legal entities within the Pitch Technologies group began a rename process to BAE Systems OneArc, following BAE Systems' earlier acquisition of Pitch Technologies AB; the company states this is a name change only, with no corporate or legal restructuring and no novation of existing contracts.

## Products and solutions

- **Pitch pRTI** - the core Run-Time Infrastructure (RTI) product of the Pitch Infrastructure family, supporting all HLA standards including HLA 4, with data distribution, time synchronisation and dynamic ownership transfer between simulation models.
- **Pitch Commander** - enables monitoring and control of distributed simulation systems running across multiple computers, including discovery and restart of failed simulations.
- **Pitch Booster** - facilitates running distributed simulations across wide area networks, increasing throughput and fault tolerance while traversing firewalls with certificate-based encryption.
- **Pitch CDS Gateway** - supports secure cross-domain simulation, connecting different security domains while controlling data release based on policy.
- **Pitch DIS Adapter** - enables interoperability between HLA-based systems and existing DIS (IEEE 1278) systems.

Named public use cases for the Pitch Infrastructure product family include large-scale military exercises, distributed synthetic training linking into NATO's Distributed Synthetic Training environment, and live, virtual and constructive (LVC) simulation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-11-12** - BAE Systems announced that Bohemia Interactive Simulations and the Pitch Technologies group are being renamed BAE Systems OneArc, with entities, contracts and operations unchanged. [source](https://onearc.com/news/we-are-onearc/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.pitchtechnologies.com (now redirects to https://onearc.com)

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. OneArc website, Pitch Infrastructure product page (https://onearc.com/products/pitch-infrastructure/) and "BISim and Pitch are now OneArc" notice (https://onearc.com/news/we-are-onearc/). ADS Group members directory (snapshot, 2026-05-15).

companies.body:
# Plaswire Ltd

> Northern Ireland manufacturer processing co-polymers for aircraft interiors and developing circular-economy solutions for difficult-to-recycle aerospace polymers.

## What they do

Plaswire processes co-polymers used in aircraft interior applications and works on developing new processes for difficult-to-recycle polymers. The company provides collection services, secure material destruction, and returns recovered materials to the supply chain within a cradle-to-cradle model. Its stated aim is to repurpose 100% of end-of-life aircraft materials, including interior polymers and airframe carbon fibre, into a sustainable replacement product for wood, concrete and virgin plastics, reducing the carbon footprint of aircraft manufacture, refurbishment and decommissioning.

## Products and solutions

- **RX Polymer** - proprietary recycled polymer made from difficult-to-recycle waste, including aircraft interior polymers, airframe composites, carbon fibre, and wind turbine blades, processed through shredding, granulation, agglomeration, washing and extrusion. Used as a substitute for precast concrete, virgin plastic and wood-based construction products.
- **Aviation materials repurposing** - collection and processing service for end-of-life aircraft interior and composite materials, converting them into RX Polymer rather than incineration or landfill.
- **Blockchain traceability** - end-to-end traceability system, developed with digital trade specialist ubloquity, tracking recycled polymer from collection through to reuse; first applied to wind turbine blade recycling with stated potential to extend into aerospace.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-11-19** - Plaswire announced a blockchain, IoT and AI-based traceability system for recycled wind turbine blade polymer, developed with ubloquity, providing end-to-end tracking from collection to reuse. [source](https://www.northernirelandworld.com/business/plaswire-revolutionises-wind-turbine-blade-recycling-with-end-to-end-traceability-5408955)

companies.name: Ploughshare
companies.summary: MOD-owned commercialisation vehicle that turns crown-owned intellectual property from DSTL, AWE and other government labs into licensed products and spinouts.
companies.body:
# Ploughshare
> MOD-owned commercialisation vehicle that turns crown-owned intellectual property from DSTL, AWE and other government labs into licensed products and spinouts.

## What they do
Ploughshare is wholly owned by the UK Ministry of Defence and operates as the commercial licensing arm for government-developed IP. It negotiates licence agreements and creates spinout companies across four portfolios: defence and security, digital science, health and wellbeing, and climate and environment. The organisation works directly with R&D teams inside DSTL, AWE and other MOD science and technology establishments. Established in 2005, Ploughshare has exclusive access to MOD defence intellectual property and has commercialised over 140 technologies, creating more than 15 spinout companies to date.

## Products and solutions

Ploughshare does not develop technology itself; it licenses and spins out MOD and Dstl-originated IP. Named examples from its own published portfolio and licensee pages include:

- **CrystalCast (via licensee Riskaware)** - a Dstl-developed decision-support modelling tool that visualises complex data at speed, used for "what-if" scenario planning; originally developed for epidemic and pandemic modelling and licensed to Riskaware for commercial availability.
- **HASP Suite (via licensee Riskaware)** - Hazard Assessment, Simulation and Prediction software toolset providing situational awareness and decision support in the CBRN/hazardous materials domain.
- **Cyber Griffin** - a licensed cyber protection capability, used by the City of London Police to provide free cyber protection support to SMEs and charities.
- **P2i Ltd** - the first Dstl spin-out (2005), commercialising liquid-repellent nanocoating technology.
- **Claresys Ltd** - spin-out established in 2008 to exploit patented Dstl technology.
- **Energetics Technology Ltd** - licensee specialising in energetic materials, blast mitigation and protection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news
- **2025** - MOD's Defence Innovation for Prosperity and Resilience (DIPR) function and Ploughshare signed a commercialisation agreement to expand routes for MOD and Dstl IP to reach the market. [source](https://ploughshare.co.uk/dipr-and-ploughshare-agreement/)

## Links
- Website: https://ploughshare.co.uk

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-07-05. Ploughshare website (ploughshare.co.uk: portfolio, licensee and spinout overview pages, digital science technology category, DIPR agreement press release), Riskaware website (CrystalCast and HASP pages), Global Defence Technology (nridigital.com, October 2024). AI and data subset tags reflect Ploughshare's own "digital science" portfolio category (which names artificial intelligence as a technology area) and its own published description of the CrystalCast decision-support/data-visualisation technology; Ploughshare itself does not perform the underlying R&D, so no broader AI or data subsets are claimed beyond what its own site describes.

# Power Device UK Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of electronic power conversion products for aerospace, defence and industrial sectors.

## What they do

Power Device UK, based in Ryde on the Isle of Wight and formerly known as DDC Electronics, Pascall Electronics and Xcel Power Systems, has over 40 years of experience designing, developing and manufacturing electronic power conversion products for the aerospace, defence and industrial sectors. Its power supplies range from simple single-stage convertors to complex multi-function, multi-stage systems, and are fully customisable to customer requirements. The company states its products are deployed with ground, air and naval forces worldwide, powering electronic systems in challenging operating environments, and that more than 170,000 of its power supply units are installed on commercial aircraft for in-flight entertainment and connectivity (IFEC).

companies.body:
# PowerPhotonic Ltd

> Designer and manufacturer of precision micro-optics for high-power and high-accuracy laser applications.

## What they do

PowerPhotonic, founded in 2004 and based in Dalgety Bay, Scotland, designs and manufactures precision freeform micro-optics using a proprietary laser micro-machining process. Its components, made from UV-fused silica, are produced with sub-micron surface accuracy and are stated to be highly efficient and damage-tolerant, able to operate across the UV, visible and near-infrared bands. The company states its optics serve high-power laser material processing, directed energy, laser communications and quantum technology applications, alongside telecommunications and ophthalmology uses. It also offers rapid prototyping and custom optics design services for OEMs and research institutions.

## Products and solutions

- **Micro-lens arrays** - standard and custom arrays for precision optical systems.
- **Beam shapers** - freeform and structured beam-shaping optics in UV-fused silica for high-power laser applications.
- **Collimators and phase correctors** - optical components for laser beam conditioning.
- **Refractive diffusers** - custom diffusers for high-power laser systems.
- **LightForge** - rapid micro-optics fabrication and prototyping service.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: PQShield Ltd
companies.summary: Post-quantum cryptography specialist delivering hardware and software security upgrades for the global technology supply chain.
companies.body:
# PQShield Ltd

> Post-quantum cryptography specialist delivering hardware and software security upgrades for the global technology supply chain.

## What they do

PQShield develops post-quantum cryptography (PQC) solutions, stating it contributed to the first international PQC NIST standards and was the first cybersecurity company to develop quantum-safe cryptography on chips, in applications and in the cloud. Its products address the security threat posed by quantum computing to existing encryption, serving markets that include semiconductors and manufacturing, identity and payments, military and aerospace, system integrators, automotive, industrial IoT, and network and telecommunications.

## Products and solutions

- **PQMicroLib-Core** - ultra-small, baremetal post-quantum cryptography library for embedded and memory-constrained devices, with a footprint as low as 5KB.
- **PQCryptoLib-Core** - FIPS 140-3 CMVP certified, CAVP compliant general-purpose cryptographic library supporting classical, post-quantum and hybrid algorithms on Linux, Windows and Mac.
- **PQCryptoLib-SDK** - PQCryptoLib-Core packaged with an OpenSSL 3.x provider to help transition OpenSSL-based applications to post-quantum algorithms including ML-DSA, Falcon and ML-KEM.
- **PQPlatform-CoPro** - FIPS 140-3 CAVP compliant hardware cryptographic coprocessor adding post-quantum capability to existing security subsystems, with side-channel protection.
- **PQPlatform-TrustSys** - PQC-focused Root-of-Trust solution supporting NIST-standardised ML-KEM and ML-DSA alongside traditional ECC and RSA, with fault-tolerance and side-channel countermeasures.
- **PQPerform-Flare / PQPerform-Inferno / PQPerform-Flex** - hardware-accelerated post-quantum cryptography products for high-throughput, low-latency use cases including TLS and network HSMs.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-10** - PQShield released an ultra-small post-quantum cryptography library for embedded systems, announced at Embedded World 2026. [source](https://thequantuminsider.com/2026/03/10/pqshield-ultra-small-pqc-embedded-security-embedded-world/)

## Links

- Website: http://www.pqshield.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/pqshield/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. PQShield website (pqshield.com/products), The Quantum Insider, ADS Group member directory.

# Praetori

> European developer of sovereign "Continuous Control Infrastructure", an agentic AI platform for defence, intelligence and other mission-critical operations.

## What they do

Praetori builds what it calls Continuous Control Infrastructure, positioned as a single, continuously adapting environment that connects information, data and intelligence through to planning, decisions and execution. The company states its platform is built for Europe's operational independence, developed and governed in Europe, deployable across cloud, on-premise and edge environments, and designed on the principle that AI expands human capability rather than replacing human decision-making authority. Praetori describes its infrastructure as interoperable with existing systems.

## Products and solutions

- **Continuous Control Infrastructure** - a platform connecting signals, intelligence, planning and coordinated action into one adapting environment, applied across four stated domains:
  - **Defence and national security** - mission planning, intelligence fusion and multi-domain coordination for armed forces, first responders and security operators.
  - **Intelligence** - multi-source fusion, entity and relationship analysis, and intelligence-to-action workflows.
  - **Critical infrastructure** - risk monitoring, incident coordination and continuity planning for energy, transport, communications and water operators.
  - **Logistics and complex field operations** - field coordination, route and scenario planning, and disruption management.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Praetorian Connections Limited

> Open source intelligence provider specialising in in-language collection and in-depth analysis.

## What they do

Praetorian Connections is a Bristol-registered open source intelligence (OSINT) provider founded by former military intelligence officers. It states its teams combine specialist tools and evolving technologies with broad linguistic capability and deep cultural and regional expertise, including in hard-to-access areas, to collect, filter and analyse large volumes of data into verified, actionable intelligence. The company describes itself as operating a multi-source digital collection platform, with analysts collating, validating and fusing data from a broad spectrum of sources. Its work supports clients on market access research, due diligence and situational awareness, and it states it draws staff with backgrounds across government agencies, the commercial intelligence sector and academia.

## Products and solutions

- **OSINT research and investigations** - in-language, multi-source open source collection and analysis, delivered as structured data for direct ingestion into client systems or as deep-dive reporting.
- **Emerging technology reporting** - identification of new equipment and technologies within the geopolitical and security space, and how they relate to other systems.
- **Verified events reporting** - primary-source reporting from hard-to-access information environments using linguist analysts.
- **Geo-political indicators and warning** - multi-source monitoring for trends towards conflict or instability, including supply chain and manufacturing disruption analysis.
- **Supply chain and sanctions compliance investigations** - research into corporate structures and relationships to assess export control and sanctions risk.
- **Training** - instruction in OSINT methods and contextualised reporting.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/praetorian-connections

# Precision Technic Defence

> Danish-headquartered supplier of tactical equipment, integrated systems and through-life services to armed forces and national security agencies.

## What they do

Precision Technic Defence Group is a defence supplier headquartered in Svenstrup, Denmark, tracing its origins to 1985. It develops, tests and supplies turn-key solutions to armed forces, combining components from selected sub-suppliers into interoperable systems and running them through testing before delivery. The group has companies in Denmark, Germany, Sweden, France, Poland, the USA, Australia and the UK, and its subsidiary Precision Services provides maintenance, integration and through-life support. A UK arm, Precision Technic Defence Limited, is incorporated in England (Companies House 08255248) and is an ADS Group member.

## Products and solutions

- **Integrated tactical systems** - interoperable systems and solutions assembled from market-leading manufacturers for military and national security use.
- **Vehicle preparation and modification** - preparation and modification of Mercedes-Benz G-Class vehicles for the Danish Armed Forces, as sole subcontractor to Ejner Hessel.
- **Precision Services** - technical maintenance, integration and through-life support for products and systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# PreCog Systems

> UK data analytics company providing anomaly detection and movement-pattern intelligence for national security, law enforcement and border control.

## What they do

PreCog Systems is a London-based software company that analyses structured and unstructured data to detect anomalies and infer movement and behaviour patterns. Its platform collects signals passively from devices searching for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connections, producing real-time and historical intelligence without connecting to those devices. It positions its work for national security, law enforcement, border control, airport security and counter-terrorism, and states its software is designed to comply with privacy measures such as GDPR.

## Products and solutions

- **PreCog analytics platform** - anomaly detection across datasets with passive data collection, real-time and historical intelligence reporting, and the ability to infer global movement patterns at a scale ranging from small deployments to nationwide systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Investors:** has received investment from Sure Valley Ventures and Mindflair.

# Premier Security & Fire Consultants Ltd

> Supplier of counter-terrorism-grade ballistic and blast-resistant security systems for government and embassy facilities.

## What they do

Premier Security & Fire Consultants, based in Ilford, designs and manufactures ballistic, blast, forced-entry and fire-resistant steel door sets, windows and curtain-walling systems. It describes itself as the UK's leading supplier of Secured by Design community entrance steel doors, screens, windows and gates, including thermally broken, fire, ballistic and blast-resistant versions, combining ballistic protection, blast resistance, security and fire protection within a single system. The company states its products are tested by BRE and LPCB to a range of security certifications, and that it supplies government embassies in the UK and overseas, alongside local authority, school, hospital, transport and high-value retail projects.

## Products and solutions

- **Ballistic and blast-resistant curtain-wall systems** - counter-terrorism-level doors, windows, screens and gates.
- **Combined security systems** - single systems integrating ballistic, blast, security and fire protection.
- **Secured by Design steel doors and gates** - community entrance systems including thermally broken, fire, ballistic and blast-resistant variants, tested by BRE and LPCB.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Prestwick Aerosystems

> Aerostructures manufacturer at Glasgow Prestwick Airport, now part of the Airbus Group following Airbus's December 2025 acquisition of Spirit AeroSystems' Prestwick site.

## What they do

Prestwick Aerosystems designs and manufactures aerostructure components for commercial and defence aircraft programmes from its facility at Glasgow Prestwick Airport. The site's principal work is the manufacture of wing leading edges and associated aerostructure assemblies, using composite and aluminium manufacturing processes, for the A320 and A350 families among other Airbus programmes. Airbus completed its acquisition of this and other former Spirit AeroSystems sites (including Belfast, Kinston, Saint-Nazaire and Casablanca) on 8 December 2025, as part of the wider split of Spirit AeroSystems between Airbus and Boeing; the Prestwick site became an Airbus affiliate under the Prestwick Aerosystems name. As part of Airbus, the site draws on the group's wider engineering, research and industrialisation capability.

## Products and solutions

- **Wing leading edges and aerostructure assemblies** - composite and metallic structures for Airbus commercial and defence aircraft programmes, including the A320 and A350 families.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** SC21 OE; site certified FAA #6S9Y332C and EASA #UK145.01148
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

[Airbus](https://www.airbus.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2025-12-airbus-completes-acquisition-of-spirit-aerosystems-sites)

companies.body:
# Prevail Partners

> UK defence and security consultancy offering intelligence, operational support and defence technologies, with a focus on border security and maritime domain awareness.

## What they do

Prevail Partners is a UK defence and security consultancy incorporated in 2018, with a registered office in Poole, England. It provides operational support, intelligence and defence capabilities to government, law-enforcement and commercial clients, with a focus on border security and maritime domain awareness. Its services span intelligence fusion, risk management, training, financial investigations, and cyber operations and security, and it has moved into defence technology through partnerships in unmanned systems.

## Products and solutions

- **Security and risk management** - operational support, due diligence, asset recovery and risk management for complex environments.
- **Border security and maritime intelligence** - border security and maritime domain awareness services.
- **Intelligence fusion** - an intelligence fusion cell service combining human, satellite, imagery, open-source and signals intelligence, plus financial forensics and bulk data analytics.
- **Raybird (via Skyeton Prevail Solutions)** - long-endurance unmanned aerial system platform offered through a joint venture with Ukrainian UAV company Skyeton.
- **Cyber operations and security** - organisational cyber risk services including vulnerability assessments, delivered alongside a partnership with Ukrainian firm Cyber Unit Technologies to bring its threat-emulation platform to the UK market.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 27001.

companies.name: Primary Networks
companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of rugged computing and power control products for naval and marine applications.
companies.body:
# Primary Networks

> Designer and manufacturer of rugged computing and power control products for naval and marine applications.

## What they do

Primary Networks (trading name of Primary Network Products (UK) Ltd, incorporated 2005) designs, manufactures, tests and installs specialised computing and power control products for the Royal Navy and the marine shipping sector. Its trading history extends back further through an ICL "Network Products" division, later part of Stordata plc, before a management buyout in 2001. Products are built to operate in harsh environments and meet defence standards including DEF STAN, MIL-STD and Tempest, with units produced to customers' exact requirements and designed for longevity in the field. Design and manufacture take place in the UK.

## Products and solutions

- **Louvar ZX series rugged naval computers** - a family of rugged computers (including the ZX3, ZX3-D, ZX4i, ZX34, ZX12, ZX5, ZX5-A, ZX6, ZX7 and ZX8 variants) built for naval platforms, EMC tested to EN55022:2010, with DEF STAN, MIL-STD and Tempest variants available for systems handling NATO Secret information; stackable or rackmount, with a fibre upgrade option.
- **G-WIN rugged panel PCs** - a range of rugged panel PCs from 8.4 to 19 inches, rated IP65/IP67 and tested to MIL-STD-810, IEC 60068-2-27 and EN50155.
- **5 KVA power tray with isolation (PT2-N series)** - a DEF STAN compliant power tray providing 115V to 230V isolation for shipboard use.
- **Comms rack filter tray (CR2-N series)** - a filter tray compliant with DEF STAN 59-411 for communications racks.
- **Custom naval server racks** - shock-tested server racks built to customer specification.
- **Secure KVM switches and cabling** - secure KVM switching and cabling integration, including Common Criteria Protection Profile 3.0 compliant units and low-smoke zero-halogen (LSZH) cabling.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Lloyd's Register approval, Investors in People (held for over nine years). Products tested to DEF STAN 59-41 and 59-411, MIL-STD-461 and MIL-STD-810, and Tempest requirements.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Society of Maritime Industries, Institute of Directors, London Chamber of Commerce.

## Recent news

No recent news items were found in the company's own news pages or in defence trade press as of this verification; the site's news section was last updated in January 2021.

## Links

- Website: https://www.primarynetworks.co.uk

## Sources

# Principle Defence
> UK information security, data protection and risk management consultancy and training provider, founded by a British Army veteran.

## What they do
Principle Defence delivers advisory and consulting engagements on information security, data protection and risk management for private and public sector clients, including multi-billion-pound programmes and central and local government. Services include Virtual Chief Information Security Officer (vCISO), Data Protection Officer (DPO), security strategy, threat intelligence, and open source intelligence. The firm also runs security and privacy training and certification courses. The company describes itself as veteran-owned and holds the Armed Forces Covenant Silver Award.

## Products and solutions
- **Virtual CISO (vCISO)** - strategic information security leadership and risk management support, provided as an extension of a client's team.
- **Data Protection Officer (DPO)** - certified DPO service supporting compliance with data protection regulation.
- **Security strategy** - risk assessment and development of tailored security strategies aligned to business objectives.
- **Threat intelligence** - threat monitoring and detection, vulnerability assessment, threat analysis and reporting, incident response support, and a continuous threat intelligence feed.
- **Open source intelligence (OSINT)** - OSINT services delivered as a distinct service line.
- **Cyber Essentials and IASME Cyber Assurance support** - assessment and certification support services.

companies.name: Prizsm Technologies Ltd
companies.summary: UK data-security firm providing quantum-resistant computational storage that fragments and scatters data across multiple clouds.
companies.body:
# Prizsm Technologies

> UK data-security firm providing quantum-resistant computational storage that fragments and scatters data across multiple clouds.

## What they do

Prizsm describes itself as a computational storage capability providing resilient, quantum-resistant, hyper-secure cloud storage and communications. Its algorithm disrupts data at bit-level and randomly distributes redundant, complementary binary digits across multiple cloud platforms, so information is stored, in its own words, everywhere and nowhere. By sitting between users and cloud storage platforms, it aims to let organisations use cheap, elastic cloud services in an inherently secure way, with data recoverable even if a cloud provider is lost.

## Products and solutions

- **Prizsm Storage** - core store-and-retrieve product using bit-level data disaggregation and multi-cloud distribution for resilient, quantum-resistant storage.
- **Prizsm Edge** - secure store-and-forward communication for edge computing and IoT, allowing multiple independent channels to share cloud storage without crosstalk.
- **Prizsm Key** - secure key sharing built on the Prizsm algorithm.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (CCS Digital Marketplace listed supplier).
- **Programmes:** Digital Security by Design (DSbD) Technology Access Programme participant; codebase ported to the Morello CHERI architecture.

## Recent news

- **2024** - Prizsm participated in the Digital Security by Design Technology Access Programme, porting its software to the Morello CHERI prototype hardware. [source](https://www.dsbd.tech/whos-involved/technology-access-programme-participants/)

## Links

- Website: https://prizsm.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/prizsm-technologies

## Sources

Prizsm website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (10720342), CCS Digital Marketplace (G-Cloud listing), Digital Security by Design, techUK, cybersecurityintelligence.com company listing (confirming quantum-resistant cryptographic approach). companies.body:
# Project-Athena
> UK micro-SME developing modular, mission-configurable uncrewed aerial systems and payload integration for defence and security.

## What they do
Project-Athena designs and builds modular UAS platforms with a focus on mission-configurability and payload integration for defence and security customers. The company operates within the D3IP community at Defence BattleLab, Dorset Innovation Park. Its approach to modular design allows payloads and mission systems to be swapped without redesigning the airframe.

Separately, a company trading as Project Athena Ltd is listed as a member of the Electech Innovation Cluster (Lancashire and Cumbria), described there as a specialist in UAV defence and countermeasure systems, with a supplier relationship to Edgar Brothers on the British Army's Fused Target Locator (FTL) programme. It is not confirmed from primary sourcing whether this is the same entity as the Dorset-based Project-Athena above, or a separate company with a similar name; flagged here for a future verification pass rather than merged into the page body above.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## What they do

Prolinx is a UK-owned and based SME, established in 1997, delivering secure hosting and managed services covering all government security classifications. It operates a secure multi-tier data centre with a 24/7 service desk, a Network Operations Centre and a Security Operations Centre, accredited to government security standards. Its stated customer base includes the Ministry of Defence, Defence Digital, the British Council and the higher-education sector.

## Products and solutions

- **Citadel Secure** - fully managed secure service assured to the OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE classification, with 24/7 support and a scalable consumption model.
- **Citadel Red** - fully managed secure service for higher security classifications, in use within specific areas of the MOD and national security agencies across multiple classifications.
- **Prolinx Assured Cloud (PAC)** - assured cloud and collaborative working environment listed on the G-Cloud Digital Marketplace.

companies.body:
# Psion Vision Ltd
> Hampshire-based software developer building smart eyewear and mixed-reality applications for defence and industrial users, sponsored by the UK Space Agency to develop the technology for the defence market.

## What they do
Psion Vision develops software for smart eyewear, providing hands-free displays, voice and head-movement control, and real-time data, video and voice communication for personnel working in demanding operational environments. The company moved into the smart eyewear market in 2018 after UK Space Agency sponsorship to develop the technology for defence applications, building on more than 30 years of prior work supporting the UK armed forces alongside the Ministry of Defence, Defence Equipment & Support (DE&S) and the Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (DSTL). It is based at the Solent Enterprise Zone, Daedalus Park, Lee-on-the-Solent, on the former RNAS Lee-on-Solent (HMS Daedalus) site.

## Products and solutions

- **Smart eyewear software** - hands-free, voice- and head-movement-controlled software for smart eyewear devices, designed to work with standard hard hats, bump caps and safety glasses, with a high-resolution micro-display and support for real-time video and voice communication with remote experts.
- **NOMAD (Naval Operations Mobile Augmented Display)** - developed with OSI Maritime Systems, a secure smart eyewear solution for Navy personnel to remotely access bridge and platform information systems and communicate via live video feed. Deployable on surface, sub-surface and soft boats, with NOMAD Support (engineering and logistics) and NOMAD Bridge (command and control) variants; described as fielded for the British Army and around 26 navies.
- **Structural integrity management software** - an earlier product line (from around 2015, developed over roughly 8 years with DSTL support) providing condition- and risk-based maintenance assessment for armoured fighting vehicles, using 3D modelling to assess structural integrity in place of fixed-schedule maintenance.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** UK Space Agency-sponsored R&D (smart eyewear development for defence, from 2018); prior R&D supported by DSTL.

## Links
- Website: https://psionvision.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/psion-vision

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-07-05. Checked: the company's own website (psionvision.com), LinkedIn company page, Companies House record (company number 06603020, incorporated 27 May 2008, registered office Merlin House, 4 Meteor Way, Lee-on-the-Solent), Solent Enterprise Zone (Daedalus) case study, OSI Maritime Systems' NOMAD product page, and general web search for independent coverage. No personal names from any source have been carried into this page.

companies.name: pureLiFi
companies.summary: Edinburgh-based developer of LiFi optical wireless communications technology, with a strong defence and national-security line.
companies.body:
# pureLiFi

> Edinburgh-based developer of LiFi optical wireless communications technology, with a strong defence and national-security line.

## What they do

pureLiFi develops LiFi (light fidelity), high-speed, bidirectional, networked and mobile wireless communication that uses the light spectrum rather than radio frequency to transmit data. It builds the optoelectronic components and systems that make LiFi work, for uses ranging from defence and government to enterprise. Because LiFi uses light rather than RF, the company markets it as inherently more secure, since the signal cannot be detected, intercepted or jammed outside its defined cone of light coverage. It was founded in 2012 as a University of Edinburgh spin-out (the legal entity was incorporated in 2011).

## Products and solutions

- **Kitefin** - LiFi defence system, an optical wireless communication system for secure data transmission without radio frequencies, deployed with the US Army in Tactical and Office variants.
- **Kitefin XE** - next-generation LiFi system launched June 2025, offering room-filling coverage over 80 square metres at gigabit capacity and compliant with the IEEE 802.11bb standard.
- **Light Antenna ONE / Light Antenna Module** - optoelectronic component enabling OEMs to integrate LiFi into connected devices, compliant with IEEE 802.11bb.
- **Through-window bridging technology** - proprietary LiFi technique to pass high-speed data through a window, the basis of a fixed-wireless-access partnership.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** In-Q-Tel (IQT) portfolio company, the strategic investor for the US national-security community and allies; University of Edinburgh spin-out.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-28** - pureLiFi agreed a strategic partnership with Askey to launch a through-window 5G fixed-wireless-access bridging system. [source](https://www.scotsman.com/business/edinburghs-purelifi-agrees-deal-to-revolutionise-delivery-of-gigabit-broadband-with-zero-drilling-7953209)
- **2025-06-10** - pureLiFi unveiled Kitefin XE, its next-generation LiFi system for secure defence and wider enterprise communications. [source](https://soldiersystems.net/2025/06/10/purelifi-unveils-kitefin-xe-the-next-generation-lifi-system-ready-to-secure-communications-for-defence-and-beyond/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.purelifi.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/purelifi

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (purelifi.com), Companies House (registration SC394047), Soldier Systems, The Scotsman and Light Reading. Headcount sits near the small/medium boundary (around 50 per third-party profiles); no formal quality or security accreditations beyond IEEE 802.11bb standard compliance were evidenced.

companies.summary: Provider of Technical Surveillance Counter Measures (TSCM) services and equipment to governments, armed forces, and law enforcement agencies worldwide.
companies.body:
# QCC Global LTD

> Provider of Technical Surveillance Counter Measures (TSCM) services and equipment to governments, armed forces, and law enforcement agencies worldwide.

## What they do

Founded in 1999, QCC Global describes itself as the world's largest TSCM and cyber forensics company, supplying bespoke TSCM services and equipment to clients in over 105 countries, including government departments, armed forces, and law enforcement agencies. Expert engineers operate proprietary detection equipment to identify and neutralise electronic surveillance threats, backed by digital forensics and mobile phone forensics laboratories.

## Products and solutions

- **TSCM / Bug Sweeping** - inspections and live monitoring to detect audio or video eavesdropping on buildings, vehicles and aircraft.
- **Cyber TSCM** - inspections to identify eavesdropping attacks on IT systems, data centres and cyber networks.
- **Digital Forensics** - imaging and analysis of computers, drones and other digital media for government, police and corporate investigators, including expert witness testimony.
- **Mobile Phone Forensics** - acquisition and analysis of mobile phones and tablets for investigators.
- **Penetration Testing and Red Teaming** - cyber, physical and social engineering testing with vulnerability and remediation reporting.
- **Secure Communications** - solutions for secure voice, messaging and video conferencing, plus secure rooms and containers.
- **Protective Security** - measures including counterintelligence window film to reduce eavesdropping and intrusion risk.
- **TSCM Training** - training for government TSCM teams on inspection of buildings, vehicles, aircraft and watercraft.
- **TSCM Equipment** - detection hardware including the SearchLight Plus cellular device detection system and the QCC Sentinel Wi-Fi/Bluetooth detection system, alongside RF spectrum analysers, near-field RF detectors, non-linear junction detectors, thermal imaging cameras and forensic lighting.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001:2022, ISO 45001, ISO/IEC 17025 (UKAS), Cyber Essentials Plus, Carbon Neutral (PAS 2060), Armed Forces Covenant Silver
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, ASIS International, TSCMi, DISA (Defense Industrial Security Association)

## Recent news

- **2025-12-11** - QCC Global launched new businesses in Dublin, Ireland and Dubai, UAE. [source](https://qccglobal.com/qcc-launches-tscm-dublin-ireland-dubai-uae/)
- **2025-06-17** - QCC Global was awarded Silver status through the Armed Forces Covenant Employer Recognition Scheme. [source](https://qccglobal.com/qcc-silver-status-armed-forces-covenant/)
- **2025-04-24** - QCC Global appointed Pete Hoddinott as Managing Director. [source](https://qccglobal.com/qcc-global-appoints-new-managing-director/)

## Links

companies.body:
# QinetiQ

> A British defence technology company providing test and evaluation, training, and technical services across air, land, sea and cyber.

## What they do

QinetiQ Group plc is a British defence technology company headquartered at Cody Technology Park, Farnborough. It operates primarily in the defence, security and critical national infrastructure markets, running test and evaluation capabilities for air, land, sea and target systems and providing technical support, training and know-how to customers in the UK and North America. The company employs more than 8,000 people.

## Products and solutions

- **Test and evaluation** - operation of UK MOD land, sea and air ranges and test facilities under the Long Term Partnering Agreement.
- **Training and mission rehearsal** - simulation, synthetic training and operational support, including live-virtual-constructive (LVC) facilities incorporating real and virtual players into synthetic environments.
- **Robotics and autonomy** - uncrewed systems and target systems.
- **Persistent surveillance** - tethered Aerostat platforms providing ISR, border security and critical infrastructure monitoring, with customisable payloads including EO/IR cameras, radar and communications relays.
- **Cyber and digital resilience** - services spanning red teaming, penetration testing, cyber security monitoring and device management, advanced threat hunting, and incident response.
- **Cyber, information and intelligence** - technical services across defence and national security.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-05** - A five-year, GBP 1.54 billion extension to the Long Term Partnering Agreement was announced between QinetiQ and the MOD for test and evaluation services, supporting more than 1,200 UK jobs to 2033. [source](https://des.mod.uk/15-billion-contract-with-qinetiq-for-test-and-evaluation-services-secures-1-200plus-uk-jobs/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.qinetiq.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/qinetiq_2

## What they do

Quanta Training provides training needs analysis, training design, training delivery, and consultancy across agile, cyber, IT service management (ITSM/ITIL), project and programme management, technical IT, and leadership development. Its Defence division has worked with a range of MOD departments for over a decade, providing security-cleared trainers and MOD-compliant equipment and course software, and supports the Forces Resettlement scheme through Enhanced Learning Credits (ELC).

## Products and solutions

- **Defence training programmes** - bespoke, MOD-compliant training delivered by security-cleared trainers, aligned to purchasing frameworks and departmental objectives.
- **Training Needs Analysis (TNA)** - a structured process to identify skills gaps, evaluate existing skills, and target training budget against defined objectives.
- **Cyber training** - courses spanning cyber best practice (CISM, CISSP), EC-Council (CEH, CSCU), CompTIA (CySA+, PenTest+), and general cyber security awareness.
- **Forces Resettlement (ELC) courses** - training funded through Enhanced Learning Credits for serving and former armed forces personnel.
- **Civil Service Learning delivery** - Quanta is an approved learning specialist under the Civil Service Learning framework, delivering courses used across government departments including the MOD.

# Quantamatic

> High-volume precision turned components manufacturer serving aerospace, defence, and advanced engineering sectors.

## What they do

Quantamatic produces millions of precision turned parts per week using Escomatic and Star CNC machinery, covering diameters from 0.80 mm to 20 mm. Established in 1989, the company describes itself as the fastest-growing UK producer of quality small turned parts, exporting to the EEC, USA and Far East. The company operates to PPAP and FAIR standards with full traceability and supply chain compliance for regulated defence and aerospace applications.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision turned components** - small diameter parts from 0.80 mm to 20 mm, produced in ferrous, non-ferrous and exotic materials from coil and bar stock, in round, square, hexagon, rectangle and custom profiles.
- **Escomatic and Star CNC machining** - fully automated Swiss coil-fed Escomatic and Japanese Star CNC lathes supporting front and back threading, drilling, milling, slotting, crimping, knurling and indexing.
- **Priority CAM sampling service** - rapid "Right First Time" sample production to speed up product development.
- **Quality-approved manufacturing** - production and inspection supported by computerised control systems, optical projectors, toolmakers' microscopes and digital measuring equipment calibrated by an independent accredited laboratory.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (BSI certificate FM13395), ISO/TS 16949 (PPAP) component documentation on request, Cyber Essentials, JOSCAR Registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

## Sources
