# Quantum-Systems GmbH

> German deep-tech company developing and manufacturing electric VTOL fixed-wing uncrewed aerial systems for ISR and survey, with a strong defence focus.

## What they do

Quantum Systems is a European deep-tech company that develops, designs and manufactures small uncrewed aerial systems (UAS), specialising in electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) fixed-wing drones. It builds its core technologies in-house, spanning aircraft platforms, mission software and AI-driven aerial-intelligence analytics. Founded for commercial and survey applications, it has grown into a dual-use company serving commercial, security and military customers globally. It is headquartered in Gilching, Bavaria, near Munich.

## Products and solutions

- **Vector** - tactical eVTOL fixed-wing ISR drone sold only to governments; selected by the Australian Defence Force under LAND 129 Phase 4B.
- **Twister** - short-range, backpackable ISR sUAS designed to operate in GNSS-denied and electronically contested environments; selected as the Bundeswehr ALADIN successor.
- **Reliant** - long-range VTOL fixed-wing UAS with a heavy-fuel engine delivering over 10 hours of persistent ISR.
- **Trinity Pro** - eVTOL fixed-wing mapping and survey drone supporting RGB, oblique, multispectral and LiDAR payloads.

## Recent news

- **2025-03** - Acquired AirRobot GmbH to expand its drone portfolio and strengthen technological sovereignty for the Bundeswehr and European partners. [source](https://www.eu-startups.com/2025/03/skys-the-limit-quantum-systems-acquires-airrobot-to-expand-drone-technology-portfolio/)
- **2025-11-27** - Closed a €180m Series C extension led by Balderton Capital, reported to triple its valuation to around €3bn. [source](https://techstartups.com/2025/11/27/german-drone-startup-quantum-systems-triples-valuation-to-3-5b-after-180m-funding-round/)
- **2025-12-12** - Won a Bundeswehr (BAAINBw) contract to supply Twister reconnaissance drones as the ALADIN successor, with a fixed order of 147 systems and options for up to 600 more. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/12/12/bundeswehr-reconnaissance-drones-quantum-systems-twister/)

## Links

- Website: https://quantum-systems.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/quantum-systems-gmbh

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Wikipedia, EU-Startups, Tech Startups, DroneLife, Defence Industry Europe. Funding totals and valuation drawn from trade press and aggregators; treat as reported.

companies.name: Queen's University Belfast
companies.summary: Research-intensive university with active aerospace, defence and advanced manufacturing research activity, including a UK Innovation and Knowledge Centre for cyber security.
companies.body:
# Queen's University Belfast

> Research-intensive university with active aerospace, defence and advanced manufacturing research activity, including a UK Innovation and Knowledge Centre for cyber security.

## What they do

Queen's University Belfast is a broadly based, research-driven university with strong interdisciplinary research spanning engineering, aerospace, materials, and advanced manufacturing. It operates through research clusters and interdisciplinary forums, with priority placed on nationally and internationally recognised research excellence. Its Centre for Secure Information Technologies (CSIT) is the UK's Innovation and Knowledge Centre for cyber security, combining research with commercialisation and industry collaboration.

## Products and solutions

- **CSIT (Centre for Secure Information Technologies)** - UK Innovation and Knowledge Centre for cyber security, founded 2009, with research spanning post-quantum and advanced cryptography, network security, secure software systems, trusted hardware and data privacy; an Academic Centre of Excellence in Cyber Security Research.
- **Cyber-AI Hub** - launched 2023 within CSIT to research the intersection of cyber security and AI, including AI-driven threat detection, robustness of AI-based malware detection against adversarial attacks, and formal verification of AI models deployed on autonomous systems.
- **Rolls-Royce Cybersecurity Technology Research Network** - CSIT is one of three university research centres worldwide in this network, alongside CERIAS (Purdue) and CyLab (Carnegie Mellon).
- **MSc Applied Cyber Security** - postgraduate taught programme, including a variant with a professional internship year.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.qub.ac.uk

Quell develops advanced machine learning systems for national security, centred on its proprietary Deep Truth® AI platform. Its SkySpyke® product is a passive 360-degree threat detection system designed to counter drone and other unmanned threats, with land and maritime variants engineered for contested environments.

QuEST Global partners with leading OEMs and technology providers to deliver engineering services across mechanical design, manufacturing technologies, embedded electronics, and software engineering. Quick Release provides product and engineering data management services, working alongside major manufacturers, OEMs and tier suppliers to build capability, accelerate development programmes and improve engineering team efficiency. # Quorum Logistic Support Ltd

> Defence ILS consultancy providing integrated logistic support, supportability analysis, reliability, maintainability and system safety services.

## What they do

Quorum Logistic Support delivers ILS consultancy across all aspects of defence support engineering, including integrated logistic support, supportability, reliability, maintainability, and system safety. Founded in 2000 and based in Shropshire, the company works with the UK MOD and Tier 1 and Tier 2 defence primes, and is expanding its portfolio into oil and gas, rail, renewables and aerospace. It also provides maritime and shipbuilding consultancy and training services.

## Products and solutions

- **Integrated Logistic Support (ILS) consultancy** - ILS engineering and management across the support lifecycle.
- **Logistic Support Analysis / Supportability Analysis (LSA/SA)** - supportability engineering to inform through-life support decisions.

companies.body:
# RS Aqua

> Portsmouth supplier of ocean-technology sensors, instruments and monitoring systems for marine science, aquaculture, defence and maritime industries.

## What they do

RS Aqua supplies and integrates ocean-technology sensors, instruments and monitoring systems, and has done so for over 40 years. Its range covers waves, currents and weather, oceanographic and submersible instruments, acoustic telemetry and underwater noise monitoring, aquaculture intelligence, autonomous and robotic platforms, and satellite telemetry. It acts as UK partner or distributor for manufacturers including Innovasea, Nortek and SEABER, and offers rental, project support, technical support and training. It is JOSCAR registered and holds ISO 9001. Since November 2024 it has operated as an autonomous business within the General Oceans group.

## Products and solutions

- **Marlin** - real-time acoustic monitoring, including underwater-noise compliance for offshore wind.
- **Acoustic telemetry and monitoring** - tagging, tracking and passive acoustic monitoring, including the Orca sensor.
- **Waves, currents and weather** - surface and submersible measurement systems.
- **Oceanographic instruments** - submersible measurement and sampling instruments.
- **Autonomy** - autonomous, robotic and uncrewed platforms.
- **Satellite telemetry and asset tracking.**

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** Society for Underwater Technology, Society of Maritime Industries

- **2024-11-18** - Acquired by General Oceans, continuing as an autonomous group business. [RS Aqua](https://rsaqua.co.uk/general-oceans-acquires-rs-aqua/)

# Radiocoms Systems Ltd

## What they do

Radiocoms Systems Ltd designs, commissions, and deploys COTS and customised communication systems for defence and security customers, drawing on multivendor relationships to deliver integrated solutions. It operates as a Tier 1 contractor in partnership with Defence Digital and TacSys Service Executive teams, designing modular, scalable voice, video and data systems for MOD customers worldwide, secured to government classification standards. The company provides system engineering, training, and after-sales support alongside its deployment services.

- **Body-worn video and CCTV** - body-worn cameras (Axon, Hytera, Motorola Solutions, Reveal) and video analytics (Avigilon).

companies.body:
# Radnor Range Ltd

> Privately owned multi-disciplinary range complex in Wales specialising in testing and evaluation of weapons, ordnance, munitions, and explosives.

## What they do

Radnor Range is a UK MOD-accredited independent test house for the test and evaluation of weapons, ordnance, munitions and explosives, operating from its own range complex near Presteigne. It conducts instrumented testing of armoured vehicles and armoured materials to international standards, Insensitive Munitions trials, UN Series testing, and weapons and vehicle-mounted weapon proofing, supported by its own explosive manufacturing, processing and pressing facilities. The company also supports drone and counter-drone flying activity, and is staffed by personnel with military and defence industry backgrounds.

## Products and solutions

- **Armoured vehicle testing** - instrumented survivability and ballistic testing of civilian and military armoured vehicles and structures.
- **Ballistic and weapons testing** - weapon systems and materials testing, including a Burst Fire Weapon System.
- **Explosives trials** - explosive composition trials, Insensitive Munitions trials, and UN Series testing for transport and hazard classification of explosives.
- **Blast trials** - blast trials for national infrastructure, including 3D digital image correlation blast modelling.
- **Munitions surveillance and disposal** - munitions surveillance, breakdown and remote sectioning of explosives, weapons and all-up munitions, and explosive disposal.
- **UAS trials** - drone and counter-drone flying trials.
- **Range training** - MOD-approved range for live fire and tactical training, and demolition training.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** UKAS 17025:2017 testing laboratory accreditation, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials Plus; UK MOD Defence Ordnance Safety Group approved independent test house; DSTL-approved range facility
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# RAINCLOUD Group
> US-based business intelligence and networking platform for the global defence technology sector, providing a curated invitation-only digital ecosystem for companies, capability discovery and market intelligence.

## What they do
RAINCLOUD Group builds invitation-only B2B platforms for high-stakes industries, with defence as its primary vertical under the RAINCLOUD DEFENSE brand. The platform combines a vetted member directory, a product showcase (the Digital Defense Show), an opportunities board, private organisational workspaces (Pavilions), and weekly intelligence outputs for its reported 6,000-plus member companies across 100-plus countries. Platform infrastructure is provided by Hivebrite. The group is incorporated in the US, UK and UAE and is expanding into a second vertical, RAINCLOUD UKRAINA, for Ukraine reconstruction business.

- **Digital Defense Show** - 24/7 virtual catalogue of defence and dual-use products and capabilities.

companies.name: Ramora Global Ltd
companies.summary: EOD and explosive disposal specialist providing bomb disposal, site remediation, EOD search, and training services to defence and emergency services customers.
companies.body:
# Ramora Global Ltd

> EOD and explosive disposal specialist providing bomb disposal, site remediation, EOD search, and training services to defence and emergency services customers.

## What they do

Ramora UK delivers explosives and security-related services to commercial and government sectors, including governments, corporations, military and law enforcement agencies internationally. Its offer spans reactive 24-hour bomb disposal through to counter-terrorist search and disposal techniques, backed by a risk management service running from initial threat assessment to strategic management policy. The company also operates a Hazardous Energetic Materials Unit (HEMU), a dedicated 24/7 callout capability for emergency services and government agencies.

## Products and solutions

- **Land Ordnance Disposal** - UK-wide 24/7 EOD response to unexploded ordnance incidents, using response vehicles licensed under carriage of dangerous goods legislation.
- **Maritime Ordnance Disposal** - a proprietary Remote Explosive Ordnance Disposal System (REODS) built for maritime EOD, removing unexploded ordnance and explosive remnants of war from pipelines, platforms and open seabed to depths in excess of 1,000 metres.
- **Site Remediation and FFEH Certification** - decontamination of former military or explosives-manufacturing sites, culminating in Free From Explosives Hazard certification for redevelopment or sale.
- **Explosive substances disposal** - assessment and disposal of chemicals with an explosive nature.
- **Consultancy and risk mitigation** - explosive consultancy delivered by the same explosives officers who carry out disposal work.
- **Training** - certified education and training packages delivered by former military personnel, from explosives awareness through to military and security forces training; facilities include a full-size search house, ship, aeroplane and search vehicle, a recompression chamber and dive tank, a lecture theatre and outdoor training grounds. EOD and IEDD training packages are delivered only to serving police or military personnel.
- **Hazardous Energetic Materials Unit (HEMU)** - a complimentary 24/7 callout service for registered emergency services and government agencies, covering chemical assessment and disposal, ordnance and explosive substance disposal, search and locate for hazardous materials, remote systems, portable chemical spectrometry and thermal imagery.
- **Equipment distribution** - UK distributor for MED-ENG and ExploSim equipment, and explosive storage solutions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 45001, ISO 14001; Cyber Essentials certified; Constructionline Acclaim accreditation.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Institute of Explosive Engineers; Site Safe Alliance; Counter-EO UK; Achilles FPAL (Silver+ supplier status).

## Links

- Website: https://www.ramorauk.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Sources: company website (ramorauk.com), including Services, About Us, Training, Accreditations and Partners pages; Hazardous Energetic Materials Unit site (hemu.uk); Companies House (Ramora Global Limited, company 07600320); ADS Group members directory.

companies.summary: Northern Ireland manufacturer of high-performance, low-light digital cameras and sensor cores for surveillance, aerospace, space and scientific markets.
companies.body:
# Raptor Photonics

> Northern Ireland manufacturer of high-performance, low-light digital cameras and sensor cores for surveillance, aerospace, space and scientific markets.

## What they do

Raptor Photonics designs, manufactures and sells high-performance, low-light-level digital cameras and camera core engines for surveillance, aerospace and space, scientific and industrial OEM markets. It supplies both off-the-shelf and custom solutions using CCD, EMCCD, CMOS and InGaAs sensors across UV, visible and SWIR wavebands, with cameras built to military specifications and optimised for size, weight and power in harsh environments. Its ISTAR camera systems are deployed on electro-optic platforms from the sea-bed to space, including gimbals and turrets on air, sea and land platforms and payloads on low Earth orbit missions.

## Products and solutions

- **Eagle** - deep-cooled scientific CCD cameras.
- **Hawk** - compact, rugged CMOS cameras for electro-optic integration.
- **Owl** - SWIR and Vis-SWIR InGaAs cameras for night vision and surveillance.
- **Ninox** - cooled SWIR and Vis-SWIR InGaAs cameras.
- **Kestrel 640 eSWIR** - extended-SWIR camera with IRNova T2SL sensor, Stirling-cooled to 170K.
- **Eagle XV / Eagle XO** - X-ray cameras.
- **OEM solutions** - block cores for gimbals and EO turrets, flight-ready camera cores for space, hyperspectral and spectroscopy cores.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Raven Innovation
> UK defence-sector consultancy helping technology SMEs enter and grow in the defence market.

## What they do
Raven Innovation provides consultancy services to technology-focused SMEs seeking to enter or expand in the defence sector. It reviews a client's portfolio and advises on strategy and objectives, business model, technology roadmaps, and current research and development projects, alongside market-ready products, with the stated aim of helping clients overcome barriers to entry into the defence sector for government or commercial business-to-business opportunities. The firm also develops product-specific use cases addressing unresolved military challenges to increase the probability of return on R&D investment, and offers talks, training events and senior leadership mentoring.

## Products and solutions

- **Strategy and positioning advice** - portfolio review, business model definition and technology roadmap development for SMEs entering the defence market.
- **Stakeholder mapping and use-case development** - identifying military use cases and stakeholders to de-risk R&D investment decisions.
- **Training and mentoring** - talks, training events and senior leadership mentoring for client organisations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Ray Systems Ltd
companies.summary: UK startup developing bio-inspired, low-signature autonomous underwater vehicles for defence and dual-use persistent monitoring and secure operations.
companies.body:
# Ray Systems Ltd
> UK startup developing bio-inspired, low-signature autonomous underwater vehicles for defence and dual-use persistent monitoring and secure operations.

## What they do
Ray Systems designs and builds autonomous underwater vehicles (UUVs) inspired by biological movement principles, targeting low-signature profiles for defence and dual-use applications. The company positions itself as a "systems in the water" business, focused on persistent exploration, real-time monitoring, and secure operations in denied environments. It states its systems unlock low-signature ISR, base protection and anti-submarine warfare capability. In December 2025 it announced a development agreement with US-listed Beam Global to design and deliver custom battery systems for its platforms.

## Products and solutions
- **RayDrive** - autonomous underwater vehicle; Mk2 completed ground-up redesign in 86 days and shipped for customer testing.
- **NelsonOS** - proprietary underwater autonomy system built to power RayDrive and positioned to extend to other uncrewed underwater, surface and air vehicles, letting platforms navigate, decide and complete missions unsupervised.
- **RayNet** - a sensing network of individually deployed nodes building a shared data picture.

## Links
- Website: https://raysystems.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ray-systems-ltd/

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-07-05. Source: company website (raysystems.com). Note: the previously recorded website raysystems.io does not belong to this company; the correct domain is raysystems.com.

companies.body:
# Raytheon UK

> Defence, national-security and aerospace technology company, the UK arm of RTX Corporation and a major UK MOD supplier and systems integrator.

## What they do

Raytheon UK is a landed company within the Raytheon business and part of the RTX enterprise in the UK, alongside Collins Aerospace and Pratt & Whitney. It is a major supplier to the UK government and to customers worldwide across defence and aerospace, cyber and space, and provides digital and training transformation solutions to commercial and military customers. It operates major facilities across England, Scotland and Wales with over 2,000 people; the main UK legal entity, Raytheon Systems Limited, was incorporated in 1946.

## Products and solutions

- **Weapons** - supplies the RAF with the Paveway IV precision-guided weapon and AMRAAM air-to-air missile, the Royal Navy with the Phalanx close-in weapon system, and the British Army with the Javelin anti-tank guided weapon; advanced manufacturing also supports Excalibur and TOW.
- **Sensors** - integrated sensor solutions for missile systems, the Multi-Spectral Targeting System (electro-optical/infrared, laser designation and illumination) used on Reaper, land radar and sensing solutions including LTAMDS, and GPS anti-jam and assured positioning, navigation and timing systems.
- **Cyber** - over 30 years of cyber security, intelligence and digital capability in defence; publicly states threat intelligence development, security operations centre capability (including its AXON Enterprise Operation Centre), and a vulnerability research team covering vulnerability research, reverse engineering, fuzzing and exploit development.
- **Space and airborne** - space domain awareness and mission intelligence, including the NORSSTrack orbital-analysis software.
- **Training transformation** - MOD training partner, prime contractor for the integrated training solution at the Future Submarine School at HMNB Clyde for Dreadnought-class submarine crews, and provider of courseware and media development services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-09** - Raytheon UK extended its apprenticeship programme to existing staff for upskilling during National Apprenticeship Week. [source](https://www.raytheon.co.uk/news/2026/02/09/raytheon-uk-supports-skills-for-life-through-apprenticeship-opportunities)
- **2025-11-04** - Raytheon UK awarded a UK Space Agency contract to deliver an orbital-analyst capability using NORSSTrack software at the National Space Operations Centre. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/11/04/raytheon-uk-awarded-uk-space-agency-contract-to-deliver-orbital-analyst-capabilit)
- **2025-09-08** - Raytheon UK completed Paveway IV precision-guided bomb integration trials on the Eurofighter Typhoon. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/09/08/raytheon-uk-conducts-paveway-iv-precision-guided-bomb-integration-trials)

## Links

- Website: https://www.raytheon.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raytheon-uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (raytheon.co.uk), including current Land, Air, Sea, Space and Cyber, Space and Training pages, RTX news centre, Companies House (Raytheon Systems Limited 00406809), ADS Group member listing and Airforce Technology. Owned by RTX Corporation (US parent); no specific accreditations were evidenced and are omitted.

# RDDS Avionics Limited

> Designs, manufactures and maintains avionics and electronic equipment for defence aerospace, marine and land vehicle applications.

## What they do

RDDS Avionics develops displays, video management systems, mission computing, command and control software, and surveillance equipment for civil and defence platforms. Founded in 1993, the company states it has over 3,000 RDDS products in service worldwide. Its engineering-led approach targets bespoke solutions built around platform-specific requirements across air, maritime and land domains, and it has a long-standing relationship with Leonardo, including as a listed supplier on the AW149 medium helicopter programme.

companies.name: Real Time Innovations International
companies.summary: Software framework company specialising in real-time data connectivity for autonomous and intelligent distributed systems.
companies.body:
# Real Time Innovations International

> Software framework company specialising in real-time data connectivity for autonomous and intelligent distributed systems.

## What they do

Real-Time Innovations (RTI) is the leading vendor of products compliant with the Object Management Group Data Distribution Service (DDS) standard. Its Connext product suite provides a connectivity framework supporting over 20 defence industry standards, connecting sensors, actuators and AI algorithms in real time across transports including tactical data links, RF, satellite and underwater sensor networks. RTI states its technology underpins mission-critical systems in defence, aerospace and government programmes, and describes itself as chairing the OSD architecture for unmanned ground control station standards and contributing to avionics open-systems standards. The UK entity is registered as an overseas company establishment, with its registered UK office in Bury St Edmunds.

## Products and solutions

- **Connext DDS / Connext Professional** - Data Distribution Service middleware connecting distributed sensors, systems and AI algorithms in real time.
- **Connext Drive** - a communication framework for automotive and electric vehicle architectures, from individual controllers to zonal and central controllers.
- **Connext AI** - a suite of LLM-powered tools intended to help design, code and debug real-time systems, built on RTI's own documentation and code repositories.
- **Admin Console and System Designer** - development tools for visualising running DDS applications and graphically designing and configuring Connext systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** states involvement in Modular Open Systems Approach (MOSA), FACE, SOSA, UCS, UMAA and VAULTIS data strategy principles; DO-178 certified variant referenced for airworthy uncrewed aircraft systems use.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-02** - RTI expanded into Japan, appointing Macnica as distributor. [source](https://www.rti.com/news/rti-macnica)
- **2026-02-10** - RTI Connext used to enable Voyis' underwater cameras for autonomous subsea and defence operations. [source](https://www.rti.com/news/voyis)
- **2026-01-13** - RTI awarded a position on the US Missile Defense Agency's SHIELD IDIQ contract. [source](https://www.rti.com/news/rti-awarded-mda-contact)
- **2025-11-06** - RTI introduced Connext Drive 4.0, described as an AI-enhanced communication framework for software-defined vehicle development. [source](https://www.rti.com/news/connext-drive-4.0)

## Links

- Website: https://www.rti.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Sources: company website (rti.com), including About RTI, Products, Aerospace & Defense and JADC2 pages, and RTI Newsroom; Companies House (UK establishment BR007613, overseas parent FC025258); ADS Group members directory snapshot (2026-05-15). UK registered address care of Baker Tilley, Bury St Edmunds.

companies.body:
# Real-Time Consultants
> UK SME delivering change management, procurement, cost assurance, cyber security, data science and programme delivery services to the MOD and wider public sector, trading as RT Consulting.

## What they do

Real-Time Consultants Ltd, trading as RT Consulting, is a UK SME delivering consultancy services across government, defence and the public sector. Its current capability set covers change management, commercial and procurement, cost assurance, cyber security, data science and analytics, health and safety assessment and strategy, live service management, portfolio/programme/project management (P3M), and sustainability. It is JOSCAR accredited and states experience supporting clients including DE&S, Defence Digital and the Submarine Delivery Agency, and describes itself as a leading UK defence consultancy for agile transformation based in Bristol, close to MOD, DE&S and defence primes.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber Security & Digital Intelligence** - cyber security strategy aligned to the Government Cyber Security Strategy, information assurance and risk-managed data handling, and support achieving accreditations and governance against frameworks including NIST, ISO standards, CIS controls and Cyber Essentials.
- **Data Science & Analytics** - personnel and services to analyse, manage and securely maintain large and complex datasets, covering data science, data modelling and data reporting disciplines.
- **Commercial & Procurement / Cost Assurance** - budget accountability and cost scrutiny support across government, defence and public sector programmes.
- **Portfolio, Programme, Project Management (P3M)** - project and programme management delivery across complex, multi-industry programmes.
- **Change Management** - organisational change aligned to client strategy, values and culture.
- **Live Service Management** - support stabilising, optimising and evolving live services, including transition from legacy platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR accredited; Programme Delivery Partner (PDP-S) supply chain member for the MOD.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO/IEC 27001.

## Recent news

companies.body:
# Real-Time Innovations (RTI)

> Connext data-distribution software underpinning real-time, autonomous and mission-critical defence systems.

## What they do

RTI is a software framework company for intelligent physical systems. Its Connext product suite is a real-time data streaming and connectivity platform built on the Data Distribution Service (DDS) standard, used to integrate distributed, autonomous and mission-critical applications. RTI describes itself as the world's largest DDS supplier, with software embedded across hundreds of major defence programmes and autonomous-vehicle deployments.

## Products and solutions

- **Connext Professional** - software framework for building distributed real-time and physical AI systems on the DDS standard.
- **Connext product suite** - data connectivity, real-time data streaming and integration tooling for autonomous systems, command and control, and digital twins.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Standards:** built on the Object Management Group (OMG) Data Distribution Service (DDS) standard.

RVL Aviation is a specialist charter airline and aerial services operator based at East Midlands Airport, part of RVL Group. companies.name: Red 6 Aerospace UK Ltd
companies.summary: Develops augmented reality flight training systems for military pilots, addressing the NATO pilot shortage and readiness crisis.
companies.body:
# Red 6 Aerospace UK Ltd

> Develops augmented reality flight training systems for military pilots, addressing the NATO pilot shortage and readiness crisis.

## What they do

Red 6 has developed the Advanced Tactical Augmented Reality System (ATARS), which overlays synthetic adversaries and training scenarios onto the real-world environment as seen from a cockpit. The system is described by the company as delivering live, virtual and constructive training, projecting synthetic threats, adversary aircraft and friendly assets directly into a pilot's view during real flight, and is designed to make military flight training more authentic, scalable and cost-effective without the constraints of live aircraft availability.

## Products and solutions

- **ATARS (Advanced Tactical Augmented Reality System)** - airborne augmented reality platform projecting synthetic threats and training assets into the live cockpit environment.
- **EVE Headset (Enhanced Visual Environment)** - proprietary augmented reality headset designed for use outdoors in daylight and at flight speed.
- **ARCADE (Augmented Reality Command and Analytic Data Environment)** - post-mission debrief and analytics tool built on ATARS flight data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-08** - Contract to integrate ATARS into US Air Force F-16s for live in-flight augmented reality training. [Breaking Defense](https://breakingdefense.com/2025/08/red-6-wins-deal-to-bring-augmented-reality-to-f-16s/)
- **2025-08** - Strategic partnership with Sierra Nevada Corporation to integrate ATARS and ARCADE into SNC's Freedom Trainer for the US Navy's Undergraduate Jet Training System programme. [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/snc-and-red-6-announce-strategic-partnership-to-support-us-navys-undergraduate-jet-training-system-ujts-program-302526785.html)
- **2025-11** - Collaboration with Boeing to integrate ATARS into an AH-64E Apache testbed. [Axios](https://www.axios.com/2025/11/17/red6-boeing-atars-apache-army)
- **2026-05** - Rochefort Asset Management closed senior secured debt financing to scale ATARS deployment. [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/rochefort-provides-financing-to-red-6-to-expand-military-augmented-reality-training-302771613.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.red6ar.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Red 6 website; ADS Group members directory; Breaking Defense; PR Newswire; Axios. UK registered address at New Street Square, London.

companies.body:
# RED Scientific
> Independent British research and analytical consultancy serving UK government and defence agencies, including the CIRSIUM digital wargaming product.

## What they do
RED Scientific (legal name RED Scientific Reply Limited, acquired by Reply and renamed January 2026) provides operational analysis, systems engineering, integrated logistics support, training and documentation, safety and security compliance, and manpower provision to the UK government and MOD. The firm maintains government-classified premises at Alton, Hampshire, and delivers on-site expert support across the UK. It has been a TacCIS Framework participant and holds a long-standing presence at the Defence Academy.

## Products and solutions
- **CIRSIUM** - a playable mathematical model of military engagements, combining software, combat algorithms and supporting data, developed for the British Army Land Warfare Centre and NATO's Allied Rapid Reaction Corps to support operational-level course-of-action and analytical wargaming. Demonstrated at the Defence Academy Industry Fair, November 2025.
- **RAW (RED Analytical Wargame)** - operational analytical wargaming tool developed with the British Army Land Warfare Centre, used by HQ Allied Rapid Reaction Corps.
- **Data Systems** - bespoke digital solutions built on Oracle, Oracle APEX and MS SQL Server, including MODNET-hosted capability.
- **Dashboard Intelligence (RED-Vi)** - open-source-intelligence harvesting, parsing and fusion with interactive dashboard visualisation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
- **Frameworks:** TacCIS participant.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015.

## Links
- Website: https://www.red-scientific.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/red-scientific-limited/

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-07-05. Sources: red-scientific.co.uk capability pages (Mathematical Modelling, Data Systems, Dashboard Intelligence, Operational Research & Modelling) and case study (Land Wargaming Development).

companies.summary: Cyber security consultancy helping organisations understand and mitigate their cyber risks.
companies.body:
# Redbay Ltd

> Cyber security consultancy helping organisations understand and mitigate their cyber risks.

## What they do

Redbay is a digital resilience consultancy spanning two service lines, cyber security and digital delivery. It works with organisations of all sizes to assess cyber risk and deliver tailored security capabilities and mitigations, with a focus on protecting operational output and revenue through practical, risk-proportionate cyber security measures.

## Products and solutions

- **Vulnerability management** - identifying and managing vulnerabilities to strengthen compliance and system resilience.
- **Security programme development** - security controls, governance frameworks, incident response plans and technical risk identification.
- **Secure by design** - shaping architecture decisions and defining controls ahead of development, applying NIST risk management and security control frameworks, and assessing in-flight projects against secure-by-design principles.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.redbay.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Redbay website (services pages); ADS Group members directory.

companies.name: Redcliffe Precision Limited
companies.summary: CNC precision aerospace manufacturer supplying components and sub-assemblies to major aerospace and defence primes.
companies.body:
# Redcliffe Precision Limited

> CNC precision aerospace manufacturer supplying components and sub-assemblies to major aerospace and defence primes.

## What they do

Redcliffe Precision provides CNC multi-axis machining (3 and 5-axis milling, 2 and 4-axis turning and mill-turn), precision thread rolling and thread testing, cylindrical and centreless grinding, minor mechanical assembly, and microstructure testing to the aerospace and defence supply chain. The company holds approvals from Airbus, Bombardier, Leonardo (Vital Parts), GE Aviation, and Rolls Royce Marine, and has supplied parts for the Airbus A350, A220 and A320 programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC precision machining** - 3 and 5-axis milling and 2 and 4-axis turning and mill-turn for aerospace and defence components.
- **Thread rolling and grinding** - precision thread rolling and testing, plus cylindrical, centreless and surface grinding.
- **Sub-assembly and finishing** - minor mechanical assembly, microstructure testing and epoxy primer spray finishing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001

## Links

- Website: https://www.redcliffeprecision.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Redcliffe Precision website; ADS Group members directory.

companies.name: RedRock Consulting Ltd
companies.summary: Technology and digital professional services consultancy serving public sector and defence clients.
companies.body:
# RedRock Consulting Ltd

> Technology and digital professional services consultancy serving public sector and defence clients.

## What they do

RedRock Consulting delivers strategy, technology, and digital transformation services to government, retail, technology and financial services clients across the public, private and third sectors. Founded in 2005 and based in Bristol, the firm works across eight capability lines: agile and programme delivery, cloud and infrastructure services, cyber security and organisational resilience, data, AI and analytics, software development, strategy and advisory, transformation and change, and user-centred design and research. The firm holds JOSCAR registration and Cyber Essentials Plus certification.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber security and organisational resilience** - includes penetration testing, security operations centre monitoring, incident response, identity and access management, and vulnerability management, delivered as consulting services.
- **Data, AI and analytics** - data analytics, data engineering and visualisation services, alongside applied machine learning, natural language processing and generative AI work.
- **Identity and access management** - a named case study describes an IdAM solution covering role-based access control, privileged access management and public key infrastructure for a central government agency.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR; Crown Commercial Service RM6190 (Technology Services 4); Crown Commercial Service RM6292 (Cloud Compute 2, Lot 3)

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Listed as a supplier on the Crown Commercial Service Technology Services 4 framework (RM6190) at its live date. [Crown Commercial Service](https://www.crowncommercial.gov.uk/news/technology-services-4-framework-launch)

## Links

- Website: https://www.redrockconsulting.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. RedRock Consulting website (capabilities and case study pages); Crown Commercial Service supplier record; ADS Group members directory.

companies.name: Redstone Risk Ltd
companies.summary: Risk management consultancy providing quantitative risk analysis and advisory services to Defence and Energy customers.
companies.body:
# Redstone Risk Ltd

> Risk management consultancy providing quantitative risk analysis and advisory services to Defence and Energy customers.

## What they do

Redstone Risk delivers risk management consulting, schedule and cost risk modelling, and risk analytics to major defence contractors and their senior leadership teams. The firm's core sector focus is Defence, spanning land and marine programmes, and Energy, including legacy nuclear decommissioning and nuclear new-build. It has direct experience supporting businesses in dialogue with the Single Source Regulations Office on Single Source Regulations compliance, and states it has supported over £20bn of defence contracts over five years.

## Products and solutions

- **Schedule risk analysis** - Monte Carlo-based schedule risk modelling for major programmes.
- **Cost risk analysis** - integrated cost and schedule risk modelling and analytics.
- **Risk advisory** - risk management training and advisory support to senior leadership on major programme risk.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-05** - Completed the initial phase of a schedule risk analysis package within the defence nuclear enterprise, building a combined schedule, assumptions and risk model across an alliance of three organisations. [Redstone Risk](https://www.redstonerisk.com/thoughts/redstone-risk-completes-sra-with-glowing-feedback/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.redstonerisk.com

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Redstone Risk website; ADS Group members directory.

companies.name: Refute
companies.summary: UK AI company detecting and countering disinformation by tracing and scoring narratives and adversarial behaviours across interconnected data at scale.
companies.body:
# Refute
> UK AI company detecting and countering disinformation by tracing and scoring narratives and adversarial behaviours across interconnected data at scale.

## What they do
Refute applies a quantitative approach to counter-disinformation, fusing, tracing and scoring narratives and behaviours across connected data sources and using generative AI to automate detection and response. The platform is designed to operate at the speed of the adversary, targeting narrative-based attacks on organisations and governments. Co-founders Tom Garnett and Vlad Galu bring experience in counter-terrorism data analysis, cyber attack response and internet identity trust systems.

Refute raised PS5M in seed funding led by Amadeus Capital Partners, with participation from Playfair, Episode 1, Osney Capital and the National Security Strategic Investment Fund (NSSIF).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
- **Programmes:** NSSIF investee.

## Recent news
- **2026-01** - Closed a £5 million seed funding round led by Amadeus Capital Partners, with participation from Playfair, Episode 1, Osney Capital and NSSIF, to scale the platform against disinformation and hybrid warfare threats. [Amadeus Capital Partners](https://www.amadeuscapital.com/refute-5m-seed-counter-disinformation/), [NSSIF](https://www.nssif.gov.uk/news/refute-raises-5-million-seed-round-to-advance-ai-powered-counter-disinformation-capabilities)

## Links
- Website: https://refute.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/refute/

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-07-05. Refute website; Amadeus Capital Partners; NSSIF.

companies.body:
# Reliance Cyber Ltd

> Specialist managed cyber security services provider with over 20 years of experience protecting organisations across multiple sectors including defence.

## What they do

Reliance Cyber delivers managed cyber security services tailored to each client's risk profile, operating across sectors including defence, local government and the NHS. The firm builds solutions using in-house teams, its own tooling and technology partnerships, combining threat intelligence with bespoke security strategies in a partnership model with client organisations. It is certified under the NCSC Cyber Incident Response scheme and states it is one of a small number of managed security service providers partnered with Google Cloud Security.

## Products and solutions

- **Managed SASE** - secure access service edge delivered in partnership with Cato Networks, aimed at zero-trust deployment for mid-market clients.
- **Managed detection and threat intelligence** - managed security services incorporating Google Threat Intelligence.
- **Identity and email security** - identity security and email and cloud security services.
- **Incident response** - response services assured under the NCSC Cyber Incident Response scheme.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
- **Accreditations:** NCSC Cyber Incident Response (CIR) scheme

## Recent news

- **2026** - Launched a Managed SASE offering built on Cato Networks. [Reliance Cyber](https://www.reliancecyber.com/)
- **2026** - Integrated Google Threat Intelligence into its core managed security services, extending its existing Google Cloud Security partnership. [Reliance Cyber](https://www.reliancecyber.com/)

> Manufacturer of customised precision electro-mechanical components and assemblies for high-performance applications.

## What they do

Reliance Precision designs, develops, prototypes, manufactures, assembles and tests precision electro-mechanical components and sub-assemblies to demanding specifications for high-performance sectors including space, defence and industrial applications. The company operates from its facility at Rowley Mills, Huddersfield, with a second manufacturing site in Ireland.

companies.body:
# Remote Medical International UK Ltd

> Provider of bespoke medical, security and HSE support for organisations operating in remote, high-risk environments, including defence.

## What they do

Remote Medical International (RMI) describes itself as a bespoke solutions partner, helping clients manage risk through medical, security and health, safety and environmental (HSE) services wherever they operate, from offshore platforms to conflict zones. The company works across oil and gas, renewable energy, mining, corporate travel, construction, maritime and defence, and states it has provided solutions to US and UK government agencies since 2014 as both prime contractor and subcontractor. The UK entity operates from a base in Fareham, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **On-site medical support** - dedicated medical providers and HSE reporting for client operations.
- **Occupational health** - fit-for-duty assessments, medical surveillance and drug testing.
- **Medical assistance** - 24/7 emergency helpline, medical emergency response plans and medical evacuation.
- **Travel medic staffing** - rapid deployment of paramedics and emergency medical technicians.
- **Mobile medical units** - configurable clinical care units for remote deployments.
- **Intelligence services** - country risk assessments and 24/7 monitoring.
- **Security assistance** - 24/7 crisis response and a global intelligence portal.
- **Government and humanitarian response** - base support services, including clinic support delivered under a LOGCAP contract.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001, ISO 45001, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Offshore Energies UK, Armed Forces Covenant (Bronze).

## Recent news

## Links

- Website: https://www.rmiglobalsolutions.com

# Renaissance Strategic Advisors Ltd

> Strategy, market assessment, and M&A due diligence consultancy focused on aerospace, defence, and government services.

## What they do

Renaissance Strategic Advisors (RSA) advises corporate and investor clients across aerospace, defence, space, intelligence and government services on growth strategy and mergers and acquisitions. The firm states more than 20 years and 1,000-plus engagements of sector experience, coupling strategy work with M&A and due diligence, and tracks emerging technology areas including AI and machine learning, autonomy and robotics, hypersonics, directed energy and quantum computing. The firm draws on a multidisciplinary team with backgrounds spanning military service, defence primes, investment banking, equity research, and government policy. The UK entity is based in London.

## Products and solutions

- **Strategy consulting** - organic and inorganic growth and value-creation strategy for aerospace, defence and government-services clients.
- **M&A advisory** - full lifecycle support from strategy through due diligence, financial advisory and post-merger integration.
- **Investment and commercial due diligence** - cites more than 350 due diligence assignments and 1,000-plus diligence projects over 20 years.

companies.name: Renishaw plc
companies.summary: UK-listed precision engineering company specialising in metrology, additive manufacturing and healthcare technologies, with applications across defence.
companies.body:
# Renishaw plc

> UK-listed precision engineering company specialising in metrology, additive manufacturing and healthcare technologies, with applications across defence.

## What they do

Renishaw is a manufacturer of high-precision metrology and healthcare technology. Its products and systems improve manufacturing efficiency and product quality and are used across aerospace, automotive, semiconductor, electronics, medical and defence sectors. The company designs, develops and manufactures in-house, with operations spanning around 36 countries, and is listed on the London Stock Exchange (ticker RSW) as a constituent of the FTSE 250.

## Products and solutions

- **Touch-trigger and scanning probes** - the founding product, sensors for coordinate measuring machines used for precision inspection of machined parts including defence components.
- **Coordinate measuring machine (CMM) probes, software and retrofits** - measurement and inspection systems for high-precision quality control.
- **Machine tool probes** - on-machine measurement and tool setting for CNC machining.
- **Position encoders** - linear, rotary, angle and magnetic encoders for high-accuracy motion control in robotics, semiconductors and precision machining, with relevance to guidance, optics and targeting systems.
- **Metal additive manufacturing (RenAM series)** - metal 3D-printing systems using multi-laser powder-bed fusion, marketed for defence applications including lightweight, complex metal parts.
- **Equator gauging system** - flexible, thermally insensitive shop-floor gauging with intelligent process control for automated CNC manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Institute of Materials, Minerals and Mining (IOM3), listed as a supplier member.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-11** - Renishaw reported record half-year revenue of £365.6m (up 7.1%), citing strong momentum in defence and semiconductor markets. [source](https://www.investegate.co.uk/announcement/rns/renishaw--rsw/half-year-financial-report/9424652)
- **2025-11-17** - Renishaw showcased defence-focused additive manufacturing, including the RenAM 500Q and TEMPUS scanning technology, at the Defense Manufacturing Conference 2025. [source](https://soldiersystems.net/2025/11/11/renishaw-to-showcase-advanced-additive-manufacturing-solutions-for-defense-at-dmc-2025/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.renishaw.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/renishaw

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (renishaw.com), Companies House (registration 01106260), London Stock Exchange listing (RSW), Investegate financial filings and Soldier Systems. No formal accreditations were firmly evidenced and are omitted; the IOM3 entry is a supplier listing.

companies.name: Replin by Hainsworth
companies.summary: Yorkshire-based manufacturer of precision interior fabrics for the aviation sector.
companies.body:
# Replin by Hainsworth

> Yorkshire-based manufacturer of precision interior fabrics for the aviation sector.

## What they do

Replin by Hainsworth designs and manufactures interior fabrics for aviation clients, covering seating, wall coverings, curtains, and blinds. Founded in 1945, the brand marks 80 years of aviation textile supply to major international airlines. Since a 2015 merger with A.W. Hainsworth, a Yorkshire wool mill trading since 1783, Replin combines wool and modern fibre expertise with bespoke design, weaving and finishing at its Pudsey mill to produce durable, specification-compliant aviation interior textiles.

## Products and solutions

- **Aviation seating fabrics** - abrasion-resistant, tightly woven textiles for passenger, pilot and crew seating.
- **Aviation curtain fabric** - flame-retardant, colour-fast fabric for cabin curtains.
- **Vertical surface fabric (WNN and WNN Nature)** - high-traffic cabin wall covering, including an aramid and undyed wool blend.
- **Eclipse and Eclipse Steadfast ranges** - wool and aramid (Nomex) blends for premium seating pods, including undyed alpaca and aramid blends.
- **Steadfast Collection** - sustainable, undyed-fibre fabric range for cabin interiors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018. Fabrics stated to meet FAR/CS 25.853 aviation flammability requirements, tested in an in-house UKAS-accredited laboratory.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Green Cabin Alliance.

## Recent news

- **2025-09-29** - Marked its 80th anniversary as an aviation textiles manufacturer. [source](https://www.replinbyhainsworth.co.uk)
- **2025-06-19** - Unveiled a new undyed-wool transport fabric collection. [source](https://www.replinbyhainsworth.co.uk)

## Links

- Website: https://www.replinbyhainsworth.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (replinbyhainsworth.co.uk), ADS Group member directory, trade press (Runway Girl Network, Specialty Fabrics Review, Aircraft Interiors International).

companies.name: Reply Ltd
companies.summary: Digital and technology consultancy with a specialism in National Critical Infrastructure solutions.
companies.body:
# Reply Ltd

> Digital and technology consultancy with a specialism in National Critical Infrastructure solutions.

## What they do

Reply designs and implements solutions built on digital media, new communication channels, and emerging technology capabilities. The company builds and operates a number of National Critical Infrastructure solutions for UK clients. In the UK, defence, intelligence and security work is delivered through named operating companies within the wider Reply group: Shield Reply for defence, intelligence and security, Spike Reply for cyber security, and Airwalk Reply, Glue Reply and Solirius for UK public-sector digital transformation.

## Products and solutions

- **Shield Reply** - defence, intelligence and security practice, delivering cloud services on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure including Oracle Roving Edge Devices for disconnected and degraded environments.
- **Spike Reply** - cyber security operating company offering penetration testing (including CREST OVS web application assessment), a 24/7 cyber security operations centre, identity governance and data security, security governance, risk and compliance, and OT/IIoT cyber security integration.
- **Airwalk Reply and Glue Reply** - UK public-sector technology transformation consultancies, delivering complex technology transformation programmes for government departments.
- **Solirius** - UK government digital transformation consultancy covering agile delivery, AI and data management, with publicly named clients including HMCTS, FCDO Services, the Department for Education and BDUK.
- **Cluster Reply, Cortex Reply and Valorem Reply** - data analytics and cloud-native modernisation capability for UK public-sector customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service Technology Services 3 (Airwalk Reply and Glue Reply named suppliers), G-Cloud (Airwalk Reply held positions on G-Cloud 11, 12 and 13; Spike Reply listed on G-Cloud 14 for penetration testing services).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-25** - Oracle and Shield Reply collaboration announced to help emerging defence technology providers scale mission-ready AI, cyber and operational capabilities. [source](https://www.oracle.com)
- **2026-01-29** - Reply operating companies Cortex Reply, Valorem Reply and Sprint Reply presented at AI in Government 2026 in Manchester. [source](https://www.reply.com)
- **2024-10-30** - Reply acquired Solirius, a UK government digital transformation consultancy. [source](https://www.reply.com)

## Links

- Website: https://www.reply.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (reply.com), Shield Reply and Spike Reply pages, Companies House (registration 03847202), Oracle newsroom, ADS Group member directory. Capability claims noted here sit at the level of named Reply operating companies rather than a single unified statement by Reply Ltd.

companies.name: Research Innovations
companies.summary: Non-traditional defence software company bringing commercial technology to national security problems in the UK, US and Canada.
companies.body:
# Research Innovations

> Non-traditional defence software company bringing commercial technology to national security problems in the UK, US and Canada.

## What they do

Research Innovations Inc (RII) develops Joint All-Domain C2, tactical C2, cyber, AI, and Information Operations products used across the joint force from tactical edge to strategic level. The company has worked with the UK Ministry of Defence since 2017, developing joint and multi-domain C2 capabilities in support of UK Defence's data strategy, with its London team working alongside the British Army's Information Activities and Operations programme and UK Strategic Command. RII has a consistent track record of transitioning R&D into operational use across UK, US and Canadian customers, with offices in Alexandria (Virginia), Melbourne and St Petersburg (Florida), San Antonio (Texas) and London.

## Products and solutions

- **PRIISM (Decision Advantage Platform)** - flagship Combined Joint All-Domain Command and Control product, combining data integration, data security and AI-driven analytics for coalition and joint decision-making.
- **PRIISM Accelerated Planning** - described as compressing a 24-month planning cycle to 24 days.
- **PRIISM Joint Targeting Platform** - compresses the sensor-to-decision timeline across domains and coalition networks.
- **PRIISM Information Advantage** - sensing, sense-making and acting on authoritative and open-source data across the information environment.
- **PRIISM MAX** - variant architecture supporting multi-national data sharing and configurable network boundaries for coalition targeting.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud 14 (Crown Commercial Service, RM1557), named supplier under the Cloud Software and Cloud Support lots.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-11** - Five-year extension of a Department of Justice contract on the Money Laundering, Narcotics, and Forfeiture Section programme. [source](https://www.researchinnovations.com)
- **2026-01** - Awarded a Missile Defense Agency SHIELD IDIQ contract. [source](https://www.researchinnovations.com)

## Links

- Website: https://www.researchinnovations.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/research-innovations-incorporated

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (researchinnovations.com, including the UK and PRIISM pages), ADS Group member directory, PR Newswire.

companies.name: Resonate Testing Limited
companies.summary: UKAS-accredited environmental, vibration, shock and fire testing laboratory serving aerospace, space and defence customers.
companies.body:
# Resonate Testing Limited

> UKAS-accredited environmental, vibration, shock and fire testing laboratory serving aerospace, space and defence customers.

## What they do

Resonate Testing is a wholly owned subsidiary of The Nacelle Group, operating a purpose-built test facility in Newry, Northern Ireland, established in 2015. The company's core disciplines are vibration and shock testing, fire and flammability testing, and environmental and climatic testing, and it states it operates the only commercial facility on the island of Ireland able to perform combined temperature-and-vibration testing up to 54kN. It serves aerospace, space, automotive, energy, electrical and mechanical, medical technology, defence, humanitarian aid, and logistics and transport sectors, with public emphasis on propulsion-system fire testing for large civil aircraft and environmental, vibration and shock qualification for space launch vehicles and satellite hardware.

## Products and solutions

- **Vibration testing** - random, sine and combined vibration-and-temperature testing up to 54kN.
- **Shock testing** - Shock Response Spectrum methodology.
- **Environmental and climatic testing** - temperature, humidity and altitude testing.
- **Fire and flammability testing** - including propulsion-system fire testing for large civil aircraft; stated to be the only commercial aircraft-interiors and components fire test lab on the island of Ireland.
- **Thermal vacuum (TVAC) testing** - launched 2026, stated to be the largest and most capable TVAC chamber on the island of Ireland, for satellite and spacecraft qualification.
- **Battery testing** - stated to be the first battery testing facility on the island of Ireland, with an explosive and fireproof chamber and abuse test rigs for eBike, EV, consumer electronics and space applications.
- Testing performed to standards including RTCA DO-160, MIL-STD-810, DEF STAN 00-35 and EN 60068.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** UKAS accreditation to ISO/IEC 17025 (vibration, environmental, fire and flammability testing), ISO 9001:2015, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, NI Space Ready Programme cohort; listed on the STFC-run UK Space Facilities directory.

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Launched Thermal Vacuum (TVAC) testing capability, marking the company's tenth anniversary. [source](https://www.resonatetesting.com)
- **2025-01** - Announced a £475,000 investment in Ireland's first battery testing facility, with five new jobs and a turnover growth target. [source](https://www.resonatetesting.com)

## Links

- Website: http://www.resonatetesting.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/resonatetesting

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (resonatetesting.com), Companies House (registration NI634844), ADS Group member directory, Engineers Ireland, Invest NI.

companies.name: Revector
companies.summary: IMSI intelligence specialist providing hardware and software solutions to detect and monitor security threats across Wi-Fi and mobile networks.
companies.body:
# Revector

> IMSI intelligence specialist providing hardware and software solutions to detect and monitor security threats across Wi-Fi and mobile networks.

## What they do

Revector develops cell-site simulator and mobile phone surveillance hardware and software for security, intelligence and public safety applications. Its core technology, the Revector Detector, detects broadcasting IMSIs within range and locates the associated device; a Wi-Fi variant detects devices seeking or interacting with Wi-Fi networks to identify activity around locations of interest. The company describes its own work as "IMSI intelligence" and "Wi-Fi intelligence"; trade press covering the same product line has also framed it as unmanned SIGINT. Publicly stated applications include critical infrastructure and government building protection, border control including UAV-borne monitoring of land and maritime borders, law enforcement and counter-terrorism, and search and rescue.

## Products and solutions

- **Detector MPS (Multi-Platform System)** - portable, covert four-channel IMSI catcher, carried in a backpack or retrofitted into vehicles, helicopters or aircraft.
- **Detector UAV Payload** - low-SWaP active payload module for integration into drone platforms, detecting and tracking 2G/3G/4G devices via dual software-defined radio, recording IMSI, IMEI, TMSI, GPS location and timestamp data.
- **IMSI intelligence devices for search and rescue** - a suite including a UAV payload, a personal-carry version, and a vehicle-mounted version, enabling location of individuals via their mobile devices and two-way contact even without local network coverage.
- **Wi-Fi Catcher** - combined IMSI and Wi-Fi capture device for UAV integration.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026 (ongoing)** - Exhibiting the Detector IMSI Catcher UAV payload and a Detector Search & Rescue product line at International Security Expo 2026, Olympia London. [source](https://www.internationalsecurityexpo.com)

## Links

- Website: http://www.revector.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/revector

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (revector.com), International Security Expo and SDSC-UK exhibitor listings, ADS Group member directory.

companies.name: RevEng.AI
companies.summary: Foundational AI platform for reverse engineering compiled software, supporting malware detection and software supply chain assurance for defence and national security.
companies.body:
# RevEng.AI

> Foundational AI platform for reverse engineering compiled software, supporting malware detection and software supply chain assurance for defence and national security.

## What they do

RevEng.AI builds AI models that enable Defence and National Security users to detect novel malware, identify previously unknown software vulnerabilities, and assure complex software supply chains and device firmware. Its foundational model, BinNet, analyses compiled software, including closed-source and third-party binaries and firmware, to determine what is actually inside them without needing source code access. The platform operates at speed and scale, reducing the cost of binary analysis for government and defence customers, and the company states BinNet has been trained alongside allied government cyber units and commercial security teams. RevEng.AI is a graduate of the NCSC for Startups programme.

## Products and solutions

- **BinNet** - foundational AI model for binary-level software analysis, turning compiled binaries back into readable, source-like output and identifying functional behaviour rather than relying on signature matching.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** NCSC for Startups graduate.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-05-27** - Raised a $15 million Series A led by the NATO Innovation Fund, with In-Q-Tel, Sands Capital, IQ Capital and Episode One participating, to verify the security and integrity of AI-generated software. companies.name: Reventec Ltd
companies.summary: Custom programmable sensor designer and manufacturer serving unmanned systems, military and motorsport sectors from Wiltshire.
companies.body:
# Reventec Ltd

> Custom programmable sensor designer and manufacturer serving unmanned systems, military and motorsport sectors from Wiltshire.

## What they do

Reventec is a mechanical and electronic design consultancy, established in 2013, specialising in sensor products for motorsport, defence, aerospace and industrial sectors. It designs and manufactures electronic and mechanical sensors, including capacitive liquid level, non-contact position and programmable temperature sensors for demanding environments. The company states it has significant experience designing sensors for military UAV platforms, and its products are in widespread use across unmanned aerial systems and military platforms, as well as motorsport and automotive applications. Reventec supplies sensors that integrate into unmanned aircraft systems; it does not manufacture UAS platforms or payloads itself.

## Products and solutions

- **LSM800** - mil-spec capacitive UAV fuel and oil level sensor with a threaded two-bolt mount, custom-built up to 450mm.
- **LSM500 range (including LSM500-38999 and LSM500-CONTOUR)** - mil-spec liquid level sensors, with a variant featuring an integrated MIL-DTL-38999 connector for plug-and-play installation.
- **LS845** - threaded liquid level sensor for fuel and oil in high-temperature, harsh-environment applications.
- **DroneCAN protocol option** - added to the capacitive liquid level sensor range; the company states it is the first capacitive liquid-level sensor manufacturer to offer DroneCAN compatibility on new orders, enabling direct integration into UAV flight controller systems.
- **Non-contact TMR position sensors** - measure through non-ferrous material and across air gaps, for ruggedised applications.
- **Programmable temperature sensors** - resistive or ratiometric voltage output, for long-term reliability in harsh and extreme-temperature environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Exhibited at DSEI 2025, launching the DroneCAN protocol feature for its capacitive liquid level sensor range. [source](https://www.reventec.com)

## Links

- Website: http://www.reventec.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/reventec-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (reventec.com), ADS Group member directory, DSEI 2025 exhibitor coverage. Reventec's sensors integrate into unmanned aerial systems; the company is not itself a UAS platform or payload manufacturer, so `uas` subset tags are not applied.

# RHE Southern Limited

> Specialist supplier of aircraft jacks and aviation lifting equipment, serving governments, airlines, MROs and operators worldwide.

## What they do

RHE Southern supplies, tests, services and repairs aircraft jacks and associated lifting equipment, with over 30 years of experience in the sector. Customers include government operators, airlines, MROs, simulation providers and military operators; the product range covers jacks, slings, chains, hydraulic lifting equipment, fall arrest systems, staging, platforms and a range of aircraft-specific support stands. The company states its equipment is approved by operators and manufacturers including Boeing, Thales, Marshall Aerospace, ST Aerospace, TUI, easyJet, Ryanair and West Atlantic.

- **Flyaway Aircraft Jack Kit** - portable jacking kit for wheel-change operations on Boeing 737-100 to -800 series and Airbus aircraft.

- **Cowl Removal Trolley** - support equipment for engine cowl removal.
- **Shoring and stress jacks** - built to Structural Repair Manual dimensions for specific aircraft types.

# RHH Franks Ltd

> Hampshire-based precision engineering manufacturer producing CNC-machined components and assemblies for aerospace and defence, with capabilities spanning fabrication, welding, brazing and non-destructive testing.

## What they do

RHH Franks is an end-to-end provider of precision engineered components and assemblies, serving aerospace and defence customers from its New Milton facility. Capabilities include 4- and 5-axis CNC machining, sheet metal fabrication, small bore tube extrusion, TIG welding, torch and dip brazing, silver soldering, heat treatment of aluminium alloys, non-destructive testing and pressure testing.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC Machined Components** - 4- and 5-axis CNC machined parts and subassemblies to aerospace tolerances.
- **Sheet Metal Fabrication** - Sheet metal parts including forming, blanking, press and stretch operations.
- **Welded and Brazed Assemblies** - TIG welding, torch and dip brazing, and silver soldering for structural and fluid-carrying assemblies.

Ricardo plc is an engineering, environmental and strategic consulting company and specialist niche manufacturer. It works across defence, automotive, aerospace, rail and energy sectors, developing propulsion systems for future aircraft and providing sustainability and performance engineering to government and defence customers. Ricardo states it has supported the UK Ministry of Defence and the wider defence industry for over 100 years, and is a long-standing key supplier to the Defence Equipment and Support Marine Engine Group, providing specialist technical services in power plant selection and operation.

# RINA TECH UK LTD

> UK arm of the Italian RINA group, providing testing, inspection, certification and consulting services across space and defence, electromagnetic compatibility, cyber security, safety and training.

## What they do

RINA TECH UK delivers specialist technical services across the defence supply chain, working directly for governments, space agencies, prime contractors, equipment manufacturers and SMEs. Core service areas include system and integration engineering, electromagnetic compatibility, ICT and software engineering, safety and cyber security, training and learning solutions, and decision support through analytical modelling. The wider RINA group's Space and Defence business covers the full system lifecycle, including specification, design, integration, modelling and simulation, prototyping, testing and validation, for combat systems, radar, surveillance systems, satellite communications, earth observation and navigation.

## Products and solutions

- **System and Integration Engineering** - full system lifecycle support from specification through integration, prototyping, testing and validation for combat systems, radar and surveillance systems.
- **EMC Testing and Integration Engineering** - electromagnetic compatibility and systems integration for defence platforms.
- **Safety, Security and Cyber Security** - safety case support and cyber security services across defence programmes.
- **Training and Learning Solutions** - training and learning support for defence customers.
- **Decision Support Solutions** - analytical modelling and simulation-based decision support for government and defence customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Riskaware Ltd
companies.summary: Bristol-based decision support software company turning scientific insight into actionable intelligence for defence, security and environmental risk challenges.
companies.body:
# Riskaware Ltd

> Bristol-based decision support software company turning scientific insight into actionable intelligence for defence, security and environmental risk challenges.

## What they do

Riskaware develops methods and tools that convert scientific understanding into practical decision support capability for government, defence and industry, work it describes as turning "scientific insight into decision advantage". Its product lines span CBRN and hazardous-material situational awareness, cyber-attack modelling, counter-drone detection, biosurveillance, and marine environmental monitoring. In August 2025 Riskaware was acquired by Evallic, a European defence technology group, joining an integrated CBRNe platform alongside Bruhn Newtech and Argon Electronics.

## Products and solutions

- **UrbanAware** - CBRN and hazardous-material situational awareness and decision support platform for emergency response and training.
- **CyberAware Predict** - processes intrusion-detection and threat-intelligence feeds to model and predict adversary behaviour in real time.
- **CyberAware Resilience** - models the impact of cyber-attacks on missions and network assets using CVSS-based analytics.
- **SpaceAware** - risk modelling and decision support for degraded space assets.
- **BioAware** - biosurveillance data fusion and forecasting for disease outbreak detection.
- **MarineAware** - cloud-based oil spill response platform combining satellite oil detection, AIS vessel tracking and dispersion modelling.
- **EDITTS** - counter-small-drone prototype using machine learning (neural networks and particle filters) for detection and classification, developed under a DASA "Countering Small Drones" call.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; European Space Agency Business Applications network.
- **Marketplace:** listed supplier on the UK Digital Marketplace (G-Cloud).

## Recent news

- **2025-08** - Riskaware acquired by Evallic, joining an integrated CBRNe detection, simulation and training platform alongside Bruhn Newtech and Argon Electronics. [source](https://evallic.com/news/riskaware-joins-evallic-in-building-the-future-of-defense-technology/)
- **2025-09-30** - Exhibited at International Security Expo 2025, presenting UrbanAware. [source](https://www.internationalsecurityexpo.com/exhibitors/riskaware)
- **2026-07-01** - Evallic, Riskaware's parent group, announced the acquisition of Argon Electronics, extending the group's CBRNe platform. [source](https://bebeez.eu/2026/07/01/evallic-welcomes-argon-electronics-a-global-leader-in-cbrne-detection-simulation-and-training/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.riskaware.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (riskaware.co.uk), Companies House (03812608), ADS Group member directory, ESA Business Applications directory, Evallic press releases, International Security Expo exhibitor listing, bebeez.eu.

# RiverSafe Ltd

> London-based cyber security consultancy specialising in security operations, threat intelligence and DevSecOps.

## What they do

Founded in 2008, RiverSafe is a professional services provider specialising in cyber security, data operations and DevOps, describing its purpose as putting security "at the heart of everything" it does for clients whose legacy systems and skills shortages hold back innovation. The firm works across SIEM and SOC engineering, threat intelligence, vulnerability management, and identity and access governance, alongside API security and DevSecOps delivery.

## Products and solutions

- **SIEM and SOC engineering** - architecting, tuning and operationalising SIEM/SOAR/UEBA platforms including Splunk, CrowdStrike, Microsoft Sentinel, Google SecOps and Exabeam.
- **Threat intelligence** - external attack surface monitoring and supply-chain risk intelligence.
- **Vulnerability management** - tool implementation, configuration, integration and training.

# RM3 Ltd
