## What they do

RM3 Ltd designs bespoke training packages including fabricated Method of Entry training apparatus and remote immersive app-based Learning Management Systems for military, policing, security services, and commercial clients. The company is led by ex-military and police professionals with decades of operational and instructional experience. RM3 Ltd is registered in England and Wales (company number 14671887), with a registered office in Hereford.

## Products and solutions

- **Method of Entry training apparatus** - bespoke fabricated equipment for Method of Entry training.
- **Learning Management System** - remote, immersive app-based learning platform.
- **Instructor-based training modules** - practical, instructor-led training delivery.
- **Train-the-Trainer (T3) programmes** - programmes to develop in-house instructor capability for customer organisations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Sources: ADS Group member directory (adsgroup.org.uk), Companies House (company number 14671887). No confirmed independent company website or LinkedIn page was identified in this pass.

companies.name: Robert Stuart Ltd
companies.summary: Metal finishing and surface treatment manufacturer serving the aerospace and defence supply chain from a single site in Harlow, Essex.
companies.body:
# Robert Stuart Ltd

> Metal finishing and surface treatment manufacturer serving the aerospace and defence supply chain from a single site in Harlow, Essex.

## What they do

Founded in 1945 and still in the same family ownership, Robert Stuart has specialised in aerospace work since its inception, with early customers including De Havilland, Hawker Siddeley, Handley Page, Rolls-Royce, British Aircraft Corporation and Westland Helicopters. The company states it offers the largest range of metal finishing services on a single site in the UK, and has carried its aerospace-derived skills into the satellite, motorsport and medical industries. It holds approvals to work for prime aerospace and defence manufacturers.

## Products and solutions

- **Anodising** - chromic, sulphuric, hard, colour-dyed and titanium anodising.
- **Chemical conversion coatings** - including Alocrom, Alodine 1200S and Iridite processes, plus chromating of magnesium.
- **Plating** - hard chromium, nickel and zinc-nickel plating.
- **Passivation and phosphate conversion coating** - manganese and zinc phosphate processes.
- **Painting and paint systems** - epoxy, polyurethane and water-based primers and top coats, bond primers and bespoke finishes.
- **Dry film lubricants** - cetyl alcohol treatments.
- **NDT and inspection** - conductivity, hardness and magnetic flaw testing, penetrant flaw detection, salt spray and humidity testing, and X-ray fluorescence.
- **Specialist masking** - selective masking processes for treatment of specific component areas.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** NADCAP; AS9100 Rev D; ISO 9001; ISO 14001.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Surface Engineering Association.

## Links

- Website: https://www.robert-stuart.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (robert-stuart.co.uk), Companies House (00398525), ADS Group member directory, Surface Engineering Association member directory. No recent (last 12 months) public news items were identified for this company.

companies.name: Robosys Automation
companies.summary: UK developer of AI-powered maritime autonomy and smart-shipping software for crewed, lean-crewed and uncrewed vessels.
companies.body:
# Robosys Automation

> UK developer of AI-powered maritime autonomy and smart-shipping software for crewed, lean-crewed and uncrewed vessels.

## What they do

Robosys develops AI-powered maritime autonomy and smart-shipping software for crewed, lean-crewed and autonomous vessels. Its flagship VOYAGER AI software can transform a new or existing vessel into a fully autonomous uncrewed surface vessel capable of independent navigation, autonomous collision avoidance, obstacle and anti-grounding detection, and dynamic route optimisation. The company is UK-headquartered in Hamble, Southampton, with regional offices in the USA, Canada and India.

## Products and solutions

- **VOYAGER AI** - flagship maritime autonomy software suite delivering remote pilotage and advanced autonomous navigation, converting new or existing vessels into autonomous uncrewed surface vessels with collision avoidance, obstacle and anti-grounding detection and route optimisation.
- **VOYAGER AI Autonomous Navigation System (ANS)** - the autonomous navigation product within the VOYAGER AI line.
- **VOYAGER AI Simulator** - maritime simulation environment for the VOYAGER AI ANS, launched at Oceanology International 2026.
- **Subsea AI-supported navigation and vessel control** - a newer subsea product line announced following a contract for a fleet of advanced swimmer delivery vehicles.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** The Society of Maritime Industries (SMI).

## Recent news

- **2026-03-16** - Robosys launched the new VOYAGER AI Simulator at Oceanology International 2026. [source](https://smartmaritimenetwork.com/2026/03/16/robosys-launches-simulator-for-autonomous-navigation-system/)
- **2025-10-07** - Robosys secured a contract to retrofit a 26m Damen 2610 Fast Crew Supplier with VOYAGER AI, its first application in the offshore renewables sector. [source](https://www.oedigital.com/news/530832-robosys-automation-secures-offshore-wind-vessel-retrofit-contract)

## Links

- Website: https://robosysautomation.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/robosysautomation

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (robosysautomation.com), Companies House (registration 12369867, incorporated 2019), the Society of Maritime Industries directory, Smart Maritime Network and OEDigital. Founding heritage is variously claimed at 2002 and 2012 in marketing copy against a 2019 legal incorporation, so a single founding year is omitted; headcount (~17) is from a third-party profile. No acquisition or change of control was found.

companies.name: Rochester Electronics Ltd
companies.summary: Authorised semiconductor distributor and licensed manufacturer specialising in end-of-life and active devices for defence and aerospace applications.
companies.body:
# Rochester Electronics Ltd

> Authorised semiconductor distributor and licensed manufacturer specialising in end-of-life and active devices for defence and aerospace applications.

## What they do

Rochester Electronics describes itself as the world's largest continuous source of semiconductors, authorised by more than 70 leading manufacturers to distribute and manufacture devices no longer produced by the original maker. Founded in 1981 in Massachusetts, USA, with its UK operation registered as an overseas company establishment, the company states its mission is to provide the semiconductor industry with an authorised, guaranteed supply source for long-lifecycle applications, holding more than 15 billion devices across 200,000-plus part numbers.

## Products and solutions

- **Authorised distribution** - 100% authorised, traceable distribution of active and end-of-life semiconductors.
- **Licensed manufacturing** - full manufacturing, including design, wafer processing, assembly, test and reliability, for turnkey re-manufacture of obsolete devices; over 20,000 device types produced, with capacity for more than 70,000.
- **Die bank** - wafer back-grinding, precision dicing, automated optical inspection and packaging, holding more than 12 billion die in stock.
- **Wafer bank** - wafer preservation in ISO-certified clean environments.
- **Obsolescence management** - replication of die, chip and package designs for devices no longer available.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; AS9120; QML (MIL-PRF-38535); QSLD (Qualified Suppliers List of Distributors).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group (UK); ADS Toulouse (France, joined 2025).

## Recent news

- **2025-07** - Became a new member of ADS Toulouse, aimed at deepening aerospace and defence cooperation across France and Europe. [source](https://toulouse.adsgroup.org.uk/member-spotlight/new-member-spotlight-rochester-electronics/)
- **2025-09** - Exhibited at DSEI 2025, ExCeL London. [source](https://www.rocelec.com/news/rochester-electronics-dsei-2025)
- **2025-10-27** - Announced delivery of in-stock Nexperia products to support global supply continuity, citing 2.9 billion active and end-of-life Nexperia devices in stock. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20251027747553/en/Rochester-Electronics-Delivers-In-Stock-Nexperia-Products-to-Support-Global-Supply-Continuity)

## Links

- Website: https://www.rocelec.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (rocelec.com), Companies House (FC018523, UK establishment of Rochester Electronics, LLC), ADS Group and ADS Toulouse member directories, BusinessWire press release, DSEI 2025 exhibitor listing. UK entity is an overseas company establishment of the US parent, hence `owned-foreign`.

companies.name: Rockwell Collins UK Limited (Collins Aerospace)
companies.summary: UK operations of Collins Aerospace, an RTX business supplying avionics, actuation and mission systems for the global aerospace and defence industry.
companies.body:
# Collins Aerospace UK

> UK operations of Collins Aerospace, an RTX business supplying avionics, actuation and mission systems for the global aerospace and defence industry.

## What they do

Collins Aerospace, an RTX business (RTX was formerly Raytheon Technologies), designs and delivers integrated solutions for the global aerospace and defence industry. Its portfolio spans avionics, mission systems, actuation, aerostructures and connected aviation. The UK operations include manufacturing and engineering centres of excellence in the West Midlands and the South West. The UK trading entity is Rockwell Collins UK Limited; the parent RTX Corporation is headquartered in Arlington, Virginia.

## Products and solutions

- **Avionics and flight deck** - navigation, communications, datalink and attitude and heading reference systems.
- **Actuation systems** - Wolverhampton is the global headquarters for actuation manufacturing, including electric thrust reverser actuation systems (elecTRAS).
- **Electronic controls and motor systems** - Solihull centre of excellence.
- **Control, navigation and guidance** - Plymouth, for surface and air applications across defence and aerospace.
- **Aerostructures and nacelle systems** - nacelles, thrust reversers and composite aircraft doors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; listed on the GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant business register.

## Recent news

- **2025-06-09** - Collins Aerospace expanded its aircraft electrification capabilities in Europe, opening a new engineering centre of excellence in Wolverhampton and an elecTRAS production line in Colomiers, France. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/06/09/rtxs-collins-aerospace-expands-aircraft-electrification-capabilities-in-europe)

## Links

- Website: https://www.collinsaerospace.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/collins-aerospace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-04. Sources used: Companies House (00543016), the ADS members directory, the Collins Aerospace and RTX websites, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register, and Invest West Midlands. The company is a foreign-owned firm with UK operations; the headcount figure is for Collins Aerospace globally. Confirmed UK sites include Wolverhampton (over 1,300 staff), Solihull, Plymouth, Winnersh and Prestwick.

companies.name: Rockwood Composites Ltd
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of precision composite components for aerospace and defence.
companies.body:
# Rockwood Composites Ltd

> UK manufacturer of precision composite components for aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Rockwood Composites is a privately owned UK manufacturer, established in 2010 on a foundation of 20 years of prior composite manufacturing experience, serving industrial, medical, defence, aerospace and leisure markets with precision structures. The company specialises in out-of-autoclave manufacturing, using bladder, compression and high-CTE moulding processes, and describes itself as delivering components to leading aerospace and defence customers. It is part of the Rockwood Group, alongside sister businesses Rockwood Aerospace, Rockwood Defence, Rockwood Cryogenics and a Morocco-based subsidiary.

## Products and solutions

- **Compression moulding** - pre-preg composite material moulding.
- **Bladder moulding** - for intricate and hollow complex parts.
- **High-CTE moulding** - out-of-autoclave manufacturing process.
- **Design for manufacture** - composite lay-up definition, tool design and FEA simulation support.
- **Finishing and assembly** - component machining, inspection, system assembly and testing.
- **Named applications** - Eurofighter Typhoon towed-decoy blades and wing connector plates delivered with Leonardo; tactical propulsion system parts with Roxel; aircraft interior components for commercial carriers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100; ISO 9001:2015.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Links

- Website: https://www.rockwoodcomposites.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (rockwoodcomposites.com), Companies House (07325480), ADS Group member directory, The Rockwood Group corporate site. No recent (last 12 months) public news items were identified for this company; a JOSCAR listing was found in a third-party buyer's guide with an expiry date suggesting it may have lapsed, so it has not been included as a current framework.

companies.name: Rohde & Schwarz
companies.summary: Independent technology group supplying RF test and measurement, military radiocommunications, electronic warfare, and cybersecurity products to defence and government customers worldwide.
companies.body:
# Rohde & Schwarz

> Independent technology group supplying RF test and measurement, military radiocommunications, electronic warfare, and cybersecurity products to defence and government customers worldwide.

## What they do

Rohde & Schwarz is an independent, privately owned technology group, founded in Munich in 1933, that develops, produces and markets communications, information and security products for industry and government. Its Aerospace, Defense and Security division designs security, surveillance and intelligence solutions for national security and defence customers, alongside separate test and measurement, broadcast and networks and cybersecurity divisions. The company describes itself as one of Europe's largest providers of network and cybersecurity equipment, applying a "security by design" approach to mission-critical and classified-level communications. Its UK entity, Rohde & Schwarz U.K. Limited, has operated in the UK for over 45 years.

## Products and solutions

- **SOVERON radio family** - secure tactical VHF/UHF and strategic HF software-defined radios for armed forces, based on the Software Communications Architecture.
- **R&S M3AR** - multiband, multimode, multirole airborne radio fitted to jets, helicopters and uncrewed aircraft, with over 10,000 units sold.
- **SATURN waveform support** - support for the NATO-designated secure, interoperable SATURN waveform, deployed across thousands of radios.
- **NAVICS** - integrated navigation and communication system, in service on Royal Navy Type 26 frigates.
- **NEMACS** - directional, ultra-secure multi-link system connecting air, land, sea and space assets using directional SATCOM links designed to reduce RF signature and resist jamming and interception, unveiled in 2026.
- **Radiomonitoring and direction-finding** - transportable monitoring stations, direction-finding antennas and systems for civil and military spectrum monitoring.
- **Network encryption and zero-trust security** - high-speed network encryption and endpoint security products, with some product lines certified by Germany's BSI for classified official-use information.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; signatory of the UK Armed Forces Covenant.
- **Recognition:** Silver Award, UK Defence Employer Recognition Scheme (September 2025).

## Recent news

- **2026-06-11** - Unveiled NEMACS, described as directional, ultra-secure connectivity for the future battlefield, at Eurosatory 2026 and ILA Berlin. [source](https://www.rohde-schwarz.com/de/unternehmen/news-und-presse/all-news/rohde-schwarz-unveils-nemacs-directional-ultra-secure-connectivity-for-the-future-battlefield_229356-1627781.html)
- **2025-09-03** - Rohde & Schwarz UK awarded the Silver Award under the Defence Employer Recognition Scheme. [source](https://www.rohde-schwarz.com/us/about/news-press/all-news/rohde-schwarz-uk-awarded-silver-award-under-defence-employer-recognition-scheme-press-release-detailpage_229356-1583170.html)
- **2025-02-27** - Announced a partnership with ELT Group to deliver electronic warfare systems for European navies. [source](https://www.asdnews.com/news/defense/2025/02/27/rohde-schwarz-elt-group-join-forces-deliver-cuttingedge-ew-systems-european-navies)

## Links

- Website: https://www.rohde-schwarz.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (rohde-schwarz.com), Companies House (00539607, Rohde & Schwarz U.K. Limited), ADS Group member directory, company press releases, Armada International, ASDNews, Army Recognition.

companies.name: Roke
companies.summary: British defence and national-security technology and engineering company specialising in sensors, communications, electromagnetic warfare, cyber, AI and autonomy, part of Chemring Group.
companies.body:
# Roke

> British defence and national-security technology and engineering company specialising in sensors, communications, electromagnetic warfare, cyber, AI and autonomy, part of Chemring Group.

## What they do

Roke integrates physical and digital systems to solve complex challenges across communications, sensors, cyber security, artificial intelligence and autonomy. It operates in the defence, national security and geospatial intelligence sectors for public and private clients, delivering advanced research and development, services and technologies. It is also a recognised crypto test house for UK Government.

## Products and solutions

- **CORTEXA GUARDIAN** - modular, mast-mounted system combining RADAR and PTZ sensor inputs for autonomous detect, track and identify, enhancing counter-UAS.
- **EM-Vis Deceive** - electromagnetic attack system.
- **EM-Vis Resolve** - electromagnetic warfare system for interception and location of radio communications signals.
- **Pattern of Life** - cyber-range solution providing realistic user emulation to test security teams and optimise cyber ranges.
- **Tactical wideband EW sensor** - adaptive beamforming and direction finding for electromagnetic awareness in contested environments.
- **Dismounted EW sensor** - field-proven find, fix and intercept against peer threats.
- **Acoustic sensor system** - detection and geolocation of artillery fire.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Recognised UK Government crypto test house.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group member; Counter-EO UK member.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-30** - Launched the "Works with Roke" defence partner scheme, an integration framework giving an interoperability badge to tested partner products. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/04/30/roke-integration-defense-partners/)
- **2025-04** - Won a UK MoD missile-defence research contract worth up to £251m, becoming delivery lead for Project STORM at the MoD Missile Defence Centre. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/04/18/roke-uk-missile-defense/)
- **2025-01-14** - Announced a strategic supply agreement with a major US prime contractor. [source](https://www.chemring.com/media/press-releases/2025/14-01-2025)

## Links

- Website: https://www.roke.co.uk/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/roke-manor-research

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (roke.co.uk), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (00267550), ADS member directory, Chemring Group press releases, and reputable defence press (The Defense Post, Army Technology, Janes). Legal entity is Roke Manor Research Limited; founded 1956 as Plessey Research Roke Manor. Current owner is Chemring Group PLC (since 2010). Public headcount figures vary between approximately 350 (engineers and scientists) and approximately 1,000 (total, per filings); both place it in the large band.

companies.name: Roke Manor Research Limited
companies.summary: UK science and engineering innovator combining physical and digital systems for defence, national security, and Fortune 500 clients.
companies.body:
# Roke Manor Research Limited

> UK science and engineering innovator combining physical and digital systems for defence, national security, and Fortune 500 clients.

## What they do

Roke has over 60 years of heritage in defence and applies that depth across computer vision, AI, autonomous systems, command and control, ISR, maritime, space consultancy, and software and digital services. The company states it has more than 600 engineers combining deep knowledge of sensors, communications, cyber and AI, and describes its ISR work as building solutions "from sensor to decision" across a Sense-Decide-Effect continuum. It operates in defence, national security and geospatial intelligence for public and private clients, and is part of Chemring Group. Note: this entry and the separate "Roke" page describe the same legal entity, Roke Manor Research Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **CORTEXA GUARDIAN** - modular, mast-mounted counter-drone system combining radar and PTZ sensors, underpinned by Roke's RapidEO automated threat detection software for a fused air picture.
- **Dragonfly** - passive, vision-based system enabling uncrewed aircraft to land on moving platforms such as ships at sea without dependency on GPS or RF beacons, designed for contested environments.
- **Autonomous shipping navigation** - autonomous navigation and planning technology for uncrewed vessels, with trials demonstrating extended continuous operation while maintaining COLREGS compliance.
- **AI inspection** - AI-powered inspection systems for aircraft and other platforms.
- **Project ZODIAC** - British Army contract to mature Land ISTAR capability.
- **Project STORM** - research and development lead role at the UK Missile Defence Centre's Science and Technology Oriented Research and development in Missile programme, covering counter-proliferation, deterrence and missile defence including hypersonic threats.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-04-02** - Awarded a contract worth up to £251m to lead research and development for the UK Missile Defence Centre's STORM programme. [source](https://www.roke.co.uk/news/missiledefencecontract2025/)
- **2023-10** - Awarded a £40m British Army contract to mature Land ISTAR capability under Project ZODIAC. [source](https://securitybrief.co.uk/story/roke-secures-40m-contract-for-the-british-army-s-istar-programme)
- **2023-01** - Acquired geospatial intelligence company Geollect, extending its space and geospatial intelligence capability.

## Links

- Website: https://www.roke.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (roke.co.uk), Companies House (00267550), ADS Group member directory, Chemring Group press releases, SecurityBrief, Army Technology, EUSPA industry directory.

companies.name: Roland Berger Ltd
companies.summary: Global strategy consultancy with a significant aerospace and defence practice serving major defence clients worldwide.
companies.body:
# Roland Berger Ltd

> Global strategy consultancy with a significant aerospace and defence practice serving major defence clients worldwide.

## What they do

Roland Berger is a global strategy consultancy founded in Munich in 1967, operating across more than 30 countries with around 2,400 staff. Its Aerospace & Defense practice serves civil aerospace, space, defence and security industries, advising OEMs, suppliers, institutions, agencies, governments and investors along the full value chain from design and production through to in-service support. The firm positions itself as a top-three player in aerospace and defence strategy consulting, citing experience from more than 250 transactions in the sector over the past decade.

## Products and solutions

- **Strategy and growth advisory** - identifying sources of growth and efficiency for OEMs and suppliers.
- **Transformation programme design** - major change and digital transformation programmes for aerospace and defence organisations.
- **Mergers and acquisitions advisory** - transaction support and market analysis of defence-sector dealmaking.
- **Space sector strategy** - advisory to public and private organisations on space-sector opportunities and transformation strategy.
- **Thought leadership** - published research on European defence industrial strategy, deterrence, innovation ecosystems and defence spending trends.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Published "The Defence Imperative", a study on Europe's path to a deterrence threshold by 2030, identifying four industrial pathways. [source](https://content.rolandberger.com/hubfs/07_presse/Roland%20Berger_Defence%20Study_2025_EN.pdf)
- **2026-02-23** - Published "Strength Through Innovation: A vision for a new innovation ecosystem for European defence", based on interviews across military, industry and research institutions. [source](https://www.defenceonline.co.uk/2026/02/23/new-vision-for-a-new-european-defence-ecosystem/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.rolandberger.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (rolandberger.com), Companies House (02454242), ADS Group member directory, Roland Berger publications, DefenceOnline. As a strategy consultancy, Roland Berger does not publicly claim to operate or supply any of Tally's technical capability categories (cyber, ISR, comms, and so on), so none have been applied.

companies.name: Rowden Technologies Ltd
companies.summary: Engineering company building sensing and information systems for constrained, degraded, and edge environments.
companies.body:
# Rowden

> Engineering company building sensing and information systems for constrained, degraded, and edge environments.

## What they do

Rowden Technologies designs and builds sensing, networking and edge-compute information systems for constrained, degraded and contested environments, where communications are unreliable and decisions are time-critical. Its stated customers include the UK Ministry of Defence and emergency services. Its products include edge device management solutions and the Dismounted Data System (DDS), fielded with the British Army as part of the ASGARD programme, alongside the Mimic RF decoy system for land forces. It also delivers mission systems programmes for the UK Government, combining commercial technology with manufacturing and engineering depth, and describes a design philosophy of "walk-up operation" so systems can be used by non-specialists across a wider force.

## Products and solutions

- **Dismounted Data System (DDS)** - sensing and data-sharing system fielded with the British Army under the ASGARD programme.
- **Mimic** - compact, tactical RF decoy system for land forces, designed for large-scale deployment with a browser-based interface intended to bring most soldiers to proficiency in under two hours.
- **Edge device management** - deployment and management of machine learning models and mixed fleets of networked devices in degraded and disconnected environments.
- **Mission systems** - bespoke capability delivery for UK Government programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Won the Product Launch Award (Electronic Warfare category) at the Army Technology Excellence Awards 2025 for Mimic. [source](https://www.army-technology.com/featured-company/2025-rowden/)
- **2026-03-27** - Hosted the British Army at its Bristol site to explore frontline operational technology delivery, including machine-learning-on-edge deployment and a hands-on Mimic session. [source](https://www.defenceonline.co.uk/2026/03/27/british-engineering-firm-rowden-hosts-the-british-army-to-explore-frontline-techcraft/)
- **2026-05-13** - Received a £25 million investment from the National Wealth Fund, its first investment directly supporting defence, national security and resilience, stated to support around 500 further jobs. [source](https://www.uktech.news/defence-tech/defence-tech-firm-rowden-secures-25m-from-the-national-wealth-fund-20260513)

## Links

- Website: https://www.rowdentech.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-05. Company website (rowdentech.com), Companies House (09981110), ADS Group member directory, Army Technology, DefenceOnline, UKTN, National Wealth Fund press release. Companies House records incorporation as 1 February 2016; some secondary sources cite 2017.

companies.name: Roxel Ltd
companies.summary: Franco-British missile propulsion specialist designing and manufacturing rocket and missile motors for European missile programmes.
companies.body:
# Roxel Ltd

> Franco-British missile propulsion specialist designing and manufacturing rocket and missile motors for European missile programmes.

## What they do

Roxel designs and manufactures propulsion systems for most existing European missiles. Key technologies include Thrust Vector Control, Insensitive Munitions, Dual Pulse systems, and smokeless propellants. Advanced manufacturing capabilities include additive manufacturing and Resonant Acoustic Mixing, with next-generation propellant development supported by the UK MoD and French DGA.

## Products and solutions

- **Missile and rocket motors** - propulsion systems for the European missile inventory.
- **Thrust Vector Control** - precision flight control through propulsion.
- **Insensitive Munitions** - reduced-sensitivity propellant formulations meeting modern safety standards.
- **Dual Pulse systems** - two-stage propulsion for extended-range applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.roxelgroup.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-30. ADS Group members directory (snapshot, May 2026).

companies.name: Royal Air Force
companies.summary: The United Kingdom's air and space force, responsible for air defence, strike, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance.
companies.body:
# Royal Air Force

> The United Kingdom's air and space force, responsible for air defence, strike, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance.

## What they do

The Royal Air Force is one of the three Armed Services of the United Kingdom, operating under the Ministry of Defence. It delivers air superiority, strike, close air support, air transport, intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance, and space capabilities. It is an active procurer of defence technology across platforms, sensors, software, and services.

## Products and solutions

- **Autonomous Collaborative Platforms (ACP)** - a published RAF strategy for introducing uncrewed and autonomous aircraft alongside crewed platforms, with remote mission operators commanding and supervising multiple autonomous vehicles within each ACP system.
- **StormShroud** - an uncrewed aircraft brought into RAF service as the first platform in the emerging Autonomous Collaborative Platforms family, intended for electronic warfare and support roles.
- **Protector RG Mk1 (MQ-9B)** - remotely piloted air system providing persistent intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance and strike capability.
- **RAF Regiment Counter-UAS** - ground-based force protection element responsible for detecting and defeating hostile uncrewed aerial systems around RAF stations and deployed locations.
- **Rapid Capabilities Office (RCO)** - RAF unit working with industry partners, Defence Equipment & Support and the Defence Science and Technology Laboratory to accelerate autonomous and uncrewed platform development into service.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-05** - RAF Regiment publicised its Counter-UAS role defending station airspace and turning intercepted drone data into intelligence. [source](https://www.raf.mod.uk/news/articles/raf-regiment-counter-uas-defending-the-airspace-and-turning-threat-into-intelligence/)
- **2025** - RAF StormShroud entered service as the first Autonomous Collaborative Platform, an uncrewed aircraft for electronic warfare support. [source](https://www.airforce-technology.com/news/raf-stormshroud-autonomous-aircraft/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.raf.mod.uk

## Sources

# RSL Project Solutions Ltd

> Independent defence project management and technical consultancy based at Old Sarum, Salisbury.

## What they do

RSL Project Solutions Ltd is a privately owned, independent defence project management and technical consultancy based at The Portway Centre, Old Sarum, Salisbury. It provides consulting, engineering, project and programme management services to UK defence primes, engineering SMEs and government agencies, operating through in-house staff and a network of associates.

## Products and solutions

- **Consultancy** - support for project management and engineering challenges, including active end-to-end management of client projects.
- **Interim Professionals** - interim technical and project management capability drawn from in-house staff and a network of qualified associates.
- **Independent project review** - independent health checks of third-party projects.
- **Bespoke PM systems** - development of project management systems tailored to client needs.
- **Training** - project management training courses and staff assessment and development.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (Stage 2 registration)
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# RT Consulting
> UK SME providing digital transformation, security assurance and AI services to MOD and other public sector clients across multiple defence procurement frameworks.

## What they do
RT Consulting (legal name Real-Time Consultants Ltd) delivers across three service areas: digital transformation covering full project and live service lifecycle management; integrated security assurance spanning cyber, information assurance, physical identity access management and crypto security; and AI services including process optimisation, digital twin and shadow AI mitigation. The firm is a long-standing supply chain member of the Programme Delivery Partner (PDP-S), providing PPM, project controls and operational support to MOD.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# RTA Ireland Ltd

> Aerospace supply chain harmonisation partner specialising in hardware sourcing, kitting, distribution and sub-contracted precision machining.

## What they do

Founded in 1989 and trading as RTA International, RTA provides supply chain consolidation and part-number harmonisation services to the aerospace and defence sectors, including hardware and COTS sourcing, stocking, kitting and distribution. The company describes its role as acting as an extension of customers' procurement and logistics teams, with offices in North America, the UK and the Philippines.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision machining** - 3 and 5-axis CNC, laser cutting, lathe and milling to aerospace tolerances, alongside sheet metal forming across materials including aluminium alloys, neoprene, Nomex and nylon.
- **COTS sourcing** - sourcing and delivery of approved catalogue hardware and standard components.
- **Kitting services** - kitting to reduce stores handling and support production efficiency.
- **Warehousing** - secure storage and inventory control supporting kitting readiness and dispatch.
- **Assembly services** - consolidation of bills of materials across multiple part streams.
- **Distribution and inventory optimisation** - line-side support models and data-driven inventory planning.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN/JISQ 9100 (AS9100D), AS/EN/JISQ 9120 (AS9120B), ISO 9001, SC21 Operational Excellence, SC21 Gold, Authorised Economic Operator (AEO-F)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

companies.name: RTX
companies.summary: One of the world's largest aerospace and defence companies, and parent of Collins Aerospace, Pratt & Whitney and Raytheon.
companies.body:
# RTX

> One of the world's largest aerospace and defence companies, and parent of Collins Aerospace, Pratt & Whitney and Raytheon.

## What they do

RTX employs over 185,000 people globally and reported revenues exceeding $80 billion in 2024. Through its three principal subsidiaries it covers commercial and military aviation systems, propulsion, integrated defence systems, and advanced technology solutions. The company has a UK presence including government relations activity in London.

## Products and solutions

- **Collins Aerospace** - Aerospace systems, avionics, aerostructures and mission systems, including the ARC-210 airborne radio and TruNet family of tactical networked communications products, and PNT products such as MAPS Gen II and NavHub-100.
- **Pratt & Whitney** - Aircraft propulsion for commercial and military platforms.
- **Raytheon** - Defence electronics, missiles and integrated air and missile defence systems, including the AN/TPY-2 and Global Patriot radars, the AN/AQS-20C mine-hunting sonar, and multi-spectral EO/IR targeting systems such as MTS.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12-23** - Raytheon awarded a $1.7 billion contract to deliver four Patriot fire units to Spain. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/12/23/rtxs-raytheon-awarded-1-7-billion-contract-to-deliver-four-patriot-fire-units-t)
- **2025-11-04** - Raytheon UK awarded a UK Space Agency contract to deliver an orbital analyst capability. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/11/04/raytheon-uk-awarded-uk-space-agency-contract-to-deliver-orbital-analyst-capabilit)
- **2026-02-04** - Raytheon partnered with the US Department of War on five agreements to expand munitions production. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2026/02/04/rtxs-raytheon-partners-with-department-of-war-on-five-landmark-agreements-to-exp)

companies.body:
# Rubik Technologies Ltd

> UK and Ireland systems integrator delivering digital transformation for manufacturing and engineering firms through Manufacturing Execution Systems.

## What they do

Rubik Technologies partners with Tulip MES to digitise production environments in aerospace, space and complex regulated manufacturing. Its work covers real-time process data capture, paper-free workflows, traceability for complex assemblies, root-cause analysis tooling and first-time-right quality improvement programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **Tulip MES integration** - manufacturing execution system deployment for real-time process data capture, paper-free shop-floor workflows and traceability across complex, regulated assemblies.
- **Data platform** - a data backbone integrating production, design, supply chain and finance systems, supporting predictive analytics, AI-driven optimisation and dashboards tracking metrics such as OEE, work in progress, lead times and carbon footprint.
- **Root-cause analysis and quality tooling** - software supporting faster root-cause analysis, reduced rework and first-time-right quality, aimed at aerospace and space manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Ruddy Nice Ltd

## What they do

Ruddy Nice provides advisory and delivery services across military training and simulation, defence consultancy, and defence-sector exhibitions and events management. Founded in 2011, the company is based in Salisbury, a hub for UK defence activity, and works across marketing, business development and event delivery for aerospace and defence clients.

companies.body:
# Run Flat Systems Ltd

> Developer and manufacturer of patented runflat insert systems for military and defence vehicles.

## What they do

Incorporated in 2007 as an R&D company, Run Flat Systems has designed and patented a modern runflat insert for single-piece drop-centre wheels, enabling all-tyres-down control and drivability across all terrain types. The system includes patented Active Beadlock technology and is compatible with Central Tyre Inflation (CTI) systems, supporting low-pressure tyre operations for military vehicles.

## Products and solutions

- **Runflat Insert System** - Patented insert enabling continued vehicle mobility on deflated tyres across all terrain.
- **Active Beadlock** - Patented technology preventing tyre bead separation during low-pressure operation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# RWS

> Global language services and content management company with a dedicated government, aerospace and defence division.

## What they do

RWS (formerly SDL Government, Aerospace and Defence) provides professional language services and multilingual content management solutions to over 50 governments globally, including defence, intelligence and law enforcement clients. Its technical documentation capability covers S1000D and military and commercial aerospace standards, including software for creating, editing, managing and publishing mission-critical maintenance information for vehicles, vessels and aircraft. RWS also provides data services, including data science, data migration, and AI training-data annotation and labelling through its TrainAI offering.

## Products and solutions

- **Language Services** - Professional translation and localisation for defence and government clients.
- **Technical Documentation** - S1000D-compliant documentation systems for military and aerospace platforms.
- **Multilingual Content Management** - Platforms for managing mission-critical maintenance and operational information.
- **Data Services** - Data science, analytics and visualisation, and data migration between legacy and modern systems.
- **TrainAI** - Data collection, annotation and labelling of AI training data (text, audio, image, video) via a global network of vetted annotators.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001, CMMC Level 2 (US Department of Defense), SOC 2 Type II
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Achieved CMMC Level 2 certification for its Contenta business, supporting access to sensitive US defense contracts. [source](https://www.rws.com/about/news/2025/rws-achieves-cmmc-level-2-certification/)
- **2025-03-28** - RWS language technology (Evolve) won two 2025 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250328770182/en/RWS-Scoops-Two-2025-Artificial-Intelligence-Excellence-Awards)

## Links

# Ryobi Aluminium Casting UK Ltd

> UK subsidiary of the global Ryobi Group, manufacturing high-pressure die cast aluminium components primarily for automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers.

## What they do

Established in 1990 and based in Carrickfergus, Northern Ireland, Ryobi Aluminium Casting UK produces complex high-pressure die cast aluminium components, principally for the automotive sector, supporting lightweighting and emissions reduction goals. The company runs 24 die casting machines and over 50 CNC machining centres, employs around 550 people, and operates as part of the wider Ryobi Group, founded as a die casting company in Japan in 1943 with facilities across Japan, China, the USA, Mexico, Thailand and Europe.

companies.body:
# Sagentia Defence

> Defence science and technology consultancy, formerly TP Group, part of Science Group plc.

## What they do

Sagentia Defence, formerly TP Group, provides science and technology consultancy on mission-critical defence programmes. It positions itself as an independent, agnostic adviser and a trusted customer friend to the MOD, with defence experience spanning over 60 years. It works with national government bodies, international institutions and global prime contractors on systems engineering, feasibility analysis, enterprise transformation and programme delivery across the science and technology, maritime, air, land, joint, space and defence digital domains, across the full CADMID lifecycle. It is part of Science Group plc, an LSE-listed science and technology group headquartered near Cambridge that consolidated several consultancies under the Sagentia brand in 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Operational analysis** - technology analysis, roadmapping, modelling and simulation, requirements and decision analysis.
- **Cost engineering** - independent cost modelling, estimating and risk analysis.
- **Project, programme and portfolio management (P3M)** - managing complex defence programmes from inception to delivery.
- **Safety assurance and certification** - through-life safety across civil and military domains.
- **Supportability engineering** - integrated logistics support and supply chain management against MOD standards.
- **Systems engineering** - full lifecycle, applying ISO 15288.
- **Analysis and innovation** - pre-concept analysis, rapid concept generation and prototyping.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO/IEC 27001:2022; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials PLUS; JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; INCOSE UK; APM; IET; IMechE; Operational Research Society; SCAF.

## Recent news

- **2025-03-17** - Launched the Sagentia Defence brand, replacing TP Group and integrating more than 300 consultants. [source](https://sagentia.com/news/sagentia-defence-a-new-era-for-the-former-tp-group/)
- **2026** - Published an insight on defence readiness as the defining priority for 2026, tied to the 2025 Strategic Defence Review. [source](https://sagentia.com/insight/defence-in-2026-readiness-is-the-defining-priority/)

## Links

- Website: https://sagentia.com/defence/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sagentiadefence

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: Sagentia Defence website (sagentia.com/defence), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/sagentia-defence-1), Science Group plc (sciencegroup.com), Companies House. Note: Sagentia Defence is a practice brand of Science Group plc (formerly TP Group, acquired January 2023); a single definitive legal entity name and registration number for the defence brand is not cleanly confirmable on the public register, so omitted. The large size band reflects the Science Group total of around 540 employees; standalone defence headcount is not public. The defence practice is Bristol-centred; the group is headquartered at Harston, near Cambridge.

companies.body:
# SAIF Autonomy Ltd

> Software company building a control assurance layer for autonomous systems and physical AI, applied initially to aerospace and land platforms.

## What they do

SAIF Autonomy develops software that enables assured and trustworthy deployment of deterministic autonomy and AI-based control methods in safety-critical applications, with no requirement for data or communications links. The company targets autonomous systems operating in aerospace and land domains, with deployments demonstrated on both drones and ground vehicles.

## Products and solutions

- **NEXUS** - modular, configurable Runtime Assurance software that continuously monitors system behaviour at the edge and prevents unsafe actions before they occur, for deterministic and AI-based control methods without requiring data or communications links.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-02** - SAIF Autonomy secured a £950k pre-seed investment round led by Fusion Fund. [source](https://www.uktechnews.info/2025/02/14/saif-autonomy-secures-95k-pre-seed-investment-led-by-fusion-fund/)

companies.name: Satellite Applications Catapult Limited
companies.summary: UK not-for-profit space technology innovation centre, part of the Catapult Network sponsored by Innovate UK.
companies.body:
# Satellite Applications Catapult

> UK not-for-profit space technology innovation centre, part of the Catapult Network sponsored by Innovate UK.

## What they do

The Satellite Applications Catapult is an independent, not-for-profit innovation and technology company that helps businesses of all sizes realise the potential of space. It works with businesses, researchers, investors, government and end-users to develop satellite-based products, services and applications, taking ideas from concept to market with the aim of growing the UK's share of the global space market. It is a private company limited by guarantee, established in 2013 as one of the first Catapult centres and government-backed via Innovate UK.

## Products and solutions

- **Autonomous and Connected Earth** - work on safe adoption of autonomous systems and integration of satellite with terrestrial networks, including PNT, connectivity and resilient communications.
- **Beyond Earth** - the in-space economy and In-orbit Servicing, Assembly and Manufacturing (ISAM), supported by a robotics test facility at Westcott.
- **Resilient Earth** - Earth observation and geospatial work for environment, emissions and resilient communities.
- **Defence and security programme** - dedicated programme convening the Defence in Space community across MilSatcom, space ISR, space domain awareness, PNT and space security and cyber.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Programmes:** Part of the UK Catapult Network sponsored by Innovate UK (UKRI).

## Recent news

- **2025-10-28** - Hosted a defence community session at Defence in Space 2025 in London, covering space ISR, space domain awareness, MilSatcom and space security and cyber. [source](https://sa.catapult.org.uk/events/defence-in-space-2025/)
- **2025-04-16** - Began a collaboration with The Aerospace Corporation UK on in-orbit servicing, linking robotics facilities at Westcott and El Segundo, California. [source](https://sa.catapult.org.uk/news/satellite-applications-catapult-and-the-aerospace-corporation-uk-collaboration-on-in-orbit-servicing-and-capabilities/)

## Links

- Website: https://sa.catapult.org.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/satellite-applications-catapult/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Organisation website (sa.catapult.org.uk), Companies House (no. 07964746), LinkedIn company page, The Aerospace Corporation newsroom, Electronics Weekly. Specific ISO certifications not publicly stated.

Savox Communications designs and manufactures rugged hearing-protection and communication solutions for defence, law enforcement, fire and rescue, maritime and industrial users. The company combines in-house design, engineering and manufacturing, and supplies radio-accessory products to leading radio and personal-protection-equipment manufacturers. It has over 40 years of experience and operations spanning Finland, Germany, the United Kingdom and the United States.

companies.name: Sayari Labs, Inc.
companies.summary: US supply-chain and commercial-risk intelligence provider serving government, defence and national security customers.
companies.body:
# Sayari

> US supply-chain and commercial-risk intelligence provider serving government, defence and national security customers.

## What they do

Sayari is a counterparty and supply chain risk intelligence provider used by government agencies, multinational corporations and financial institutions. Its network analysis platform surfaces hidden risk through integrated corporate ownership, supply chain, trade transaction and risk intelligence data drawn from primary sources across more than 250 jurisdictions. It serves government, defence, border security, law enforcement and national security customers with use cases including counter-proliferation, sanctions and export-control enforcement, forced-labour detection and supply-chain security.

## Products and solutions

- **Sayari Graph** - corporate and trade network platform for entity mapping, relationship discovery and ownership intelligence, built on primary-source records.
- **Sayari Map** - supply chain mapping and bulk risk screening covering forced labour, sanctions and ESG exposure.
- **Sayari Signal** - risk screening data platform consolidating sanctions, export control and regulatory screening, including owned-uk exposure.
- **Sayari API** - programmatic access to the risk intelligence data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** US Customs and Border Protection enterprise contracts, including a DHS CBP SBIR Phase III award.

## Recent news

- **2024-04-16** - Closed a $235m strategic majority growth investment from TPG, inclusive of capital for organic growth and M&A. [source](https://www.tpg.com/news-and-insights/sayari-closes-235-million-strategic-investment-from-tpg-inclusive-of-additional-capital-for-organic-growth-and-ma)
- **2025** - Secured an expanded contract with US Customs and Border Protection to strengthen national trade security. [source](https://sayari.com/resources/newsroom/pr-sayari-secures-expanded-contract-with-cbp-to-strengthen-national-trade-security/)

## Links

- Website: https://sayari.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sayarilabs

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (sayari.com), LinkedIn company page, TPG newsroom, BusinessWire, PR Newswire, Security & Policing 2026 exhibitor listing, PitchBook. Majority-owned by TPG since 2024. Specific security certifications (SOC 2, ISO 27001, FedRAMP) not publicly confirmed.

# Selectamark Security Systems plc

> Asset identification and forensic marking solutions provider, supplying police forces, government bodies, and defence organisations to deter theft and support recovery and prosecution.

## What they do

Selectamark manufactures and supplies property marking and asset identification products under several brands, including SelectaDNA (forensic DNA marking), SelectaMARK (visible marking), SelectaLABEL (security labels), and BikeRegister (the UK's national cycle database). SelectaDNA is used by police forces to link suspects to crime scenes and secure convictions, including through specialist trained search dogs.

## Products and solutions

- **SelectaDNA** - Forensic DNA marking solution applied to assets; links criminals to crime scenes and enables police prosecutions.
- **SelectaMARK** - Visible property marking to deter theft and aid identification.
- **SelectaLABEL** - Asset and security labelling for property management.
- **BikeRegister** - UK national cycle registration and recovery database.

companies.summary: Defence and government support services provider, listed on the London Stock Exchange.
companies.body:
# Serco Group plc

> Defence and government support services provider, listed on the London Stock Exchange.

## What they do

Serco is a British multinational services company providing support across defence, space, justice, migration, health, customer services and transport. Its defence business operates and maintains military bases, provides marine and fleet support, training and mission-support services for the UK Ministry of Defence and international customers. Serco generated around £1.89 billion of defence revenue in 2024, roughly 35 per cent of group revenue. It is a constituent of the FTSE 250.

## Products and solutions

- **Base and estate support** - operation and maintenance of RAF and Royal Navy sites including Brize Norton, Northolt, Portsmouth, Devonport and Clyde.
- **Marine services** - in-service support for Royal Navy and British Army marine fleets.
- **Training and mission support** - synthetic warfare training and operational support for defence customers in the UK and internationally.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group (UK aerospace, defence, security and space trade association).

## Recent news

- **2026-05-19** - Awarded a five-year, $90M (£65M) US Army contract for mission support of the Planning Programming Budgeting Business Operating System. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/19/3297617/0/en/Serco-Awarded-90-Million-Army-Contract-Strengthening-Leadership-in-Mission-Support-and-Operations.html)
- **2026** - Won a seven-year contract to provide in-service support for the British Army's fleet of 512 marine vessels, starting April 2026. [source](https://www.serco.com/uk/media-and-news/2026/serco-wins-contract-to-support-british-armys-marine-assets-fleet)

## Links

- Website: https://www.serco.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/serco

Shock-WBV designs, tests and manufactures seat suspension systems in the United Kingdom to protect operators and passengers from wave shock and whole-body vibration in military and commercial high-speed vessels. companies.body:
# SIG SAUER, Inc.

> Manufacturer of firearms, weapon systems, ammunition and electro-optics for military and law enforcement.

## What they do

SIG SAUER, Inc. is a US-based manufacturer of firearms, electro-optics, ammunition, suppressors, airguns, remote weapon stations and training. Headquartered in Newington, New Hampshire, with over 3,200 employees across twelve locations in three states, it blends American, German and Swiss engineering heritage. The US company forms part of the wider SIG SAUER group under Germany's L&O Holding, which also owns the German SIG SAUER GmbH & Co. KG.

## Products and solutions

- **XM7 (M7) rifle** - 6.8mm rifle selected for the US Army Next Generation Squad Weapon programme.
- **XM250 automatic rifle** - 6.8mm automatic rifle under the same NGSW programme.
- **XM8 carbine** - shorter NGSW carbine variant of the M7 rifle.
- **6.8 Common Cartridge ammunition** - family of ammunition supplied alongside the NGSW weapons.
- **Electro-optics and suppressors** - sighting systems and sound suppressors for military and law enforcement use.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** prime contractor on the US Army Next Generation Squad Weapon (NGSW) programme.

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - US Army accepted first deliveries of the XM8 carbine, a new variant of the 6.8mm M7 rifle. [source](https://www.nationaldefensemagazine.org/articles/2026/6/11/army-introduces-new-xm8-carbine-for-close-combat-ops)
- **2025-10** - Displayed the Product Improvement Effort (PIE) M7, lightened by about 0.7 lb, at the AUSA Annual Meeting. [source](https://news.clearancejobs.com/2026/03/24/why-the-army-is-developing-a-new-xm8-variant-of-its-m7-rifle/)

companies.name: Silvus Technologies
companies.summary: Developer of high-speed mobile ad-hoc network (MANET) tactical radios and mesh networking technology.
companies.body:
# Silvus Technologies

> Developer of high-speed mobile ad-hoc network (MANET) tactical radios and mesh networking technology.

## What they do

Silvus Technologies develops software-defined MANET radio systems for secure data, video and voice communications without fixed infrastructure. Its proprietary MN-MIMO waveform creates a self-forming, adaptive mesh network able to link hundreds of nodes. Customers span military, law enforcement, public safety, autonomous systems manufacturers and commercial users worldwide. Silvus is a Motorola Solutions company following the 2025 acquisition.

## Products and solutions

- **StreamCaster MANET radios** - family of tactical mesh radios providing high-fidelity video, voice and IP data, used on the ground, in the air and at sea.
- **StreamCaster MINI 5200 (SM5200)** - compact 182-gram 2x2 MIMO MANET radio with up to two watts output power and up to 100 Mbps data throughput.
- **StreamCaster NEXUS** - chest-mounted next-generation tactical networking system for dismounted military operators, built around the SM5200 radio.
- **MN-MIMO waveform** - proprietary waveform underpinning the self-forming mesh network across the product range.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-08** - Silvus launched StreamCaster NEXUS, a tactical networking system for dismounted military operators. [source](https://www.motorolasolutions.com/newsroom/press-releases/silvus-technologies-launches-streamcaster-nexus.html)
- **2025-08-06** - Motorola Solutions completed its acquisition of Silvus Technologies. [source](https://www.motorolasolutions.com/newsroom/press-releases/motorola-solutions-completes-acquisition-of-silvus-technologies.html)
- **2025-05-27** - Motorola Solutions announced an agreement to acquire Silvus Technologies for approximately 4.4 billion US dollars in up-front consideration. [source](https://www.motorolasolutions.com/newsroom/press-releases/motorola-solutions-to-acquire-silvus-technologies.html)

## Links

- Website: https://silvustechnologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/silvus-technologies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Motorola Solutions newsroom press releases, Military Embedded Systems.

# Simthetiq

> Provider of military simulation, 3D models and synthetic training environments.

## What they do

Simthetiq is a Montreal-based provider of 3D solutions for the defence sector, offering visual systems, 3D model libraries, synthetic environments and virtual training. Its synthetic environments are geo-specific or geo-typical and adaptable to training requirements, supplied in standard industry formats. The 3D content is designed as plug-and-play with common simulation software and is compatible with simulation protocols such as DIS and HLA.

## Products and solutions

- **Synthetic terrains** - modular and comprehensive geo-specific and geo-typical terrains for a range of simulation activities.
- **3D model library** - simulation entity models and 3D content for training and simulation, supplied in standard industry formats.
- **Immersive training environments** - geo-specific synthetic environments and immersive classroom solutions for military end users.

## Recent news

- **2022-04-15** - Simthetiq was awarded a multi-year contract from the Canadian Department of National Defence to provide simulation entity models in support of the Canadian Advanced Synthetic Environment (CASE) programme. [source](https://www.simthetiq.com/news/simthetiq-awarded-multi-year-contract-in-support-of-canadian-advanced-synthetic-environment-program-2/)
- Simthetiq delivered an immersive training classroom to the Royal Canadian Navy using the Station IX display environment. [source](https://simthetiq.com/news/simthetiq-delivers-immersive-training-classroom-to-the-royal-canadian-navy/)
- Simthetiq delivered large-scale and immersive geo-specific synthetic training environments for NATO military end users. [source](https://canadiandefencereview.com/simthetiq-delivers-large-scale-synthetic-training-environment-for-nato-military-end-user/)

companies.name: Sintela Limited
companies.summary: Bristol manufacturer of distributed fibre-optic sensing systems for security, perimeter and infrastructure monitoring.
companies.body:
# Sintela

> Bristol manufacturer of distributed fibre-optic sensing systems for security, perimeter and infrastructure monitoring.

## What they do

Sintela designs, manufactures and field-supports distributed fibre-optic sensing (DFOS) systems, with particular expertise in distributed acoustic sensing (DAS). Its ONYX systems turn existing fibre-optic cable into a long-range sensing platform that detects strain, temperature and acoustic changes for security, perimeter intrusion detection and infrastructure monitoring. Applications span pipelines, telecoms and power cables, railways, highways, mining, subsea cables, geophysical monitoring and border surveillance.

## Products and solutions

- **ONYX nano** - short-range DAS interrogator (1 to under 20 km) for small sites.
- **ONYX peta** - standard-range DAS interrogator (around 20 to 75 km per fibre) for medium sites.
- **ONYX peta EX** - long-range DAS interrogator (around 75 to 200 km per fibre) for large sites.
- **Operating System Software (OSS)** - core firmware with REST API, Modbus and SNMP integration.
- **Industry Application Software (IAS)** - bespoke application-specific user interfaces, with AI detection and classification.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ONYX conforms with FCC, CE and RoHS; tested against the Center for Internet Security (CIS) Benchmarks; reliability calculated per Telcordia SR-332.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-01** - Press coverage of a US border security contract with a ceiling increased to $200m, using fibre-optic AI sensing for US Customs and Border Protection. [source](https://businesscircle.co/2026/04/01/uk-firm-sintela-wins-200m-us-border-contract-using-fibre-optic-ai-sensing/)
- **2026-05-15** - Exhibited at the 27th World Mining Congress 2026. [source](https://sintela.com/sintela-at-27th-world-mining-congress-2026/)
- **2026-03-26** - Shortlisted for a 2026 British Business Award in the Growth Strategy of the Year category. [source](https://sintela.com/sintela-shortlisted-for-a-2026-british-business-award/)

## Links

- Website: https://sintela.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sintela

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: company website (sintela.com), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/sintela-ltd-2), Companies House (company 11015440), Business Circle, Western Morning News. SKD Systems, trading as STARK and operating as legal entity SKD SE, is a European defence-technology company specialising in unmanned systems. Founded in 2024 and headquartered in Munich, it launched the OWE-V Virtus electrically powered VTOL loitering munition and the Minerva mission-control suite in early 2025. companies.body:
# Skua Defence

> UK firm building uncrewed air system capability for allied militaries using training and simulation proven on the Ukrainian frontline.

## What they do

Skua Defence is a UK company formed by former Ukrainian and British military officers to help allied and partner forces build uncrewed air system capability. It draws on a network in Ukraine spanning training centres, simulator developers, military units and manufacturers, and applies that frontline experience to instructor development, simulation and training design. The company also advises on protecting sites against drone attack through layered defensive systems and operator training.

## Products and solutions

- **UAS capability development** - instructor-cadre development, realistic simulation and training design intended to translate into operational capability for NATO and aligned militaries.
- **Counter-drone site protection** - risk assessment and layered defensive design to detect, respond to and recover from drone incidents, drawing on operator experience from Ukraine.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

[source](https://www.nextgov.com/defense/2025/12/now-you-can-train-next-drone-war-simulated-ukrainian-front-lines/410279/)

companies.body:
# smartmicro

> Designer and manufacturer of automotive, traffic and defence radar sensors.

## What they do

smartmicro designs, develops and manufactures radar solutions for traffic management, automotive and airborne applications, as well as defence. The company was founded in 1997 as a spin-off from the Technical University of Braunschweig, where it is headquartered, combining development, testing and production on one campus. Its defence offering draws on automotive and traffic radar experience and includes long-range radar and airborne applications, with all development carried out in Germany. smartmicro has subsidiaries in the United Kingdom and the United States.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence radar** - radar-based detection and tracking of small, low-flying and fast-moving objects for drone detection and infrastructure protection.
- **Automotive radar sensors** - high-performance radar sensors for automotive applications.
- **Traffic management radar** - radar sensors for traffic management and intelligent transport systems.
- **Engineering services** - radar engineering services for automotive radar sensors.

## Recent news

- smartmicro promotes its defence radar solutions for drone detection and the protection of critical infrastructure such as energy facilities, airports and military bases, with development carried out in Germany. [source](https://www.smartmicro.com/defense-radar-solutions/)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/smartmicro

# Snubnose Ltd

> Automated compliance evidence collection platform built for the UK defence supply chain, targeting DefStan 05-138 and Defence Cyber Certification requirements.

## What they do

Snubnose provides an automated platform that connects to suppliers' existing tooling (Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune, vulnerability scanners, firewalls and SIEM platforms) to collect, organise and verify security evidence across all 144 DefStan 05-138 controls. As DefStan 05-138 Issue 4 and Defence Cyber Certification move from self-assessment to independently audited compliance, the platform removes the manual evidence-gathering burden for defence supply chain companies.

## Products and solutions

- **Snubnose Platform** - Automated evidence collection and verification across 144 DefStan 05-138 controls, integrating with Microsoft 365 and security tooling.

companies.summary: Value-added electronics group supplying ruggedised components, assemblies and manufactured units to industrial and military markets for use in harsh environments.
companies.body:
# Solid State Plc

> Value-added electronics group supplying ruggedised components, assemblies and manufactured units to industrial and military markets for use in harsh environments.

## What they do

Solid State Plc (AIM: SOLI) operates through two divisions: Steatite Ltd (system design and manufacturing) and Solsta Ltd (technical component distribution, formerly known as Solid State Supplies). The group covers ruggedised computing, power, antennas, tactical and satellite communications, and optoelectronic products, providing design-in support and component sourcing for customers operating in demanding defence, industrial and medical environments. Constituent brands include Custom Power (batteries), Q-Par Antennas, Active Silicon (imaging), Gateway and Durakool (components).

## Products and solutions

- **Steatite Communications** - Tactical and secure communications, including mobile ad-hoc networking (MANET) mesh radios and UHF SATCOM terminals and amplifiers.
- **Steatite Embedded** - Ruggedised computing, single-board computers, systems on modules, and industrial panel and box computers for harsh environments.
- **Custom Power** - Custom rechargeable and single-use lithium battery packs for UAVs, ROVs, and military and medical platforms.
- **Steatite Antennas (Q-Par)** - Microwave and RF antennas and antenna subsystems.
- **Solsta sensor range** - Includes radar sensors and infrared sensing and thermal imaging components for industrial and defence applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (AS9100D/AS9120B variants), ISO 14001, ISO 45001, Cyber Essentials, ERAI
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Midlands Aerospace Alliance

## Recent news

- **2026-05 (FY25/26 results)** - Group revenue up 23.2% to £154.1m for the year to 31 March 2026, with defence and security around 47% of group revenue and an open order book of £106.6m. [Proactive Investors](https://www.proactiveinvestors.co.uk/companies/news/1094633/solid-state-shares-rise-9-as-defence-and-ai-demand-drives-upgrade-hopes-1094633.html)
- **2025-10-30** - Steatite secured an initial US$10.8m UK MOD order to supply MPU5 and Wave Relay tactical radio technology for the British Army's Project CAIN communications programme, with delivery in H1 2026. [Soldier Systems Daily](https://soldiersystems.net/2025/10/31/solid-state-plc-through-steatite-has-secured-an-initial-10-8-million-uk-mod-order-for-project-cain/)
- **2025-09-29** - A £1.65m defence contract funded a new Integrated Systems facility for the group. [Company announcement](https://solidstateplc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/2025-09-26-SOLI-Integrated-Systems-Reach-final.pdf)

## Links

- Website: https://www.solidstateplc.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Company website (solidstateplc.com, solsta.co.uk), Companies House, LSE stock page, Soldier Systems Daily, Proactive Investors, ADS members directory.

Solis Design provides engineering design consultancy services covering aerospace, defence, automotive, motorsport, avionics, and product design. The company delivers in-house mechanical, electrical, and stress engineering, supporting customers from initial concept through to production-ready designs, working across Airbus and Boeing platforms as well as military aircraft, helicopters, military vehicles and naval platforms. The company states it owns and operates a static test facility for structural testing of seating, galleys, stowages and other cabin and defence monuments.

companies.body:
# Sonic Communications (Int) Ltd

> Specialist manufacturer of radio accessories, bodyworn video surveillance equipment, and vehicle technical installation systems for police, military, government, and industrial sectors.

## What they do

Sonic Communications designs and manufactures communications accessories and video surveillance equipment, with over 45 years of service to police, military, government, and industrial customers. The company describes itself as an accessory and integration specialist rather than a radio manufacturer: its products are designed to work with all major radio makes and models and, in its own words, are agnostic to the frequency, modulation, or encryption method used by the connected radio equipment. It also operates as an approved training provider for surveillance and covert equipment use, and maintains a facility in Dubai supporting overseas installation and product support.

## Products and solutions

- **Genesis headset range** - Low-profile, noise-cancelling headsets for helmet and PPE integration.
- **Patrol and Maverick headsets** - Tactical communications headsets for general duty and firearms/rapid-intervention use.
- **Torpedo and Ring PTT** - In-line and covert push-to-talk accessories.
- **Enhanced HIU 3** - Headset interface unit with integral microphone, volume and PTT control.
- **Micro Stealth Wireless Earpiece** - Covert, low-noise wireless earpiece with a custom-fit option.
- **S-TAG (Sonic Tactical Audio Gateway)** - Interconnects radios, satellite PTT terminals and push-to-talk-over-cellular apps with smartphones.
- **Special Vehicle Operations** - Covert and overt vehicle installation of technical communications and surveillance equipment.
- **Bodyworn and mobile video surveillance** - Surveillance systems for operational and covert use, including a partnership with Digital Barriers for live video analytics.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, British APCO (Silver Corporate Member)

## Links

- Website: https://www.sonic-comms.com

## Sources

companies.body:
# Sonovision Ltd

> Technical publications, Integrated Logistic Support, immersive training, and ground support equipment design for aerospace, defence, energy, and marine sectors.

## What they do

Sonovision provides technical documentation, e-learning and computer-based training, Integrated Logistic Support, and immersive design including AR and VR applications, animation, and ground support equipment design and manufacture. They serve customers across aerospace, defence (land, sea, and air), energy, and marine sectors, with offices in Letchworth Garden City and Bristol. The UK operation traces its history to 1987 and is part of the Sonovision Group, itself a subsidiary of the French Ortec Group since December 2022. Sonovision is a signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Technical publications** - Authoring and delivery of technical documentation for complex platforms.
- **ILS** - Integrated Logistic Support services across the equipment lifecycle.
- **E-learning and CBT** - Computer-based training and e-learning development.
- **AR/VR and animation** - Immersive training and visualisation applications.
- **Ground support equipment** - Design and manufacture of GSE for aerospace and defence platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links
