companies.name: Sophrodyne Aerospace Ltd
companies.summary: Aeronautical and computer-science consultancy specialising in aerodynamic modelling and flight simulation across the full Mach range.
companies.body:
# Sophrodyne Aerospace Ltd

> Aeronautical and computer-science consultancy specialising in aerodynamic modelling and flight simulation across the full Mach range.

## What they do

Sophrodyne Aerospace provides aerodynamics and flight mechanics consultancy, building models and simulations for drones, UAVs, and full-size aircraft from subsonic to hypersonic regimes, with a particular specialisation in rotorcraft aerodynamics, performance, interactional effects, flight dynamics, vibration and noise. The company states it also specialises in machine learning and AI, computer vision and human-machine interface work within its computer-science practice. It works on behalf of platform developers and regulators rather than designing its own aircraft or drone platforms, including published work with the UK Civil Aviation Authority on eVTOL and helicopter downwash and outwash safety.

## Products and solutions

- **Vorticity Transport Model (VTM)** - A high-resolution computational model for predicting rotorcraft aerodynamics, including rotor and wing aerodynamic interference.
- **Innovative Aerospace Solutions** - Design validation, model-building and bespoke numerical tools for aerospace clients.
- **Expert Witness Services** - Technical input to legal proceedings involving aerospace matters.
- **Investor Due Diligence** - Technical assessment of aerospace investment targets.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Vertical Flight Society, Royal Aeronautical Society

## Recent news

- **2026-05** - Joint Sophrodyne research with the German Aerospace Centre (DLR) on helicopter outwash measurement presented at the Vertical Flight Society's 82nd Annual Forum. [Company news](https://sophrodyne-aerospace.com/news/)
- **2025-11** - Co-chaired and presented at the Royal Aeronautical Society's 2025 Rotorcraft Conference on Advanced Air Mobility integrated operations. [Company news](https://sophrodyne-aerospace.com/news/)
- **2025-09** - Presented a paper on eVTOL outwash aerodynamics at the 51st European Rotorcraft Forum, Venice. [Company news](https://sophrodyne-aerospace.com/news/)

## Links

- Website: https://sophrodyne-aerospace.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Company website (sophrodyne-aerospace.com), ADS members directory, UK Civil Aviation Authority publications (CAP2576, CAP3075), Companies House.

companies.name: Sopra Steria Ltd
companies.summary: European IT consulting and digital services group with a significant UK defence and aerospace portfolio spanning the full programme lifecycle.
companies.body:
# Sopra Steria Ltd

> European IT consulting and digital services group with a significant UK defence and aerospace portfolio spanning the full programme lifecycle.

## What they do

Sopra Steria is a European technology group offering IT consulting, digital services, and software development across 25 countries, and has worked with the UK Ministry of Defence for over 30 years. In UK defence, the company delivers MJDI, the tri-service inventory management system used by military logisticians; BluejaySecureCollaboration, a SECRET-level collaborative working environment for MOD Strategic Command's Defence Digital organisation; and the Single Living Accommodation Management Information System (SLAMIS) for the Defence Infrastructure Organisation. Subsidiary SSCL delivers payroll, pensions, HR and administrative services for serving personnel and veterans, alongside wider cross-government shared services. In aerospace, the company's Aeroline vertical, including subsidiary CIMPA, covers the lifecycle from engineering through to maintenance, with a multi-year Airbus contract to modernise engineering methods and tools.

## Products and solutions

- **MJDI** - Tri-service inventory management system used across military logistics.
- **BluejaySecureCollaboration** - SECRET-level collaborative working environment for sharing classified information between government, industry and international partners.
- **SLAMIS** - Single Living Accommodation Management Information System covering over 130,000 single living accommodation bedspaces.
- **CIMPA** - Product Lifecycle Management services for aerospace, defence, transport and energy clients.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud 14, Digital Outcomes and Specialists (Programme), Crown Commercial Service Debt Resolution Services
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001, ISO 44001:2017
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK

## Recent news

- **2026-05-29** - Entered exclusive negotiations to acquire the manufacturing engineering business of Daher Industrial Services, strengthening aerospace manufacturing engineering capability. [AviTrader](https://avitrader.com/2026/05/29/sopra-steria-eyes-aerospace-expansion/)
- **2025/2026** - Extended its Red Hat partnership to scale sovereign AI capabilities for defence, public sector and critical infrastructure clients. [ChannelWeb](https://www.channelweb.co.uk/news/2026/sopra-steria-red-hat-partnership)
- **2025-04-24** - SSCL secured a contract extension worth over £300m to continue delivering government business services, including for defence personnel, through to at least 2028. [Businesswire](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250424865926/en/Sopra-Steria-Group-SSCL-secures-%C2%A3300m-plus-contract-extension-to-deliver-critical-government-business-services-for-further-three-years)

## Links

- Website: https://www.soprasteria.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Company website (soprasteria.co.uk), Crown Commercial Service supplier record, ADS members directory, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant business register, company press releases.

companies.name: Sora Aviation
companies.summary: Bristol-based Advanced Air Mobility start-up developing a 30-seat battery electric VTOL aircraft.
companies.body:
# Sora Aviation

> Bristol-based Advanced Air Mobility start-up developing a 30-seat battery electric VTOL aircraft.

## What they do

Sora Aviation is developing the S-1, a 30-seat, fully electric tiltrotor VTOL aircraft with a crew of one pilot and one cabin crew member, designed to make air mobility services affordable and widely accessible. The aircraft has a baseline weight of around 11,000kg and a stated range of up to 86 nautical miles, using distributed electric propulsion. The company's primary market is civil Advanced Air Mobility, with a route-planning and pre-order partnership in South Korea. At the Vertical Flight Society's Forum 82 in May 2026, Sora presented a conceptual hybrid-electric variant of the S-1 for naval heavy-lift applications; this is a study-stage concept, not a confirmed programme or contract. The company is based at Future Space, Filton Road, Bristol.

## Products and solutions

- **S-1** - A 30-seat, crewed, fully electric tiltrotor VTOL aircraft targeting affordable regional air mobility, with first flight of a demonstrator targeted around 2028.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-05-07** - Presented a conceptual hybrid-electric heavy-lift variant of the S-1 for naval applications at the Vertical Flight Society's Forum 82. [Aviation Week](https://aviationweek.com/defense/aircraft-propulsion/sora-eyes-naval-application-hybrid-electric-tiltrotor)
- **2025-07** - Signed a partnership with South Korea's ANH Structure to co-develop S-1 cabin and cockpit interiors. [The Business Desk](https://www.thebusinessdesk.com/south-west/news/25304-sora-aviation-signs-landmark-deal-with-korean-aerospace-giant)
- **2025-06** - Secured £2.1m in UK Aerospace Technology Institute Programme funding for two R&D projects: BatWing (battery pack technology, with the University of Bath) and SoraAero (aerodynamics and aeroacoustics simulation, with the Universities of Bristol and Manchester and Sophrodyne Aerospace). [eVTOL Insights](https://evtolinsights.com/2025/06/sora-aviation-secures-2-1-million-funding-from-aerospace-technology-institute-programme-for-two-rd-projects/)
- **2025-03** - Secured a pre-order for 20 S-1 aircraft from South Korean helicopter operator Moviation. [Revolution.aero](https://www.revolution.aero/news/2025/03/10/sora-aviation-secures-20-aircraft-pre-order-from-koreas-moviation/)

## Links

- Website: https://soraaviation.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-07-03. Company website (soraaviation.com), Aviation Week, FlightGlobal, Companies House, ADS members directory.

companies.body:
# Source Protective Solutions Ltd

> Electronic warfare, surveillance, and counter-drone solutions for military, law enforcement, and critical national infrastructure customers.

## What they do

Source Protective Solutions provides fixed, mobile, and aviation electronic warfare systems covering signals analysis and jamming, alongside surveillance and counter-UAS capabilities. The company states it promotes, delivers, integrates, trains on, and maintains systems sourced from specialist manufacturer partners rather than manufacturing hardware itself. It serves military forces, police agencies, and critical national infrastructure protection customers internationally, and offers capability development and training in signals analysis, jamming, and counter-drone operations alongside its equipment supply.

## Products and solutions

- **Broadband Jammer and Directional Jammer** - Fixed and directional radio-frequency jamming systems.
- **FAST SKY PROTECTION** - Portable, modular anti-UAV system.
- **Spectrum Analyzer** - Spectrum monitoring and analysis system, with an anti-drone variant.
- **Direction Finding System** - Radio direction-finding equipment for signals location.
- **Tactical Communications ISR/Jamming Platform** - Vehicle-based VHF/UHF/SHF system for combined signals collection and jamming.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# SPAICE
> Spatial-AI autonomy software for satellites, aircraft and drones operating in communications- and GNSS-denied environments.
## What they do
SPAICE builds AI autonomy software so platforms can navigate and operate when communications and GPS are degraded or denied. Products target In-Orbit Services using Generative AI and Deep Reinforcement Learning, with proprietary navigation and multitasking tools designed to integrate with existing satellite systems. The team, founded by graduates of Imperial College London, ETH Zurich and Oxford, has assembled a dataset of over one million photorealistic images of orbiting assets for model training. Pilots and endorsements have been reported with Leonardo, Astroscale, ESA and Telespazio.
## Links

# Special Quality Alloys Ltd

> Sheffield-based manufacturer and supplier of forgings, precision rolled rings, and high-specification bar stock in nickel alloys, stainless, and titanium.

## What they do

Special Quality Alloys Ltd manufactures and supplies aerospace and defence-grade forgings, ring-rolled components, and bar stock distribution, specialising in nickel superalloys, duplex stainless, and titanium alloys. Founded in 1986, the company is part of the family-owned Special Steel Group and maintains in-house control of the manufacturing process, supported by group companies for heat treatment, testing, and machining.

## Products and solutions

- **Forgings and precision rolled rings** - hammer forge, ring rolling, and upset forging in nickel alloys (Alloy 718, 625, 725), duplex stainless (F51, F55), 17-4PH, and F6NM.
- **Bar stock distribution** - supply of exotic alloys, superalloys, steel alloys including Inconel, and titanium alloys.
- **CNC machining** - lathe and milling operations to finished or near-net dimensions.

# Spherea UK

> UK arm of the Spherea group, supplying automatic test equipment and in-service support for military, aerospace and space applications.

## What they do

Spherea Test & Services Ltd designs, manufactures, supplies, services, repairs and integrates electronic test equipment and diagnostic solutions, with related software and product development, across the full life cycle of critical applications for military, aerospace, space and other civil markets. It positions itself as a recognised partner to the UK Ministry of Defence, leading primes and international customers, citing more than 50 years of experience delivering test solutions to the UK defence sector. It is the UK entity of the wider Spherea group, headquartered in France.

## Products and solutions

- **ATEC Series 7** - generic-purpose avionic MRO test benches used by airlines, OEMs and MROs to verify conformity of critical avionic electronic equipment.
- **ATEC Dyna Series** - modular, scalable production automatic test equipment for high-throughput avionics manufacturing with parallel multi-unit testing.
- **ATEC ATMOS** - compact, open automatic test bench for electronic equipment with a reduced signal count, covering avionics and mechatronic and optronic applications.
- **U-Test** - software and simulation platform combining models from different environments with real equipment to create a digital twin.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Spherea group acquired Konrad Technologies (US), extending its test and measurement portfolio. [source](https://www.spherea.com/about-us)

## Links

- Website: https://www.spherea.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/spherea-uk

companies.body:
# Spire Global UK Ltd

> Glasgow-based UK entity of a US space-to-cloud data and analytics company operating a constellation of over 100 nanosatellites to deliver earth observation, maritime, aviation, and weather data services.

## What they do

Spire Global operates a large constellation of nanosatellites and a global network of ground stations to track and analyse earth information, maritime vessel movements, aviation traffic, space weather, and terrestrial weather patterns. The UK entity is headquartered in Glasgow and provides space-derived data and analytics for defence, government, and commercial customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Maritime tracking** - global AIS vessel tracking and analytics.
- **Aviation tracking** - global aircraft surveillance and flight data.
- **Weather intelligence** - terrestrial and space weather data and forecasting services.
- **Earth observation and ISR** - satellite-derived surveillance data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.spire.com

companies.name: StanhopeAI
companies.summary: Deep-tech autonomy software company building edge-deployable AI agents based on Active Inference and the Free Energy Principle.
companies.body:
# StanhopeAI
> Deep-tech autonomy software company building edge-deployable AI agents based on Active Inference and the Free Energy Principle.
## What they do
StanhopeAI is a spinout from University College London and King's College London developing autonomy software for systems that must operate in unfamiliar, contested or comms-denied environments without GPS, prior maps or remote operators. The approach uses the Active Inference paradigm rather than LLM-style models, producing smaller, edge-deployable agents that learn and adapt in real time. The company has publicly demonstrated full-size autonomous drone flight. Backed by Frontline Ventures, Paladin Capital Group, Auxxo, UCL Technology Fund and MMC Ventures.
## Links
- Website: https://www.stanhopeai.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/stanhopeai/
## Sources
Public information verified 2026-06-29.

companies.name: STARK Defence
companies.summary: European defence technology company building AI-enabled uncrewed systems and loitering munitions.
companies.body:
# STARK Defence

> European defence technology company building AI-enabled uncrewed systems and loitering munitions.

## What they do

STARK is a European defence technology company specialising in uncrewed systems across multiple domains. It develops and manufactures loitering munitions and the mission software to operate them, and supplies the German Bundeswehr and other NATO states. The company was established in 2024 and has operations across Germany, Ukraine, the United Kingdom, Greece and Sweden.

## Products and solutions

- **OWE-V Virtus** - electrically powered VTOL loitering munition. Public specifications cite a cruise speed of around 120 km/h, a dive speed of up to 250 km/h, a 5 kg warhead and an endurance of around 60 minutes.
- **Minerva** - mission control software suite for precision-strike coordination, including operation in GNSS-denied or data-link-degraded conditions, integration with battle management systems, and coordination of synchronised strike actions.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-23** - STARK confirmed a EUR 500 million Series C round co-led by Sequoia Capital and Founders Fund, with backers including the NATO Innovation Fund, valuing the company above EUR 3.5 billion. [Sifted](https://sifted.eu/articles/stark-defence-drones-funding-round-confirms) [Tech.eu](https://tech.eu/2026/06/23/stark-bags-eur500-million-in-new-funding/)
- **2026** - Germany approved procurement of medium-range loitering munitions from STARK and Helsing. [Army Recognition](https://www.armyrecognition.com/news/aerospace-news/2026/germany-approves-540m-medium-range-loitering-munition-procurement-from-helsing-and-stark-defence-firms)

## Links

- Website: https://stark-defence.com/en
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/stark-defence/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (stark-defence.com), STARK LinkedIn company page, Wikipedia (STARK), Sifted, Tech.eu, Army Recognition.

# Stirling Dynamics Ltd

> Advanced engineering consultancy delivering control systems, simulation and technical services across aerospace and marine, part of the Expleo Group.

## What they do

Stirling Dynamics is an advanced engineering company providing high-end engineering products and services to civil and military aerospace and marine programmes worldwide. It specialises in active control technologies, system monitoring, simulation and modelling, and has worked on over 70 different aircraft types. companies.body:
# STS Defence

> Defence electronics, communications and engineering company specialising in naval and air defence systems, part of the Cicor Group.

## What they do

STS Defence is a UK-based technology and engineering company specialising in mission-critical, secure communications and networks, electronic warfare and control, and instrumentation systems. It operates primarily in the naval and air defence markets, helping customers design, assemble and integrate equipment and systems and support capability through-life. It has been a wholly owned subsidiary of the Swiss-listed Cicor Group since October 2023.

## Products and solutions

- **Ships communications masts** - configurable, integrated main communications masts for naval warships.
- **UHF satellite communications** - delivery and through-life support of mission-critical UHF SatCom systems.
- **Integration and support** - system integration plus Integrated Logistic Support aligned to MoD principles, covering reliability engineering, repairs, spares and obsolescence management.
- **Electronic warfare and instrumentation** - specialist EW support and instrumentation, sensors and control systems for marine and harsh environments.
- **Electronics manufacturing** - fabrication, assembly and testing of consoles, cabinets, box builds, PCBAs and cable harnesses (via Cicor integration).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** JOSCAR registered; SC21 Operational Excellence.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Institute of Obsolescence Management.

- **2025-08** - Selected by Rohde & Schwarz to supply communications masts for the Australian Navy. [source](https://www.portsmouth.co.uk/news/defence/gosport-defence-business-mast-new-warships-australia-5271707)

## Links

companies.name: SubSea Craft
companies.summary: British advanced maritime-technology company designing, testing and manufacturing high-speed surface and sub-surface and uncrewed platforms for special-forces and naval defence customers.
companies.body:
# SubSea Craft

> British advanced maritime-technology company designing, testing and manufacturing high-speed surface and sub-surface and uncrewed platforms for special-forces and naval defence customers.

## What they do

SubSea Craft is a UK specialist maritime-technology manufacturer that designs, tests and builds advanced maritime platforms at pace, working with military partners to equip operators with the latest technology. Its flagship is VICTA, a dual-domain craft that transits at high speed on the surface then submerges to covertly insert and recover divers and payloads. It operates an integrated design, prototype, test and build facility at The Camber in Old Portsmouth.

## Products and solutions

- **VICTA** - flagship diver delivery unit. An optionally-manned carbon-fibre craft that runs at 40-plus knots on the surface then floods ballast tanks to submerge for covert insertion and recovery of divers and payloads in contested environments. Can be helm, umbilical or autonomously operated.
- **MARS (Maritime Autonomy Reconnaissance System)** - a compact, modular, multi-role uncrewed surface vessel for offensive operations, ISR and logistics; low-signature and mission-configurable.
- **CADDIS** - a marinised uncrewed aerial vehicle launchable underwater from a submerged VICTA or by a diver, transitioning to flight to deliver ISR and targeting information.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member; Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-21** - Announced US expansion, selecting Virginia Beach as its US hub. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/05/21/subsea-craft-us-expansion/)
- **2026-05** - MARS USV entered production, with an upgraded variant in advanced testing against a customer contract. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2026/05/subsea-craft-advances-mars-usv-as-production-begins/)
- **2025-01-29** - Appointed the Rt Hon Penny Mordaunt as Chair of the Board. [source](https://subseacraft.com/subsea-craft-announces-penny-mordaunt-as-new-chair-of-the-board/)

## Links

- Website: https://subseacraft.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/subseacraft-limited

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (subseacraft.com), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (08930367), ADS member directory, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register, and reputable defence and maritime press (Naval News, Navy Lookout, Janes, Army Recognition). Incorporated 10 March 2014; the VICTA project began in 2018. No single authoritative public headcount figure was found; third-party figures range from approximately 48 to approximately 200, placing it most likely in the medium band.

# SynMax UK Ltd

> Satellite data analytics company providing maritime domain awareness and energy sector monitoring using commercial satellite imagery.

## What they do

SynMax uses commercial satellite imagery to find and monitor assets and deliver maritime intelligence. The company's Theia platform provides maritime domain awareness, while the Hyperion product monitors oil and gas production activity in near real-time using proprietary satellite data.

## Products and solutions

- **Theia** - comprehensive maritime domain awareness solution using satellite data.

companies.name: Systematic
companies.summary: Developer of defence command and control and battle-management software, including the SitaWare suite.
companies.body:
# Systematic

> Developer of defence command and control and battle-management software, including the SitaWare suite.

## What they do

Systematic, established in 1985 and headquartered in Aarhus, is Denmark's largest privately owned software company, with solutions sold in over 50 countries. It develops software for the public and private sectors, including defence command and control. Its SitaWare suite is combat-proven commercial off-the-shelf software providing C4ISR and battle-management capabilities across land, sea, air and joint domains, with interoperability for coalition operations. SitaWare is used by more than 50 countries, including most NATO nations.

## Products and solutions

- **SitaWare Suite** - C4ISR and battle-management software offering command-and-control across the battlespace and coalition interoperability.
- **SitaWare Headquarters** - command-and-control software for planning and conducting operations; selected by NATO as its standard system for land operations.
- **SitaWare BattleCloud** - cloud-native evolution of the SitaWare Suite, extending capabilities from fixed headquarters to mobile users at the tactical edge.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - The French Army's 3rd Division adopted SitaWare Headquarters C2 software. [source](https://euro-sd.com/2026/01/major-news/48619/french-army-adopts-sitaware-hq/)
- **2025-07-15** - Systematic launched SitaWare BattleCloud, a cloud-native version of the SitaWare Suite. [source](https://systematic.com/us/industries/defense/news-knowledge/news/systematic-introduces-cutting-edge-cloud-enabled-c4isr-enhancements-to-the-acclaimed-sitaware-suite/)
- **2024-04** - NATO selected SitaWare Headquarters as its standard system for planning and conducting land operations. [source](https://euro-sd.com/2024/04/major-news/37625/nato-selects-sitaware-hg/)

## Links

- Website: https://systematic.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/systematic

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website and newsroom, European Security and Defence, Army Technology, The Defense Post.

companies.summary: Luxembourg company building a publicly available information (PAI) and open-source intelligence (OSINT) platform for defence, national security and public safety.
companies.body:
# Tadaweb

> Luxembourg company building a publicly available information (PAI) and open-source intelligence (OSINT) platform for defence, national security and public safety.

## What they do

Tadaweb is a Luxembourg-headquartered software company that builds a PAI and OSINT platform used by defence, national security, public safety, cyber threat intelligence and corporate security organisations. The platform ingests publicly available and commercially available information and integrates with third-party web tools and APIs, combining technology with human analysis under a stated emphasis on transparency and ethics. Its "Small Data" approach is designed to augment analysts rather than replace them, keeping the human in control rather than relying on a black box.

## Products and solutions

- **PAI and OSINT platform** - core SaaS platform that ingests publicly and commercially available information and integrates with third-party web tools and APIs.
- **Small Data approach** - combines precise data points to reduce time to insight while keeping the analyst in control.
- **Low/no-code visual query engine** - visual query capability cited by investors as a differentiator.
- **Maritime Domain Awareness** - capability for national security customers announced for launch in 2026.

## Recent news

- **2025-06-19** - Raised around $20m to scale its Small Data PAI and OSINT platform, in a round led by Arsenal Growth and Forgepoint Capital International with existing investor Wendel. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250619691508/en/Tadaweb-raises-$20-million-to-scale-Small-Data-PAI-and-OSINT-Operating-System)

## Links

- Website: https://www.tadaweb.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/tadaweb/

# Techtest Ltd

> Manufacturer of emergency locator transmitters, personal locator beacons and search and rescue homing systems for civil and military applications, trading as part of the H.R. Smith Group.

## What they do

Techtest manufactures internationally certified Emergency Locator Transmitters (ELTs), Personal Locator Beacons (PLBs) and Automatically Deployable Emergency Locator Transmitters (ADELTs) compatible with the COSPAS-SARSAT rescue system, including GPS-equipped variants. The company also produces search and rescue homing and decoding systems for locating personnel in distress, and test equipment for aircraft antenna systems.

## Products and solutions

- **Emergency Locator Transmitters (ELTs and ADELTs)** - internationally certified, GPS-equipped beacons for COSPAS-SARSAT.
- **Personal Locator Beacons (PLBs)** - civil and military personal distress beacons.
- **SAR homing and decoding systems** - equipment for locating personnel in distress for civil and military SAR operations.
- **Aircraft antenna test equipment** - specialist test sets for aircraft antenna systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

TEK Military Seating designs and manufactures OEM vehicle seating for military applications, covering driver, commander, gunner, turret, loader and crew positions across a range of suspension, pedestal, sledge, runner, riser and plinth configurations. The company's blast attenuation seating is adjustable and reusable, and the product range extends to blast floor matting and universal vehicle stowage.

## Products and solutions

- **ProTEK® military vehicle seating** - modular crew seating system covering most military vehicle types, both legacy and new build.
- **Blast attenuation seating** - adjustable and reusable blast-protective seats for armoured vehicle occupants.
- **Blast floor matting and vehicle stowage** - complementary protection and storage solutions for platform interiors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ITAR Approval, UKAS, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001:2022, ISO/TS 16949, Cyber Essentials Plus

# Teledyne Defence & Space

> UK manufacturer of RF and microwave components, sub-systems and systems for defence, space, electronic warfare, radar and communications.

## What they do

Teledyne Defence & Space (TDS) designs, develops and manufactures complex integrated RF and microwave solutions from its site in Shipley, West Yorkshire. It is a business unit of Teledyne Microwave Solutions and part of the US-listed Teledyne group. TDS supports defence, space, security, electronic warfare, radar and communications customers, and describes itself as a supplier of ITAR-free and ITAR-compliant microwave products with over 40 years of heritage, tracing its origins to Filtronic Components Ltd.

## Products and solutions

- **Radar Warning Receivers (RWR)** - threat-warning receiver systems.
- **ELINT and ESM receivers** - electronic intelligence and electronic support measures receivers, including the Phobos radar ESM system offering 360 degree passive detection.
- **Multi-function assemblies** - DIFM, DLVA, channelisers, converters, synthesisers and switch multiplexers.
- **Filters and components** - bandpass, suspended substrate stripline, tunable, combline filters and multiplexers.

companies.body:
# Telent

> Technology company designing, building and maintaining critical network and communications infrastructure across UK and Ireland defence and public sector.

## What they do

Telent is a UK and Ireland technology company specialising in the design, build, operation and maintenance of critical digital and communications infrastructure. It draws on decades of experience in mission-critical communications and operational technology across transport, emergency services, network providers, defence, utilities and the public sector. Its stated purpose is keeping national infrastructure connected, resilient and secure. The Telent business was formed in 2006 from the residual UK services business of Marconi, with the underlying legal entity tracing to 1961.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence** - secure communications and digital infrastructure for the armed forces.
- **Rail** - rail and metro communications and control systems, including Network Rail's nationwide SCADA programme.
- **Public safety** - emergency services communications and logistics for coastguard, ambulance, fire and police customers.
- **Traffic** - intelligent traffic systems delivered with National Highways.
- **Service providers** - network build and support for telecoms operators, including full-fibre delivery.
- **Enterprise and public sector** - managed network and IT services, cyber security, and integrated warehouse logistics systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; techUK (Communications Infrastructure, Central Government, and Justice and Emergency Services groups).

## Recent news

- **2026-01-14** - Won a contract to operate and improve the RAF's SCIDA service across 244 military sites, with delivery from April 2026. [source](https://www.intelligentciso.com/2026/01/14/telent-lands-strategic-contract-to-support-the-rafs-increasing-demand-for-digital-capability/)
- **2025-08** - Acquisition by M Group Services completed following regulatory approval. [source](https://mgroupltd.com/news-insights/m-group-successfully-completes-telent-acquisition/)

## Links

- Website: https://telent.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/telent

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (telent.com), Companies House (00703317), ADS Group member directory, techUK, M Group Services, Intelligent CISO, Wikipedia. Owned since August 2025 by M Group Services, itself backed by CVC Capital Partners, hence backed-pe. Registered office is now Stevenage; operational HQ remains Warwick, recorded here.

Telesoft designs high-performance data communications technologies and systems that let communications service providers, network security organisations and large enterprises monitor, analyse and protect their networks. It runs a UK sovereign Security Operations Centre staffed by SC-cleared analysts and serves service providers, telecoms, government and enterprise customers.

companies.name: Terminal Autonomy
companies.summary: Designer and mass-producer of low-cost AI-guided long-range strike and loitering munitions, combat-deployed in Ukraine; founded by British and Australian military veterans and a Ukrainian engineer.
companies.body:
# Terminal Autonomy

> Designer and mass-producer of low-cost AI-guided long-range strike and loitering munitions, combat-deployed in Ukraine; founded by British and Australian military veterans and a Ukrainian engineer.

> Foreign-HQ. Headquartered and manufacturing in Kyiv, Ukraine. Founded by British and Australian military veterans, so it carries a UK founder link, but no UK-registered entity or UK office was confirmed from public sources. Formerly named One Way Aerospace; this is a different company from Flyby Technology (see Sources).

## What they do

Terminal Autonomy builds combat-tested autonomous one-way attack drones and loitering munitions with proprietary AI navigation and targeting optimised for GPS-denied and comms-denied environments, produced at scale for frontline use. The company markets ITAR-free systems and operates a production facility in Kyiv. It was founded in 2022 as One Way Aerospace and rebranded to Terminal Autonomy in late 2023.

## Products and solutions

- **AQ-400 Scythe** - long-range one-way attack drone and loitering munition with a substantial warhead payload and extended range, designed for precision strike at distance.
- **AQ-100 Bayonet** - compact loitering munition for GPS-denied and high-jamming environments, with AI terminal guidance and swarming.
- **AQV-120 Scalpel** - modular unmanned system for precision attack and surveillance.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-24** - Terminal Autonomy Ukraine signed international cooperation agreements, reported at significant scale, on the fourth anniversary of the invasion. [source](https://oboronka.mezha.ua/en/chotiri-ukrajinski-kompaniji-domovilisya-pro-mizhnarodne-partnerstvo-308904/)
- **2023-12-16** - Launched mass production of the AQ-400 Scythe, with the first batch delivered to Ukrainian forces. [source](https://www.armyrecognition.com/archives/archives-land-defense/land-defense-2023/ukrainian-company-terminal-autonomy-launches-mass-production-of-long-range-aq-400-scythe-kamikaze-drones)

## Links

- Website: https://terminalautonomy.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/terminalautonomy

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (terminalautonomy.com), LinkedIn company page, Ukrainian company records, Wikipedia, and reputable defence press (Army Recognition).

Important correction to the source brief: Terminal Autonomy was formerly named One Way Aerospace, not Flyby. It is a Ukraine-headquartered company with British and Australian co-founders, not a UK-HQ business. Flyby Technology Limited (Companies House 12797144, maker of the Jackal UAV, expanding to a Swindon manufacturing hub) is a separate, still-active UK company that shares founder links with the One Way Aerospace / Terminal Autonomy ecosystem but has not rebranded to Terminal Autonomy. If the intended directory entry was the UK loitering-munition and UAS company, that is Flyby Technology; this entry covers Terminal Autonomy as the public record describes it. No single authoritative public headcount figure was found; size band is an estimate from reported production scale.

companies.body:
# Thales S.A.

> French aerospace, defence and security prime and the European leader in defence electronics, with a large UK arm.

## What they do

Thales is a French multinational specialising in advanced technologies for the defence, aerospace, and cyber and digital sectors, and is the European leader in defence electronics. Headquartered in the La Defense business district of Paris, it is listed on Euronext Paris under ticker HO. Thales UK has operated in Britain for over 140 years, supporting customers across defence, cyber security, digital identity and space, with its registered office at Green Park, Reading, and major manufacturing at Belfast, Glasgow, Crawley and Templecombe.

## Products and solutions

- **Missiles and air defence** - the Lightweight Multirole Missile (LMM) and Starstreak, designed and manufactured at Belfast; mounted and short-range air defence systems.
- **Naval systems** - sonar, mine countermeasures and unmanned maritime systems for the Royal Navy.
- **Communications and networks** - secure tactical and strategic military communications.
- **Cyber and digital identity** - cyber security, secure data and digital identity solutions.
- **Optronics and sensors** - radars, electro-optic sensors and surveillance systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member (Thales UK).

## Recent news

- **2026-03-20** - Signed a contract with the UK MoD, valued at an estimated 48 million pounds, for the Mounted Short Range Air Defence (MSHORAD) Assessment Phase, running to December 2028. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/03/20/thales-mobile-air-defense/)
- **2026-02** - The UK MoD signed contracts worth 36 million pounds for hundreds more Lightweight Multirole Missiles, supporting around 700 jobs at Thales in Belfast. [source](https://www.army-technology.com/news/uk-mod-thales-missiles-contracts/)
- **2026** - Secured an initial 10 million pound contract, with scope to grow to up to 100 million pounds, to deliver next-generation mine countermeasures for the Royal Navy. [source](https://www.thalesgroup.com/en/news-centre/press-releases/thales-secures-major-contract-transform-royal-navy-mine-countermeasures)

## Links

- Website: https://www.thalesgroup.com/en
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/thales

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (thalesgroup.com), LinkedIn company page, The Defense Post, Army Technology, ADS Advance, Thales news centre. Companies House (Thales UK Limited, company number 00868273; registered office 350 Longwater Avenue, Green Park, Reading, Berkshire RG2 6GF). Global HQ Paris (La Defense), France; Thales Group formed in 2000 (renamed from Thomson-CSF); Euronext Paris ticker HO. Global headcount approximately 83,000 per public figures.

> Aerospace systems consultancy and ISO 17025-accredited test facility specialising in Engine Build Up integration, certification support, and structural testing.

## What they do

The Nacelle Group comprises Nacelle Systems Consultancy (NSC) and Resonate Testing. NSC specialises in systems design and integration, stress analysis, and technical validation including FAR 25/CS25 airworthiness certification support. Resonate Testing provides an in-house ISO 17025 accredited test facility that integrates directly with NSC's qualification and certification work.

## Products and solutions

- **Systems and EBU Integration** - Engine Build Up (EBU) systems design, integration, and airworthiness certification support to FAR 25/CS25.
- **Structural and Environmental Testing** - ISO 17025 accredited test facility covering fire protection, environmental, and calibration/test-rig services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Theta Technologies Ltd

> Exeter-based specialist in nonlinear acoustic non-destructive testing (NDT) of high-technology and safety-critical components for aerospace and defence manufacturing.

## What they do

Theta Technologies develops and supplies non-destructive test equipment and testing services using nonlinear acoustic methods to detect subsurface cracks and closed defects that conventional NDT often misses. Its systems are designed for safety-critical component manufacturing where material type, surface finish or geometry limits the effectiveness of standard techniques.

## Products and solutions

- **Nonlinear Acoustic NDT Equipment** - Test systems for detecting subsurface and closed defects in high-technology components.
- **NDT Testing Services** - Contract testing for aerospace and defence manufacturers requiring sensitivity beyond conventional methods.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.summary: UK AI safety and grey-web intelligence platform operator serving defence, law enforcement and national security customers.
companies.body:
# THINKPOL
> UK AI safety and grey-web intelligence platform operator serving defence, law enforcement and national security customers.
## What they do
THINKPOL operates two adjacent platforms under the same brand. The enterprise AI safety platform at thinkpol.ai gives organisations real-time monitoring, incident tracking and response workflows around generative AI usage. The grey-web intelligence platform at think-pol.com indexes over 30 billion public posts, including deleted content, at sub-300ms latency, targeting law enforcement and national security teams. The platform is EU-hosted, GDPR-native, covers Russian, Chinese and Arabic ecosystems natively, and exposes capability via a Model Context Protocol interface for agentic integration.
## Products and solutions
- **THINKPOL AI Safety Platform** - enterprise monitoring and response for generative AI interaction incidents.
- **Grey-web intelligence platform** - OSINT search across 30bn+ public posts with cross-platform correlation and linguistic fingerprinting.
## Links
- Website: https://thinkpol.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/thinkpol/

companies.name: Tiberius Aerospace
companies.summary: Defence technology company developing the Sceptre extended-range precision-guided 155mm ramjet artillery munition, with the UK MoD as launch customer.
companies.body:
# Tiberius Aerospace

> Defence technology company developing the Sceptre extended-range precision-guided 155mm ramjet artillery munition, with the UK MoD as launch customer.

## What they do

Tiberius Aerospace develops next-generation precision weapons, missile systems, autonomous platforms and AI-enabled defence capabilities for the UK, US and allied nations, applying commercial technology to defence problems. Its lead programme is Sceptre, a 155mm ramjet artillery round designed for extended range and high precision. The company emerged from stealth at Future Artillery in May 2025. It operates a UK registered company (Tiberius Aerospace Limited) parented to the US-incorporated Tiberius Aerospace, Inc., with the UK MoD as the named launch customer; tagged owned-foreign on that basis.

## Products and solutions

- **Sceptre (TRBM 155HG)** - extended-range precision-guided 155mm ramjet artillery munition. Publicly stated to reach speeds around Mach 3.5, altitudes above 65,000 feet and ranges up to 150km depending on payload, compatible with NATO-standard 155mm systems. Uses a liquid-fuelled multi-fuel ramjet (diesel, JP-4, JP-8) and is stated to deliver a circular error probability under 5m, including in GPS-contested conditions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member.

## Recent news

- **2025-09-08** - Secured a UK MoD contract to support rapid trials and development of the Sceptre ramjet artillery munition, with the UK MoD as launch customer. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/09/08/tiberius-aerospace-artillery-munition/)
- **2025-05** - Emerged from stealth at Future Artillery with the launch of Sceptre. [source](https://www.tiberius.com/press/newly-revealed-defence-company-tiberius-aerospace-launches-sceptre-a-revolutionary-new-ramjet-155mm-munition)

## Links

- Website: https://www.tiberius.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/tiberius-aerospace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (tiberius.com), Companies House (Tiberius Aerospace Limited, number 16107264, 21 Holborn Viaduct, London EC1A 2DY, incorporated 28 November 2024), ADS Group member listing, The Defense Post, EDR Magazine, UK Defence Journal.

companies.body:
# TISICS Ltd

> Advanced metal composite manufacturer producing lightweight structural components for aerospace and spacecraft programmes.

## What they do

TISICS develops and manufactures titanium and aluminium composite components using net-shape manufacturing technologies, targeting aircraft and spacecraft structures. Their materials outperform high-strength steel and titanium at significantly lower weight, with applications in landing gear, structural components, engine parts, pressure vessels, propellant tanks and spacecraft structures.

## Products and solutions

- **Titanium composite** - Stronger and stiffer than high-strength steel, used in landing gear and structural airframe components.
- **Aluminium composite** - Exceeds the strength and stiffness of titanium at 40% lower density, used in engine and spacecraft applications.
- **Pressure vessels and propellant tanks** - Net-shape composite structures for spacecraft and satellite programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# tlmNexus Ltd

> Defence and security software house specialising in through-life equipment management, airworthiness and asset management.

## What they do

tlmNexus designs and operates digital representations of complex, high-value defence and security equipment, enabling maintenance and operational management decisions based on accurate, real-time data. The company solves through-life acquisition and support management issues for the defence sector, combining expertise-led consultancy with software development. It has supported the UK MOD Typhoon platform since 2007 and its airworthiness software is used across the majority of the UK's military registered aircraft, including fixed-wing, rotary-wing and uncrewed air systems.

## Products and solutions

- **Resolve** - secure airworthiness and issue management application used to track and manage airworthiness-related issues across UK military registered aircraft.
- **Derive** - requirements management.
- **Approve and Foresight** - financial planning and budgeting.
- **DaRT** - Damage and Repair Tracker.
- **Observe** - post-mission data capture.
- **Evidence Document Builder (EDB)** - structured evidence assembly.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service supplier, including G-Cloud and Digital Outcomes; JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus. Armed Forces Covenant Employer Recognition Scheme Silver Award.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK, Royal Aeronautical Society, Team Defence Information.

## Recent news

## Links

companies.summary: UK sovereign, veteran-owned manufacturer of unmanned aerial and ground systems for military and government, known for the nano Bug drone.
companies.body:
# UAVTEK

> UK sovereign, veteran-owned manufacturer of unmanned aerial and ground systems for military and government, known for the nano Bug drone.

## What they do

UAVTEK designs and manufactures unmanned aerial and ground systems for military and government users, from nano-drones to fixed-wing VTOL aircraft. The company describes itself as a UK sovereign, veteran-owned manufacturer and positions itself as airframe-agnostic, using a single ground controller and a common operating system across its fleet to cut training time. Its systems use a proprietary AES-256 encrypted radio for electronic warfare resistance. The registered office is in Gloucestershire (the company's brief noted Bicester; public records place the HQ in Cheltenham/Aldsworth, so the real HQ is recorded here).

## Products and solutions

- **Bug nano drone** - nano UAV developed in collaboration with BAE Systems, weighing around 196g, with a stated 40-minute battery life, 2km range and a maximum speed of about 80km/h. Selected by the UK MoD to support the UK armed forces in 2020.
- **Unmanned aerial and ground systems** - a range of UAS and UGV platforms operated through a single controller and common operating system across the fleet.

## Recent news

- **2020-12** - Unveiled the nano Bug drone developed in collaboration with BAE Systems. [source](https://www.baesystems.com/en-uk/article/collaborating-with-uavtek-to-develop----to-develop-non--bug--drone-)

## Links

- Website: https://www.uavtek.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/uavtek

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (uavtek.com), UAVTEK LinkedIn company page, Companies House (UAVTEK Limited, number 10445956, registered office Harvest Barn Farm, Aldsworth, Cheltenham GL54 3QR), BAE Systems, Army Technology.

> Electronic warfare, cyber and communications division of the Ultra group, delivering tactical comms, cryptographic equipment and EW capabilities to UK MoD, US DoD and Five Eyes customers.
## What they do
Ultra Intelligence and Communications (Ultra I&C) designs and delivers tactical communications, encryption and cryptographic equipment, command and control systems, electronic warfare effects, and cyber capabilities. The division serves UK MoD, US DoD and Five Eyes and allied customers across sites including Greenford, Fleet, Havant and Cheltenham. Ultra Cyber UK is a sub-division focused on the UK cyber portfolio. The wider Ultra group was taken private in 2022 by Cobham, itself owned by Advent International, and subsequently restructured into divisional businesses.

- **Cryptographic and high-grade encryption products** - Certified cryptographic hardware.

companies.summary: Undersea warfare specialist supplying sonar, sonobuoys, countermeasures and anti-submarine warfare systems to allied navies. Part of the Cobham Ultra group.
companies.body:
# Ultra Maritime

> Undersea warfare specialist supplying sonar, sonobuoys, countermeasures and anti-submarine warfare systems to allied navies. Part of the Cobham Ultra group.

## What they do

Ultra Maritime is a defence technology business supplying advanced sonar and maritime systems for anti-submarine warfare from the air, surface and undersea. Its products include sonobuoys, countermeasures, towed arrays and transducers used by navies across NATO and allied nations. The business is part of the Cobham Ultra group, owned by private equity firm Advent International following the 2022 acquisition of Ultra Electronics; tagged backed-pe on that basis. It operates an integrated design and manufacturing centre in Greenford, west London, alongside operations across the Five Eyes nations.

## Products and solutions

- **Sonobuoys** - air-deployed acoustic sensors for submarine detection, including next-generation multistatic active receive variants.
- **Anti-submarine warfare sonar** - towed arrays, transducers and sonar processing for surface, air and undersea ASW.
- **Torpedo defence and countermeasures** - systems to protect naval platforms against torpedoes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Ownership:** part of Cobham Ultra, owned by Advent International (Ultra Electronics acquired 2022).

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Officially opened a new integrated design and manufacturing centre in Greenford, west London, backed by around £20 million of investment. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2026/01/ultra-maritime-looks-to-grow-uk-sonobuoy-production/)
- **2025-02** - Announced an £18 million UK MoD contract to supply sonobuoys for the Royal Navy's Merlin maritime patrol helicopter. [source](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/ultra-maritime-receives-18-million-contract-for-sonobuoys-from-the-uk-ministry-of-defence-302378405.html)

Universal Defence and Security Solutions (UDSS) is a UK defence and security consultancy providing strategy, operational advice, major-project support and delivery to governments, armed forces, technology companies and private industry. It reports a network of more than 700 specialists, including former UK military personnel across the land, sea, air, cyber and space domains. companies.body:
# Urban Hawk Data Intelligence Limited

> Bristol spatial-computing firm building real-time simulation and digital twins for defence and other sectors through its Polaron engine.

## What they do

Urban Hawk Data Intelligence is a UK spatial-computing company that turns space, aerial and ground scan data into simulation-ready digital twins. Its proprietary Polaron engine hybridises diverse data sets to simulate and analyse scenarios, risk, mitigation and causation, running in real time at the edge or via the cloud. The company positions itself as an industrial research and development firm in simulation, AI and optimisation, shaping prototypes and validating them through field trials, with applications including defence.

## Products and solutions

- **Polaron World Engine** - a real-time simulation and analytics engine creating digital twins for situational awareness, capable of testing large numbers of agents across an environment to understand flows, congestion and resilience, with applications spanning routing, logistics, evacuation and crowd movement.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- None confirmed publicly at the time of verification.

- No dated public news item confirmed within the last 12 months at the time of verification.

UTAC Millbrook provides automotive engineering advice and testing services to the UK Ministry of Defence and defence industry clients worldwide, with expertise spanning military vehicle experimentation, trials, and certification. # Vannevar Labs, Inc.

> US defence-technology company building AI software for national security and intelligence missions.

## What they do

Vannevar Labs is an American defence-technology company founded in 2019 and headquartered in Palo Alto, California. It builds AI and software products for national security and intelligence missions, including non-traditional intelligence collection, maritime awareness and countering foreign influence. It is privately held and venture-backed.

companies.body:
# Vessel Arrest Systems

> UK manufacturer of less-than-lethal vessel-stopping and waterside security systems for coastguards, customs and military users.

## What they do

Vessel Arrest Systems is a UK company that designs, manufactures and supplies less-than-lethal vessel-stopping and maritime security products, with associated training and support. The company traces its origin to a UK Government Home Office project, deploying its first system in 2003, with further development under Home Office guidance. Its products are used by coastguards, customs authorities and military organisations to protect assets and waterside zones from unauthorised or threatening vessels.

## Products and solutions

- **Vessel Arrest Boom** - a maritime security barrier that entangles a vessel's propellers to bring it to a controlled stop and demarcates a water-based security zone.
- **Vessel Arrest Fence** - surface and sub-surface protection providing static and smart-detection capability.
- **Vessel Arrest Launcher** - an aluminium and stainless-steel launcher using compressed air to deploy an entanglement device or rescue equipment without flash, heat or noise.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- No dated public news item confirmed within the last 12 months at the time of verification.

companies.body:
# Viasat, Inc.

> US satellite and tactical communications company supplying secure networking and SATCOM to military and commercial markets.

## What they do

Viasat is an American communications company headquartered in Carlsbad, California, founded in 1986. It provides high-speed satellite broadband, secure networking and tactical communications systems across military and commercial markets, with decades of experience in multi-orbit, multi-network satellite connectivity. It is listed on Nasdaq under ticker VSAT. UK operations run through Viasat UK Limited, based in Aldershot.

## Products and solutions

- **Government and defence SATCOM** - protected and anti-jam military satellite communications, including work under the Protected Tactical SATCOM-Global programme.
- **Tactical data links and networking** - secure tactical data, information assurance and battlefield networking for armed forces.
- **Cybersecurity and information assurance** - encryption, secure networking and key management products.
- **Satellite systems** - design, build and operation of geosynchronous satellites and supporting ground systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member (Viasat UK).

## Recent news

- **2026-06-16** - Awarded a US Space Force prime contract under the Protected Tactical SATCOM-Global programme to build, launch and operate satellites; the Viasat and Intelsat "Swarm 1" awards were collectively worth around 437.7 million dollars. [source](https://breakingdefense.com/2026/06/space-force-contracts-viasat-intelsat-for-first-of-new-anti-jam-communication-sats/)

## Links

companies.body:
# Vizgard

> London AI software company building computer-vision tools for detection, classification and tracking in surveillance, drone and counter-drone systems.

## What they do

Vizgard is a London-based SME providing an AI software toolkit that automates detection, classification and tracking for surveillance, drone and counter-drone systems. Its FortifAI platform is a distributed visual AI system that integrates with existing camera infrastructure and uses low-power commercial edge processors to deliver real-time threat detection and autonomous camera control. The company works with the MOD, the Home Office and defence primes.

## Products and solutions

- **FortifAI** - visual autonomy software providing real-time detection, classification and tracking for PTZ cameras, drones and unmanned platforms. Detects and classifies people, vehicles, boats, drones, birds, aircraft and helicopters, with a counter-UAS detect, track and classify capability.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Customers and programmes:** Work for the UK MOD, Home Office and HMGCC Co-Creation; FortifAI deployed on the Royal Navy's Extra-Large Unmanned Underwater Vessel; Home Office contract for a portable knife-detection solution.

## Recent news

- **2025-01-22** - Closed an oversubscribed £1.5 million seed round led by Sure Valley Ventures, with Midwich Ignite and Focal, to scale FortifAI. [source](https://www.uktechnews.info/2025/01/22/vizgard-secures-1-5-million-seed-investment-led-by-sure-valley-ventures/)

# VRAI
> Dublin-based defence simulation company. The HEAT platform delivers VR training with biometric and cognitive load data capture for military crews in high-risk environments.
## What they do
VRAI Simulation develops data-driven VR training for high-risk defence environments. Founded by an Irish Army veteran and a technology entrepreneur, the company captures human performance data including heart rate, eye movement, control inputs, communications and cognitive load during simulated training. Customers include Rheinmetall and the Irish Defence Forces, where armoured crews train weekly using Varjo XR headsets with integrated biometric sensors. A EUR 5 million funding round was secured in early 2025.

- **HEAT (Hazardous Environment Awareness Trainer)** - VR training platform with integrated human performance and physiological data capture.

companies.body:
# Vysiion
> Secure communications and network infrastructure integrator serving defence, government and critical national infrastructure, with SC and DV-cleared engineering teams; part of the Exponential-e Group.
## What they do
Vysiion delivers secure communications, network infrastructure and systems integration for defence, government, critical national infrastructure and regulated environments. Capabilities span secure WAN/LAN and SD-WAN networks, unified communications, resilient voice and radio systems, SCADA and operational technology communications, CCTV, access control, control room AV, and secure collaboration environments. The company provides end-to-end design, installation, commissioning and 24/7 support through SC and DV-cleared engineering teams. Part of the Exponential-e Group.
## Products and solutions
- **Secure WAN/LAN and SD-WAN** - Assured network infrastructure for defence and government.
- **Unified communications and resilient voice** - Including radio systems for operational environments.
- **SCADA and OT communications** - Secure connectivity for critical national infrastructure.
## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 27001

Whitespace, legal entity Whitespace Global Limited, is a UK technology company building Collective, an AI operating system designed for regulated environments. # WholeShip
> Cornwall-based UAS test and evaluation company operating the National Drone Hub at Predannack Airfield, the UK's first CAA-accredited drone test and evaluation site.

## What they do

WholeShip Ltd is a UK company specialising in the development and testing of uncrewed aerial systems and associated technologies. It operates the National Drone Hub at Predannack Airfield in partnership with the Royal Navy and the Cornwall Space Cluster, providing facilities, expertise and access to segregated MoD airspace for rapid drone capability development. Under its operatorship the hub became the UK's first CAA-accredited drone test and evaluation site.

## Products and solutions

- **National Drone Hub** - UAS test and evaluation facility at Predannack Airfield with access to segregated MoD airspace, bringing together industry, academia, government and regulators in a single sandbox environment.

# X-Net (Services) Ltd
> Dorset technical and business services company providing 5G, IoT, cyber ranges and hosting to defence, national security and law enforcement, and operator of the D3iP arm at Dorset Innovation Park.

## What they do

X-Net (Services) Ltd, formerly Kimcell Ltd, provides technical and business services across consulting, engineering, exploitation and hosting. It serves two customer bases: defence, national security and law enforcement through its Dorset Innovation Park operation; and public and private sector internet-services customers through its web, CRM and hosting brands. Headline capabilities include 5G, IoT, cyber ranges and virtualisation platforms. It operates the D3iP identity at Dorset Innovation Park, the defence-innovation arm that co-runs the contractor-facing side of the Defence BattleLab.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber ranges and virtualisation platforms** - for defence, national security and law enforcement customers.
- **D3iP** - Dorset Innovation Park defence-innovation operation co-running Defence BattleLab partner onboarding.

companies.summary: Somerset defence software house and UK and European market leader in ATAK plugin development, building tactical edge software and systems integration for situational awareness.
companies.body:
# Xi Systems
> Somerset defence software house and UK and European market leader in ATAK plugin development, building tactical edge software and systems integration for situational awareness.

## What they do

Xi Systems specialises in tactical software development, ATAK plugin development and systems integration for situational awareness in the defence and security markets. Founded in 2010 in Somerton, Somerset, it has worked with ATAK since 2014 and is recognised as a UK and European market leader in ATAK integration. Its edge software spans MANET, HF and SATCOM radio networks using open architectures such as DDS, gRPC and MAVLink.

## Products and solutions

- **Tactical software** - edge software for MANET, HF and SATCOM radio networks across battery monitoring, fire control, quadrupeds, BVLOS UAVs and manned aircraft.
- **ATAK plugin development** - plugins for Bluetooth, UAVs, video cameras, aircraft systems and radio remote control.
- **Systems integration** - combining UAS, MANET communications and machine-speed decision making for situational awareness.

## Links

- Website: https://www.xisystems.co.uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-30.

companies.body:
# Xiphos Partners
> US defence-technology company combining synthetic training simulation and sustainment analytics, with the accredited JTAC Virtual Trainer joint-fires simulator.

## What they do

Xiphos Partners is a US-based defence technology and services company combining sustainment, advanced training and synthetic simulation across aerospace, defence and energy, with an emphasis on joint fires, special operations and aviation training. Its flagship JTAC Virtual Trainer is a fully accredited joint-fires simulator, deployable as a single-station VR/XR system or a 2D laptop mode, scaling for collective training and integrating with fielded systems. A separate sustainment line provides predictive analytics and lifecycle management to lift readiness. Customers include the US Office of Naval Research and other DoD users.

## Products and solutions

- **JTAC Virtual Trainer (JVT)** - accredited joint-fires simulator in VR/XR or 2D laptop modes.
- **Sustainment analytics** - predictive analytics and lifecycle management for readiness.

## Links

Xona Space Systems is building a low Earth orbit satellite navigation constellation called PULSAR, designed to deliver precise and protected positioning, navigation and timing (PNT) services. ## What they do

Zelim develops the ZOE (ZELIM Optical Enhancement) software platform, an intelligent detection, classification and tracking solution designed for maritime security operations. ZOE enables real-time detection of vessels, people and other objects that are frequently missed by traditional maritime surveillance systems such as radar or human watchkeepers, using a proprietary dataset of labelled imagery that can be customised to end-user requirements.

companies.body:
# Zenotech Ltd

> Computational fluid dynamics and cloud HPC software developer serving aerospace, defence and other engineering markets.

## What they do

Zenotech develops cloud high-performance computing (HPC) and computational fluid dynamics (CFD) software, helping organisations run faster, more accurate and more cost-effective simulation. It serves aerospace, automotive, built environment, defence, renewables and transport, with HPC resources at the Bristol and Bath Science Park. Its CFD tools are tailored to transonic aircraft, both civil and defence, and to low-speed platforms, and it provides aerodynamic design analysis and drone flight-control validation services.

## Products and solutions

- **zCFD** - GPU-accelerated high-performance CFD solver, designed to be scalable and cost-effective.
- **HiPer CFD** - scale-resolving CFD simulation product for modern GPU hardware.
- **Drone aerodynamics and flight control validation** - high-fidelity CFD analysis for drone developers and operators.
- **AirSight** - service to support safer drone and unmanned air vehicle operations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01-13** - Supported drone developer ESOX with aerodynamic analysis for a platform shown at CES. [source](https://zenotech.com/news/from-simulation-to-ces-zenotech-supports-esox-to-develop-a-cutting-edge-drone/)

# ZZAG AI

> Human-centric AI company applying narrative intelligence and qualitative AI assessment to government and defence applications.

## What they do

ZZAG AI (trading as Zig Zag Technology) develops human-centric AI tools that extract insights from narrative and qualitative data, with applications in counter-disinformation, AI ethics assessment, and decision support for government and defence. The company's approach combines natural language processing with qualitative research methodology to assess AI systems for human-centricity, bias, and suitability for specific operational contexts.

## Products and solutions

- **Narrative intelligence** - NLP-based analysis of text data to surface patterns in how people and groups describe themselves and others, with applications in counter-influence and threat assessment.
- **Qualitative AI assessment** - Model card and adversarial testing frameworks to evaluate AI applications against human-centricity, reliability, and bias criteria, applied in MOD and government AI programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group
